那波浪正因轻抚而欢悦、因敲击而昂扬。于是你看见金色音符盘旋升起，喧嚣又美丽。
Within those waves, joy resides, carried by each stroke that sends golden notes soaring, resounding with beauty.
那音符引领你继续攀援而上。你终于得见舞台的全貌——
These notes guide your ascent, leading you to a grand vista of the magnificent stage.
钢琴家嘴角含笑、恣意轻松；被齐声合奏的乐器们环绕、拥簇其中。
The pianist appears serene and content, enveloped by the harmonious music of the instruments.
于是你继续追寻着黄金的音符。你们一路相伴，相携登上顶峰，俯瞰万里夜空；又跃入汪洋，溅起千丈白浪。
Following the trail of golden notes, you ascend to the pinnacle, beholding the night sky and plunging into an ocean, creating thousands of white capped waves.
不知不觉之间，一曲终了——
Before you know it, the music reaches its conclusion...
你蓦然惊醒，而演奏者与被演奏者的美梦还在继续。
You awaken abruptly, yet the dream of the pianist and his instruments persists.
You draw closer to the stage.
钢琴家已全然忘我，沉沦却又漂浮在音乐与欢乐织就的洪流之中。
The pianist has surrendered himself, immersed in a torrent of music and ecstasy.
兴致高昂时他仍会不自觉哼上几句，却早已换了活泼欢快的调子。
He hums a few lines when inspiration strikes, transforming his melody into a lively rhythm.
你明白，此刻已再没什么能够搅扰他了。
You realize that nothing can break his immersion now.
你喜欢我们的演出吗——你喜欢他的音乐吗？
Did you enjoy our performance? Did you like his music?
一位和蔼的老妇人突然向你搭话。你环顾四周，却发现这轻飘飘的耳语，竟来自眼前的钢琴。
A gentle voice suddenly addresses you. As you look around, you realize that it comes from the piano in front of you.
我很高兴——我的小先生，他现在很幸福。
I'm glad that my dear master... he's happy now.
我从小看着他长大，我们就像彼此的家人一样。
I've been accompanying him since he was a child. We are like family.
这么多年了，他走到哪儿，就把我带到哪儿…你看，就连在梦里他都没有抛下我。
Throughout the years, wherever he goes, he takes me along... Even in his dreams, he doesn't leave me behind.
可惜这么好的孩子，却被自己曾经最要好的「朋友们」给抛下了……
It's a shame that such a kind boy was abandoned by those whom he considered his "best friends"...
我很高兴他愿意来到这座梦中的城市、愿意和自动乐团的大伙儿成为同伴。
I'm glad that he's willing to come to this dream city and find companions in the automated orchestra.
你瞧，我们爱他、人们也爱他——我的小先生啊，他将再也不会感到孤独、感到痛苦啦。
You see, we love him, and everyone loves him... My dear master will never feel lonely or miserable again.
耳边突然响起一声暴躁的低吼，你被吓了个激灵。
A low, irritable growl emerges by your ears, giving you a scare.
你靠得太近了！离远点，别影响我们演出！
You're too close! Stay away! Don't interfere with our performance!
见你傻愣愣站着不动，一旁的青年——或者说架子鼓——终于忍不住了，扬起支闲着的鼓槌，在你手臂上不轻不重地敲了一下。
Seeing you still standing there, the young man on the side, more specifically, the "drum," raises his idle drumstick and gives you a not-so-gentle tap on the arm.
跟你说话呢，给个反应啊！果然人类就没有靠谱的——当然，麦克斯除外。
Hey, I'm talking to you! Are all humans so numb? Well, except Max, of course.
等等…你…你该不会打算拐走麦克斯吧？想都别想！
Wait... You... You're not planning to take Max away, are you? Don't even think about it!
我告诉你，我们才是他*最重要*的伙伴，永远都是！
I'm warning you! We are his *most important* companions, and we will always be!
*自动乐团*能满足他的一切需求，所以别再打他的主意了！
The *automated orchestra* can fulfill his every need! Don't ever try to take him away!
您很关注麦克斯先生…是因为感到好奇吗？
Are you concerned about Maestro Max... out of curiosity?
一位优雅绅士不紧不慢地开口。
很抱歉擅自揣测您的想法，不过我听*钢琴夫人*说过，麦克斯先生在「现实中」似乎与*现在*不大一样。
I apologize for assuming your thoughts, but according to *Mrs. Piano*, it seems that Maestro Max isn't quite the same in reality as he is *now*.
如果您之前见过他，那么我非常理解您的好奇心…因为我对他也抱有同样的*好奇*。
If you have met him before, then I understand your curiosity very well... as I share the same *curiosity* about him.
您知道吗——或许这个说法算不上得体——在我看来，麦克斯先生和我们简直是「天生伴侣」。
In my opinion, although it may not be entirely appropriate... Maestro Max and we are simply natural partners.
音乐家们往往过分热衷于在音乐中展现自我，这不是件坏事，但对于我们这些自动乐器而言，多少有些冒犯。
Musicians tend to be overly expressive in their music, which isn't necessarily a negative trait, but it can be overwhelming for us automated instruments.
而麦克斯先生…他在自我塑造的过程中，始终保持着一种忘我的纯粹，这令我们感到非常*舒适*。
However, Maestro Max... He maintains a sense of innocent purity throughout his self-expression, which puts us at *ease*.
那些「旧友们」并不善于发觉他的天赋，为此我感到十分遗憾。
His "old friends" failed to recognize his talent, and I feel genuinely sorry about that.
但不要紧，我们会代替他们，成为麦克斯先生最忠实的伙伴。
Nonetheless, we will step in and become Maestro Max's most loyal companions.
节拍陡然一转，现场的气氛变得热烈起来。
The beat intensifies, and the atmosphere grows heated.
不知不觉中，人群开始朝这边聚集；连空气渐渐都开始变得灼热而拥挤。
The crowd gathers, filling the space. Even the air carries a buoyant spirit.
你又看见那些金色音符——它们此刻更加灵动张扬、愈发色泽艳丽。
Once again, you witness the golden notes, now more dynamic and vibrant than ever.
每一次震颤都令你的心跳随之鼓噪，你的血脉为之偾张——
Each tremor sets your heart pounding, your veins electrified.
等什么呢？还不快抛弃一切烦恼，彻底融入这音乐的狂欢！
What are you waiting for? Cast away your worries and immerse yourself in this musical carnival!
过马路的时候请小心。虽然在梦中受伤并不会导致肉体死亡，但被车撞的疼感可是相当拟真的……
Be careful when you cross the road. Your body won't die if you get wounded in a dream, but the pain from a car crash still hurts like the real thing...
…如果疼感造成的冲击过于强烈，你就会从梦中惊醒。换个角度来看，应该没人想在梦境里目睹一场惨烈的车祸吧？
...If the impact of the pain is too intense, you'll be startled awake from your dream. In other words, I'm guessing no one in the Dreamscape really wants to witness a horrific car crash?
不过别担心，家族会尽最大的努力保护每一位宾客。我们有许多维持梦境世界安定的手段。
But don't worry, The Family protects each and every guest with utmost care. We have many security measures to maintain the Dreamscape's safety.
哈哈，我倒是很乐意为贡献自己的一份力量。
Haha, I'm more than happy to lend a hand.
不过呢，我其实是猎犬家系的护卫组长。守护行人安全是我的职责。
But, I'm actually the Bloodhound Family's Guard Leader. Protecting travelers is my duty.
作为来宾，希望你能遵守《入梦守则》，不要给他人造成负面的梦境体验。
As a guest, I hope you will abide by the Dreaming Regulations, and refrain from burdening others with a bad experience in the Dreamscape.
…至于存心危害梦境的家伙，我们会严肃地对他做出提醒——如果能从一开始就避免走到这步的话，那真是再好不过了。
...As for those offenders who seek to sully the Dreamscape, we will sternly issue them with a warning — it would be for the best if one would avoid this outcome in the first place.
Are you being punished with guard duty?
依我看，守护来宾的安全可不能算一种惩罚。
From where I stand, protecting the safety of guests is no punishment at all.
这确实是十分基础的工作，但基础不代表没有价值。家族的事业离不开为之付出的奉献者，唯有团结协作才能铸就伟大。
This may be a very basic job, but that doesn't mean it is meaningless. The Family's businesses rely plenty on patrons who contribute to them. Only in unity can greatness be achieved.
你不是家族成员，不了解这个道理也很正常。我原谅你的失礼。
You're not a Family member, so it's only natural you don't understand our ways. I forgive your insolence.
I have some questions for you...
那你算问对人了——服务来宾是每一名家族成员的责任。我会尽力回答你的。
You've asked the right person then. Servicing guests is one of the duties of every Family member. I will answer as best as I can.
家族是梦境的缔造者和管理者，在匹诺康尼有着举足轻重的地位。
The Family is both the creator and administrator of the Dreamscape, and they are of decisive importance in Penacony.
除了我们猎犬家系外，还有橡木、苜蓿草、隐夜鸫和鸢尾花四大家系。各个家系分别负责不同的工作，彼此亲密无间。
Apart from us Bloodhound Family, there are also four other major lineages of Oak, Alfalfa, Nightingale, and Iris. Each family is charged with different jobs and is very tight-knit.
当然，这可没有夸大的成分。家族之所以能把梦境打理得井井有条，就是因为各家系能精诚团结，全无冲突与分歧。

Of course. That is not hyperbole. The only reason that The Family was able to make sure the Dreamscape runs in such an orderly manner is due to the various families' earnest unity. We are all without conflict or disagreement.
在偌大的宇宙中，个人的力量实在太过渺小。唯有相互帮扶，万众一心，凡人才可能做出非凡的壮举。
In the vast universe, the strength of an individual is insignificant. Only through mutual help and binding our hearts as one, can humans perform superhuman feats.
这也是{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}对我们的教导，任何人都应铭记在心。
This is also the {RUBY_B#Harmony}Great One's{RUBY_E#} teachings unto us. Everyone would do well to remember them by heart.
What does the Bloodhound Family do?
我们猎犬在五大家系中主管安保与维和。不只是警卫，消防员、侦探和其他一些职位也由我们的成员负责。
Among the five lineages, we the Bloodhounds manage security and maintain order. It's not just the police — our members are also in charge of the firemen, detectives, and other vocations.
想象一下猎犬的品质吧——机灵，善战，而且忠诚。这也是每名猎犬成员的美德。我们是匹诺康尼美梦的后盾，宾客安全的保障。

Think about the characteristics of a hound: Clever, battle-hardy, loyal. These are also the virtues of each Bloodhound member. We are the shield of Penacony's beautiful dream, safekeeping the well-being of our guests.
当然，如果有人不把《入梦守则》放在眼里，那么他很快就会意识到猎犬是多么可怕且难缠的对手。
Of course, if someone flouts the Dreaming Regulations, he will very quickly learn how frightening and persistent the Bloodhounds are.
I have no questions right now.
注意安全。如果遇到危险，猎犬随时为你效劳。
Watch yourself. If you run into danger, the Bloodhounds are at your service.
哦对了，难得有人主动跟我搭话，这个送给你吧。这是一位橡木家系的朋友送给我的…但我不喜欢甜食。
Oh right, since it's rare that someone would bother to talk to me, I'll give this to you. A friend from the Oak Family gave it to me... but I don't have a sweet tooth.
I have some questions for you...
那你算问对人了——服务来宾是每一名家族成员的责任。我会尽力回答你的。

Watch yourself. If you run into danger, the Bloodhounds are at your service.
梦中有哪些值得我关注的人？
Is anyone worth my attention in the dream?
哦，这个问题真是正中下怀。梦里再找不到比我们猎犬更专业的探子了。
Oh, this is a good question. There's no one more in the know than us Bloodhounds.
实际上，梦境里确实有一批…比较特殊的人，是猎犬的重点观察对象。
In truth, there are a bunch of quite... special people in the Dreamscape. They are also our observation targets.
如果你和类似的家伙打过交道，应该明白我指的是什么。
If you've come across such people, you probably know what I'm talking about.
不过，最近我的艾迪恩代币不够了，所以…咳咳，你懂得。
But, I've been suffering a shortage of Aideen Tokens recently, so... *ahem* you know what to do.
那么，你想要关注什么样的对象呢？
Now then, who do you want to know about?
The one who can't get angry.
The one who can't be happy.
The one who can't calm down.
不用担心意外，家族会保护每一位来宾。
Don't worry about accidents — The Family will protect each and every guest.
一愣过后，伍尔西又重新恢复了那副冷峻的面孔——不难看出，夸张的情绪外露让他倍感尴尬。
In an instant, Woolsey returns to his aloof expression. It's not hard to see that the exaggerated outburst has made him feel extremely awkward.
家主真该让那些人好好认识下猎犬！
The head should really have those guys get acquainted with the Bloodhounds!
啊！商店街那些不长眼的逐梦客，真是一想就来气。
Bah! I get irate just at the thought of those short-sighted dream-chasing fools on the shopping street.
有些猎犬成员长得是有点凶，但一见我们就跑是不是有点太夸张了——我们又不吃小孩！
Some Bloodhound members may look pretty fierce, but people don't have to flee at the sight of us... It's not like we eat children!
要是没有我们保护匹诺康尼的梦境，这地界早就乱套了，哪儿轮得到他们夜夜笙歌？！
If we weren't around to protect Penacony's Dreamscape, this realm would plunge into chaos. Where would they have the idyllic moods to sing the night away!?
这帮家伙不感恩就罢了，还总要摆出一副嘴脸，好像我们上辈子欠了他们钱一样。
I'd tolerate these buffoons if they were ingrates, but those disapproving faces they make... It's like we owed them money in a past life.
呵，吃里扒外的东西！我绝对不会给他们送钱…给你还差不多。
Hah, those two-faced fools! I'll never give them any money... I'd much rather give them to you.
啊！商店街那些不长眼的逐梦客，真是一想就来气！

唉，家族的未来可怎么办啊……
*sigh* What can we do about The Family's future...
现在的家族成员，真是一代不如一代……
The caliber of The Family's members is really going down the drain with each generation...
我弟弟今年就要举办成人礼了。我问他最喜欢什么活动，他居然说是刺绣…真是枉费我一番苦心，把全套宇宙拳王争霸赛的珍贵录像都送给他了。

My younger brother will have his coming-of-age rites this year. I asked him what his favorite activity was, and he actually said embroidery... What a complete waste of the trouble I went through — I even gave him the entire Cosmic Fistfighter Championship collection that was worth a fortune.
他那幅孱弱的身板，哪还像个猎犬的模样？要是被家族里的长辈看到了，不笑掉大牙才怪。
Just look at that puny body of his — how could he resemble anything close to a Bloodhound? If The Family old-timers were to see him, they'd laugh themselves to their graves.
而且我只是随便批评了两句，他就唉声叹气，哭哭啼啼……
And all I did was reprimand him lightly, and then he just sighed and started bawling...
唉，真愁人。明明当哥哥的也是为了他好，怎么就不懂呢……
*sigh* So vexing. I'm just trying to be a good older brother to him, why can't he understand...
这样一来，不就显得为这事儿愁眉苦脸的我也像个笑话了吗？唉……
And now I look like a joke for being worried in the first place? *sigh*
哈哈哈！没有猎犬，这个世界早完蛋了！
Hahaha! This world would've been a goner without the Bloodhounds!
哦…哦哦哦！不知道为什么，我突然感觉心情变顺畅了——就像刚参与了一场群架，而我是最后一个站着的人！哈哈哈！
Oh... Oh oh oh! I don't know why, but I suddenly feel much better — like I just joined a bar brawl, and I'm the last one standing! Hahaha!
不仅如此！一想到我是家族的一份子，我的自豪感就源源不断地向外喷涌，如同这城里随处可见的喷钞机！
Not just that! Just the thought of me being one of The Family makes my heart burst with overflowing pride, like one of those money guns that are everywhere in the city!
哦，我们是猎犬——阴谋的揭露者，匹诺康尼的守护神！不管梦境还是现实，一切危机在我们面前都将烟消云散！
Oh, we're the Bloodhounds — the expositors of conspiracies, protectors of Penacony! Be it in dreams or reality, all dangers dissipate like smoke before us!
来，跟我一起念——没有猎犬，世界就完蛋了！
Come, chant with me: The world would be a goner without the Bloodhounds!
猎犬也不能饿着肚子干活——艾迪恩代币就是我的精神食粮。抱歉啦，客人。
Bloodhounds can't work on an empty stomach. Aideen Tokens are my spiritual food. Sorry about that, honored guest.
已经没有这样的人了。不知为何，这些家伙最近都变得有些…真性情。
There's no one like that anymore. For some reason, these fellows have all become somewhat... true to their nature recently.
不过我倒不觉得这是件坏事——即使在梦里，大家也拥有保持愤怒的自由。
But I don't think it's a bad thing. Even in dreams, everyone still has the freedom to remain angry.
已经没有这样的人了。即使最愁眉苦脸的家伙，一想到梦境的繁华与美好，也会不由自主地露出笑颜。
There's no one like that anymore. Even the most worrisome person would unwittingly smile at the thought of the dream's prosperity and beauty.
匹诺康尼现在是真正的「美梦」了。
Penacony is now a truly beautiful dream.
已经没有这样的人了。大家都是想哭就哭，想笑就笑。
There's no one like that anymore. Everyone cries when they wish, and laughs when they want.
虽然不知道怎么回事，但我觉得这样也挺好。有句话怎么说来着：「若哭泣不自由，则欢笑无意义」。
I don't know what's going on, but I think it's a good thing. How does that saying go again? "If you're not free to cry, then there's no point in laughing."
已经没有这样的人了。现在大家都能控制好自己的情绪，而不是一天到头歇斯底里。
There's no one like that anymore. Everyone can manage their emotions very well now and isn't in a constant state of hysteria.
必须承认，自从某些人消停之后，我耳边确实清净了许多。
I must admit that it's been much more peaceful once some people stopped their antics.
Hmm... According to what I know, no.
说来奇怪，最近许多梦境中人都变得…不一样了。背后可能有人在做手脚。
It's strange, but recently, many people in the Dreamscape have become... different. There might be someone causing this behind the scenes.
我们猎犬会持续关注此事，以免影响其他来宾。客人你就放心好了。
We Bloodhounds will continue to keep an eye on this matter and prevent it from affecting the other guests. Please do not be concerned.
嗯？之前不是刚给你指明过吗，又要找新的人？
Hmm? Didn't I just tell you that earlier? Looking for someone else?
偶尔也稍微安分一下吧，至少先跟我介绍的那个人打打交道——换朋友不要那么频繁嘛。
Have some patience and give the person I introduced a chance, okay? Friends aren't something you can just swap out all the time.
这片梦境区域还没有完工，暂时不向游客开放。
This dreamscape area is still under construction and off-limits to visitors for now.
但既然你能出现在这里，想必是得到了上头的批准，我也就不多问了。
But since you're here, you must have gotten the thumbs-up from the higher-ups, so I won't ask anything.
Anyway, come to us Bloodhounds if you're in trouble.
这里虽不如大街上繁华，但视野极好，空气也要新鲜不少，还有免费的相声听……
This place may not be as bustling as the main street, but it's got a good view, and the air is fresher too. And there are free crosstalk performances to listen to...
您好啊，这么巧在此处遇见，要不要一起看会儿风景聊聊天？
Hello, what a coincidence to see you here. How about a chat while we take in the sight?
嗨呀，我说的就是那些筑梦师啊，这帮人可好玩了——
No, I'm talking about those Dreamweavers. They're a fun lot...
你怨我需求乱改，我恨你进度欺诈；理念不合要吵，设计分歧就骂；私下里蜚短流长，当着面撸袖子干架……

You complain about my constantly changing requirements, I resent your deception in progress. We argue when our ideas don't align, and insults fly when our designs differ. Privately, grievances linger, and face-to-face, sleeves are rolled up for a confrontation.
天天你来我往，就跟说相声似的。这帮「艺术工作者」可真艺术啊…哈哈！
It's just like performing crosstalk, these "artists" sure are artsy... Heh!
唉，说到这个，好久没回罗浮，也不知道阿来阿往那俩小子最近又有什么新鲜段子……
*sigh* Speaking of which, it's been a long time since I've gone back to the Luofu. I wonder if Back'n and Forth have come up with any fresh new routines...
I listened to them just a couple of days ago.
I want to listen to Mr. Xiyan's storytelling now.
哎——没想到！竟然还是他乡遇故知啊！怪不得今儿日历上说是宜出行，敢情在这儿等着我呢！
Ooh, how unexpected! A friend from a distant land! No wonder the calendar said that it was good to travel today — an encounter was waiting for me right here!
我向来工作之余就喜欢来这里放松放松心情，小友之后若是得了空，记得多来找我多聊聊啊！
I like to relax here after work. If you ever find the time, don't forget to stop by and have a chat!
那敢情好啊，我正愁在这边找不到人聊天呢！
That would be fantastic. I've been hankering for a chat around here!
What are you doing in Penacony?
还能做什么，做生意呗。我是天舶司下翔水商会驻匹诺康尼的负责人，来这儿是打算开拓一下贸易市场。
What else can I do? Business, of course. I'm the head of the Aquaglider Guild in Penacony under the Sky-Faring Commission, here to explore the trade market.
目前来说，我的主要业务是向仙舟引进苏乐达。
Currently, my main business is to import SoulGlad to the Xianzhou.
不过说实在的…我还真不怎么喜欢那种甜了吧唧的气泡糖浆，那玩意也就是广告营销做得好。
But honestly... I don't really like that saccharine, carbonated syrup. It's just advertised well.
要真论好喝，还得是咱仙舟的仙人快乐茶！
If you want a REALLY good beverage, it's gotta be Xianzhou's Immortal's Delight!
呃…嗐——这不是好不容易来一次梦里嘛，自然要和平日里做出些区别。
Err... Well, it's a rare treat to be in a dream — gotta do something that's a little different from your humdrum life.
你别说，现在没了尾巴，感觉还挺神奇的，哈哈！
Well, it feels wondrously strange without a tail, haha!
好嘞，那您自便，我再呆一会儿。
Sure thing, you do you. I'll stay a while longer.
Have a good day, we'll meet again soon!
你说这么大个匹诺康尼，就真连个贸易蓝海都没有？
Is there truly no room for new trade products in such a vast market like Penacony's?
这前前后后我也调研了好几个月了，愣是没找到什么还有开发潜力的贸易口子。
I've already surveyed the trends for months — I just can't seem to find any potential breakthrough that's worth developing.
生意难做啊…再这么下去，我怕不是真的只能去跟人推销「豆汁儿口味苏乐达」了……
It's tough doing business here. If things keep up like this, I might end up hawking mung-bean-flavored SoulGlad to others...
别说，我还真的带了苏打豆汁儿过来，你也来一瓶？
How fortuitous, I have some mung bean soda with me. You want a bottle?
这前前后后我也调研了好几个月了，愣是没找到什么还有开发潜力的贸易口子。
I've already surveyed the trends for months — I just can't seem to find any potential breakthrough that's worth developing.
生意难做啊…再这么下去，我怕不是真的只能去跟人推销「豆汁儿口味苏乐达」了……
It's tough doing business here. If things keep up like this, I might end up hawking mung-bean-flavored SoulGlad to others...
我也想要一条尾巴啊…谁不喜欢毛茸茸软乎乎的大尾巴啊……
I want a tail too... Who doesn't like a poofy fluffy tail...
你们化外民总羡慕长生种，却殊不知越是长生种，越是畏惧天缺。
You outworlders envy long-life species — what you don't know is the longer we live, the more we dread our genetic disadvantages.
像我这种只是没了尾巴的，尚不影响日常生活，却也百年来都未曾在他人面前抬得起头……
For those who don't have tails like me, it doesn't affect our daily lives, yet we've never been able to raise our heads high and proud for the last century...
能补天缺倒也不是没有，比如符太卜、比如十王司那个小判官…但这些人要么就是有大毅力、要么就是有大机遇，而我——

Though it's not like there aren't any who compensate for their disadvantages, like Diviner Fu or that wee judge from the Ten-Lords Commission... But these people either succeed through sheer will, or serendipitous opportunity, yet for me...
老袁突然侧过身，一手捂住腰后，满脸警觉与不耐。
Yuan suddenly turns sideways, one hand covering the back of her waist, her face awash with alarm and anxiety.
烦不烦、烦不烦、烦不烦！简直没完没了——
Annoying, annoying, so annoying! Will it never cease!
不就是没尾巴吗！我没有尾巴，难道你们就有咯？
It's just a tail! So what? Do any of you have tails?
自己都没有，还天天问我！就说烦不烦人、讨不讨厌！
They don't even have one, yet incessantly ask me about it! So annoying! So sickening!
老袁眺望着远处的天空与高楼，脸上流露出些许惬意的神色。
Yuan gazes at the sky and towering buildings in the distance, a pleasant expression on her face.
起初我加入翔水商会，其实是为了寻找让自己长出尾巴的机缘。
When I joined the Aquaglider Guild, I wanted to find an opportunity to grow a tail.
但随着这些年东奔西走，我渐渐明白，自己的人生未必非得绕着那条尾巴转悠。
But as I traveled across the lands over the years, I gradually understood that my lot in life didn't have to revolve around this tail.
于是我更加留心沿途的风景、各地的人情…不得不说，这或许才是人生真正的意义所在。
So I started paying more attention to the scenery along the way and the local customs... I have to say, this may really be the true meaning of life.
哎呀，又一个新面孔…你好啊年轻人，愿意和我这个老太婆聊聊吗？
Ah, a new face... Hello, young one. Mind having a chat with an old lady like me?
Sure, I've got nothing to do now anyway.
真是个干脆的年轻人，我喜欢。
A straightforward one, I like you.
你不是在和他们聊天吗？
他们…不用在意这些人，他们有自己的事要忙，对吧？
They... no need to mind these people. They're busy with their own stuff, aren't they?
靠近些，年轻人。你有什么有趣的经历吗，来给老婆子我讲讲吧？
Come closer, young one. Do you have any interesting experiences to share with an old lady?
本着尊老爱幼的传统美德，你耐着性子和老妇人聊了起来。
In line with the tradition of respecting your elders, you summon your patience and chat with the old lady.
你给她讲列车与同伴、讲迄今为止的旅途。老妇人专注地听着，渐渐露出餍足的神色。
You talk to her about your Express companions, about the journey thus far. The old lady listens intently, her expression gradually growing sated.
真好…真好啊！多么自由、多么精彩……
Very good... Excellent! So free, so exciting...
老妇人眯起眼，喃喃赞叹。你看着她的表情，觉得自己又做了件好事。
She closes her eyes and murmurs compliments. Seeing her expression, you feel like you've done another good deed.
…但她为什么一直盯着你？这让你有点犯怵。她好像在等着你开口，但你完全不知道现在还能说些什么。
...But why does she keep staring at you? You're a little apprehensive — she appears to be waiting for you to continue talking, but you don't know what else to say.
嗯…？等等，年轻人，别走呀！你还没向我提出*报酬*呢！
Hmm...? Hold on, young one, don't leave just yet! You haven't asked for a *reward* from me!
你这{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}还挺实诚，真不错。现在的年轻人啊，个个能说会道，还知道体贴人，陪老婆子我聊上一整天都不嫌烦。

You're an honest {F#girl}{M#boy}. Young people nowadays are really good with people, and know how to treat them well. They don't feel bothered even after chatting with an old lady like me for an entire day.
我还挺喜欢你的…要不你就别走了？想要什么只管开口，只要是用钱能满足的需求，我都可以帮你实现。
I like you quite a bit... How about you stay here? All you have to do is ask — as long as it can be settled with money, I can make all your wishes come true.
喏，这些你先收着吧，就当是我的一点心意。
Here, keep these. Take it as a token of my appreciation.
当然当然，我就喜欢跟年轻人聊天……
Absolutely, I love chatting with young people...
哈哈，看来你是真的一点儿都没听说过我啊……
Haha, looks like you've really never heard of me...
我出身商贾之家…我们老钱家啊，世世代代都在和钱打交道。
I come from a merchant family... We've been dealing with money for generations.
尚未成年时我就被钦点为下任家主，也算是为咱的家族任劳任怨了一辈子。
I was named the next head before I came of age, but at least I slogged my whole life for my Family.
这不，到了晚年，好容易得了清闲，我赶紧出来溜达溜达。
To have the time now for idle times in my golden years, you bet I'm going to come out for a stroll.
老婆子我啊，忙了半辈子、累了半辈子，也是时候享享清福了。
An old granny like me, after hustling for half my life, it's time for me to enjoy some peace and quiet.
我来这匹诺康尼是为了养老，但那些新鲜刺激的已经不适合我了，所以平日里没事就喜欢和年轻人聊聊天……
I came to Penacony as a retirement plan, but those intense experiences don't suit me at all, which is why I prefer talking to young people in my spare time...
你看，我有故事听、他们有钱拿，这不是双赢吗？
Look, I get to listen to stories, and they get to earn some money, so that's a win-win all around, no?
You look a bit under the weather?
哈…说来好笑，我被人惦记了一辈子，没想到竟在这梦里翻了车。
Ha... It's a funny story — I was targeted my entire life, but I never expected to get up-ended in this dream.
谁能想到这「美梦之城」的大街上，还能突然窜出个皮皮西来，把我这老婆子的脖子给勒了呢？
Who would've expected that a Pepeshi would suddenly appear on the streets of this city of dreams and strangle an old lady like me?
虽然不过是噩梦一场，但从梦里惊醒的那种感觉可真是不好受哇…希望别再来一次了，我这把年纪可经不起这吓……
It may have been just a nightmare, but to be shocked awake from my dream didn't feel good at all... I hope it doesn't happen again, I don't think I can take much more at this age...
不管怎么样，都得让家族的人给我个交代……
In any case, The Family has to take responsibility for this...
好、好，有空记得再过来啊。
Sure, sure. Come by again when you're free.
回见，年轻人。我还等着你给我讲更多的故事呢。
Another time, young one. I'm sure you have more stories to tell.
这位老太太似乎在「让你接受她的资助」这件事上格外执着。
This old lady appears to be highly insistent on the matter of you accepting her sponsorship.
…听说购物中心的珠宝店新出了一套钻石首饰，你想要吗？
...I hear the jeweler at the mall has recently launched a set of diamond jewelry. Do you want it?
开拓者一定喜欢车子吧，我送一辆最新款斯坦威游隼给你怎么样？
Trailblazers must love cars. How about I give you the latest Steinway Falcon speedster?
或者还有什么你看得上眼的，只管说就是。别看我这一套行头朴素，但在正经事上我可从来不吝啬。
Or there might be something else you fancy, just let me know. I may look like a commoner, but I'm never stingy where it matters.
这个「正经事」嘛，过去对我而言是做买卖谈生意、为家族牟利…而现在，我只想让自己开心。
As to how I got my money, I used to deal in trade in my younger days, turning profits for The Family... But now, I just want to be happy.
来，这些你拿去…这地方到处是年轻人玩的游戏，我玩不明白，不如你拿着吧。
Here, take these... The games around here are all for young people. I simply don't get it, so you might as well take them.
…听说购物中心的珠宝店新出了一套钻石首饰，你想要吗？
...I hear the jeweler at the mall has recently launched a set of diamond jewelry. Do you want it?
开拓者一定喜欢车子吧，我送一辆最新款斯坦威游隼给你怎么样？
Trailblazers must love cars. How about I give you the latest Steinway Falcon speedster?
或者还有什么你看得上眼的，只管说就是。别看我这一套行头朴素，但在正经事上我可从来不吝啬。
Or there might be something else you fancy, just let me know. I may look like a commoner, but I'm never stingy where it matters.
这个「正经事」嘛，过去对我而言是做买卖谈生意、为家族牟利…而现在，我只想让自己开心。
As to how I got my money, I used to deal in trade in my younger days, turning profits for The Family... But now, I just want to be happy.
Haha, I'm sure you find it funny...
…那帮人整天惦记着从我这儿打听出个「生意经」来，可实际上哪有那玩意啊。
...All that bunch of people are obsessed about is getting some business insights out of me. It's all nothing but nonsense if you ask me.
我不过是尽量把事想得周全、做得谨慎，但哪个正经做生意的不是这样呢？
I just did things as best I could, as cautious as I tried. Any business owner would do the same thing, no?
就算真有什么值得说道的…我始终没被财势迷了眼，这应该能算得上一种好品质？
Even if I did have something tangible to say... I didn't get blinded by the allure of untold wealth, so I guess it was ethical on my part?
他们只看到我向来生活得清苦朴素，为了省钱凡事亲力亲为，就偷偷称我「吝啬鬼」、「守财奴」…让人难过！
All they saw was the frugal life I led, doing everything myself in order to save money, and they called me a miser and a scrooge behind my back... I was so sad!
人啊，一旦开始习惯了享受，才真变成了「金钱的奴隶」呢。
Once people get accustomed to luxury, they become slaves to wealth.
这点道理都不懂，还想把生意做大做好？我看他们是真的把梦当成现实了吧……
They think they can run a successful business when they don't even know this simple fact? I think they truly believe their dreams have become reality...
唉，你啊，怎么就是不愿意接受我的长期「资助」呢……
Hey, why are you not willing to accept my long-term sponsorship?
看看我身边那些年轻人…大家各取所需，多好？
Just take a look at the young people around me... Everyone takes what they need, isn't that good?
唉…我当然知道钱换不来「真心」，但正因如此我才更放心。
*sigh*... Of course I know money can't buy sincerity, but that's why I feel even more at ease.
我自小颇受家族器重，家中无论平辈长辈，待我总是恭恭敬敬的。
Since my youth, I was treated with respect by my family, from my peers to my elders.
等到长大了…生意场上哪有什么两肋插刀的朋友？能不被人家惦记上、背后插你两刀已经实属难得。
When I grew up... Where would you even find true friends who'd do anything for you in the business world? You'd be glad if you went unnoticed, and that all you got was a knife in the back.
我从未识得过「真心」…所以说啊，与其妄想着有人真心相待，还不如花钱买快乐实在。
I have never experienced sincerity... which is why, instead of fantasizing about someone treating you sincerely, it'd be better to buy happiness and authenticity with money.
不过，或许就是因为你目前还别无所图，我才与你说了这么多吧……
Then again, perhaps it's because you've shown no ill intent so far, that I've spoken so much to you...
财富对我这种生于商贾之家的人而言，比起享乐的源泉，更像是一种责任。
To one born into a merchant family like me, wealth resembles more of a responsibility than a source of pleasure.
为了不让偌大家业毁于手中，这么多年来，我都在努力与「奢侈」保持距离。
To prevent the business from going under, I've been working hard to distance myself from luxury all these years.
我不住豪宅、不买豪车，吃穿用度能省就省，家务维修亲力亲为…说实话，我一直过得很辛苦。
I don't live in a spacious mansion, I don't buy luxury cars, I scrimp and save on what I eat and wear, and I do my own chores... Honestly, I've been living a harsh life.
但现在，我终于能放下责任，用「普通人」的方式来对待钱了。
But now, I can finally lay down my duty, and treat money in the way that an ordinary person can.
啊…这挥金如土的感觉，可真是该死的甜美啊！
Ah... it's a blasted good feeling to spend money as if it meant nothing!
拿去吧，再多拿走点！在年轻人身上花的钱越多，我就越有活着的感觉……
Take it, take more of it, in fact! The more I spend on young people, the more alive I feel...
财富对我这种生于商贾之家的人而言，比起享乐的源泉，更像是一种责任。
To one born into a merchant family like me, wealth resembles more of a responsibility than a source of pleasure.

To prevent the business from going under, I've been working hard to distance myself from luxury all these years.
我不住豪宅、不买豪车，吃穿用度能省就省，家务维修亲力亲为…说实话，我一直过得很辛苦。
I don't live in a spacious mansion, I don't buy luxury cars, I scrimp and save on what I eat and wear, and I do my own chores... Honestly, I've been living a harsh life.
但现在，我终于能放下责任，用「普通人」的方式来对待钱了。
But now, I can finally lay down my duty, and treat money in the way that an ordinary person can.
啊…这挥金如土的感觉，可真是该死的甜美啊！
Ah... it's a blasted good feeling to spend money as if it meant nothing!
自动乐团…真是可悲，没想到匹诺康尼这样高雅的地方会有这么卑劣的技术。
The automated orchestra... How tragic that an elegant place like Penacony would allow such vulgar technology.
女子怒视着公园里的自动乐团，语气中充斥着鄙夷。
The lady stares at the park's automated orchestra in seething anger, contempt oozing out of her every breath.
家族将这种东西放在街头，还好意思用音乐代表他们的虔诚…我真为他们感到羞愧。
The Family dares display these contraptions out on the streets, and they have the cheek to use music to convey their devotion... I feel ashamed on their behalf.
What has the automated orchestra done to you?
朋友，任何一名演奏家都会对这种东西感到愤怒的——他们就是一群亵渎音符的破铜烂铁，只会进行没有灵魂的演奏。
My friend, any virtuoso would be outraged by this — nothing more than scrap metal desecrating the art of sound and playing soulless music.
如果放任自动乐团被滥用，真人演奏家的生存空间会变得越来越小，这里的音乐艺术将会被污染、破坏、毁灭……
If automated orchestras become commonplace, there will be less and less room for real musicians to survive, and the art scene here will be contaminated, destroyed, and ruined...
是的，这是音乐家与乐迷们的噩梦！
Yes, it's the greatest nightmare for musicians and fans alike!
That's a bit of an exaggeration...
哼，一点也不夸张，只是你还没有感受到！
Hmph, it's not an exaggeration! You just can't feel it yet.
如果家族再不重视这个问题，匹诺康尼的演奏家迟早都会出走…梦中属于活物的音乐将会走向末日！
If The Family does not take this problem seriously, all of Penacony's musicians will leave sooner or later. The music that belongs to living beings in dreams will soon come to an end!
朋友，如果今后不想在这里只能听到如机器般没有灵魂的声响，就请和我一起抵制自动乐团吧！
My friend, if you do not want to listen to any more of this soulless music played by machines in the future, let's band together and boycott the automated orchestra!
好啊，我喜欢聊天——前提是你足够尊重音乐。
Sure, I'd love to chat — only if you respect the music.
我？我只是一位在宇宙中旅行的演奏家，在各个世界了解当地的音乐形式，再把我自己的音乐带到这个世界。
Me? I'm just a musician traveling the universe, learning about local music on various worlds and bringing my own music to these worlds.
我曾经很享受这个过程，每个世界都会给我带来新的感触，让我看到不同的艺术表现形式…但不知从何时起，用工具代替乐手的行为开始在宇宙中蔓延。

I used to enjoy this process, every world brought me new emotions and allowed me to see different forms of artistic expression... But at some point, the replacing of musicians with automated instruments started to spread throughout the universe.
自从发现了这件事以后，我就给了自己一个新的使命——将这些误入歧途的世界拉回正轨！让人们明白——只有活物演奏的音乐才叫音乐！

Ever since I discovered this, I've made it my life's mission to guide these errant worlds toward the right path! I have to make them understand that music is only music when it's played by the living!
You abhor the automated orchestra this much?
当然，如果你不能理解我的想法，就让我给你举个例子吧——你是做什么的？
Of course, if you don't understand me, allow me to give you an example — what do you do for a living?
我是星穹列车的无名客。
I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.
无名客…那你想想，假如有人发明了一种智能探测仪，管它们叫「自动无名客」，把你们「开拓」的任务全都抢走了，说不定还要把你踢下列车，你难道不恨它们吗？

Nameless... Just think about it: If someone invented a smart detector and called it the "Auto-Nameless," it took away all your trailblazing missions and kicked you off the Express, wouldn't you hate it?
我是伸张公义的银河球棒侠。
I'm the Galactic Baseballer of justice!
球棒侠…那你想想，假如有人创造了一个机器超级英雄，管它叫「自动棒球侠」，把你行侠仗义的风头全都抢走了，还盗用你的形象，你难道不恨它吗？
Baseballer... Just think about it: If someone invented a robot superhero and called it the "Auto-Baseballer," it stole your image and all your glory, wouldn't you hate it?
呃…那你想想，假如有人发明了一种仿生机器，管它们叫「自动无业游民」，把你能领的补助、睡觉的桥洞、要翻的垃圾桶全抢走了，你难道不恨它们吗？

Uh... Well, just think about it: If someone invented an android and called it the "Auto-unemployed," it took away all your subsidies and your sleeping spots and snatched away all your trashcans, wouldn't you hate it?
这么说你就能懂了吧？这些自动机器看似是在提供便利，实则是在迫害它们身为有机生命的同行，是在扼杀各个行业的未来！
Do you understand what I'm saying now? These automatic tools may seem convenient, but they're actually cannibalizing their organic counterparts, killing the future of every industry!
再见，朋友，小心别让自动乐团破坏了你的审美。
Goodbye, my friend, be careful not to let the automated orchestra ruin your artistic taste.
布罗娜紧皱眉头，怨恨与怒火充盈在她的眼中——如果不赶快劝劝她，下一秒她可能就会把面前的自动乐团砸个稀巴烂。
Brona frowns, resentment and hatred filling her eyes — if you don't quickly persuade her, she'll likely smash the automated orchestra in front of her into smithereens in the next second.
这毫无灵魂的杂音…真是让人心烦意乱！我再也不能忍受这些的冰冷的魔鬼在街头啸叫了！
This soulless cacophony... It's getting on my nerves! I can't stand these cold devils howling down the streets any longer!
朋友，你不知道这些东西会伤害多少人吗？他们不是乐器，是武器！是杀害艺术家的武器！
My friend, do you grasp the harm these things can bring to people? They're not musical instruments, they're weapons! Weapons that kill artists!
自动乐团、托腔机巧、义体奏乐宏…这些东西让我们乐手数年乃至数十年、数百年的勤学苦练都失去了意义！

The automated orchestra, musical accompaniment ingenia, artificial music creation... These are the things that render the years, decades, and even centuries of hard work by us musicians utterly meaningless!
如今有多少演奏家失去了听众的尊重，又有多少喜欢音乐的人因为这些歪门邪道而放弃学习乐器！长此以往，音乐将亡！
Countless musicians have lost the respect of their fans, and many aficionados have given up on learning their instruments because of these crooked practices! Over time, music will wither and die!
听着，那边的指挥家，停下你罪恶的指挥棒！那是屠杀艺术的屠刀！
Listen up, conductor! Lower your evil baton! That is the executioner's axe upon all art!
她不理会你的劝说，冲着自动乐团的指挥家大喊大叫——但对方沉浸在自动奏响的音乐之中，也不理会她的反抗。
She disregards your advice and yells at the conductor of the automated orchestra — the conductor, immersed in music, ignores her resistance.
布罗娜看着自动乐团，嘴角颤动起来——她开始发出不屑的嗤笑。
Brona looks at the automated orchestra, the corners of her mouth twitching as she exudes a scornful sneer.
呵呵…呵呵呵，如此空洞的演奏，没有一丝情感的流露，没有一丁点独创的节奏。
Heheh... Heheheh, such a hollow performance, devoid of any emotion, not a trace of personal interpretation of rhythm...
是我想得太多了，区区物件的拙劣模仿，怎么能比得上人类用心奏响的音乐呢？
I'm overthinking it — how can music made by a mere object compare to music made from the heart?
真正的演奏艺术，绝不是用乐器的振动发出乐谱上的声音这么简单…那是乐器、旋律、乐手一同合作的艺术品，蕴含着一个音乐人对艺术的感悟和他的灵魂！

The art of musical performances goes beyond merely using the instrument and translating the notes from a sheet of music... It involves the harmonious collaboration of the instrument, melody, and musician, working together to craft a masterpiece. This encompasses the interpretation and soul of the musician!
朋友，你应该能听出来吧？自动乐团的音乐完全无法跟真人演奏相比！
My friend, can't you hear it? The music from an automated orchestra pales in comparison to the music produced by a living, breathing human!
你…看来你并不是懂得欣赏音乐艺术，可惜。
You... It appears that you don't seem to appreciate the essence of musical artistry, what a pity.
呵呵，但也无所谓，我们演奏家并不是为你这种人工作的——我们的演奏只为满足那些尊重音乐的人，还有取悦我们自己的灵魂！
Heheh, but it doesn't matter. We musicians don't play for people like you — we only perform for those who appreciate music, and to sate the yearnings of love that our souls crave!
太好了，你这样懂得尊重音乐的人，才是真正值得我们倾注心血演奏的听众。
Fantastic! People like you who truly appreciate music are the ones we find deserving of our performances into which we pour our hearts and souls.
至于自动乐团的演奏…谁愿意听就去听吧！那些人永远无法理解真正的艺术！而一个伟大的音乐家也绝不会被这种「技术」轻易打败！

As for the performances by the automated orchestra... Whoever wants to listen can go ahead! Those people will never understand true art! A great musician will never be discouraged by such a travesty on art!
朋友，这些苜蓿币给你——答应我，拿它们去看场音乐会吧，台上全是活人的那种。
My friend, take these Alfalfa credits — just promise me, take these coins and go watch a performance where music is played by the living!
去聆听吧，去感受吧，去了解艺术真正应有的样子吧！
Hear it, feel it, and experience art as it should be!
区区物件的拙劣模仿，怎么能比得上人类用心奏响的音乐呢？
How can a crude imitation compare to music made from the heart?
真正的演奏艺术，是乐器、旋律、乐手一同合作的艺术品，蕴含着一个音乐人对艺术的感悟和他的灵魂！

The essence of true performance art lies in the harmonious collaboration of musical instruments, melodies, and musicians — a fusion that encompasses the musician's interpretation of art and their soul.
布罗娜直勾勾地望着自动乐团，眼眸逐渐失神——她似乎被起舞的乐器夺走了灵魂。
Brona stares at the automated orchestra, her eyes slowly losing focus — her soul seems to have been hooked by the melodious instruments.
唉，仔细想想…我所做的一切应该都是徒劳啊……
Alas, upon reflection... It seems that everything I've done has been in vain...
那些喜欢自动乐团的人，他们根本不是音乐家…他们也许是想要降低演出成本的商人，也许是想随时听到演出的宾客，也许只是想图个新鲜的普通人。

Those who enjoy the automated orchestra aren't virtuosos... Perhaps they are simply businessmen who want to minimize performance costs, or they could be guests who simply want to enjoy a musical piece, or just ordinary people in search of something refreshing.
演奏的意义、乐手的处境、艺术的未来…这些根本就不是他们在乎的东西，无论我怎么解释，也没办法让这些人共情。

The meaning of performance, the circumstances of artists and the future of art... These are not things that they are concerned about. No matter how much I try to reason with them, they simply can't empathize.
算了，或许演奏家终有一天会被这些没有灵魂的机巧淘汰吧——就让我在被世人遗弃的边缘演奏至最后一刻吧。
Forget it. Perhaps one day, all artists will be replaced by these soulless ingenia. Let me perform until the very last moment before the world abandons me and my craft.
但最让我伤心的是…我曾经还以为喜爱谐乐的家族能尊重我们这些演奏家，没想到他们却亲手制造了这些东西…这个给你吧，我已经不想再听他们虚伪的歌曲了。

What breaks my heart is... the fact that I used to think that the harmony-loving Family respected us musicians. It has never occurred to me that they were the ones behind this... This one's for you, I can't bear to listen to their hypocritical songs anymore.
唉，仔细想想…我所做的一切应该都是徒劳啊……
Alas, upon reflection... It seems that everything I've done has been in vain...
或许演奏家终有一天会被这些没有灵魂的机巧淘汰吧——就让我在被世人遗弃的边缘演奏至最后一刻吧。
Perhaps one day, musicians will be replaced by these soulless ingenia. Allow me to perform till I'm forsaken by the world.
布罗娜深呼了一口气，收回了对自动乐团投出的锐利目光——你感到一种知性的气息回到了她的身上。
Brona lets out a deep sigh, withdrawing her sharp gaze towards the automated orchestra. You feel an air of intellectualism returning to her.
我想起之前跟那个指挥家吵了一架，他告诉我「自动乐团」是有灵魂的。
I remember getting into an argument with that conductor — he told me that the automated orchestra has souls.
那些东西好像确实和我以前看过的智能乐器不同——它们似乎有自己的思想，有自己的性格，就像是「生命」一样……
Those things are certainly different from the smart musical instruments that I've encountered before. They appear to be sentient, and have their own personalities, as if they had life in them...
朋友，你说那些小东西真的能明白人类创造音乐的含义吗？
My friend, you're saying those little things can really understand the essence of music created by humans?
自动乐团…也是拥有灵魂的演奏者吗？
The automated orchestra... do they have souls?
但他们真的会对音乐发表看法，甚至会去了解自己指挥家的情绪……
But they'll really express their opinions about music, and even seek to understand the emotions of their conductors...
唔…或许成为有机生命并不是理解伟大音乐的先决条件。
Hmm... Perhaps organic life isn't a prerequisite to understanding great music.
我觉得自己或许该换个视角看待问题了。这些自动乐器说不定能创造新的音乐形式…我可能还要再思考一下。
I wonder if I should look at this problem from a different perspective. Perhaps this automated orchestra has a new way of creating music... I may have to contemplate further.
能收获对音乐的新感悟，这也是我在宇宙中旅行的意义。谢谢你的启发——这是我曾经为一群悲剧演员献奏时得到的报酬，小小薄礼，不成谢意。

One of the reasons for my cosmic travels is to gain new insights into music. Thank you for your revelation — this is the compensation I earned when I played my music for a group of tragedian actors. It's not much, just a token of my appreciation.
唔…或许成为有机生命并不是理解伟大音乐的先决条件。
Hmm... Perhaps organic life isn't a prerequisite to understanding great music.
我觉得自己或许该换个视角看待问题了。这些自动乐器说不定能创造新的音乐形式…我可能还要再思考一下。
I wonder if I should look at this problem from a different perspective. Perhaps this automated orchestra has a new way of creating music... I may have to contemplate further.
您好。看您的模样，是对店里售卖的豪车感兴趣？都是最新的款式，请随意挑选。
Hello. It looks like you're interested in one of our cars? These are all the latest models — don't hesitate to take your pick.
现在梦境里的公共交通是越来越发达了，速度也比以前要快，不过…乘坐那些狭窄球笼，终究还是少了些乐趣，您不这样觉得嘛？
The public transport in the Dreamscape is becoming more advanced, and much faster than before. But... it feels somewhat boring to sit in those Spheroids, don't you think?
既拥挤不堪，高峰时段还经常找不到座位。前些日子的新闻，不知道您有没有听说，有好几位皮皮西宾客，在过路口的时候差点被球笼给撞了。

They're crowded to the point where you can't even find a seat during peak hours. I don't know if you've heard the recent news, but a few Pepeshi guests were also almost run down by one of these Spheroids while crossing the road.
不算什么大事，但要真遇到还挺闹心的。要是您拥有了自己的车，这些烦恼就全免啦。
It may sound negligible, but things would've been bad if someone really got run down. If you had your own car, you'd be saved from all these troubles.
你们的车不会出事故吗？
Your cars won't get into accidents?
我向您保证，这批新车都是经过严格的质检程序才上市的，安全方面绝对有保障，这是我们的售后记录，可以给您翻阅，至今维持着全好评的成绩。

I can guarantee that this batch of new cars has all undergone stringent quality assurance testing before launch, and they're absolutely safe. This is our after-sales record, feel free to browse through it — they're all highly rated to this day.
你们的车比球笼要贵啊。
Your cars are even more expensive than Spheroids.
可我们的车比球笼要舒适呀。像您这样尊贵的宾客，出行最讲究的就是*松弛感*，来梦里是为了放松，要是再成天挤来挤去，可就得不偿失了。

But they're more comfortable than Spheroids. For an esteemed guest like you, *chill and relax* is the name of the game when you're traveling. It'd be a waste if you're being bustled all about when you've come to the dream to relax.
所以您看…这款车是否合您的心意呢？暗金色的车身与您的气质极为搭配，专为速度设计的流线造型也能满足您对时尚的追求，价钱合理，买它不会错的。

Well... would this car pique your interest? A dark gold car would go really well with your style, and the streamlined model designed for speed would fit right in with your pursuit of fashion. Its price is fair too — you'd be missing out if you didn't buy it.
不喜欢的话，店里还有其他款式。您可以慢慢挑选。
If you don't like it, there are other models in-store. Take your pick.
没问题。这些都是我们推荐的车型，配套齐全，总会有能让您满意的。
No problem. Our recommended models are fully equipped, so you're sure to find a model that suits your fancy.
呃…您是刚来匹诺康尼不久嘛，梦境里的车都是全自动驾驶，完全不需要进行任何操作，只用激活按钮，输入目的地，接下来交给系统就好。

Ah... You've just arrived in Penacony. The cars in the dreams are all self-driving. You don't have to drive them — just push the button, enter your destination and let the system take care of the rest.
说真的，您这个问题把我逗笑了。要是需要手动驾驶，我也不会向您保证绝对不会出事故了呀。
Haha, your question tickles me. Even with manual driving, I can't guarantee that there won't be accidents.
自动驾驶就不会出事吗？
Does self-driving mean there won't be accidents?
据我所知，本车行售卖的车辆，在梦境里还没有发生过任何事故，刚才的好评记录您也看到了，都是真实评价，不会有假。
To the best of my knowledge, the cars sold at this dealership have never been involved in any accidents. All the positive reviews you've seen are genuine!
就算…可以给您交个底，真发生了事故，我们也有极为完善的售后服务，绝对不会让您的利益受损，这样可以放心了吧。
Even if... Well, I can assure you, in the event of an accident, our impressive after-sales care ensures that we will never compromise your interests, so you can rest assured.
…我吗？您说笑了，本车行的豪车都是为您这样尊贵的宾客准备的，我连乘坐的机会都没有，怎么可能还会驾驶呢。
...Me? You must be kidding, the luxury cars at this dealership are exclusive to VIPs like yourself. I don't even get to sit in them, let alone drive them.
好的，您有需要的时候可以随时过来。
Certainly, feel free to drop by whenever you require assistance.
是对买车感兴趣吗？我们的车行随时欢迎您。
Interested in buying a car? You are always welcome at our dealership.
给您推荐的那款新车怎么样，最近的销量挺不错，价钱也合理。您可以再考虑下。
How's the model that I recommended? The recent sales have been strong, and it comes at a reasonable price. It might be worth your consideration.
怎么说，挣钱好像也没想得那么难嘛！
How do I put this, guess it's not that hard to earn money!
…心情好得就像是连着喝了十几杯甜味饮料，连身边的风都冒着气泡！
...I feel as if I've drunk a dozen sweet drinks in a row, even the wind is bubbling around me!
昨天是销售冠军，今天的成交量眼看着也要登顶，真是要感谢每位愿意光顾的客人——就是您吧！您就是我的苏乐达，我的快乐之源！

Yesterday we were top in sales, and it looks like we're going to repeat that feat again today. It's all thanks to the customers who are willing to support us — that must be you! You really are my SoulGlad, my source of happiness!
不再多逛逛嘛，我觉着呀，您和这些豪车就是绝配！都散发着苜蓿币的香味！
Don't you want to take a closer look? Personally, I feel our luxury cars and you are a match made in heaven! It radiates with the fragrance of Alfalfa credits!
你感到一股由衷的喜悦从身旁传来，仿佛寒冷的夜已经过去，最灿烂的梦即将实现，你不由得翘首以盼，沉陷在这份对明天的纯粹希望中。

You feel a wave of joy emanating from your side, as if the chilling night has passed, revealing a most splendid dream about to come true. You can't help but look forward to it, sinking into a pure hope for tomorrow.
…心情好得就像是连着喝了十几杯甜味饮料，连身边的风都冒着气泡！
...I feel as if I've drunk a dozen sweet drinks in a row, even the wind is bubbling around me!
昨天是销售冠军，今天的成交量眼看着也要登顶，真是要感谢每位愿意光顾的客人——就是您吧！您就是我的苏乐达，我的快乐之源！

Yesterday we were top in sales, and it looks like we're going to repeat that feat again today. It's all thanks to the customers who are willing to support us — that must be you! You really are my SoulGlad, my source of happiness!
不再多逛逛嘛，我觉着呀，您和这些豪车就是绝配！都散发着苜蓿币的香味！
Don't you want to take a closer look? Personally, I feel our luxury cars and you are a match made in heaven! It radiates with the fragrance of Alfalfa credits!
这个月到手的工资变少，都是那些人的错！
There's a cut in this month's paycheck, and it's all because of those people!
啧，那群猎犬都是贪婪…永远不会满足的人，该叫它们白眼狼！
Pft, those greedy hounds... They are never satisfied. More like freeloading dogs!
前几天，就在主干道上发生的那起车祸…明明以前花点钱就能摆平的，这次非得说，因为开车的是位皮皮西富商，要多送点礼物才能让他消气。

A few days ago, an accident happened on one of the main roads... It could've been resolved with some compensation, but he insisted that more gifts were required since it was a rich Pepeshi businessman driving the car.
就是他们自己私吞了！还要威胁我们，说不给钱就要把伪造好评的事传出去！奸诈！
They're the ones who took the money! They have the audacity to threaten us, saying that if we don't pay up, they'll leak the matter of us faking our reviews! So scummy!
为了抹掉事故记录，这个月的公关成本上升了不少…哎，奖金又要变少了。
In order to erase the records of the accident, this month's public relations costs have gone up... *sigh* My bonus is going to shrink again.
还有！我非得要喷了，好好的自动驾驶系统不用，坚持要用手操控，这不出事才怪嘛！有时候真不知道那些皮皮西人的脑子里都在想什么！

Also! I really have to say something about this: They refuse to use the self-driving function and insist on driving manually, of course there will be an accident! I really don't know what these Pepeshi are thinking!
哎，最开始就不该相信他们的……
*sigh* Shouldn't have trusted them in the first place...
我真傻…真不该劝老爸来这买车的。
I'm so stupid... I shouldn't have convinced my dad to buy a car here.
…手头的员工优惠始终没用，正好他原本的车也该换了，就想着…趁这个机会，占点车行的便宜。内部价，再打上折扣还真挺实惠的。

...I never used my employee's discount, and it was time to replace his car. So, I saw it as a good opportunity to take advantage of the dealership — the discounted internal price is actually quite a steal!
结果…给我们的是仓库里积压了好几年的老型号。不仅驾驶系统早就过时了，需要全部重新安装，就连表面的喷漆都开始变色，尽是怪味……

In the end... we were given an outdated model that had been sitting in storage for years. Not only was the driving system obsolete and needed to be replaced, the paint was discolored, and it also had a strange odor...
这哪是员工福利呀，分明就是把卖不出去的产品低价清仓…还吃准了我不敢投诉的想法，品牌形象受影响，我的奖金也要减少。哎。
How is this to the employees' benefit? It's clearly just clearance for unsold stock... They knew I wouldn't dare complain about fear of affecting the brand's image and my bonus taking a hit... Argh!
能怎么办呢，就当是个教训，想保住工作，就必须吃这个亏…我真傻。
What can I do about it? I'll just take it as a lesson learned. If I want to keep this job, I'll just have to take this... I'm so stupid!
欢迎光临！店里都是刚到的衣服，时尚潮流，款式齐全，您可以随意挑选。
Welcome! The store has a new season of arrivals, fashionable and stylish with an array of designs, take your pick!
要是有喜欢的，我可以帮您看看折扣，价钱绝对公道。
If you see something you like, I can help you check if there's a discount, it'll be a steal!
这些是近期颇受好评的单品，挑出来供您选购。
These are some of the bestsellers recently, I've picked them out for you to choose from!
How long have you worked here?
…您是问我吗？没多长时间，原先的那位店员辞职了，我才刚从其他店调过来。
...Are you asking me? I've only been here for a while, the previous staff quit and I just got transferred here from another store.
请放心，我从事服务行业也好几年了，会竭力保障您愉快的购物体验。
Please be assured, I have been in the service industry for several years. I will do my utmost to ensure that you have a delightful shopping experience.
不打扰您了，有需要随时喊我就行。
I won't impose any further, please feel free to reach out to me if you require any assistance.
It's an honor to serve you.
对店里的商品还满意吗？有任何意见，都可以直接向我提出，我们会尽全力改进。
Are you satisfied with the items in our store? If you have any suggestions, feel free to let me know and we will do our best to improve.
我得好好干，绝不能浪费这个来之不易的机会！
I'll have to do my best, I can't afford to let this opportunity go to waste!
…总算在梦境里找到了份稳定体面的工作，待遇还不错！我得好好干，绝不能浪费这个来之不易的机会。
...I finally found a decent job in the Dreamscape with decent benefits! I'll have to do my best, I can't afford to let this opportunity go to waste!
感谢家族的提拔，感谢我妻子的支持和照顾……
It's all thanks to The Family for the promotion, and my wife's for her care and support...
...What can we do? We can only keep on living.
店里的营收压力很大，家族那边也逼得紧，孩子的学费没着落，生活开销倒水涨船高。
The pressure for in-store sales is huge, and The Family's demands are pressing. My child's tuition is not settled and the cost of living is going through the roof.
不知道当时，柯柯娜是怎么撑下来的…她既然选择离职，肯定找到了更好的去处吧。
I have no idea how Cocona even endured this ordeal... If she chose to resign, that must mean she found something better.
真想看看那些规矩是哪个大聪明想出来的！
I'd really like to see who's the genius who came up with these rules!
...What kind of crap rules are these!
「时刻谨记：客人的话都是对的，客人的指责都有道理，客人的意见必须听从，客人的期待就是你的目标…如果收到差评，无条件扣除半个月工资，并取消晋升资格。」

"Always bear in mind: The customer's words are always right, the customer's complaints are always practical, the customer's opinions must be adhered to, the customer's expectation is your goal... If poor reviews are received, half a month's pay will be docked without question, and promotion evaluation will not be considered."
管得这么严，还让不让人活了！
So strict! How about we just dig ourselves a grave!?
啊，没想到连着喝下<unbreak>40</unbreak>瓶苏乐达会是这种滋味。真是…太爽啦！
Ah, who would've thought downing forty bottles of SoulGlad back-to-back would feel like this. It feels... absolutely amazing!
我一定要把这感觉记下来…那边那个，你也要加入派对？
I have to note this feeling down... You, over there, do you want to join the party?
别担心，这只是一点小小的…兴奋过度。梦里的苏乐达，喝不坏身子的！
Don't worry about me. I'm just a little... over-excited. Inside a dream, drinking SoulGlad doesn't harm your body!
何况我可是丹西，「黄金的时刻」最逍遥的派对客，怎么会因为玩乐倒下？
Plus, I'm Dancy! I am Golden Hour's most legendary partygoer. You think a bit of fun is enough to take me out?
还能是什么？「黄金的时刻」无时无刻不在举办派对，需要自备的只有一颗爱玩的心。
What party do you think? Golden Hour is one non-stop party! All you need to bring is a fun-loving spirit!
而我，就是这里最逍遥的派对客，丹西！
As for me, I'm the most legendary partygoer here, Dancy!
看我的皮皮西后援团就知道，我可比一般人会玩多了。整个匹诺康尼就没有我不敢尝试的娱乐！
You can tell by my Pepeshi entourage that I am the biggest partygoer around! There is no form of entertainment in Penacony that I wouldn't dare try!
要是你也愿意成为我的粉丝——更准确地说，派对搭子——我就可以和你分享我源源不断的<color=#f29e38ff>「艾迪恩代币」</color>，让你在梦里尽情畅玩。

If you were willing to become my fan — Or, my party partner, to be more precise — I can share my endless <color=#f29e38ff>"Aideen Tokens"</color> with you, so you can play to your heart's content inside the dream.
好！从现在起，我们就是共同进退的玩伴了。
Okay! From now on, we are ride-or-die party partners!
别那么没精神嘛~从现在起，我们就是共同进退的玩伴了！
Don't say it like that! From now on, we are ride-or-die party partners!
这…没关系，照样给！谁让咱们都是来匹诺康尼玩的逐梦客呢，哈哈~
That... It's fine. I'll give them to you anyway! After all, we are all Dreamchasers here in Penacony, haha~
来，干了这瓶苏乐达！让我们一起拥抱「糖浆主义」！
Come, drink this SoulGlad! Let us embrace syrupism together!
So, what about today's friendship fee?
What's the hurry! I was just about to give it to you!
I want to chat with you.
玩得开心，朋友，别让梦境留有遗憾！
Have fun, my friend! Don't leave any regrets in the Dreamscape!
如何评价匹诺康尼的美梦？
How would you rate the dreams of Penacony?
绝赞！我就这么说吧，如果不是生存所迫，谁不想一辈子待在梦里？！
Super awesome! Let me put it this way, if it weren't a matter of survival, I don't think anyone would ever want to leave this dream!
你要知道，对绝大多数普通人来说，现实只会带来一肚子负面情绪，唯有在梦中才能尽情释放自我。
What you have to understand is that for most regular people, reality only brings a world of negative emotions. It's only in the dream world that we can truly unleash our inner selves!
再没有哪个地方比梦境更适合生活了。这里就是天堂，是抚慰人心的魔法泉。
There is no better place to live. This is paradise, and a magical spring that soothes our souls.
创造这一切的「钟表匠」简直是大众灵魂的救星！
"The Watchmaker" that created this place, is truly the people's savior!
而我，派对客丹西，将用玩乐来向他献上最崇高的敬意！
As for me, Dancy the partygoer, I will use fun as my way of expressing my greatest respect to him!
How do you rate Golden Hour?
我最喜欢的「时刻」，没有之一。十分满分的话我给它九点九分。
It is my favorite Moment, without exception. I'd give it <unbreak>9.9</unbreak> out of <unbreak>10</unbreak>!
谁没有过在夜幕下眺望高楼的经历呢？每每看着这座永不熄灯的城市，我就感到…安心。
Who hasn't stared up at the skyscrapers under the cover of night? Whenever I see this city that never sleeps, I feel... at peace.
即使什么娱乐设施都没有，我也愿意待在栏杆边上，对着远处的楼宇发呆一整天。
Even if there were no fun and games on offer, I'd be happy to stand by the rail and stare at the distant buildings for a whole day.
我相信它肯定抓住了我们心底的什么东西。
I am convinced that the city has captured something in all our hearts.
Do you have any fun recommendations?
「黄金的时刻」你肯定已经玩了个八九不离十，我就不再赘述了。
I know you must have played almost everything Golden Hour has to offer by now, so I won't keep babbling on...
之前听新闻说，家族正在扩建一处全新的梦境空间。那地方好像叫什么「筑梦边境」，暂时还不让外人参观。
I heard on the news that The Family is building a brand-new Dreamscape. They're calling it "Dream's Edge" or something like that, but outsiders aren't allowed in for now.
不过，能被家族叫来当筑梦师的家伙肯定都很会玩。你要是有办法溜去那里，指不定能偷学两招。
Although, I just know that anyone that The Family would call to be a Dreamweaver must be super fun. If you could find a way to sneak in, maybe you could learn a few tricks from them.
唉~再不快点出新地图的话，逐梦客们迟早也会厌倦这里吧……
Ugh, if they don't drop a new map soon, Dreamchasers will get bored with this place...
每周都有艾迪恩代币拿吗？
Are there Aideen Tokens to grab every week?
当然…不过每周只能拿一次。
Of course... But only once a week.
我需要一些时间把它们…取出来。对，从我的小金库里取出来。
I need some time to... withdraw them. That's right. To withdraw them from my personal vault.
在此期间，你先随便玩点其他的什么，之后再来找我谈这个话题吧。
In the meantime, go and play something else for a while. We can discuss this topic again later.
玩得开心，朋友，别让梦境留有遗憾！
Have fun, my friend! Don't leave any regrets in the Dreamscape!
是你啊，我的朋友。让我们…嗨起来？
It's you, my friend! Shall we... party?
丹西的表情开始凝固，就像冷却下来的热油。
Dancy's expression began to freeze, like hot wax solidifying as it cools.
奇怪，我感觉…有点累。难道是最近嗨过头了？
That's strange. I feel... a little tired. Maybe I have overdone the partying a little lately?
不对，现在不是思考这些的时候。如果不赶紧玩的话，我来「黄金的时刻」不就失去意义了吗？
No, now is not the time to be thinking such things! If I don't start having fun right now, then coming to Golden Hour loses all meaning. Don't you think?
可惜，没有了激情，再热闹的派对也嗨不起来了。
Unfortunately, a party without passion will never be a true blast.
为什么人只有在梦中才能放松自己呢……
Why is it that I can only ever relax inside the dream world...
唉，为什么人只有在梦中才能放松自己呢……
Ah, why is it that people can only ever relax once they are in the dream world...
丹西的表情低落下来，欲哭无泪。
Dancy's expression suddenly dropped, as if they were about to cry.
人们总是往我身上贴标签，什么酒店经理，什么完美精英…就好像我不用上厕所一样。
People are always trying to put labels on me... such as "hotel manager," "perfect elite"... It's like I'm not even a human that uses the toilet just like everyone else.
有时我也会感到劳累，也想摆脱这些印象…可大家的期许已经成了我的面具，戴上容易，摘下来难……
I feel tired too, sometimes. I want to escape these impressions... But people's expectations have become a mask for me; easy to wear, but very hard to remove...
到头来，我只有在梦里、变成别人认不出的样子，才能稍稍展露本心……
In the end, it's only in the dream world where I can become someone that no one recognizes that I can truly show my authentic self.
哈，我可比看上去不正经多了！
Hah, I'm a lot less serious than I look!
丹西的神态突然开始扭捏起来，眉头时而紧锁、时而舒展……
Dancy's expression began to warp, brow furrowing and relaxing...
现实酒店里的那些年轻服务员，每次一见我就怕得要死，却在背地里联合起来说我苛刻。
Those waiters in the hotel in reality, every time they see me, they're scared half to death. Then, when they're behind my back, they gang up and say that I'm cruel.
估计他们还以为我很不食人间烟火。哈，其实都是假正经！
They probably think that I am stuck-up and consider myself superior to everyone around me. Hah! My seriousness is all an act!
真以为我喜欢总是板着个脸啊？还不是因为有人敬酒不吃吃罚酒！
You think I enjoy always having a stern face on? I have to be like this, or they'll walk all over me!
At least my seriousness scared them into behaving...
My friend! No Party, No Life!
仿佛播碟机切到了一张劲爆的摇滚专辑，丹西的脸突然换上了一副激动的表情。
Dancy's expression suddenly became super excited, as if a jukebox had suddenly started blasting an electrifying rock anthem.
呜呼，真是人不疯玩枉少年啊！
Woohoo! No Party, No Life! My friend!
何必反思过去？何必焦虑未来？我们唯一要做的就是享受当下，纵情玩耍。
Why dwell on the past? Why worry about the future? The only thing we need to do is enjoy the moment and have fun!
这就是苏萨先生的《糖浆主义宣言》，你们都该明白这个道理！
That is precisely Mr. Sousa's Syrupism Manifesto. Make sure you understand this lesson!
随着他的动作幅度逐渐加大，各种东西从他口袋里接二连三地掉出……
As his movements grew larger and more exaggerated, various things began to fall out of his pockets, one after the other...
仿佛播碟机切到了一张劲爆的专辑，丹西的脸突然换上了一副激动的表情。
Dancy's expression suddenly became super excited, as if a CD player had suddenly started blasting a power ballad.
呜呼，真是人不疯玩枉少年啊！
Woohoo! No Party, No Life! My friend!
何必反思过去？何必焦虑未来？我们唯一要做的就是享受当下，纵情玩耍。
Why dwell on the past? Why worry about the future? The only thing we need to do is enjoy the moment and have fun!
这就是苏萨先生的《糖浆主义宣言》，你们都该明白这个道理！
That is precisely Mr. Sousa's Syrupism Manifesto. Make sure you understand this lesson!
这位朋友，请留步，容我采访你一下——请问你知道什么是「二次元」吗？
My friend, please allow me a moment. I would like to interview you — Are you familiar with "anime"?
我不懂二次元，你教教我吧。
I'm not. Tell me about it.
唉…我以前以为我懂什么是二次元，但事到如今，我也搞不清楚了…到底什么是二次元呢？
Oh... I used to think I understood what anime was but recently, I can't seem to tell... Just exactly what IS anime?
让我来教教你，我是动漫高手。
Let me teach you. I am an anime expert.
你？动漫高手？不是我看不起你啊，要论「动漫高手」，在这匹诺康尼还没人比我配得上这称呼…可现在连我，都搞不懂什么是二次元了……

You? An anime expert? It's not that I am underestimating your knowledge. It's just that no one in Penacony is more fitting for the title of anime expert than I... It's just that now, even I cannot understand what anime is anymore...
你自己不就是二次元角色？
Are you not yourself an anime character?
你真有意思，我怎么会是二次元角色呢？人家二次元角色要么酷炫要么可爱，我配吗？
What a strange thing to say. How could I be an anime character? Anime characters are all either cool or cute. You think I live up to that?
我原本来到这匹诺康尼，是为了拓展自己作为二次元艺术家的眼界，可事到如今，倒是陷入了困惑，不知道到底什么才算是二次元了……
I originally came to Penacony to expand my outlook as an anime artist but... I find that I have fallen into confusion and no longer know what anime even IS anymore...
唉…我一直以为自己多多少少也算是当世泰斗了，可现在却觉得，自己远比自己想象中要浅薄。
Ah... I always thought that I was an authority in the modern anime world... But now I feel like I am far less knowledgeable than I imagined.
好啊。也许和你聊聊，也能帮我拓宽一些思路，走出泥沼。
Alright. Perhaps through talking with you I will be able to expand my thinking and escape this slump.
你为啥觉得自己搞不懂二次元？
Why do you think you don't understand what anime is?
这件事说来话长…我以前是常盘国教育科学省的大臣，任期结束后，就来到匹诺康尼，研究本地的动漫产业。
It's a long story... I was once the Minister of Education and Technology in Tokiwa. Once my time in that capacity ended, I came to Penacony to research the local anime industry.
其实原本我只是来这里采风的，可很快却发现，这里的动漫产业和我理解中的完全不同。
I actually originally came just to perform interviews, but I quickly realized that the anime industry here was completely different to how I had understood it to be.
常盘国的二次元创作已经逐渐形成了一套完整的规范…该写什么样的角色、什么样的世界观、什么样的故事，早就有了成熟的模板。

Anime works in Tokiwa have gradually formed a set of complete standards and norms... A well-formed template for what kinds of characters to write, what kinds of worldviews to feature and what kinds of stories to create has been set in place for a very long time.
可匹诺康尼的动画和漫画似乎并非如此。这里的很多角色和情节设置，若是放到常盘国的市场里，一定会被很多人斥责「这不是二次元」！

However, animations and comics in Penacony are not this way. A lot of the characters and plot devices used here, if they were released in the Tokiwa market, would have people screaming: "This isn't anime!"
我本来也是抱着猎奇的心态去接触那些作品的，没想到它们有着远超我预期的想象力……
I originally kept a curious mind when I came into contact with these works. The level of imagination in them far exceeded my expectations...
那是一种常盘国的先贤们才有的想象力，而在如今的常盘国，早已不复得见了。
It is a level of imagination that only the sages of Tokiwa once had, one that has not been seen in Tokiwa for a long time.
所以…我开始动摇了。是不是我们常盘国的所谓「二次元」，已经变质成了一种无趣的定型文，而我们引以为傲的那些创作规范…也许都是错的……

So, I began to waver. Could it be that what we call "anime" in Tokiwa had long-since degraded to become a boring set of tropes, and those standards that we once held so proudly... could be incorrect...?
你老家是个怎么样的地方？
常盘国是个自然资源匮乏的国家，我们在公司贸易体系中最重要的出口商品，就是我们的二次元艺术品。
Tokiwa is a country of sparse natural resources, and our most valuable export in the IPC trade system is our anime artwork.
所以长久以来，动漫创作是常盘国人的普遍教养。任何知识分子都会画漫画，民众也不会给没参与过动画制作的政治家投票。

So, for a long time, making anime has been part of the Tokiwa people's upbringing. Any educated person can draw manga and the people would never vote for a politician who hasn't been part of an anime's creation.
可随着时间的推移，我们的创作越来越故步自封，创作者对着所谓「模板」，不敢越雷池一步。
However, as time has progressed, our works have become more and more stale and creators are reluctant to step outside of this so-called "template."
我一度觉得这是常盘国文艺创作开始步入正轨的结果，直到来到匹诺康尼，我才恍然惊觉…自己是不是已经扼杀了无数潜在的天才？

I once believed that this was a result of Tokiwa's literary creations being on the right track. That wasn't until I came to Penacony that I suddenly realized... I might have killed the creativity of countless potential geniuses.
可话虽如此，但到底什么是二次元…二次元创作又到底应该遵循什么规范…我是越来越想不通了……
Saying that, the more I think about "what anime actually is" and "what standards should anime really obey"... The more lost I become...
I have things to take care of. Let's speak again another time.
好啊，下次如果有时间，可以聊聊你对二次元的理解。
Alright. If you get time, you can talk to me about your understanding of anime.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
摸了也不会变成动漫高手哦～
It won't turn you into an anime expert, you know!
I have things to take care of. Let's speak again another time.
好啊，下次如果有时间，可以聊聊你对二次元的理解。
Alright. If you get time, you can talk to me about your understanding of anime.
平田平次皱着眉头，嘴里念念有词，似乎正在思考母国动漫产业的未来。
Hirata Heiji furrows his brow, mumbling something to himself. It seems that he is deeply considering the future of the anime industry in his homeland...
是否应该彻底抛弃掉所谓「久经市场验证的创作规则」，去拥抱更加不确定的可能性呢？
Are we supposed to completely abandon these so-called "creation standards that have repeatedly proven themselves in the market," to embrace more uncertain possibilities?
这也许会带来更好的作品，但也可能会导致极为惨痛的失败……
This may bring higher-quality works, but it may also lead to a disastrous failure...
究竟该怎么做呢？真是难以抉择……
What are we supposed to do? This truly is a difficult decision...
我其实有些摇摆…艺术创作是否应该有所谓的规范呢？
I'm actually starting to waver... Is artistic creation even supposed to have these so-called standards?
如果没有规范，那艺术作品和鬼画符的区别是什么？如果有规范，那是否必然会导向如今常盘国艺术节规范呆板的现状？

If there are no standards, then what differentiates art from just random scribbling? If there are standards, then that will inevitably lead to the current situation we see in Tokiwa, with regulations and standards causing stagnation.
也许只有搞清楚这件事，才能为常盘国的未来找到道路。
Perhaps figuring this out is my only way to find a path for Tokiwa's future.
平田平次皱着眉头，眼中含着泪，似乎正为母国的动漫产业而忧心。
Hirata Heiji furrows his brow, with a tear in his eye. It seems that he is deeply concerned for the future of the anime industry in his homeland...
我太缺少危机意识了。常盘国自己的市场够大，在公司的贸易体系内也一直占有相当程度的份额。
I was too oblivious to our crisis. Tokiwa's market is sufficiently developed and we have always occupied considerable shares within the IPC trade system.
所以我一直以为，我们的动漫产业已经足够好了…直到来到匹诺康尼，我才意识到危机离我有多近。
So, I always believed that our anime industry was just fine... It wasn't until I came to Penacony that I realized how close we were to crisis.
我做了很多年的教育科学省大臣，非常清楚匹诺康尼动漫产业所蕴含的市场潜力…只要他们有心去做更进一步的商业化运作，那常盘国的二次元帝国必将遭受一场浩劫……

I've served as the Minister of Education and Technology for many years, so I know very well the market potential contained within the Penacony anime industry... All it takes would be for them to increase their market operations, and the Tokiwa anime empire would fall into catastrophe...
是时候做出改变了，因为危机总比它看起来更加迫近……
It is time for change. Crisis is always closer than it seems.
平田平次凝望着天空，怒目圆瞪。
Hirata Heiji stares into the sky, his eyes wide with anger.
我现在开始恨自己了。我真的恨。常盘国的人民选我做大臣，可我却沉浸在四海太平的假象之中，忘记了居安思危的简单道理。

I have started to hate myself. Truly, I despise myself. The citizens of Tokiwa have selected me to be their Minister, yet I allow myself to be immersed in delusions of stability. Everyone knows that it is precisely when things are peaceful that you should begin to prepare for disaster!
如果有一天——我想这一天也许不会太久——常盘国的二次元艺术走向了没落，那我身为教育科学省的前大臣，必然是最大的罪人！
If the day comes — A day that I don't think is far away — when Tokiwa anime falls into decline, then my time spent as the Minister of Education and Technology was my biggest sin to my people!
现在的受众还能够接受常盘国的二次元，只是因为他们早已习惯了！而并非因为这些真的是全银河最好的动漫产品！
The only reason that our audiences are still able to accept Tokiwa anime is because they've long-since grown used to it! It is not because our works are the best in the cosmos at all!
等到人们发现，在那些未被人关注到的角落，存在着无数更新更好的作品时，我那伟大的「二次元帝国」的末日就到了……
When people realize that there are countless greater works hidden in the galaxy's unexplored corners, our great anime empire will meet its day of judgment...
平田平次皱着眉头，但嘴角却挂着微笑。
Hirata Heiji furrows his brow, but a smile hangs at the corners of his lips.
其实也挺好的。虽然我遭受到了巨大的文化冲击，但这又何尝不是一种幸事呢？
You know what, that is okay, too. Although I suffered a great culture shock, is that not a good thing?
我是卸任官员，是政治家，是常盘国的名流——但在那些身份之前，我首先是个漫画家！
I am a retired official, a politician, and a household name across Tokiwa... But, before all these things, I am an anime artist!
我喜欢漫画，漫画是这个世界上最伟大的叙事艺术。但如果没有来到匹诺康尼，遭受到这莫大的冲击，我对漫画的认知恐怕会永远陷入浅薄的泥沼。

I like manga, as it is the greatest storytelling art form in existence. However, if I had never come to Penacony and experienced this shock, I fear that my knowledge of manga would have been forever stuck in the shallows.
我会继续考察匹诺康尼的动漫产业，学习他们的技法，研究他们的叙事…最终我会将它们与常盘国的技法融会贯通，成为独具一格的艺术！

I shall continue to reference the Penacony anime industry, learn their techniques, and research their storytelling... Finally, I will combine them with our Tokiwa techniques and become an artist like no other!
这是一件幸运的事，真的！经此一遭，我有信心如常盘国的那些建国先贤一样，成为伟大的漫画家！
I am truly fortunate to have this opportunity, truly! I am confident that I can become a great manga artist, just like Tokiwa's founding sages!
建筑不是艺术，建筑也不该是艺术。只有能力低下者才执着于「艺术」，因为他们没有运用「技术」的知能。
Architecture is not an art, nor should it be. Only those with low capability are obsessed with "art" because they do not have the capacity to utilize "technology."
看来你听到了我的自言自语，真是羞愧。
I see you've overheard me talking to myself. How embarrassing.
阿锡卡的脸上并没有露出任何羞愧的神情。
Asika's face shows absolutely no signs of embarrassment.
很高兴你能这么想。有机生命大都热衷于歌颂某种并不实际存在的「艺术性」，来掩盖自己在技术上的无能。你与他们不同。

I'm very pleased that you feel this way. The majority of organic lifeforms love to extol and obsess over this "art" that does not even exist, so as to cover up their technological incompetence. You are not the same as them.
看来你听到了我的自言自语，真是羞愧。
I see you've overheard me talking to myself. How embarrassing.
阿锡卡的脸上并没有露出任何羞愧的神情。
Asika's face shows absolutely no signs of embarrassment.
你会这么说，我并不意外。有机生命大都热衷于歌颂某种并不实际存在的「艺术性」，来掩盖自己在技术上的无能。
I'm not surprised that you would say this. The majority of organic lifeforms love to extol and obsess over this "art" that does not even exist, so as to cover up their technological incompetence.
抱歉，我的用词有些过分。我绝对没有侮辱你或其他有机生命的故意…如果你受到了冒犯，我诚恳道歉。
My apologies. My use of words was a little harsh. I do not intend to mock you or other organic lifeforms... If I have offended you, please accept my sincere apologies.
只是我的那些有机学生们实在太不开窍，让我这铁疙瘩憋了一肚子火，这才忍不住口出暴言。
It's just that my organic lifeform students just don't understand what I'm teaching them. It has lit a fire in my stomach, and I could not help but blurt out these harsh words.
「艺术」当然是很重要的，只是…「艺术」绝不是孤立存在的某种特性，而是服从于功能而自然产生的美学景观。

Of course "art" is important. It's just... There is no way that "art" exists as an independent characteristic; it is merely an aesthetic landscape that is naturally produced as the result of a function.
再次抱歉，我好为人师的老毛病又犯了。当然，你若是不介意，我倒是愿意再和你聊聊。
My apologies. I always end up lecturing people like this. Of course, if you do not take offense, I would like to continue our discussion.
好啊，我非常乐于与你交流。
Alright. I am very happy to communicate with you.
我以前是卡戎•塔尔金星系联盟的建筑系教授，现在是折纸大学筑梦技术系的教授。
I was once an architecture professor in the Charon-Targin System Alliance. Now I am a professor of dreamweaving technology at Paperfold University.
我平时在「太阳的时刻」上班，下班后才会来「黄金的时刻」让自己放松一下。
Normally, after I finish work in the Moment of Sol, I come to Golden Hour to relax by myself.
建筑师和筑梦师，这两种工作没什么本质区别。虽然在建筑手段上大有不同，但对于我们设计者来说，工作还是一样的工作。
An architect and a Dreamweaver, the two jobs have no intrinsic difference. Although there are many differences in the methods of construction, to us designers, the work is the same.
不过嘛…梦境终究是个更自由的地方，很多原本只能留在蓝图上的概念性建筑，完全可以在匹诺康尼得以实现。
However... The dreamscape is a place of greater freedom. Many conceptual buildings that originally would have never made it further than a blueprint are completely possible in Penacony.
我一向不觉得这是好事。这让很多匹诺康尼的筑梦师沾染上了「务虚」的恶习，建造出了一堆非用户友好的垃圾建筑。

I have never thought that it's a good thing. This allows Dreamweavers in Penacony to fall into the bad habits of "focusing on ideology" and constructing a load of non-user-friendly garbage structures.
比方说…只要触发某个开关就能调转重力、让人在墙上走？这种功能到底有什么用？花里胡哨的，很有趣吗？
For example... What if there's a switch that could turn off gravity and allow people to walk along walls? Is this function useful? Is it fun to get wrapped up in this nonsense?
不过恐怕光凭我自己，是很难扭转这矫饰主义的风气了。
Though I fear that it will not be easy for me to reverse this trend of pretentious aesthetics alone.
糟糕？那倒不至于，他们都是很优秀的年轻人。只是…我和我的学生们，可能是相互折磨的典范。
Bad? They're not. They're all excellent young people. It's just that... my students and I may be the epitome of mutual torment.
我恨他们不开窍，天天去凭空追求艺术，而忽略了建筑的本质应当是实用性。他们也恨我，恨我不肯放他们自由地追寻梦想。

I hate that they spend their days chasing artistic ideas that are based on nothing and overlook the fact that the innate nature of architecture is practicality. They also hate that I will not allow them to go and freely chase their dreams.
我在他们眼中就是那种典型的智械教授，呆板、守旧、无法理解有机生命的追求…像从什么歧视智械的有机至上主义电影中走出来的角色一样。

In their eyes, I am just a classic Intellitron professor, inflexible, outdated and incapable of understanding the pursuits of organic lifeforms... They're like characters out of some organic-supremacist film that looks down on Intellitrons.
但他们不了解我，也不了解建筑学。我可能…也不够了解他们吧。
But they do not understand me, nor architecture. Perhaps... I do not understand them well enough, either.
唉…我现在只希望他们不要真的恨我。
Ah... I just wish that they will not truly hate me.
I have things to do, bye!
I have things to do, bye!
事实上没有任何证据表明，有机生命比无机生命「更浪漫」或是「更懂艺术」。很多人只是没办法反驳我的观点，才选择攻击我作为智械的身份。

In truth, there is no evidence that states that organic lifeforms are "more romantic" or "have a greater understanding of art" than the inorganic. Many people just choose to attack my identity as an Intellitron as they do not have a way to refute this view.
坦白说，我不太看得起很多「伟大」的建筑师。他们的思维方式非常诡异，充满了不合逻辑的倒果为因。
I'll be frank. I do not hold many "great" architects in high regard. They use bizarre methods of thought which are full of illogical decisions that mistake effect for cause.
比方说折纸大学的另一个教授，嘎鲁酋长——以前还是博识学会的呢。她就一直强调要跳脱「建筑语言的直叙性」，创造一种「比喻性的建筑语言」。

Take my fellow professor at Paperfold University, for example: Chief Gru — former member of the Intelligentsia Guild. She always stressed the need for us to break away from the "direct narrative nature of architectural language" and create a kind of "metaphorical architectural language."
嘎鲁酋长设计「泰科铵大球馆」时，引经据典去诠释她的艺术思想——
When Chief Gru designed the Taikiyan Stadium, she quoted classic architectural works to explain her artistic thought process.
「对五个琥珀纪以来极繁主义滥觞的驳斥」、「阐释了非资本性的资本竞技及其先天性的二律背反」…实在太过佶屈聱牙，我一个智械都背不出来。

"A rebuttal against the origin of maximalism for five Amber Eras," "An analysis of non-capital capital competition and their intrinsic antimony"... It was so convoluted that even an Intellitron like myself would struggle to memorize it.
可到最后，有人在乎她那些深奥的「艺术理论」吗？没有。人们只在乎大球馆极不合理的卫生间位置，以及缺乏安全性的球场设计。

But, in the end, did anyone care about her "artistic theories"? No. People only cared about the extremely illogical locations of the toilets within the large stadium and the unsafe design of the court.
这些缺陷后来都被公司擅自改掉了，嘎鲁酋长直到现在还在生气，说公司「败坏了艺术」，太可笑了。
IPC later fixed these problems themselves without consultation. Chief Gru is still mad to this day, saying that IPC ruined art. It's ridiculous.
其实大家对我也有所误会…我并非先天就是个呆板的老学究，我曾经也是个充满激情的建筑师。我做过那样的建筑师，所以我才知道那样是不行的。

People actually misunderstand me... I have not always been a rigid old pedant. I used to be an extremely enthusiastic young architect. It is precisely because I have lived as this kind of architect that I know it does not work.
好像和你说过，我在卡戎•塔尔金的时候也是大学教授。在「赫尔辛格•塔尔金纪念大学」建筑设计系任教。
I think I mentioned to you before, I was a university professor when I was in Charon-Targin. I was an instructor in the department of architectural design at Herzinger Targin Memorial University.
大学五百年校庆的时候，我主导设计了一个三万人大礼堂。当时我受矫饰主义建筑学派影响很深，也执着于做一些极繁的、非用户友好的建筑。

For the school's <unbreak>500</unbreak>th anniversary celebration, I led the design of an auditorium with a thirty thousand person capacity. At the time, I was heavily influenced by mannerist teachings, and I was obsessed with making overly complex and non-user-friendly buildings.
「赫尔辛格大礼堂」就是我当时最得意的作品。为了完成这个「伟大」的作品，我牺牲了很多建筑本应有的东西……
The Herzinger Auditorium was my proudest work at the time. However, in order to create this great work, I sacrificed a lot of elements that a building was supposed to have...
比如…一定程度的安全性。真的只是牺牲了一点点安全性，一点点而已。我又不是疯子，不可能完全罔顾安全。
For example... a set level of safety. It really was just a little safety precaution that I sacrificed, just a tiny one... I am not a madman, so I would never completely forsake safety.
可就是这一点点被牺牲的安全性，最终导致了近两万名师生…唉…我说不下去了，你自己查吧，「赫尔辛格大礼堂坍塌事故」。有不少关于这个的纪录片。

But just a little sacrifice in safety led to nearly twenty thousand students and teachers... Ah... I can't bring myself to talk about it. You can look it up for yourself: "The disaster of the Herzinger Auditorium collapse." There are a number of documentaries detailing it.
事发之后，很多人为我辩护。他们说这些不是我的错，他们说这是施工方的问题，他们说这是选材的失误…可我很清楚，这就是我的错。

After the incident, many people came to my defense. They said that it was not my fault; they said that it was the construction company's fault, and they'd made a mistake when selecting materials... But I knew very well, that this was my mistake.
从那以后，我就恨透了我自己，也恨透了我那时迷信的「建筑艺术」…我们合谋，害死了很多很多人……
Since then, I have hated myself to my core and hated this blind worship of the "art of architecture"... This path we plotted killed so many people.
我其实每天都想从折纸大学辞职。梦境里的人比外面的人还务虚，有时候我都想一人赏他们一闷棍，再拖到小黑屋里打到他们放弃梦想为止。

If I'm honest, I think about quitting my job at Paperfold University every day. People in the dreamscape are even more unrealistic than those outside. Sometimes, I want to beat them for their ideas, then drag them into a dark room and beat them until they abandon their dreams entirely.
我这话不好听吧？但我这可是真心话！哎…我发自内心希望他们能明白，他们的阿锡卡教授绝不是无法理解他们的「艺术」！
I imagine that sounds terrible? But it is my truth! Ah... I truly wish that they will come to understand, it is not that their Professor Asika could never understand their "art"!
但如果想搞纯艺术，就去艺术系吧！筑梦技术系不需要那么多务虚的人！
But if they just wish to focus on art, they should become artists! The dream construction department does not need all these unrealistic Dreamweavers!
到底什么是「建筑的艺术」？非常简单！就一句话——「建筑是一种机器」！
Just what is the "art of architecture"? It's simple! "A building is a type of machine"!
那，什么是「机器的艺术」？最美的飞船长成什么样子？易于航行的外表设计、坚固安全的外壳选材、低耗高效的虚数内能引擎…这样的飞船是最实用的，也是最美的，不是吗？

Then, what is the "art of machinery"? What does the most beautiful spaceship look like? An exterior design that eases navigation, a body constructed from a sturdy and safe material, a low-emission and high-efficiency imaginary intra-kinetic engine... A ship like this is the most practical and the most beautiful, is it not?
飞船可能对你来说太复杂了，那说点你更熟悉的——马桶。我虽然没用过，但我知道，一个马桶最重要的是什么？舒适、清洁、便利。设想一个完美践行实用性原则的马桶吧！

Perhaps a spaceship is too complicated for you. Let me talk about something you're more familiar with — a toilet. Though I have never used one, I understand what the most important facets of a toilet are. Comfort, cleanliness and convenience. Let's imagine the perfect toilet that implements the principles of practicality!
它有符合人体工程学的流线型座位，像王座一样舒服。它表面喷涂着惰性生物瓷，永远无臭又干净。它与卫生间的墙壁融为一体，毫无卫生死角。

It would have an ergonomic, streamlined seat that offers the comfort of a throne. Its surface would be coated with an inert bio-porcelain that is always free of odors and dirt. It would be fused into the bathroom wall to leave no corners for bacteria to thrive.
这样一款马桶的设计者，估计脑子里从来都没想过「艺术性」这三个字，但这款马桶，毫无疑问是真正的艺术品。它在美学意义上绝对是完美的！

I imagine that the designer of such a toilet would never have the word "artistic" cross their mind, yet this toilet would without a doubt be a work of art. In terms of aesthetics, it is undoubtedly perfect!
建筑是一种机器！一切符合生物使用需求的东西，都自然而然是美的，而绝不需要有人去倒果为因，凭空追寻艺术！他们追寻的所谓艺术，无非是「真空中的球形鸡」罢了！

Buildings are a type of machine! Something that is completely suited to use by organics is naturally beautiful. There is no need for people to flip the process on its head in a meaningless search for artistic beauty! This "art" that they pursue is merely some unrealistic hypothesis!
那些可悲的建筑大师们，苦心孤诣一辈子所构想出来的「建筑艺术」，还远远不如一个马桶！
The "art of architecture" that these pitiful architectural masters have spent their entire lives striving to conceive is not even equal to a simple toilet!
我现在完全是凭着一腔热血，才继续在折纸大学任教的。我现在根本没办法从工作中找到什么乐趣，唯有来黄金的时刻散心时，才能久违地感到些快乐。

I am only able to continue my teaching position at Paperfold University due to this burning passion. I find no joy in my work anymore. It is only when I come to Golden Hour to relax that I can feel some of this long-lost happiness.
说真的我还是喜欢设计建筑的。我喜欢做建筑师，也喜欢做筑梦师。
Honestly, I still enjoy designing buildings. I like being an architect and a Dreamweaver.
我也绝对不是反对人们追求「艺术」，只是反对建筑师和筑梦师们普遍性地搞错重点。
I am also in no way opposed to humans pursuing "art." I am just opposed to architects and Dreamweavers widely mistaking what is truly important.
应该牢记一个准则——「形式永远服从功能」。只要践行这个准则，功能性自然会带来形式上的美。我还从来没见过任何一个建筑物是「实用但丑陋」的。

There is one principle that should be remembered at all times — "Form must always follow function." If you can realize this principle, functionality will naturally bring out the beauty of the form. I have never once seen a building that was "functional but ugly."
说实话，作为智械，我的脾气实在是太差了，有时候不愿意好好和学生们沟通。如果我们能好好沟通，也许他们也能明白我的良苦用心。

In truth, as an Intellitron, I have a terrible temper and sometimes I am unwilling to properly communicate with my students. If we could communicate properly, perhaps they would understand that I mean well.
唉…等哪次上课时，我心情像今天这么好的时候，应该能好好和他们聊聊这个话题吧。
Ah... Perhaps one day in class, when I am in as fine a mood as I am now, I should be able to discuss this topic properly with them.
可惜一到学校，我的电压就开始升高，估计是很难有这种机会了，哈哈。
It is just a shame that the moment I arrive at the school, my voltage starts to rise and I imagine it will not be easy to find such an opportunity, haha.
您好，请问有什么需要帮助的吗？
Hello, is there anything that I can help you with?
我是隶属「猎犬」的奥希洛特，负责这片区域的安保工作。
I am Auslotte of the Bloodhound Family. I am responsible for security in this area.
…我只是在日常巡逻而已。您有什么事吗？

...Wh—Why aren't you saying anything? Are you hungry? The restaurant has the Stargazer slice cakes today. Why don't you... go and grab some?
她在紧张，那紧张中还带着些许窘迫与尴尬。

明明就连「忘记交谈对象的名字」这种事，都没能对她造成如此显而易见的影响——或许你真的在无意中戳中了她的痛处。

溜号同桌、打架王和班长这三个性格迥异的人居然是好朋友，换做任何人都难以想象。有一天放学之后，他们三个围到了你的课桌前——

那辆车啊，性格不错，就是脑子不太好使，要命的话还是离远点。
