它曾经也是辆正常车，出过几次事故后就变得奇怪了。
Eh, it used to work fine until a couple of accidents changed it.
设备都很完整，引擎也是新款，怎么就发疯成这样了呢。不明白。
It's got top-notch equipment and an engine of the latest model. How it ended up in this mess is beyond me.
依我看，这群车就没个正常的。劝你别买它们啊，买了铁定吃亏！
If you ask me, none of those cars is good. You might as well pour your money into the sea!
我呢，虽然是贵了点，你也够不太上，但钱都花了，总得派上点用场。不妨就把我停在车位里，也算是给你撑门面了。
I actually cost more than you can afford, but since you've already paid for me, you might as well put me to some use. You can keep me in the parking spot to boost your image.
就这么说定了。不许反悔啊。
It's a deal. There's no backing out now.
我的引擎技术来自追逐萨尔索图晨昏线的浮空城市，急刹工艺师从机动球场最尖端的漂移战靴，窗玻璃是塔利亚闪亮的沙砾，就连喷漆都是……

My engine technology originates from a floating city on the terminator line in Salsotto. The craftsmanship of my emergency brake is inspired by the cutting-edge drift boots used in the Roboball court. My window panes are made of the shiny sand from Talia, and even my paint is...
后面的词是啥来着，怎么搞忘了。
What's the rest of my lines again? It's slipped my mind.
我是您购买的尊享豪华独轮飞车。很荣幸为您服务。
I'm the premium luxury monowheel speedster you purchased. It's my honor to serve you.
请问有什么能帮您的吗？本车设备齐全，配有最新自动驾驶系统，绝无事故风险。
How can I help you? I come with the complete set of equipment and the latest autonomous driving system. The risk of accidents is zero.
明白了。这就为您启动出行程序。
Understood. I will now initiate the travel program for you.
…抱歉，引擎激活失败。经系统检测，您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
...Sorry, the engine failed to start. According to the system diagnosis, your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try again.
How do I charge the car?
本型号独轮飞车使用特制接口，请您购买适配的充电插头进行操作。
This vehicle uses a special connector. Please purchase a suitable charging plug for charging.
购买方式可登录飞车官网进行查询，请勿轻信市面上的仿制产品，以免出现任何意外。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
You may purchase it on our official website. Please avoid using counterfeit products on the market to prevent any mishaps. Thank you for your cooperation.
Is there anything else I can do besides charging?
除内置电源外，本型号独轮飞车还配备有脚动驾驶系统。
In addition to the built-in batteries, this vehicle is also equipped with a foot-operated driving system.
如需使用，请您预先进入车内，使劲蹬踩脚下的踏板以驱动发电设备，期间不可停止。经计算，当您的蹬踏速度接近快跑时，飞车即可开始正常行驶。

To use the system, please enter the vehicle and vigorously pedal the footboard to drive the engine. Based on our estimation, the vehicle will start moving when your pedaling speed approaches a running pace.
本型号独轮飞车采用开放式车厢设计，您可在蹬踩过程中轻松欣赏沿途风景，绝不会乏味。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
This vehicle has an open carriage design that allows you to admire the scenery along the way while pedaling. Your journey will never be dull. Thank you for your cooperation.
您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.

This vehicle has an open carriage design that allows you to admire the scenery along the way while pedaling. Your journey will never be dull. Thank you for your cooperation.
行啊，当然可以。要是连这点小事都做不到，我还算什么豪华飞车。
Naturally. If I can't even perform such a small task, what kind of luxury speedster would I even be?
坐稳咯。我们现在就出发。
Sit tight, we're setting off right now.
Bring me to the Golden Hour.
逛腻了，想回去了？行啊，那就走吧。
Bored with shopping and wish to return already? Fine, as you wish.
嗨，说实话，我自己都不知道这功能有什么用。想试试的话就随你吧。
To be honest, I don't even know what this feature does myself. If you want to try it out, go right ahead.
想去！我仰慕那里很久了，好想去看看！漂亮的飞车就该停在豪华的飞艇里！
Yes, I want to go there! I've admired that place for so long and have always wanted to take a look! A beautiful flying car like me should be parked on a luxurious airship, after all!
Let's go, I can't wait any longer!
Bring me to the Golden Hour.
这就要走了？我还没呆够呢。哎，行吧，我是你的飞车，都听你的。
Leaving already? I wanted to stay here a while longer. Well, alright, I'm your flying car after all. Your wish is my command.
请说：「嗨，豪华飞车，麻烦把车灯打开。谢谢。」
Please say: "Hi, luxury speedster, please switch on the lights. Thank you."
信不信我直接让你熄火？
Do you want me to stall your engine?
啧，还真是粗暴呢。好吧好吧，都依你。
Tsk, how rude. Fine, fine, whatever you say.
Please switch on the lights. Thank you.
You forgot to say my name.
不过嘛，看在你这么有礼貌的份上…算了吧！这就给你打开车灯。
However, since you were so polite... Fine! I'll switch them on for you.
哈哈哈哈哈。朋友，当然可以，守护人们是我义不容辞的责任啊！
Hahahaha. Of course I can, friend. After all, I am duty-bound to protect humans!
来吧！坐上来吧！无论何时，无论要去往哪里，我都会帮你顺利抵达！
Come and sit inside me! No matter the place, I'll ensure that you reach there on time!
Bring me to the Golden Hour.
没问题！无论何时，无论要去往哪里，我都会帮你顺利抵达！
No problem! No matter the place, I'll ensure that you reach there on time!
疾风——力量！目标——「黄金的时刻」！
Speed is power! Next stop: Golden Hour!
Beep, beep, beep... Poof! Traveling at the speed of light!
你？那可是最豪华的飞艇，所有飞车的价钱加起来，都不够买一个车位的。
You wish to go there? You do know that your destination is a luxurious airship, right? Even the price of all flying cars combined is not enough to buy a parking bay on that airship.
说说看，你去那里打算做什么？
Tell me, what do you plan to do there?
呃…你知道的，我很早时候就是你的飞车了，一直很仰慕你。至于刚才那些话，都是开玩笑的，别当真。
Ah... You know, ever since I became your flying car, I have always admired you. Regarding our earlier conversation, please be assured that I was merely joking. Don't take it to heart.
去「{TEXTJOIN#87}」对吧？我们现在就出发！
You wish to go to {TEXTJOIN#87}, right? In that case, let us depart right now!
Bring me to the Golden Hour.
好好好！坐稳，我带你过去！
Okay, okay! Sit tight, I'll take you there right now!
没想到吧，连我的车灯采用的都是博识学会的最新专利。睁大眼睛，做好迎接光明的准备！
Surprised? I'll have you know that even my lights are the most recent patent of the Intelligentsia Guild. Open your eyes and prepare to witness unparalleled brightness!
您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.
如急需出行，请使用其他飞车。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
If you're in a hurry, do consider using another flying car. Thank you for your cooperation and have a pleasant day ahead.
Bring me to the Golden Hour.
您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.

你一口吃掉了脆筒，酸酸甜甜的奶油在口腔飘散…味道不错。
You stuff the cone into your mouth, savoring the sour and sweet flavor of the cream... That's yummy.
「嘴下留情啊！」你似乎听见脆筒这么说道——但是太晚了，现在你只能回味它的甜美了。
"Please have some mercy!" You seem to hear the crisp cries of the cone, but it's too late. You can only relish its lingering taste in your mouth.
你吃掉了脆筒，它不算坚硬的筒身在你嘴里被切断、磨碎…真解压！
You gobble up the cone. Its crunchy shell is broken and crushed into bits in your mouth... What a satisfying experience!
冰冰凉凉的感觉包裹了你的舌头，没什么比酸甜可口的冷饮更清爽了。
Your tongue is enveloped by an icy sensation. Nothing is more refreshing than a sweet and sour drink served chilled.
酒瓶是为了供人痛饮才存在，甜筒是为了给人畅吃才存在——而你帮助它完成了毕生的使命。
Wine is made to be drunk, and the cones exist to be eaten. You have helped the cone fulfill its lifelong mission.
你一口将脆筒吞吃落肚，动作干净利落。
You toss a cone into your mouth in a slick move.
你开始思考，这座城市里的脆筒是否会有被你吃完的那天。
You begin to wonder whether you will finish up all the cones in this city one day.
哪怕这些脆筒修建了草房子，也拦不住胃口大开的你。
Even those houses made of cones are not spared by your ravenous appetite.
你又吃掉了一个脆筒，幸好在梦中吃甜食不用考虑体重负担。
You munch on yet another cone. Fortunately, being a sweet tooth in a dream doesn't make you gain weight.
光一个脆筒怎能满足你的胃口？你又吃下第二个脆筒，仔细地品味了一通。
How can you stop at just having one cone? You put another cone into your mouth and savor it.
你咀嚼着甜筒，不禁开始思考——既然街上有这么多免费的甜筒，为什么之前它们没有被吃光呢？也许这就是梦境吧。
While chewing on the cone, you wonder why the many free cones on the street haven't been eaten. It's probably only possible in a dreamscape.
你咽下最后一个脆筒，打了一个满意的饱嗝——在美食面前就没必要矜持了。
You swallow the last cone and let out a burp in satisfaction. There's no need to care about table manners when enjoying good food.
你一连吃掉了三个脆筒，甚至感觉有些饱腹…多亏梦里吃不坏肚子。
After eating three cones in a row, you start to feel a bit bloated... Luckily, you won't suffer from diarrhea in a dream.
随着最后一个脆筒下肚，一股若有若无的空虚从你心底泛起…难道是吃得太快了？
As you finish the last of the cone, a faint sense of emptiness sets in... Is it because you've eaten the cones too quickly?
当第三个脆筒吃到一半时，你感觉到了一丝发腻——或许这就是为什么厂商把一组脆筒的数量控制在三个。
When you are halfway through the third cone, you start to get sick of the taste. That's probably why the manufacturer keeps only three cones in a set.
在不断重复的吞吃动作中，你似乎理解了「贪饕」的命途……
While repeating the act of swallowing, you seem to gain an understanding of the Path of Voracity...
停！一定要把我吃掉吗？或许我们可以和平共处？
Stop! Do you really have to eat me? Perhaps, we can get along in peace.
What am I going to eat then?
给、给你这个，求求你放过我……
Th—This is for you. Please let me go...
I'll show you mercy this time.
这最后一个脆筒似乎有些特别——准确的说，它的形状有些不妙。不过你还没来得及感到不适，巧克力味的甜筒就已经在你嘴里融化了。
This final cone is quite special. To be more precise, it has an odd shape. Before you can feel the discomfort caused by the difference, the chocolate-flavored cone has already melted in your mouth.
容器的使命是存储，但这台机器选择将财富分享给世界——这或许也是「同谐」的一种表现？
The purpose of a container is storage, but this machine chooses to share its wealth with the world. Could it be an act of Harmony?
「你可说不准天上何时掉馅饼。」
"You can't tell when the windfall will come."
一声脆响过后，钞票如雪般飞落。
After a crisp sound, banknotes fall like a flurry of snow.
还不等你提出要取钱，钞票就从机器内喷涌而出。
Before you even request a withdrawal, money bursts forth from the machine.
钞票纷纷扬扬飞上了天——倘若没人拿走，打扫起来可能要费点功夫。
Banknotes flutter in the sky. If no one picks them up, cleaning the place will be a hassle.
你原本以为必须要念点什么咒语才行，不过现在看来，只需要站在它面前就够了。
You thought you needed to recite some spell to make the machine work, but now it seems like you only have to stand in front of it.
你不禁开始思考：这台机器如此慷慨地发钱，还会有宾客因捉襟见肘离开梦境吗？
With this generous machine around, will anyone still be forced to leave the Dreamscape due to financial issues?
答案是「有」——玩嗨了的人可不知道什么叫理性消费。
The answer is yes. People who are having a blast couldn't care less about spending wisely.
你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
You come face-to-face with a blue bird, but it does not look like it's going to speak anytime soon.
你们一人一鸟就这么互相盯着对方，时间在沉默中流逝。
Time passes in silence as you and the bird stare at each other.
这场无声的角力还在继续。不知你们谁会是最后的胜者。
The silent staring contest continues. No one knows who's going to win.
显而易见，我是只折纸小鸟，你可以叫我「湛蓝爵士」。
Obviously, I'm an origami bird. You can call me Dr. Blues.
折纸小鸟…就是折纸做的小鸟，你没看过《钟表小子》吗？
An origami bird... is a bird made of folded paper. Haven't you watched Clockie?
我没空给你解释设定，自己去找{RUBY_B#折纸小鸟聚集地}「大树」{RUBY_E#}的那几只鸟问问吧。
I have no time to explain the settings. You can ask those birds on the {RUBY_B#origami birds' gathering spot}Great Tree{RUBY_E#}.
Mhm, make sure you never forget about it.
我忙的很，有事去找{RUBY_B#折纸小鸟聚集地}「大树」{RUBY_E#}的那几只鸟吧，它们应该有事要拜托你。
I'm swamped with work. If you have any questions, you can go to those birds on the {RUBY_B#origami birds' gathering spot}Great Tree{RUBY_E#}. I think they'll need your help with their affairs.
等你帮它们<color=#dbc291ff>找到足够数量的折纸小鸟后，我就会给你奖励</color>——「故事情节」是这么写的。
When you have helped them <color=#dbc291ff>find the required number of origami birds, I'll give you rewards.</color> This is written under the "Storyline" section.
小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.

你来找我不会就为了发呆吧。
Don't tell me you're here just to zone out.
我完成小鸟们的委托了！
I've completed the commission for the birdies!
我完成小鸟们的委托了！
I've completed the commission for the birdies!
我完成小鸟们的委托了！
I've completed the commission for the birdies!
活干的还挺快。找到所有折纸小鸟了？
That's efficient. Have you found all the origami birds?
Finding the origami birds is exhausting, tweet...
The birds are so lovely, tweet!
「这是给予勤劳的小镇居民的奖励。」那个叫「猫头鹰老师」的角色是这么说的，拿去吧。
According to Professor Owl, this is a reward for hardworking residents. You may have it.
好了，一切搞定。我在这集的戏份终于结束了。
Well, it's a wrap! I've finally finished my part in this episode.
Hold on. I have some questions!
有问题先憋着，提前剧透可不是什么好习惯。
Keep those questions to yourself for now. I don't want to give any spoilers.
故事距离「真相大白」的章节还早着呢。
You still have a long way to go before reaching the chapter where the truth will be revealed.
Why don't you "tweet" when you speak?
你盯着小鸟，誓要从它脸上挖出些许端倪。
You scrutinize the birdie, determined to catch some hints from its expression.
小鸟抖了抖翅膀，转身飞走了。

Tick-tock! Here we are again, my gray friend!
好不容易遇到一个能看得见我的朋友，我得好好给你科普一下美梦小镇的奥妙才行！
I rarely run into people who can see me, so I must make use of this opportunity to tell you all the wonders about Dreamville!
看到你面前这尊雕像了吗？不瞒你说，它就是根据我——钟表小子——的形象被打造出来的哦！
See that statue in front of you? Tell you what, it is made based on me, Clockie!
I can tell. I'm not blind, you know.
滴答滴答，这尊雕像的秘密可不止这些！接下来我要说的话，就只讲给能看见我的朋友听！
Tick-tock, tick-tock, there are more secrets about this statue! Next, I'm going to tell you things I only reveal to my friends!
你在美梦里畅游的时候，偶尔应该能拿到一种<color=#dbc291ff>金色的钞票</color>，钞票上面还印着我的头像，对吧？
You do occasionally receive a kind of <color=#dbc291ff>golden banknote</color> with my face on it during your journey in the Dreamscape, right?
没错没错！我就知道灰色的朋友肯定善于观察！
That's right! I knew you would be a good observer!
你没见到过吗？没关系，只要<color=#dbc291ff>在梦境的世界里勤加探索</color>，你迟早会拿到它的！
Haven't you come across it? It doesn't matter. You'll get one sooner or later by <color=#dbc291ff>exploring the Dreamscape</color> more frequently!
接下来才是重点，你可要听好：很多人都不知道，那种金色的钞票可以被用来为「我」补充美梦能量！
Here comes the crucial part, so listen closely — many have no idea that those golden banknotes can be used to replenish my dream energy!
只要把那些金色的——滴答，就叫它「金表钞」吧——只要把那些「金表钞」交给这尊雕像，我在美梦小镇中的声誉和影响力就会提升！
By handing those golden banknotes — let's call it Clock Credits — to the statue, I'll become more famous and influential in Dreamville!
如果雕像能多多获取「金表钞」里藏着的力量，早晚有一天，美梦小镇的所有人就都能看到我的模样啦！
The more energy the statue acquires from Clock Credits, the sooner everyone in Dreamville can see me!
到了那个时候，我就可以跟你、还有你的伙伴们一起玩咯！
When the time comes, I'll be able to hang out with you and your buddies!
要是我不想让别人看见你呢？
What if I don't want the others to see you?
滴~嗒！真正的好朋友才不会说这种话！
Tick... tock! If you were my true friend, you wouldn't say things like that!
I get it. You're just hungry for the money.
滴~嗒！灰色的朋友，请你收回刚才说的这句话！
Tick... tock! My gray friend, please retract that statement!
哦，顺带一提，你在美梦小镇一般的商店里是不能用「金表钞」买东西的喔！如果你擅自把那种钞票掏出来，指不定还会被人盯上！
For your information, you can't use Clock Credits to buy stuff in regular stores in Dreamville! You might even get yourself targeted by pickpockets if you try using them in public!
——所以不如把它们都交给我！只要你能为我补充美梦能量，我也会给你准备丰厚的礼物的！
So, you might as well let me have them! As long as you can replenish my dream energy, I'll give you awesome gifts in return!
滴答，需要解释的就这么多啦！记住，<color=#dbc291ff>多多探索美梦小镇、多多赚取金表钞、然后多多把它们带到我的雕像这儿来！</color>下次见咯，灰色的朋友！
Tick-tock, that's all I want to say! Remember to <color=#dbc291ff>explore the Dreamville as much as you can, earn Clock Credits, and take them to my statue here!</color> See you, my gray friend!
哇哦！灰色的朋友，没想到你已经为我带来这么多「金表钞」了，真是厉害！
Wow! I'm surprised you have gathered so many Clock Credits for me, my gray friend! That's terrific!
虽然我现在拥有的美梦能量还不足以让小镇上的所有人都看到我…但这已经是很大的进步了！这都多亏了你，灰色的朋友！
Although I still don't have enough dream energy to make myself visible to everyone in town... this is already a significant improvement! I owe you a big one, my gray friend!
滴答！为了向你证明，金表钞的确能提升我在美梦小镇里的影响力——下次和雕像互动的时候，你可要睁大眼睛仔细看好咯！
Tick-tock! Pay closer attention the next time you interact with the statue. You'll see how the Clock Credits can indeed make me more influential in Dreamville!
See you next time, my gray friend!
Pom-Pom, check out this dream bubble.
看到你手中梦泡的一瞬间，帕姆「蹭」地一下跳了起来——你从未见过它圆润的双足离开车厢地板如此之远。
Pom-Pom jumps the moment they see the dream bubble in your hands. You've never seen their chubby feet making it that far from the ground before.
你、你是从哪里拿到的那东西帕？！
Wh—Where did you get that thing!?
L—Let me take a closer look!
帕姆从你手中抢走了那只梦泡，然后将它毛茸茸的额头抵了上去……
Pom-Pom yanks the dream bubble away from you and presses their furry forehead on it...
帕姆的眼睛里似乎有什么东西在闪烁——是泪花吗？还没等你看清楚，它就用大耳朵挡住了眼睛，似乎生怕被你发现它伤感的样子。
Something is glistening in Pom-Pom's eyes. Are they tears? Before you can look closer, they cover their eyes with their large ears, trying to hide their sorrow from you.
几秒钟后，帕姆的心情似乎平复了下来，神态也恢复了正常。
Pom-Pom manages to pull themselves together several seconds later.
{NICKNAME}乘客…在这列车上发生过很多你不知道的事情呢帕。等到以后时机成熟了再和你讲吧！
{NICKNAME}... many things that have happened on this train aren't within your knowledge. I'll tell you about them when the time is right!
列车锅，我最中意的那口列车锅…那家伙，到底什么时候才能把它还给我呢？
Express Special... My favorite Express Special... When will that guy give it back to me?
滴答！{NICKNAME}，我最好的朋友——我从来都没想过，自己居然还能等到这一天的到来！
Tick-tock! {NICKNAME}, my best friend! The day I've been eagerly anticipating has finally arrived!
自从你来到美梦小镇以后，这里的气氛相比从前完全变了一个样！你贡献的「金表钞」让镇上的每位居民都能量满满，活力满满！
Since your arrival in Dreamville, this place has completely changed! The Clock Credits you contributed have brought energy and vitality to every resident!
滴答，灰色的朋友，我现在弄明白了一件事！我从前一直都想让镇上的人们看到我，承认我…但实际上，这件事好像压根没那么重要！
Tick-tock, I've realized something, my gray friend! I desired for the townspeople to acknowledge and recognize me... but now it seems it's not as significant as I once believed!
在遇到你之后，我终于搞懂了：珍惜自己身边的好朋友，这才是我最应该追求的事情！
After meeting you, I finally realized that cherishing my friends is the most important thing to do!
仓鼠球骑士、哈努兄弟、音符小姐、还有{NICKNAME}…滴答！你们就是钟表小子最珍贵的宝藏，美梦小镇上最可爱的居民！
Hamster Ball Knight, Brother Hanu, Miss Note, and you, {NICKNAME}... Tick-tock! You are all my most cherished treasures! The most beloved inhabitants of Dreamville!
滴答，总之，非常感谢你的贡献！下次触碰雕像的时候，记得睁大眼睛看好——我给你准备了一个大大大…大惊喜！
Tick-tock! Thank you so much for your contributions! The next time you touch the statue, keep your eyes wide open and watch closely, because I have a huge... a tremendous surprise in store for you!
唷嘿！真高兴能再次见到你，我的朋友！
Hi-ho! Nice to see you again, buddy!
我们一起经历了这么多冒险，还帮助那么多在梦里迷失的人们找回了自我…真是不可思议！这是我经历过的最棒的旅程！
We've been through all these adventures and helped so many lost people find themselves again in these dreams... It's really extraordinary! This is the best adventure I've ever been on!
虽然以后恐怕没法再和米沙一起玩了…但我知道，这才是他一直以来想要前往的目的地！所以，我才不会被悲伤打倒——我该打起精神，替他感到高兴才对！

Though I probably won't be able to play with Misha in the future... I know this is the destination he's always been seeking! So, I won't let sadness knock me down. I'm gonna perk up and be happy for him!
米沙，还有米哈伊尔，他们之所以决定建起美梦小镇，初衷一定是希望大家能带着亲朋好友一起来到这里，享受难得的欢乐时光！
The reason why Misha and Mikhail decided to build up Dreamville was the hope that everyone could bring their friends and family here to have a good time!
但是，他们肯定不希望所有人都沉浸在这里，忘记了前进的路在哪！谢谢你，我最好的朋友，是你帮助美梦小镇找回了它原本存在的意义！

But they definitely wouldn't want everyone to just drown in this place and forget where the road ahead is! Thank you, my best friend! You're the one who helped Dreamville re-discover its original purpose!
灰色的朋友，你们的旅途应该也快要迎来下一站了吧？我还有守护美梦小镇的任务在身，就不和你们一起上路了——
Gray-haired friend, your journey is approaching its next stop too, no? I still need to protect Dreamville, so I won't be going with you...
——但请你务必要记得钟表小子、哈努兄弟、折纸小鸟、甚至石头老板这些伙伴噢！有机会的话也记得回来看看，再顺便多给我带些金表钞来！

...But don't forget about your friends like Clockie, Brother Hanu, the origami birds, and even Boss Stone! If you have the chance, come back and see us. And remember to bring me more Clock Credits if you can!
万一你们在旅途中迷了路，就呼唤「罗盘小子」的名字吧。我一定会速速赶到大伙身边，为你们精准导航！
If you ever get lost during your travels, just call for the Compassie. I'll be there in a flash and help you to navigate with great precision!
在那之前，我会继续以「钟表小子」的身份留在这里，守护梦境世界的快乐跟和平！滴~答！
Before that, I'll remain here as Clockie, defending the Dreamscape's happiness and peace! Tick-tock!
哟，快来瞧瞧！「黄金的时刻」历史上第一位被幸运派对之神眷顾的贵宾诞生了！
Yo, check this out! The first-ever guest in Golden Hour to be blessed by the Lucky Party God is here!
这不是明摆着的嘛？此时此刻，您就是整个梦境十二时分里最闪耀的那颗幸运星！
Isn't it pretty obvious? You're the shiniest lucky star across all Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape!
Sounds fabulous. Get me my prize now.
别那么心急，朋友！此时此刻，您就是整个梦境十二时分里最闪耀的那颗幸运星！
Don't be so impatient my friend! Right here, right now, you're the shiniest lucky star across all Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape!
您瞧，「知更鸟」是最近才被安装到「美梦排排乐」里的隐藏奖励机制，而您是第一个成功摇出三个「知更鸟」画像的幸运儿！
You see, the Robin is a hidden prize mechanism recently installed in Dreamy Slots, and you're the first lucky winner who gets three Robins in a row!
为了褒奖您的运气和…呃，十足的运气，请您收下这张「至尊幸运儿的黑卡」！
To celebrate your luck and... um, blessing, allow me to present to you this Lucky One's Black Card!
What can I do with this card?
…这当然就要靠您自己去发现了，朋友！这么安排是为了让您在获奖的兴奋之余，还能充分享受探索带来的满足感！没错，设计如此！

...You'll have to figure it out yourself, my friend! It's arranged that way so that you can feel the excitement of winning a prize as well as enjoy the process of discovering the uses of the card! Yes, that's the concept!
Can I have something more practical?
呃…这么安排是为了让您在获奖的兴奋之余，还能充分享受探索带来的满足感！没错，设计如此！
Um... It's arranged that way so that you can feel the excitement of winning a prize as well as enjoy the process of discovering the uses of the card! Yes, that's the concept!
怎么能这么说呢？这叫「经典设计」，「经典」懂哇！
How can you describe it that way? It's called a classic design. A classic, you know?
读道具描述是吧？老套路了。
I have to read the item description, right? That's an old trick.
您真是一点就通，没错，我们遵循的就是如此经典的设计套路。
I'm glad you catch my drift. That's right. We always do things here the old-school way.
那么，「至尊幸运儿的黑卡」还请您收下…接下来您想干什么就干什么，我就不打扰您了！
Well, please keep the Lucky One's Black Card... Now, you're free to do whatever you want. I'll get out of your hair!
丹西灰溜溜地离开了——看得出来，他的兴致在和你聊天的过程中被扫得一点不剩。
Dancy leaves with a crestfallen look. Apparently, your conversation with him has sapped him of his enthusiasm.
来自内心的声音告诉你——这扇门的背后一定隐藏着什么不得了的秘密。
Your intuition tells you there must be an incredible secret hidden behind this door.
来自内心的声音还告诉你——那张黑卡就是打开这扇门的钥匙。
Your intuition tells you the Lucky Guy's Black Card is the key to this door.
…好吧，不开玩笑了，你内心压根就没那么想。你能找到这扇门靠的完全是：一、瞎蒙；二、系统提示。
...That won't fool anyone, you've never really had those thoughts. You find this door solely relying on your random guesses and the system prompts.
Swipe the card to open the door now.
此处不知为何留下了一支录音笔。你摁下播放键……
There is a voice recorder here. You press the "Play" button...
我*皮皮西粗口*！谁让你把这房间布置成这*皮皮西粗口*样的？
What the *Pepeshi profanity*! Who asked you to set up this room in this *Pepeshi profanity* way!?
我们要的是奖励房、奖励房懂不懂？！不是什么情趣房间！
We wanted a prize room! You heard me!? Not a love hotel room!
*粗口*！要怎么布置你们怎么不早提？等你们的需求提过来，道具部的采购截止日期早就过了！
*Profanity*! Why didn't you say so earlier? By the time your requests came in, the procurement deadline had long passed!
没有明确的需求，我当然只能先随口说说咯…这难道能怪我吗？*粗口*！
Without clear instructions, I could only do things my way... How can you blame me for that? *Profanity*!
…录音到这里戛然而止。你猜测那两个人有大概六成的概率在这房间里打了一架。
...The recording comes to a sudden halt. You think there is a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> chance that the two had a fight in this room.
欢迎光临，请问有什么需要的吗？
Welcome, how can I help you?
来看看吧，客人，包您满意！
Dear guest, come in and take a look, there will definitely be something you like!
Dreamscape's specialty, guaranteed genuine or your money back.
欢迎光临美梦小镇主题餐厅，请问有什么需要的吗？
Welcome to the Dreamville theme restaurant. How can I help you?
飞碟堡，橡木蛋糕卷，「鲱鱼先生」柠檬塔…好难选啊……
Floatdisc burgers, oak cake rolls, "Mr. Herring's" lemon tarts... I can't choose...!
What should I have for dinner tonight...
Why not have a Clockie Pizza!?
咳咳…您好，尊贵的客人，欢迎来到朝露公馆。
Ahem... Hello, dear guest, welcome to the Dewlight Pavilion.
您与哪位「家族」成员预约了会面呢？
Which member of The Family did you schedule a visit with?
（与「家族」成员预约…我该怎么回答呢……）
(Scheduled a meeting with a member of The Family...? How should I respond...?)
I am here to see Sunday.
哎呀，竟然是星期日大人的客人！
Oh my! A guest to see Master Sunday!
I am here to see Robin.
原来是知更鸟小姐的客人呀。
Ah, so you're here to see Miss Robin.
I am here to see Gallagher.
加拉赫先生？倒是很少有来找这位先生的客人……
Mister Gallagher? Guests asking to see Mister Gallagher are rather rare...
难道说…您是那位大人的客人吗！他最近确实秘密接待了一些客人……
Could it be... You are a guest of the Master himself! He has indeed been receiving a number of guests in secret recently...
明明你没说话，但面前的迎宾员似乎却已明白了一切。
You did not say anything, but the usher before you seems to have completely understood the situation.
刚刚真是失礼了——您是「家族」的贵客，请向里走吧！会有人来接待您的。
I can only apologize for my rudeness before — As a VIP guest of The Family, please enter! Someone will be along to greet you shortly.
当然，有什么问题也可以回来找我。
Of course, if you have any issues, please feel free to come to me.
I hope you have a pleasant time!
There are some things I am confused about.
还有什么我能帮到您的？
Is there anything else I can help you with?
这里「朝露的时刻」——与匹诺康尼的大部分地区不同，这里并不对外开放，基本留给「家族」成员与少部分贵客使用。

Unlike the majority of the other districts of Penacony, the "Moment of Morning Dew" is not open to outsiders. It is fundamentally reserved for use by members of The Family and a select number of VIP guests.
请放心，在朝露公馆中的所有谈话都是会受到「家族」的保护，绝对保密，绝对安全！
Please rest assured that any conversations held within Dewlight Pavilion will be protected by The Family and will be kept completely confidential!
I feel like security here is extremely strict?
没错。除了有入梦权限的「家族」成员外，就只有像您这样被直接邀请的贵宾知道抵达朝露公馆的方法。
That's correct. Aside from Family Members with dream access, only VIP guests such as yourself that have been directly invited know how to reach the Dewlight Pavilion.
所以这里甚至可以称为是全匹诺康尼最安全的地方——对那些擅入者来说，光是寻找进入这里的方法就得费上一番功夫了。
So, you could go as far as to say that this is the safest area in all of Penacony. Those that would try to infiltrate this place would have a hard enough time simply trying to find a way in.
而且公馆里也有很多安保措施。您就放一百个心吧！
What's more, there are many more security measures inside the pavilion itself. You can rest completely assured!
哎呀，还从没有来客问过我这种问题呢。
Oh my, I have never had a guest ask me a question like that.
我想想…对大多数人来说，这片美梦应该是当之无愧的天堂。
Let me think... For the majority of people, this wonderful dream would be an absolute paradise.
但我从小在这里长大，再美的景色看多了也容易觉得单调…偶尔我也会想去看看匹诺康尼外的世界，看看那种挂着群星的天空。
However, having grown up here, even the most breathtaking sights can grow dull and monotonous... Sometimes I wish to visit the world outside Penacony and see the starry sky of reality.
相信您一定见过那样的银河吧。
I'm sure you have laid eyes on the cosmos of which I speak?
好的，祝您一梦平…啊不对，一梦愉快！
Very well, I wish you a safe drea — Ah, I mean a joyous dream!
好的，祝您一梦平…啊不对，一梦愉快！
Very well, I wish you a safe drea — Ah, I mean a joyous dream!
为您服务是我的荣幸——祝您一切顺利！
It is my honor to be able to serve you. I wish you well!
飞碟堡，橡木蛋糕卷，「鲱鱼先生」柠檬塔……今晚吃什么好呢？
Floatdisc burgers, oak cake rolls, "Mr. Herring's" lemon tarts... What should I have for dinner tonight...?
公馆的工作太简单了，每天上班就只想着「今天吃什么」……
Work at the pavilion is so easy... all I think about while I'm at work is "what should I have for dinner tonight..."
哎，布琳娜，你不能再这么堕落下去了。该认真工作了！
Ah, Brina! You must not let yourself slack off like this. Pay attention to your work!
…嗯，今晚还是去吃钟表披萨吧。
...Hmm, maybe I will have a Clockie Pizza for dinner tonight.
公馆很少有人拜访，这份工作倒是难得清闲…但有的时候也让人难以忍耐……
The pavilion rarely has visitors, so this job offers a lot of leisure time... But sometimes it can be unbearable...
毕竟——只有一个人站岗，能和我聊天的人实在太少了！
I'm working here alone, after all. There's barely anyone to talk to!
偶尔来了客人也都是非富即贵的大人物，哪有人愿意和一个小小的迎宾员聊天呢……
When we do get the odd visitor, they're all extremely rich and important figures. Why would any of them want to talk to a lowly usher...
哎，大概这就是清闲的代价吧……
Ah, I guess this is the cost of having a leisurely job...
只有一个人站岗，能和我聊天的人实在太少了！
I'm working here alone. There's barely anyone to talk to!
哎，大概这就是清闲的代价吧……
Ah, I guess this is the cost of having a leisurely job...
您评评理——哪能有这种事儿呢！
You tell me... How could such a thing happen!?
好不容易上岸一个清闲又稳定的岗位——没想到居然要我之后去「安谧的时刻」轮岗！
I worked so hard to get myself into this nice, stable, leisurely position... Then I find out that they wanna reassign me to shifts in the "Moment of Serenity!"
据说那里关押的都是最最可怕的犯人……
I hear that all of the most terrifying convicts are held there...
据说有伪装成熊崽的智械、自称为皇帝的游民，甚至某次似乎还有押进来个奇怪的广告牌……
I hear there is an Intellitron that impersonates a teddy bear, a homeless man that calls themselves an "Emperor"... I hear they even brought in a weird billboard...
This list just gets weirder and weirder...
But that's what they all say!
据说、据说我的上一任还遇到过会说话的垃圾桶…！
I hear the person working there before me even met a talking trashcan!
这过的都是什么日子啊！
What a horrible life it would be!
很久没有遇到愿意和我聊天的好心客人了。
It's been a while since I met a kind guest willing to talk with me.
您知道吗？即使在朝露公馆中，也有许多神秘的「未解之谜」……
Did you know that even the Dewlight Pavilion contains mysterious "unexplained riddles..."?
絮絮叨叨的布琳娜拉着你聊了许久，从公馆内部的神秘通道、宝库里被隐藏的小门，再到天天游荡在建筑中的恐怖幽灵……

Brina the chatterbox talks your ear off for quite some time. She talks about the mysterious passages in the building, the hidden door in the treasury, and the terrifying ghosts that roam within the structure every day...
你被迫听了许多不可告人的秘密八卦。希望这些故事中的当事人不会因此来找你麻烦。
You are forced to listen to loads of secret gossip that you cannot share with anyone. Let's hope that the people implicated in these stories don't come to find you and settle the score later!
嘿嘿，好久没有过这样酣畅淋漓的对话了。
Hehe, it's been so long since I've been able to chat to my heart's content like this.
不过我告诉您的那些八卦——您记得为我保密呀！
Although, these rumors I've told you... You have to keep them a secret!
嘿嘿，好久没有过这样酣畅淋漓的对话了。
Hehe, it's been so long since I've been able to chat to my heart's content like this.
不过我告诉您的那些八卦——您记得为我保密呀！
Although, these rumors I've told you... You have to keep them a secret!
(Better think of a way to fool my way through...)
你好，逐梦客。我是康娜，朝露公馆的告解侍者。
Hello, Dreamchaser. My name is Conna, a Confessor of Dewlight Pavilion.
虽然在才干上不及橡木家系的「铎音」，我依旧愿意充当希佩的代言人，聆听并赦免你的全部罪过。
I might not be able to stand toe-to-toe with the Bronze Melodia of the Oak Family, but I am more than willing to be Xipe's representative, to listen to you and forgive all your sins.
倘若你有愧，便说出来吧。
If you have any guilt you carry, then speak.
她的表情美丽而冷漠，仿佛能拒人于千里之外。你实在没法鼓起勇气对她自述「罪行」——假如你确实有的话。
Her expression is beautiful but aloof, as if she is keeping everyone at arm's length. You simply cannot muster your courage to tell her your sins — that is, if you actually had any.
Will you listen to my confession?
当然，有什么话就说出来吧——我会全盘接受的。
Of course. Speak freely. I will gladly receive them all.
I have a sin to confess.
那么，请你详述曾经犯下的错误，以此展现改正的决心。
Then, please elaborate on your previous indiscretion, and display your willingness to repent.
I regularly make life difficult for trashcans.
我对垃圾桶怀有无限的喜爱，曾在多个世界向它动手动脚，窃取其中的宝物……
I have an unfathomable love for trashcans, having fondled them all across many different worlds. I also stole plenty of valuables from inside them...
我也曾与有手有脚的垃圾桶大打出手，暴力推翻了他们的王。直到今天，依旧有桶视我为敌。
I also once hit a trashcan that had arms and legs, thrashing their leader thoroughly and flipping it upside down. Even now, there are trashcans that bear great hostility towards me.
I have employed clandestine means for rewards.
我控制不住自己的双手，经常攻击路边的各种容器，将它们残忍地打碎……
I can't control my own hands, regularly attacking all kinds of containers and vessels along my path, smashing them to smithereens...
每到一个地方，我就要四处寻找宝箱，将里面的财宝尽数掠走，无论它们是否属于我。
Every new place I'm at, I will scour the area for chests and plunder all the valuables in them, even if they don't belong to me.
我消耗过崇高道德的赞许。
I have consumed the Praise of High Morals.
我曾多次向心中的邪念屈服，做出违反道德的事情，包括但不限于涂改留言、寄回作业、打捞喷泉……
Many times, I gave in to my evil thoughts, performing deeds that were immoral, including but not limited to altering messages, sending back homework, salvaging coins from fountains...
好在我拥有崇高道德的赞许，这才下得去手。
It was only because I had the Praise of High Morals that I could do all these.
我在此向你告解，请求弥补我的罪过。
I hereby confess to you, to please forgive my sins.
只要你心怀虔诚，誓不再犯，神主便会看在迷途知返的份上赐你赦免。
As long as your heart is devoted, and you vow never to commit these crimes again, the Great One will grant you forgiveness on account of you recognizing how misguided you were.
回去之后，记得要对同伴展露真心，对生人展现热情，如此便能抵消过错。
When you return, you must remember to treat your companions earnestly, to spread kindness to strangers — then can you atone for your mistakes.
…流程结束。不得不说，你的经历…确实让我另眼相看。
...The process is complete. I have to say, your experiences... do paint you in a new light.
你真的可以让希佩原谅我吗？
Can you really get Xipe to forgive me?
实际上，我并不能恳请祂与我等同在。但我愿意倾听你的话语。
Truthfully, I cannot plead with THEM to stoop down to our level. But I am willing to listen to your words.
大部分人的过错都只是些琐事，并没有严重到需要神主亲自赦免的地步——大家只是缺少一个倾诉的对象而已。
Most people's mistakes are but trivial, and do not warrant the Great One's personal forgiveness. They mostly just lack a listening ear.
而且很多时候，仪式感也是必不可少的。退一万步讲，我至少可以代表自己原谅你啊。
And many times, ceremony is also an essential part of it. If nothing else, at least I can forgive you on behalf of myself.
美梦…我个人倒是没什么不满。不过倾听的告解多了，难免会被某些负面情绪影响。
Dreams... I personally have no qualms against them, but one can't avoid the effects of certain negative emotions after listening to so many confessions.
即使家族内部，也有不少人对梦中的混乱心存芥蒂，而这个问题在短时间内无法根治。
Even within The Family, there are many who bear resentment towards the chaos in the dreams, and this problem won't be resolved anytime soon.
有人说，这是家族放任导致的乱象——因为我们不能对来宾做出过分的惩罚，最多也只是禁止他们再度入梦。
Some say that this madness was caused by The Family's neglect, but we can't mete punishment that is too severe on the guests — the worst we can do is to prevent them from entering the dreams again.
可眼下还有更好的办法吗？难道我们要为了所谓的安宁，放弃追求福祉、同谐同乐的底线吗？
But what other better solution is there? Are we supposed to sacrifice our goal of pursuing happiness and harmony, all for the so-called peace?
我不认为那是个好主意，匹诺康尼的梦中不应存在压迫。倘若一定要用极端手段约束来宾，那我宁愿这里永远混乱下去。
I don't think it was a good idea. There should be no suppression in Penacony's dreams. If we had to use extreme methods to regulate guests, I'd rather this place remain forever chaotic.
再见，愿你在美梦中同享喜乐。
Goodbye, and may you have joy and happiness in the dream.
从理论上讲，你有权向她做出告解，但她冷若冰霜的表情让你打消了这个想法…或许应该等她心情好点再说？
In theory, you have the right to give her a confession, but her frosty visage quashes any such notions... Perhaps come back when she's in a better mood?
一愣过后，康娜的面容重归严肃，看不出丝毫情绪的波动。
After a momentary shock, Conna's face reverts to her usual solemnity, with not a sliver of emotion on it.
你是来告解的吗？如果不是的话还请不要于此逗留，你身后还有其他人在等待。
Are you here for a confession? Please do not loiter if you aren't. There are people waiting behind you.
我终究不是真正的「铎音」，没法将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
Ultimately, I'm not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...
啊…我终究没法像真正的「铎音」那样，将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
Ah... I'm ultimately not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...
上次有人来找我倾诉，说他沉迷梦境，连着疯玩了好几个月；等回到现实才发现，自己远在天外的年迈养母已经因病离世，而自己错过了她的最后一面……

The last time someone came for confession, he said he was obsessed with the Dreamscape, running amok inside for months. Only when he returned to reality did he discover that his own foster mother at home, far away from him, had passed away from illness, and he had missed the chance to see her for the last time...
他懊恼又自责，几乎要失去活着的勇气。可我除了不痛不痒的安慰以外，什么也给不了他……
He was both upset and remorseful, almost to the point where he lost the courage to live. Yet I couldn't do anything more for him, apart from empty words of comfort...
这样的事情我已见过许多。比起悲伤，我心中更多的是…疲倦。
I've seen many such incidents. Compared to sorrow, my heart is more... tired.
这片美梦之所以能够成形，兴许就是因为它能隔绝与它不相干的一切痛苦烦忧——可谁能想到呢？它们并不会凭空消失……
Perhaps this dream was able to take shape because it can sever all pains and worries irrelevant to the dream. But who would have guessed that such anguish would not just disappear into thin air...
啊…我终究没法像真正的「铎音」那样，将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
Ah... I'm ultimately not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...
上次有人来找我倾诉，说他沉迷梦境，连着疯玩了好几个月；等回到现实才发现，自己远在天外的年迈养母已经因病离世，而自己错过了她的最后一面……

The last time someone came for confession, he said he was obsessed with the Dreamscape, running amok inside for months. Only when he returned to reality did he discover that his own foster mother at home, far away from him, had passed away from illness, and he had missed the chance to see her for the last time...
他懊恼又自责，几乎要失去活着的勇气。可我除了不痛不痒的安慰以外，什么也给不了他……
He was both upset and remorseful, almost to the point where he lost the courage to live. Yet I couldn't do anything more for him, apart from empty words of comfort...
这样的事情我已见过许多。比起悲伤，我心中更多的是…疲倦。
I've seen many such incidents. Compared to sorrow, my heart is more... tired.
这片美梦之所以能够成形，兴许就是因为它能隔绝与它不相干的一切痛苦烦忧——可谁能想到呢？它们并不会凭空消失……
Perhaps this dream was able to take shape because it can sever all pains and worries irrelevant to the dream. But who would have guessed that such anguish would not just disappear into thin air...
Violence... is a betrayal to dreams!
康娜的脸上横添了一抹怒纹，额头紧皱成一团——这是洁癖者看到一地垃圾时的正常反应。
An angry frown streaks across Conna's face, her forehead scrunched up into wrinkly folds — that is the default reaction of someone obsessed with cleanliness who sees trash strewn all about.
人之无情，竟可以到这种地步？真是令人作呕！
Is the heartlessness of humanity truly capable of such atrocity? It simply makes me nauseous!
我想起了一位告解者，他向我寻求良心的慰藉，可他所做的分明是丧尽良心之事。
I'm reminded of a penitent who sought my comfort of his conscience, but what he did was clearly unconscionable.
家族的邀请遍及寰宇、明察秋毫，所赠的都是够格之人。而这位告解者德行不佳，才干亦不见长，并没有收到邀请。

The Family's invites were sent all over the worlds, and their judgment was keen-sighted — all who received them were worthy. But this penitent's morals and talents were both lacking, which is why he did not receive one.
谁曾想他被嫉妒占据了头脑，居然在半路截杀了一位来宾，夺取了对方的邀请函……
Who knew envy would take over his mind, intercepting and killing a guest on the way, then stealing the victim's invitation...
我当即呼叫了猎犬的家人们将他拿下，永远逐出梦境。
I summoned the Bloodhounds instantly to arrest him and exiled him from the Dreamscape forever.
被捕之后，他对自己的所作所为全无悔意，反倒咒骂我是背信弃义之人。
After his capture, he was remorseless about his vile act, and even cursed me for being someone who had forsaken my professional oath.
真是可笑——明明从选择付诸暴力的那时起，他就已经先背弃了美梦。
What a joke. He was the one who forsook the dream first the moment he chose violence.
康娜的脸上横添了一抹怒纹，额头紧皱成一团——这是洁癖者看到一地垃圾时的正常反应。
An angry frown streaks across Conna's face, her forehead scrunched up into wrinkly folds — that is the default reaction of someone obsessed with cleanliness who sees trash strewn all about.
我想起了一位告解者，他向我寻求良心的慰藉，可他所做的分明是丧尽良心之事。
I'm reminded of a penitent who sought my comfort of his conscience, but what he did was clearly unconscionable.
家族的邀请遍及寰宇、明察秋毫，所赠的都是够格之人。而这位告解者德行不佳，才干亦不见长，并没有收到邀请。

The Family's invites were sent all over the worlds, and their judgment was keen-sighted — all who received them were worthy. But this penitent's morals and talents were both lacking, which is why he did not receive one.
谁曾想他被嫉妒占据了头脑，居然在半路截杀了一位来宾，夺取了对方的邀请函……
Who knew envy would take over his mind, intercepting and killing a guest on the way, then stealing the victim's invitation...
我当即呼叫了猎犬的家人们将他拿下，永远逐出梦境。
I summoned the Bloodhounds instantly to arrest him and exiled him from the Dreamscape forever.
被捕之后，他对自己的所作所为全无悔意，反倒咒骂我是背信弃义之人。
After his capture, he was remorseless about his vile act, and even cursed me for being someone who had forsaken my professional oath.
真是可笑——明明从选择付诸暴力的那时起，他就已经先背弃了美梦。
What a joke. He was the one who forsook the dream first the moment he chose violence.
来啊，迷途的羔羊，向我敞开你的心扉吧。
Come, lost lamb, open your heart to me.
康娜的脸上闪过一丝笑意。她本想遮掩，却忍俊不禁。
A smile flashes across Conna's lips. She initially tries to hide it, but can't help it nonetheless.
噗嗤，年度模范侍者…整得就像什么大奖一样。
Psh, model attendant of the year... Like it's some sort of grand award.
是啊，也许家主应该给我发个胸牌，上面写着「年度模范在此」。这样还算有些仪式感。
Yes. Perhaps the head of The Family should confer me with a medal, with "I'm the role model of the year" engraved on it. At least there'd be some sense of ceremony to it.
知道模范怎么评的吗？每位家人都会被发到一个沾满奶油的甜甜圈，好把它扔到自己推荐的人身上。谁被沾了最多的奶油，谁就是年度模范。

Do you know how this prize is decided? Every Family member will be sent a donut doused in cream to be thrown at the person they wish to recommend. Whoever gets most covered in cream will be the model employee of the year.
真是顶高帽啊。不过既然大家这么看重我，我也得好好回应才行。来吧，尽情朝我发射甜甜圈——我是说，尽情向我倾诉吧。

What a pretentious farce. But since everyone thinks so highly of me, I have to reciprocate in kind. Come, fling donuts at me to your heart's content— Err, I mean, confess to me to your heart's content.
如此看来，她还是有一丝幽默感的…也许只是有些怕生？
At least she still has a sense of humor... Or maybe she's just somewhat uncomfortable with new people?
I've got nothing to confess anymore.
好，我会始终在此，等待倾听你的心声。
All right. I'll be right here, waiting to listen to your heart's voice.
你好啊，我是艾薇拉，《钟表小子》系列动画的忠实粉丝，也是在这里帮工的志愿者。
Greetings, I am Elvira, a loyal fan of the Clockie cartoon series, and also a volunteer here.
如你所见，克劳克影视乐园还有很多地方不够完善，主要是人手太有限了…当然， 我们有在努力改进。
As you can see, there are many aspects of Clock Studios Theme Park that aren't up to the task yet, mainly because we severely lack manpower... Of course, we're working on improving that.
总之，欢迎你到处转转。只有人多起来，乐园才能更加兴旺嘛。
In any case, you're welcome to look around. Theme parks only get more prosperous with crowds.
I want to chat with you.
好啊，我很高兴有人能对影视乐园感兴趣。
Sure, I'm very glad that there are people interested in theme parks.
你为什么在这做志愿者？
因为我想和钟表小子一起工作？还记得我小时候每天最期待的事，就是提前坐在客厅的沙发上，等着准时收看钟表小子动画。

Because I wanted to work with Clockie? I still remember when I was younger, the thing I most looked forward to every day was to sit myself in front of the living room sofa and wait for Clockie's cartoon to air.
可惜不管它更新得再快，也跟不上我追剧的速度。到离开校园的时候，我已经把所有钟表小子相关的衍生剧集都刷过至少三遍了。

It's a pity that no matter how fast it got updated, it could never catch up to the speed at which I watched. By the time I left school, I'd already seen all of Clockie's related spin-offs at least three times over.
所以，我决定亲自参与到钟表小子的制作中，哪怕只是帮大家端茶送水也好…毕竟那可是我的童年啊。
So, I decided to personally participate in Clockie's production, even if it was just serving the crew drinks and food... I mean, it was my childhood after all.
那可就多了，像什么帮客人拍照、跑腿，管理周边商品，修缮游乐设施之类的，偶尔还得照顾扮演动漫形象的同事。
Oh, I do plenty, like helping guests take photos, running errands, managing the merch, fixing rides and all that. Sometimes, I even have to take care of my coworkers who play the cartoon characters.
虽然大部分是些没什么技术含量的杂活，但架不住量大类多，大家都会时不时招呼我去帮忙。
Most are odd jobs that don't require much skill, but there's plenty of it to go around. Most people call for my help regularly.
嘿嘿，这么一想，我还是个挺不可或缺的人物呢……
Hee-hee, when I think about it, I'm still a pretty important staff member around here...
你怎么看待这里的皮套人？
What do you think of the costumed people here?
你是指扮演动漫形象的同事？我敬重他们，就像我敬重每一个创作者那样。
You mean my coworkers playing the cartoon characters? I really respect them, just like I admire every creator.
不管在现实还是梦境，每部能被人观赏的作品都是千万个系统时辛勤劳动的结晶。
Whether in reality or in the Dreamscape, every work that manages to finally reach the audience is the fruition of tens of millions of system hours of blood, sweat, and tears.
而想要构建出我们喜爱的世界，除了创意的提供者以外，也离不开将创意付诸实际的执行者。
And to create a world we all love, we can't forget the people who helped execute the idea as well as those who provided the idea.
每当看见钟表小子和伙伴们在荧幕上舞蹈，我都要由衷地发出赞叹——大家居然能将那些虚拟角色演绎得如此惟妙惟肖。
Every time I see Clockie and his companions dance on the screen, I can't help but marvel in earnest at how everyone brought those fictional characters so vividly to life.
希望有朝一日我也能参与到动画创作中去……
I hope that one day I can also play a part in animation production...
再见，希望你在这里玩得开心。
Goodbye, and I hope you have fun here.
再见，希望你在这里玩得开心。
Goodbye, and I hope you have fun here.
请问您有什么需要帮忙的吗？
Do you need help with anything?
…请见谅，我压力大的时候总是容易喜怒无常。毕竟这里的工作并不轻松。
...I apologize. My mood swings get erratic when I'm stressed out. The work here isn't exactly a walk in the park.
这是个夕阳产业，趁早转行吧。
It's a dying industry. Better jump ship early.
哈哈，多谢关心，不过辞职还是算了。
Haha, thank you for your concern, but I'm not planning on leaving.
虽然确实会有些劳累…但当工作结束后、我对着日历回想每天的经历时，总觉得一切努力都是有意义的。
It's quite tiring here... but when work is over, and I think back on my experiences of the day while staring at the calendar, I always feel that all that hard work is worth it.
因为我、以及我的同事们，一直在用双手筑就全新的东西。
Because I, and my coworkers, are building something totally new with our own hands.
我们所做的基础工作，会切实地为克劳克影城提供帮助。指不定下一部钟表小子电影的片尾名单里就有我呢。
All the groundwork we do will realistically help Clock Studios Theme Park. Who knows, I might be in the ending credits in the next Clockie movie.
艾薇拉的脸上重拾了喜悦与激情。她对你露出一个笑容，用元气满满的声音开了口——
Elvira's face is marked with joy and passion yet again. She smiles at you, and musters her gusto as she says:
那么现在，请问您有什么需要帮忙的吗？
Now, is there anything I can help you with?
还有很多事情要做…加油干吧。
There's much more to do... gotta work harder!
哎呀，我怎么还在这说闲话，明明有很多事情没做呢……
Gah, what am I doing here still chatting away. I still get lots of things to do...
门口的导览牌要修缮，游戏机里的代币要更换，动漫人物的扮演者们也需要慰问一下……
The signboard at the entrance needs fixing, the tokens in the arcade machines need changing, and there are cartoon character actors who need attending to...
艾薇拉陷入了沉默。某种一直萦绕着她的热忱消失了，取而代之的是工作最本真的情感——枯燥。
Elvira falls into a deep silence. A certain kind of enthusiasm that surrounded her has disappeared, replaced by the most fundamental emotion associated with work: Monotony.
哪怕梦想变成了工作，也终究是一份工作。
Even if one manages to work at a dream job, in the end, it's just that: A job.
唉，难道属于动画片的年代真的已经过去了吗？
*sigh* Is the age of cartoons truly over?
唉，这年头，喜欢动画片的人越来越少了……
*sigh* There are fewer and fewer people who like cartoons these days...
曾经跟我一起追剧的好友们早就退坑了。大家都说自己有很多事情要忙，不能再把时间花在这些没用的东西上。
The friends who used to binge-watch the series with me quit way early on. Everyone says they've got a lot of stuff to do, and have no time to spend on such useless activities.
我知道啊，现实的重力总是会打破一切幻想，把人们从天空拽回地面。我早就知道这个道理，只是无力改变……
I know, the gravity of reality always shatters all fantasies, dragging them from the sky back to earth. I knew this a long time ago, but I can't do anything to change it...
不过我相信，终有一天，等到人们被枯燥的现实折磨得遍体鳞伤…他们一定会重新对美好的事物投去目光。
But I believe that one day, when people are battered by the monotony of reality... They will once again cast their eyes on happier things.
我愿意等待那天的到来…换句话说，除了等待以外，我还能做些什么呢？
I'm willing to wait for that day to come... Rather, what else can I do besides wait for it?
唉，这年头，喜欢动画片的人越来越少了……
*sigh* There are fewer and fewer people who like cartoons these days...
曾经跟我一起追剧的好友们早就退坑了。大家都说自己有很多事情要忙，不能再把时间花在这些没用的东西上。
The friends who used to binge-watch the series with me quit way early on. Everyone says they've got a lot of stuff to do, and have no time to spend on such useless activities.
我知道啊，现实的重力总是会打破一切幻想，把人们从天空拽回地面。我早就知道这个道理，只是无力改变……
I know, the gravity of reality always shatters all fantasies, dragging them from the sky back to earth. I knew this a long time ago, but I can't do anything to change it...
不过我相信，终有一天，等到人们被枯燥的现实折磨得遍体鳞伤…他们一定会重新对美好的事物投去目光。
But I believe that one day, when people are battered by the monotony of reality... They will once again cast their eyes on happier things.
我愿意等待那天的到来…换句话说，除了等待以外，我还能做些什么呢？
I'm willing to wait for that day to come... Rather, what else can I do besides wait for it?
为什么，为什么总有人冒出来破坏我的梦想？！
Why, why are people always popping out to ruin my dream!?
啊啊啊，到底什么时候才能加入家族、见到真正的钟表小子啊？
Aaahhh, when will I get to join The Family and see the real Clockie?
是啊，苜蓿草家的人告诉我，只要成为「家人」，就能接触到真正的钟表小子的秘密。
Yeah, the Alfalfas told me that I'd get to know the real Clockie's secret if I became a Family member.
之前他们确实派人来邀请过我，那会儿我都以为自己要成功了——结果他们一听我是为了钟表小子才加入家族，就又把我退了回来。
They actually did send someone to invite me previously, and I thought I was this close to succeeding... In the end they got wind that I was only joining The Family for Clockie, and rejected me.
看他们那表情，就好像我说要往松饼里加两片月亮似的…至不至于啊？！
From their looks of disdain, it's like I said I wanted to add two slices of the moon to my waffle or something... Was it really that bad a desire!?
到底是谁劈了美梦小镇影院的屏幕？知不知道维护它需要多高的成本啊！
Who was it who cleaved Dreamville Cinema's screen in two? Do you know how much it takes to maintain it!
原本我最大的娱乐就是看大屏幕上轮播的钟表小子动画——没想到现在就连这点消遣都被剥夺了！对它的破坏简直是对美梦的亵渎！

Initially, my greatest joy was to watch Clockie's cartoon reruns on the big screen. Now even this small slice of happiness has been ripped away from me! Its destruction is a desecration of a beautiful dream!
为什么在梦里也要打打杀杀，到底是谁这么想不开？就不能老老实实地坐下来欣赏艺术吗！
Why must violence be committed even in dreams? What're these people angry about? Why can't they just sit back and enjoy art!
怎么办啊…要不干脆去算一卦？或者去大街上抓个弹簧荷官？
What do I do... How about I just go get my fortune told? Or should I head to the main street to catch a Spring Loader?
算事业啊，我正巧认识个仙舟来的狐人，算得可准了，就是收费有点贵……
For my job. I coincidentally ran into a foxian from Xianzhou, and she's the real deal. Just that her fee is a bit dear...
对啊，让它给我丢个骰子，根据点数决定到底怎么选……
Yeah, get it to throw a die for me, and make my choice from the number thrown...
嘿…等等！相遇即是有缘，不如你来给我些建议吧？我就当你同意了啊——
Hey... Wait! It's destiny that we encountered each other. How about you give me a couple of suggestions? I'll take your silence as consent...
我问你，如果有两个选项摆在你面前：要么当个无忧无虑的高级打工人，要么为了自由自在地追求梦想而劳碌奔波，你会选哪个？
Lemme ask, if you had two choices in front of you: To be a carefree and highly paid employee, or chase your dream through hardships in the name of freedom. Which would you choose?
A highly paid employee sounds good.
哈，你也这么觉得吗…也对…人嘛，总得学会活得现实点儿。
Ha, you feel that way too... That's true... We all have to learn to be more realistic about our life goals.
哈，你也这么觉得吗…果然…即便美梦早已被金钱锈蚀，人也不该放弃自己的追求……
Ha, you feel that way too... That's right... Even if dreams have long been corrupted by money, we should never abandon our pursuits...
Can't I just be an average lazy bum?
…你能不能有点追求？算了，就当我没问过吧。
...Can you at least have a little ambition? Meh, forget I ever asked.
谢谢你的帮助，但这件事情对我而言至关重要，我还得再好好考虑一下……
Thanks for your help, but this matter is of utmost importance to me. I still have to ponder on it properly...
行啊，反正我一时半会儿也做不出决定……
Sure, not like I can make a decision on the fly anyway...
So what kind of employee are you?
我…？我是个梦泡艺术家。哈…很神奇对不对，「艺术家」和「打工人」这两个词看起来明明如此不相干……
Me...? I'm a dream bubble artist. Ha... Amazing, isn't it? When these two words "artist" and "employee" do not seem related at all...
可实际上，如果失去了资本的支持与运作，所谓的「艺术」也不过是滞销的商品罢了。
But in reality, if we lost the support and management from corporations, our so-called "art" would be nothing but unsalable commodities.
梦想啊…我的梦想是能有这么一天——当人们谈论起我的作品时，他们不谈销量、不论票房，而是认真解读、理性探讨，去挖掘、去理解作品的内容与内涵，以及隐藏在背后的真正的「我」……

Dream... My dream is to have such a day — when people talk about my works, they would not deliberate its sales nor discuss its box office, but to seriously analyze and rationally study it, to delve into it and understand its content and meaning, and to find the true "me" hidden within...
不过我也知道，这只是痴人说梦罢了，哈哈。
But I also know that's just the talk of a lunatic dreamer, haha.
没问题，正好我也需要一些时间来沉淀我的思绪。
It's fine. I also need some time to percolate on my decision.
要不抛个硬币试试？算了，这也太过随便了……
How about I just toss a coin? Nah, that's not serious enough...
你又来啦…所以，愿意花些时间听听我的烦恼吗？
You're back... So, willing to spend some time to listen to my woes?
我…原本也算个小有名气的梦泡艺术家，代表作有《漆皮木偶与太空仓鼠》、《第十三个时刻》、《迷因的野餐》……
I... was a dream bubble artist of small renown, with my representative works being Patent Leather Puppet and Space Hamster, The Thirteenth Moment, and Meme's Picnic...
相信单从这些名字中你也能发现，我在艺术上的表达稍微有那么一点——好吧，对于一般人而言或许是过于——抽象和前沿。
I'm sure you've noticed from these names that my artistic expression is a little... All right, to most people, it might be overly... abstract and avant-garde.
我原本并不为此感到烦扰。曾经的我一直坚信「艺术」本该如此，天经地义。直到…我主动离开了鸢尾花家系。
I didn't think too much of that. I once firmly believed that art should be thus, until... I left the Iris Family of my own accord.
我的风格并未改变，口碑与名声却一落千丈…往日的赞美都变成了恶评，他们讥讽我、嘲笑我，将我的作品贬的一文不值。
My style didn't change, but my fame suffered greatly... Praises of the past became review bombs, and they ridiculed me, mocked me, and considered my art utterly worthless.
我现在有些…迷茫。明明我还是我，但没有了「鸢尾花」的光环之后，我似乎又不再是「我」了……
I am now somewhat... lost. I'm still me, but without the Iris Family's name, I don't seem to be "me" anymore...
那些鼓吹什么「酒香不怕巷子深的」，要么就是幸存者偏差，要么就是还没经过现实的毒打……
Those who drum on about "good wine needs no bush" either have experienced survivor bias or haven't been beaten up by the brutalities of reality yet...
我曾天真地认为，作为一名「艺术家」，我所需要做的就只是投身创作、尽情挥洒我的天赋与才华。
I once naively thought that, as an artist, all I need to do was to pour my creativity into my work and flaunt my artistic talent.
直到我从镶金的鸟笼子里钻了出来，才明白并不是只要作品够精彩、够独特，就一定能收获关注与喜爱。
Not until I wormed my way out of my gilded cage did I realize that a piece had to be more than just exciting and unique to receive attention and adoration.
当失去了为你打点好一切流程的的团队后，你得时刻关注市场动向和家族政策、得紧巴巴地控制资源投入与制作周期，你得分神打点资金人脉、亲自宣发造势，甚至还不得不费大力气处理盗版维权的问题……

When you lose a team that did everything for you, you have to pay attention to market trends and Family policies, stringently manage your resources and production timelines, personally promote yourself and manage your sponsors and network. You even have to spend huge amounts of effort on combating copyright disputes...
现在想来，过去的我是多么愚蠢…艺术的背后永远都少不了钱与权的影子，谁又能只靠一腔热情生存下去？

Now that I think of it, I was so dumb in the past... The shadows of finance and power are always pulling the strings behind the glamor of the art world. Who would be able to survive with just passion?
我曾天真地认为，作为一名「艺术家」，我所需要做的就只是投身创作、尽情挥洒我的天赋与才华。
I once naively thought that, as an artist, all I need to do was to pour my creativity into my work and flaunt my artistic talent.
直到我从镶金的鸟笼子里钻了出来，才明白并不是只要作品够精彩、够独特，就一定能收获关注与喜爱。
Not until I wormed my way out of my gilded cage did I realize that a piece had to be more than just exciting and unique to receive attention and adoration.
当失去了为你打点好一切流程的的团队后，你得时刻关注市场动向和家族政策、得紧巴巴地控制资源投入与制作周期，你得分神打点资金人脉、亲自宣发造势，甚至还不得不费大力气处理盗版维权的问题……

When you lose a team that did everything for you, you have to pay attention to market trends and Family policies, stringently manage your resources and production timelines, personally promote yourself and manage your sponsors and network. You even have to spend huge amounts of effort on combating copyright disputes...
现在想来，过去的我是多么愚蠢…艺术的背后永远都少不了钱与权的影子，谁又能只靠一腔热情生存下去？

Now that I think of it, I was so dumb in the past... The shadows of finance and power are always pulling the strings behind the glamor of the art world. Who would be able to survive with just passion?
说什么「只要努力就会有回报」…哈，这种鬼话也就傻子才会相信！
All that talk about how "hard work begets rewards"... Ha, only a fool would believe such lies!
那些「当红个人梦泡艺术家」，你以为他们的作品当真有多与众不同？算了吧，不过是刚巧赶上个好时机，顺势赚了一波流量罢了。
Those flavor-of-the-month indie dream bubble artists... you think their works are really one-of-a-kind? Perish the thought. They simply lucked out and rode the wave of popularity.
说实话，我现在如果想要重新回到鸢尾花家系，其实也没那么难。即便最近的作品口碑暴跌，我的影响力和粉丝基数始终还在，比再去培养一个同样风格的新人性价比高多了。

Honestly, it wouldn't be that hard if I really wanted to return to the Iris Family fold. Even if my recent works were lambasted, my influence and fan base are still intact. I'm still more cost-effective than building up a newbie with a similar style.
总的来说，现在的我对他们而言还有些价值…而且为艺人洗白、重新造势这种事情，他们向来擅长得很，根本花不了多大成本。

Anyway, I'm still of some value to them in my current state... They've always been excellent at resetting an artist's career and creating some new hype for them anyway. It doesn't cost that much to them.
虽然像是笼中鸟，但好歹吃喝不愁…这笔买卖怎么看都不亏吧，我在那一个劲儿纠结什么呢…哈、哈……
It's a cage, but at least I'll be clothed and fed... I see no downside to this deal, so why am I struggling with this decision... Ha, ha...
心有不甘又怎样、天赋异禀又如何——当钱和权成了高不可攀的门槛，所谓的艺术又怎么可能保持它的「纯粹」呢！
So what if I can't take it lying down? So what if I possess exceptional talent... When money and power become insurmountable barriers, how can the so-called "art" even preserve its purity!?
即便如此，我依旧心怀梦想……
Even so, I still have a dream...
男人痴痴地望着墙上的仓鼠球骑士海报，咧开的嘴角挂着餍足的笑意。
The man gazes, entranced, at the Hamster Ball Knight's poster on the wall. His lips are parted into a contented grin.
或许在他的幻想中，他已经克服了重重困难，获得了自由、实现了梦想…
Perhaps, in his fantasies, he has overcome the obstacles to become a free man and achieved his dream...
你决定悄悄走开，不去惊扰这场梦中的白日梦。
You walk away quietly so as not to disturb his daydream inside the dream.
眼前的皮皮西正仰头望着半空中的哈努兄弟立牌，面色怅然。他身上有种独特的气质，在这熙攘喧闹的人群中显得格格不入。
The Pepeshi before you is looking up at the Hanu sign in midair with a sorrowful face. He has a unique aura that makes him stand out in the cacophonous crowd.
你思索半晌，突然意识到，那是「孤独」。
After contemplating for a while, it suddenly occurs to you that this aura is "loneliness."
…没什么，我只是有些羡慕…钟表小子和哈努兄弟之间的友情罢了。
...Nothing much. I'm just a little envious of the... friendship that Clockie and Hanu share.
虽然我并没怎么看过钟表小子的动画，却依旧为他们之间纯粹的友谊而动容。
Although I've never watched much of Clockie's animation, I'm still moved by the pure friendship between them.
Are you a fan of Hanu?
哈哈，并不是，我甚至没怎么看过动画。但不得不说，他和钟表小子之间纯粹的友谊令我非常羡慕。
Haha, not really. I actually barely watched the animations. But still, I find the pure friendship between Clockie and him very enviable.
我也有一位…很重要的朋友。但我们之间的关系出现了一些…裂痕。实不相瞒，我正深受此事困扰。
I, too, have an... important friend, but our friendship is going through... a rough patch. In fact, I'm quite upset because of this.
为了向他证明自己，我来到了匹诺康尼，成为一名梦境鼓励师。只可惜…时至今日我依旧没能找到合适的方式来解决我们之间的问题。或许我们之间的友谊…已经走到了尽头。

To prove myself to him, I ventured to Penacony and became a Dreamscape Motivator. Unfortunately... I still have yet to come up with any solutions that can help us mend fences to this day. Perhaps... our friendship is already over.
啊…抱歉，自顾自说了这么多，希望没影响到你的心情。祝你玩得开心！
Oh, forgive me for rambling on. I hope your mood isn't affected. Have a great time!
Are you up for a chat?
…和我吗？如果你想的话，当然没什么问题。
...With me? If that's what you want, be my guest.
Would you like to talk about your friend?
嗯…这么说或许有些扫兴，但抱歉，我现在还没准备好谈论关于他的话题。
Well... I'm sorry for disappointing you, but I'm not ready to talk about him at the moment.
如果你不介意的话，我们可以聊一些别的？
How about we talk about something else if you don't mind?
这么一说…哦，我想起来了…你是那时候拜托安娜帮忙的年轻人吧？
Oh, I remember you. You were the youngster who asked for Anna's help back then, right?
听说后来事情被妥善解决了，想来一定有你不少功劳吧。
I heard that the matter was successfully resolved in the end. You must have played a big role in it.
Well, I hope you have a wonderful time.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
你…？如果你是在开玩笑，很抱歉我现在并没有这个心情；但如果你是认真的，请立刻打消这个念头——否则我会如实向猎犬反馈！
What...? If you're joking, I'm sorry. I'm not in the mood for that right now. If you're serious about it, I'd suggest that you drop the idea immediately, or I'll report you to the Bloodhounds!
Now, please stay away from me.
回见，如果你之后需要梦境鼓励师的帮助，倒是不妨来找我聊聊。
See you around. Feel free to come to me if you ever need the help of a Dreamscape Motivator.
眼前的皮皮西依旧仰头望着半空中哈努兄弟的立牌，面色怅然。
The Pepeshi before you is still looking up at the Hanu sign in midair with a sorrowful face.
动画中的友谊总是那么纯粹，那么美好。哈努兄弟永远是钟表小子的好伙伴，没有争吵、没有背叛、没有…算了，没什么。
The friendships portrayed in animations are always so pure and beautiful. Hanu is always a good companion of Clockie's. They don't fight, betray each other, or... forget it.
无论如何，我和那个男人的孽缘…也该有个了结了。
Anyway, it's probably time for the karma between me and that guy... to come to an end.
哈、哈啊…是啊…我究竟还要自欺欺人到什么时候呢……
Ha... Haha... Yeah... When am I going to stop fooling myself?
我的那位老朋友…他曾是我的向导、我的领路人，可最后…他反倒成了我前行的最大阻碍。我为此感到…遗憾。
That old friend of mine... He used to be my role model and mentor, but... he ended up becoming the biggest obstacle to my progress. I feel... regretful about that.
我们有过很多很多次争吵。起初他谴责、而我试图辩解，后来我们互不相让，再后来我们之间只剩数不尽的、令人难堪的谩骂。
We've argued many, many times. When he condemned me at first, I tried to defend myself. As time went on, neither of us gave in. We just kept hurling insults at each other in the end.
他开始一本又一本地著书立说，驳斥一切在他看来的异端邪说；而我则只身来到匹诺康尼，成为了一名梦境鼓励师……
He began penning book after book to refute everything he deemed heretical, while I traveled to Penacony all by myself to become a Dreamscape Motivator...
哈，话虽这么说，其实我的工作性质和「筑梦师」更类似——作为对自身理论的实践，我帮家族设计制作了一些小玩意…比如大街上那些窥梦电话。

Having said that, the nature of my work is actually similar to the one of a Dreamweaver. As practical applications of my theories, I've designed some gadgets for The Family... like the Dreampeek Call on the streets.
我们都自顾自地沉浸在自己的领域里，自顾自地想要证明自己才是正确的那一个。只不过这一切如今早已没有了意义……
We were both obsessed with our fields, trying hard to prove that we were the right one. However, this fight had long lost its meaning...
到了最后…就连争吵的声音也消失了。我们之间仅剩沉默。
At the end of the day... we didn't even argue with each other anymore. What was left between us was sheer silence.
我承认自己是个懦夫，但我无论如何也无法接受…他居然先我而去了，从此我们再也没有和好的可能……
I know I'm a coward, yet there's no way I can ever accept the fact that... he passed away before me. There's no chance for us to ever patch things up...
…或许，我该向家族寻求一些帮助……
...Perhaps, I should seek help from The Family...
我的那位老朋友…他曾是我的向导、我的领路人，可最后…他反倒成了我前行的最大阻碍。我为此感到…遗憾。
That old friend of mine... He used to be my role model and mentor, but... he ended up becoming the biggest obstacle to my progress. I feel... regretful about that.
我们有过很多很多次争吵。起初他谴责、而我试图辩解，后来我们互不相让，再后来我们之间只剩数不尽的、令人难堪的谩骂。
We've argued many, many times. When he condemned me at first, I tried to defend myself. As time went on, neither of us gave in. We just kept hurling insults at each other in the end.
他开始一本又一本地著书立说，驳斥一切在他看来的异端邪说；而我则只身来到匹诺康尼，成为了一名梦境鼓励师……
He began penning book after book to refute everything he deemed heretical, while I traveled to Penacony all by myself to become a Dreamscape Motivator...
哈，话虽这么说，其实我的工作性质和「筑梦师」更类似——作为对自身理论的实践，我帮家族设计制作了一些小玩意…比如大街上那些窥梦电话。

Having said that, the nature of my work is actually similar to the one of a Dreamweaver. As practical applications of my theories, I've designed some gadgets for The Family... like the Dreampeek Call on the streets.
我们都自顾自地沉浸在自己的领域里，自顾自地想要证明自己才是正确的那一个。只不过这一切如今早已没有了意义……
We were both obsessed with our fields, trying hard to prove that we were the right one. However, this fight had long lost its meaning...
到了最后…就连争吵的声音也消失了。我们之间仅剩沉默。
At the end of the day... we didn't even argue with each other anymore. What was left between us was sheer silence.
我承认自己是个懦夫，但我无论如何也无法接受…他居然先我而去了，从此我们再也没有和好的可能……
I know I'm a coward, yet there's no way I can ever accept the fact that... he passed away before me. There's no chance for us to ever patch things up...
…或许，我该向家族寻求一些帮助……
...Perhaps, I should seek help from The Family...
他有什么资格说我背叛了他！哈哈，他自己又做了些什么？
How dare he accuse me of betraying him!? Haha, what about his own doings?
一个博识学会的学者，竟然想要垄断知识——这种事情传出去，只会是天大的笑话！
As a scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild, he actually thought of monopolizing knowledge. What a massive joke that would be if others heard about it!
我承认他在「梦与心灵」领域的研究无人可及，但这不意味着他能成为一个独裁者、能掌握对思想和话语的生杀大权！
Indeed, his research in the field of dreams and psychology was unparalleled, but that didn't give him the right to be a tyrant! Or to decide whether some thoughts and speech should exist!
看看他都做了什么——通过故弄玄虚的仪式、神秘晦涩的行话，将普通的学术交流变成门徒选拔大会…人们不再拥有自由交流思想的权利，所有反对他的声音都将成为异端邪说。

Look at what he did — he turned ordinary academic conferences into ceremonies for him to pick his disciples by setting up contrived rituals and throwing in convoluted jargon... People were no longer free to speak their minds and converse with each other, as all voices opposing him were labeled as heretical.
他甚至…博识尊在上…甚至妄图将我变为刽子手与帮凶！
He even... oh, by Nous... attempted to make me an executioner and his accomplice!
而我只是想按自己的方式去追求知识、去构建自己的学说，就被斥为「背叛」…荒谬、荒谬！
And I was deemed a traitor for wanting to pursue knowledge and form my doctrine in my own way... How ridiculous!
他究竟为什么…会变成这副样子呢？
Just why... did he turn out this way?
一个博识学会的学者，竟然想要垄断知识——这种事情传出去，只会是天大的笑话！
As a scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild, he actually thought of monopolizing knowledge. What a massive joke that would be if others heard about it!

People were no longer free to speak their minds and converse with each other, as all voices opposing him were labeled as heretical.
他甚至…博识尊在上…甚至妄图将我变为刽子手与帮凶！
He even... oh, by Nous... attempted to make me an executioner and his accomplice!
而我只是想按自己的方式去追求知识、去构建自己的学说，就被斥为「背叛」…荒谬、荒谬！
And I was deemed a traitor for wanting to pursue knowledge and form my doctrine in my own way... How ridiculous!
他究竟为什么…会变成这副样子呢？
Just why... did he turn out this way?
皮皮西的嘴角浮现起一抹微笑，这使得他看上去更加年轻、也更有活力了一些。
The Pepeshi breaks into a faint grin that makes him appear more youthful and vibrant.
他的目光落在虚空某处，眼中浮现出一种满溢怀念的欣喜。
When he sets his gaze on a spot in the empty air, there is a hint of nostalgic delight in his eyes.
你知道吗？第一次见面的时候，我们明明相约共进晚餐，却未曾想一直聊到了第二天的早饭。
Did you know that, the first time we met, our dinner lasted all through the night till breakfast the following day? We had so much to talk about.
现在我还清晰地记得那天早上的菜单，就像我还记得与他聊过的每一个话题。
I can still remember the breakfast menu that morning, as clearly as I can remember every conversation I've had with him.
那时候我是如此地崇拜着他——比起朋友，他更像是我的父亲，我的导师。现在他已经走了，这些话也没有那么难以启齿了…是，我的确曾经崇拜着他，依赖着他。
I looked up to him so much at that time. He was more like a father and a mentor to me. Now that he is gone, I can say these things a lot more easily... Yes, I once idolized and relied on him.
我曾经最大的梦想就是为他搭建一座专属的学术舞台，然后看他如何在那台上绽放光芒、折服众生……
Once upon a time, my greatest aspiration was to create an academic platform only for him, where he could shine and impress everyone with his wisdom...
他是如此的无可替代…假如这梦境能让我永远沉浸在美好的回忆里，也好。
He was irreplaceable... It would be great if I could forever immerse myself in those beautiful memories.
抱歉，我不喜欢在上班时间闲聊。
Sorry, but I don't like to chat during working hours.
Mind if we have a little chat?
既然你有兴趣，我们就来聊聊吧。
Since you're up for it, let's do it.
How do you feel about your job?
这里的工作？说实话，不算刺激。
My job here? Frankly speaking, it isn't the most interesting thing.
麦考先生对公馆的安保要求十分严格，而我负责将他的命令传达给猎犬家系的小伙子们。
Mr. McCoy is stringent about the security of Dewlight Pavilion. My job is to convey Mr. McCoy's instructions to the Bloodhound guys.
直到现在，还没有敌人能入侵这里。所以我们每天也就是做些惯例的巡逻，偶尔帮着招待一下客人什么的…平淡的日常啊。
No one has ever succeeded in breaking into this place, so we just patrol the place every day and occasionally assist in entertaining the guests... That's a pretty uneventful routine.
不过，这正是美梦安宁的象征，不是吗？
Still, it means things are peaceful in the Dreamscape, isn't it?
What are your thoughts on dreams?
哦，美梦，任何家人都不会否认它存在的必要。不过它并不是我们生活的全部。
Oh, dreams. No one in The Family would deny its importance, but it isn't the only thing that matters in my life.
就拿我来说吧，除了工作，其余时间我都会回到现实，陪伴家人和宠物们——我家里养了几十只小动物。
Just take me as an example. When I'm not working, I'll return to reality to spend time with my family and pets — I have dozens of animals at home.
嗯…基本都是我收养的流浪动物。最开始只有两三只，时间一长就多起来了……
Yup... They were stray animals that I took in. I only had a couple of them in the beginning, and got more as time went on...
虽然不知道那是谁，不过我猜她一定也是个爱宠人士，哈哈。
I have no idea who that is, but I bet she must be a pet lover too, haha.
我家里基本都是收养的流浪动物。最开始只有两三只，时间一长就多起来了……
Most of my pets used to be stray animals. I only had a couple of them in the beginning, and they got more as time went on...
对于这一做法，我从没感觉过后悔或者嫌麻烦。毕竟，现实里的问题也总得有人解决，不是吗？
I've never regretted doing this or found it a nuisance. After all, someone has to deal with the issues in the real world at the end of the day, right?
What's your take on the Sweet Dreams Troupe?
噢，美梦剧团，可爱又乖巧的小东西，我非常喜欢。
Oh, Sweet Dreams Troupe. They are a lovely and sweet bunch. I like them.
作为梦境的造物，它们在服务宾客方面丝毫不逊色于我们人类，是很可靠的小帮手。
Although they are Dreamscape creations, they're just as good as us humans when it comes to serving the guests. They're quite reliable assistants.
不幸的是，在服务宾客的过程中难免会有情绪堆积。一些美梦剧团因此被侵蚀成了…不那么美妙的样子。
Unfortunately, it's inevitable to get frustrated while handling the guests. It's unfortunate that some Sweet Dreams Troupes are corroded as a result and are reduced to... something less sweet.
倘若有一天，梦里的人们能不再有负面情绪，剧团或许也能始终保持纯粹——那会是真正的美梦。
If one day people in the Dreamscape could be rid of their negative emotions, the troupe could probably stay pure all the time — that would be a beautiful dream in the truest sense.
再见，祝你度过愉快的一天。
See you, and I hope you have a wonderful day.
里奥的表情冷若冰霜。他没有说话，也没人敢去搭话。
Leo wears a frosty expression. He isn't uttering a word, and no one dares to talk to him.
…失礼了，我很少表现得像刚才那般失态。
...My apologies. That behavior was out of line. I am not usually like that.
我不喜欢在旁人面前表现情绪，那会为我的工作带来困扰。这次…是意外。我保证不会有下次了。
I do not like to reveal my emotions in public as it will affect my work. This time... this is an accident. It won't happen again.
美梦终有一天会迎来幻灭……
Dreams will one day face their end...
美梦…唉，美梦中本不该存在悲伤，但有时我就是抑制不住悲观的心态。
Dreams... One shouldn't feel sad in a dream, but I just can't help feeling pessimistic sometimes.
是，我们当然需要美梦，「黄金的时刻」是一座梦之城。正因心存对美好的渴望，人们才会来到这个地方。
There's no doubt we need dreams. The Golden Hour is a city of dreams where people who desire beauty visit.
但梦的扩张已经逼近极限，所有能享的福都终有穷尽。如今的匹诺康尼就像一个肥皂泡，再想变大就只能迎来破碎。

Nevertheless, the expansion of dreams is approaching its limits, and all the nice things will eventually come to exhaustion. Penacony is akin to a bubble that is bound to burst if it continues to grow bigger.
或许在未来的某天，全宇宙都会厌倦梦境，连带着厌倦一切幻想…到了那时，我们这些人又该能做些什么呢？
There might come a day when the entire universe gets sick of the Dreamscape as well as the illusions that come with it... When the time comes, what can people like us do?
唯一值得庆幸的是，我们暂时还看不到那么一天。
The only good thing is that such a day won't be happening in the near future.
在这朝露公馆以外，尽是谎言与欺骗！
The world beyond Dewlight Pavilion is full of lies and deception!
嘶…家族之外，危机四伏啊！
Hmm... Dangers are lurking everywhere outside The Family!
Has the Dreamscape been invaded by monsters?
Are the IPC here to attack us?
不，我只是想起了一件糗事。总有些逐梦客让人气到牙痒痒！
No, I just recalled something embarrassing that happened to me. There are always some Dreamchaser who never fail to get under my skin!
有次我离开公馆去「黄金的时刻」采购，在路边遇到了一个带货的逐梦客。
There was a time I went out to buy something in the Golden Hour. I bumped into a Dreamchaser who worked as a salesman along the way.
他说自己手上有来自朋克洛德的「以太卡带」，急着出手，只要五万信用点就卖给我。当时我只带了苜蓿钞，跟家人们借了个遍才凑齐那么多信用点。

He claimed to own an Aether Cartridge from Punklorde and was eager to sell it to me for just <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits. I only brought Alfalfa credits with me at that time, so I had to borrow from some of my family to afford it.
结果后来，我在星际网络上搜到了一模一样的同款，就是一盘普通的磁带——才五百信用点不到！

In the end, I came across another cartridge that looked exactly the same on the Interastral network as the one I bought. It was just a regular cartridge worth less than <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits!
真是大坑啊！难道人与人之间连最基本的信任都没有了？！愿神主教训这些破坏「同谐」的商人！
That was an outright scam! Can people nowadays still be trusted!? May the Great One punish the merchants who disrupt Harmony!
更可气的是，家族还不能对他做出过分的惩罚，只能将他逐出梦境…我不甘心啊啊啊啊！
Much to my dismay, The Family only ousted the guy from the Dreamscape without any heavy sentences... That's unacceptable!!!
嘶…某些逐梦客，真是让人气到牙痒痒！
Hmph... Some Dreamchasers are just so annoying!
有次我离开公馆去「黄金的时刻」采购，在路边遇到了一个带货的逐梦客。
There was a time I went out to buy something in the Golden Hour. I bumped into a Dreamchaser who worked as a salesman along the way.
他说自己手上有来自朋克洛德的「以太卡带」，急着出手，只要五万信用点就卖给我。当时我只带了苜蓿钞，跟家人们借了个遍才凑齐那么多信用点。

结果后来，我在星际网络上搜到了一模一样的同款，就是一盘普通的磁带——才五百信用点不到！

更可气的是，家族还不能对他做出过分的惩罚，只能将他逐出梦境…我不甘心啊啊啊啊！
Much to my dismay, The Family only ousted the guy from the Dreamscape without any heavy sentences... That's unacceptable!!!
你好啊。如果需要找人倾诉的话，我愿意聆听。
Hello there. If you have anything to get off your chest, I'm all ears.
数种情绪在短短一瞬间划过里奥的脸颊。最终，他仿佛大梦初醒般露出了一抹微笑。
Several different emotions flicker across Leo's face in a short time. In the end, he breaks into a faint smile as if he's just woken up from a dream.
哦，天呐，天呐…我都错过了些什么！
Oh, dear... What have I missed?
我拥有的这份工作是多么美妙啊——不用东跑西颠，不会感到劳累，下班后还能回家照看我的小狗。
It just dawned on me how perfect my job actually was — I don't have to run errands at different places. It's not too tiring, and I still have time to take care of my dogs after work.
仔细想想，之前的我真是太死板了。这样惬意的日子，就该笑着过才对！
Come to think of it, I've been too rigid all this while. I should be enjoying such a wonderful life with a smile!
或许是时候改掉这副冷脸了…从现在起，我要热情接纳身边的每一个人——就从你开始吧。
Perhaps, it's time I get rid of this poker face... From now on, I must treat everyone around me with warmth. Let's start with you.
请你收下这份情绪作为礼物，我将它珍藏了很久，很久。
This emotion is a gift for you. I've kept it for a very long time...
数种情绪在短短一瞬间划过里奥的脸颊。最终，他仿佛大梦初醒般露出了一抹微笑。
Several different emotions flicker across Leo's face in a short time. In the end, he breaks into a faint smile as if he's just woken up from a dream.
