我拥有的这份工作是多么美妙啊——不用东跑西颠，不会感到劳累，下班后还能回家照看我的小狗。
It just dawned on me how perfect my job actually was — I don't have to run errands at different places. It's not too tiring, and I still have time to take care of my dogs after work.
仔细想想，之前的我真是太死板了。这样惬意的日子，就该笑着过才对！
Come to think of it, I've been too rigid all this while. I should be enjoying such a wonderful life with a smile!
或许是时候改掉这副冷脸了…从现在起，我要热情接纳身边的每一个人——就从你开始吧。
Perhaps, it's time I get rid of this poker face... From now on, I must treat everyone around me with warmth. Let's start with you.
…你看起来像个新面孔，想见识一下我的大宝贝吗？
...You seem to be new in town. Would you like to take a look at this great item that I own?
哦对，你应该还不知道我「机动骑士」亨德列克的名号……
Right, I think you have never heard of me. I'm Hendrick the Mobile Knight.
自我介绍下，我是家族中最为幸运和强大的皮皮西——我拥有神主赐予的高科技战斗机甲！
Let me tell you something about myself — I'm the luckiest and strongest Pepeshi in The Family. I have a high-tech combat mech bestowed by the Great One!
看这右肩上的漆黑炮口，左臂上的伸缩能量刀，还有背后的双缸推进器…就知道这身战甲是极品啦！
Look at the black cannon on its right shoulder, the retractable energy blade on its left arm, and the dual thrusters on its back... I bet you can tell it is an elite armor!
可是你身上什么都没有…
But I can't see you wearing anything...
对哦，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉，像你这样的外宾什么也看不到…真可惜。
I almost forgot about this — only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. It's a shame that it isn't visible to an outsider like you.
对哦，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉，像你这样的外宾什么也看不到…真可惜。
I almost forgot about this — only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. It's a shame that it isn't visible to an outsider like you.
等等…这不对劲！按理来说，应该只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉才对——你明明什么都看不到，干嘛装出一幅很兴奋的样子！
Wait, this isn't right! Normally, only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. Why did you fake your excitement when you couldn't see anything?
哈，你也对我的战甲感兴趣了？
Ha, you're intrigued by my armor, aren't you?
给我介绍一下你的战甲。
Tell me more about your armor.
我这身战甲名叫「全领域歼击动力铠」，放眼整个宇宙也是数一数二的上品。
It's called "All-area annihilating power armor," one of the best of its kind in the entire universe.
穿上它之后，哪怕虫群和军团携手入侵朝露公馆，也会被我打得落花流水！
Even if the Swarm and the Legion were to launch a joint attack on Dewlight Pavilion now, I would be able to crush them when wearing it!
它们应该进不来梦境吧…
I don't think those two can come into the Dreamscape...
Are you sure you wouldn't win due to reinforcements?
咳咳，总之就是很厉害！你只需要接受这个设定就好。
Ahem. The armor is awesome. That's all I'm saying! You just need to accept that setting.
不过战斗并不是战甲唯一的功能——我经常开着它带家人们出去兜风，大伙都赞不绝口呢。
Combat isn't the only function of the armor though. I often take my kin out for a ride in it. Everyone loves it.
How did you get the armor?
说来话长，从我还是个孩子时起，这套战甲就已然浮现于我身……
It's a long story. This mecha had manifested on my body since I was little...
那是一个平静的午后。妈妈在厨房做饭，我在沙发上玩着模型小人。安逸与香味一同在空气中弥散。
It was a peaceful afternoon. Mom was cooking in the kitchen, while I was playing with some figurines on the couch. Tranquility was in the air along with the mouthwatering aroma of food.
可空气中很快就多出了另一股味道——刺鼻的浓烟。
But soon, there came a pungent smell of smoke.
突如其来的光芒笼罩了一切。火焰冲上天空，将这副美景烧成灰烬。
Suddenly, everything was enveloped by a glaring light. Flames shot up toward the sky, turning this beautiful scene into ashes.
我不顾一切地爬向厨房，抱起受伤的妈妈，飞奔到屋子外面。热浪没能烧灼我的皮肤，废墟也没能阻拦我的脚步……
Without hesitation, I crawled my way to the kitchen, carried my injured mother, and ran outside the house. The heat did not burn my skin, and the debris did not impede my way.
哪怕以皮皮西的尺度来看，一个孩子也不可能做到这些…这定是神主的恩赐！
Even by the Pepeshi's standard, a child couldn't have done all that... It must have been a gift from the Great One!
我平日乐于助人，偶尔做点无害的幻想。神主认为我是好的，便向我投来注视。这是良善的回报。
I enjoyed helping others and occasionally daydreamed harmlessly. The Great One must have thought I was good and decided to cast THEIR gaze upon me. It was the reward for my kindness.
直到现在，那副战甲依然披挂于我身。
I'm still wearing the armor now.
What are your thoughts on dreams?
你是在暗戳戳讽刺我的战甲只是做梦吗？开玩笑的~
Are you suggesting that the armor only exists in my dream? Don't worry. I'm just messing with you.
我从来没有怀疑过家族事业的正确性！不过现在的美梦…确实有些糟乱。
I've never doubted whether what The Family is doing is correct! However, I must say the Dreamscape is indeed a bit chaotic now.
随着入梦的人数越来越多，各种胡作非为的闹剧也开始层出不穷。
As more and more people are flocking to the dream, cases of unruly behavior have been on the rise.
出于「神主」的仁慈，家族只会对这样的行为作出制止和口头教育，不会实行过分的惩罚。
Out of the benevolence of the Great One, The Family only addresses such behavior through intervention and verbal warnings without giving out severe sanctions.
但总有些逐梦客不识好歹、不长记性，光我自己就曾经三次抓到过同一个破坏公物的家伙！
Yet, some Dreamchasers just never learn their lessons. I've caught the same guy damaging public property three times myself!
唉，希望这种情况有朝一日能有所改善吧。
Alas, I hope things will get better one day.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
喂喂，我的战甲可是装有反击电弧的，当心被烫掉手指头！
Hey, my armor comes with a counterattacking electric current. Be careful, or your fingers might be burned off!
再见。希望有朝一日，你也能欣赏到我的战甲。
Goodbye. I look forward to the day when you can see my armor.
哟，老兄，来见识下我的战甲吗？
Hey buddy, wanna see my armor?
…没想到作为「家人」，我居然也会表现出如此强烈的情绪，真够失态的。
...I didn't know I could get so emotional as a "kinsman." That was so shameful.
难道是战甲的镇静模块失效了？不应该啊…之后去补充点冷却液吧。
Has the calming module of my armor stopped working? It shouldn't be... Let me replenish the coolant later.
皮皮西头顶的绒球突然蔫了下来，仿佛一根枯草般搭在脑壳边缘。
The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head suddenly droops down and rests on the edge of his head like a withered weed.
唉，生亦何欢，死亦何苦…即便拥有如此强大的战甲，许多事依旧无能为力……
Alas, life doesn't guarantee pleasure, and death isn't all about pain... Even with such powerful armor, many things are still beyond my control.
不对，好像突然有一股奇怪的情感涌上心头。按理说不该发生这种事的……
Hold on. I can feel a weird sentiment getting stronger. This isn't supposed to happen...
…可能是战甲缺少能源？是时候狂吃飞碟堡补充快乐元素了。
...Maybe the armor needs more energy? It's time to chow down on some Floatdisc Burgers for more of that happy element.
这让我回想起去年的那场邂逅…不行，现在不是说这个的时候！
It reminds me of the encounter with a certain someone last year... No, now isn't the time to discuss that!
必须抑制这危险的情感。要忍耐…对，忍耐……
I have to suppress this dangerous emotion. I need to be patient... pa... tient...
皮皮西头顶的绒球突然蔫了下来，仿佛一根枯草般搭在脑壳边缘。
The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head suddenly droops down and rests on the edge of his head like a withered weed.
唔…突然有一股奇怪的情感涌上心头。按理说不该发生这种事的……
Hmm... I can feel a weird sentiment getting stronger. This isn't supposed to happen...
…可能是战甲缺少能源？是时候狂吃飞碟堡补充快乐元素了。
...Maybe the armor needs more energy? It's time to chow down on some Floatdisc Burgers for more of that happy element.
这让我回想起去年的那场邂逅…不行，现在不是说这个的时候！
It reminds me of the encounter with a certain someone last year... No, now isn't the time to discuss that!
必须抑制这危险的情感。要忍耐…对，忍耐……
I have to suppress this dangerous emotion. I need to be patient... pa... tient...
皮皮西的脸色突然开始变红，仿佛一块逐渐加热的烙铁——这可真是太神奇啦。
The Pepeshi's cheeks suddenly turn red like an iron block heading up — what a miraculous sight to behold.
是动力炉短路了吗？我感觉战甲内的温度正在上升……
Is my power furnace short-circuited? I can feel the temperature within my armor rising...
我明白了，是我的热血在燃烧！一想到梦境里的种种乱象，我的炮口就开始蠢蠢欲动！
I've got it! The heat comes from my burning enthusiasm! I feel the urge to fire my cannon every time I think of the chaotic situation in the dream!
既然家族不愿用强硬的手段惩罚坏蛋，就由我来代为教训他们好了！
Since The Family doesn't want to be harsh on the bad guys, I'll do the job!
我是火焰，是黑暗骑士，是一切邪恶的终结者！
I shall be the blaze and the dark knight that puts all evil to an end!
我要开启歼灭模式，把那些扰乱梦境治安的家伙通通<size=28>轰~杀~成~渣</size>呀！
I'll activate the annihilation mode to <size=28>shred</size> into pieces those who disrupt the law and order in the Dreamscape!
哦哦哦，我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转！
Wow, my armor is overclocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate!
皮皮西头顶的绒球开始不停摆动，仿佛飞行器的螺旋桨——要是速度再快一点，说不定他真能飞起来。
The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head starts swinging vigorously like the propeller of an aircraft. He might be able to fly if it spins a little bit faster.
哦…哦！这是什么？我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转，感觉好像要飞起来了！
Oh... Oh? What's happening? My armor is overlocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate! It feels like I'm going to fly!
是因为开启了推进系统的缘故吗…不对，是因为我好嗨！
Is it because I've turned on the propulsion system... No, it's because I'm excited!
干脆就这样冲上云霄吧，突破天际！
Why don't I just soar through the clouds and traverse across the sky like this!
一股粉色的气息从他身上涌出，弥散到周遭的空气中。那是肉眼可见的热情。
He radiates a pink glow that permeates the air around him — it visibly represents his enthusiasm.
皮皮西头顶的绒球开始不停摆动，仿佛飞行器的螺旋桨——要是速度再快一点，说不定他真能飞起来。
The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head starts swinging vigorously like the propeller of an aircraft. He might be able to fly if it spins a little bit faster.
哦…哦！这是什么？我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转，感觉好像要飞起来了！
Oh... Oh? What's happening? My armor is overlocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate! It feels like I'm going to fly!
是因为开启了推进系统的缘故吗…不对，是因为我好嗨！
Is it because I've turned on the propulsion system... No, it's because I'm excited!
干脆就这样冲上云霄吧，突破天际！
Why don't I just soar through the clouds and traverse across the sky like this!
真无聊啊…干什么都提不起劲儿来……
I'm so bored... Nothing I do seems to get me fired up anymore...
哦？嗨！你看起来…特别酷！这身行头在匹诺康尼很少见啊，可以冒昧问问你是从哪来的吗？
Oh? Hey! You look really cool! You never see outfits like that around Penacony. May I ask where you are from?
The Astral Express is my home!
For a Nameless, the whole world is my home.
哦哦哦！听起来就不简单——所以那究竟是什么，能给我讲讲吗？
Ooh! That sounds complicated! So, what does that mean? Can you tell me more?
你简明扼要地为沃尔特解释了何为星穹列车、何为无名客。
You give Walter a brief explanation of the Astral Express and what it means to be a Nameless.
嗨——这可比电影里演的精彩多了！那你一定去过很多地方吧？一定有过不少惊险刺激的经历吧？
Hey... That sounds even more amazing than a movie! Then you must have been to many places? You must have had all sorts of dangerous and thrilling experiences.
给我讲讲呗？作为回报，关于匹诺康尼你要是有不了解的，都可以来问我。
Will you tell me some stories? To repay you, you can come to me any time there is something about Penacony you don't fully understand.
想问什么尽管问！要说我对这片儿多熟悉——就连艾迪恩公园的地砖有多少块我都一清二楚！
Ask whatever you like! To say I know a lot about this place is an understatement... I could even tell you how many floor tiles there are in Aideen Park!
So, how many tiles are there?
呃…嗨…这就是个比喻，比喻懂吗！你还是问点实际的吧。
Uhh... Hey... It's a metaphor. You know what a metaphor is, right? Why don't you ask me a more realistic question?
有什么推荐的游玩项目？
Are there any fun activities you'd recommend?
附近的话，首选当然是艾迪恩公园！仓鼠球竞速和哈努兄弟角色扮演可都是必玩项目。
If you mean nearby, my first stop would obviously be Aideen Park! You have to try the hamster ball race and the Brother Hanu roleplay!
说到这个…哈哈，黄金扭蛋机旁边那三个一排的美梦排排乐，你有空可以看去看一眼。
Speaking of which... Haha, that line of three Dreamy Slots next to the Golden Capsule Machine... if you get a chance, you should go and check them out.
最左边金色那个特别有「个性」，天天劝人戒赌，为此没少被人投诉；但不管被重置多少次它都改不了这个毛病，都快成都市传说了。

The furthest golden machine to the left has a lot of "character..." Every day it begs and begs people to quit gambling, which has caused a lot of complaints. However, it doesn't matter how many times they reset the machine. This problem never goes away. It's becoming a bit of an urban legend.
至于其它时刻嘛…喜欢自然风光就去「绿洲」、喜欢选秀节目就去「热砂」、想艳遇就去「蓝调」、想购物就去「薄暮」……

As for the other Moments... If you like natural scenes, check out the Moment of Oasis. If you like talent shows, then go to Moment of Scorchsand. If you want a romantic affair then go to Blue Hour. If you want to go shopping, then go to Moment of Dusk...
要是嫌这些都不够刺激，那我推荐你去「星辰的时刻」——什么球笼、机动球、独轮车，各种比赛那边应有尽有。
If none of these are exciting enough for you, I suggest heading over to the Moment of Stars... Spheroid, Roboball, Unicycler... they have competitions for everything over there.
Are there any dishes you can recommend?
这个嘛…最有名的苏乐达你肯定喝过了吧？那我推荐你试试噼咔白葡萄汽水，那玩意味道不咋样，但是劲儿特别足。美梦糖浆嘛…我倒是不太推荐，太甜了，而且喝完容易犯困。

Hmm... SoulGlad is the most popular one. You must have tried that, right? Then I recommend trying Pika White Grape Soda. It may not taste great, but it's got a lot of kick! Dream Syrup on the other hand... I wouldn't recommend it. It's too sweet and makes you really sleepy.
至于吃的…如果是为了打卡的话，肯定得试试钟表披萨和橡木蛋糕卷——虽然那个蛋糕卷嚼着跟啃木头差不多。
As for food... If you just want to check out some popular foods, you have to try Clockie Pizza and Oak Cake Rolls... Even if eating those cakes is a bit like chewing on wood...
但如果你想吃点实在的，那我推荐飞碟堡和百层圣代。当然，圣代千万别点无糖的！
But if you want to eat something a bit more filling, I recommend Floatdisc Burgers and Hundred-Layer Sundaes. Of course, whatever you do, don't order the sugar-free sundae!
哎呀，这么快，我还没聊够呢……
Ah, so soon? I still have so much to talk about...
I have things to do. See you around.
行吧。关于匹诺康尼，如果你还有什么想要了解的，尽管来问我就好。
Alright. If there's anything else you want to know about Penacony, come and ask me anytime.
哦，你来啦？最近有没有什么新鲜事，跟我分享分享呗？
Oh, you're here? Do you have any new stories to share with me?
这一天天的，我快无聊死了。倒不是说这梦里不好，不过嘛……
Living day after day like this... I could just die of boredom. I'm not saying that the dream world is bad, it's just...
假如你从出生起就开始喝苏乐达，那这玩意对你而言，不就和白水没什么区别了吗？
Imagine you've drunk SoulGlad your whole life since you were born. Then, to you, drinking SoulGlad would be no different to just drinking plain old tap water, wouldn't it?
真想来场说走就走的星际冒险啊……
I wish I could just run away on an interstellar adventure...
他们总说这梦境有多让人流连忘返，但看久了也就是座繁华一点的普通都市而已。
They all say how the Dreamscape is so amazing that people never want to leave... But after you've stared at it long enough, it's just another slightly more prosperous city.
其实我可羡慕你这样的人了，自由自在、无拘无束，想去哪就去哪，既没有负担也没有顾虑……
Honestly, I really envy people like you. Completely free, no restraints, going wherever the wind takes you, no burdens or worries...
Why be moved when you can get moving?
你又怎么知道我没行动呢？
How do you know I haven't gotten moving?
瞧你这话说的…匹诺康尼已经不做监狱很多年了。
Oh, c'mon... Penacony hasn't been a prison for a long time.
别的不说，光是冒险中可能用到的资源装备，我就已经收藏了整整一屋子。
I already have a whole room full of resources and equipment that might be useful on an adventure, and that's just the beginning.
更何况…虽然还没离开过阿斯德纳星系，附近的星球我可没少转悠。但没有哪一颗能让我感受到冒险的快乐——
What's more... Although I've never left the Asdana star system, I have travelled to a lot of the nearby planets. It's just that none of them have really allowed me to feel the joy of adventure...
那些地方充斥着毫无特色的建筑、乏味过时的娱乐、矫揉造作的景观…甚至还不如匹诺康尼呢！
They're all just filled with unremarkable buildings, outdated entertainment, and artificial scenery... They can't even measure up to Penacony!
真正的冒险，必是充满曲折险阻、惊心动魄，必是能够目睹最真实的宇宙……
A true adventure needs to be full of twists and turns, thrills and excitement, and allow you to witness the truest universe...
So, you want to be a Nameless?
I can invite you to the Express.
呃…这、多谢你的好意，但现在不行，我不能随随便便答应你。
Uhh... Umm, thank you for the kind offer, but I cannot right now. I cannot just casually agree to something like that...
星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...
他们总说这梦境有多让人流连忘返，但看久了也就是座繁华一点的普通都市而已。

I can invite you to the Express.

Uhh... Umm, thank you for the kind offer, but I cannot right now. I cannot just casually agree to something like that...
星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...
果然和那种大老粗玩不来……
I just knew that I could never spend time with those oafs...
你知道我那俩「结拜兄弟」吗？不知道也没关系，听我说就是了。
Do you know about my "sworn brothers"? If you don't know, I'll explain anyway.
前些日子我在影城闲逛，心血来潮去门口的快餐车转了转，然后就多了俩兄弟……
A few days ago, I was wandering around the theme park and went to check out the food trucks by the entrance on a whim. Then, I ended up gaining a couple of brothers...
Do brothers come free with the snacks?
…你先听我说完。当时正好有个钟表小子的皮套演员在和老板聊天，我一听，这不巧了——俩人一个叫沃尔普，一个叫沃尔纳。
Listen to the rest of my story first. At that moment, I happened to overhear a Clockie actor talking to his boss and would you believe it... Their names were Wolpe and Warner!
俗话说得好：「三个沃尔X，顶个钟表匠。」，我们就在钟表小子雕像前结拜了。
The saying goes: "The more Ws you get, the better." So, we vowed to be brothers in front of the Clockie Statue.
老三沃尔纳倒是还好，人够机灵，还能说会道，相处下来也算舒坦；但那个沃尔普…唉，听说他以前是个银河知名的运动健将，但在我看来完全就是糙人一个！

The youngest, Warner, wasn't that bad. He was smart enough and quite eloquent. We got along pretty well. But that Wolpe... Ah, I hear he used to be a famous athlete across the cosmos, but I just think he's an oaf!
请他们去钟表餐厅吃个饭吧，别人都细嚼慢咽，就他一个劲儿往嘴里塞，跟打仗似的。
I figured I'd take them out for a meal at the Clock Diner. But where most people take their time and chew slowly, he just rammed it all in his mouth like he was at war with his food.
最近鸢尾花家系有个小歌手的「纯美之歌」不是有点名气吗，亏我特意带他们去享受一下文化熏陶，结果呢？沃尔普这老小子，听了没一会就睡得和气泡锂犬似的。

Recently, the Iris Family has that young singer who sang "Song of Beauty," right? She's pretty popular. Well, I had the great idea of taking them to experience some culture, and what happens? That Wolpe fool falls asleep and is snoring like a bubble hound before she's even sung a few bars!
果然偏远小行星出来的…就是上不得台面…也是，要真是个有能耐的，也不至于退役之后来当什么皮套演员了。

Turns out he's just from some remote minor planet... Not suitable to be seen with in public... I guess that makes sense. If he actually had any skills, why would he retire to become a costumed performer?
果然偏远小行星出来的…就是上不得台面……
Turns out he's just from some remote minor planet... Not suitable to be seen with in public...
摊上这种「结拜兄弟」，可真是…唉！
Only I could end up with "sworn brothers" like that... Eugh!
瞧瞧他们，挤破了头都想往这梦里钻……
Look at them, they're all desperate to get into this dream...
哎呦，怎么竟然还有人相信「在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>70</unbreak>年，才能拿到永久居留权」这种事情啊，怪好笑的……
Ah, how are there people who still believe that "you have to work in Penacony for <unbreak>70</unbreak> years to receive the right to permanent residency" nonsense... It's ridiculous...
明明平时看着挺机灵一个人，怎么在这种事上半点也不灵光，啧啧。
Some of these people are actually very intelligent. But when it comes to things like this, all sense just completely deserts them, tsk tsk.
不过…倒是不能理解那些「逐梦客」是怎么想的，毕竟是匹诺康尼嘛…哈哈……
Although, I can understand how these Dreamchasers feel... This is Penacony after all... Haha
更何况，酒店的服务再好，又有谁不希望能在黄金的时刻有套自己的房子呢，对吧？
What's more, it doesn't matter how amazing the hotel service is here, who wouldn't wish to have their own home in Golden Hour, right?
哎呦，怎么竟然还有人相信「在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>70</unbreak>年，才能拿到永久居留权」这种事情啊，怪好笑的……
Ah, how are there people who still believe that "you have to work in Penacony for <unbreak>70</unbreak> years to receive the right to permanent residency" nonsense... It's ridiculous...
明明平时看着挺机灵一个人，怎么在这种事上半点也不灵光，啧啧。
Some of these people are actually very intelligent. But when it comes to things like this, all sense just completely deserts them, tsk tsk.
不过…倒是不能理解那些「逐梦客」是怎么想的，毕竟是匹诺康尼嘛…哈哈……
Although, I can understand how these Dreamchasers feel... This is Penacony after all... Haha
更何况，酒店的服务再好，又有谁不希望能在黄金的时刻有套自己的房子呢，对吧？
What's more, it doesn't matter how amazing the hotel service is here, who wouldn't wish to have their own home in Golden Hour, right?
欢迎来到美梦小镇，滴答！
亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!
Why are you acting so strange today?
…怪怪的——滴答？这都被你看出来了，我的朋友……
...Strange... Tick-tock? I see you noticed, my friend...
钟表小子中了石头老板的诡计，误饮了过期的汽水，滴答——
Clockie fell for Boss Stone's wicked scheme and accidentally drank an expired soda, tick-tock...
不过别担心，钟表小子很快就会重新振作起来的，滴答！
But don't worry, Clockie will pull himself together in no time, tick-tock!
滴答？美梦小镇是钟表小子的家，钟表小子当然会在这里啦！
Tick-tock? Dreamville is Clockie's home, of course Clockie would be here!
我的朋友，看来你还不太了解这个美丽的小镇吧？
My friend, I see you still do not fully understand our beautiful little town?
相信我，只要多转转，你总会爱上这里的，滴答！
Believe me, just take a little stroll around and you will fall in love, tick-tock!
Serve me? But no one else can see you...
…滴答？看、看不到？这…天呐，我的朋友，你是怎么知道的？
...Tick-tock? C—Can't see me? This... Oh dear, my friend, how did you know?
我还以为汽水先生的「隐身薄荷汽水」是我的独家机密呢！
I thought that Mr. Soda's "invisibility mint soda" was a special secret just for me!
善良的朋友啊，你是不会将钟表小子的秘密武器告诉邪恶的石头老板的，对吧？
My kind friend, you won't tell the evil Boss Stone about Clockie's secret weapon, will you?
很高兴遇见你，亲爱的朋友，滴答！
I'm happy to see you my dear friend, tick-tock!
愿你在美梦小镇度过一段愉快的时光，滴答——
I hope you have a wonderful time in Dreamville, tick-tock!
当然没问题啦，滴答！钟表小子对朋友知无不言，滴答！
Of course we can, tick-tock! Clockie would tell his friends anything, tick-tock!
美梦小镇，滴答！美丽又和平的小镇，滴答！我和我的朋友们在这里快快乐乐、无忧无虑地生活着，滴答！
Dreamville, tick-tock! A beautiful and peaceful village, tick-tock! My friends and I live happy and carefree lives together here, tick-tock!
然而——可恶的石头老板觊觎着建造小镇的石料，那个大坏蛋竟然自称是小镇主人的后代，想把大家都赶出去，滴答！
However... The evil Boss Stone covets the stones that we used to build our town. That villain even claims that he is the town master's successor and wants to force us all out of here, tick-tock!
不过请放心，朋友！我和我的伙伴们是不会让他的邪恶阴谋得逞的，滴答！
But don't you worry, my friend! My friends and I will never let his evil plan succeed, tick-tock!
我的朋友们都是非常有趣的家伙——
All of my friends are endlessly fascinating...
哈努兄弟，我最可靠的伙伴，我永远能放心地将背后交给他，滴答！
Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion. I can always relax with him watching my back, tick-tock!
汽水先生，小镇上最有「内涵」的家伙，他的汽水总能让我精神百倍，滴答！
Mr. Soda is the most "cultured" person in town. His sodas always get me brimming with energy, tick-tock!
猫头鹰老师和折纸小鸟们，他们建造了这座小镇，就像爱护自己的巢一样爱护着它，滴答！
Professor Owl and the origami birds... they created this town and they care for it like they would their own nests, tick-tock!
还有音符小姐、镜子公主、木头老爷、仓鼠球骑士…相信我，朋友！你也会像我一样喜欢他们的，滴答！
Then there is Miss Note, Mirror Princess, Old Man Wood, Hamster Ball Knight... Trust me, my friend! I know you'll love them all just like I do, tick-tock!
请记住，我的朋友！无论何时，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
Remember, my dear friend! Clockie is here to serve you anytime!
欢迎来到美梦小镇，滴答！
亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!
想要和我一起逛逛美梦小镇吗，滴答！
Do you want to walk around Dreamville with me, tick-tock!
一阵沉默后，眼前的「钟表小子」突然变为一个形容憔悴的男人。
After a moment of silence, the "Clockie" before you suddenly transforms into a haggard-looking man.
呼…真的非常抱歉，但我现在感觉不太好，可以让我稍微歇一会儿吗？
Phew... I'm so sorry. I don't feel very well. Could you give me a moment to rest?
Ahh... Thank you for your kindness...
You're just clocking off right now, huh?
抱歉…我知道这样非常不负责，但现在，我只想透一口气……
Sorry... I know this is extremely unprofessional but... I just need... to breathe for a moment...
疲惫的男人再次陷入沉默，表情匮乏，目光涣散。
The exhausted man falls silent again, his expression empty and his eyes unfocused.
或许是他太过难看的面色着实令人同情、也或许是他的颓丧感染了你，你竟突然想和他聊聊。
For some reason, you find yourself wanting to talk to him. Maybe his pitiable expression has inspired some kind of sympathy in you, or maybe his depression is infectious.
于是你走近了些，轻轻拍了拍他垮塌的肩膀。
So, you approach him and gently pat his slumped shoulders.
啊？哦，抱、抱歉，我没注意到…你是想和卡通角色互动吗，那边还有其他演员……
Huh? Oh, s—sorry, I didn't notice you... Did you want to interact with one of the characters? There are more actors over there...
哈哈…你想听我抱怨吗？唉…既然你到现在还没走，我就当你想听啦。
Haha... Do you want to hear me whinge? Ah... Since you're still here, I'll take that as a yes.
我这人，怎么说呢…嗨，我知道他们都觉得我傻…毕竟大概没谁都到这把年纪，还以为人能靠梦想活着了吧。
A man like me, well... Ah, how do I put this? I know they all think I'm stupid... I mean, no one else at my age still thinks that people can rely on their dreams to make a living, right?
…当初…退役之后，我没按他们说的，靠过去的名声接广告赚流量，而是为了最喜欢的钟表小子，跑来匹诺康尼当皮套演员。

At first... After I retired, I didn't listen to them and didn't use my fame to live off of advertising deals. Instead, I came running straight to Penacony to be a costumed performer for my favorite Clockie.
结果这份工作根本就不是我想象中的样子…更糟糕的是，酒店的房费消耗了我大半身家，而如今的身体状况又不允许我重返竞技赛场……
In the end, this job was nothing like I imagined... What's worse, the hotel fees have used up the majority of my savings, and now my body is in no state to get back into the competitive arena...
要问「后悔吗」——我自己也不知道，哈哈。我只知道如今的我就像是失去了汽水先生的钟表小子，再提不起半分精神、点不燃一星热情……
If you ask me "Do you regret it?" ...Even I'm not sure, haha. All I know is that, right now, I feel like Clockie without Mr. Soda. I can't get my spirits up, or ignite even a spark of enthusiasm...
哎呀，自顾自说了这么多，你都听烦了吧。谢谢你听我抱怨，我现在感觉…好多了。
Ah, I've ranted for so long, you must be tired of listening to all this. Thank you for listening to my complaints. I actually feel... a lot better now.
短暂的沉默之后，「钟表小子」又出现在你的面前。
After a brief silence, Clockie appears before your eyes once more.
亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!
星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...
亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴……
My dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you, tick...
抱歉，我想稍微休息一会，就一会……
Sorry, I just need to take a quick rest, just a quick one...
美梦小镇是个美丽又和平…个鬼啊！
Dreamville really is a beautiful and peaceful... Ah, who am I kidding!
眼前的「钟表小子」哼哧哼哧喘着粗气，扁圆表盘与细瘦双腿紧绷成两点半钟的折角，沉重的「时针」在前后一刻度区间内来回晃动着。

The Clockie before your eyes pants and breathes heavily. The angle of their thin, folded legs against the circular clock face shows half-past two, as the heavy hour hand sways back and forth within a quarter-hour interval.
那群——狗东西！自己什么活也不干，一天到晚就知道对着别人指手画脚！
Those... scum! They never do any work themselves. All they know how to do is give orders!
动不动就「自愿加班」、动不动就「扣半年绩效」…我们每天从早干到晚，到手那点苜蓿币扣完酒店房费连块钟表披萨都买不起！

Every other day it's "voluntary overtime" or "we're cutting the half-year performance bonus"... We're here daily from dawn until dusk and the meager Alfalfa credits they pay us aren't even enough for a slice of Clockie Pizza after I've paid my hotel fees!
我们是喜欢钟表小子、是可以为爱发电，但这不意味着我们就甘愿被压榨！就连石头老板做坏事之前都知道找个「体面的理由」呢！
We all love Clockie, but just because we're passionate about it doesn't mean that we're okay with being exploited! Even Boss Stone knows you can't just be evil without a solid reason!
可恶啊…动画…动画不应该是给人带来快乐的东西吗？
Dagnabbit... Aren't... Aren't cartoons supposed to bring people joy?
那为什么来到了「美梦小镇」之后，我反而再也快乐不起来了呢……
Then why is it that ever since I came to Dreamville, I've lost all my happiness?
他们永远是我最好的朋友，滴答！
They will always be my best friends, tick-tock!
钟表小子为你服务，滴答！你想听我介绍一下我的朋友们吗，滴答！
Clockie is here to serve you, tick-tock! Would you like to hear me introduce my friends, tick-tock?
哈努兄弟，最可靠的老大哥，滴答！他不仅带我和汽水先生去钟表餐厅吃大餐，还邀请我们去大剧院听音乐会，滴答！
Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion, tick-tock! Not only did he take me and Mr. Soda to Clock Diner for a feast, he even invited us to the Grand Theater for a recital, tick-tock!
虽然我听不懂那么高雅的东西，还半路睡着了，哈哈！但我真的非常高兴，滴答！
Although, I don't really understand such elegant things and I fell asleep halfway through, haha! But, I was really happy, tick-tock!
汽水先生，我的好朋友，滴答！他又勤劳又机灵，人也特别善良，每次有卖不完的快餐都会留给我，还不要我的钱，滴答！
Mr. Soda is my good friend, tick-tock! He is hard-working, intelligent, and really kind. Whenever he has leftovers, he leaves them for me and doesn't ask me for money, tick-tock!
能和他们成为兄弟真是太好了，滴答！
I'm so happy I became brothers with them, tick-tock!
我还有很多其他好朋友，他们都是很好的人…有机会我再向你好好介绍他们吧？
I have lots of other good friends, too! They are all wonderful people... I'll introduce you to them all when I get an opportunity, okay?
喏，这是汽水先生给我的苏乐达，也分你一瓶吧，滴答！
Oh, Mr. Soda gave me these SoulGlad, I'll share one with you, too, tick-tock!
钟表小子为你服务，滴答！你想听我介绍一下我的朋友们吗，滴答！
Clockie is here to serve you, tick-tock! Would you like to hear me introduce my friends, tick-tock?
哈努兄弟，最可靠的老大哥，滴答！他不仅带我和汽水先生去钟表餐厅吃大餐，还邀请我们去大剧院听音乐会，滴答！
Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion, tick-tock! Not only did he take me and Mr. Soda to Clock Diner for a feast, he even invited us to the Grand Theater for a recital, tick-tock!
虽然我听不懂那么高雅的东西，还半路睡着了，哈哈！但我真的非常高兴，滴答！
Although, I don't really understand such elegant things and I fell asleep halfway through, haha! But, I was really happy, tick-tock!
汽水先生，我的好朋友，滴答！他又勤劳又机灵，人也特别善良，每次有卖不完的快餐都会留给我，还不要我的钱，滴答！
Mr. Soda is my good friend, tick-tock! He is hard-working, intelligent, and really kind. Whenever he has leftovers, he leaves them for me and doesn't ask me for money, tick-tock!
能和他们成为兄弟真是太好了，滴答！
I'm so happy I became brothers with them, tick-tock!
我还有很多其他好朋友，他们都是很好的人…有机会我再向你好好介绍他们吧？
I have lots of other good friends, too! They are all wonderful people... I'll introduce you to them all when I get an opportunity, okay?
故乡是个很神奇的地方。你出门的时间越长，逃得越远，反而在情感上才离它更近。
A home is a mysterious thing. The longer you leave it and the farther you roam, the closer you feel to it.
起初，故乡是个很具体的词，一幢房子，也可以是一颗星球。随着时间流逝，它会变得越来越模糊，几个你还叫得出名字的人，小时候没吃到的那颗糖…都可以是故乡。

At first, home is a word with a very clear meaning. It could be a house, or it could be a planet. But, as time goes on, the meaning becomes more and more blurred. It could be those friends whose names you still remember, or that sweet you never managed to have as a child... They can all be your home.
当你尝试用些固定的形容去描述它的时候，你就开始在失去它了。
It's precisely when you try to use a fixed definition to describe a home that you begin to lose it.
...So, how do you feel now about home?
…我？哈哈，我已经在厌恶它了，因为我回到了这里。
...Me? Haha, I already hate my home... because now I'm back here.
你是来匹诺康尼游玩的宾客？待的时间不短了吧，告诉我，你喜欢这个地方吗？
You're a visitor to Penacony, aren't you? You've been here for some time. Tell me, do you like Penacony?
是么？不管好与坏，这里都是我没法离开的地方。
Really? Well, love it or hate it, I cannot leave this place.
我对钟表小子毫无感觉，但在星际漂泊的漫长旅程中，我依旧会选择重看这部动画来对抗无止境的空虚与孤独，那种温暖的熟悉感…抵得过任何实际的陪伴。

I have no feelings towards Clockie, but throughout my long days of interstellar travel, I always chose to rewatch that cartoon to stave off the infinite emptiness and loneliness. That warm sense of familiarity... It's as good as any actual companionship.
你是匹诺康尼本地人么？
是啊。我对这里熟悉得不能再熟悉了，就连衣服都浸透了苏乐达的香味，就连影城展示的所有角色，我都能细致说出它们每个人的来历和故事。

I am. I could not be any more familiar with Penacony. Even my clothes are saturated with the smell of SoulGlad. Show me any character on the theme park display and I can tell you all of their backgrounds and stories in detail.
匹诺康尼是个好地方，尤其对你们这些宾客而言，热闹，好玩，无休无止，可以肆意放纵直到天亮，不用担心任何现实的烦扰。
Penacony is a good place, especially for you guests. It's lively, fun, and never stops. You can party until the break of dawn without having to worry about any real-life problems.
但对我来说并非如此，因为它是我的故乡。
But that is not the case for me, because this is my home.
说得有点多了。祝你在影城玩得开心，陌生人。
I have talked a bit too much. I hope you have a wonderful time in the theme park, stranger.
故乡是个很神奇的地方。你出门的时间越长，逃得越远，反而在情感上才离它更近。
A home is a mysterious thing. The longer you leave it and the farther you roam, the closer you feel to it.
无论是否喜欢匹诺康尼，这里都是我无法离开的地方……
Whether you like Penacony or not, this is a place that I just can't leave.
哈，才刚回来不久，我就已经开始在厌恶它了。
Ha, I've just gotten back, and I've already started to hate it.
我讨厌故乡，因为它知道所有你那些不愿再回想起的往事。
I hate coming home. It knows all of those things that you don't want to remember.
果然啊，回到了熟悉的地方，过去那些悲伤的难堪的回忆就全部涌了上来。
It always happens, you get back to a familiar place and all of those sad and painful memories come flooding back.
…我有时会想，为什么我的父母偏偏是家族成员？为什么我从小就得学习「谐乐颂」，背诵那些其实根本就没人在乎的词句，只为了讨所谓的大人物开心？

...I sometimes think, why did my parents have to be members of The Family? Why did I have to study the "Odes of Harmony" from such a young age? Memorizing and reciting all those words that no one cares about just to please these so-called "important figures"?
又为什么…我明明背得那么出色，最后还是没能挽救我的家庭呢？
And why... Even though I learned them so well, was I not able to save my family?
看着原本骄傲的父亲，沦落到必须看人脸色行事的地步，我实在无法忍受这种生活的落差，赌气离开了匹诺康尼，再也没和任何人联系过。
Seeing my once-proud father being reduced to being subservient to others, I could no longer deal with our sudden fall from grace. So, I left Penacony selfishly and never contacted anyone again.
哈…现在我也分不清楚了——我没法忍受的究竟是家庭的巨变，还是当时那个没用的自己？
Ah... Now, I can't quite tell... Was it the changes in my family that I could not stand, or the fact that I was so powerless?
果然啊，回到了熟悉的地方，过去那些悲伤的难堪的回忆就全部涌了上来。
It always happens, you get back to a familiar place and all of those sad and painful memories come flooding back.
…我有时会想，为什么我的父母偏偏是家族成员？为什么我从小就得学习「谐乐颂」，背诵那些其实根本就没人在乎的词句，只为了讨所谓的大人物开心？

...I sometimes think, why did my parents have to be members of The Family? Why did I have to study the "Odes of Harmony" from such a young age? Memorizing and reciting all those words that no one cares about just to please these so-called "important figures"?
又为什么…我明明背得那么出色，最后还是没能挽救我的家庭呢？
And why... Even though I learned them so well, was I not able to save my family?
看着原本骄傲的父亲，沦落到必须看人脸色行事的地步，我实在无法忍受这种生活的落差，赌气离开了匹诺康尼，再也没和任何人联系过。
Seeing my once-proud father being reduced to being subservient to others, I could no longer deal with our sudden fall from grace. So, I left Penacony selfishly and never contacted anyone again.
哈…现在我也分不清楚了——我没法忍受的究竟是家庭的巨变，还是当时那个没用的自己？
Ah... Now, I can't quite tell... Was it the changes in my family that I could not stand, or the fact that I was so powerless?
我从来不认为自己很聪明，但比我蠢的人实在太多了。
I have never thought that I was that intelligent, but there are far too many people who are more foolish than I am.
你肯定没想过吧，欺骗这个世界有多么容易。
I'm sure you've never thought how easy it would be to fool this world, have you?
信息技术越是发达，可操作的空间就越大。想完美假扮成另一个人非常困难，但合成对方的声音、仿造电子证明、盗取生物数据都极为简单。

As information technology grows more developed, the extent that we can manipulate the world grows. Perfectly imitating someone else is difficult, but synthesizing their voice, forging their electronic certificates, and stealing their biological data is extremely easy.
稍微动一点点心思，就能轻易骗过星际和平公司最强大的安保系统。哪怕你是无家可归的流浪汉，只要身份信息检测通过，同样可以坐进他们的贵宾室！

With just a small amount of effort, you can easily fool the Interastral Peace Corporation's most powerful security systems. Even a homeless person can get into the IPC's VIP lounge as long as they pass the ID verification!
离家出走的天环族，和某个年迈的皮皮西富商…在数据层面可以是同一个人！普通人都能看出来的差别，系统指标却分辨不出，实在是太可笑了。

A Halovian who ran away from home and an old, wealthy Pepeshi merchant... They could be exactly the same person in terms of data! The fact that system parameters cannot identify differences that any regular person could visually spot is truly laughable.
别用这种看待罪犯的眼神盯着我…要怪，就只能怪他们雇的设计师太蠢，留下这么明显的漏洞，不被人钻空子才奇怪呢！
Don't look at me like I'm a criminal... If you want to blame someone, blame the foolish designers they hired! It would be strange if people didn't exploit such obvious loopholes!
公司想抓到我可没那么轻松！
If the IPC wants to catch me, it won't be that simple!
我打电话给我爸那个老顽固，说打算回匹诺康尼度个长假，结果…结果他居然通知了猎犬家系来酒店抓我！他就是贪图公司给的那笔悬赏金！

I called my stubborn old man and told him I'd be taking a long vacation back in Penacony. You know what happened...? He informed the Bloodhound Family and told them to come and capture me at the hotel! He wants the bounty that the IPC put out on me!
是啊，我也是犯傻了。我就不该在那个失眠的深夜，把自己做过的事都告诉他。
You're right. I was being dumb. During that insomniac night, I shouldn't have told him everything I've done.
可我能怎么办…除他以外，我已经没有亲人了。除了匹诺康尼，我也没有能够回去的地方。这里是我最后的牵挂。
But what am I supposed to do...? I have no family left besides him. I have nowhere to return to except Penacony, either. This is the only place I have ties to.
但我不会束手就擒。既然能从公司的围捕中逃走这么多次，就不怕再多一次！
But I'm not just going to hand myself in! I've managed to escape the IPC's hunts so many times, I can do it again!
嘿，这位客人，欢迎光临钟表餐厅克劳克影视乐园分厅。请问您是想来点——
Hey, dear guest! Welcome to the Clock Diner in Clock Studios Theme Park! May I ask what I can get you—
钟表披萨蛋糕卷，百层圣代柠檬挞；\n切片蛋糕飞碟堡，苜蓿色拉苏乐达？
We have Clockie Pizza, Cake Rolls, Hundred-Layered Sundaes, and Lemon Tarts\nSliced Cakes, Floatdisc Burgers, Alfalfa Salad, or SoulGlad?
软糖酸梦彩梦好，圣代百层薯条佳；\n噼咔汽水兑糖浆，脆筒最配爆米花！
Sour Dreams and Dreamlight are good, sundaes with fries are the best.\nPika soda and syrup or crispy cones and popcorn beat all the rest!
哈哈，雕虫小技而已，您谬赞了。
Haha, it's just a little trick I do, it's not that big a deal.
那么，您准备来点什么呢？
So, what can I get you?
Are you up for a chat?
嗯？当然可以，我最喜欢和人聊天啦。不过…客人不如先买瓶苏乐达，咱们边喝边聊，免得干了嗓子？
Hm? Of course! I love talking to people. Although... How about buying a SoulGlad first and we can drink as we chat, we don't want you getting thirsty!
好啊，给我瓶经典苏乐达。
Alright, a bottle of Classic SoulGlad.
嘿呀，我就喜欢您这样的客人。来，经典苏乐达一瓶，您拿好！
Hey! You're the best kind of customer! Here, one Classic SoulGlad.
You don't get thirsty in a dream.
那您饿了吗？要不来一份薯条圣代，垫垫肚子？
Then, are you hungry? How about a Potato Fries Sundae to fill your belly?
好嘞，薯条圣代一份，您慢慢吃！
Okay, one Potato Fries Sundae, bon appétit!
You don't get hungry in dreams, either.
零食呢？我向您倾情推荐美梦脆筒，就像广告上说的——「您能够品尝到美梦的味道」！
Then what about a snack? I would recommend the Dreamy Cone! You know, the ad says: "Taste the flavor of your dreams!"
既然你这么努力推销，行吧…
As you're so intent on selling me something, go on then...
哈哈，客人您可真体贴！相信我，您会喜欢这支「美梦」的！
Haha, you're so thoughtful! Believe me, you will enjoy this "beautiful dream"!
I don't want to eat anything...
嗨，您早说嘛，我也省得耽误您时间…哎呦！
Hey, then why didn't you say! I wouldn't have wasted your time like this otherwise!
实在是不好意思，我突然想起有点事，下次再陪您聊天啊！
My apologies, but I just remembered something that I have to do, I'll chat with you next time, okay?
来，客人想聊什么？您问，我必定知无不言！
What would you like to talk about, dear customer? Ask me anything and I'll tell you all I know!
Are you up for a chat?
嗯？客人想聊什么？您问，我必定知无不言！
Hm? What would you like to talk about, dear customer? Ask me anything and I'll tell you everything I know!
为我介绍一下影视乐园吧？
What can you tell me about the theme park?
这个嘛…「克劳克影视乐园」归属于「克劳克影业」，是关于钟表小子、哈努兄弟、仓鼠球骑士等卡通角色的乐园。
I see... Clock Studios Theme Park belongs to Clock Studios, it is a theme park all about cartoon characters like Clockie, Brother Hanu, and Hamster Ball Knight.
您可以在此处与扮演它们的皮套演员互动，并游玩与各个卡通形象相关的游艺项目。
You can interact with costumed performers who are dressed as cartoon characters and enjoy all sorts of entertainment based on these characters.
不过这些信息在梦境护照上就能查到，您想听点不一样的吗？
But, you can find all of this information on the Dreamscape Pass, do you want to hear about something else?
Go on, what are you trying to sell me this time...
哈哈，客人您真是上道。要来份「酸梦」软糖吗？便宜实惠、酸爽可口，保证您喜欢！
Haha, you know your stuff, dear customer. How about some "Sour Dreams" Soft Candy? They're great value for money, sour and refreshing, I guarantee you'll love them!
给您讲个好玩的吧——我有个朋友，原本是个星际驰名的运动健将，光是到手的金牌就能摆满一面墙。
I'll tell you something interesting... I have a friend who was once a celebrated athlete throughout the galaxy, he could cover a whole wall with the gold medals he's won.
但您猜怎么着，他退役之后竟然不远万里跑来这里当了皮套演员！您知道他有多喜欢钟表小子吗？这系列每一集动画他都看过，厉害吧！

But, guess what? After he retired, he immediately came running here from far away to start work as a costumed performer! Do you know how much he loves Clockie? He's seen every single episode — Isn't that amazing?
您回头在这边游玩的时候可以稍微留意些，说不定正巧就能遇见他呢。
You can keep an eye out the next time you're here to have fun — you might just run into him.
Forget it, I don't want to hear it.
诶呀，真可惜…不过没关系，如果客人您什么时候想听了，尽管来找我就好。
Oh my, that's a shame... But that's okay! If you want to hear what I have to say sometime, just come and find me.
Why not tell me about yourself?
嗨，我有什么可聊的。我就普普通通一逐梦客，放在人群里挑都挑不出来。
Hey, there's nothing much to say about me. I'm just a plain old Dreamchaser... You couldn't pick me out of a crowd!
倒是您，看着就器宇不凡，您是做哪行的啊？
But you, one look at you and I know you're someone special. What do you do?
放在宇宙里挑都挑不出来。
You couldn't pick me out of the universe.
哎呦，我就说吧，您果然是个人物。看在咱这交情上，您以后可别忘了多多照顾我的生意啊！
Oh my, I knew it! You are a big shot! As we're friends now, don't forget to come and help me out with business, okay?
没问题，您快去忙您的吧。
Alright, I'll let you get back to your business.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
…诶呦，没想到竟能得您厚爱，可真是我的荣幸。不过嘛，我两个哥哥可能不太喜欢别人对我这么做。
...Oh my, I did not expect you to be so kind. This is truly an honor. Although, my two brothers don't really like people treating me this way...
他们啊，一个是有权有势的本地人，一个是身强体壮的运动健将，我实在不想您因为这点小事和他们起冲突……
As for them, one is a powerful local figure, the other a strong athlete. I really don't want you to conflict with them over such a trivial matter...
所以您看，要不还是算了吧？
So, why don't we just forget it?
I'd like to buy some food.
没问题，您准备来点什么呢？
No problem, what can I get you?
好嘞，多谢惠顾，下次再来啊！
Alright, thank you for your patronage, I hope to see you again soon!
客人您又来啦，欢迎欢迎！今天想要吃点什么、喝点什么？
Dear customer, you're back! Welcome, welcome! What can I get you today? Something to eat? To drink?
让我给您先报个菜单！欢迎光临钟表餐厅克劳克影视乐园分厅。请问您是想来点——
Let me get you a menu! Welcome to the Clock Diner in Clock Studios Theme Park! May I ask what I can get you—
钟表披萨蛋糕卷，百层圣代柠檬挞；\n切片蛋糕飞碟堡，苜蓿色拉苏乐达？
We have Clockie Pizza, Cake Rolls, Hundred-Layered Sundaes, and Lemon Tarts\nSliced Cakes, Floatdisc Burgers, Alfalfa Salad, or SoulGlad?
软糖酸梦彩梦好，圣代百层薯条佳；\n噼咔汽水兑糖浆，脆筒最配爆米花！
Sour Dreams and Dreamlight are good, sundaes with fries are the best.\nPika soda and syrup or crispy cones and popcorn beat all the rest!
Do you really think I'm stupid?
我难道真的不知道什么「只要在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>30</unbreak>年，就可以拿到永久居留权」这种瞎话是他们唬我玩的吗？
You think I don't know that all this "as long as you work in Penacony for <unbreak>30</unbreak> years you can get a permanent residency" stuff is all lies?
没错，我是天天关心家族的人才引进政策，天天算那些乱七八糟的没用积分…但人生总得有点奔头吧？
That's right, I keep my eye on The Family's talent acquisition policies and count those useless, ridiculous credits every day... But people need ambition, right?
既然不能像他们那样出生在赛道终点，那就怎么也得想办法比身边的人跑得更快点……
As there's no way for me to be born at the finish line like they were, I just have to find a way to run faster than everyone else around me...
人总不能悲惨到连给自己画饼的资格都没有吧？
People can't allow their lives to become so tragic that they even lose their right to dream, can they?
知道我最讨厌什么吗？我最讨厌的就是那些自命不凡的本地人！
Do you know what I hate the most? I hate those arrogant, self-important natives more than anything!
要说这人和人啊，还真就不一样！有的人整天奔波劳碌，才勉强交得起酒店房费；有的人生来屁股下面就摆满了金砖，能在黄金的时刻里肆意挥霍……

People really just aren't born the same! Some people have to work themselves into the ground all day just to be able to scrape hotel fees, some are born with a silver spoon in their mouths and get to spend all their time whiling their lives away in Golden Hour...
要说勤勤恳恳工作有什么用呢？你再怎么累死累活，能比得了人家含金汤匙出生的大少爷吗？
What use is there to working hard? It doesn't matter how hard you push yourself, you'll never compare to that rich kid who was born with everything, will you?
我们辛辛苦苦上百个系统时，甚至挣不来人家一顿饭钱，你说可笑不可笑？
We work ourselves to death for a hundred system hours and can't even buy ourselves a good meal. Don't you think that's ridiculous?
施舍似的带我们去吃喝玩乐，满口什么兄弟情谊…哼，也就那个愣头青看不出来，人那是把咱这群打工仔当宠物遛呢！

He takes us out to eat, drink, and be merry like it's some kind of charitable act, chatting about "the bonds of brotherhood..." Pfft! Even if that smooth-brained dumbo couldn't tell, he was treating us workers like pets!
最近可真是轻松了不少啊……
Things have been a lot more relaxed recently...
多亏了傻大个儿，之前那些找茬的、蹭吃蹭喝的，最近可是消停得很啊。
Thanks to that burly oaf, there's been far fewer people coming in and picking fights for free food and discounts.
哎呦，怎么会有这么缺心眼的家伙啊——随便施舍点小恩小惠就对你感恩戴德，真好打发。
Ah, how could someone be so slow! Give him a little bit of charity and he's kissing your feet! He's so easy to please.
给几顿剩饭，什么脏活累活都上赶着帮你做了…真是的，每次见了他，我心情都会变好不止一星半点——
Give him some leftovers and he'll come running to take care of your dirty work and chores... Seriously, every time I see him, I feel a lot better about myself.
什么运动健将，金牌选手…现在还不是混得比我还惨，任我差遣？哈哈哈！
He was an athlete? A gold-medalist...? Now he's in even more dire straits than I am and taking orders from me? Hahaha!
还想和我聊聊么？就算手边没有特别调制的饮料，随便唠上两句也是好的。
What do you want to talk about? I'm willing to open up to you, even if I don't have a custom drink in my hand.
I want to know more about you.
这个吧台就是最好的聊天场所，你想知道些什么呢？
This lounge is the perfect place for a chat. What do you want to know?
就知道你会问这个。当时情况紧急，没来得及详细说明，我也很少对人谈起。
I knew that was where you were going. The situation was critical back then, and I didn't have time to explain properly. I don't often talk to people about this, either.
...It all happened a long time ago.
我的父母是匹诺康尼最常见的那种家族成员，年轻、冲动、自负而野心勃勃，相信梦境里到处都是财富，竭尽所能想爬到更高的位置。

My parents were the kind of Family members you'd see all the time. Young, impulsive, conceited, and ambitious to a fault. They believed that the Dreamscape was full of wealth and would give anything to claw themselves up to a higher position.
很显然，他们失败了。就在破产前的那天，他们悄悄离开了这颗星球，将刚出生不久的我留在入梦池中。鸢尾花家系的侍者发现了我，并交给了现任家主——梅芙恩小姐。

Clearly, they failed. Just before the day they went bankrupt, they secretly left the planet and placed me, a newborn baby, in the Dreampool. A servant of the Iris Family found me and handed me over to the current family head - Ms. Maeven.
没有。这些事都是在我成年后，动用家族关系才调查到的。
No. I only discovered this once I was older using Family connections.
呵…为什么要怨恨没有任何印象的两个人呢？
Hmm... Why would I hate two people that I have no recollection of?
刚才和你说的这些事，也都是在我成年后，动用家族关系才调查到的。
Everything I just told you... I only managed to discover once I was older using Family connections.
他们没有给我留下任何可以追踪的线索，我也没专门去找过他们。
They didn't leave me any clues to find them, and I have never gone in search of them.
就这样，我加入了鸢尾花家系，往后的经历就是另一个故事了。
Just like that, I became a part of the Iris Family, what happened after that is a whole other story.
梅芙恩——就是鸢尾花家系的家主，是个沉醉于舞台的人，她相信那种热烈的氛围能消解人与人之间的所有隔阂。在捡到我后，她将我作为未来的演艺明星而着重培养。

Maeven, the Iris Family Head, is obsessed with the stage. She believes that a passionate atmosphere can break down all barriers between people. So, after she took me in, she focused on raising me as a future acting superstar.
我没有辜负她的期待，在那个领域取得了不错的成绩。艾米绮就是在那时候认识的，她是我的后辈，同样是备受期待的孩子，在演出方面拥有非凡的天赋。

I did not disappoint her and managed to achieve a lot of success in this field. I met Amiky back then, too. She was my junior and also a child who shouldered a lot of expectations due to her outstanding acting talents.
但很快我就厌倦了这种生活。鲜花和掌声只会给我带来深深的疲惫感，舞台上的生活太过虚幻，那不是真正的我。
However, I quickly grew tired of this life. The flowers and applause only gave me a deep sense of fatigue. Living a life on the stage is all too illusory, and that's not the real me.
可能吧，我也说不清楚。谁知道呢？但我喜欢现在的生活。
Maybe, I'm not even sure myself. Who knows? But I like the life I have now.
我们每个人都在寻找着什么。
We are all searching for something.
我们也都同时失去了什么——哈哈哈，这种句子常挂在嘴边可没什么意思。
Then we are all losing something else at the same time. Hahaha, these quips are no fun to be constantly mentioning.
后来，在和梅芙恩大吵一架后，我离开了鸢尾花家系，独自开了这间酒吧。
After that, I had a huge argument with Maeven and left the Iris Family. Then, I came and opened this lounge by myself.
再往后的事，你也清楚了。作为调饮师的生活很单调，但也很丰富，值得反复回味。
And you know the rest from there. Life as a drinksmith is monotonous but rich. It is worth savoring.
我没有直接说出来，就是担心会影响怪物们的情绪。
I never said it outright because I was worried about upsetting the monsters.
但没想到，猎犬家系来得比预想得要快，更没料到的是，你们会去「黄金的时刻」找我，还恰好听到了我和艾米绮的对话。生活真是充满了意外。

But, I never expected that the Bloodhound Family would have arrived so quickly. Even more unexpected was the fact that you happened to overhear me and Amiky talking when you came to Golden Hour to search for me. Life really is full of surprises, isn't it?
你打算回到鸢尾花家系吗？
Do you plan on returning to the Iris Family?
不打算，但艾米绮说得没错，仅凭理想没法保住这家酒吧。要是没有我和梅芙恩的这层关系，恐怕怪物们早就被清理掉了。
I don't. But Amiky was right, I cannot save this lounge with ideals alone. If it weren't for my relationship with Maeven, I fear that the monsters would have all been cleared out long ago.
和家族周旋是个麻烦事，后面还得再想想办法。
Dealing with The Family is always troublesome, I'll need to think more about this in the future.
艾米绮那边要怎么交代呢？
How do you deal with Amiky?
别看艾米绮蛮横不讲理的样子，其实心软得很，稍微哄几句就消气了。
Amiky isn't the rude and unreasonable girl that you think. She's actually very gentle, she just needs a few words of comfort and she calms down.
<color=#dbc291ff>调饮…就是对话的过程。</color>我现在算是越来越体会到这点了。
<color=#dbc291ff>Mixing drinks... is like the art of conversation.</color> I feel like I'm coming to understand this more and more.
沟通是信任的基础，要是将话藏在心里不说，被误会了也没法怪别人，对吧？
Communication is the foundation of trust. If you keep things in your heart and don't say them out loud, then you cannot blame other people when they misunderstand you, can you?
多亏你的帮助，我们暂时保住了「惊梦酒吧」，但这样终究不是长久之计。
Thanks to you, we managed to hold onto the Dreamjolt Hostelry, but this is not a long-term fix.
在未来…我希望能让更多人接纳它们，让怪物们能在外面的社会里生活。梦境酒店实在太过狭隘，它们都很想见识更大的世界。
In the future... I hope more people will learn to accept monsters and allow them to enter society. The hotel in the dreamscape is just too small, they long to see the big, wide world.
哈哈哈，现在说这些还是有点太理想了。慢慢来，走一步看一步吧。
Haha, maybe it's a little too idealistic to be saying things like that for now. We'll take it slowly, step by step.
反正，我们的时间还很长。
We have plenty of time ahead of us, after all.
I don't have any other questions.
I'm just stopping by to say hi.
没事情的话，就在酒吧里随便逛逛呗。记得多跟怪物们聊聊，它们都可想你了。
If you're not busy, why not take a stroll around the lounge? Make sure you talk with the monsters, too! They've missed you so much!
造型古典的艺术钟，出现在餐桌上也毫无违和感。
The classically-designed art clock looks completely out of place on the dinner table.
这块钟表摆放得十分端正，似乎承载着某种仪式性作用。
This clock is positioned extremely precisely and seems to serve some kind of ritualistic function.
不要试图用手去碰它，这玩意看起来就很贵。
Don't touch it. Just one look at it tells you that this is expensive.
时钟的指针丝毫不动。可能这就是「愿时光永驻此刻」的真正意涵。
The clock's hands are motionless. Perhaps this is the true meaning of "may this moment last forever."
这座雕像似乎被某种巨大的外力推倒在地，但依旧完好无损。
This statue seems to have been tipped over by some great force, but it remains undamaged.
象征家族权威的雕像，不知因何被推倒、拦住了你前进的路。
A statue that symbolizes the great authority of The Family has been knocked over, blocking your path ahead.
你不知道这是怎么回事，反正不是你干的。
You don't know what this is about, but you know it wasn't you that did it.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着里奥撒缪斯，橡木家系的第一位家主。传说他在一位忆者的指引下拔出了紧紧嵌在梦泡中的神剑，深孚众望，橡木家系也由此成为匹诺康尼的核心势力。

This statue symbolizes Riothamus, first Family Head of the Oak Family. Legend says that under the guidance of a Memokeeper, he was able to remove the divine sword that was stuck fast inside a dream bubble. This won him great renown with the people and allowed the Oak Family to become a central power in Penacony.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着贝尔蒂埃，猎犬家系的第一位家主。传说他是里奥撒缪斯的左膀右臂，忠贞不二，枪术高超。当橡木家主遭到背叛濒死时，是他陪伴这位家主到最后一刻。

This statue symbolizes Bediver, first Family Head of the Bloodhound Family. Legend states that he was Riothamus' right-hand man - faithful to the end and skilled in battle. When the Oak Family Head was betrayed and left to die, it was he that accompanied him in his final moments.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着坦特里斯，鸢尾花家系的第一位家主。传说他的武艺是六大家系中最顶尖的，却也多愁善感。他与公司员工坠入爱河，而这段恋情最终招来了血腥的内战。

This statue symbolizes Tantris, first Family Head of the Iris Family. Legend states that though his martial prowess exceeded that of all of the other Families, he was a kind and gentle man. He fell deeply in love with an IPC employee. This romance eventually led to a bloody civil war.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着果戈尔凡，苜蓿草家系的第一位家主。有关他的记载不多，人们只知道他在对公司的战争中是一名变节的狱卒，始终掌管着公司在匹诺康尼的金库。

This statue symbolizes Gogrefan, first Family Head of the Alfalfa Family. Little is known about him, except that he was a prison guard that defected during the war against the IPC and that he retained control of the IPC treasury in Penacony.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着凯尔康尼，隐夜鸫家系的第一位家主。他主持了对边陲监狱的生活化改造，也是梦境拓荒运动的主负责人。他缔造了现今意义上的「梦想之地」匹诺康尼。

This statue symbolizes Celcony, first Family Head of the Nightingale Family. He took charge of the enlivening transformation of the frontier prisons and was the main person in charge of the Dreamscape pioneering movement. He created the "land of the dreams," Penacony, as it exists today.
在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.
这尊雕像象征着一位神秘人物——潜伏于五大家系背后的影子家系家主——卡拉赫爵士。他是一位「神秘」的命途行者，暗中控制着五大家系和匹诺康尼大小事务。

This statue symbolizes a mysterious figure - Head of the Shadow Family that lurks behind the Five Lineages - Sir Callagh. He is a Pathstrider of Enigmata, controlling the Five Lineages from the shadows, along with all political affairs of Penacony.
有关六尊隐夜鸫雕像的故事就到此为止了。看得开心吗？如果开心，那么恭喜你——
We shall leave the story of the Nightingale Statue for now. Did you enjoy those stories? If you did, then congratulations...
刚才你所看到的一切都是瞎掰的，或者说，虚构的历史。匹诺康尼历史上最多曾有过七大家系，由于种种变故形成了如今的五大家系，但根本不存在所谓的「影子家系」。

Everything you read just now was nonsense. Or, should I say, a fabricated history. In Penacony's history, the maximum number of Families that have existed is seven, and various changes over time formed the five lineages that we have today. There is no such thing as a "Shadow Family."
各大家系的首位家主也全都另有其人，且大多是些名不见经传的小角色，例如：橡木家系的马格诺只是个阴险狡诈的政治犯，鸢尾花的阿斯娜则是蒙冤入狱的宇宙歌者……

The first Family Heads of each lineage were also different people, the majority of them being unknown characters that feature in no such legends. For example: The Head of the Oak Family, Magnoy, was nothing more than a corrupt politician. Asna of the Iris Family was a universal singer who was wrongly imprisoned...
苜蓿草的拉契卡是公司传统项目部的贪污犯，隐夜鸫的图尔度是个让公司蒙受巨额损失的疯人学者——你觉得不够史诗？那就对了，因为历史本就是由无数小人物编织而成的。

Lakkika of the Alfalfa Family was an embezzler working in the IPC Traditional Project Department and Tordu of the Nightingale Family was an insane scholar that caused the IPC crushing financial losses... Are those stories not epic enough for you? Good, because history is simply created through the actions of countless, unremarkable people.
还有，一个忠告：耳听为虚，眼见为实。祝你「开拓」好运！
One more word of advice: That which you hear is false, only seeing is believing. Good luck on your "trailblazing!"
一尊平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，并不承载任何明显或隐含的寓意及宣示意图。
An unremarkable Nightingale Statue that illustrates no obvious or hidden propaganda or intentions.
为什么橡木家系家主要在公馆玄关摆这么多隐夜鸫雕像？真是令人费解。
Why would the Oak Family Head have so many Nightingale Statues in the foyer? It really is incomprehensible.
隐夜鸫雕像很想注视你，但它没有眼睛。
The Nightingale Statue wishes to stare at you, but it has no eyes.
道理你都明白，但隐夜鸫为什么这么大？
You understand the logic, but why are the Nightingales so large?
一幅挂在墙上的装饰性绘画，其中的形象酷似折纸小鸟——不过是偏写实风格的。
A decorative painting is hung on the wall, the image on it is a precise rendering of an origami bird... But in a realistic style.
画上的折纸鸟与你见过的小鸟们不尽相同，或许这反映了家族内部艺术风格的变迁。
The origami bird in the picture is unlike those that you have met before, perhaps reflecting the changing of artistic styles within The Family.
桌上翠鸟身形微晃，仰头发出声清脆的啼鸣；画中红鸟则眉目低垂，音调绵长戚悲——
The green bird on the table sways slightly as it raises its head to let out a crisp, clear cry. The red bird in the painting has its brow furrowed as it sings in a low tone of sadness...
「她开口了！啊！请继续说下去吧，我画中的爱侣！」
"She is ready to speak! Ah! Please, continue, my lover of painting-made!"
「不在这里、也不在那里！你为何不在我所及之处！」
"You're not here, you're not there! Why can you not be by my side!"
一座神秘的水池？主持修建这座公馆的人究竟在暗示什么？
A mysterious pond? Just what was the person that led the construction of this pavilion hinting at?
水池里的液体令你联想到匹诺康尼特产苏乐达——令人惊讶的是，它确实是苏乐达。但为什么？
The liquid in the pool makes you think of the Penacony specialty, SoulGlad. Shockingly, it actually is SoulGlad! But why?
生活小窍门：水池里的水并不会主动攻击人类。放心洗手吧。
Life tip: Water in a pond will never actively attack humans. You can wash your hands with peace of mind.
一座巨大的沙盘，以固定比例真实还原了「黄金的时刻」街巷风貌。
A giant sandpit that has realistically replicated the streets and alleys of "Golden Hour" on a smaller scale.
据说沙盘内部设有隐秘的机关，指向公馆更深处的秘密。
Rumor has it that there is a secret mechanism inside the sandpit that leads to secrets that lay further in the depths of the pavilion.
各大家系家主会定期在此处展开会谈，商议梦境都市的日常事务、经营情况，以及未来的发展规划。这座沙盘就是他们流程的一环。

Each Family Head will periodically hold a meeting here to discuss the daily affairs, operational status and future development plans of the Dreamscape here. This sandpit is used as part of this process.
公馆的共享书架。家族成员们会捐赠出自己的私人藏书，供众人自由翻阅。
The pavilion communal bookshelf. Family members will donate books from their own private collections for others to read freely.
对家族成员来说，书本和知识都是可以共享的。
As far as members of The Family are concerned, books and knowledge are things that can be shared.
这面书架上陈列着家族的关键资料。正当你试图拿起一本看看时，侍者的声音刺入你的脑内，立刻制止了你。
The shelf is stacked with crucial information regarding The Family. Just as you reach out and attempt to pick one up, a servant's voice pierces through your mind and stops you in your tracks.
家族的机密书架，其中记载了一些不为人知的内事，外人无权翻阅——包括你。
The Family's secret bookshelf records certain affairs that are not to be divulged to outsiders, outsiders are not permitted to read these materials... This includes you.
…说好的「书本和知识都是可以共享的」呢？
...I thought "books and knowledge were things that can be shared?"
象征猎犬家系的徽记，被绫罗绸缎包围的猎犬仍旧忠心不移。
A crest that symbolizes the Bloodhound Family. Wrapped in silks and satin, the loyal hound remains faithful still.
象征鸢尾花家系的徽记，优雅绽放的花朵散发着动人心魄的魅力。
A crest that symbolizes the Iris Family. A flower blooms elegantly, exuding a charm that captivates the hearts of man.
象征橡木家系的徽记，一圈圈年轮如靶心般指引众人前进的方向。
A crest that symbolizes the Oak Family. It shows growth rings of a great tree guiding everyone towards progress, like the bullseye on a target.
象征苜蓿草家系的徽记，向心聚拢的叶片昭示着无与伦比的凝聚力。
A crest that symbolizes the Alfalfa Family. Leaves gathering together towards the center display an unparalleled cohesive force.
象征隐夜鸫家系的徽记，枝头的鸟儿亦是衔枝的筑梦师。
A crest that symbolizes the Nightingale Family. The bird sitting on the branch is also a Dreamweaver, holding the branch in place.
知更鸟的宣传海报，出于某种纪念意义而被收藏于此。
Robin's promotional posters. They've been collected here as some sort of keepsake.
当你靠近时，一种天启般的预感倾泻着灌进你的脑海，清晰又强烈——
As you approach, a premonition rushes over your mind like a revelation, clear and powerful...
那二人终将如化冻河冰，冰下裂隙滋生，河上湍流暗涌。
The fate of those two is like that of ice on a frozen river. As the ice cracks, the river will grow turbulent.
同谐的梦中，殊途者异梦。
In a dream of the Harmony, those of different paths follow different dreams.
知更鸟演出时的宣传海报，出于某种纪念意义而被收藏于此。
Robin's promotional posters. They've been collected here as some sort of keepsake.
「假如我说，你真美啊，请稍稍停留——」
"What if I said... Stay, you're so beautiful!"
公馆主人的众多收藏品之一，彼此间几乎没有共同点。他的个人美学简直像家族的成分一样复杂。
One of the pavilion master's many collected items, none of which seem to share anything in common. His personal tastes seem to be as complicated as the composition of The Family itself.
你分不清这些收藏品比起外面的同款究竟有什么特别。不过有没有可能——它们本就无关紧要呢？
You cannot tell just what is special about these pieces compared to the identical models outside. Although perhaps... They're not important at all?
你发现自己并不太能欣赏房间主人的高雅品味。
You realize that you are just not able to appreciate the acquired taste of the chamber's master.
巨大的同心圆雕像，据说可以为祈祷者带来精神力量。
A giant statue of concentric shapes, it is said to be able to bring vigor and vitality to those who pray to it.
这念头或许有些不合时宜，但…祈祷真的有用吗？
This thought may not be entirely appropriate but... Does prayer even work?
透过圆心，你仿佛能感受到希佩的笑意。
You feel as if you can feel Xipe smiling at you through the center of the circles.
据说有些侍者会在无人注意的角落将雕像当做标靶——不知道那些手感火热的投手们还能不能享受来自家族的包容。
Rumor has it that some servants use the statues as targets when they are out of sight... You wonder if those hot-handed pitchers will ever receive forgiveness from The Family?
你曾经听那位仙舟艺人女孩说过，以前他们家里吃饭也用这么大的圆桌。
You once heard that young artist on the Xianzhou say that her family used to eat at a giant round table of this size.
你听说公馆的主人有非常严重的强迫症，但这张圆桌的状态证明他痊愈了。
It's said that the master of this pavilion suffers from severe compulsions, but this table clearly shows that he has been cured.
圆桌不似长桌，没有主次和对立关系，极有可能是「同谐」命途的星神候补。
Unlike a long table, round tables have no sense of priority or opposition, it is very likely that they are an Aeonic candidate for the Path of Harmony.
圆桌不似长桌，没有主次和对立关系，「均衡」的星神见了它高低也得鞠两个躬。
Unlike a long table, round tables have no sense of priority or opposition. The Aeon of Equilibrium would still have to bow twice upon seeing it.
哇嘎嘎！呆站在这干嘛，别挡着我上菜呢。刚做好的美味的披萨，嘿，松脆，热腾得很！
Mwahaha! What are you staring at me for? You're in the way of my food! Freshly made pizza is so crispy and hot!
悄咪咪吃掉一块，应该不会有人发现吧咔咔咔！
No one will notice if I sneak a little slice, will they? Gahaha!
汪！这是客人点的单，不可以偷吃哇！
Woof! A customer ordered this, you can't steal it!
缺角的披萨，看起来太明显了哇。
A slice of pizza with a corner missing is so obvious!
怕什么！嘻嘻，你再吃掉一块不就看不出来了嘛。大份的能吃，小份的也能吃，没毛病！
What are you worried about! Hehe, if you take another bite, then you can't even tell! If it's a big portion, you can eat it... Same with a small one, no problem!
Do I need to tell Siobhan about this?
呜呜…对不起，我不该动这种歪心思，我会做个乖孩子的，真的，要不…信我一次？
Waaa... I'm sorry! I shouldn't think such wicked thoughts! I'll be good, I promise! How about... you trust me just this once?
嘻嘻，请…请。吃得越多，暴露的概率越小！大的变小，正正好好！
Hehe, please, be my guest! The more we eat, the less likely it is they'll find out! Big slices get smaller, it's perfect!
汪！危险！这个披萨就交给我去送哇，你们都不准靠近！
Woof! Danger! Leave the pizza delivery to me, and none of you are allowed to get close!
哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！哪位客人要的披萨，介意我偷偷尝尝嘛，就…就一口！
Waaahahaha! You won't even let me try the pizza they ordered? Just a little... just... just one bite!
汪！饮料放在您桌上了！披萨跟我完全没关系哇！
Woof! The drinks are on your table! That pizza has nothing to do with me!
…您是想和我聊聊？当然可以，这儿的氛围很悠闲，正适合说说心里话。
...You want to talk with me? Of course, the atmosphere is very relaxed, it's perfect for talking about what's on your mind.
既然是您主动发起的邀约，还是请先开口吧？
As you invited me to talk, you should probably start?
想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
I want to know what you think about this lounge.
我很喜欢，恐怕在整个梦境里，都找不到如此…有人情味的地方了。
I like it a lot! I fear there is nowhere else in the Dreamscape that you can find a place with such a... human touch.
虽然酒吧里生活的都是怪物，可它们远比那些宾客要更加亲切和友善，也比宣扬谐乐的家族要更温暖。
It may just be monsters that live here, but they're a lot kinder and friendly than those visitors. They're a lot warmer than that harmony-touting family, too!
要想找个真正能让人放松的地方，这里再合适不过了。
If you want somewhere that can really help you relax, you won't find better than here.
I want to know what you think about me.
…您？向搭讪对象询问这种直接的话题，您还真是不懂得循序渐进的道理呢。
...You? That's a real direct way of speaking to someone you're chatting with. You really don't seem to grasp the concept of taking it slow.
依我在酒吧的见闻来看，这里的主人，还有那些怪物们都很信任您，说明您至少是个善良的人，没有将它们视作肆意差遣的对象。

From what I have learned in this lounge, both the owner and the monsters seem to trust you a lot. This means that you are at least a kind person, you don't just see them as things you can order around as you please.
能做到这点，就已经比沉陷在梦境中、只知道享乐的人们要好太多了。我认为您相当优秀——不是恭维，是真心这么觉得哦。
Your empathy already makes you far better than the people drowning in this Dreamscape and only seeking to indulge in fun. I think you are quite outstanding — It's not flattery. I really do this so.
I want a drink, too, tweet!
Please don't make us go back, tweet!
You won't get a reward for catching us, tweet!
嘿，我看你们很有讲脱口秀的天分，跟我去参加「奇异果」电台怎么样？
Hm, I think you two would be great at stand-up comedy! Why don't you join me at Kiwis radio station?
Oh? Can I help you with anything?
想听听你的脱口秀表演。
I want to hear your stand-up comedy performance.
皮皮西笑话讲腻了，换成狗狗笑话也不错！我现场编一个啊。别急，在想了。
I'm bored with telling Pepeshi jokes, I am going to start telling dog jokes! I'll come up with one now... Just a second, I'm thinking.
想到了！听我说——有只狗狗啊，最近换了新主人，它问：「主人，为什么你从来都不肯亲近我」，主人回答：「我始终都把你当成最好的伙伴啊」。

I know! Okay... There's this dog, and he recently got a new master. He asked his master: "Hey master, why do you never treat me like you love me?" The master replied: "I've always treated you like my best friend!"
狗狗又问了：「那为什么你总是居高临下地对我呢」…你知道是为什么吗？
Then the dog asked again: "Then why do you always look down on me..." Do you know why?
因为狗狗原本的主人是个皮皮西人——哈哈哈哈！
Because the dog's old master was a Pepeshi... Hahaha!
哎，现编的笑话果然不够味。要不这样，干脆聘请我来你们酒吧做驻场脱口秀演员吧！
Ah, jokes are never funny when you make them up on the spot... I know, why don't you hire me as a resident stand-up comedian in your lounge?
I want to know what you think about me.
嗨，这位观众真是问了个好问题！这里是酒吧，讲出来的话当然要符合氛围才行。
Hey, a member of the audience has asked a fine question! As this is a lounge, your words have to fit in with the atmosphere.
所以我会回答：「匹诺康尼有那么多家酒吧，酒吧里有那么多客人，可你在搭讪时偏偏选中了我」…怎么样！够深情，够动人心弦吧？！
So, I would respond: "There are so many lounges in Penacony, with so many guests in each lounge, yet you chose to talk with me..." Well? What do you think? That would blow you away, right?
哎，我也知道，我就是个逗观众开心的，煽情这套玩不太来。等我学成了再给你表演，等着啊！
Ah, I know... I just like to make audiences happy, I'm no good at playing with emotion and stuff like that... Let me learn and I'll put on a proper show for you, you just wait!
…不是吧，这么老套的梗都有人喜欢？莫非是我的表演技巧太好了？
No way, there's someone who likes even an cliché line like that one? Or could it be that my acting skills are just too amazing?
我想想…嗯，要不干脆转行去演话剧好了，老是讲脱口秀确实没啥前途啊。
Let me think... Hmm, maybe I should change careers and start acting? There really isn't much future in being a stand-up comedy host, after all...
嗨！点个头，哈个腰，与客人共度的夜晚真美妙！欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
Hey! Nod your head and give a bow, a night with customers makes me feel wow! Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!
原来是您。调饮辛苦了！按照您的意思，我正站在酒吧入口处看门呢。
Oh, it's you! Thanks for your hard work mixing drinks! As you suggested, I'm standing by the door and keeping an eye out.
Why isn't Mr. Bigwig at the door?
哎！它就是个苏乐达的派送员，懂什么看门。不像我——嗓音洪亮，高大威猛，往这一站，特别有范！要是再穿个黑西装，就更有排场了！

Hah! They're just the SoulGlad deliveryman, what would they know about being a door attendant? They're not like me... They don't have a loud and clear voice. They aren't tall and mighty, capable of leaving a lasting impression! If I only had a tuxedo on, I'd be perfect!
我好像没安排过这件事吧？
怪我！怪我！没及时向您报告。我寻思着酒吧的门常敞开，要是顾客到来却没人招待，那怎么能行！所以就擅自行动了。

My bad! My bad! I didn't report back to you earlier. I was thinking about the fact that the lounge door is always open, it's no good if guests arrive and there is no one there to greet them! So, I took action.
您放心！有我在，这家酒吧绝对不会出事！就算出事，也是小事！
Rest assured! There will be no issues in this lounge! If there are, they will only be small ones!
嗨！脚并拢，头埋低，时时倾听客人的心意！欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
Hey! Feet together, head down, our customers always wear the crown! Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!
你也是门卫？啧，那么高的个子，看起来威风，说不定脑子里早就全生锈了。
You're a door attendant, too? Tsk, look at how tall you are, standing all high and mighty. Has your brain gone rusty from being so high in the sky?
哼。看在你没有站着跟我说话的份上，就勉为其难地聊聊吧。
Humph. As you're not standing over me while we talk, I guess we can make conversation.
想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
I want to know what you think about this lounge.
挺好的地方，不吵闹，没有那些凭身高显摆的傻蛋。喏，这个大块头不会去欺负那两个小型怪物，它们的关系好像还不错，这就很难得了。

I like this place. It is not too loud and there aren't too many of those tall idiots bragging about their height. Tsk, this big brute won't bully those two little monsters. They look like they get on well — This is a rare sight.
我回去问问皮皮西俱乐部的管理员，看他们想不想来这团建。找个能让所有会员都满意的地方挺不容易的，他们不喜欢外人多的场所。

I'll go and ask the Pepeshi Club administrator if they want to come here for a team-building event. It's not easy to find a place that everyone is happy with. They don't like places with lots of outsiders.
有消息了再通知你…还是那个酒保？算了，就你吧，至少你不会给我太多压力。
Shall I let you know when I hear something... Or the drinksmith? Forget it, I'll talk to you, I know you won't pressure me too much.
That's more of an issue on your end, isn't it?
少废话。拒绝和比我高的人讲道理，问就是我对！
Quit your nonsense. I will not try and reason with people taller than me. I am always right!
I want to know what you think about me.
呃…这个问题有点突然，我得缓缓。
Uhh... That question came out of nowhere, let me think.
咳咳。嗯，不好意思，但我必须拒绝你。你是个远高于皮皮西标准线的人类，而我是个恪尽职守的门卫，我们之间是根本不可能的。除非你……

Ahem. Umm, I'm sorry, but I must turn you down. You are a human, far taller than the height standards of the Pepeshi people, and I am a dutiful door attendant, it would never work between us. Unless...
没什么除非！哼，就是这样！我们连朋友都做不了！
No, unless nothing! Humph, I said what I said! We can't even be friends!
钢琴家安静坐在丝绒织成的软垫上，神情似水般平和，望向远处的目光微微含笑。
Serene, the pianist sits on a velvet cushion, his countenance remaining tranquil as still water. A faint smile adorns his face as he gazes into the distance.
究竟是这嬉闹的光景，让他回想起了过往和朋友度过的欢乐时光，还是单纯喜爱这些有趣的怪物，任由自己沉醉在酒吧惬意的氛围中？

Perhaps the whimsical scene evokes his memories of joyous moments shared with friends? Or perhaps he simply harbors a deep fondness for these amusing monsters, immersing himself in the cozy ambiance of the lounge?
钢琴家做出「请」的手势，并未有过多言语。
Without speaking much, the pianist gives you a gentle gesture.
想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
I want to know what you think about this lounge.
柔和的话语随乐声而至，不知何时，那架钢琴出现在了麦克斯的身边。
His soft words are accompanied by a melody. Before you realize it, the piano materializes beside Max.
我们很喜欢这里——我的小先生，他很久没有这样开心过了。
We love this place. My dear master hasn't been so happy in quite some time.
梦境给了我们生命，却没有赋予我们对等的地位和自由。人们都将我们视作纯粹的自动演奏工具，没有灵魂，坏了就换，不值得投入任何感情。

While the Dreamscape has granted us life, it hasn't granted us any social status or freedom. People view us as mere automated machines, devoid of souls, conveniently replaceable when damaged, and unworthy of emotional attachment.
冷漠不会带来任何好的结果，只会加深彼此的孤独和痛苦。
Apathy will not bear favorable outcomes, only deepening our loneliness and pain.
因此，我很欣赏这位酒吧主人的做法。尊重与陪伴，永远是表达爱意最好的方式。
Therefore, I appreciate the lounge owner's approach. Respect and companionship are always the best way of expressing love.
想听听你对怪物们的看法。
I want to know what you think about monsters.
低沉的嗓音混杂着急促鼓点，在你的耳畔骤然响起。
A low voice, amidst the sharp beat of a drum, suddenly resonates in your ears.
都是群傻了吧唧的家伙，过去被欺负成那样还不反抗，没骨气！
Those imbeciles! They're spineless worms who don't even have the guts to fight back against the mistreatment they endure!
人类根本不值得相信，非得等到被抛弃了才明白——当然，麦克斯除外。
Humans don't deserve any trust — except for Max, of course. But those fools just remain blind to this fact until the very day they are abandoned.
不过看它们现在过得还挺开心，希望这里的生活能长久持续下去吧。
But now they seem to be happy, so let's hope the life here will last long.
I want to know what you think about me.
恍惚间，你听见了某位绅士的声音，语气克制礼貌，如弦乐般舒缓而悠扬。
Out of nowhere, you hear the voice of a gentleman. His tone is restrained and polite, soothing and melodious like string music.
您是个很善良的人，就像麦克斯先生那样，我从您的谈吐间看得出来。
You possess a benevolent soul, just as Maestro Max does. I can discern it from the way you speak.
但麦克斯先生已经有了值得信任的伙伴，我们约好了，要在梦境里演奏一辈子音乐。
However, Maestro Max already has trusted companions, as we have promised to create music within the Dreamscape for the remainder of our existence.
如果您接近麦克斯先生，只是出于同情或是好奇的话，我希望您最好收起这份情感，这对一位纯粹的音乐家而言无异于冒犯。
If you approach Maestro Max out of mere sympathy or curiosity, I implore you to set aside such sentiments, as they would be perceived as offensive to a pure musician.
用于服务的自动道具…它们真的拥有灵魂，能够感受快乐，欣赏艺术吗？
Automated machines for service... Are they truly capable of possessing souls, experiencing pleasure, and appreciating art?
或许我该好好在这观察段时间，反思自己的观点了。
Perhaps I should reflect upon myself during my stay here.
行，这里的音乐也正适合畅谈，你想聊什么话题？
Alright, the music here is perfect for a conversation. What would you like to discuss?
想听听你对怪物们的看法。
I want to know what you think about monsters.
我来到匹诺康尼前就听说过，在梦境里有种供人娱乐的自动道具，很听话，完全按照命令行事。但工具就是工具，替代不了人类。

Before my arrival in Penacony, I heard that there are automated machines designed for amusement in the Dreamscape. They're obedient and always do their job well. However, tools are tools, and they'll never replace human beings.
别的都无所谓，但我无论如何都没法忍受那些自动乐团。它们演奏的不是音乐，是毫无灵魂的噪音，简直亵渎了那些旋律！
I'm fine with most things here, but those automated orchestras... What they produce is not music, but soulless cacophony!
至于酒吧里的怪物，嗯…我承认，它们让我看到了自动道具的另一面。从某种角度来说，它们确实是「生命」，对世界有着和我们类似的体验。

As for the monsters in the lounge, well... I admit they've presented me with a new perspective on the automated machines. In a way, they can be considered "beings" with a similar perception of the world as we do.
你还真是会挑问题。对，我得好好想想。但在得出结论前，我对它们的厌恶不会改变。
That's a touchy subject. I need to think more about it. But until I come to a conclusion, I won't change my distaste for it.
哎，会这么说也是因为…我对音乐的爱不会改变。
Look, I'm saying all this because... my love for music will never change.
会…吧？有什么不这么做的理由吗？我可没无聊到以欺负这些小东西为乐。
I will... perhaps? I mean, why not? I'm not so bored that I find pleasure in bullying those little creatures.
但这丝毫没法动摇我对自动乐团的质疑！
But that doesn't mean I won't criticize automated orchestras!
I want to know what you think about me.
我对你的态度，得取决于你的音乐品味。
My opinion of you depends on your taste in music.
就是这样，我知道你是酒吧的调饮师，聊天的能力肯定不错，但想用花言巧语来接近我是不可能的。我永远只会为美妙的旋律而沦陷。
That's the crux of it. I know you're a drinksmith and a skilled conversationalist, but flowery words won't impress me. Only a great melody will win me over.
自动乐团制造出来那些噪音不算是音乐啊，别想投机取巧！
And don't try cheap tricks! The noises coming from automated orchestras don't count as music!
都站到了舞台上，我们是不是应该说点什么？
You know, we're on the stage together, shouldn't we talk a little?
唉，为何沉重的命运总压在我身上，为何怪物不能停止互相伤害，非以戏耍同类为乐？
Ah, why must the great weight of destiny weigh so heavy on my shoulders? Why can't monsters stop harming each other and learn to take joy from playing together?
开心点呀，人家要和你表演的是甜甜的喜剧。
Cheer up! We're supposed to be performing a sweet comedic piece together!
至少在故事里，要表现得和人家更亲近点。这样台下的客人们才会感到幸福呢。
You have to act a little more intimate with me, at least in the story. That is the only way to make the audience happy.
I... I will try... my best...
嘻嘻，不用那么紧张啦，因为要演出的，本来就是我们的故事呀。
Hehe, don't be so nervous! This is our story we're performing, after all!
感谢您。希望下次人家也能给您带来幸福呀。
Thank you. I hope next time we can bring you happiness, too.
I do not wish you well.
…您是生气了嘛，那下次换人家来给您带来幸福呀。
...Are you angry? Then next time allow me to bring you happiness.
唉，那就勉为其难的…和你共演吧，不准欺负我啊。
Ah, then I guess I have to try... I'll perform with you, but you're not allowed to bully me!
真的吗？人家好感动，那就赶快开始吧！
Really? Oh, I'm so touched! We have to begin immediately!
人家觉得，生活呀，就是充满了...无数像这样意义深远的邂逅。
I feel like, this life we live, it is so full... of countless unexpected and profound meetings. Like... like this one.
能遇见灵魂伴侣的概率，不过只有六分之一。
The chances of meeting your soulmate are but one in six.
我的人生目标，就是和你维持现状。
My dream in this life, is to be like this with you, forever.
它们的故事让我忍不住落泪，我最愿意为美好的爱情而欢呼了。
I can't help but cry watching their story. I will always let out a cheer for true love.
看啊，它们是如此般配，如此的令人歆羡。
Look, they are such a perfect match! I can't help but admire and envy them!
属于我的那个她，我早已遇见，可是…她如今在哪呢？
My true love, I met her long ago, but... Where is she now?
想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
I want to know what you think about this lounge.
我好爱这个地方，空气中都弥漫着甜腻的香味！
I love this place! It's got a sweet aroma in the air!
那位神秘酒保，和我的爱人有着相似的魅力，温柔，又是如此英姿飒爽！可惜我的心早已被她占据，容不下其余对象了。
That mysterious drinksmith, she has a similar charm and kindness as my beloved, yet she is heroic and bold, too! It is a shame that my heart has already been taken, and I have no space for another.
I want to know what you think about me.
你的意思…？不行，不可能，我的爱是如此坚定，绝不会发生偏移。
You mean... No, impossible, my love is resolute and will not be swayed!
我的心已被她夺走，即使给我调制那种特殊的饮料，即使你拿出安抚那群怪物的手段，也动摇不了我的信念！
She has stolen my heart, no specially mixed drink or secret monster-calming technique will shake my faith in love!
有趣的爱情故事总能让人轻易沉陷其中，尤其是…怪物间的亲密关系。
Interesting love stories are always so easy to get immersed in, especially... intimate relations between monsters.
您不觉得很有趣嘛？性格迥异的奇特生物，封闭的梦境空间，黑暗中逐渐发酵的复杂心绪…呀，光是谈到这几个关键词都忍不住开始浮想联翩了。

Don't you find it fascinating? Strange creatures with contrasting personalities, sealed inside a Dreamscape together as complex emotions start to ferment in the darkness... Ah, just these little tropes alone get my mind racing!
可以啊，您想和我聊些什么呢？
Of course, what do you want to talk about?
想听听你对怪物们的看法。
I want to know what you think about monsters.
它们都是很…有意思的生命，对吧？梦境中的物件会走动，能像我们一样交流和思考，这本身就是件相当新奇的事，我喜欢观察它们的行为。

They are all very... interesting creatures, don't you think? The fact that objects in the Dreamscape can walk, communicate and think like us, this is such a novel concept. I enjoy observing their behavior.
更何况，酒吧里发生的事我都听说了，遭噩梦侵袭的被遗忘者，和不离不弃的照看者…这样的温柔的故事在哪都会受欢迎的。

What's more, I've heard about what happened in this lounge. The forgotten ones plagued by nightmares and the carer that refused to abandon them... A heartwarming story like this would be popular anywhere!
这家酒吧可真是适合取材的好地方，请允许我再多待段时间吧。
This lounge is a great place to get inspiration, please allow me to stay a while longer?
I want to know what you think about me.
…在这样的氛围里，提出这样的问题，您的想法还真是出乎意料呢。
...Quite the unexpected question to propose in a place with such an atmosphere.
可惜呀，要是故事的开头太过顺利，整本小说就失去吸引人读下去的动力了，所以请容许我暂且卖个关子，避开这个话题。
Unfortunately, if a story begins too smoothly, readers will lose interest in the story. So, I will skip this question for now.
现在我和您并肩坐在这里，共同度过了一段美好的时光，这就够了，不是吗？
Sitting side-by-side here, sharing in these beautiful moments, don't you think that's enough?
…噢？这倒挺有意思的，怪物们的故事很适合作为新闻素材。
...Hm? Now that's interesting, the story of these monsters would make great news articles.
「惊梦剧团」居然能与人类正常相处，甚至提供表演服务，看来那位传说中的调饮师确实挺厉害，下次请她来我们节目做特邀访谈嘉宾好了。

Not only can the Dreamjolt Troupe interact with humans, they even offer performances! It seems that the legendary drinksmith is indeed an impressive woman. I should invite her for a special feature interview on my program.
我想想…时间应该还够，不过你得说快点，我是偷偷出来逛的。
Let me think... I probably don't have time but, speak quickly, I snuck out here to have a look around.
想听听你对舒翁的看法。
I want to know your thoughts on Siobhan.
舒翁？是酒吧的那位神秘调饮师对吧，关于她的消息，我多多少少听过点。
Siobhan? That's the name of the mysterious drinksmith, correct? I've heard a number of things about her.
她的身份可不简单，具体情况你自己去打听吧，反正是个在家族内部很有名望的人，没记错的话…应该是鸢尾花家系？可别说是我告诉你的啊。

Her background is complicated, if you want to know the specifics then you should ask around for yourself. Either way, I know that she holds a lot of renown within The Family... The Iris Family, if I remember rightly...? You cannot tell anyone that you heard this from me.
I want to know what you think about me.
你是这家酒吧新招来的调饮师？听说最近都是你在照顾那群怪物，效果挺好的，它们都很信任你，愿意把想法和你分享，看来你在沟通方面很有一套嘛。

Are you the new drinksmith here? I hear that it's you that has been looking after those monsters lately? I hear it's going well, and they trust you a lot, that they are willing to share their thoughts with you. It seems you're quite the adept communicator.
我会找人把这里的见闻写成报道，让更多观众都知道的，等着上电视吧。
I will send someone to write a report on what I've seen here and let our viewers know. Keep an eye on the TV!
嘿！刚才有五个苏乐达汽水瓶在空中飞！
Hey! There were five SoulGlad bottles flying in the air!
不准围观。这不是动物表演！
No spectators. This is not an animal show!
好吧，为了这家酒吧的人气考虑，稍微牺牲下也没什么。
Well, I guess I can make a compromise for the sake of the lounge's popularity.
There's something you haven't told me.
哼，是回忆里的那场真心话大冒险吧，我还以为你忘了。
Hmph, it's about the Truth or Dare game, right? I thought you had forgotten about it.
我可以告诉你当时的事，但你必须回答一个问题。
I can tell you what happened back then, but you need to answer me a question.
这是我和舒翁的约定。她不在酒吧的时候，我会照顾那些怪物。
This is my agreement with Siobhan. When she's not around the lounge, I'll take care of the monsters.
所以，我有义务逗它们开心。
So, it's my job to keep them entertained.
…后空翻喝汽水。这是我以前从电视节目里学来的技巧。
...Drinking SoulGlad while doing backflips. Learned it from a TV show.
只要表演这个戏法，其他怪物都会笑出来。
Every time I pull off that trick, the other monsters will laugh out loud.
轮到你回答了。我想知道——如果舒翁没有提出委托，见到我们，你会怎么做？
Now, it's your turn. I'd like to know... what would you have done to us if Siobhan hadn't hired you?
但无论如何，你的选择里绝对不会有——「和这群怪物成为朋友」。
No matter what you answer, I doubt "become friends with these monsters" would've been on the list.
对你来说，我们不过是梦境里随处可见的游荡物品罢了。
