To you, we're just wandering objects spread all over the Dreamscape.
没关系，我们本就不该对人类奢望过多。
It's fine. I know we shouldn't expect too much from humans.
就当我没问过。你继续去忙吧。
Let's pretend I didn't ask this question. Now, go back to your business.
哼。计算，瞄准，出杆，简单的几何学。
Hmm, calculations, aiming, shots... simple geometry.
在充满变数的梦境里，这是仅剩的确定性。我喜欢不变的东西。
It's the only certainty left in this ever-changing Dreamscape. I appreciate things that remain unchanged.
You seem to be enjoying yourself.
是吧。这家酒吧暂时保住了，我们的生活不会被打扰。这就是值得高兴的事。
Yeah, indeed. This lounge is safe for now, and our lives won't be disrupted. That's something to be happy about.
也祝你在这过得开心。我们的调饮师。
Enjoy your time here as well, our drinksmith.
加到六个瓶子！放心，我肯定不会失手。
Make it six! No worries, I've got this.
…奇怪，这只运输道具，我是不是在哪见过？感觉很熟悉。
...Hmmm, have I ever seen this transportation thing before? It feels familiar.
算了！想这么多干嘛，相同用途的「美梦剧团」都长一个样，不需要专门去分辨！
Ah, forget it! Same-purpose Sweet Dreams Troupe members all look the same! Why bother distinguishing them?
哟，您想找我聊聊，完全没问题！想看看我训练的物品吗？
Hey, if you'd like to talk, I'm all ears. Maybe you'd be interested in the props I've trained?
想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
I want to know what you think about this lounge.
哈哈哈哈，要我说，这可真是个傻地方！我早就知道有几位驯物师同僚，把道具当作自己的伙伴，又是照顾又是保护的，没想到就是这里。
You know what? This place is filled with morons! I've heard that some of my fellow Props Masters treat props like companions, but I didn't know they're living here.
我听说这些怪物都被训练得服服帖帖，才打算过来取经。但这哪是驯物啊，简直都把它们供起来了，还给道具调饮料，这不是搞笑吗？

I heard those monsters are incredibly obedient, so I came to see how it's done. But what do I find? This is not prop-taming at all! Those fools treat these monsters like their bosses and even mix drinks for them! It's downright hilarious!
不听话的道具就该用鞭子抽！不管什么情绪，给我卖命工作就对了！
Disobedient items deserve a good whipping! I don't care about their moods! They're supposed to work hard for me!
就算你不干，有的是其它道具来干！
And even if some of them don't feel like working, I have plenty of substitutes!
I want to know what you think about me.
哎呦，客人，我哪敢对您有看法啊。您能喜欢道具表演就是我的荣幸了。
Oh, dear guest! How dare I have complaints about you? I'm honored that you're interested in my item show.
…现在要看吗？这里的环境悠闲又清净，正适合看点好玩的节目来打发时间！
...So, would you like to enjoy the show now? A little entertainment in this quiet joint would be the perfect way to kill some time!
Just a moment. It'll start soon.
别急着拒绝啊，我先给您演示看看。
Don't be so quick to say "no." Let me show you how it's done.
这位骄傲的驯物师才刚从口袋里掏出长鞭，一个汽水瓶盖就径直砸到了他的头上。
Just as the proud props master reaches for his whip, a soda bottle cap smacks him right on the head.
哇！疼疼疼疼疼疼疼——是谁干的！
Ouch! It hurts!! Who the heck did that!?
没用的东西！要是我管理的道具，非得拿鞭子把你抽到服…哎呀！！！
You useless piece of junk! If I were your master, this whip would... Ouch!!!
只要你坐在那，我就总是忍不住想瞄准你的头。
As long as you're sitting there, I can't resist aiming for your head.
你…我去向你的主人告状！给我等着瞧！我就不信还处理不了你一个道具了！
You... I'll tell your master! Just you wait! There will be consequences!
它看起来很喜欢这个地方。
It seems to be fond of this place.
想听听你对这些饮料的看法。
It seems to be asking for your thoughts on the drinks.
它似乎对你调制的饮料很感兴趣！
It seems interested in the drinks you've mixed!
它似乎很遗憾自己没能喝到饮料……
It seems to regret not getting a drink...
它似乎在询问饮料能打包带走吗？
It seems to be asking if it can pack the drinks and take them away.
它跳下了椅子，似乎不想再聊了。
It jumps off the chair and doesn't seem interested in talking anymore.
I want to know what you think about me.
怎么回事？在你提出问题的一瞬间，一名智械女性突然出现在了眼前！
What's going on? The moment you ask the question, an Intellitron girl pops out of nowhere!
先警告你一句，别对那些可爱的小动物动歪心思。它们都很纯粹，离远点，不准随便靠近，免得沾染上人的臭味。
Consider yourself warned — don't get any funny ideas about those cute little animals. They are pure, and it's best to keep your distance, or you will taint them with human stink.
至于你…这家酒吧的事，我都打听过了，你像是个会平等对待动物的人，但就算如此，我还是没法相信你。
As for you... I've heard about this lounge. Even if you seem like someone who treats animals the same as humans, I'm not trusting you completely.
生命形式的差别不能轻易抹平，理解只是空谈！
Differences in life forms can't be easily ignored, and mutual understanding is merely empty talk!
安抚心灵的神奇饮品，要是能在梦境里推广开来该有多好啊。
A magical drink that soothes the soul. It'd be wonderful if it could spread far and wide in the Dreamscape.
不过…所有负面情绪都能被轻易消除的话，我这样的梦境鼓励师还有什么用呢？
However... if all the negative emotions could be easily erased like this, who would need a Dreamscape Motivator like me anymore?
您好，是需要咨询吗？这里很安静，正适合进行深入谈话。
Greetings, do you need counseling? It's quiet here, perfect for an in-depth conversation.
想听听你对情绪的看法。
I'd like to hear your thoughts on emotions.
情绪是种很奇妙的存在，它没有实体，无法被清晰观测到。它是活着的某种状态，同样可以是错觉。情绪能被有意识地制造，也能被强行改变或消除。

Emotions are fascinating. They have no tangible form and can't be clearly observed. They are certain states of being alive, and they can be both real and illusory. They can be consciously created, altered, or even eliminated.
但对「美梦剧团」而言，情绪能决定它们的本性。它们的生命附属于梦境，不会生病或衰老，不受时间的控制，却会因情绪转变而发生根本变化。

However, for the Sweet Dreams Troupe, their emotions determine their very nature. Their lives stem from the Dreamscape, and they won't fall ill or age. However, their essence can change dramatically due to shifts in emotions.
很不可思议吧？所以，听说这家酒吧的故事后，我很好奇。
It's incredible, isn't it? That's why I became curious after hearing the story of this lounge.
…究竟是什么样的力量在保护着怪物们，不被噩梦彻底侵蚀呢？
...I wonder, what powers have been protecting the monsters from being completely corrupted by the Nightmare?
I want to know what you think about me.
…您？可、可…我是梦境鼓励师，您是我的客户。这样的关系…也太危险了啊。
...You? B—But I... I'm a Dreamscape Motivator, and you're my client. Such a relationship... would be far too dangerous.
不行不行，虽说我的职责是帮助您消除烦恼，但这也并不意味着……
No, no, no, even though my duty is to help you alleviate your worries, it doesn't mean...
深呼吸…抱歉，我可能误解了您的意思。真要说，我认为您是位极为优秀的心理咨询师，这些「惊梦剧团」的情绪问题不是能轻易解决的，您处理得很漂亮。

*gasp* ...I'm sorry. I may have misunderstood you. To be honest, I think you're an exceptional counselor. The emotional issues of the Dreamjolt Troupe members are not easily resolved, but you've handled them impressively.
咦？！…对、对不起！我需要暂时离开，来好好平复我的情绪！
Huh!?... I... I'm sorry! I need to take some time away to calm down my emotions!
You can also ask me for counseling.
哈哈，虽说我确实也有些情绪问题，不过还没到必须麻烦其他人的程度。有机会的话，还是让我尝尝您调制的饮料吧。
Haha, I admit that I may have some emotional issues too, but it's not to the extent that I need to bother others. I'll just try one of your drinks.
你尝试向眼前的顾客搭话，但对方似乎沉浸在酒吧的悠闲氛围中，并未注意到你。
You attempt to engage in conversation with the customer before you, but they seem immersed in the leisurely ambiance of the lounge, oblivious to your presence.
真高兴见到你，星穹列车的开拓者。
Pleasure to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express.
Are you looking for an autograph? Not today...
看来情报不错。你的说话风格确实…幽默。
It seems my intel was spot on. You do have a rather... humorous manner of speaking.
小时候，我总是缠着父辈们给我讲无名客们的银河冒险故事。你们简直是我的童年偶像…真没想到，我现在居然有机会和你们面对面聊天。

When I was a kid, I kept asking folks from my parents' generation to tell me tales of the Nameless' cosmic adventures. You were basically my childhood heroes... I never imagined I'd be able to speak to you face-to-face like this.
哎…可惜啊，家族需要我，我还有任务在身。要不然，我真想辞了这个工作，和你们星穹列车一起旅行。
Ah... Unfortunately, The Family needs me. I still have a mission to do. If it weren't for that, I'd leave this job in a heartbeat and travel with you on the Astral Express.
呵，看来是真货——恭喜，你的嫌疑被洗清了。
Ha, looks like you are the real deal — Congratulations, you are no longer under suspicion.
我做不了主，得问问列车长。
I can't call the shots. You'll have to ask the conductor.
列车长…呵，看来是真货——恭喜，你的嫌疑被洗清了。
The conductor... Ha, looks like you are the real deal — Congratulations, you are no longer under suspicion.
什么嫌疑？你的任务就是这个？
What suspicion? Is this your mission?
呵呵，特殊时期，还请多多担待。最近风头紧，现在猎犬的鼻子比以往任何时候都灵敏。
Hehe. These are special times, so please bear with me. Things have been tense recently. The Hounds' noses have been sharper than ever.
别说傻话，别做傻事，你就不会惹上麻烦。也祝你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
There won't be any trouble so long as you don't say or do anything foolish. I hope you enjoy your time in Penacony.
当然。正好给我打掩护，尽管聊吧。
You bet. That'll be the perfect cover. Chat to your heart's content.
度假，旅游，约会，享受生活，追杀会飞的皮皮西…哪条比较可信？
Resorts, travel, dates, enjoying life, or hunting down a Pepeshi who can fly... Which one is more believable?
我为这个问题准备了一百个答案，但都不太适合你。不过，既然你是大剧院事件的亲历者…我倒是可以稍微和你聊聊。

I've prepared a hundred answers to this question, but none of them would really suit you. That said, I suppose I could talk with you a bit... since you experienced the Grand Theater incident firsthand.
「秩序」——或者说橡木家系——相信你们已经照过面了。这群人背叛了神主，必然要受到相应的惩罚。但他们仍在美梦中流窜，而我们正在…有序收网。

I trust you have already encountered Order — or should I say the Oak Family. They betrayed the Great One and must be punished accordingly. However, they are still scuttling somewhere in the dreamscape, while we are in the process of... tightening the surrounding net one step at a time.
质疑神主，控制欲过强，这都是受「秩序」影响的表现。如果你身边有这种人，请务必告诉我，报酬管够。

Questioning the Great One and having an overwhelming desire for control are all signs of Order's influence. If anyone around you exhibits those signs, please let me know. The reward will be worth your while.
神主吸收了太一的「秩序」，相对的，那位陨落的星神也在我等谐乐中留下了杂音。就像一种跨越时空的诅咒，久久盘桓在家族头上。

The Great One absorbed Ena of Order. Consequently, that fallen Aeon left behind a dissonance in our harmonious music. It is like some kind of curse that transcends time and space and has hung over The Family's head for ages.
虽然老东西们从不把小喽啰放在眼里，但放任不管也会滋生重疾…就像现在。想要「同谐」伟力长存，就必须把旧病的残渣清除干净。

Though those old fools never gave their underlings any thought, ignoring them will cause the wound to fester... just like it is now. If the Harmony's power is to remain eternal, then every last trace of that old wound must be excised.
更多的嘛…我就不能说了。刚才这段小故事可是特殊服务，别外传。
Anything beyond that... I can't tell you. That little story was an exclusive service. Don't tell anyone else.
我猜这不是你的真面目…
I guess this isn't who you really are...
当然。见人说人话，见鬼说鬼话，这是猎犬特工的必备素质。
Of course not. Changing your personality to fit the person you're with is a trait a Hound agent must have.
别嫌弃我不够真诚…你肯定不会希望我以对待叛徒的态度来对待你的。
Don't be disappointed that I'm not honest enough... I'm positive you wouldn't want me to handle you with the same attitude I come at traitors with.
I look forward to meeting you again.
真高兴有你陪我…一个人在这儿盯梢，我快闷死了。
I'm happy to have you keep me company... I would have been bored to tears scouting here all alone.
黑爪女士笑盈盈地看着你，不变的嘴角弧度让你脊背发凉。
Lady Black Claw looks at you pleasantly, but the way the arc of her lips is constantly frozen in the same smile sends shivers down your spine.
聊点什么好呢…啊，有了——听说过「安谧的时刻」么？有机会的话，我可以带你去逛逛。参观参观噩梦边境的监牢，见识各种有趣的…人。

What else could we talk about... Ah, I know. Have you heard of the Moment of Serenity? If we have the opportunity, I can take you to check it out. You can see the jail on the Nightmare's edge and meet some interesting... people.
有个家伙蹲了两个琥珀纪的号子，猜猜为什么？那家伙满嘴秽语，侮辱家族…警告无果，我们只好请他换个地头生活，免得扰民。

There was this guy who's been in jail for two Amber Eras. Can you guess why? He was constantly spouting off obscenities and insulting The Family... He paid no heed to our warnings, so our only option was to ask him to live somewhere else to avoid riling people up.
他现在还保持着每天辱骂家族的习惯呢，大不敬发言记录了整整十册。他可能觉得自己能骂死我们吧…呵呵。
Even now he still insults The Family every day. His disrespectful tirades filled at least ten books. Maybe he's under the impression that he can insult us to death... Hehe.
对了，还有个奇才——她宣称创造了一种完美的社会形式，到处推销，甚至偷偷溜进大剧院，准备趁剧目的中场休息阶段上台演说……

Oh, yeah. Then there's this other special person. She declared that she created a perfect form of society and was pushing the idea wherever she went. She even snuck into the Grand Theater and planned to take to the stage during intermission to give her spiel...
还有，我最喜欢的一位：那家伙只因为想拍恐怖片，硬是驯服了三十九只迷因。结果那群张牙舞爪的小家伙跑到「蓝调的时刻」大闹了一场…这下成沉浸式恐怖电影了。

Then there's my favorite. He wanted to shoot a horror film so badly that he tamed and trained <unbreak>39</unbreak> memes. So, this fierce-looking group headed to the Blue Hour and caused a big scene... They truly made an immersive horror film.
觉得他们都挺无害的，对吧？至于那些有害的…呵呵，在美梦里还是不聊这个了。
You think they were harmless, right? Well, as for those that weren't so harmless... Hehe, we won't chat about that in the Dreamscape.
有趣的小把戏…如果我会你这种手段，审问应该能轻松不少。
Neat little trick there... If I could use that tactic of yours, my interrogations would probably be way easier.
黑爪女士自在地吹了个口哨，完全看不出悲伤的样子。她到底是怎么察觉到「钟表把戏」的？
Lady Black Claw whistles casually. You can't see a hint of sadness in her. How could she have detected the Clockwork?
来聊聊犯事的家伙们吧。正好，前段日子抓了个筑梦师，足够作为谈资。
Let's chat about some people who've committed crimes. It just so happens a Dreamweaver got arrested a few days ago. That should be a decent topic of conversation.
有大剧院事件在先，那些潜伏已久的叛徒们纷纷闻风而动。这个筑梦师嘛，就是其中一员。

There was the Grand Theater incident that happened before. Those traitors who had been lurking in the shadows for so long caught wind of what was going on and took action. The Dreamweaver was one of them.
他往所在的筑梦工事里创造了一枚自毁装置——别问，这当然不合法——他想以此来要挟家族，让我们为他划分出一块「秩序」的试验田，自己当国王，容纳所有信徒居住。

He created a self-destruction device in the dream construction project he belonged to — yes, that's illegal, I know — He wanted to use the explosive to extort The Family so that we'd give him a testing field for Order. He wanted a place where he could be king and get all the believers to live there.
可惜，他还没来得及要挟，计划就破产了。知道他怎么暴露的吗？被他的「战友」们卖了：他们觉得那人追求的东西根本不是「秩序」，所以直接找到了我们。

Unfortunately for him, he never got the chance to squeeze The Family. His plan fell apart. Do you know how his little scheme got exposed? His "allies" sold him out. They felt he wasn't after Order at all, so they approached us directly.
这群人…明明信奉一尊「秩序」，却自以为自己的理想才是唯一的「秩序」。呵呵，可怜虫。
This group... They believe in the same Order, and yet they assume that their own ideal is the only Order out there. They're so pitiful.
这点小伎俩…想要动摇「同谐」的洪流，还是有点不自量力了。
They tried to divert the torrent that is Harmony... with that little trick. That was a serious overestimation of their strength.
黑爪女士露出深邃的笑容，似乎在期待你会如何回应。「钟表把戏」似乎没有产生作用…「家人」的实力恐怖如斯。

Lady Black Claw has this profound smile on her face as if in anticipation of how you are going to react. It looks like Clockwork isn't taking effect. The strength of "Family members" sure is terrifying.
我的音级远高于那些普通的家人。虽然我不知道你的小把戏来自哪道命途的力量…但无论如何，这种挠痒痒似的把戏，在我身上只会被「同谐」的力量「啪」地弹开。

My scale degree goes far beyond the average Family member. I may not know what Path your little trick drew power from, but... that trifling ability merely bounces off of me thanks to the power of Harmony.
想当年，有个忆者和我大战了三百回合，愣是没撼动我的记忆半分，最后当场与我义结金兰…名字暂时没编好，你只用知道姐姐我很厉害就行了。

It makes me think of that one time when a Memokeeper fought me for three hundred rounds and shockingly couldn't even disturb a single bit of my memory. In the end, the Memokeeper and I became sworn sisters... I haven't made up a name yet, but all you need to know is that I am incredible.
「同谐」的合唱既给予我们力量，也会淡化我们的情感，强烈的情绪例外。比如，和你聊天就很开心……
Harmony's united choir imbues us with strength but also dilutes our emotions. Except for strong emotions, that is. For example, how I am happy to be speaking with you...
来！这笔钱就当是姐姐给你的朋友费，在匹诺康尼狠狠地消费吧！
Here! Take this money. Think of it as some cash from a friend. Go out and spend big while you are here in Penacony!
黑爪女士表达愤怒的方式还真是…与众不同。
The way Lady Black Claw expresses anger is... certainly unique.
我的音级远高于那些普通的家人。虽然我不知道你的小把戏来自哪道命途的力量…但无论如何，这种挠痒痒似的把戏，在我身上只会被「同谐」的力量「啪」地弹开。

My scale degree goes far beyond the average Family member. I may not know what Path your little trick drew power from, but... that trifling ability merely bounces off of me thanks to the power of Harmony.
想当年，有个忆者和我大战了三百回合，愣是没撼动我的记忆半分，最后当场与我义结金兰…名字暂时没编好，你只用知道姐姐我很厉害就行了。

It makes me think of that one time when a Memokeeper fought me for three hundred rounds and shockingly couldn't even disturb a single bit of my memory. In the end, the Memokeeper and I became sworn sisters... I haven't made up a name yet, but all you need to know is that I am incredible.
嘘、嘘——「秩序」的残秽们又有新动静了。
Shhhh. The remnant of Order is up to something again.
黑爪女士的视线穿过你，落到一个遥远的地方…可那里根本没有人。
Lady Black Claw's gaze goes right past you and is locked on a distant spot... But no one's there.
想要借「秩序」来实现自己私欲的，往往没法掀起太大的波澜。真正可怕的，是那些自以为在救赎世人的家伙。
If these people are using Order to achieve their own desires, then they can never amount to anything. The truly scary ones are those who think they are saving the world.
他们把自己的一切恶行标榜为正义，以至于能与「同谐」的愿景几乎混为一谈。
They label all of their evil deeds as justice and start believing it is basically the same as Harmony's vision.
稍有疏忽，不忠的种子就会在家族里生根发芽…要撕破他们的伪装，让他们露出丑恶的真面目，可不是个容易活。
If we aren't vigilant, the seeds of disloyalty will take root in The Family... Ripping off their disguise and exposing the truth of their wickedness is easier said than done, though.
他往这边看了——让你久等了，老同学，这是你要的苏乐达。
He's looking this way. Sorry to keep you waiting, dear classmate. Here's the SoulGlad you wanted.
黑爪女士一边递给你苏乐达，一边望向远方。她的嘴角扬起一丝不易察觉的笑意。
Lady Black Claw hands you the SoulGlad while gazing into the distance. A nearly imperceptible smile crosses her lips.
想要借「秩序」来实现自己私欲的，往往没法掀起太大的波澜。真正可怕的，是那些自以为在救赎世人的家伙。
If these people are using Order to achieve their own desires, then they can never amount to anything. The truly scary ones are those who think they are saving the world.
他们把自己的一切恶行标榜为正义，以至于能与「同谐」的愿景几乎混为一谈。
They label all of their evil deeds as justice and start believing it is basically the same as Harmony's vision.
稍有疏忽，不忠的种子就会在家族里生根发芽…要撕破他们的伪装，让他们露出丑恶的真面目，可不是个容易活。
If we aren't vigilant, the seeds of disloyalty will take root in The Family... Ripping off their disguise and exposing the truth of their wickedness is easier said than done, though.
不过…等抓了最后这只老鼠，暂时应该能清净一阵子了，呵呵。
But... once I catch the very last rat, everything should stay clean for a while, hehe.
你是偷偷溜进来的宾客？怎样，实物比参观手册上的厉害多了吧！
Did you sneak in here? Well, what do you think? The real thing is much more impressive than what you see in the manual, right?
这里不仅是匹诺康尼最著名的地标性建筑，在梦境的发展历史中也有着重要地位。
Not only is this place Penacony's most iconic architectural landmark, but it also has an important place in the history of the Dreamscape's development.
哪怕是美梦剧团的广告牌，谈到它时也会骄傲地亮起灯来——能来大剧院一趟，也算是我的梦想。
Even the Sweet Dreams Troupe's billboard lights up when it talks about this building. Visiting the Grand Theater is basically my dream come.
哎呀，如果不是大剧院需要维修，我恐怕连走进那扇门都做不到。如此华贵的场所，和我完全是两个世界的造物。
Well, if it weren't for the fact that the Grand Theater needs renovating, I don't think I could even get through the door. An opulent place like this exists in an entirely different world from me.
这样宏伟的地方，里面居然也有我出的一份力，想想就觉得开心。
Just the thought of contributing to a place as magnificent as this makes me so happy.
只可惜，不能在这里一直待到正式演出。每次开演，我都会远远地站在外面看着。
It's just a shame that I can't stay here to see an official performance. I always stand somewhere outside and look at the theater every time a show is on.
有时我能听到一些声响，虽然不知道是哪儿发出的，但我想，那一定就是演奏的余音……
Sometimes, I can hear some sounds. I don't know where they are coming from, but I imagine that they must be the reverberations of the performance...
对了，你有看过歌剧院的演出吗？
Say, have you seen a show in the Grand Theater before?
真可惜，我还说问问你的感受。
That's a shame. I was just about to ask your thoughts about the shows here.
真羡慕，你一定是位了不得的大人物。
Jealous! You must be someone very important.
I put on a big show here once.
哇塞！你原来是明星，真是太了不起了！
Whoa! So you are a star! That's incredible!
演出啊，会有些什么呢？是像梦泡电影那样？还是说有比流行曲目好听一百倍的歌？还是…总而言之，应该是我完全想象不出来的美梦吧。
What kind of show? Something like a dream bubble movie? Or some song that's a hundred times better than regular pop music? Or... Anyway, it must be some dream that I couldn't even begin to imagine.
隐夜鸫的工头说了，只要努力工作，总有一天我也能以宾客而非修理工的身份走进来。
The supervisor from Nightingale told me that if I worked hard, the day would come when I could be here as a guest and not someone doing construction.
一想到工友们纷纷向我投来敬佩和艳羡的目光，就连干活都比平时更有力气了。
When I think about the looks of admiration and envy my fellow workers would give me, I find myself feeling more upbeat about my work than usual.
Want to talk for a bit?
好呀，只是我这人没什么见识，希望不会让你无聊。
Okay, but I don't really know much about anything. I hope you won't get bored.
我住在公司提供的集体宿舍里，和几个室友挤在一起，但她们人都很好，每天我们都一起到「黎明的时刻」上班。
I live with a few people in a cramped dorm room provided by the IPC. They're all nice though. We go to the Moment of Daybreak for work every day.
入梦后，我们就会陆陆续续收到客户的单子，有时是单独给一些店铺做维修，有时是一起去填补大工程的空缺。

After we enter the Dreamscape, we'll receive orders from customers. Sometimes, it'll be a solo task to do maintenance on some shops. Other times, we'll need to work together to fill in the gap of a large project.
维修工作经常因为意外情况加班，所以我一般会订一份速食营养餐，去现实吃掉就立马回来。

Maintenance work often requires working overtime because something comes up, so I typically will order some kind of healthy fast food meal that I'll eat quickly in the real world, then rush back to work.
这么想来，我生活的地方其实是梦境，现实只是维持生命的餐厅而已。
Now that I think of it, I pretty much live my life in the Dreamscape. Reality is just a restaurant where I eat to keep my body alive.
不过这不也挺好吗？干的活越多，钱就越多，离梦想就越近。
But that's not bad, no? The more work I have, the more money I make, and the more money I make, the closer I am to achieving my dreams.
I want to become a rich patron of this theater!
嘿嘿，很庸俗吧？可有钱真的能做到好多事，不是吗？
Hehe. Too basic, right? But really, there's so much you can do if you have money, you know?
把想去的地方全逛个遍，带爸妈到匹诺康尼最好的餐馆吃一顿，给室友每人带件礼物，买几束花放在床头，还有好多还没想到的。

Go to all the places I want, take my parents to the best restaurant in Penacony, give all my roommates presents, buy some flowers to put at my bedside, and so many other things I haven't thought of yet.
最后，像个上流人士一样走进大剧院，美美地享受一场演出。
Last but not least, I would be an upper-class person and waltz into the Grand Theater to enjoy a performance.
怎样，是不是你听着也开始羡慕了？
Just listening to me must have you feeling envious, right?
在我还是学生的时候，很喜欢捏梦泡。
I used to love making dream bubbles when I was a student.
因为脑子里有许许多多的梦想都没法实现，所以只能自己做几个梦泡出来，满足一下那些异想天开的愿望。
I had all these dreams floating around in my head that I was never going to fulfill, so all I could do was make some dream bubbles to satisfy my unrealistic visions.
比如，我做过一艘超光速飞船，想要像电影里的驾驶员那样，享受在宇宙里高速航行的快乐。
Like how I had this dream of making a faster-than-light spaceship and being one of those pilots you see in the movies. I'd get to enjoy flying around the universe at blinding speeds.
可是，我只看过电影，飞船以外的细节完全做不出来。所以入梦之后，我就只能在船舱里孤零零地飘着，一直飘到梦醒。
But I had only seen the movies, so I couldn't think of any details other than the ship. Once I entered the dream, all I could do was float around by myself inside the ship until I woke up.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
呃…原来宾客们都这么开放的吗？
Uh... Are all the guests this open-minded?
我…我个人在这方面还是保守派，所以…那个…对不起，不可以的！
I... I'm a bit conservative when it comes to that sort of thing. So... umm... sorry! No can do!
真好，离开以后，你一定会遇上很多有趣的事情吧。
Great. You'll have all sorts of interesting things happen after you leave.
不过我会追上来的，勤奋是逐梦客成功的唯一道路，一直走下去，幸福总会到来。
But I'll catch up to you. Working hard is the only path to success for a Dreamchaser. Happiness will find you if you just keep going.
到时候，我要你也好好地崇拜我一下。
When the time comes, I want you to adore me.
欧利马笑呵呵地擦了把汗，疲惫的身体里，又被振奋地挤出几分活力。
Olma wiped off a bit of sweat as she giggled. The excitement allowed her tired body to squeeze out just a bit more energy.
名为梦想的神，一如往常地，用手掌捂住了她的双眼。
The goddess known as Dream covers her eyes with her hands as she always does.
省吃俭用，辛勤劳动，成功就在我的前方招手。
If I live frugally and work hard, success will be just around the corner.
知道吗？我的工资又涨了5％！平均下来，每天多到手的钱可以买三瓶苏乐达！
Did I tell you? My pay went up by 5%! That means with the extra money I get every day, I can basically buy three bottles of SoulGlad!
维修工这份活计虽然很累，但只要肯对自己狠下心来，比起许多看似体面的工作，收入要可观得多。而且我们没有团建！

Doing repair work is tough stuff, but if you are willing to be tough on yourself, the pay can be way better than jobs that seem like they'd be more respectable. On top of that, we don't have team-building activities!
很多人都喜欢做白日梦，如果自己出生在更富裕的家庭会怎样，可也就是想想而已。不够努力才是他们没钱的原因。

Lots of people like to daydream. They'll think about what life would be like if only they had been born into a richer family, but that's just empty thinking. The reason they don't have money is that they aren't working hard enough.
但我可以亲手改变自己的生活，只要踏实肯干，就像那些盛会巨星，名不见经传的小人物也可以成为闻名世界的大商人。
But I can change my life with my own two hands. I just need to be down-to-earth and work hard, just like the Festive Superstars. An unknown figure can become a world-famous businessperson.
哎，这么多钱，要怎么花才好呢。
Ah, this is a lot of money. How should I spend it?
乌云压顶般的阴霾骤然将欧利马的双瞳笼罩，她试图压抑身体的颤抖，但并不成功。
Olma's eyes cloud over with a sudden gloominess. She tries to suppress her body's trembling to no avail.
如果现在只有她一个人，你怀疑她甚至会直接瘫下来。
You suspect that if she were by herself, she would be falling to the floor.
未来该怎么办啊，现在这种日子，完全看不到头。
What am I going to do in the future? With how things are now, I can't see where it's all going.
唉…每天除了干活就是干活，可存款却不怎么见长。入职的时候，项目经理明明告诉我，只要多干几年，什么都会有的，可这都多少年了？

Ah... I just work day in and day out, but I'm not seeing my savings grow. When I first started my job, the boss told me anything could happen if I just worked harder for a few years. How many years have I been at it?
爸妈都说我这工作没有前途，可我还能去干什么？白日梦的前台也不招皮皮西呀。
My parents told me that my job has no career advancement prospects, but what else can I do? The front desk of The Reverie isn't going to hire a Pepeshi.
前段时间生病去医院走了一遭，好不容易屯的钱一下子又没了不少，天天这么干哪可能不生病，完全就是个无底洞。
I got sick a while back and went to the hospital. All the money I worked so hard to get went down the drain. How can I not get sick when I work this hard every day? It's a vicious cycle.
照现在这样子过下去，不吃不喝干上五百年，也赶不上人家开到剧院门口的一辆车。
If I keep going the way I have, even if I don't eat or drink for five hundred years, I still wouldn't be able to afford the kind of car people are driving up to the main door of the theater.
这日子过得就像在推一块石头，每次推上山，就会带着你滚回低谷，我真的快撑不下去了。
Each day feels like I'm pushing a massive boulder, and every time I reach the top of the mountain, it pushes me back down the valley. I really can't do this anymore.
欧利马的委屈涌上心头，愤怒的情绪重新泵入欧利马的血管，仿佛下一刻就会嘭地炸开。
Olma's grievances well up in her heart, and anger pumps into her blood vessels once again. She seems like she might explode.
多年来受的委屈，在骗局里持续的生活，这些东西止不住地在她的脑子里打转。
All of the wrongs she had endured over the years and the life she continued to lead in a scam, none of that could stop her mind from spinning.
我想通了…什么用辛苦创造财富，其实、其实都是假的！骗人的！
I've figured it out... All this talk of working hard to create wealth is actually nothing more than a fantasy! It's a scam!
设备损坏要自己花钱修，员工宿舍要租金，就连入梦池污染都要我们赔钱，你干脆让我把公司买下来得了。

If we break any equipment, we've got to pay for it ourselves. We've got to pay rent to live in the employee dorms. We've even got to pay compensation for pollution when entering the Dreampool. With all of that, you might as well let me buy the company.
那些高高在上的家伙有把我们当作人吗？我们只是齿轮和零件！损耗了就扔掉。工厂零件还要定期花钱保养呢。
Do the higher-ups even see us as people? We're nothing more than cogs and gears! We're easily replaceable. Even factory components require maintenance.
我猜，他们巴不得把我的心、我的肝和肺全都拿走，摆在橱窗里卖掉。
I suppose they can't wait to take my heart, my liver, and my lungs and put them on display to sell them.
然后，再把卖掉的钱拿走九分，将吃剩的残渣施舍给我，美其名曰赏赐。
And then, they'll run off with most of the money and give me the scraps that remain as a "reward."
这就是匹诺康尼所谓的美梦！
That's the Penaconian Dream for you!
真是越想越气，这苏乐达我是喝不下去了，送给你算了。
I feel furious just thinking about it. I can't keep drinking this SoulGlad. You take it.
设备损坏要自己花钱修，员工宿舍要租金，就连入梦池污染都要我们赔钱，你干脆让我把公司买下来得了。

If we break any equipment, we've got to pay for it ourselves. We've got to pay rent to live in the employee dorms. We've even got to pay compensation for pollution when entering the Dreampool. With all of that, you might as well let me buy the company.
那些高高在上的家伙有把我们当作人吗？我们只是齿轮和零件！损耗了就扔掉。工厂零件还要定期花钱保养呢。
Do the higher-ups even see us as people? We're nothing more than cogs and gears! We're easily replaceable. Even factory components require maintenance.
我猜，他们巴不得把我的心、我的肝和肺全都拿走，摆在橱窗里卖掉。
I suppose they can't wait to take my heart, my liver, and my lungs and put them on display to sell them.
然后，再把卖掉的钱拿走九分，将吃剩的残渣施舍给我，美其名曰赏赐——这就是匹诺康尼所谓的美梦！
And then, they'll run off with most of the money and give me the scraps that remain as a "reward." That's the Penaconian Dream!
欧利马叹了口气，不知道该露出什么表情，最终还是停留在一丝浅浅的微笑上。
Olma sighs. She seems uncertain about what expression to make and just holds the faintest of smiles.
此刻，你眼前的人似乎一下子老了几十岁，深沉而无奈。
Just at that moment, the person in front of you seems to have aged several decades. It's as if she were sinking deeper and helpless.
虽然生活的现状不佳，但，走一步算一步吧。
My life might not be great at the moment, but a step forward is still a step forward, I guess.
工作这事，无非也就是一种买卖，我出力，老板出钱。但老板有选择的权力，我没有，所以只能遵守他制定的交易规则。

Work is all a matter of buying and selling. I put in the effort; the boss puts in the money. The difference between us is that the boss has the right to choose, while I don't. All I can do is abide by the rules he sets for exchanging my work for money.
平心而论，以我的现状，想要成为那种能够自由进出大剧院的宾客，多半不现实。可整个匹诺康尼又有多少人是这样的宾客呢？

To be fair, becoming the kind of person who can freely enter the Grand Theater as a guest is pretty unfeasible based on my current circumstances. I wonder how many people in Penacony are able to walk right into this theater?
酒店前台，商店服务员，猎犬的警卫，其实大家的生活都是平凡普通的。盲目追求所谓的有钱，只会迷失自我，被老板画的饼骗到。

Attendants at hotels, clerks working in stores, Bloodhound guards, all of us lead average lives. Blindly chasing after the goal of being wealthy will just cause us to lose ourselves. We'll be duped by the pie our bosses draw for us.
我现在意识到，比起一味的攒钱，适当地做一些改善生活的事情要重要得多。
I've come to realize that doing things to improve our lives is more important than blindly making money.
多关心关心自己的身体健康，抽空回去看看爸妈，到公园里去躺着发会儿呆，再去海边弄点薯条。听起来不错吧？
Things like being mindful of your health, taking time to see your parents, stretching out at a park to space out for a while, or enjoying some fries on the beach. That all sounds pretty good, right?
我开始怀念昨日品尝到的佳酿了——冽如清溪、甘如花蜜，就好似流动的黄金、凝固的日色……
I'm starting to miss the fragrant brew I tasted yesterday — cool as a fresh stream, and that honeyed liquid was akin to molten gold or the color of the sun itself...
这乏味的工作属实枯燥，今天该怎么打发时间呢…嗯？
This mundane job is too boring. How should I spend my time today... Eh?
瞧瞧，这鬼地方竟来了位如此可爱的客人…有什么我能为你做的吗，亲爱的？
Oh look, such a lovely-looking customer in such a forsaken place... What can I do for you, darling?
合理利用工作时间，调整个人办公状态…直白点说，就是忙里偷闲、无聊消遣。
To astutely utilize my work hours and organize my own work attitude... Or more bluntly, to find time to slack off at work and relieve my boredom, darling.
哦~我无意冒犯。很抱歉，我惯常如此，或许你可以将其视作某种表达友好的方式。
Ooh, I didn't mean to offend. I apologize. It's just a force of habit. You can just take it as my way of a friendly greeting.
你说话的方式有点瘆人…
The way you talk is a bit creepy...
哈哈…抱歉，比起建筑，我更崇尚诗词之美，言语也难免受其影响，请你见谅。
Haha... I apologize. I much prefer to revel in the beauty of poetry than architecture, and my speech may have been affected as well. Please forgive me.
那么，请容我贸然询问，你前来此地，是否怀有某种目的……
Now then, if you don't mind my asking: Do you perhaps have a motive for coming to this place...
别担心，我无意打探你的秘密，只是假如你此刻并不匆忙，请让我占用些许时光，为你带来一份乐事——
Don't worry, I do not mean to pry into your secrets. It's just that — if you're not too busy — I would ask that you lend me some of your time to bring you an item of pleasure...
瞧！这是我根据球笼竞速发明的改良型飞行棋，规则简单易懂……
Look! This is a modified version of Aero-Chess I invented based off the Spheroid Races. The rules are easy to understand...
男人用某种令人无法拒绝的语气介绍着他的小游戏，你出于好奇，决定尝试一下……
In a tone that prevents one from refusing his request, the man introduces his fun little game. Out of sheer curiosity, you decide to try it...
一局结束，你意犹未尽地抬起头，发现竟已过去了三个系统时。
You finish a round, and when you raise your head, you are flabbergasted: Three system hours have passed.
真是位可敬的对手——托你的福，亲爱的，我度过了非常有意义的一天。
You are truly a worthy opponent. My day has been meaningfully spent thanks to you, darling.
虽然我也想继续与你在棋盘上角逐厮杀，但非常可惜，下班时间已经到了。
I would like to continue our intense clashes on the board, but alas, it is time for me to punch the clock.
但请别沮丧，我最近会时常流连于剧院，直到那些不可爱的「瑕疵」被修补完毕。
But do not despair — I will frequent the theater these days, till those unlovely "flaws" are fixed.
倘若你仍想继续我们的战局，明日我依旧恭候于此。
If you wish to continue our battle, I will be waiting for you here tomorrow.
又或者…倘若你企盼新鲜的乐趣，我也可以为你献上更多惊喜。
Or perhaps... if you wish for more refreshingly fun times, I have more surprises in store for you.
Are you up for a chat?
当然可以，亲爱的。如果是你的话，我将很乐意献上宝贵的下班时间。
Of course you can, darling. I'd be more than willing to spend my precious off-hours with you.
我啊…我是隐夜鸫群中的无名小鸟，一位无足轻重的仆从、家族肆意驱使的家佣。
Me...? I'm just a nobody in the Nightingale Family. An insignificant servant, an attendant bound to the every whim of The Family.
我受命而来，打扫老爷夫人们打碎的花瓶、修理少爷小姐们弄坏的玩具。
I was instructed to come here and clean up the vases that the masters and mistresses broke, and to fix the toys damaged by the young masters and misses.
瞧瞧这娃娃房、瞧瞧这大剧院，被人搞得破破烂烂——就像是有人在此同星神打了一场！
Just look at this child's room, and this giant theater — it's been ruined. It's as if someone had an epic battle with an Aeon in here!
这么消极怠工没问题吗？
You sure it's all right to be so indolent with your work?
多谢你的关心，亲爱的。但那些老爷们向来只看结果，不关心过程。
Thank you for your concern, darling, but all those old geezers care about are results, and not how they are met.
要是他们哪天突发奇想，亲自跑来监工，那可就再好不过啦。我可是巴不得有人来接手这烂摊子……
If they suddenly decided to show up on a whim to check in on my progress, that would be even more wonderful. I can't wait to palm this horrid job off to someone else...
当然——前提是他们当真能找到合适的人来接手。
Of course, that is if they could ever find someone more accomplished to handle this job.
That's all the questions I have.
你要走了吗，亲爱的？真可惜，我还想多听听你那美妙的嗓音呢。
Leaving so soon, darling? What a pity, I was hoping to enjoy your mesmerizing voice a bit longer.
这可真是份甜蜜的叨扰，期待再次与你相见。
This chat was truly a sweet distraction. I do hope to see you again.
能再次见到你我很开心，亲爱的。
It's so nice to see you again, darling.
你的到来令我耳目皆新，能从这乏味单调的工作中寻得一丝慰藉。
Your mere presence has bequeathed me a sliver of comfort from the tedium of this job.
自从我那同样热爱诗歌的挚友不知所踪，我已许久未曾有过如此感受…说来我是否还未向你介绍过我的挚友——
Ever since my kindred friend — an avid compatriot of poetry like me — disappeared, I have not felt this way for a long time... Speaking of which, I haven't introduced that bosom friend of mine...
我们总是形影不离、总是共同在诗歌与雕塑的美中遨游；我们无所不谈，契合如同灵魂的侣伴，直到……
We were thick as thieves, meandering through the splendor of poetry and sculptures together. There was nothing we would not talk about, as if our spirits were in perfect synch, until...
我虽尚无法知晓「死亡」的真相究竟如何，但总有一天，我们终会回到彼此身边。
I may not know the truth behind "Death," but one day, we will return to each other's sides.
不过在那之前…要再来一局飞行棋吗？还是来尝试一下我最近研究出来的惊梦纸牌？
But before that... How about another round of Aero-Chess? Or would you like to have a go at my newly-discovered Dreamjolt Cards?
我倒是觉得，这梦境并无修缮的必要……
I rather think that this Dreamscape does not require any fixing...
我虽受命修缮此地，心中不免暗生惫怠。美梦往往令人乏味，混沌反而流光溢彩。
I may have been instructed to fix up this place, but tiresome darkness fills my heart. Dreams are often mundane, and chaos is just so much more colorful.
庭中蔷薇美则美矣，却不免怯懦、娇娇滴滴…倒不如教自由的继续自由，支离的愈发支离。
The roses in the yard are so gorgeous, yet so timid, so delicate and helpless... We might as well teach the free to continue to be free, and the splintered to become more fractured.
筑梦者当如诗人与英雄，将梦境化作不屈的意志、斗争的武器，而非多愁善感的欢歌、无病呻吟的愁绪。
Dreambuilders are like poets and heroes, turning Dreamscapes into weapons of combat with indomitable wills — not odes of sentimental joy, nor melancholic moans of obscurantism.
若有一天，我与世界作别，请勿陈鲜花于棺柩前，请为我呈上桂冠、甲胄与宝剑……
If the day would come when I would bid farewell to this world, do not offer fresh blooms before my casket, but a laurel crown, a chest of armor, and a sharp sword...
唉，看来你也是没有艺术灵光的腐朽之人——我的意思是工作太无聊了，丝毫没有浪漫的情调！
*sigh* It appears that you are also not one touched by the enlightenment of art. I meant that work is so boring, and devoid of any romantic ambience!
谁又能想到，美梦竟如此令人失望……
But who knew that Dreamscapes would be such a disappointment...
蠹虫…梦里梦外，无处不在——那是滔天洪水无法濯净的污浊，遍野烈焰无法燃尽的腐败。
Vermin... They're anywhere and everywhere, within and without dreams — it is a rot that cannot be cleansed by deluges, a corruption that cannot be extinguished by rampant wildfire.
我曾受邀为暴君筑碑、佞臣塑像，故得见如何人命草芥、荒谬荒唐。他们许我以万千金纸、无限荣光，而我自然当倾情以报、答此重赏——

I have been invited to erect monuments in honor of tyrants and sculpt statues for sycophants — I have witnessed both the absurdity of the world and the insignificance of human lives. They have bestowed me with countless riches and infinite glory, and naturally, I am honor-bound to return the favor and respond to these hefty rewards...
我以鸽血石为腐肉、羊脂玉作骸骨，以黄金铸魔鬼、白银造妖巫；腐黑曜为坏疽，败翡翠作流毒…这亲手打造的华庭，我将其命名为「审判的幻景」。

I used pigeon blood rubies as carrion, suet jade as bones, forged demons in gold, and created wights in silver. Putrid obsidian as gangrene, flawed jade as poison... This court built with my own hands, I will name it the "Illusion of Judgment."
而我为此付出了什么呢？不过是些微不足道的代价：他们谓我恶魔，将我流放，咒我颠沛流离，令我不得归乡。
And what have I paid for with this? A meager price not worth mentioning: They labeled me a devil, exiled me, cursed me with vagrancy, and forced me to never return to my hometown.
但彼时我心中尚存希望，相信世间必有自由的美梦、无垢的圣堂……
But now, hope sparks in my heart. I believe the world must have dreams of freedom, an untainted sanctuary...
你…我是说我渴望着一片能够自由创造艺术的天地，但那并不存在于星海，也不会存在于梦中！
You... I meant that I yearn for a haven where I can freely create art, but it won't exist in the stars, nor does it in dreams!
这里全都是庸俗的家伙——恕我冒昧，你也一样！
These are all riffraff here — pardon me if I may say so, but so are you!
男人的目光落在虚空，恬淡笑意中带着某种近乎神圣的喜悦。
The man's gaze falls upon the void, his indifferent smile radiating a certain, almost divine joy.
亲爱的，你可曾听说过「欧福里翁」？
Darling, have you heard of Euphorion?
那是颗崇高的星球，是自由的殿堂、是理想的黄金乡——
That is a sublime planet, a sanctum of freedom, a utopia of ideals...
那里的人们兼具智慧、美丽与勇气，他们生来典雅，因永不熄灭的宏愿而伟大。
The people there are erudite, beautiful, and brave. They are born elegant, and great in their inextinguishable ambition of grandeur.
那里不存在悲愁、不存在腐朽，那里繁星汇集、钟灵毓秀……
Neither sorrow nor decadence exist there. Myriad stars gather there, where talents and their brethren congregate...
只可惜…那星球已沉入虚无之海，足足一个琥珀纪之久，自此再无人有幸抵达那乌托邦的港口。
Alas... That planet is submerged in the boundless sea of Nihility — for an entire Amber Era, none have had the fortune of approaching this utopian harbor.
但我心中尚存希望…或许终有一日，我将泅渡那方混沌、潜入那片虚无，寻得那永恒的乐土……
But hope persists in my heart... Perhaps one day, I will traverse that chaos, dive into that void, and find that eternal paradise...
呵呵，我是想说——我总有一天会找到那里，哪怕永远被困在虚无的黑暗，也比困在盲目庸俗的世界中要好。
Heh-heh, what I meant was that I will one day find that place. Even if I am eternally trapped in that dark void, it is still better than being trapped in this blind, uncouth world.
准备好了吗，朋友们？那么，布莱茨，从你开始……
Everybody ready? Alright, Blite, you're up first...
嗯，不错、不错…就是这样，太美妙了！…哦，不，不不不！施托赫森，你在做什么？！这里不该是渐强的！……
Hmm, not bad, not bad... That's it, then. Wonderful! ... Er, no no no! Storsen, what are you doing? It's not time for the crescendo yet!
天啊，洛莲！你又为什么要发出那种声音？请注意我的手势！…哎，算了算了，今天就到这里吧！我们改日再排练。
Ack, Lorraine! Why are you making that noise again? Please, pay attention to my conducting! ... *sigh* Enough, forget about it. That's all for today! We'll rehearse again another day.
这位高贵的指挥家似乎正在自言自语…看起来可真古怪。
This haughty conductor seems to be talking to himself... What a weirdo.
…自言自语？不不不，我只是在…和家人们排练。
...Talking to myself? No no no, I was just... rehearsing with my family members.
一个人？哈哈，不不不…我只是在和家人们排练。
Alone? Haha, no no no... I was rehearsing together with my family members.
没想到大剧院里还能听脱口秀。
I didn't expect to find stand-up comedy in the Grand Theater.
脱口秀？！不，这可是为了「谐乐大典」而生的谐乐，不是那种，呃…不太严肃的艺术表现形式。
Stand-up comedy? No, this is just a piece for the Charmony Festival. Not like that, er... less serious form of art.
你呢，朋友？据我所知，现在的大剧院可不是寻常游客能随意出入的地方。
And you, friend? As I understand it, the Grand Theater doesn't just let in any ordinary tourists for a visit these days.
{NICKNAME}? Don't tell me you're the one with the Astral Express...
I'm part of the Astral Express's crew.
哦，哦！我知道了，你是说《银河球棒侠传说》的主人公吧。看你这身打扮……
Oh! I get it. You mean the main hero from the Legend of the Galactic Baseballer. Judging by how you're all dressed up...
…失敬失敬。各位的事迹我听说了，感谢你们让我离谐乐大典的舞台更进一步。
...Excuse me. I've heard about your deeds. Thank you for bringing me one step closer to center stage at the Charmony Festival.
我可以请教一些问题吗？
May I please ask you a few questions?
当然！各位可是我的大恩人哪。
Certainly! You are all benefactors of mine.
When exactly did I become your benefactor?
哈哈，这当然是因为你们搞定了「谐乐大典」原定的调弦师啦。
Haha, of course it's when you sorted out the original Chordmaster for the Charmony Festival.
至于发生了什么，想必你比我更清楚。鸢尾花家系现在正在重新选拔调弦师…虽然他们都觉得知更鸟小姐还会重返舞台，但我不这么认为。

You know better than I do as to what happened. The Iris Family is now auditioning for another Chordmaster... and despite them all thinking Miss Robin is ready to make a return to the stage, I beg to differ.
要登上「谐乐大典」舞台的只可能是我——我已经梦见神主不止一次了，祂说我迟早会成为调弦师，成为众望所归……

The only one who can mount the stage at the Charmony Festival is me — the Great One has visited me in my dreams more than once to tell me that sooner or later I am going to be a Chordmaster beloved by the masses...
…现在是时候了——我再也不用私下去琴房兼职调弦了——经此一役，我即将走上人生巅峰！
...And now it's time — I won't have to moonlight in secret anymore at the piano shop. After this, I'm going to climb to the pinnacle of success!
想请你介绍一下「谐乐大典」。
Can you tell me about the Charmony Festival?
「谐乐大典」？你就简单理解为我们的一种「祈愿」仪式吧。
The Charmony Festival? You can just think of it as a kind of "prayer" ceremony for us.
家族在银河各地的分家都会不定期举行类似的仪式，规模也各不相同。据我所知，匹诺康尼的谐乐大典应该是各大分家里最隆重的，因此一纪里只会举办一次。

The Family holds similar ceremonies of differing sizes every now and then across the various branches spread throughout the Cosmos. As far as I know, Penacony's Charmony Festival is the most prestigious of The Family's, and so it's only staged once every Amber Era.
在谐乐大典上，我们为同一种梦想祈愿，对同一种愿景祷告。以理想凝聚集群，「众赞之弦」便会降临，响应我们的愿望，赐给我们无上的极乐……

During the Charmony Festival, we pray for a common dream and for a common vision. Brought together under the same ideals, the "Harmony of Praise" will arrive, answering our prayers and granting supreme bliss...
…当然，这只是通常情况。如果是「无限夫长」阿伊里涅夫响应召唤，那有人可要吃苦头了。
...Of course, that's just how it usually happens. If it's Aelenev, the Eternal Centurion, who answers the call, then someone is going to get punished.
他只会出现在家族守护家人的战争中，将众家人团结为一支同调的军队。被他消灭的人也会被同化，成为我们的一员——从某种角度来说，也算是好处吧，哈哈。
He only shows up for The Family's wars, uniting them into a cohesive force — and everyone he destroys ends up getting assimilated, becoming one of us. In many ways, it's a good thing, haha.
你的幻想家人是怎么回事？
What's the deal with your little imaginary family members, then?
幻想家人？这种说法可有点冒犯了：布莱茨、施托赫森、洛莲他们只是自愿放弃了肉身而已——他们可是「托斯卡尼乐团」不可或缺的家人！
Imaginary family? That's offensive to Blite, Storsen, and Lorraine, who all volunteered to give up their bodies — they're all indispensable family members of the Toskani Orchestra!
They volunteered to give up their own bodies?
嗐，表情别太难看，朋友，事情不是你想象的那样。
Hey, don't look so distraught. It's not as bad as you think.
「自愿放弃肉身」可是第Ⅶ音级的家人们梦寐以求的*特权*。他们初入家族，虽然能感受到其他家人的情绪和集群之声的模糊指引，但也只是浅尝辄止。

"Voluntary body abandonment" is a special privilege that scale degree VII Family members can only dream of. When they first enter The Family, they can sense the emotions and hear the vague guidance of other Family members, but it's all just superficial.
跨越了最初的{RUBY_B#「情绪的同谐」}第Ⅶ音级{RUBY_E#}，我们才有机会与集群之声融为一体…而且可不是说融合就融合——只有通过选拔的家人才能享受这种福利。

Only after the first {RUBY_B#"Emotional Harmony"}scale degree VII{RUBY_E#} do we get the chance to merge with the other Family voices... and not just anyone gets to merge — only those selected Family members are able to enjoy this privilege.
所以，你懂吗？我的意思是…虽然神主谱写的每个音符都同样重要，但有的音符比其他音符更重要…我是说，更*同谐*，哈哈。

So then, do you get it? What I mean is... despite every note being created with equal importance by the Great One, in actual fact some notes are more important than others... I'm saying, some of them are more Harmonious, haha.
没错，托斯卡尼就是我——我是这个乐团的总指挥。
That's right. I'm Toskani — and I'm the conductor of this orchestra.
我们乐团总共有<unbreak>72</unbreak>位成员，算上我。布莱茨是我们的第一小提琴，施托赫森是首席双簧管，洛莲负责竖琴。
We have <unbreak>72</unbreak> members in our orchestra, including me. Blite sits as our first violin, Storsen is our first oboe, and Lorraine is our harpist.
我们基本都是处于{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人，能够与其他成员通过「共鸣」来传递信息，清晰理解集群之声呼唤。而为了更好地团结在一起…我们合而为一了。

We are basically Family members of {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"}scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} who can communicate with each other using "resonance" to transfer information and understand clearly the calls of The Family voices. And to show better solidarity with one another... we decided to unite as one.
噢，别客气！为外人宣扬家族的谐乐是我的使命，你可以尽情提问。
Oh, you're welcome! Promoting The Family's harmony to others is my mission, so ask away about anything you'd like.
Let's end the chat here, then.
噢，就这样了？好吧，但如果你还有疑问，我随时可以效劳。
Oh, is that so? Fine, but if you have any other questions, I'm available any time to help.
再见，恩人！我也要专心准备…呃，「谐乐大典」了。
Goodbye, o patron! I have to focus on getting ready too for... er, the Charmony Festival.
托斯卡尼对着空气念念有词，满脸都是断定自己即将走上人生巅峰的喜悦。
Toskani mutters a few words to himself, ecstatic in the belief that he is about to reach the zenith of his life.
天助我也，天助我也！都说星穹列车热心肠，这回总算是让我见识到了！
The Great One blesses me! Everyone knows how kind-hearted the crew is, and now I get to witness it myself.
朋友们，你们也很开心吧？我们马上就能登上「谐乐大典」的舞台啦！
Friends, are you all happy too? We'll soon be center-stage at the Charmony Festival!
嗨，我们又见面了，托斯卡尼乐团的大救星！我们正在加紧排练呢——选拔在即，可不能辜负了你们的好意！
Hey, it's the savior of the Toskani Orchestra! We meet again. We're knee-deep in rehearsals — auditions are coming up, and there's no way we're going to let you down!
你知道吗？如果不是你们出手干预谐乐大典，像我们这种只有{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人根本没可能登上剧院舞台。

Do you know that if you hadn't stepped in to help with the Charmony Festival, Family members like us with only {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"}scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} would have no hope of making it on stage?
我和乐团商量了一下，觉得无论如何都得报答各位。可惜我们只是个不入流的小乐团，没法准备太昂贵的礼品……

I've chatted this over with the orchestra, and feel like we have to repay you no matter what happens. But unfortunately, we're only a small group of amateurs, so we couldn't get you anything expensive...
这、这是我最喜欢的匹诺康尼小吃，一周才能吃上一次的那种——一点心意，还请你笑纳！
This here is my favorite local snack here in Penacony, the kind of treat I only splash out for once a week — just a little token of thanks for you!
嗨，我们又见面了，托斯卡尼乐团的大救星！如果不是你们出手干预谐乐大典，像我们这种只有{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人根本没可能登上剧院舞台。

Hey, it's the savior of the Toskani Orchestra! We meet again. Do you know that if you hadn't stepped in to help with the Charmony Festival, Family members like us with only {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"} scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} would have no hope of making it on stage?
我们正在加紧排练呢——选拔在即，可不能辜负了你们的好意！
We're knee-deep in rehearsals — auditions are coming up, and there's no way we're going to let you down!
朋友们，我们要不还是别白费力气了……
Friends, how about we stop wasting our energy...
皮皮西指挥家看起来有些落寞。
The Pepeshi conductor looked a little defeated.
哎…虽然说这次「谐乐大典」出了大乱子，可这么隆重的典礼，哪里轮得到我们这种第Ⅵ音级的小虾米露面？
*sigh*... Despite all the mess with this year's Charmony Festival, such a grand ceremony as that should make no space for small fries like us at scale degree VI, right?
知更鸟小姐，那位银河巨星，你认识吧？听说她是第Ⅴ音级的家族成员…不过只比我们高一级，但她和我们已经完全是两个世界的人了。

Miss Robin, do you know that cosmic superstar over there? I heard she's a scale degree V Family member... that may only be one step above us, but she may as well have come from a completely different world.
五线谱上，第一线到第五线充其量也只有一根指头的距离。但落到现实里，哪怕再让我们多活几辈子，那也弥补不了音符与音符之间的差距。

On a musical stave, the distance between the first and the fifth lines is no more than a finger's width at most. But in real life — even if we lived out a few more lives — it still wouldn't be enough to contain the gaps between the notes.
说老实话，我们乐团里的大部分人都有点泄气了…可出路又在哪里？我们也说不清。
To be honest, most of us in the orchestra have started to lose faith... But how can we pivot? We aren't sure.
如果还是走老路，搞那些传统谐乐，我们是绝对出不了头的！
If we continue down the old path and keep doing all that traditional music, we'll never be able to make it!
给我燥起来！——<size=28>「我们要用生命燃烧下去，点燃孤独的白矮星！」</size>
Let's mosh! — <size=28>"We'll burn with our life, 'cause the white star needs a spark to ignite!"</size>
听我说，朋友们！还记得我们的梦想吗？我们要在「谐乐大典」的舞台上留下让世人永远传唱的旋律！
Listen up, friends! Remember our dream? We're going to rock a melody on the Charmony Festival stage that'll make the whole world sing!
我们不能继续走老路了！机会只有一次，我们必须唱出风格，唱出水平，给鸢尾花家系那帮*古典名家*一点小小的现代震撼！
We can't keep going on like this! You only get one shot, and we have to use our style and our talent to rock that fusty old classical Iris Family a rockin' good shock!
想想爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ，想想咱们的主推！想想大卫，想想戴夫，想想席德，想想博纳姆！
Think of Emerald-III, and think of all our top picks! Think of David, think of Daeve, think of Sid, and think of Bonham!
他们面对红巨星的时候怂了吗？没有，那咱们也不能怂！鸢尾花的评委毁灭不了一整个星系…他们连根毛都算不上！
Were they scared when they faced down the superstar? No — so neither should we! The Iris Family judges can't destroy an entire star system... They're small fry.
让他们看看新时代*交响摇滚*的厉害，让他们好好感受感受《廉价救赎》的含金量！都给我摇起来，燥起来，跟我一起唱——
Let's show them the power of modern orchestral rock and prove the worth of Cheap Salvation! Let's get rock and rollin' — everybody sing along with me now...
<size=28>「懦夫只会向外逃去，口中却嚷着救赎之名——喔哦哦哦！」</size>
<size=28>"Only cowards flee while shouting the name of the redeemer — oh-yeah-yeah!"</size>
我们不能继续走老路了！机会只有一次，我们必须唱出风格，唱出水平，给鸢尾花家系那帮*古典名家*一点小小的现代震撼！
We can't keep going on like this! You only get one shot, and we have to use our style and our talent to rock that fusty old classical Iris Family a rockin' good shock!
想想爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ，想想咱们的主推！想想大卫，想想戴夫，想想席德，想想博纳姆！
Think of Emerald-III, and think of all our top picks! Think of David, think of Daeve, think of Sid, and think of Bonham!
他们面对红巨星的时候怂了吗？没有，那咱们也不能怂！鸢尾花的评委毁灭不了一整个星系…他们连根毛都算不上！
Were they scared when they faced down the superstar? No — so neither should we! The Iris Family judges can't destroy an entire star system... They're small fry.
让他们看看新时代*交响摇滚*的厉害，让他们好好感受感受《廉价救赎》的含金量！都给我摇起来，燥起来！
Let's show them the power of modern orchestral rock and prove the worth of Cheap Salvation! Let's get rock and rollin'!
托斯卡尼乐团现在正在中场休息。你想聊聊吗？
The Toskani Orchestra is taking a breather right now. Do you want to have a chat?
嗯…这次排练效果不错。家人们，记住这种感觉，把它带到舞台上。
Mmm... well, today's rehearsal went great. Remember this feeling, my Family, and bring it with you onto the stage.
现在先休息一下吧。哦，对了，布莱茨，记得检查下你的琴——最后一句稍微有点跑调。
Now let's take a breather. Oh yeah — Blite, remember to get your piano checked. That last line was a little out of tune.
没事，问题不大，观众们听不出来…但你是艺术家，别辜负了你的琴和作品。
It's cool. No big deal. The audience won't be able to tell... But you're an artist, so you shouldn't be letting down your instrument and your work.
看看这个世界，简直是无聊透顶——
Just look at this world. It's so boring, through and through...
我无意针对任何人，但必须得说，会场里进行的那些挑战都极其愚蠢，毫无技巧可言。
I don't mean to criticize, but I have to say that all the challenges were so stupid that they barely took any skill.
什么「演技派」舞台，什么「枪火」的试炼，不过是用来填充流程的乏味环节，连打发时间都显得枯燥。
The "School of Acting" stage, the "Gunfire" trial... they're just boring fillers used to speed things up and make even killing time seem boring.
就拿我的故乡——朋克洛德来举例，那里曾举办过一场声势浩大的线下寻宝活动，完美融合了冒险游戏和现实谜题，可以称得上是完美的设计。
Take my homeworld for example: Punklorde. We once put on an enormous offline treasure hunt that perfectly integrated adventure gaming with real-life puzzles. The design was perfect.
你知道那次夺宝传奇的胜出者是谁吗？
Do you know who the winner of the great treasure hunt that day was?
呃。没关系，从你脸上的表情看得出来，你肯定很想知道。
Er, fine. That's okay. I can tell just by the look on your face that you'd love to know.
既然你如此好奇，就告诉你吧。实不相瞒，正是本人，朋克洛德的超级骇客——「石剑」！
Seeing as you're so curious, I'll tell you who. The truth is, it was none other than me — the super hacker of Punklorde — Stoneblade!
Are you up for a chat?
想说什么就赶快，超级骇客的时间比你想的还要值钱。
If you've got something to say, make it snappy. A hacker's time is worth far more than you think.
哼，好心提醒你，小灰毛，太过轻视眼前的人可是会吃苦头的。
Hmph, may I please remind you, Gray Hair, that you shouldn't insult people, or you might regret it.
整个匹诺康尼的通信网络都在我的掌控之中，想篡改你账户里的数据对我来说轻而易举——我的权能超乎你的想象，别逼我出手。

I have all of Penacony's communication network in the palm of my hand, and changing your account data is a piece of cake for someone like me — my powers are far greater than you could ever imagine. Don't force my hand.
不知好歹的家伙，必须给你点教训瞧瞧。
You just don't know what's best for you. Let's see how you like me teaching you a little lesson.
「石剑」伸手在你的眼前虚晃了下，忽然你的视野闪过了几缕华丽光彩。
Stoneblade lifts his hand up and does a flick. Suddenly, a glorious brilliance flashes before your eyes.
回去好好检查你的账户吧，别以为我站在这什么都没做，你就能平安无事。超级骇客的手段总是出乎普通人的想象。
Go back and check over your account. Don't think that you're safe and sound just because I'm standing here doing nothing. Most super hacks are usually beyond the comprehension of normies.
就算你没发现任何变化，你的数据中也已被埋下病毒，以后睡觉别睡太死。
Even if you don't notice any changes, your data's already been corrupted with a virus, so don't sleep too soundly in the future.
只能说，懂的都懂，不懂的——也没必要过多解释。
All I can say is, if you get it, you get it. There's nothing more to explain.
啥？你说什么？敢不敢再说一遍？！我超级骇客还从来没怕过谁！
Huh? What did you say? Just you try saying that again! I've never been afraid of anyone before in my life!
...Why, you! I'll make sure you never forget!
「石剑」伸手在你的眼前虚晃了下，忽然你的视野闪过了几缕华丽光彩。
Stoneblade lifts his hand up and does a flick. Suddenly, a glorious brilliance flashes before your eyes.
回去检查账户，要是信用点没有减少，我就自愿放弃朋克洛德的身份！别以为你可以在超级骇客的面前为所欲为！

Go back home and check your account. If you haven't lost any credits, I'll relinquish my Punklordian passport! Don't just think you can get away with doing whatever you want around a super hacker like me!
是我想的那个朋克洛德吗？
Is that the same Punklorde I think it is?
能培养出我这种超级骇客的星球，恐怕全宇宙都找不到第二个。
I doubt a super hacker such as me could ever hope to come from any other planet in the universe!
那是个堆满电子废料和快餐盒垃圾的地方，虚拟和现实的界限模糊到快要看不见，涂鸦填满了你能看见的所有墙壁——可到处都是乐趣和冒险。

It's a place that's filled with e-waste and used takeout packaging. The line between the real and the virtual is so blurry that it's almost invisible, and graffiti covers every wall as far as the eye can see — yet fun and adventure can be found absolutely everywhere.
我爱朋克洛德，同时我也无法抑制住心中快要喷涌而出的叛逆精神，所以才受家族邀请来到这里，帮助建设匹诺康尼。
I love Punklorde, but I can't contain the rebellious spirit that's always bursting up out of me — so I took up an invitation from The Family to come here and help build Penacony.
但现在，看看这乏味到令人昏睡的会场，或许是到了我该离开的时候了。
But when I look at this place now, it bores me to death. Maybe the time's come for me to leave.
哼，那你就走吧。冷漠不过是弱者用来自保的借口罢了。
Hmph, then go. Apathy is just an excuse the weak use to protect themselves.
我无意针对任何人，但必须得说，会场里进行的那些挑战都极其愚蠢，毫无技巧可言。
I don't mean to criticize, but I have to say that all the challenges were so stupid that they barely took any skill.
瞧瞧这些可笑的游艺设施，这也叫做挑战？我们朋克洛德的合家欢派对游戏比这有意思多了。
Just look at these ridiculous amusement facilities. Call that a challenge? Even the block parties on Punklorde are more fun than this.
我爱朋克洛德，同时我也无法抑制住心中快要喷涌而出的叛逆精神，所以才受家族邀请来到这里，帮助建设匹诺康尼。
I love Punklorde, but I can't contain the rebellious spirit that's always bursting up out of me — so I took up an invitation from The Family to come here and help build Penacony.
但现在，看看这乏味到令人昏睡的会场，或许是到了我该离开的时候了。
But when I look at this place now, it bores me to death. Maybe the time's come for me to leave.
那个时候啊，有个不知道天高地厚的银头发小姑娘跑来挑战我，哼，我稍微动了动手指，就把她的游戏账号全注销了！
Back then, there was a silver-haired girl who was full of herself who tried to challenge me. Hmph, with a swipe of one finger I just canceled all of her gaming accounts!
哈哈哈，当我成为超级骇客的时候，朋克洛德所有的论坛都回荡着我的名字。
Haha, when I first became a super hacker, my nickname shook the forums of Punklorde to the bone.
人们纷纷发送讯息，告知彼此这个重要的消息，内容只有简单的两个字——「「石剑」」！
Everyone was sending messages to each other about this important news, and they only needed to use one word: "Stoneblade"!
There's nothing on the internet more popular than copypasta.
哎，还没完。那个时候啊，有个不知道天高地厚的银头发小姑娘跑来挑战我，哼，我稍微动了动手指，就把她的游戏账号全注销了！
Ah, I'm not done. Back then, there was a silver-haired girl who was full of herself who tried to challenge me. Hmph, with a swipe of one finger I just cancelled all of her gaming accounts!
你是没见到，那个小姑娘又哭又闹的样子，太好玩了！记得她好像在公司的通缉名单上，名字叫做…银什么来着？银……
You never saw the way that girl cried and made a scene, it was just hilarious! I remember she had made IPC's most wanted list. What was her name again? Silver-something or Argo-something... Silver...
是叫这个吗？感觉不太对劲…反正她还黑进了过庇尔波因特的公司总部，声称要炸掉那里来着。
Was that the name? Doesn't sound right to me... Anyway, she hacked into Pier Point's HQ before and claimed she was going to blow the whole place up.
对对，就是这个银枝！她还单挑过塔伊兹育罗斯，打算成为「繁育」令使来着。
Ah yes, that's the one! Argenti! She also called out Tayzzyronth to try and become an Emanator of the Propagation.
对对，就是这个银河球棒侠！{F#她}{M#他}还潜入过星穹列车，打算要刺杀阿基维利来着。
Yes yes, it's this Galactic Baseballer! {F#She}{M#He} even infiltrated the Astral Express before, and plotted to assassinate Akivili.
总得让那些缺乏自知之明的人知道，超级骇客不是谁都能惹的！
When people are lacking in self-awareness, you gotta let them know not to mess with a super hacker!
我想离开这个无聊的地方，去更广阔的宇宙里冒险。我也想像这些选手一样，站在聚光灯下接受欢呼。但…那终究不是属于我的生活。

I want to leave this boring place and venture out into the wide open universe. I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.
还未等你有反应，「石剑」突然疯狂挥动起手臂来，于是你的视野里出现了一道绚丽的彩虹。
Before you get a chance to react, Stoneblade suddenly swings his arms around wildly. A brilliant rainbow materializes before your very eyes.
呜。其实…超级骇客的故事，都是骗你的。你不会生气吧？
*sob*... actually... all those stories about being a super hacker? They were lies. You're not mad at me, are you?
我只是热砂分会场的灯光控制员，平时的工作就是操作这些设备，给现场炒热气氛，致谢名单里都不会出现我的名字，所以才编造了那些经历。

I'm just the lighting controller at Scorchsand Hall. My work involves operating this equipment and warming up the crowd. You'd never find my name in the credits of anything, so I made all of those events up.
但我听一位朋克洛德宾客跟我讲过「石剑」这位骇客的故事。我羡慕他的自由不羁——所以在这个可以隐去身份的梦境，我借用了他的名字。

But I heard this story from a Punklordian guest about the great hacker Stoneblade, and I was jealous of that kind of unrestrained freedom — so I decided to borrow his name and use it here in this Dreamscape where one can become anonymous.
唉，我也想像站在聚光灯下，接受观众们的欢呼。但…那终究不是属于我的生活。
*sigh* I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on by the audience. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.
I loved the rainbow that you made.
So that bit about stealing the credits, too...
嗯…是骗你的。我能做到的，只有改变会场的光线而已。
Mmm... that was all a lie. All I'm good for is changing up the lighting at a venue.
这是我摸鱼时候研究出来的小技巧，可以通过体感来控制灯光。你看，顺时针挥手是渐暗，逆时针是渐亮……
This is a little trick I came up with while I was slacking off to control the lights by using hand motions. You see, waving clockwise dims the lights, while counterclockwise brings them up...
「石剑」抓着你絮絮叨叨地讲了好久操控技巧，看得出他确实在这方面很有心得。
Stoneblade grabs onto you and prattles a never ending spiel about his control panel skills. You can tell that he really does have experience when it comes to this.
呵呵，找个人说说话后感觉好多了…虽然改变不了什么，但还是谢谢你。
Haha, I feel so much better after talking with someone... even though nothing's actually changed: Thank you very much.
还未等你有反应，「石剑」突然疯狂挥动起手臂来，于是你的视野里出现了一道绚丽的彩虹。
Before you get a chance to react, Stoneblade suddenly swings his arms around wildly. A brilliant rainbow materializes before your very eyes.

*sigh* I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on by the audience. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.
I loved the rainbow that you made.
So all that about hacking accounts was also...
嗯…是骗你的。我能做到的，只有改变会场的光线而已。
Mmm... that was all a lie. All I'm good for is changing up the lighting at a venue.
这是我摸鱼时候研究出来的小技巧，可以通过体感来控制灯光。你看，顺时针挥手是渐暗，逆时针是渐亮……

Haha, I feel so much better after talking with someone... even though nothing's actually changed: Thank you very much.
再这样下去，节目的口碑非得给他们败完了！
If I keep this up, the ceremony's reputation is going to be ruined by them!
我在热砂分会场工作这么久，遇见这种事还是头一回！
I've worked at Scorchsand Hall for ages, but this is the first time I've ever seen anything like this!
「那位红发的挑战者，凭借出色的演技和高贵的品格成功征服了所有评委」…就离谱！
"The redheaded challenger won the hearts of all the judges with incredible acting and superb morals"... What a load of baloney!
什么时候盛典巨星沦为这种只要挤几句煽情的话，就能成功当选的垃圾赛事了？演出实力呢？作为明星的涵养呢？这是选秀，不是比谁的信念更坚定！

Since when was such a superstar system reduced to a trash competition where anyone who says such pathetic platitudes could win? What about the acting? Where's the celebrity training? This is a talent show, not a contest to see whose faith is stronger!
再这样下去，节目的口碑非得给他们败完了！
If I keep this up, the ceremony's reputation is going to be ruined by them!
不管！超级骇客也要打工挣钱，我正在气头上，非得要痛骂这群评委，好好出这股恶气！
So what! Super hackers also have to earn a living, and I'm angry. I'm going to really give these judges a piece of my mind and let off some steam!
…好，那么正式开始之前，我们再来对一遍流程：首先是那位冠军的挑战路线，确定记清楚…嗯？哎呀，看来没必要特意去记了……
...Alright. Before we officially start, let's go over things once more: First, the winner's route — can you remember all that? ... Ah, looks like you won't have to remember it after all...
嗨！你就是{NICKNAME}吧？我是你的粉丝，有空接受个短暂的采访吗？
Hi! Are you {NICKNAME}, right? I'm one of your fans. Have you got time for a quick interview?
那当然了，就凭你在盛会海选的精彩表现，粉丝还会少吗？
Of course you do! How could you not, based on your brilliant performance in the Festivity Auditions?
放心，我又不会把你骗到薄暮拍卖行去……
Don't worry. I'd never trick you into going to the Dusk Auction House...
Who knew being famous could be such a pain...
哈哈，看来你平时走在路上，应该没少被人要签名吧？
Haha, I bet loads of people bug you for autographs whenever you're just walking around in public, right?
咳、重新介绍一下——我是《逐梦客时讯》驻热砂分会场的记者，目前正制作一期关于新晋冠军，也就是你的节目。
Ahem, let me reintroduce myself real quick — I'm a reporter from the Dreamchaser Bulletin's Scorchsand Hall section. I'm putting together a piece about the new champion. That's you.
既然能在此时此地遇见，就说明我们之间还挺有缘分的，所以…稍微来聊几句怎么样？
Seeing as we've managed to meet up here and now, there must be some level of destiny between us. So then... how about a little chit-chat?
这位女士不由分说开始了她的采访。此人谈吐幽默风趣，思路天马行空，却并不教人感到冒犯。
The lady begins her interview without any further explanation in a humorous style that is freewheeling but never offensive.
你们不知聊了多久，直到她转头对摄影师说——
You talk and talk for who knows how long, before she turns around to her photographer to say...
好了，今天先到这里吧，辛苦你了。
Alright. That's it for today. Thank you very much.
也辛苦你啦，{NICKNAME}——那么…既然已经到了下班时间，我能以粉丝的身份请你喝瓶苏乐达吗？
And thanks to you, {NICKNAME} — so anyway... seeing as it's the end of my shift, can I treat you to a bottle of SoulGlad, as a fan?
出于个人爱好，我时不时会做些海选的攻略，都是些机制的分析和通关技巧的总结。
As a hobby I sometimes also help contestants out with their strategies, just mechanical analysis and tips on how to clear each stage.
你的经验对我而言，将会是非常宝贵的素材，所以你愿意再和我多聊聊吗？
Your experience would provide extremely valuable material for a person like me. So would you like to chat a little more with me?
I've got some questions to ask you.
当然没问题，你想问什么就只管说，就算是我不知道的，也可以帮你查……
Of course, no problem. Ask me anything you want. Even if I don't know the answer, I can help you check it out...
Can you tell me more about Dreamchaser Bulletin?
嗨，这个啊——其实就是个由逐梦客自发组织创办的期刊，用于进行信息的分享与交换。
Ah, that — actually it's a self-published magazine from the Dreamchasers who use it to promote and share info.
当人们进入阿斯德纳星系范围内，就能收到《时讯》的订阅推送，不知道你还有没有印象……
When people enter the Asdana system, they'll get a push notification about subscribing to the bulletin. I wonder if you've had a chance to check it out yet...
总之，期刊的内容非常丰富，不仅有时事头条、悬赏招工这类常规内容，还有不少攻略指南之类的硬通货，你甚至还可以在上面追小说连载。

Anyway, the magazine is chock-full of rich content — not just things like regular news and vacancies but also lots of hard currency like strategic guides. Or you can even follow the serial fiction in each issue.
我个人建议你订阅一份，这玩意还挺实用的。
Personally, I suggest you get a subscription — it's actually really useful.
Tell me more about the Moment of Scorchsand.
这个嘛…来，深吸口气，你闻到了什么——苏乐达的味道，金钱的味道！
Oh, that... Come! Take a deep breath, and tell me: What can you smell? The scent of SoulGlad, the aroma of money!
这个时刻中最耀眼的，就是资本用金纸堆出来的明星梦。大家乌泱泱挤作一团，挤破了头去争抢冠军头衔……
Back then, the most dazzling thing of all was using stacks of gold to build celebrity dreams. Everyone thronged into a bunch, smashing their heads together to fight for the champion title...
这里既是选手的竞技场、也是观众的狂欢之所，更是个巨大的苏乐达广告牌，强势地吸引着所有人的目光。
This wasn't just the contest arena, but also a party zone for the crowd — and it was also a massive billboard for SoulGlad, drawing in everybody's attention.
That's all I wanted to talk about.
唉，愉快的时光总是这么短暂……
*sigh* Good times never seem to last long...
没问题，回见！不过已经这个时间了吗…看来今天又要通宵赶稿了……
No problem. See you later! But it's late already... looks like I'll be pulling another all-nighter again...
说起来，有件事我觉得还是提醒你一下比较好……
Speaking of which, there's something I think I'd better remind you about...
这届比赛中有位——至少在你这匹黑马杀出来之前——非常有潜力夺冠的种子选手。
There's one seed in this competition who harbored a lot of winning potential — that is, until a dark horse like you came onto the scene.
你知道的，像我们这样的记者多少有些自己的消息渠道，所以在得知他的存在之后，我找到了他，请求进行赛前采访。
You know, journalists like us have our own sources, so after learning about his existence, I went looking for him to ask for a pre-match interview.
怎么说呢，这人虽然自负得很，但确实有些实力或是倚仗…我自认好歹算个经验丰富的记者，但从他身上愣是套不出半点有用的消息。

But — how to put this? Despite being conceited, he does actually have some real strength and background... I thought I was this experienced journalist, but I couldn't manage to get any useful info out of him.
比赛结束之后，我又见到了他，那时候他的状态似乎有些不对劲……
After the contest finished, I saw him again and something didn't seem quite right about the state he was in...
虽然可能是我多心了，但出于谨慎，你最好还是留意一下那个叫做加西亚的男人。
I might just be paranoid, but out of an abundance of caution, I suggest you keep one eye open for this Garcia guy.
虽然可能是我多心了，但出于谨慎，你最好还是留意一下那个叫做加西亚的男人。
I might just be paranoid, but out of an abundance of caution, I suggest you keep one eye open for this Garcia guy.
How did she even end up getting kicked out?
…啊…抱歉，我走神了，我只是稍微有点…迷茫？
...Ah ...Sorry, I was a little distracted there. I just got a little... confused?
你知道吗，免费攻略这种东西，本身就是为爱发电的产物。我原本非常享受这种将所知信息汇总整理，推导出个相对正确的结论，然后分享给大家的过程。

You know, these free strategies of mine are a total labor of love. I just really enjoy this process of gathering all the information, proposing a probable hypothesis, and then sharing it with everyone.
我也一直知道，但凡涉及到流量和利益相关，某些人的手段能有多下作…啊，抱歉，我现在思路有些混乱，我只是想说——
And I've always known just how low some people can go when it comes to numbers and profits... er, sorry — I'm a little muddle-headed right now. I just think that...

There have been a lot of people appearing out of nowhere here lately, I need to keep my guard up. I can't afford to have the Bloodhounds finding their way in here. The Dreamflux Reef is a place full of people who just want to live a peaceful life. They don't want to be disturbed by the chaos of the outside world.
忘了自我介绍。我叫柯洛达，是个…嘿，星际牛仔！
I never introduced myself. My name is Cloda, and I'm a... heh, interstellar cowgirl!
Are you up for a chat?
行啊，你要和我聊点什么？
Alright, what do you want to talk about?
Why are you here in the Dreamflux Reef?
哎呀，这个说来话长。跟大部分人差不多，眼睛一黑，醒来就被带到这了。
Ah, that's a long story. Much like the majority of people here, I blacked out and woke up here.
只不过呢…我进梦境的方式有点特殊。你们宾客都是通过酒店入梦的吧，但我不一样，借助的是塔利亚的一种自制装置，原理讲不太清。

Although... I entered the Dreamscape a little differently than most people do. Guests like you came in through the hotel, right? I didn't. I used a custom Talian device. I can't really explain how it works.
进来还算容易，想出去可就麻烦了。当我发现怎么都离不开这个倒霉的梦时，就只能认命了。
Getting in was easy enough, but it's getting out that is the challenge. When I realized I could never leave this unfortunate dream, I just had to accept my fate.
你可以在「黄金的时刻」生活。
You could live in the Golden Hour?
那个挤满人的地方？不行不行，我最受不了这种虚荣浮夸的地方，明明都是普通人，非得装成高贵的模样，做给谁看呢！

Where it's crowded with people? Absolutely not. I can't stand fake and conceited places like that. They're all just normal people, yet they pretend like they're all rich and elegant nobles... Who are they trying to impress?
你可以在「朝露公馆」生活。
You could live in the Dewlight Pavilion?
哈？你不会在搞笑吧。那种严肃的地方，住久了绝对会变成疯子！
Huh? Are you joking? That place is so serious and strict that I'd end up going insane there!
还是流梦礁适合我啊。自由，清净，没什么麻烦事。爽快！
I think the Dreamflux Reef suits me best. Free, peaceful, and free of trouble. It's refreshing!
...Do you know how to cook pepper steak?
这是什么匹诺康尼时兴的开玩笑方式吗？为什么你也要问啊。
Is that some kind of Penaconian joke that I don't understand? Why would you ask that?
——统一回复：不会，我根本不知道这是啥！
...My straight response: No, I don't even know what it is!
有吗？我对你倒是完全没印象，话说…你该不会是在通缉令上看到的吧？
Have you? I don't remember you at all. Say... I wasn't on a wanted poster, was I?
Think quickly. This is very important.
I think it was a wanted poster...
不会吧！我都好久没开张过了，怎么通缉令还保留着。不应该啊？
No way! I've been out of business for ages. How are there still wanted posters around? That can't be right.
I think I saw you on a billboard...
广告牌？「黄金的时刻」追着人跑的那种？
A billboard? Like the ones in the Golden Hour that chase after people?
为什么广告牌上面会有我的形象？这也太奇怪了吧。不可能，绝对不可能！
Why would I be on a billboard? That's not possible. There's no way!
It gave me a message for you.
「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
"There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"
…什么意思？广告牌…等我干嘛？是我欠了它的钱吗？莫名其妙的。
...What does that mean? Why would a billboard be waiting for me...? Do I owe it money or something? That's so strange.
不管！我是在宇宙间流浪的牛仔，不会为任何事情停留！
Who cares! I am a cowgirl who roams the universe as I please! I won't let anything stop me!
I wish you a happy journey.
不用你说，每个牛仔都会找到最适合自己的生存方式！
Of course I'll have a happy journey. We cowgirls always find the style of life that suits us best!
还是流梦礁适合我啊。自由，清净，没什么麻烦事。爽快！
I think the Dreamflux Reef suits me best. Free, peaceful, and free of trouble. It's refreshing!
我刚到这的时候，也尝试过重拾盗贼的老本行。可没过多久我就想通了，就算夺来了东西，也没法带回现实啊，那何必还要冒这个风险呢？

When I first got here, I tried picking up my old profession. But it didn't take me long to realize that I couldn't take any of the stuff I pilfered back to the real world. So, what's the point of taking that risk?
所以我现在就躺平咯。在这地方和大伙聊聊天，唠唠家族的闲话，也挺舒服的。
So, I'm out of the game now. I'm pretty cozy just chatting with people around here and gossiping about The Family.
哎，困在梦里的时间长了，反而变得有点向往安定了。
Ah, having been stuck in this dream for so long, I'm starting to long to settle down.
哎，情绪平静下来后，想想觉得还挺奇妙的。
Ah. Now that my emotions have settled, I realize that this is actually quite wonderful.
我以前是个牛仔，过着全宇宙到处乱跑的生活。现在，困在梦里的时间长了，反而变得有点向往安定了。
I used to be a cowgirl, spending my life running all over the universe as I pleased. Now, having been stuck in this dream for so long, I've started to long to settle down.
Do you want to settle in the Dreamflux Reef?
I think that would be nice.
是吧。这地方和城里是没法比，可足够有人情味。大家互相照顾，日子还算过得去。
Yep. Though it can't compare to the big city, there's something more human about this place. Everyone takes care of each other and life isn't bad.
并且我就是看不惯家族，说得冠冕堂皇，什么同谐，什么以强援弱。结果呢，还不是自己住在亮闪的房子里，留其他人自生自灭。

Plus, I still can't stand The Family and their pretentious proselytizing of Harmony and how they are the strong defending the weak... How can they say that when they live in their glittering houses and leave everyone else to fend for themselves?
…好，决定了。不管梦境以后变成什么样子，我都会留在这里，非得把流梦礁建设成所有人都能自由生活的地方！
...Alright. I've decided. No matter what the Dreamscape becomes in the future, I will remain here. I want to construct the Dreamflux Reef into a place where everyone can live freely!
我要告诉塔利亚的那帮人，「盗贼公国」的理想还没有破灭！
I want to let the gang back in Talia know that the Kingdom of Banditry's ideals have not been extinguished!
可惜啊…梦里什么都有，但连夜空都是假的。我看不见星星。
It's a shame though... We have everything here in the dream, but even the sky is fake. I cannot see the stars.
虽说在这过得不错，虽说塔利亚也不是个什么好地方…但有时候啊，还是会怀念从前。
Although I don't have a bad life, and Talia really isn't some glamorous paradise... Sometimes, I still miss my past.
我是从遥远的星球来的，最喜欢做的事就是驾驶飞船在宇宙里到处乱转。真的，你没体验过可能不知道，自由，浪漫，无拘无束，我爱死那种感觉了。

I come from a distant planet. There is nothing I love more than flying my spaceship around the universe as I please. Honestly, if you haven't experienced it, you won't understand that freedom, romantic sensation, and feeling of being truly unrestrained. I love that feeling so much.
飞船航行的轨迹就像张网，星星就是网里活蹦乱跳的鱼。我从哪里经过，那附近的星星就都属于我。我来到，我看见，我拥有全部。
The trail my spaceship leaves behind is like a net, and the stars are like frolicking little fish. Wherever I go, those stars belong to me. I came, I saw, and I owned everything.
可惜啊…梦里什么都有，但连夜空都是假的。这里没有星星。
It's a shame though... We have everything here in the dream, but even the sky is fake. There are no stars here.
要是真让我碰上家族成员，我才不会给他们好脸色看！
If I ever come across a member of The Family, I'll make them regret it!
那个「家族」里真的还有正常人吗？
Is there anyone normal in that "Family"?
我没和他们正面接触过，但相关的事在流梦礁里听了不少。米哈伊尔为建设这颗星球做了这么多，现在却只能隐姓埋名地藏起来，就离谱！

I've never met any of them face-to-face, but I've heard a lot about them in the Dreamflux Reef. That Mikhail did so much work to construct this planet and now, he hides himself away in complete anonymity? Ridiculous!
要是真让我碰上家族成员，我才不会给他们好脸色看！
If I ever come across a member of The Family, I'll make them regret it!
啊。那位小姐算是例外吧，我和她说过话，挺温和的，对孩子们也很热心。
Ah. Miss Robin is an exception. I've spoken with her before. She was quite gentle and very passionate about children.
听说知更鸟小姐很早就离开了匹诺康尼，所以没染上多少家族的臭味…要是她想成为梦主，我肯定举双手赞成。
I heard that Miss Robin left Penacony a long time ago, so she was not infected with the foul stench of The Family... If she wanted to become the Dreammaster, I would be in full support.
加拉赫啊…这个人很神秘，总能给你种熟悉、却又看不透的感觉，但交个朋友是没啥问题——而且他的调饮技术简直绝了，塔利亚的小酒馆根本没法比！

Gallagher... He's real mysterious. I can never read him, but he always seems strangely familiar, too. I guess he's alright as a friend... Plus, he mixes an unbelievable drink. The taverns in Talia could never compare!
哎，最近挺少在流梦礁碰到他，希望那些该死的家族走狗不会为难他。
Ah, I barely ever run into him around the Dreamflux Reef anymore... I hope those Family dogs don't go giving him any trouble.
...It's moving! Did you see that? It's moving!
什么？不就是个垃圾箱吗……
啊…哈哈、你也看不到…没关系，我看得到，我认得出危险……
Ah... Haha, you can't see it either... That's fine. I can see them, and I know the danger...
What madness are you spouting? Get out of the way...
发疯？哈…发疯，我才没疯！而且，我告诉你，我才是清醒的那个！你们…都被家族骗了！
Madness? Hah... Madness, I'm not mad! I am the only one who sees what's going on here! You... you've all been lied to by The Family!
我告诉你，他们的爪牙无处不在…可能在那儿！也可能在…那儿！无时无刻不在监视着、监视所有人…阴魂不散！
I'm telling you, their minions are everywhere... They could even be right here! Or maybe... over there! They are always watching, they're watching all of us... They linger around every corner!
…我先走了。你也最好离他远点，这人多半是偷渡来的，在流梦礁待久了就会成这样。
...I'm getting out of here. You should stay away from him, too. He probably came here as a stowaway, spent too long in the Dreamflux Reef, and ended up like this.
家族…家族…他们永远盯着你！
The Family... The Family... They're always watching!
男人自顾自沉浸在自己的世界中，对你的试探毫无反应。
The man is lost in his own world, and he has no reaction to your inquiry.
Give up on speaking to him.
所有人都觉得我是个疯子…但我发誓，我看到了…我全都看到了，真的！
Everyone thinks I am insane... but I swear I saw it... I saw all of it, honestly!
你去过美梦之外的地方吗？我不是说这座城寨…而是那种危机四伏的*噩梦*。
Have you ever been outside the dream before? I don't mean this fortress... I mean the nightmare fraught with danger.
我去过一次，朋友。我有一次误入了筑梦边境某处的「边界」——那是一道像是梦泡组成的高墙…人可以轻而易举地穿过去。

I've been there once, my friend. I once accidentally entered a "boundary" on the Dream's Edge by mistake... It was like a giant wall built from dream bubbles... People can pass through it quite easily.
我不知道该怎么形容那个地方…它就像是「黄金的时刻」的翻版，但…是活的。没错，字面意义上的「活的」。
I don't know how to describe that place... It was like a duplicate of the "Golden Hour," but... It was alive. That's right, exactly what it sounds like... It was "alive."
地面是…紫红色，很有弹性，时不时还会轻微颤动…墙面也是，我没敢碰，但它们看起来温热又黏腻…有点恶心。
The ground was... it was purplish-red and springy. It would shiver slightly from time to time... The walls too. I didn't dare touch them, but they looked warm and sticky... It was disgusting.
而且我还看到有其他人走了进去…呃，或许是人吧。然后那幢房子开始蠕动，就像是在…消化。我等了很久，那个人始终没有出来。
Then, I saw someone enter it... Um, they might have been a person. Then, the house began to squirm, and it was like it was... digesting? I waited and waited, but that person never came back out.
然后，我的身边突然出现了一群…钟表小子，金属制的。它们已经严重锈蚀了，从表情到身体都歪歪扭扭…它们的叫声尖锐刺耳，就好像用指甲刮钢板一样…呃。

Then, a group of Clockies suddenly appeared around me... They were all made of metal. They were heavily rusted, and everything from their expressions to their bodies was warped and twisted... Their cries were ear-splitting, like nails on a chalkboard... Ergh.
我吓坏了。按理说，我应该会吓醒的…但你经历过吗？ 就是你明知自己在做梦，想要醒来却动弹不得。到处都是怪物，我只能逃——

I was terrified. Normally, I should have woken up from the fear but... Has that ever happened to you before? You know you're dreaming, and you want to wake up but you're paralyzed. You're surrounded by monsters and all you can do is run...
男人如鲠在喉，再也吐不出半个音节，只兀自大喘着气，像极了报废的鼓风机。
The man has become too upset to speak. He is fighting just to get a single syllable out. All he can do is fight for air, like a punctured air pump.
His eyes are filled with fear.
我经历了的这些事…一定都是家族布下的险恶阴谋！
These things that I experienced... They must have been some sinister plot set up by The Family!
哎…简直难以置信…但家族一定是想要对我*洗脑*……
Ah... It's hard to believe but... I know The Family must be trying to brainwash me...
你根本想不到那个鬼地方有多可怕！我费了好大的力气才从那片地狱里爬出来，结果…结果他们竟然对我说，我看到的全都是「忆质过敏诱发的幻觉」！

You can't even imagine how terrifying that place was! It took so much energy just for me to drag myself out of that hell! In the end... in the end, they told me everything I saw was "hallucinations triggered by memoria allergy"!
后来没过多久，他们另派了人过来照看我。这帮人的说法又变了…他们说那片诡异的梦境是个*普通*的「负面情绪回收站」…哈、哈哈……

Not long after, they sent people to come and look after me. These people said something completely different... They said that strange Dreamscape was just a normal "recycling center for negative emotions"... Ha. Haha...
这不是自相矛盾吗？我就觉得他们在骗我…他们肯定在酝酿一个大阴谋！我本打算把这些事情公之于众…可他们竟打算以「疗养」的名义软禁我，还密谋要消除我的记忆！

Isn't this just a contradiction? I feel like they're trying to fool me... They must be cooking up some huge conspiracy! I was going to take this information public... But they put me under house arrest in the name of "treatment" and planned to erase my memory!
好、好在我逃出来了…逃到了这片流梦之地。美梦并不安全…美梦就是个谎言！
F—Fortunately, I escaped... escaped to this land of Dreamflux. Dreams are not safe... Dreams are a lie!
Hahaha, we're all going to die!
嘿，朋友，你知道「美梦剧团」吗？就是那些梦里随处可见的小畜生……
Hey, my friend, do you know the "Sweet Dreams Troupe"? They're the little wretches you can see all over the place in the dream...
告诉你，你可别被它们无害的外表给骗了！它们都是吃噩梦长大的怪胎，家族邪恶计划的一部分！
Let me tell you, don't let their harmless appearance fool you! They are freaks that feed on nightmares to grow! They're part of The Family's wicked scheme!
想活命的话就离他们远点，可别被骗进噩梦里当肥料…要是那玩意主动招惹你，你就…就敲碎它们的壳子、打烂里面的怪物、将它们捣成泥、烧成灰……

Stay away from them if you want to live. They'll trick you into going into the nightmares and use you as fertilizer... If those things come at you, you've gotta... You've gotta smash their shells, beat the hell out of the monsters inside, grind them into paste, and burn them to ash...
我们得拯救匹诺康尼…和我一起把那些怪物赶回噩梦吧，让它们再也不能出来害人！
We have to save Penacony... Help me fight off those monsters together. We have to chase them back into the nightmare and make sure they can't come out and harm people again!
男人目光涣散，憔悴的脸庞被失了神智的狂喜涂满。
The man's eyes are unfocused and his pallid face is covered in the ecstasy of insanity.
哈哈…再见了，虚假的美梦！我逃出来了…我成功了，流梦之地会保护我的！
Haha... Farewell, fake dream! I have escaped... I succeeded! The land of Dreamflux will protect me!
再见吧，该死的怪物、肮脏的魔鬼！祝你们在地狱里永远发烂发臭！别想抓到我，更别想把我变成你们的点心…你们抓不到我的！
