Farewell, cursed monsters and foul demons! May you rot in hell for all eternity! Don't even dream of trying to catch me or turn me into your little snack... You will never catch me!
哇哦…流梦城寨还真是个好地方啊。这气氛，这打光——都是素材！好久没像现在这样思如泉涌了，爽。
Wow... Dreamflux Fortress is truly wonderful! This atmosphere, this lighting... It is all material! I have not felt my thoughts rush like this in some time. It feels amazing!
可惜路上都是正常人，要是能再多点迷因怪物就好了……
It's just a shame that everyone I met along the way was so normal... If only I could have encountered a few more memetic monsters...
<size=28>再来抓我一次吧，甜蜜的「死亡」！</size>
<size=28>Come and seize me once more, sweet "Death"!</size>
「死亡」？！…什么嘛，你和那只怪物长得一点都不像。
"Death"!? ...What? You look nothing like that monster.
Is this a performance art piece?
不、不好意思！我只是来这边采采风，打扰到您了……
Ah, S—Sorry! I'm just here collecting material. I didn't mean to disturb you...
您是…流梦礁本地人？还是误入的游客？能请您分享一下美梦以外的恐怖…我是说有趣经历吗？拜托您了，这对我真的很重要。

Are you... a Dreamflux Reef native? Or are you a guest who stumbled upon this place by mistake? Would you care to share with me your terrifying... I mean interesting stories in life outside the dream? Please, this is very important to me.
Of course! Just a moment. Let me find my pen and paper...
呃，您问我？我就是个名不见经传的小漫画家…自娱自乐，画灵异恐怖题材的那种。
Oh, me? I'm just a small-time manga artist... I draw horror and supernatural-themed manga for my own entertainment.
这个题材太冷门，所以我没什么读者。不过，凡是因为我的作品聚在一起的朋友们都有共同话题——我们都成了好朋友。
This kind of stuff is not in high demand, so I don't have many readers. Although, friends who gather around my work all share a common topic.... We've all become very close.
这样倒也没什么不好…至少我还挺满意的。毕竟「林子大了什么鸟都有」…我不擅长处理太复杂的人际关系，只想好好创作，那种麻烦事还是算了吧。

There is nothing wrong with this... I'm quite satisfied, at least. After all, "the wider the net you cast, the more fish you catch..." I'm not great at dealing with complex social interactions. I just want to create, and avoid trouble as much as possible.
一般情况下，我只画自己喜欢的题材和作品。打个比方，会在午夜活过来的人偶啊，墨水变成的恶魔啊…之类的。
Normally I just draw works and themes that I enjoy myself. A puppet that comes to life at night, ink that transforms into demons... Things like that.
迷因怪物也是我的取材对象，所以先前我一直在探听「死亡」的都市传说…然后就误打误撞来到这儿了。
Memetic monsters are also a source of inspiration for me. I've been looking into an urban legend about "Death"... That search brought me stumbling here.
好在结果不错，新作的灵感正在我的脑海里源源不断地涌现——我有预感，撼动寰宇画坛的惊世名作即将在我笔下诞生！

Fortunately, this has worked out wonderfully! I can feel inspiration flooding my mind endlessly... I have a feeling that a masterpiece that will shake the artistic world is soon to be born from my pen!
The only problem is... How do I get back...?
啊？没什么可分享的吗？好吧……
Oh? You've got nothing to share with me? Okay then...
您慢走。如果遇到了什么恐怖…有趣经历，可以随时分享给我啊！
Take care. If you come across any terrifying— interesting experiences, you can always come back and share them with me!
我突然意识到一个严重的问题……
I suddenly realized a serious problem...
不出意外的话，我果然还是出意外了——虽然找到不少好素材，可我现在找不到回去的路了……
If things are as I expect, the unexpected has occurred... Though I have collected a great deal of inspiration, I have lost my way back from here.
算了，来都来了…干脆在这边好好逛逛，权当度假吧。
Forget it. I'm here now... I'll just take a good stroll around here, like I'm on holiday.
这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
Is this... really the life I want?
说真的，{M#哥们}{F#姐们}，这几天我在想…我干脆要不就住在这儿，不回去了。
If I'm honest, {M#mister}{F#miss}, I've been thinking the past few days... Maybe I should just live here and not bother going back?
说起来嘛，就是我家里那档事。我的兄弟姐妹不少，个个都是各行各业的领军人物。我嘛，就是搞搞自己喜欢的事业……
Now I'm talking about it, I have problems with my family. I have many siblings who are leading figures in various industries. Me? I'm just doing something I enjoy...
你懂的，虽然来不了多少钱，但我至少也吃饱穿暖，过得也挺开心。可父母就知道成天数落我，说我什么用都没有、什么事都做不好……

You understand. Even though I'm not making much money, I can eat and sleep soundly. I'm quite content. But, my parents are always criticizing me, telling me I'm useless, and I can't do anything right...
我受够了，真的受够了——但我有时候竟然还觉得他们说得有道理…就我现在这种状态，真的是能用*好*来形容的吗？
I've had enough. I really have... But, sometimes I do think that they have a point... Can I really call the state of my life now good?
有时候就…哎，心情挺复杂的。不知道路在何方，只能得过且过……
Sometimes I... Ah, it's really complicated. I don't know where my path is, so I just have to keep muddling along...
这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
Is this... really the life I want?
说真的，{M#哥们}{F#姐们}，这几天我在想…我干脆要不就住在这儿，不回去了。
If I'm honest, {M#mister}{F#miss}, I've been thinking the past few days... Maybe I should just live here and not bother going back?
说起来嘛，就是我家里那档事。我的兄弟姐妹不少，个个都是各行各业的领军人物。我嘛，就是搞搞自己喜欢的事业……
Now I'm talking about it, I have problems with my family. I have many siblings who are leading figures in various industries. Me? I'm just doing something I enjoy...
你懂的，虽然来不了多少钱，但我至少也吃饱穿暖，过得也挺开心。可父母就知道成天数落我，说我什么用都没有、什么事都做不好……

You understand. Even though I'm not making much money, I can eat and sleep soundly. I'm quite content. But, my parents are always criticizing me, telling me I'm useless, and I can't do anything right...
有时候就…哎，心情挺复杂的。不知道路在何方，只能得过且过……
Sometimes I... Ah, it's really complicated. I don't know where my path is, so I just have to keep muddling along...
这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
Is this... really the life I want?
哼，这地方比十二时刻清净多了。
Hmph, this place is much more peaceful than the Twelve Hours.
说来倒是又好气又好笑：我来到流梦礁这些天，最大的收获竟然不是「灵感」，而是「清净」。
Speaking of, there's something quite funny and frustrating: The most valuable thing I gained from these few days in the Dreamflux Reef was not "inspiration" at all, but "peace."
前阵子我在美梦里取材，可以说是处处碰壁。那些沉迷美梦的体面人啊，我好声好气地请教，他们讲不出个所以然就算了，还要反过来教育我不懂美梦的规矩。

Before, when I would gather materials in the dream, you could say I was just banging my head into a brick wall. I'd politely ask these dream-obsessed, upstanding, moral people for advice, but they couldn't give me a straight answer. What's more, they'd go on a tirade about how I didn't understand the rules of the dream.
然后，他们就开始说车轱辘话，试图教会我上流社会的*礼仪*。等我学明白了这套组合拳，想要继续深挖创作素材时，才发现这已经是他们的毕生所学了。

Then, they'd talk in circles and attempt to teach me the manners of high society. After I understood that combo and tried to dig for more creative inspiration from them, I realized that this was all they had to show for their entire lives.
哎，美梦啊美梦…每个人都得穿上同一套精致的正装，遵守他们那套莫名其妙的规矩，不然就是没底蕴、没涵养。
Ah, this dream... Everyone must adorn themselves in the finest wear and follow these strange rules, or they're seen as uncultured and unrefined.
可我就是做点自己喜欢的事而已，要这些有什么用？简直太折磨了……
But, I just want to do something I enjoy. Why do I need these things? It was simply torturous...
流梦城寨真是个好地方啊…嘿嘿。
Dreamflux Fortress is truly wonderful... Hehe.
在黄金的时刻呆久了，看流梦礁的垃圾桶都觉得眉清目秀…真的，我没开玩笑。
After spending all that time in the Golden Hour, even the trashcans of the Dreamflux Reef start to look beautiful... No, I'm being serious.
你知道吗？刚来这边的时候，我看到餐厅竟然和垃圾站比邻，只觉得头皮发麻……
Did you know? When I first got here, I saw a restaurant right next to a waste collection station... It gave me the shivers...
但后来，我发现自己居然渐渐适应了…至少现在我能在路边席地而坐，面不改色，边和人聊天边吃东西了。
But, I gradually grew accustomed to all this... At least now I can sit on the roadside without making faces, and talk with people while eating.
而且说实话，那家餐厅的食物虽然卖相谈不上好，但味道还不错。流梦礁的生活条件虽然不怎么样，氛围可真是非常宜居了。

And if I'm honest, the food in the restaurant didn't look great, but it didn't taste bad at all. Though the living conditions in the Dreamflux Reef may be nothing to write home about, the atmosphere is actually very comfortable.
说起来，前阵子我在街边买到个小纪念品。瞧着挺可爱的，我就多买了几只——谢谢你陪我聊天，就送你一个作谢礼吧！
Come to think of it, I saw some small souvenirs in a street-side store a while ago. I thought they looked cute, so I bought a few extra... Thank you for talking with me. Have a thank-you gift.
在黄金的时刻呆久了，看流梦礁的垃圾桶都觉得眉清目秀…真的，我没开玩笑。
After spending all that time in the Golden Hour, even the trashcans of the Dreamflux Reef start to look beautiful... No, I'm being serious.
说实话，流梦礁的生活条件虽然不怎么样，氛围可真是非常宜居了。
If I'm honest, the living conditions in the Dreamflux Reef may not be anything to write home about. But, the atmosphere is not bad at all.
哟，瞧瞧是谁来了？{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}，没想到我们居然在这又见面了。
Oh, look who it is! I didn't expect to meet you again, {M#boy}{F#girl}.
看来你已经发现了匹诺康尼美梦的秘密。无名客的本事果然不赖。既然已经知道了流梦礁的存在，现在你又如何看待这片流梦之地呢？

I see you've also discovered the secrets of Penacony's beautiful dream. I should know not to doubt the skills of a Nameless. Now that you have learned of the Dreamflux Reef, what do you think of this land?
哈哈，我同意。有时候，我甚至觉得梦里比现实还要清醒呢。
Haha, I agree. Sometimes, I feel more awake in a dream than I do in real life.
梦境终究只是逃避的手段。
The Dreamscape is just another escape for people.
哈哈，不愧是强者的发言！不过嘛，普通人总会需要一个避风港的。
Haha, the words of the strong! For real though, normal people will always need a safe haven.
当然，你可以坚持自己的答案，只是我不认为一刀切是个好主意。就算没有美梦，人们也总能找到点什么来沉迷。
Of course, you can stick with your answer. I just don't think that this is a one-size-fits-all situation. Even if dreams did not exist, people would still find something to lose themselves in.
这道题对我来说有点超纲…
I think this question is a little outside my pay grade...
哈哈，好吧。至少你没有随便应付我，这份诚实值得认同。
Haha, fine. At least you didn't just give me some perfunctory response. I praise your sincerity.
既然如此，我来分享一下自己的看法吧。
In that case, allow me to share my views.
流梦礁不同于十二时刻，它的立身之本是「自由」。这里每个人都有故事，其中不乏与我相似的家伙。
What makes the Dreamflux Reef different from the Twelve Hours is that it was built upon the foundation of "freedom." Everyone here has a story, even someone like me.
依我看，「自由」的反面是「秩序」…而匹诺康尼梦境的两种形态便是这类争论的延伸。
If you ask me, the opposite of freedom is order... The two forms of Penacony's Dreamscape are but an extension of this argument.
十二时刻是根除了烦恼的真空，流梦礁则是不加修饰的原始梦境。它们就像硬币的正反面，缺一不可。我不清楚「钟表匠」创造流梦礁到底是为了什么，但……

The Twelve Hours is a vacuum that had eliminated all worries. The Dreamflux Reef is an unadulterated Primordial Dreamscape. They are like two sides of the same coin. One cannot exist without the other. I don't know why the Watchmaker created the Dreamflux Reef, but...
以开拓客的视角来看待…或许开拓之道的真谛，就是要有选择的余地。
As a Trailblazer... Perhaps the true meaning of the way of Trailblaze is to have the space to make decisions for yourself.
开拓，必须靠自己迈步向前，而非被鞭策或驱使。当你可以选择逃避时，勇敢才更显珍贵。
Trailblaze requires us to rely on ourselves to move forward, not to be spurred or urged in any direction. It is when you have the option to run away that courage can truly be considered valuable.
有人喜欢享乐，期盼它能冲淡现实的不快；有人厌恶繁华，渴望过无拘无束的生活…无论哪种人，在梦中都理应有容身之处。

Some people enjoy pleasure and hope, that it can dilute the misery of reality. Some despise opulence and long for a life without restraints... Whatever kind of person you are, there should be a place for you in the dream.
所谓「不可能之事」，就是鼓励我们做出选择，找到真正属于自己的美梦——哪怕它并不华丽。
That which we call "impossible" is what encourages us to make a choice and find the dream that truly belongs to us... Even if it is not glamorous.
这只是我个人的一点感想。当然，我可能只在第三层，而「钟表匠」在第五层…有机会能当面问问他就好了。

These are just my personal views. Of course, I imagine I am still only on something like the third floor when the Watchmaker is up high on the fifth... I would love to have a chance to ask him myself one day.
我还会在流梦礁待上一段时间。如果你有想法，可以随时来找我聊聊。
I will be in the Dreamflux Reef for some time yet. If you have any more thoughts, you can talk to me anytime.
I want to chat with you.
I want to hear more of your stories.
经历了这么多之后，我的故事已经不足为奇了。不过既然你想听，我还是乐意讲讲的。
After all I've been through, I realize my stories are no longer remarkable. But, since you want to hear one, I'd be happy to tell you.
那么，你要听什么样的故事呢？
So, what kind of story would you like to hear?
你是如何来到流梦礁的？
How did you come to the Dreamflux Reef?
说来话长。上次跟你分别之后，我又把线人的东西仔细看了看，还真琢磨出了些许玄机。
It's a long story. After we bid farewell the last time, I looked back over the informer's things and uncovered some secrets...
实际上，那群受害者都有一个共同之处——现在你已经知道它是什么了。不过我当时并没有直接想通，反倒因为过度思考而有些神志不清……

In reality, all of the victims had one thing in common... Now, you know what that is. But back then, I didn't put it together straight away. If anything, I overthought it so much that I ended up even more confused...
于是我直接在梦里闭目养神，睁开眼就发现自己到这来了。很神奇，不是吗？顶级的谜语有时只需要最简单的解题方式。
So, I closed my eyes to quiet my mind, and when I opened them, here I am. Isn't it mysterious? Sometimes the hardest of riddles are solved in the simplest ways...
这不是什么都没解出来嘛！
听上去是有些掉价，可许多宾客都是这样进入流梦礁的——他们的反应比我夸张多了。
It may be a little disappointing, but many guests entered the Dreamflux Reef in this way... though their reactions were a lot more dramatic than mine.
不过，要说会主动留在这里的家伙，到底都是些勇敢的人——毕竟，这种原始的梦境里可没有家族「不会发生危险」的承诺。

I have to say, the people who are actively choosing to stay here are extremely brave... A Primordial Dreamscape like this doesn't have the same Family guarantee of "being free from danger," after all.
你听说大剧院的事了吗？
Have you heard about what happened at the Grand Theater?
「秩序」的残党？死了那么久的星神，居然还能搞起事来，真是稀奇…呃，咳咳，我可不是在说咱们那位阿基维利。
The remnants of "the Order"? It truly amazes me that an Aeon that has been dead for so long could still cause issues... Ahem, I'm not talking about our Akivili, of course.
话说回来，这乱子之所以能顺利解决，肯定少不了你们星穹列车的一份功劳吧？
Come to think of it, this whole situation being resolved so smoothly must have been considerable thanks to your Crew, right?
马马虎虎啦，全是大家的功劳。
Sort of, everyone did their share.
哈哈，星穹列车啊…真不愧是无名客最大的牌面。实不相瞒，你们名气越大，我们也就越跟着沾光。
Haha, the Astral Express... truly lives up to its reputation as Nameless' greatest asset. Truth be told, the more your fame grows, the more we bask in your glory.
指不定，哪天我甚至可以在宇宙间大摇大摆地逛荡，再也不用看其他人的脸色…嗐，希望我能活着见到那一天吧。
Who knows, maybe one day I'll be able to roam the vast universe as I please, without having to answer to anyone ever again... Ah, I hope I live to see that day.
之前跟踪我的人是你吗？
Were you following me just now?
嘿，{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}，现在才察觉到吗？
Hey, {M#smart boy}{F#smart girl}, have you only just noticed?
其实，我不是没办法离开筑梦边境。只是我在银河里摸爬滚打这么多年，直觉告诉我这一趟必定凶险异常——家族可能早就有所防范了。

Truth be told, I have the means to leave the Dream's Edge, but I've spent enough time in the cosmos to instinctually know that the trip is going to be perilous. The Family may have already taken precautions.
所以我才打算让你先探探路，把家族为我布下的陷阱都踩干净。结果呢？我在第五层，家族在第一层。

That's why I wanted you to explore the route first so that you could trigger all the traps laid for me in advance. But, where did that leave me? I'm here on the fifth level, and The Family is on the first.
除了那俩骚扰我的公司喽啰外，什么麻烦都没有。啧啧，感觉还有点平淡呢……
Aside from the two IPC minions who messed with me, there were no other troubles. Tsk, it almost feels a little boring.
哎，我确实没法否认这个指控，所以…能请你不要把它放在心上吗？
Ah, I can't deny that, but... I hope you aren't bothered by it.
Of course I can do that.
果然！象征「开拓」的无名客心胸也很「开阔」…感激不尽。
I knew it! Thanks for being the bigger person here, Nameless. I could not be more grateful to you.
不过，为表歉意，我还是送你个赔罪礼吧——拿好哦！
To show my remorse, here's a token of my apology. Please keep it!
我知道这种事很难被原谅，但…我至少没有伤害你，对吧？哈哈，对吧……
I know that something like this is not easy to forgive, but... at least I didn't harm you, right? Haha, right...
…呃，抱歉，我知道错了。为表歉意，这个送你当赔罪礼吧。
...Ah, I'm sorry. I know it was wrong. Please accept this gift as an apology.
果然！象征「开拓」的无名客心胸也很「开阔」…感激不尽。
I knew it! Thanks for being the bigger person here, Nameless. I could not be more grateful to you.
不过，为表歉意，我还是送你个赔罪礼吧——拿好哦！
To show my remorse, here's a token of my apology. Please keep it!
再见啦。说不定有朝一日，你也能成为船长呢，哈哈。
See you! Who knows, maybe one day I can become a captain, too! Haha.
再见啦。说不定有朝一日，你也能成为船长呢，哈哈。
See you! Who knows, maybe one day I can become a captain, too! Haha.
「开拓」之道…呵呵，还真是深奥啊。
The way of the Trailblaze... Hah, how profound.
科琳收敛了情绪，用一抹微笑取而代之。
Colleen gathers her emotions and sheathes them with a smile.
待的时间一长，我也有些喜欢这个地方了——主要是喜欢那个巨大的忆质空洞——它让我想起了宇宙。
As time has passed, I've come to like this place... I enjoy the giant memoria void more than anything... It reminds me of the universe.
和「黄金的时刻」不同，流梦礁的夜晚更加平静。怎么说呢？就像在现实里熬夜似的。我的心也会跟着一起平静下来，得以好好感受夜晚…或者说太空，最原本的面貌。

The evenings of Dreamflux Reef are calmer and quieter than the Golden Hour. I'm not sure how to explain it. It's like staying up through the night in the real world. My heart falls calm alongside it, and I'm able to experience the true nature of the night fully... Or maybe I should say space.
据说，许多人都会像我这样，向夜色寻求慰藉。至于原因，用文艺一点的说法…大概就是「人总会向往星空」吧。
I hear many people seek solace in the night like I do. As for the reason, I guess a more literary explanation would be... "Humanity will always yearn for the stars."
在外面漂泊这么久…我也有些想念家乡了。
Having roamed the outside world for all this time... I'm starting to miss home, too.
科琳突然一言不发，神情落寞。看起来就像是一位…智慧的贤者。
Colleen suddenly falls silent as her expression becomes gloomy. Suddenly, she looks like... a wise sage.
不知不觉间…冒险就已经结束了啊。我花了好大力气才解开谜题，来到这里。但是现在，突然间我就无事可做了……
Before I even realized... my adventure had already ended. I went to great lengths to solve the puzzle and make it here. Now, I'm suddenly left with nothing to do...
接下来要去哪里呢，回到家乡吗？唉，不知道为什么，鼻子突然有点酸……
Where am I supposed to go from here? Back home? Ah, I don't know why, I'm getting a bit of a lump in my throat...
哈哈…一个人在外面漂泊这么久，搞得我都变得多愁善感起来了。
Haha... All this roaming the world alone has made me soppy and sentimental...
钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
Watchmaker... Just where have you gone?
科琳皱起了眉，表情却并不夸张。
Colleen's face folds into a gentle frown.
…这就是冒险的尽头吗？「钟表匠」想要向我们展现的，就只是这样的小场面而已？
...Is this really the end of the adventure? Is this small stage really all that the Watchmaker wanted to show us?
Why are you complaining all of a sudden?
不，我倒没有抱怨，只是觉得有点…没劲。
No, I'm not complaining. I'm just a little... defeated.
之前不是还夸他来着吗？
Weren't you praising him just before?
确实，他的布局值得肯定，但我却感觉有点…没劲。
It's true that his plans deserve credit. I just feel a little... defeated.
原本我以为流梦礁会是整段冒险的高潮，高低得在这里发生一段激烈的打斗，然后感悟出宇宙真谛什么的……
I thought that Dreamflux Reef was going to be the crux of the entire adventure. I thought that I would be cast into fierce battle and come to understand the truths of the universe...
…但是除了几位无名客的衣冠冢外，我什么都没见到。难道它就是「钟表匠的遗产」？未免也太无聊了！
...But I've not seen anything here besides the empty tombs of a few Nameless. Are they really the Watchmaker's Legacy? That's such an anticlimax...
是有什么谜题没解开吗？还是说米凯有事瞒着我……
Is there some kind of puzzle we haven't yet solved? Or is Micah hiding something from me...
啧，钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
科琳皱起了眉，表情却并不夸张。
Colleen's face folds into a gentle frown.
原本我以为流梦礁会是整段冒险的高潮，高低得在这里发生一段激烈的打斗，然后感悟出宇宙真谛什么的……
I thought that Dreamflux Reef was going to be the crux of the entire adventure. I thought that I would be cast into fierce battle and come to understand the truths of the universe...
…但是除了几位无名客的衣冠冢外，我什么都没见到。难道它就是「钟表匠的遗产」？未免也太无聊了！
...But I've not seen anything here besides the empty tombs of a few Nameless. Are they really the Watchmaker's Legacy? That's such an anticlimax...
啧，钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
梦境给了我一个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种感觉了。
The Dreamscape has given me a chance to start again... I have already come to enjoy this feeling.
突然想起一件好笑的事情——我在这边给自己安排的假身份，是一个离家出走的叛逆少女。
I've just realized something funny... The false identity I gave myself here is that of a rebellious young girl that ran away from home.
很扯，对吧？但确实让我焕发了第二春。而且…我伪装得很好。人的心态会被他人所扮演的社会角色左右——没有什么比一位可怜的少女更容易惹人疼爱了。

Ridiculous, right? But, it's given me a second chance at youth. Plus... I play the role well. People's attitudes are influenced by another character's role in society... And what is more loveable than a pitiful young girl?
这让我想起…小时候的我躺在床上总是幻想，倘若我出生在另一个星球，会不会过上完全不同的人生？
This reminds me... When I was a child, I used to lie on my bed and fantasize. I wondered if I was born on another planet, would my life have been completely different?
可惜，现实没有如果。倒是这座梦境给了我个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种*扮演他人*的感觉了，哈哈。

Unfortunately, there are no hypotheticals in the real world. But it was this Dreamscape that actually gave me the chance to start again... And I've come to enjoy the feeling of playing another character... Haha.
突然想起一件好笑的事情——我在这边给自己安排的假身份，是一个离家出走的叛逆少女。
I've just realized something funny... The false identity I gave myself here is that of a rebellious young girl that ran away from home.
很扯，对吧？但确实让我焕发了第二春。而且…我伪装得很好。人的心态会被他人所扮演的社会角色左右——没有什么比一位可怜的少女更容易惹人疼爱了。

Ridiculous, right? But, it's given me a second chance at youth. Plus... I play the role well. People's attitudes are influenced by another character's role in society... And what is more loveable than a pitiful young girl?
这让我想起…小时候的我躺在床上总是幻想，倘若我出生在另一个星球，会不会过上完全不同的人生？
This reminds me... When I was a child, I used to lie on my bed and fantasize. I wondered if I was born on another planet, would my life have been completely different?
可惜，现实没有如果。倒是这座梦境给了我个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种*扮演他人*的感觉了，哈哈。

Unfortunately, there are no hypotheticals in the real world. But it was this Dreamscape that actually gave me the chance to start again... And I've come to enjoy the feeling of playing another character... Haha.
男人似乎对你的打扰表示不悦。他静静地看着你，过了好一会儿才开口。
The man seems displeased at you disturbing him. He stares at you silently for a considerable while before opening his mouth to speak.
知道流梦礁最大的优点是什么吗？清静。
Do you know what the greatest thing about the Dreamflux Reef is? The peace and quiet.
没有响个不停的喇叭，没有闪来闪去的灯光，也没有会走路的广告牌过来烦你。
There are no horns blaring constantly, no flashing lights, and no walking billboards to hassle you.
实话告诉你吧，这会儿我刚种完田回来，就想找个清静的地方喘口气……
Honestly, I just finished planting in my fields and was searching for a quiet place to take a breather...
You can farm in a dream?
很稀奇吗？家族还能在梦里盖楼呢。
Is it that strange? The Family builds buildings in the dream.
虽然不像筑梦师那么专业，但只要决心足够坚定，任何人都可以把梦境塑造成想要的样子。你得先这样，再这样……
Though we may not be as professional as Dreamweavers, all it takes is firm determination and anyone can mold the Dreamscape into the vision they desire. First you do this, then you do that...
哟，你居然也对种田感兴趣？真是少见。
Oh, you're interested in farming, too? This is rare.
虽然不像筑梦师那么专业，但只要决心足够坚定，任何人都可以把梦境塑造成想要的样子。你得先这样，再这样……
Though we may not be as professional as Dreamweavers, all it takes is firm determination and anyone can mold the Dreamscape into the vision they desire. First you do this, then you do that...
男人兴奋地为你讲述了梦境耕耘的一百个注意事项。
The man excitedly reels off hundreds of things to look out for when farming in the Dreamscape.
呼，难得有人愿意一口气听我说这么多——梦里的人都不喜欢种田，看来你是个可塑之才啊！
Phew, it's rare to find someone willing to listen to me sharing all of this... No one in the dream enjoys farming. But it seems that you could be someone I could work with!
我叫梅隆，要是你对种田感兴趣的话，欢迎随时来找我探讨。
My name is Mellon. If you're interested in farming, you're welcome to come and discuss it with me whenever you please.
正好田里没活，你想要聊什么？
I actually don't have any plants to tend to at the moment. What do you want to talk about?
I want to talk about your fields.
我的田…它设在流梦礁城外，一处偏僻的梦境角落…原本我想过去「绿洲的时刻」选址，但被猎犬拒绝了。
My fields... They're located outside the Dreamflux Reef city, in a remote corner of the Dreamscape... I originally wanted to find land in the Moment of Oasis, but the Hounds refused me.
那些受欢迎的梦里可没有空间给人种田——像什么「黄金的时刻」，早就被高楼挤满了。
Those popular dream areas don't have enough space to allow people fields to farm in... Places like the Golden Hour have long since been filled up by giant buildings.
当然，梦里种田也得讲究家族法。十二时刻的时间都被锁死了，只有在流梦礁，作物才会生长。
Of course, you have to pay attention to the laws of The Family if you want to plant fields in a dream. The time in the Twelve Hours is frozen, and crops will only grow in the Dreamflux Reef.
But this place has no sun.
But this place has no soil.
这地方也没水和肥料啊。
But this place has no water or fertilizer.
…啊哈哈，倒也没有那么拟真。每天浇一遍苏乐达就够了。
...Ahaha, farming here is not that realistic. I just have to water them with SoulGlad once a day and they're good.
可惜，现在大家都用合成机生产粮食，谁又能理解一分耕耘一分收获的快乐呢……
Unfortunately, everyone uses synthesizers to produce food nowadays... No one understands the joy of "reaping what you sow" anymore...
Why have you decided to stay in the Dreamflux Reef?
实不相瞒，我在现实里是星际和平公司的一员，年终奖抽中了来匹诺康尼的旅游机会……
I will not hide it from you. In the real world, I am a member of the IPC. I won a ticket to travel to Penacony in the end-of-year raffle...
原本以为最火的「黄金的时刻」会足够有新意，谁曾想那地方跟其他都市星球没什么区别——都太城市化了。

Originally, I thought that the Golden Hour that everyone loves so much would be exciting enough for me. What I didn't expect was that it would be no different to any other urban planet... Far too urbanized for me.
Is urbanization not a good thing?
别误会，我可是公司员工，怎么会认为城市不好呢？可如果连旅游都只能看见千篇一律的景观，未免太无聊了些。
Don't get me wrong. I am an IPC member, so how could I believe that urbanization is a bad thing? However, if even my travel destinations offer nothing but the same scenery, I'm going to find it dull.
所以，我一直想要去一个和庇尔波因特不同的地方。这流梦礁…算是实现了一半吧。
So, I always wanted to go somewhere different to Pier Point. With the Dreamflux Reef... I guess I've half-achieved that.
Let's leave it here for now.
没事，我很高兴有人愿意听我说话。
Alright! I'm very happy to have someone willing to listen to me.
那再见，我做点别的事情打发时间。
Farewell. I shall find something else to kill the time.
田地是最公平的，有劳才有得。不干活，就没饭吃。
The farms are the definition of fairness. If you want to benefit, you have to do the work. If you don't work, you'll have nothing to eat.
现实也是一样。有些事情，不把脚踏进泥里，就永远无法做成…越是参加劳动，对这样的道理感悟也越深刻。

The real world is the same. There are some things that you will never be able to achieve if you don't get your hands dirty... The more you get involved in real labor, the more you will understand this truth.
唉，这样的日子还能持续多久呢？
Ah, how much longer can the days continue like this?
忧虑笼罩了梅隆的脸庞，仿佛田地上空的乌云。
Worry begins to cover Mellon's face like dark clouds over a field.
你应该也听说了，流梦礁正在逐渐崩塌。或许过不了多久，这地方就会消失。到时候梦里就只剩下那呆板的十二时刻可去了。

You must have heard that the Dreamflux Reef is gradually collapsing. There is a chance that this place will disappear very soon. When that time comes, the dream will only have the boring Twelve Hours to offer.
更难顶的是，这地方一时半会儿又毁不掉。就像你明明得了绝症，却偏偏是早期，距离发作还有几年活头……

What's worse is that this place will still not be destroyed for a while. It's like being diagnosed with a terminal illness, but in the early stages. Like you still have a few years before it takes effect...
抱歉，扯远了…唉，好不容易才找到可以种地的梦境。这样的日子还能持续多久呢？
Sorry, I got carried away... Ah, I finally managed to find a Dreamscape that allows me to tend to my fields. How much longer can days like this continue?
啧，过上男耕女织的生活就这么难吗？
Tsk, is it really this hard to enjoy an old-fashioned, traditional life?
梅隆的眉头紧皱成一团，仿佛隆起的田埂。
Mellon's brows furrow into a frown, like the raised banks of a cultivated field.
我之所以这么热衷于劳动，是因为我出生在一个农业星球。那里环境不好，必须经常开垦新的田地、精耕细作，不然就会闹饥荒。

The only reason I am so passionate about hard labor like this is because I was born on a farming planet. The environment there is poor and new fields must be cultivated constantly and carefully to avoid famine.
自从并入星际贸易网络后，原本能用来耕作的土地都被铺上了高速路，粮食供应也被星际和平公司一手包揽。再没有饥荒出现，也没有值得开垦的地方了。

Ever since we were integrated into the Interstellar trade network, all land that could be used for farming has been paved over with highways and the IPC has taken over our food supplies. There is no more risk of hunger and no more land is worth farming.
可惜，工厂终究不像田里那样令人安心。我加入公司、来到宇宙，就是为了找到可以平静生活的地方……
Unfortunately, factories are nowhere near as comforting to work in as the fields. I joined the IPC and travelled the universe just so that I could find a place to live a quiet life...
没想到泛银河市场里的星球基本都被开发了个遍，仅剩的几片净土也都是漫天要价的生态旅游区…只有在梦里，才能找到免费的处女地。

What I did not expect is that basically every planet in the pan-cosmic market has been completely developed, and the few remaining areas of untouched land are ecotourism areas with ridiculous prices... It's only inside a dream that I can find free, untouched land.
啧…我只是想体验男耕女织的简单生活，为什么就这么难呢！
Tsk... I just want to experience a simple, traditional life. Why should that be so hard!?
梅隆的眉头紧皱成一团，仿佛隆起的田埂。
Mellon's brows furrow into a frown, like the raised banks of a cultivated field.
泛银河市场里的星球基本都被开发了个遍，仅剩的几片净土也都是漫天要价的生态旅游区…只有在梦里，才能找到免费的处女地。

Every planet in the pan-cosmic market has been completely developed, and the few remaining areas of untouched land are ecotourism areas with ridiculous prices... It's only inside a dream that I can find free, untouched land.
啧…我只是想体验男耕女织的简单生活，为什么就这么难呢！
Tsk... I just want to experience a simple, traditional life. Why should that be so hard!?
哈哈哈，田里怎么能长出钞票来呢？
Hahaha, how would money grow in the land?
…说起来，曾经有个皮皮西人也对种田表示过好奇，还兴高采烈地让我带他去参观。
...That reminds me, there was a Pepeshi person who was very curious about farming before, too. He even excitedly asked me to show him around the field.
一问才知道，他居然想把苜蓿钞种在地里，还说过上几年就能成为梦境首富。我拗不过他，就圈了一块地让他自己捣鼓……

It was only when I asked him that I learned he planned to plant Alfalfa credits in the land... He said that in a few years, he would be a Dreamscape millionaire. I couldn't convince him otherwise, so I circled off some land for him to play with...
结果第二年挖开一看，别说长出钞票来，连原本那些钞票都不翼而飞了。
In the end, when he came to dig it up the next year, not only were there no banknotes to harvest... Even the ones he originally planted had vanished without a trace.
所以说啊，种田也要讲究家族法！
That's why I say you have to abide by The Family's rules even when farming!
…说起来，曾经有个皮皮西人也对种田表示过好奇，还兴高采烈地让我带他去参观。
...That reminds me, there was a Pepeshi person who was very curious about farming before, too. He even excitedly asked me to show him around the field.
一问才知道，他居然想把苜蓿钞种在地里，还说过上几年就能成为梦境首富。我拗不过他，就圈了一块地让他自己捣鼓……

It was only when I asked him that I learned he planned to plant Alfalfa credits in the land... He said that in a few years, he would be a Dreamscape millionaire. I couldn't convince him otherwise, so I circled off some land for him to play with...
结果第二年挖开一看，别说长出钞票来，连原本那些钞票都不翼而飞了。
In the end, when he came to dig it up the next year, not only were there no banknotes to harvest... Even the ones he originally planted had vanished without a trace.
所以说啊，种田也要讲究家族法！
That's why I say you have to abide by The Family's rules even when farming!
若鸟儿生来并无镣铐，又是何物束缚我命运……
Birds are born with no shackles, then what fetters my fate?
这一句要舒缓地唱，就像星星在夜空中缓慢亮起，船只从月光照耀的港湾出航……
This line should be sung gently, like stars slowly lighting up in the night sky, or like a ship slowly setting sail from a moonlit harbor...
在她温柔的哼唱下，熟悉的旋律仿佛蒙上了不一样的色彩。她注意到你的到来，微笑着向你点头致意。
Under the gentle tone of her humming, this familiar melody seems to take on a whole new meaning. As she notices your arrival, she smiles and nods her head to greet you.
What is that you were singing?
歌手知更鸟闻名银河的作品，《使一颗心免于哀伤》。
It's a famous piece by Robin, a singer known across the cosmos: If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking.
噢不，我只是一位退休的音乐教师。
Oh, no. I'm just a retired music teacher.
呵呵，多动听啊，年轻人的歌声果然充满了活力。
Hehe. You have a lovely voice. The voices of the young are always so full of vitality.
自从退休之后，我就在这里教孩子们唱歌，刚刚我正在备课呢。
Ever since I retired, I have taught children here to sing. I was just preparing a lesson.
孩子们来自阿斯德纳星系的各处，有空便通过入梦装置聚在这里。虽然在现实中他们可能永远无法拥有接受音乐教育的机会，但在梦中我们得以自由自在地歌唱。

Children from all over the Asdana star system use dream devices to gather here when they get time. Though they may never have opportunities to receive musical education in the real world, they can sing freely as they please here in the dream.
《使一颗心免于哀伤》深受孩子们喜爱，我们最近正在逐字逐句地打磨与练习。希望有一天，现实中的人们也能听见他们动人的歌声。

If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking is very popular with the children. Recently, we have been practicing and focusing on every word and syllable, in the hopes that one day the real world will get to hear their beautiful voices.
I look forward to that day.
在大家的帮助下，孩子们进步得飞快。不久之后，他们也许就能进行完整的演唱了。
The children have been improving quickly thanks to everyone's help. They may even be ready for a full recital soon.
当然可以！知识理应在梦境中自由流通，每个人都有接受教育的权利与机会。
Of course! Knowledge should flow freely in the dreamscape. Everyone should have the rights and opportunity to receive education.
Thank you for your hard work.
我的付出不值一提，是梦境之中所有人共同的努力才使得这些贫苦的孩子们拥有了受教育的机会。
My hard work is nothing really. It is the hard work of everyone in the Dreamscape that has allowed these poor children to receive an opportunity to be educated.
梦境是虚拟的，但这虚拟的空间却给予了我们跨越距离相遇的机会。
The dreamscape may be virtual, but this virtual space has given us the opportunity to traverse distance and come together.
即便是残翼的鸟儿，在这梦中，亦有飞翔的可能。为了这一天，我会一直守望下去。
Even a bird with clipped wings has the potential to fly in a dream. I will always be watching over them, so that they may see this day.
Are you up for a chat?
没问题，和孩子们正式排练的时间还早。年轻人，你想聊些什么？
No problem. It is still too early to arrange a formal rehearsal with the children. What did you want to talk about, youngster?
为什么想要帮助这些孩子？
Why do you want to help these children?
要说这个念头何时萌发的，可能要追溯到我第一次来到阿斯德纳星系的时候。
If you mean where this idea first originated from, I would say it was likely from when I first came to the Asdana star system.
我第一次看到了梦的具象化，神奇的联觉梦境将身处不同空间的人们联系在一起，创造出种种奇观。
It was the first time I saw the materialization of a dream. The mysterious Synesthesia Dreamscape connected people from different spaces together to create all sorts of wonders.
令人遗憾的是，联觉梦境变成了纸醉金迷的美梦，而我从那时便想，如果大家能够来到虚拟空间中分享知识和技能，该有多好。

Regrettably, the Synesthesia Dreamscape quickly transformed into a dream of indulgence and luxury. It was then that I thought how amazing it would be if everyone was able to gather in a virtual space to share their knowledge and skills.
在我退休之后，我终于能够着手去利用梦境的功能，让现实中贫苦的孩子们接受音乐教育。
After I retired, I was finally able to make use of the Dreamscape's functions and provide musical education to impoverished children in the real world.
梦境对您来说意味着什么？
What does the Dreamscape mean to you?
梦境么…对我来说，它是现实的一种补充。
The Dreamscape... For me, it is a supplement to the real world.
在现实中，我因为车祸失去了行动的能力，但在梦中，我却能够跨越遥远的距离与孩子们相遇。
In the real world, I lost the ability to move because of a traffic accident. But, in the dream, I am able to traverse vast distances to meet with these children.
但我们在梦中所做的一切，都是为了反哺现实——我们在梦中做好准备，从而在现实中更好地飞翔。
However, everything that we do in the dream world is to enrich ourselves in reality... We prepare ourselves in the dream that we may fly higher in the real world.
平时有遇到什么难题吗？
Are there any troubles you've faced along the way?
入梦装置的价格、我身体的病痛、孩子们的身体状况…乃至于家族的举动，都会对我们这一方小小的合唱团造成巨大的影响。
The price of dream devices, my affliction and symptoms, the children's physical conditions... and even the actions of The Family have a huge influence on our tiny little chorus.
所幸在大家的帮助下，这些困难没有打倒我们。未来也许会有更困难的时候，但我坚信只要我们不放弃，一定能够安然度过。

Fortunately, thanks to everyone's help, these challenges did not bring us down. There may be even greater challenges in the future, but I firmly believe that as long as we don't give up, we will be able to make it through safely.
That's all the questions I have.
Then I'll return to prepping for class.
年轻人，愿你们在大海静谧的怀抱中安享美梦之后，为世界献上一束破晓的光。再见。
Youngster, I wish that you would offer a ray of light to the world after enjoying the sweet dream in the silent embrace of the ocean. Farewell.
孩子们一直在稳定地进步，他们的潜力多么大啊……
The children have been making steady progress, and they all have such amazing potential...
在现实中，这些孩子往往都身负某些缺陷，他们或不善与人交往，或自小患有某种疾病…总之，他们是生活在社会暗面的边缘人。

In reality, all of these children suffer with some kind of disadvantage. Some of them struggle with social interaction, some of them have struggled with their health from a young age... Whatever it is, they are all marginalized people that live in the shadows of society.
自从在球笼事故中失去行动能力之后，我明白了一件事——相比于怜悯和同情，他们更需要的是尊重和平等对待。
Ever since I lost my ability to move in a Spheroid accident, I've come to realize something... What they need more than pity and sympathy is respect and equal treatment.
在与他们一起训练的过程中，我们遭遇了无数困难，灰心丧气、中途退出、被误解、被拒绝…甚至恶语相向——但他们终究没有辜负自己的努力。

In the process of training with them, we have encountered countless hardships. Becoming disheartened, giving up, being misunderstood, being rejected... We have even exchanged harsh words... But in the end, they never gave up on all their hard work.
每次看到他们互相配合，快乐地沉浸在音乐之中，不断向着更好的自己前进的时候，我就像目睹奇迹一般幸福……
Every time I see them working together, happily immersed in the music and constantly moving towards a better version of themselves... The joy I feel is like I'm watching a miracle unfold before me.
除了音乐之外，孩子们也应该接触其他的学科……
Children should be exposed to other subjects beside music, too.
艺术能够帮助人们更好地面对生活中的种种苦难，但毕竟无法直接解决实际的生活问题。
Art can allow people to better face the various challenges of life, though it cannot directly solve our real-world problems.
我计划在接下来的日子里，与其他退休的老师一起，为孩子们开设更加系统的课程。
In the coming future, I plan to work with other retired teachers to put together a more systematic syllabus.
年轻人，你觉得孩子们会对什么样的学科感兴趣？
Youngster, what kind of subjects do you think children are interested in?
例如机械制造、园艺、烹饪这样的课程…是的，它们非常实用。
You mean like engineering, gardening, cooking...? You're right. They've been very practical subjects.
例如逻辑、数学这样的课程…是的，它们能极大地提升思维能力。
You mean like logic and mathematics...? You're right. That will help them to greatly improve their thinking skills.
Maybe they should be taught according to their individual skills?
有道理，孩子们的天赋不同，擅长的东西也不同，能够扬长避短是最好的。
You may have a point. Children have different talents and excel in different areas. It would be best to utilize their strengths and avoid their weaknesses.
可惜我们人手太少，一时之间找不到更多的教师。
It's a shame that we are so understaffed and cannot find any more teachers at the moment.
听说博识学会向来以传播知识为使命，也许我应该联系他们。感谢你的意见，年轻人。
I hear that the mission of the Intelligentsia Guild has always been to spread knowledge. Maybe I should contact them? Thank you for your thoughts, youngster.
我不明白，为什么总有人当着孩子的面对他们的努力冷嘲热讽！
I have never understood how there are people that can stare a child in the eye while mocking their hard work!
有许多人并不认可我的所作所为，他们相信无论如何你都不可能将劣质的种子培育成参天大树。
There are many people that do not approve of what I am doing. They believe that no matter what you do, a damaged seed can never be cultivated into a great tree.
我能理解这样的悲观预期，但我不明白，他们为什么要当面打击孩子的自信心！
While I understand their pessimistic outlooks, I don't understand why they would attack a child's self-confidence in front of them like that!
曾有一个孩子好不容易鼓起勇气唱出自己的声音，却被人当面嘲讽难听。回去之后，我便再也没有见过她。
I had a child who worked really hard to gather her courage and sing out loud, yet people laughed at her and told her she was terrible. I have not seen her again since she left.
从始至终，我希望的从不是他们长成别人眼里的参天大树，而是他们能够拥有像普通人一样的生活，能够在悲伤的时候、喜悦的时候想起音乐，想起那些充满希望的事物——

From the very beginning, my aspiration was not for them to grow into what others see as vast, towering trees. It was for them to be able to enjoy the life of a normal person. That when they were happy or sad, they would be able to think of music and think of those moments full of hope...
唉，就连这样微小的愿望，也有人无情地践踏！
Ah... There are people out there that would heartlessly trample even a tiny little hope like this!
I wonder how much longer I can accompany them...
受伤之后，我的身体一天不如一天了，最近就连入梦的时候也会感觉疲惫。
Since I was injured, my health has been worsening by the day. Recently, I've been feeling fatigued even when entering the dream.
虽然平时在训练的时候，我常常有意无意和孩子们开玩笑，老师要是突然消失了该怎么办，但他们总是嘻嘻哈哈地应付过去。
Even though I'm constantly joking with them about "what if the teacher suddenly disappears one day" during our practices, they always just laugh it off.
也许下次该让孩子们学习一些悲伤的歌曲，毕竟这是无可回避的人生话题。总有一天他们会飞向天空，而我会坠落大地——
Maybe next time I should teach the children some sad songs. This is a life topic that cannot be avoided forever, after all. One day, they will soar toward the sky, and I will fall to the ground...
但悲伤和眼泪令幸福与微笑显得如此珍贵，我们用美将哀痛的事实包裹，吞咽下去，而这就是艺术能带给我们的力量。
But it is sadness and tears that make smiles and joy all the more precious. We wrap our sadness and suffering in beautiful packaging and swallow them. That is the power that art can bring us.
忆质的流动速度变得越来越快，越来越快……
The speed of the memoria flow is growing faster...
流梦礁的忆质， 越来越不正常了……
It seems like the Dreamflux Reef's memoria is becoming increasingly abnormal...
长期观察结合精密的测量，我得出的结果应该不会有多大误差。
Based on my long-term observation and precise measurements, I'm sure my result shouldn't have many errors.
真的吗？看来你的灵敏度堪比精密的科学仪器。
Is that true? It looks like your sensitivity is comparable to a precision scientific instrument.
不对，你是不是在和我开玩笑…算了，我都习惯了。
No way. Are you messing around with me...? Never mind. You're not the only one anyway.
自我开始研究忆质动力学以来，我就一直在监测阿斯德纳忆域的忆质流动情况。
Since I started my research on memoria dynamics, I've been monitoring the flow of memoria in the Asdana Memory Zone.
不对…肯定有什么怪东西在影响着流梦礁……
It can't be... There's definitely something strange affecting the Dreamflux Reef...
不好意思，我要继续观测了……
Please excuse me. I need to continue my observation...
Are you up for a chat?
时间宝贵，请尽可能长话短说。
Time is precious. Please keep it concise.
我曾是来自折纸大学的学者，专业是忆质动力学。为了完成我的课题，我一直在流梦礁工作。
I'm a scholar from the Paperfold University, specializing in memoria dynamics. To complete my research, I have been working in the Dreamflux Reef.
除了学者的身份之外，我也经常在流梦礁开设关于忆质的科普活动，担任孩子们的科学教师。
Besides being a scholar, I often run science programs on memoria in the Dreamflux Reef and serve as a science teacher for the kids.
忆质就像是精神领域的液体，它会流动，蒸发，汇聚，它能溶解、沸腾、凝固。它能够影响意识，塑造幻觉，产生梦境……
Memoria is like a fluid on the mental dimension. It will flow, evaporate, and converge. It can dissolve, boil, and solidify. It can influence consciousness, shape illusions, and produce dreams...
所谓的忆质动力学，便是研究其运动规律并加以应用的学科。
And so, memoria dynamics is the study of its laws of motion and their application.
What is happening to the Dreamflux Reef?
简单来说，组成它的忆质在不断流失——终有一天，它会消融在忆域的深海之中。
Simply put, the memoria that forms it is depleting. One day, it will dissolve in the depths of the Memory Zone's sea.
That's all the questions I have.
虽然我还没有得出精确的结论，但是种种迹象都表明，流梦礁正变得越来越危险。
While I haven't reached a definitive conclusion yet, all signs suggest that Dreamflux Reef is growing increasingly perilous.
So please, leave while you can.
Is the Dreamflux Reef... going to disappear...?
忆域就像一片海洋，流梦礁便是其中一座渺小的岛屿。
The Memory Zone is like a sea, and the Dreamflux Reef is only a tiny island on it.
但如果组成岛屿的忆质不断流失，那么终有一天它会消融在忆域之中。
However, if the memoria that is forming the island is constantly depleting, the island will inevitably dissolve in the depths of Memory Zone one day.
她在这里度过了短暂而绚烂的一生，难道就要这样葬身于无底的时间之中，与荒蛮的迷因相伴吗？
She has spent a short and splendid life in this place. Is she going to be buried here for eternity in bottomless time, and be accompanied by nothing but savage memes?
只要找出原因，也许就能扭转忆质的异常活动。
As long as we can find out the cause, we could perhaps reverse the abnormal activity of the memoria.
流梦礁的忆质都在朝向黑洞那端涌去……
The Dreamflux Reef's memoria is flowing toward the Black Hole...
如果我们能够找到诱发忆质如此运动的事物，并且找到办法消除它，那么一切也许还来得及。
If we can find the thing that induces such a movement of memoria and discover a way to eliminate it, it may not be too late to savage the situation.
听说家族邀请了众多派系的宾客来到美梦，但愿有人能够发现这一点，并且去阻止吧。
I heard that The Family has invited many guests from different factions to the dream. Let us hope that someone can discover this and stop it in time.
并非是我想打击您，想凭一个人的力量扭转忆质流动的趋势太困难了。
Not that I wish to put you down, but it will be tough to try to reverse the flow of memoria single-handedly.
Maybe no one can stop it.
只要付出了自己的全力，也许什么结局我都能接受吧。
As long as I did my best, whatever the outcome is, I'll accept it.
许多人忽视了她的贡献，这绝对违反了学术的良心！
Many ignore her contributions, and this is an absolute violation of the academic conscience!
曾有这样一位女性，是她首创了对于忆质运动的科学研究。
There was a woman who pioneered the scientific study of memoria movements.
她是「钟表匠」的伙伴，在灾难中的岁月为美梦无私奉献，留下诸多珍贵的手稿，而后籍籍无名地死去。
She was the Watchmaker's companion and selflessly dedicated herself to the dream during years of disasters, leaving behind numerous precious manuscripts, yet she passed away without any recognition.
在折纸大学，忆质动力学的课本里居然连她的名字都没有，取而代之的是所谓的学术权威——她无力为自己辩解，但这并不是他们篡夺学术的借口！

At the Paperfold University, her name isn't even mentioned in the memoria dynamics textbook. Instead, it was replaced by the so-called academic authorities — she cannot defend herself, but this is no excuse for their usurpation of her works!
因为受够了那些所谓权威的恶劣行径，我来到流梦礁探寻她的足迹……
Because I had enough of the bad behavior of those so-called authorities, I came to the Dreamflux Reef in search of her footsteps...
可恶的剽窃者，你们不能欺瞒所有人！
Evil plagiarists, you cannot fool everyone!
能够花这么多时间在自己感兴趣的研究话题之上——回过头想象，也是一种幸福……
Come to think about it... I consider myself lucky to be able to spend so much time on a research topic that interests me...
我在折纸大学研究忆质动力学，那是个很难的学科，建系以来也只有寥寥不过百人毕业。
I studied memoria dynamics, a very challenging subject, at Paperfold University, and only a few hundred people have graduated since the department was founded.
我的师兄师姐里有很多是被调剂来这个专业的，但我是真心喜欢关于「记忆」的世界，我喜欢它澄澈明净的时候，也喜欢它神秘无常、波涛汹涌的时候。

Many of my seniors were transferred to this specialization, but I genuinely love the world of "Remembrance." Whether they are transparent and clean or mysterious and unpredictable, I love them all equally.
虽然不是忆者，但我也渴望了解忆质的本质，渴望探寻生命所能抵达的深度。
I may not be a Memokeeper, but I too am curious to find out more about the nature of memoria and explore the depths to which life can reach.
在这一路上，我遇到了许多震撼人心的事与人，成群结队如同光影一般闪烁的忆者，庞大到令人窒息的忆域迷因，在忆质的潮水中退守最后家园的人们……

Along the way, I encountered many stunning things and people, such as hordes of Memokeepers who shimmered like lights and shadows, gigantic Memory Zone memes suffocating in their size, and people who retreated to and guarded their last homes in the tidal wave of memoria...
那些旅途的孤独和痛苦，回头望去也许是上天的馈赠——它将痛苦教给我们，同时也教会了我们从痛苦中感受幸福的能力。
Looking back at the loneliness and pain in these journeys, they may have been a gift from heaven — to teach us pain as well as the ability to feel happiness from those painful moments.
我会一直坚守在这里，为了我自己的理想……
I am going to always stay here... for my ideal...
那股影响流梦礁忆质的异常力量似乎消失了……
That abnormal energy influencing the memoria of Dreamflux Reef seems to have disappeared...
这样一来，流梦礁能够缓慢地修复自身，也许有一天，它会变回从前那个繁华的样子。
In that case, the Dreamflux Reef can gradually recover itself. Perhaps one day, it will return to prosperity.
不过是谁做了这一切呢？
But who is the one behind it?
They must be a great hero.
是啊，如果没有人挺身而出，这样棘手的问题绝不会自己消失。
Yes. If no one stands out and takes action, such a difficult situation will not resolve by itself.
一定是很多人共同的努力。
I'm sure it's a team effort.
是啊，面对如此棘手的问题，汇聚众人的力量才有解决的可能。
Yes. When facing with such a difficult situation, only the power of teamwork can resolve it.
原来是你…不愧是和拉扎莉娜女士一样的无名客啊！
So it's you... Not bad for a Nameless like Madam Razalina!
无论是谁，我衷心感谢所有帮助过流梦礁的人。虽然我并非这里的原住民，但流梦礁几乎已经是我第二个故乡了。
Regardless, I am sincerely grateful to those who helped the Dreamflux Reef. I may not be a local of this place, but the Dreamflux Reef has almost been my second hometown.
作为学者，我也知道自己有时不合时宜，有时过于死板严谨，甚至令人不可理喻——但流梦礁的人们包容了我的缺点，为我的研究提供了许多方便。

As a scholar, I acknowledge that at times I may have acted inappropriately, overly rigid, stringent, or even incomprehensible — yet the people of the Dreamflux Reef have embraced my shortcomings and supported my research in numerous ways.
无论如何，我不会忘记这里的人们，和这里曾发生的故事。毕竟，研究忆质的人，永远不会轻慢那些美好的记忆……
No matter what, I'll never forget the people and the stories here. After all, people who study memoria will never take those beautiful memories for granted.
Are you up for a chat?
时间宝贵，请尽可能长话短说。
Time is precious. Please keep it concise.
现在流梦礁的情况怎么样？
How's the situation of the Dreamflux Reef now?
根据我的观测，流梦礁的忆质不再向着美梦的方向涌流。
Based on my observation, the Dreamflux Reef's memoria is no longer flowing toward sweeter dreams.
这就意味着忆质会重新盈满流梦礁被腐蚀的空洞——如果能得到恰当的建设，那么它总有一天会变得繁荣而美丽。
This means the memoria will replenish the corroded void of Dreamflux Reef, and if it is properly constructed, the Dreamflux Reef will flourish and become beautiful one day.
你接下来的计划是什么？
我完成了自己的课题，关于忆质的论文也马上要出版了。
I have completed my research, and my paper on memoria is also about to be published.
也许我会离开流梦礁前往忆域中更加深邃的地方，但在这之前，我想再好好搜集与研究拉扎莉娜的手稿。每次阅读，我总会有新的想法，新的灵感……

Perhaps I'll leave the Dreamflux Reef and travel to a deeper place in the Memory Zone, but before I do, I'd like to gather and study Razalina's manuscripts again. Every time I read them, I'll get new ideas and new inspirations...
That's all the questions I have.
再见，愿我们都能在彼此的旅途中见到壮美的风景。
Goodbye. May we all see magnificent scenery on each other's journeys.
流梦礁的调查研究告一段落，是留下继续研究拉扎莉娜的手稿，还是前往别处研究新的话题……
The investigation and study of the Dreamflux Reef have come to an end. Should I stay to continue studying Razalina's manuscripts or travel elsewhere to study new topics...?
当初无意间观测到流梦礁异常的忆质运动，还在寻找毕业课题的我就被此吸引，长期地驻扎在此地。

Initially, I was in search of a topic for my graduation project when I chanced upon the unusual movement of memoria in the Dreamflux Reef. I was deeply attracted to it and stayed here for a long time.
流梦礁给了我许多美好的记忆，我的研究成果也即将发表。
The Dreamflux Reef has given me many beautiful memories, and I am also about to publish my research.
是留下继续研究拉扎莉娜的手稿，还是前往别处研究新的话题…人生未来的方向，我得好好想想。
Should I stay to continue studying Razalina's manuscripts or travel elsewhere to study new topics...? I must think about my future and my life direction.
流梦礁得救了，但有些老朋友终究还是不在了……
The Dreamflux Reef may be saved, but some of my old friends are no longer around...
在驻留流梦礁的这段时间里，我结识了许多朋友。
I had made many friends during my stay in the Dreamflux Reef.
他们不介意我的怪异，时常鼓励我进行研究，与我倾诉他们所知的过往。
They embraced my quirks without reservation and occasionally spurred me on in my research endeavors, sharing with me glimpses of the past as they remembered it.
如果他们能够看到现在的流梦礁，那该多好。
If only they could witness the Dreamflux Reef as it stands today, that would be truly remarkable.
我不该在那个时候对他们坦诚我的测算结果——他们在离世的时候，会对流梦礁的未来感到多么绝望啊……
I shouldn't have been honest with them about my measured results — how much despair they would have felt about the future of Dreamflux Reef when they passed on...
许多人忽视了她的贡献，这绝对违反了学术的良心！
Many ignore her contributions, and this is an absolute violation of the academic conscience!
曾有这样一位女性，是她首创了对于忆质运动的科学研究。
There was a woman who pioneered the scientific study of memoria movements.
她是「钟表匠」的伙伴，在灾难中的岁月为美梦无私奉献，留下诸多珍贵的手稿，而后籍籍无名地死去。
She was the Watchmaker's companion and selflessly dedicated herself to the dream during years of disasters, leaving behind numerous precious manuscripts, yet she passed away without any recognition.
在折纸大学，忆质动力学的课本里居然连她的名字都没有，取而代之的是所谓的学术权威——她无力为自己辩解，但这并不是他们篡夺学术的借口！

At the Paperfold University, her name isn't even mentioned in the memoria dynamics textbook. Instead, it was replaced by the so-called academic authorities — she cannot defend herself, but this is no excuse for their usurpation of her works!
因为受够了那些所谓权威的恶劣行径，我来到流梦礁探寻她的足迹……
Because I had enough of the bad behavior of those so-called authorities, I came to the Dreamflux Reef in search of her footsteps...
可恶的剽窃者，你们不能欺瞒所有人！
Evil plagiarists, you cannot fool everyone!
我好像做了一个很长的梦…梦中我见到了拉扎莉娜女士……
I felt I had a very long dream... In my dream, I saw Madam Razalina...
不知道怎么回事，前不久我好像在梦里睡了过去。
I don't know what happened, but I fell asleep in my dream a while ago.
那是多么美好的梦啊，我遇见了拉扎莉娜女士，她的样子与我想象中的一模一样，小小的身躯，无穷的活力，精辟的观点，优雅的言语……
It was such a beautiful dream. I met Madam Razalina, whose appearance was what I'd always imagined. Her body was petite, but she was energetic, sharp-witted, and could express herself elegantly...
我们一起在流梦礁闲逛，讨论着一道悬而未决的难题。不愧是拉扎莉娜女士，我们马上得出了正确的结果。
We hung out together at the Dreamflux Reef and discussed a difficult conundrum. And as expected of Madam Razalina, we quickly came up with the correct answer.
但就在我要把它记下来时——一股莫名的悲伤惊醒了我，我的枕头也被泪水浸湿了……
But just as I was about to jot it down... An unknown wave of sadness woke me. My pillow was also soaked with tears...
也许你真的见到了拉扎莉娜。
Maybe the woman you met in your dream was really Razalina.
多么希望是这样啊，可惜我学习的知识让我难以相信这点…但梦境本就是混杂着「神秘」的忆域，或许真的是她本人！

How much I wish that were the case. Unfortunately, my knowledge makes it hard for me to believe that... However, Dreamscapes are originally Memory Zones with Enigmata mixed in. Maybe that was really her!
I want to meet Razalina too!
哈哈，她的人格魅力如此超群，即便未见其面也能感受到她的活力。
Haha! What an outstanding personality she had! You could even sense her energy without meeting her.
你们已经在精神层面沟通过了！
You two have communicated on a spiritual level!
是啊，在阅读她的手稿时，我仿佛透过纸面看到了她的灵魂…也许那才是真正深刻的相遇吧。
Exactly. When I was reading her manuscripts, it was as if I could see her soul through the papers... Maybe that was genuinely a profound encounter.
即便那只是幻觉，每每回想起梦中的场景，我还是感到一阵幸福，好像她真的来到了我身边一样。
Even if it was just a hallucination, every time I recall the scene in my dream, I could still feel a surge of happiness as if she had come to me.
拉扎莉娜女士，我会继承你的遗愿走下去的……
Madam Razalina, I'll carry on where you left off...
你好，我是守卫维德，有什么需要帮忙的吗？
Hello, I am Guard Vader. How may I assist you?
诶，又是个生面孔，怎么称呼？
*sigh* Another unfamiliar face. How do I address you?
开拓？真是个好名字！我也喜欢开拓！
Trailblaze? That's a great name! I love trailblazing too.
挥舞着球棒打败怪物的侠客…这个形象放进动画和游戏里一定很有意思！
A hero who swings the baseball bat to defeat monsters? It must be interesting to have such a figure in animations and games!
Just a nameless one, passing by.
哈哈，这里还真有不少像你一样的人。
Haha, you're not the first one here.
总之，欢迎来到流梦礁参观！这里是钟表小子的摇篮，一段沧桑的往昔之梦，一个辉煌时代的落幕之地。
Anyway, welcome to the Dreamflux Reef as a guest! This is the birthplace of Clockie! It is a forlorn dream of bygone days, a place where a glorious era saw its curtain fall.
上电梯的时候看到那个钟表小子的雕像了吗？它是流梦礁的标志性建筑，也见证了流梦礁的兴衰——如果你是钟表小子的粉丝，千万记得与它合个影！

Did you see the statue of Clockie when you got into the elevator? It's an iconic landmark of the Dreamflux Reef and has also witnessed the rise and fall of the Dreamflux Reef... If you're a fan of Clockie, don't forget to take a picture with it!
我是钟表小子的超级粉丝！
I'm a super fan of Clockie!
我和钟表小子是老朋友了。
呃…我懂！谁不想要一位钟表小子一样的朋友啊！
Eh... I get it! Who doesn't want a friend like Clockie?
I don't know who Clockie is.
太遗憾了，下次让我给你推荐几集经典的钟表小子动画吧！你一定会爱上这个可爱的角色的！
What a pity! Let me recommend to you some of his classic cartoons next time! I'm sure you'll love this adorable character!
钟表小子动画延续至今，已经不仅仅是一部影视作品这么简单了。它承载了时代的变迁、历史的更迭，梦境的精神。
Clockie's cartoon has lasted to this day, and it is no longer just a movie and television series. It carries the change of times, the shifts of history, as well as the spirit of Dreamscapes.
虽然「钟表匠」先生从未亲口承认，但我相信，钟表小子的故事就是他自己的故事！也就是我们匹诺康尼的故事！
Mr. Watchmaker might not have admitted it, but I believe Clockie's stories are his own! In other words, they are the stories of us Penaconians!
除了担任守卫之外，我一直在搜集与钟表小子创作相关的物品，希望能在未来为钟表小子建立一座博物馆，但最重要的原画稿却始终不见踪影。

In addition to my job as a guard, I've been collecting items related to the creation of Clockie, hoping to build a museum for Clockie in the future. However, I cannot find the most important item — the original artwork of Clockie.
亲爱的旅客，你们走南闯北，如果有什么相关消息的话，请记得通知我一声！
Dear traveler, you must be exploring more places than me. If you've ever heard of any relevant news, please let me know!
感激不尽！钟表小子博物馆建成的那天，您的名字一定会出现在感谢名单上。
Thank you so much! The day Clockie Museum is up, your name will certainly be on the gratitude list.
没事，您有空留意一下就行，定有酬谢。
It's fine. Just keep an eye out. I'll pay you for it.
And what do I get in return?
我家里还珍藏着钟表小子系列的大量手办，您要是找到了随您挑！
I have a large collection of Clockie figurines. Find the item and you can take your pick!
一不小心就跟您聊上了，瞧我这坏毛病。不耽误您的时间了，祝您玩得愉快！
Pardon me. Looks like I've held you up with my long conversation. I won't take up any more of your time. Have fun!
临别之前，让我们为美梦小镇加油吧！
Before you leave, let's cheer for Dreamville!
Are you up for a chat?
好啊，要是不耽误您的时间，想聊多久都行！
Sure. If you have the time, I'm more than willing to chat with you!
Is your work really so relaxing?
其实我也是义务劳动。流梦礁不像美梦，想来就来，想走就走，只要不出恶性事件，一切都好说。

Honestly, this is a voluntary work. The Dreamflux Reef isn't like the sweet dreams. Here, you can come and go as you please. And as long as you don't cause nasty incidents, you can do whatever you want.
况且现在居民也少了，自然清闲得多。要是今天你不来找我聊天，我肯定在和一帮老家伙下棋呢！

Besides, there aren't many residents now, so my job naturally becomes easier. If you hadn't dropped by here to chat with me today, I'd probably be engaged in a game of chess with a group of elderly folks!
怎么喜欢上钟表小子的？
What's your reason for liking Clockie?
说起来也有点不好意思，小时候父母常常把我一个人留在家里，那阴冷的房间，吓人的雕像，瘆人的鸟叫…是钟表小子的声音赶走我的恐惧，陪着我一起长大。

Well, that's embarrassing. When I was a child, my parents used to leave me alone at home. There were terrifying statues displayed in that cold room with creepy birds chirping... But Clockie's voice chased away my fears and kept me company as I grew up.
所以对我来说，它已经不是一个动画形象了！它就像我的伙伴和家人，一个永远不会变老的守护者！
So, to me, it is no longer just an animated figure! It is like my partner and a family member, a guardian who never ages!
钟表小子博物馆进度如何？
还在筹建之中，真是让人烦恼啊…最紧缺还是资金，以及投资人的信心。
It's still in the pipeline, which is a real pain... What we're lacking now is funding and the confidence of the investors.
不过我不会放弃的，就像钟表小子从来不会放弃一样！
But I won't give up, just like how Clockie never gives up!
That's all the questions I have.
吃好玩好，小心忆域迷因！我也继续工作了。
Enjoy your time here and beware of the Memory Zone Memes! I should continue my work too.
最近有不少客人来到流梦礁，流梦礁一定会慢慢好起来的！
There are quite a number of people coming to the Dreamflux Reef recently. I'm sure this place will slowly get better!
不知从什么时候起，流梦礁变得越来越小，越来越破败，人们走的走，逃的逃，许多人暂别之后便再也没见过面。
I don't know when it started, but the Dreamflux Reef seems to be shrinking and becoming more dilapidated. People have left or fled, and many have never crossed paths again after a temporary farewell.
不过，最近有像你这样的新面孔来到了流梦礁，他们对这里感兴趣，愿意和这里的人们交流。
But there are new faces like you who have recently arrived at the Dreamflux Reef. They are interested in this place and willing to interact with the people here.
也许，在不久的将来，流梦礁将重新变回那个繁荣、美丽的地方，变成那个真正的美梦小镇！愿钟表小子的精神与我们同在！
Perhaps in the near future, the Dreamflux Reef will return to its vibrant and beautiful state, evolving to become that true Dreamville! May the spirit of Clockie be with us!
最近忆域迷因的活动变得有些频繁了，所幸没有发生什么恶性事件。
The activities of the Memory Zone Memes are becoming increasingly frequent, but fortunately, nothing bad happened.
流梦礁所在的地方不太稳定，经常会有忆域迷因闯入城镇。您有遇到过迷因吗？
The location of Dreamflux Reef is somewhat unstable, and Memory Zone memes often break into town. Have you ever encountered a meme?
Yes, and I fought it off.
您真是英明神武！但这样做难免有些危险。
What a brave and mighty hero! But that could be dangerous.
还好没出大事，您下次要小心了。
Luckily nothing serious happened. You should be careful next time.
忆域迷因就像野兽，有些温顺亲人，有些野性暴虐。
A Memory Zone Meme is like a wild beast. Some are gentle and kindred, while some are barbaric and tyrannical.
遇到迷因的时候，保持情绪的平静有助于延缓迷因的行动，然后就找准时机迅速把自己强制唤醒。要是让某些可怕的迷因缠上了，那可没完没了了。

When encountering a meme, maintaining your composure is the key to slowing its actions, and then it's just a matter of seizing the right moment to forcibly jolt yourself awake. There's no way out of its clutches if certain terrifying memes get too familiar with you.
下次碰到类似情况，您可以试试这样做。
Next time you're in a similar situation, you can try doing this.
听说有人私自利用钟表小子的形象为自己牟利，简直太可恶了！
I heard that someone is privately exploiting the image of Clockie for their own gain. This is simply abhorrent!
钟表小子是梦境世界共同的精神财富，不是某些人的个人财产。
Clockie is a shared cultural asset of all Dreamscapes. It's not a personal property.
听说最近有人用它的形象推销自己的产品，甚至在未经原作者许可的情况下扭曲钟表小子的设定，太可恶了！
I heard that someone has been using his image to promote their products lately, even modifying the original settings of Clockie without his creator's permission! This is abhorrent!
更可气的是，每次我去找他们理论，他们总要搬出什么版权之类的东西糊弄我。
What's even more annoying is that every time I go to them to argue about it, they'll always bring out copyright-related jargon to throw me off.
我听不懂他们颠来倒去的法律术语，我只知道钟表小子不是他们手里的牟利工具！
I couldn't grasp the twisted legalese they were using, but one thing was clear: Clockie isn't a tool they should use for personal profit!
唉，我还能见到钟表小子博物馆建成的那一天吗？
Alas, will I ever see the day when the Clockie Museum is built?
自从我成年以来，我便一直在为钟表小子博物馆的建议而奔走。
Ever since I came of age, I've been actively advocating for the Clockie Museum proposal.
我找过不少于五十位投资人，他们都以种种理由拒绝了我的提议，嘲弄我的想法。
I've approached at least fifty investors. All of them rejected my offer and mocked my idea for various reasons.
钟表小子相关的物件已经在我的房间里堆积成山了，也许它们终有一日会变作具有珍贵历史价值的文物…但我还能看到那一天吗？有谁能记得我做的努力吗？
Items related to Clockie have been piling up in my room, and maybe one day, they will become artifacts of significant value... but will I live to see that day? Will anyone remember my efforts?
唉，我其实一直很清楚钟表小子是个虚拟形象…也许我是时候该从年少时的幻梦中走出来了。
*sigh* I'm aware that Clockie is merely a fictional figure... Perhaps it's time for me to let go of the fantastical dreams of my youth.
感谢你的好意，话说回来，其实没人记得也不会怎么样…世上又有几个人的努力能被记住呢？
Thank you for your kindness. Speaking of which, it doesn't matter if no one remembers... How many people in the world are remembered for their efforts anyway?
As long as you did your best.
是啊，连钟表小子都没有彻底打倒过它的敌人……
You're right. Even Clockie has never completely defeated his enemies before...
呸呸呸这些丧气话让您见笑了，您把我说的话忘了吧——钟表小子绝不言败，我也是！
Blah, what am I doing saying all these depressing words! How embarrassing! Just forget what I said — Clockie never admits defeat, and neither do I!
咳咳…最近流梦礁可真热闹，匹诺康尼上一次聚集这么多无名客，还是古老的囚笼时代呢……
Ahem... The Dreamflux Reef is really swarming with visitors these days. The last time Penacony saw so many Nameless gathered here was during the old prison days...
年轻人，你应该也是无名客吧？
Youngster, I guess you're a Nameless too, right?
你让我想起了刚到匹诺康尼的自己…那应该是将近十个琥珀纪之前的事了，我那时也是和你一样意气风发的年轻人，希望能代表「烛墨学派」记录匹诺康尼的历史。

You reminded me of myself when I first arrived in Penacony... That would have been nearly ten Amber Eras ago, and I was a spirited youngster like you, hoping to record the Penacony history on behalf of the Candelagraphos.
Have you lived for such a long time?
是啊，真是好一段漫长的时光，长到历史都已经失真……
Yeah, it has been a really long time, so long that the history has become unreal...
Keen to share your secret to good health?
呵呵，我靠的可不是养生，而是要付出更多代价的方式……
Hehe, it's not about good health, but rather, how to pay higher prices...
年轻人，那是属于肉体的赐福，而我早就已经是一个幽灵了……
Youngster, that is a blessing that belongs to the flesh, and I've long been a ghost...
为了能记录匹诺康尼的未来，我在寿命的终点选择了放弃肉体，成为了一种…只能在梦中存留的迷因。
To document the future of Penacony, I chose to relinquish my physical form at the end of my lifespan, transforming into a sort of... meme that can only stay within dreams.
作为致力于记录的学者，只是付出这种代价就可以见证更多历史，实在是太划算了。
As a scholar dedicated to documentation, paying this price to witness more great histories is worth it.
但我写下的史书却被放在匹诺康尼大图书馆的最底层，被小说、漫画、同谐颂歌和致富秘诀掩盖…但在杜撰的繁荣外，我们还能在这片原始的梦里铭刻真实。

Unfortunately, the history books I've authored now rest at the bottom of the Penacony Grand Library, overshadowed by novels, manga, odes to Harmony, and guides on how to get rich quick... However, amidst the facade of prosperity, we can still etch the truth in this primordial dream.
啊…梦是现实的延伸，记忆的枝桠。时间的光辉从天空洒下，树叶的缝隙间映射出历史的剪影。可那影子太过斑斓，让人看不清面孔，以至于任人打扮。

Oh... dreams are extensions of reality and branches of memories. As the light of time pours down from the sky, the silhouettes of history are cast upon the gaps in the leaves. Yet the shadows are too patchy to reveal its true face, allowing everyone and anyone to dress it in any way they wish.
记得那时，无名客们就站在我面前。他们说，要把这里变成全宇宙最耀眼的地方。
As I recalled, the Nameless were standing before my eyes. They said they wanted to make this the brightest place in the universe.
他们做到了，可他们到哪儿去了呢？变成了哈努兄弟、折纸小鸟、镜子公主和左轮队长，除此便什么也不剩下。
And they did it, but where did they go? They became Brother Hanu, Origami Bird, Mirror Princess, Captain Revolver, and nothing else.
未必，想想那些为匹诺康尼献出生命的人，还有几人知晓他们的名字？
Not necessarily. Think of those who sacrificed their lives for Penacony. How many still know their names?
这是一个没有历史的世界，遗忘是纵情娱乐的终点。
This is a world without history, and oblivion is indulgence's ultimate end.
谢谢你，年轻的无名客，如果「钟表匠」他们知道了，一定会很高兴的。
Thank you, young Nameless. If the Watchmaker and the others knew about it, they would surely rejoice.
「钟表匠」也是太天真了…即使是动画这种晦涩的形式，即使被记住的不是他自身，也仍希望能够把过去的故事传递到后人手上。

The Watchmaker was too naive... Even though it was through the vague form of animation, and he might not be remembered by anyone, he still passionately desired to pass on the tales of yore to future generations.
他的工作完成了，但我的事业还在继续。
He's completed his job, but my career is still ongoing.
而我之后还有后人，后人亦有后人，如此往复，总有些故事能在梦中长存。
And there will be people after me, then more people will come after they have passed, and so forth. There will always be some stories that will live on in the dreams.
Do you have time for a chat?
如果你对历史有兴趣的话，我可以为你讲上一天一夜。
If you're interested in history, I can talk with you all day and night.
What are you up to recently?
我吗？还在整理几本童书的读者来信——别用露出那么惊讶的表情。
Me? I'm still sorting through letters from readers of several children's books — don't look so surprised.
最初我也不赞同这种做法，用幼稚的故事来替代严肃的历史记录，有悖我们学派的原则。可「钟表匠」用他的动画说服了我。

At first, I didn't agree with this approach either. Replacing important historical records with childish stories goes against the principles of our school. But the Watchmaker's animation convinced me.
况且，我也不是完全做了妥协。他们曾经的对话，那些被我记录在册的故事，我把它们处理后掰碎了一点点地塞进作品里。
Besides, I didn't completely compromise. The conversation they had and the stories I documented in the book were processed and broken into digestible chunks before being entered into the work.
刚开始的时候，编辑还会为这事儿来找我麻烦，让我不要在故事里加入奇怪的元素和乱码。
At the start, the editors came at me, telling me not to include strange elements and garbled codes in the story.
可渐渐他们发现，这些内容不仅没有降低销量，反倒激发了读者的解密和背景研究的热情，也就不再多说什么。
But gradually they realized not only the content did not reduce the sales, it inspired readers to solve the codes and conduct background research. And so, they stopped commenting about it.
和「钟表匠」一样，我绕过家族的监管，我也成功把历史传达了出去。
Like the Watchmaker, I bypassed The Family's supervision and successfully released the true histories.
听说过烛墨学派吗？「秉烛而行，照亮文墨」，不让历史被时间埋葬。而我就是学派的一个记录员。
Have you heard of the Candelagraphos? "Illuminate each step with candlelight and bring life to the written word" to ensure that time will not bury the past. I am an archiver in the Candelagraphos.
记录正在发生的历史，这正是我来匹诺康尼的目的。不过，记录员也不止我一个，但活到今天的，就只有我了。
Documenting the history as it is happening is my purpose of coming to Penacony. Of course, I'm not the only archiver, but I'm the only surviving one.
刚脱离公司控制的监狱世界，自然不太安稳，我就这么跟着「钟表匠」他们。一边走，一边记录，有时也帮忙做些书记工作。

As a prison world that broke free from the IPC's grasp, it is only natural that this place ended up becoming unstable. Hence, I followed the Watchmaker and the others. As I wandered, I meticulously recorded my observations and occasionally assisted with clerical tasks.
他们一会儿勾肩搭背，一会儿又因为晚饭吃什么吵起来，经常吵得我写不进东西。
At times, they'd wrap their arms around each other's shoulders, only to later bicker over dinner choices. More frequently, I found it impossible to write while assailed by constant commotion.
这时候，我就会威胁他们，谁要是再吵，我就在历史里记一笔，说他是个笨蛋。
At times like this, I'd threaten them and tell them that whoever was next to argue would be listed as an idiot in the historical annals.
当然，我只是在骗他们，学派不允许篡改历史。可他们不知道啊，就一个个老老实实地坐下来，在我面前装出一副无辜的样子。
Of course, I was only bluffing. The Candelagraphos doesn't allow us to modify history. But how would they know? And so, they obediently sat down and acted innocent in front of me.
这地方不赖吧？既没有家族甜言蜜语的蛊惑，也没有四处巡逻的猎犬。
Isn't this a great place? Neither The Family's bewitching sweet talk nor the patrolling hounds are around.
就和生命一样，比起被豢养后逐渐失去可塑性的匹诺康尼，这样的梦域反而能够承载更丰富的变化。
Just like life, such a dreamland can hold richer permutations than Penacony, which had gradually lost its plasticity after being cultured.
它足够原始，在它身上，你能同时看到过去和未来的影子。
The dreamland is primitive enough for you to see both its past and its future.
看到在监狱的废墟上搭建起新家园的囚犯，看到在梦境的荒漠里飞驰的逐梦客，看到黑暗中不断摸索前路的人们。
You can see prisoners building new homes on the ruins of their prisons, Dreamchasers who speed through the desert of their Dreamscapes, and people who keep groping their way forward in the darkness.
不过，对常年耽溺在金色美梦里的那些人而言，这里或许确如他们所说，是一场「恐怖的噩梦」吧。
However, for those who have been drowning in the golden dream for years, this place is nothing but a "horrible nightmare" to them.
再见，愿群星铭记列车的旅途，遗忘永远追不上你们的脚步。
Farewell. May the stars remember the journey of the Express, and oblivion never match your pace.
历史的美丽之处正在于，它只有寥寥的信息，却能为我们展现出无限的世界。
The allure of history lies in its sparse collection of facts, which can nonetheless unveil a boundless world of possibilities.
再精确的历史，经历了时间和立场的磨砺，都会变得模糊。采撷其中的真实，也是我们的工作之一。

However meticulously documented, history will inevitably succumb to the erosion of time and variances of perspective. Thus, sifting through its layers to uncover the truth is an essential aspect of our job.
以我去过的一颗小行星为例，数个琥珀纪以来，那里的居民一直流传着关于「长尾黑面鲎」的传说。
Taking one of the asteroids I've visited as an example. For several Amber Eras, the inhabitants there have been passing down a legend about the "long-tailed, black-faced horseshoe crabs."
这种生活在冰川深处的巨型节肢动物，以部落的孩童为食。每到长夜降临，人们都会把孩子藏进地窖里，直到第九颗星星升起为止。
These giant arthropods live deep in the glaciers and feed on the children of the tribes. When the long night falls, people hide their children in cellars until the ninth star rises.
实际上，冰川并不允许巨型动物的生存，所谓的怪物，不过是远古时期冰川另一端敌对部落的图腾。

Yet the truth remains that the glaciers pose an insurmountable obstacle to the megafauna's survival. These so-called monsters are merely symbolic totems of the rival tribe situated on the other side of the glaciers from time immemorial.
每到长夜，他们就会潜入村庄抢走幼儿。但这个部落对数字九有着未知崇拜，所以行动只会持续到第九颗星星升起。

Every long night, the rival tribe will sneak into the villages to snatch the young children. But for some unknown reason, this tribe worships the number nine, so the action will only last until the ninth star rises.
而居民们一直以来恐惧的那只巨鲎，早在很久以前，就和自己融合成一个部落了。
And as for the giant horseshoe crabs that the inhabitants have always feared, they had long ago fused themselves into the tribe.
历史的悲怆之处正在于，无论有多么瑰丽，你能把握的也只有来者。
The pathos of history lies in no matter how magnificent it is, all we can grasp is what lies ahead.
你见过匹诺康尼现实的星空吗？许多年前，战火还未停息的时候，它们就挂在那儿。我们坐在一片废墟里望着它们，它们也望着我们。
Have you seen the real stars of Penacony firsthand? Ages ago, before the war ceased, they adorned the sky above us. We sat in the ruins and gazed upward at them as they looked down upon us.
时间流转，匹诺康尼从监狱变成充斥噩梦的荒漠，又从荒漠变成盛会之星。当年一起看星星的人，还能剩下几个呢。

As time marched on, Penacony transformed from a prison into a desert haunted by nightmares and from a desert into a Planet of Festivities. How many of those who once gazed at the stars together remain in Penacony?
可我只能看着，因为历史不可改变。我没法治好哈努努的伤，没法从忆质黑洞里救回拉扎莉娜，更没法把那只飞蛾与铁尔南带离虫群的包围。

But I could only watch, for history can never be changed. I couldn't heal Hanunue's wounds, rescue Razalina from the Memoria Singularity, or even save that moth and Tiernan from the Swarm's encirclement.
但你知道吗？我仍记得他们的面孔，记得他们讲的笑话与夜晚的吵闹，可就只是记得而已。
Do you know? I can still remember their faces, the jokes they told, and their playful voices at night, but that's all I can do.
因为这些都只是历史，它们早已过去，留给我的只有这片深邃的长梦。
Because it's all history. They are bygone days, leaving me with only this deep and long dream.
这种小吃是以前一位无名客的最爱，但我实在欣赏不来…可每次总忍不住买一点。
In the past, this snack was one of the Nameless' favorite, but I just couldn't bring myself to appreciate the taste... Yet I can't help but to buy it every time I see it.
要不要试试？或许你会喜欢这种味道。
Do you want to give it a try? Perhaps you will like it.
你见过匹诺康尼现实的星空吗？许多年前，我们还在战火里的时候，它们就挂在那儿。我们坐在一片废墟里望着它们，它们也望着我们。
Have you seen the real stars of Penacony firsthand? Ages ago, while we were still at war, they adorned the sky above us. We sat in the ruins and gazed upward at them as they looked down upon us.
时间流转，匹诺康尼从监狱变成荒漠，又从荒漠变成盛会之星。当年看星星的人，还能剩下几个人呢。
As time marched on, Penacony transformed from a prison into a desert and from a desert into a Planet of Festivities. How many of those who once gazed at the stars together remain in Penacony?
可我只能看着，因为历史不可改变。我没法治好哈努努的伤，没法从忆质黑洞里救回拉扎莉娜，更没法把铁尔南带离虫群的包围圈。
But I could only watch, for history can never be changed. I couldn't heal Hanunue's wounds, rescue Razalina from the Memoria Singularity, or even save Tiernan from the Swarm's encirclement.
但你知道吗？我仍记得他们的面孔，记得他们讲的笑话与夜晚的吵闹，可就只是记得而已。
Do you know? I can still remember their faces, the jokes they told, and their playful voices at night, but that's all I can do.
因为这些都是历史，它们早已过去，留给我的只有这片深邃的长梦。
Because it's all history. They are bygone days, leaving me with only this deep and long dream.
历史的愤慨之处在于，纵使它无法更改，也总会有人尝试去扭曲。
The infuriating part of history lies in its immutable nature, yet there are always relentless attempts to distort its course.
看看家族现在所做的，简直是在玷污匹诺康尼的过去！
Look at what The Family is doing now. They are just tarnishing Penacony's past!
淡化历史、漠视历法、令人沉沦美梦…好像这样做，所有的过去就能一笔勾销，悄悄让不利于自己的记载烟消云散，史书只留下家族的赞美诗。

Dismissing history, disregarding calendars, and drowning everyone in dreams... It's as though through these acts, they seek to erase the past, silently eradicating the unfavorable truths and leaving the history books echoing only the hymns of The Family.
那些追求自由的囚犯，不畏险阻的逐梦客，甚至他们自己手下默默牺牲的成员，都成为如今五大家系的注脚——
The freedom-seeking prisoners, the odd-defying Dreamchasers, and even the members of their crew who were quietly sacrificed have now become the footnotes of the five major lineages...
不惜磨灭了这么多人的存在，堵上了这么多张嘴巴，只为给家族镀上一副救世主的金身，也不怕吃撑了！

Going to great lengths to eliminate the existence of countless individuals and silence myriad voices, all to adorn The Family with the illustrious title of savior. Are they not wary of being suffocated by their greed!?
匹诺康尼的今天绝不是梦主或者任何一个人创造的，它的辉煌应当属于所有的匹诺康尼人。
Today's Penacony is in no way created by the Dreammaster or any one person. Its splendor should belong to all Penaconians.
历史的喜悦之处在于，经历百般苦难，故事仍能传承下去，仿佛延续了往者的生命。
The joy of history lies in its resilience. Despite countless ordeals, the stories persist as if carrying forward the lives of the dead.
我还没来匹诺康尼的时候，参加过一个古代遗迹的挖掘。遗憾的是，那个文明因为资源缺乏，最终也没能走出自己的星球。
Before arriving in Penacony, I participated in an excavation of ancient ruins. Regrettably, the local civilization failed to depart the bounds of its planet due to a lack of resources.
早早预料到这一事实的人们，在文明死亡的最后，将所有的故事都刻到了芯片和石头上，用尽全力扔进太空。
The people who anticipated this fact early carved all their stories onto chips and stones at the passing of their civilization and cast these histories into space with all they had.
直到不知道多少年以后，我们来到刻满了故事的行星环。在最大的一块石头上，他们对我说「陌生人，感谢你的到来」。
It wasn't until many years later that we arrived at the ring system carved with stories, and on the largest stone, were the engraved words: "Thank you for coming, stranger."
我们一个个地记录并转译下那些故事，故事又流转到宇宙的各个角落，在我们身上，失落的文明获得了第二次进入太空的机会。

Methodically, we recorded and transcribed the stories, disseminating them to all corners of the universe. Through our endeavors, the lost civilization was afforded a second opportunity to travel the stars.
而你们来到这里，带走匹诺康尼的故事，对我们来说，或许也是一种重生吧。
And now you are here to take away the tales of Penacony. To us, this is perhaps a kind of rebirth.
这份薄礼还希望你收下，就当是陪我这糟老头子聊天的报偿了。
Here's a small gift from me. Thanks for chatting with an old geezer like me.
我还没来匹诺康尼的时候，参加过一个古代遗迹的挖掘。遗憾的是，那个文明因为资源缺乏，最终也没能走出自己的星球。
Before arriving in Penacony, I participated in an excavation of ancient ruins. Regrettably, the local civilization failed to depart the bounds of its planet due to a lack of resources.
早早预料到这一事实的人们，在文明死亡的最后，将所有的故事都刻到了芯片上，用尽全力扔进太空。
The people who anticipated this fact early carved all the stories onto chips at the death of civilization and threw them into space with all their might.
直到不知道多少年以后，我们来到了刻满了故事的行星环上。我看见，他们对我说「陌生人，感谢你的到来」。
It wasn't until many years later that we arrived at the ring system carved with stories were the engraved words: "Thank you for coming, stranger" conveyed.
我们一个个地记录并转译下那些故事，故事又流转到宇宙的各个角落，在我们身上，失落的文明获得了第二次进入太空的机会。

Methodically, we recorded and transcribed the stories, disseminating them to all corners of the universe. Through our endeavors, the lost civilization was afforded a second opportunity to travel the stars.
而你们来到这里，带走匹诺康尼的故事，对我们来说或许也是一种重生吧。
And now you are here to take away the tales of Penacony. To us, this is perhaps a kind of rebirth.
欢迎光临…哎呀，这位客人也是新来的吧？城寨里最近突然多了许多生面孔，我都快记不过来了。
Welcome... Oooh, don't tell me we've got another new guest visiting today? All these new faces in town, I can't keep track of them all.
听说很多人都是因为意外从美梦那边过来的，你瞧着应该也差不多……
I heard lots of people are coming over from the Dreamscapes because of accidents. You look to be the same...
哎呀…不好意思，年纪大了就是容易自顾自唠叨起来，我还是先给你简单介绍一下吧。
Oh. I'm sorry. It's far too easy to natter on about yourself once you get to my age. Let me give you a brief rundown of what we do.
本店是流梦城寨唯一的乐坊，店里的员工都是像我这样的自动乐器。
We're the only band in all of the Dreamflux Fortress. All our staff here are talking automated instruments, just like me.
我们的主营业务同样是「自动乐器」，客人只需花费少许苜蓿币，就能带心仪的乐器回家，让它为你演奏。当然，本人是非卖品。

Our main trade is also in automated instruments. For just a few Alfalfa credits, customers can take home the instrument of their choice and have it play for you at home. Of course, I personally am not for sale.
此外，本店还售卖由我们自己录制的黑胶唱片…如果你觉得无聊了、或是心情不太好，都可以来这里转转。
We also sell our own vinyl records here... Come here and flip through some if you're ever bored or feeling down in the dumps.
——毕竟，本店的宗旨就是「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」。
...I mean after all, our store motto here is "Bring joy to the world through music."
Are you up for a chat?
当然可以，我很乐意为你提供一切力所能及的帮助。
Sure can. I'd be more than happy to help you out however I can.
Tell me a little about your band.
乐坊啊…这家乐坊在这座城寨刚刚建立起来的时候就已经存在了。
Our band... it's been around since this city was first founded.
不过那时候店里只有我一个，我时不时为人们演奏、偶尔录制些唱片，为拓荒者们单调的生活增添些许调剂。
But back then, I was the only one in the store. I'd often perform for people, and sometimes I'd cut a few records — always adding a little spice to shake up the boring lives of the settlers.
后来…渐渐有其它自动乐器来到这里，其中大部分都有些坎坷波折的经历，而我收留了它们。
But then, later... other automated instruments gradually came along, most of them with some kind of rough, storied past — and I took them all in.
渐渐地，这里变得热闹起来：我们为人们演奏，用赚取的佣金进行日常的养护…每一天都充实而忙碌。大家的音符中充满欢乐，人们也常因此而获得快乐。

Gradually, things started to grow more lively here: We'd play for people and put the money we earned toward everyday maintenance... every day was a full and busy one. Everybody's music was brimming with joy in every note, and people got to feel a lot of joy as they listened.
好了，大概就是这样啦…你还有什么想了解的吗？
Well, that's about all there is... Anything else you'd like to know?
Tell me more about automated instruments.
我的店员们，它们有着不同的来历、迥异的经历，但唯独有一样是共通的——大家都是优秀的乐手。
My staff all come from different places with different backgrounds, but they also all have one thing in common: Everyone is an outstanding musician.
咆哮先生歌喉奔放粗犷，呐喊出的乐音震人心弦，就同它的外貌那般狂野不羁——但你要照顾好他那几根总是断掉的弦；
Mr. Growl's voice is rough and bold, and his bellows are every bit as wild as his appearance — just take care to avoid his constantly-breaking strings.
圆笛男爵嗓音嘹亮、音域宽广，它是位高贵的绅士，擅长典雅的乐曲——但他总是耽于自赏，妄想吹奏自己。你如果买走了他，得好好教会他什么叫做谦卑。

Baron Oboe has a sonorous singing voice and a broad range. He's a classy gentleman who's good with graceful tunes — but he's always making fun for himself and playing whatever music he likes. If you buy him, make sure you teach him a little bit about humility, first.
其它店员们也都有着自己独特的演奏风格与技巧，如果你感兴趣的话，不妨亲自看看它们。
The other staff all have their own unique playing style and tricks. If you're interested, why don't you go and take a look for yourself?
哎呀，不知不觉竟然聊了这么久……
*Oooh* I didn't realize that we'd been chatting for so long...
I'd like to see the products.
没问题，来挑些你喜欢的吧。
No problem. Pick out whatever you like.
当你希望从音乐中汲取欢乐的时候，欢迎再来这里转转。
Come back and take a look around next time you feel like you need the joy of music.
哎呀，你又来啦…欢迎光临，有什么需要吗？
*Oooh* You're back... Welcome back. Can I help you with anything?
你是想要租赁乐器表演，还是想要来张唱片？
Would you like to rent an instrument, or buy a record?
又或者，是来找我聊聊天呢……
Or perhaps you've come to have a little chat with me...
…你愿意听我讲讲过去的故事吗？
...Would you like to hear a little story about my past?
我可是把老提琴了——在我诞生之初，匹诺康尼还是座监狱呢。
I'm actually an old double bass — back when I was born, Penacony was still a prison.
那时的梦境蛮荒而原始，那时的人们豪放粗犷、无拘无束。我和我的伙伴、我的太阳——阿斯娜，就相识于彼时此地。

Back then, the Dreamscapes were wild and primitive. The people were bold and savage, too — completely unhinged. It was then and there that I first met my partner, the sun around whom my everything orbits: Asna.
那时我与她常常奏响欢快的乐曲，囚犯们就围在我们身边，看着、听着，他们眼里有光。曲调高昂时他们纵情欢呼、合着节拍起舞……

We used to play cheerful music together, and the prisoners would gather around to watch and listen, their eyes lighting up. When the melody ramped up, they would cheer heartily, dancing to the rhythm of the beat...
我的琴声与她的歌声回荡在原初梦境的天空里，回荡在璀璨的漫天星光中。那段日子…或许是我这漫长一生中最快乐的时光。

My strings would reverberate with her voice throughout the sky of that Primordial Dreamscape, echoing in the brilliant starlight. Those days... may just be the happiest days I've ever had in all my years.
后来，那只野狼和乘着火车的人解放了监狱，阿斯娜成了他们口中的「鸢尾花之母」，我也成了博物馆里的一件展品，再也没有见到她。
