Later, after that wolf and the passengers of that train liberated the prison, Asna became what they called "The Mother of Iris" and I became an exhibit in a museum — doomed to never meet again.
如今，我又被一个小偷带回到了这里。我看着这座城寨如何抽芽、如何生发，我录了那么多唱片，都是我们一起合奏过的曲子。
But then, I was brought back here by some thief. I saw how this city had sprouted and took shape, and I recorded all these vinyl records of the songs we'd once played together.
但那些曲子却不再鲜活生动。它们缺了灵魂，就像梦里少了她的影子……
But those songs, they no longer felt alive. They lacked a soul, just like I lacked her shadow inside my dreams...
诶呀…抱歉，唠叨了这么久…像我这样上了年纪的老琴，总忍不住找人聊聊…多聊聊，才不容易忘掉那些弦音……
*sigh*... Sorry for nattering on so long... an old double bass like me can never resist chatting with people... because chatting makes it harder to forget the melody of those strings...
希望那孩子能快些好起来……
I hope that kid gets better soon...
哎呀，是你来啦？抱歉，我现在正苦恼着呢…介意听我稍稍抱怨一会儿吗？
Oh. It's you. Sorry. I'm working on something tricky right at the moment... would you mind if I vented my spleen a little?
事情是这样的：最近乐坊来了位新成员，小号先生。那孩子有点内向，性格乖巧、很讨人喜欢…但问题就出在它太过「讨人喜欢」了。
Here's the thing: We've added a new member to the band recently, Mr. Trumpet, who's a little introverted, kind of cute, and very likable... But the problem is, he's too "likable."
我曾对你说过吧，乐坊的大家都有些坎坷的过往…比如手风琴小姐曾因梦境的侵蚀产生异变、长笛女士曾被合作多年的伙伴抛弃、圆号先生曾因人类孩童的恶作剧遭受严重的损伤……

I told you before that most of the band came from previously rough lives... like Miss Accordion, who was mutated by a corroded Dreamscape, Miss Flute, who was abandoned by her partner for years, or Mr. French Horn, who was grievously wounded by some humans playing a childish prank...
哎呀，别担心，这些都不是什么秘密，而且大家也早就走出了曾经的阴影。那么现在说回小号先生……
*Oooh* Don't worry. These aren't secrets at all and everyone has left their dark pasts well behind them. So then, getting back to Mr. Trumpet...
它的音色因忆质侵蚀变得有些浑浊，但这并非问题所在。它很…自卑。即便大家都在努力安慰它、照料它，但它似乎依旧缺乏安全感。

His timbre has been corroded by memoria, but that's not the real problem. He's... got an inferiority complex. He seems to be really insecure even though everyone constantly reassures and looks after him.
而直到前些天我才发现…原来它竟一直在私下里偷偷练习，日以继夜地演奏、演奏到活塞都出现了轻微的磨损。而这一切只因为…它觉得「只有能够完美地演出，才不会再次被抛弃」。

And I didn't realize until just the other day that... he had been rehearsing in secrecy the whole time, day and night, until his pistons started to get worn down from overuse. And he was doing this because... he had this thought that he could only avoid abandonment through perfect musical performances.
…或许我有些反应过度了，但我确实感到恼火——当然，这情绪并非针对小号先生，而是我自己。
...Maybe I overreacted, but I felt really angry at the time — not at Mr. Trumpet, of course, but rather directed at myself.
是否是因为我疏于照顾，才没能给它足够的安全感？是不是我并没有尽到应尽的责任……
Did I not give it enough sense of security because I failed to care for him enough? Was it because I didn't do everything I could for him...
我理应…也必须能尽己所能，为我的「家人」做些什么…对吧？
I should... no, I MUST do everything I can for my "kinsmen"... right?
…或许我有些反应过度了，但我确实感到恼火——当然，这情绪并非针对小号先生，而是我自己。
...Maybe I overreacted, but I felt really angry at the time — not at Mr. Trumpet, of course, but rather directed at myself.
是否是因为我疏于照顾，才没能给它足够的安全感？是不是我并没有尽到应尽的责任……
Did I not give it enough sense of security because I failed to care for him enough? Was it because I didn't do everything I could for him...
我理应…也必须能尽己所能，为我的「家人」做些什么…对吧？
I should... no, I MUST do everything I can for my "kinsmen"... right?
I love my life at the moment...
哎呀，刚刚有个常来光顾的年轻人，问我要不要和他一起回去美梦去。
Oh. A young customer who's one of our regulars just came by asking if I wanted to go back to the sweeter Dreamscapes with him.
可我去美梦做什么呢？我的心已经老了，再弹不出热情欢快的曲子啦。所以我问他：「难道是想让我回到博物馆的橱窗里吗？」
But what am I going to do there? My heart's already too old to play those cheery songs once more. So I asked him: "Don't tell me you're trying to take me back to that display cabinet in the museum?"
哈哈…那个小家伙似乎挺失望，但对于现在的我来说，美梦太喧闹，这里却正好。
Haha... that poor kid seemed pretty disappointed, but at this age I find the sweet dreams too noisy. Things are perfect where I am now.
这里有我的乐坊、我的「家人」们。我可以隔着薄薄的橱窗玻璃，看它们演出、看它们用音符为人们带来欢乐。
Here, I have my band and my "kinsmen." Through just a razor-thin piece of glass, I can observe them performing — plus all the joy that their melodies bring people.
那是种真实无比、纯粹无比的欢乐…我曾在囚犯们的眼睛里见过它，我曾在阿斯娜的指尖感受到它，而如今它又出现在我的面前——
That's a kind of pure, true joy... I'd seen it in those prisoners' eyes. I'd felt it at Asna's fingertips, and now it had arrived once more before me...
「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」…看吧伙伴，这个约定，我最终还是好好遵守了啊。
"Bring joy to the world through music"... Look at me now, Asna. This promise of ours: I've kept my word until the very end.
对于现在的我来说，美梦太喧闹，这里却正好。
At this age I find the sweet dreams too noisy. Things are perfect where I am now.
这里有我的乐坊、我的「家人」们。我可以隔着薄薄的橱窗玻璃，看它们演出、看它们用音符为人们带来欢乐。
Here, I have my band and my "kinsmen." Through just a razor-thin piece of glass, I can observe them performing — plus all the joy that their melodies bring people.
那是种真实无比、纯粹无比的欢乐…我曾在囚犯们的眼睛里见过它，我曾在阿斯娜的指尖感受到它，而如今它又出现在我的面前——
That's a kind of pure, true joy... I'd seen it in those prisoners' eyes. I'd felt it at Asna's fingertips, and now it had arrived once more before me...
「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」…看吧伙伴，这个约定，我最终还是好好遵守了啊。
"Bring joy to the world through music"... Look at me now, Asna. This promise of ours: I've kept my word until the very end.
亲爱的客人，欢迎光临，想吃点什么？
My dear guest, welcome! What would you like to eat?
本店是流梦礁的老字号，品种一应俱全。翠丝的面包要说第二，没人敢在流梦礁说第一。
We're a vintage Dreamflux Reef brand with everything you could possibly need. If someone says Jessie's bread is only second best, then there is no champion bread in the Dreamflux Reef.
Tell me more about this bread.
Sounds like fake news to me.
哈哈哈，您可真幽默。我们小本经营，顾客都是老居民，要是不诚信早就被大家赶跑啦。
Haha, you're a funny one. We're a small owner-operated business and our customers are all long-time locals. If we weren't honest, we would have gotten driven away years ago.
Can you describe for me how delicious it is?
硬要说的话，既不华丽，也不新奇，就像是小时候妈妈做的那种味道——本店在制作过程中，只讲究一个厚道。
If you insist: It's not overly gorgeous or innovative. Rather, it's just like the flavor mom used to bake when you were a child. During the baking process, all we focus on is sincerity.
本店的面包以及其他的所有食物，所用的原料都来自纯净有机的忆域农田。
All bread and other foodstuffs in our store use pure organic ingredients sourced from the Memory Zone's farms.
它们生长的土壤不含有有害的情绪，亦不掺杂消极与负面的记忆，所以由它们制作的精神食粮尝起来口味温和醇厚，回味甘甜。
The soil they grow in is devoid of harmful emotions and negative memories, so the spirit fuel it produces has this mild and mellow taste with a lingering sweet aftertaste.
等您醒来之后，就会发现食用这类产品的好处了。这可比美梦里的快餐健康多了。
You'll soon realize the benefits of eating this once you wake up. This is far healthier than the fast food in the sweet dream.
您可以待会看看菜单，不急着选~
Check out the menu whenever you're ready. No rush~
Are you up for a chat?
没问题，面包和故事，我这里都有。
No problem. Bread and stories — we've got the works.
Why did you open this kind of store?
想起了已经是很久之前的事情了。从我离开美梦，来到流梦礁后，因为一直很喜欢烹饪，便想到开一家店来维持生计。
It's something that happened long, long ago. When I first left the Dreamville for the Dreamflux Reef, I wanted to open my own store to make a living and continue my love of cooking.
我尝试了好多新奇的菜品，发现大家还是最喜欢朴实无华、量大管饱的食物，所以就坚持下来一直做了。
I tried out many an experimental dish but discovered that everyone preferred filling themselves with simple meals in sufficiently large portions. So I kept going and making them all.
现在想想，之前和我同一时间开的那些店，也只有我一家一直开到现在了。唉，沧海桑田啊。
Now that I think about it, my store's the only one left out of all those stores that opened up around the same time as mine. *sigh* How things change!
以前流梦礁人多的时候，每天这里都排着长队，等着热腾腾的面包出炉。
Back when there were more people around the Dreamflux Reef, this place would have a long queue out the door every day waiting for fresh hot bread to come out of the oven.
现在不行喽，人越来越少，也只有老顾客来光顾了。不知道你有没有碰到那个整天笑嘻嘻的维德，他可是每天雷打不动地买三个面包。生意都是靠他们撑着。

But not now. Fewer and fewer people come in, and we're down to regular customers only. I wonder if you've met Vader who just sits around grinning all day? He never fails to buy three loaves of bread from us, every day. Our very business depends on these people.
不过最近来了不少像你这样的年轻人，但愿未来会变好一些吧。
But these days we've seen quite a few youngsters like you coming through, so hopefully things will get better in the future.
有遇到什么有趣的客人吗？
有趣的客人…那可太多了，您不就是吗？
Interesting customers, eh... ? Too many of those to count. And don't you count yourself as one?
开个玩笑。若说让人印象最深刻，还是一位从我年轻时就时常光顾这里的老人。一杯咖啡，一块面包，一条老狗，他能待一下午。

Just kidding. If you're talking about someone who let an impression: There was this old man who came by regularly back when I was young. A cup of coffee, a loaf of bread, and this old dog: Enough for him to stay the entire afternoon.
他最会用钟表小子来讲故事，有时啊能把整个屋子的人都逗笑，可惜…他已经不会再来了。
He'd tell the best stories using Clockie as the medium, and sometimes he'd have the entire room in stitches laughing along. But unfortunately... he won't be coming back again.
That's all the questions I have.
I'd like to see the food.
欢迎下次光临，翠丝的店永远为你敞开~
See you again next time — Jessie's store will always be open to your business~
欢迎下次光临，翠丝的店永远为你敞开~
See you again next time — Jessie's store will always be open to your business~
烘焙的香味，就是幸福的味道！
Fresh baking: That's the smell of happiness!
在流梦礁最困难的时候，大家食不果腹，精神低落。
Back when the Dreamflux Reef was facing dire times, nobody had enough food to eat and spirits were very low.
每次小麦粉到货，我们坐在店里，将一大块面包切成小块大家轮流分享，连咖啡也是你喝一小口，再传给我喝一小口。

Every time a flour delivery arrived, we'd all sit in the store and chop a big loaf into smaller pieces of bread for everyone to take turns sharing. Even the coffee was shared between people, sip by sip.
最后大家都笑了，这过的叫什么日子嘛！
Everyone ended up hunched over laughing. What kind of day do you call that!?
到现在，磨粉、揉面、发酵、烘烤…这样的工序我已经重复了不知道多少遍，但每次闻到烘烤带来的热腾腾、暖洋洋的香味时，我就会感到由衷的幸福。

All the grinding, kneading, fermenting, and baking... I've repeated this process countless times, but every time I smell that steamy warm scent of something baking, I'll get this feeling of sincere happiness.
大家团结在一起度过难关，有这么好的一群人，流梦礁未来也一定不会差——这话我跟科玫不知说了多少次，她还年轻，她太相信那些数字，然而重要的是我们的心。

With such a talented group all working together to overcome hardships, the future of the Dreamflux Reef is looking great — I don't know how many times I've said this to Kaimee because she is still young and still trusts the data too much, but what's most important is our spirit.
最近来了不少年轻人，也许我也应该开发一些新口味。
A lot of youngsters have been coming by the store these days. Maybe I should branch out into some new flavors?
虽然我们也算老店了，但固步自封只能被时代淘汰。
We might be a trusted old brand, but if we remain stuck in our old ways, we'll soon be obsolete.
难得碰到外面的年轻人，你们现在喜欢什么样的食物？
Such a rare chance to chat with a youngster from outside. What kind of foods do you like to eat now?
仙舟的特色饮料吗？我好像在家族的图书馆里看到过。可惜不知道配方呢。
Is that the Xianzhou specialty drink? I think I saw it once in The Family's library. What a pity I don't know the recipe for it.
独特的口味…听说橡木家系的人能面不改色地吞下一整块呢。
What a unique taste... They say that members from the Oak Family can swallow a whole piece of the cake without batting an eyelid.
Hang on. Let me get a pen.
她用奇怪的眼神看着你，然后仿佛明白了什么……
She shoots you a strange look seeming to comprehend something...
So you... are you an Intellitron?
不用不好意思，我们不歧视智械的。
Don't be embarrassed about it. We don't discriminate here against Intellitrons.
现在的智械已经这么先进了吗…你们智械应该会喜欢能源类的食物吧，下次我会试着研究电池和机油套餐的。
Modern day Intellitrons are so advanced... You should like energy for food, right? I'll try to look into a battery and machine oil combo for next time.
感谢！一会我整理一下新菜单，敬请期待！
Thanks! I'm taking care of the new menu. Stay tuned!
竟然有人在我们的精神食粮里以次充好，甚至想要用忆质食品全面取代现制菜品！
There are actually people out there selling counterfeit copies at a mark-up, and even some who want to replace all food with memoria fuel!
现实的食品滋养我们的肉体，梦境中的食物充实着我们的精神。从某种意义上说，精神食粮的重要性一点也不逊色于现实中的食物。
Real food nourishes our bodies, while Dreamscape food enriches our spirit. In a way, spirit fuel is no less important than real food.
最近我进的货质量越来越差，制造这些原料的厂商还和我抱怨，大家都以次充好，他们要是不同流合污根本赚不到钱。

I've been getting worse and worse stock lately, and the manufacturers who make the raw materials complain about people selling counterfeit copies at a mark-up. Unless they themselves stoop as low, they can't make any money.
更有甚者，开了一家忆质食品公司——把关于食物的记忆复制一下就能制造食物，热一热就能吃…他们试图用这种方便又劣质的东西垄断梦境的食品行业。

What's more, they even started up a memoria fuel company — copying food-related memoria to manufacture food that becomes good to eat as soon as you heat it up... They are trying to corner the Dreamscape's food market with their convenient but inferior product.
这种东西吃多了会把自己的味觉搞坏的！但那些不知情的年轻人只能买他们的廉价菜饭裹腹，这样吃下去他们的精神状态怎么会好？
Eating this stuff will break your taste buds! Those unsuspecting youngsters gorge themselves on that cheap stuff. How are their spirits going to fare if that keeps on?
唉，人心不古，世风日下啊！
*sigh* Public decency nowadays. The world is going to the dogs!
当我离开家族来到流梦礁之后，曾有一段迷茫无助的时间——我开了一家咖啡店，但大家视我为间谍和敌人，生意寥寥无几，快到了倒闭的边缘。

When I first left The Family and came to the Dreamflux Reef, I had this period of helpless confusion — I opened up a cafe but was viewed as a spy and the enemy. Business dwindled, and we were quickly on the brink of bankruptcy.
这时，一位老人开始每天光顾我的小店，他点了一杯咖啡，自己画着钟表小子的分镜，一条黑犬趴在他的脚边打盹，日复一日……
Just then, this old guy started visiting our cafe every day. He'd order a coffee and doodle pictures of Clockie while a dog snoozed at his feet. Day in, day out...
从那以后起，大家逐渐放下了对我的怀疑，店里的生意也一天比一天好。
From that moment forth, everyone gradually let go of their doubts about me, and business at the cafe got better and better.
有一天我鼓足勇气向他道谢，他微笑着向我点头，送了一幅钟表小子的画给我，并称赞了我的手艺。
One day, I worked up the courage to approach him, but he just laughed and nodded at me. He gave me a picture of Clockie, and praised me for my baking skills.
后来我才知道，那位平易近人的老人就是让家族头疼的搅局者，匹诺康尼的最为传奇的大亨。
I later learned that kind old man had been behind The Family's troubles and was Penacony's most legendary tycoon.
他现在已经不在了，但我的店即便没有他也天天有顾客造访，这是他留给我的礼物…相信每一位流梦礁的居民，都应该收到过类似的礼物吧……

He is no longer with us anymore, but even without him, customers still visit our store. That's a gift that he left behind for me... I trust all the residents of Dreamflux Reef have all received the same gift...
你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
You and the blue bird stare at each other, but it doesn't look like it's going to speak anytime soon.
…同一个把戏玩两次就没意思了。
...It's pointless to play the same trick twice.
啧，来得太快了，我还没休息够呢。
Tsk, here so soon? I'm still tired.
...Did you go silly from hunting for birds?
你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
You and the blue bird stare at each other, but it doesn't look like it's going to speak anytime soon.
…哎，又一个没看过《钟表小子》的土老帽。
...Bah, another bumpkin who's never seen Clockie before.
显而易见，我是只折纸小鸟，你也可以叫我湛蓝爵士。
Obviously, I'm an origami bird. You can call me Dr. Blues.
...Did you go silly from hunting for birds?
算了，既然来了，那领个任务再走吧。
Never mind, since you're here, take this mission before leaving.
我想想…按照「故事情节」来说，这一章我该扮演「善良的折纸小鸟」，而你是「帮我寻回伙伴的好心客人」。
Let's see... According to the plot, I should be playing the kind origami bird in this chapter, and you're the kind-hearted guest who helps me find my companions.
——但扮鸟太累了，我拒绝。光是修这座「清醒村」就够我忙的了。
...But playing a bird is tiring, so I'm refusing this role. I'm busy enough fixing up Rouseville.
总之，只要你找回足够数量的小鸟，我就会给你对应的奖励。
Anyway, I'll give you your just rewards as long as you get enough birds back.
听懂了吗？懂了就出发吧。
You got that? You should get going if you have.
看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
Looks like you've already found half of the birds.
这是来自折纸小鸟的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
This is a gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.
看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
Looks like you found all the birds.
太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好「谢礼」，慢走不送。
Excellent, we can wrap up early. Don't forget to take this gift, and don't let me keep you.
…又怎么了？我现在忙的很，有话快说。
...What is it now? I'm super busy. Well? Spit it out.
折纸小鸟「湛蓝爵士」，或者筑梦师「奥尔拉」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
Origami Bird Dr. Blues, or Dreamweaver Orla. You can call me whatever you want as long as you don't cause trouble for me.
…算了，这个名字从你嘴里吐出来总感觉怪怪的…你还是叫我「湛蓝爵士」吧。
...Never mind, this name sounds weird when you're the one saying it... Better just address me as Dr. Blues.
给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
Tell me the story of the origami birds...
折纸小鸟的故事？自己看《钟表小子》动画去，讲得比我清楚多了。
The origami bird story? Go watch the Clockie series yourself — they explain it much clearer than I would.
清醒村是《钟表小子》动画第二部的故事舞台：「穿过美梦小镇的影子，钟表小子来到了一座与众不同的神奇村落。这里聚集着许多被美梦驱赶的村民：爱撒谎的猎犬、疯疯癫癫的猫头鹰，还有不会啾的折纸小鸟……」

Rouseville is where the story is set in the second Clockie series: "Through Dreamville's shadow, Clockie arrives at a wondrous village that is quite distinct. Many residents cast out by Dreamjoy have gathered here: A Bloodhound who lies compulsively, an owl that has gone quite mad, and an origami bird that doesn't tweet..."
——如何，听起来好玩吗？我瞎编的。
...How about it? Sounds fun eh? I wrote it off the top of my head.
所谓清醒村，其实就是{RUBY_B#流梦礁}这里{RUBY_E#}。一处收留那些不为美梦所容的可怜虫的「庇护所」罢了。
This so-called Rouseville is actually {RUBY_B#Dreamflux Reef}this place{RUBY_E#}. Nothing more than a safe haven for those poor souls who were abandoned by Dreamjoy.
Tell me about the origami birds...
你见过忆域迷因吗？那是一种因人的情感与欲望而诞生的梦境生命体——或者说一种类似于生命体的「现象」。你见到的折纸小鸟也是差不多的东西。

Have you seen a Memory Zone Meme before? That is a Dreamscape lifeform born out of people's emotions and desires, or simply put, it's a "phenomenon" akin to a lifeform. The origami birds you've seen are no different from that.
广泛的群众认知，足够充分的执念，再加上一点点来自于神秘的「谎言」…捏个折纸小鸟也不是什么难事。
With widespread audience awareness, ample determination, and a hint of Enigmata's lies... making an origami bird isn't such a hard task.
只要注意别让它们跑到梦境之外就好——哦，但我不算，我属于特例。
Just make sure they don't get outside the Dreamscape — oh, except for me I mean. I'm the exception.
感谢那条猎犬，看来他的「谎言」放在现实里也能生效。
I'll have to thank that Hound. Looks like his "lie" also works in the real world.
猫头鹰老师是美梦小镇的设计者，是钟表小子的老朋友，是折纸小鸟们的老师——当然，这只是动画故事里的设定。
Professor Owl is the one who designed Dreamville and Clockie's old friend. He's the teacher of the origami birds. Of course, that's just how it was set up in the cartoon's story.
在过去的匹诺康尼，人们都叫他「格拉克斯教授」，曾经是来自博识学会的扎兹卡学者，后来是隐夜鸫家系的首领。
In the Penacony of the past, people called him Professor Glaux. He was once a Zatzka scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild, and later became the leader of the Nightingale Family.
不知道「钟表匠」用了什么办法，才让他愿意抛下星空生态学派的首席教授职称，跑到一无所有的梦境里开荒……
I don't know how the Watchmaker got him to willingly abandon his post as Head Professor of the Astral Ecology School to come to this forsaken wasteland in the Dreamscape...
他是个伟大的筑梦师，也是个伟大的老师…只可惜现在除了那条吵闹的大街，没什么地方能看到他的名字。
He is both a great Dreamweaver and a teacher... It's a pity that his name has been buried in obscurity — you won't find it mentioned anywhere.
提示？当然可以，我知道所有小鸟的位置。
A hint? Certainly, I know where all the birds are.
一枚硬币换一条线索——不许讨价还价。
A coin for a clue, and no haggling.
小鸟矜持地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
The bird gingerly picks up the coin you give it, and... swallows it!
让我看看，还有哪个倒霉蛋没被抓到呢……
Let's see which unlucky fella hasn't been caught yet...
嗯…有个到处捣乱的小鸟老爱在别人的作品上恶作剧，<color=#dbc291ff>入口那边的海报上</color>看看吧，它估计又在那干坏事呢。
Hmm... There's a mischievous bird that loves playing pranks on others. Take a look at <color=#dbc291ff>the poster by the entrance</color>. It could be up to no good there.
嗯…有只小鸟最近老是郁郁寡欢，或许现在也在<color=#dbc291ff>垃圾堆那边</color>唉声叹气吧。
Hmm... There's a bird that's been in low spirits recently. Maybe it's still sullenly pottering about by the <color=#dbc291ff>garbage pile</color>.
嗯…折纸小鸟都喜欢恶作剧呢，最近有人说<color=#dbc291ff>入口那边的灯泡</color>经常闪烁，或许就是某个小鸟的手笔。
Hmm... All origami birds love pranks. I hear there's been a flickering <color=#dbc291ff>lightbulb by the entrance</color>. Maybe it's one of the birds' pranks again.
嗯…你喜欢寻宝游戏吗？有只小鸟沉迷在寻宝游戏里，现在估计也站在<color=#dbc291ff>线索版附近</color>扮演引导者呢。
Hmm... You like treasure hunts? There's a bird that's obsessed with it. It's probably still standing <color=#dbc291ff>near the clue board</color> pretending to be a guide.
嗯…有只调皮的小鸟总在阴森森的地方躲着吓人呢，去<color=#dbc291ff>巨大的钟表小子雕像附近</color>找找看吧，它应该就躲在那里。
Hmm... There's a playful bird that likes hiding out in dark spots to scare people. Go take a look <color=#dbc291ff>near the giant Clockie Statue</color>. It might just be hiding there.
嗯…有只脑回路很奇特的小鸟，最近常在<color=#dbc291ff>猫形摊车的附近</color>徘徊，据说是爱上了那只猫…折纸小鸟会梦见钢铁猫咪吗？谁知道呢。

Hmm... There's a bird that doesn't have its head screwed on right. It's usually pacing about <color=#dbc291ff>near the cat-shaped cart</color>. Apparently, it has fallen in love with that cat... Do origami birds dream of steel cats? Who knows.
嗯…有只当售票员的小鸟总在<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机附近</color>抓人套票。但那台售票装置似乎坏掉很久了，不知道它在用什么卖票……

Hmm... That ticket vendor bird is always catching scalpers <color=#dbc291ff>near the pinball machine</color>. But that ticket vending machine's been broken for a while now, I wonder how it's selling its tickets...
嗯…去<color=#dbc291ff>冒热气的下水道附近</color>找找吧，有只奇怪的小鸟最近沉迷蒸桑拿。真是笨，折纸的鸟怎么能蒸桑拿呢？

Hmm... Go take a look near the <color=#dbc291ff>sewer that's got hot air steaming out of it</color>. There's a strange bird that's really into saunas these days. Absurd, can origami birds even soak in saunas?
嗯…见过那种藏在气球里的小鸟吗？<color=#dbc291ff>商业街那条死路的拐角</color>里还有一只，去那找找吧。
Hmm... Have you ever seen a bird that hides in balloons? There's one right by the <color=#dbc291ff>corner of the dead-end alley of the business street</color>. Go there and take a look.
嗯…音响店前有只<color=#dbc291ff>画着猫的招牌</color>，你大概能在那找到一只小鸟。不知为何，它总执着于在别人的作品上画蛇添足…难道是因为鸟爪拿不起画笔吗？

Hmm... There's a <color=#dbc291ff>signboard with a cat drawn on it</color> in front of the stereo shop. You should be able to find a bird there. For some reason, it's always fixated on adding unnecessary details to other people's art pieces... Could it be because birds can't hold a paintbrush?
嗯…有只爱听故事的小鸟，一直在<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」的身旁</color>待着，它大概还在期待钟表小子的下一场冒险吧。
Hmm... There's a birdie who loves listening to stories — it's just been hanging out <color=#dbc291ff>by the Watchmaker's side</color>, probably looking forward to Clockie's next adventure.
嗯…有只好奇心很强的小鸟，总往人多的地方钻。最近<color=#dbc291ff>拜访「钟表匠」的客人</color>很多，那小鸟估计也在附近吧。

Hmm... There's an extremely curious bird that always likes to squirrel away in crowded places. Recently, there've been <color=#dbc291ff>many guests visiting the Watchmaker</color>. That bird must be nearby as well.
嗯…有只小鸟最近在尝试一种类似于「蹦极」的行为，难以理解…总之，去<color=#dbc291ff>下沉楼梯附近</color>找找它吧。
Hmm... A bird has recently been experimenting with an activity much like bungee jumping, though the reason escapes me... Anyway, head to the <color=#dbc291ff>sunken staircase</color> to find it.
嗯…或许每只小鸟都曾有个当海盗的梦想？<color=#dbc291ff>电梯附近</color>有个海盗梦入脑的小鸟，去和它玩会儿冒险游戏吧。

Hmm... Maybe every bird once had dreams of being a pirate? There's a bird <color=#dbc291ff>near the elevator</color> who daydreams of nothing but pirates. Go find it and play some adventure games together.
嗯…有只小鸟总站在在<color=#dbc291ff>电梯附近的路灯上</color>，那里是最佳的观景点——视野开阔，而且没有人打扰。

Hmm... There's a bird that's always standing <color=#dbc291ff>near the lamp post by the elevator</color>. That's the best vantage spot for the sights — a panoramic view with no one around to disturb you.
嗯…有只倒霉的小鸟缺乏挑选藏身点的技巧，总是选中一些危险的地方。去找找<color=#dbc291ff>路边那只快要掉下来的广告牌</color>吧，它正在上面等人救场呢。

Hmm... There's a poor bird that lacks the know-how to pick a good hiding spot. It's always choosing dangerous locations. Go look by the <color=#dbc291ff>billboard that's about to collapse along the roadside</color>. It's probably trapped atop, awaiting rescue.
嗯…折纸小鸟会跳舞吗？我不知道，但有只爱跳舞的鸟总在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的广告牌附近</color>练习，说是能借着广告牌的灯光打节拍呢。

Hmm... Do origami birds know how to dance? I don't know, but a bird that loves dancing is practicing <color=#dbc291ff>near an elevated billboard</color> — something about using the billboard's lights to time the beat.
嗯…有只胆小的小鸟，总找一些黑漆漆的地方锻炼胆量。附近有一座<color=#dbc291ff>只亮着一扇窗户的诡异公寓</color>，它就在那里试胆呢。

Hmm... There's a timid bird that's always seeking out pitch-black places to hone its guts. There's an <color=#dbc291ff>eerie apartment building with only one window lit up</color>. It should be trying to train its courage there.
嗯…这附近就有一只小鸟啊——就在我面前，<color=#dbc291ff>那边的椅子</color>上，看到了吗？
Hmm... There's a bird nearby somewhere... right in front of me by <color=#dbc291ff>that chair</color>. Do you see it?
嗯…有只小鸟最近总吵着要买气球，被我打发到商业街那边去了。去<color=#dbc291ff>卖气球的店铺附近</color>找找吧，它估计就在附近溜达呢。

Hmm... There's a bird that's been crowing about buying balloons recently. I shooed it away towards the business street. Go find it <color=#dbc291ff>near the shop that sells balloons</color>. It's probably strolling around in its vicinity.
再见，贫穷的客人——下次记得带着硬币来。
Goodbye, impoverished guest. Bring me some coins next time.
玩游戏要遵守游戏规则，一枚硬币对应一条线索，多了少了都不行——你还没找到上一只小鸟呢。
There are rules to playing a game. A coin for a clue. No more, no less. You haven't found the previous bird.
Come back again when you find it.
也行，别忘了找找这里的折纸小鸟——赶紧让我的戏份杀青吧。
That works too, don't forget to look for the origami birds here. Hurry up and let me wrap my scene up.
小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.
嗯？看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
Hmm? Looks like you've already found half the birds.
这是来自折纸小鸟的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
This is a gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.
嗯？看来你已经找到剩下的小鸟了。
Hmm? Looks like you've found the remaining birds.
这是来自折纸小鸟最后的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
This is the final gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.
嗯？看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
Hmm? Looks like you found all the birds.
太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好「谢礼」，慢走不送。
Excellent, we can wrap up early. Don't forget to take this gift, and don't let me keep you.
寻鸟游戏已经结束了。有话快说，没话就快走。
The bird hunting game is over. Make it quick, or leave me be.
…又怎么了？本鸟现在忙的很，有话快说啾。
...What is it this time? I'm awfully busy, make it quick, tweet.
我叫「湛蓝爵士」，是帮助钟表小子修建清醒村的折纸小鸟啾。
I am Dr. Blues, an origami bird that's helping Clockie build Rouseville, tweet.
给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
Tell me the story of the origami birds...
折纸小鸟的故事？自己看《钟表小子》动画去，讲得比我清楚多了。
The origami bird story? Go watch the Clockie series yourself — they explain it much clearer than I would.
清醒村是坐落在美梦小镇影子中的神奇村落。这里聚集着许多被美梦驱赶的村民：爱撒谎的猎犬先生、神奇的猫头鹰老师，还有建设村落的折纸小鸟……

Rouseville is a wondrous village within the shadow of Dreamville. Here, many villagers who have been driven out by Dreamjoy have gathered: A Bloodhound who lies compulsively, the fascinating Professor Owl, and an origami bird that is building the village...
怎么样啾，听起来是个很有趣的地方吧？
How about it, tweet? Sounds like a fun place, no?
Tell me about the origami birds...
除了外出寻找枝条，大多数时候折纸小鸟都是聚在「大树」附近一起生活的啾。
Besides going out to look for branches, the origami birds usually spend most of their time gathering near the Great Tree in their daily lives, tweet.
但偶尔也会出现一些不合群的小家伙…所以我为它们修建了「清醒村」啾！
But sometimes, folks who don't get along with us do show up... So I built Rouseville for them, tweet!
啾，猫头鹰老师是美梦小镇的设计者，是钟表小子的老朋友，是折纸小鸟们的老师。
Tweet, Professor Owl designed Dreamville, and he is an old friend of Clockie's and a teacher of the origami birds.
他是最厉害的鸟儿，也是我们最好的教导者，我最崇拜他了啾！
He's the most amazing bird there is, and our best mentor too. I respect the heck out of him, tweet!
提示？当然可以，我知道所有小鸟的位置啾。
A hint? Certainly, I know where all the birds are, tweet.
一枚硬币换一条线索——不许讨价还价啾。
A coin for a clue, and no haggling, tweet.
小鸟矜持地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
The bird gingerly picks up the coin you give it, and... swallows it!
让我看看，还有哪个倒霉蛋没被抓到呢，啾啾……
Let's see which unlucky fella hasn't been caught yet, tweet...
再见，贫穷的客人——下次记得带着硬币来啾。
Goodbye, impoverished guest. Bring me some coins next time, tweet.
玩游戏要遵守游戏规则，一枚硬币对应一条线索，多了少了都不行啾——你还没找到上一只小鸟呢。
There are rules to playing a game. A coin for a clue. No more, no less, tweet. You haven't found the previous bird.
等找到它了再来吧，啾啾。
Come back again when you find it, tweet tweet.
也行，别忘了找找这里的折纸小鸟啾。
That works too, don't forget to look for the origami birds here.
小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.
啾？看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
Tweet? Looks like you've already found half of the birds.
这是本鸟的谢礼。拿好，慢走不送啾。
This is a gift from me. Take it, and don't let me keep you, tweet.
啾？看来你已经找到剩下的小鸟了。
Tweet? Looks like you've found the remaining birds.
这是来自本鸟最后的谢礼。拿好，慢走不送啾。
This is the final gift from me. Take it, and don't let me keep you, tweet.
啾？看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
Tweet? Looks like you've found all the birds.
太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好本鸟的谢礼，慢走不送啾。
Excellent, now I can wrap up early. Don't forget to take my gift, and don't let me keep you, tweet.
啾！真是群好高骛远的家伙，翅膀还没硬，就想着怎么飞行了啾。
Tweet! What a bunch of arrogant fellas, already thinking about flying before their wings have even fully grown.
连练习振翅的魄力都没有，以后还怎么叼更多石头来扩充小镇啾。
They don't even have the discipline to practice flapping their wings, how will they even bring back more stones in the future to expand the town?
等我把你们抓回来，一定要狠狠地操练你们一顿啾！
Wait till I catch all of you, I'll make you all train till you beg for mercy, tweet!
嘿呀！是钟表小子硬派的好朋友啾。
Oho! It's Clockie's sturdy friend, tweet.
是叫「球棒侠」还是「棒球侠」…这些都不重要啾！
Is it the Baseballer or Ballbatter... Not that it matters, tweet!
「汽水赛场」上的小鸟真该和你学学，不要吃点苦头就怕得找不着鸟啾。
The bird at the Soda Racetrack should learn from you. Don't go hiding just because things get tough, tweet.
嘿呀，是没见过的家伙啾。
啾，这股苏乐达的味道…难道是钟表小子的朋友啾？怪不得一副硬派好汉的样子……
Tweet, this SoulGlad smell... Could you be Clockie's friend, tweet? I thought you looked like someone tough...
等训练完「汽水赛场」的这些小鸟，一定要和我比比谁飞得更快啾。
Wait till I finish drilling those birds at the Soda Racetrack, we must see who's the faster one, tweet.
吼吼，是美梦小镇的大家比赛飞翔的热血之地啾。
Ho-ho, it's the high-octane grounds where everyone in Dreamville has flying races, tweet.
只有像我这样厉害的小鸟，才能抢到大树顶端的宝座，不说黄金公子，就连钟表小子和哈努兄弟也飞不过我啾。
Only an awesome bird like me can claim that throne atop the Great Tree. Forget about Young Master Gold... even Clockie or Brother Hanu could not outfly me, tweet.
They let you win, didn't they?
硬派鸟就不要在意这些细节啾。
Real hardcore birds are never concerned with the details, tweet.
这年头，新孵化的小鸟都越来越浮躁了。我让它们多练习几千次振翅，结果一回头就全溜走了，叽叽喳喳地说要去看比赛啾。

These days, newly hatched birds are getting more capricious. I tell them to practice flapping their wings a few thousand more times, but they run away as soon as I turn my head, incessantly tweeting about wanting to watch the races, tweet.
嘿呀！硬派的朋友，我突然有了个好主意——由你来帮我逮住它们啾。
Oho! My hardy friend, I've suddenly had a great idea. How about you help me catch them, tweet?
我这么大摇大摆地飞过去，它们肯定都会躲着我不出来，但小家伙们都不怕你啾。
They'll surely hide from me if I get close, but they're not afraid of you, tweet.
你要是能做到，我就把「美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟」的称号让给你啾。
If you can do it, I'll present you with the title of "Fastest Flying Bird of Dreamville," tweet.
去吧，把那些没魄力的小家伙找回大树，我要替老师好好给它们补补课啾。
Go and return those spineless fools to the Great Tree. I will drill their lessons into them in the Professor's stead, tweet.
啾！已经找到了这么多小鸟，你难道有台能看到未来的钟表啾？
Tweet! You've found so many birds already! Do you have a clock that can see the future or something, tweet?
这些报酬先给你，让它们见识见识真正的硬派鸟啾。
Take these rewards with you first. Let them witness the true form of what it means to be hardcore, tweet.
让我确认下，你真不是专程来抢走我「美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟」称号的？啾啾？
To confirm, you're not really here to take my "Fastest Flying Bird of Dreamville" title away from me, right? Tweet tweet?
本来是给小家伙们的零花钱，但为了惩罚它们逃跑，都分给你了啾。
This was supposed to be their allowance, but I'm giving it to you to punish them for escaping, tweet.
嘿呀，有问题尽管问，上至痛打石头老板，下至装点美梦小镇，就没有我不知道的啾。
Oho, don't hesitate to ask me anything. Whether it's beating Boss Stone to a pulp or prettying up Dreamville, there's nothing I don't know, tweet.
知道星辰游乐园和安谧禁闭室吗？都是我带着小鸟们一起搭建的啾。
Do you know Stardust Amusement Park and the reflection room? It was I who led the birds in building those, tweet.
当小镇出现危机的时候，我也会带着大家一起打退那些坏蛋——小家伙们都叫我不好惹的「赤红大哥」啾！
When the town is in danger, I also lead everyone in fending off those bad guys. Everyone knows I'm Boss Red, and that I'm not to be trifled with, tweet!
给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
Tell me the story of the origami birds...
吼吼，那能说的可就多了啾。
Ho-ho, I've got plenty to talk about then, tweet.
这里原本是美梦小镇的「汽水乐园」，小鸟们都爱在这里抓虫子啾。
This used to be the soda haven of Dreamville. The birds loved catching bugs here, tweet.
但小镇外面来了一群坏蛋，把乐园弄得一团糟，连花都开不出来，大家花了好大的力气才把它们赶出去……
But a bunch of baddies came into town, and smashed up our paradise and turned it to scorched earth. It took everyone's efforts to drive them out...
所以我们搭建了这个锻炼身体的赛场，只要大家变得比谁都厉害，坏蛋就不敢欺负我们了啾。
So we built this racetrack to train our bodies. As long as everyone became stronger than everything else, baddies wouldn't dare bully us again, tweet.
在赛场上得到冠军的镇民就能成为美梦小镇的「大明星」！哈努兄弟、钟表小子、音符小姐、仓鼠球骑士、木头老爷、猫头鹰老师，还有我们这几只鸟都是大明星！
Residents who won on the racetrack would become Dreamville's stars! Brother Hanu, Clockie, Miss Note, Hamster Ball Knight, Old Man Wood, Professor Owl, and us birds here, we're all stars!
美梦小镇的狠角色可不少，比如汽水先生，看起来成天呆头呆脑的，真遇到困难还得靠他帮忙啾。
There are plenty of menacing characters here in Dreamville, like Mr. Soda. He looks like he just muddles around all day, but we rely on him when it really counts, tweet.
还有钟表小子，别看他两条腿短短的，喝下苏乐达之后，跑起来可没几只鸟能追上他啾。
And Clockie too. Don't be fooled by his short legs. Once he gulps down SoulGlad, few birds can keep up with his speed, tweet.
嘿呀！你也知道那位伟大的猫头鹰老师？全美梦小镇我最敬佩的就是它老人家啾。
Oho! You also know our great Professor Owl? He's the one I look up to the most in Dreamville, tweet.
别看老师总待在树上，搭建美梦小镇的时候，森林里藏着不少坏蛋，老师和钟表小子把它们都解决了，是硬派鸟中的硬派鸟啾。

He may look like he just perches in a tree all day, but when we were building Dreamville, there were so many baddies lurking in the forest. The Professor and Clockie took care of them all. They're the most hardcore among the real hardcore birds, tweet.
我毕生最大的梦想，就是成为一只和老师一样厉害的鸟啾。
My lifelong dream is to become an amazing bird like the Professor, tweet.
唔…虽然小家伙们逃跑时一哄而散，但就凭它们的速度，还逃不出我的眼睛……
Hah... Those little fellas may be speedy when they're fleeing, but slowpokes like them won't even be able to escape my eyes...
只是最近记性有点差…你手头有神奇的的「魔法硬币」吗？有它我就能想起来了啾！
It's just that my memory's been hazy recently... Do you have any of those wondrous magic coins? I'll be able to remember with them, tweet!
小鸟粗暴地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
The bird snatches the coin from you viciously, and then... gobbles it up!
Hehe, my memories are returning, tweet...
嘿呀——让我想想，有个害羞的小家伙，最近在偷偷练习唱歌，<color=#dbc291ff>大厅的那些音响</color>，应该很适合它啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a shy fella that's been learning to sing in secret. The <color=#dbc291ff>lobby with audio equipment</color> should be perfect for it to practice, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，有个热心肠的小家伙特别爱到处帮忙，说不定又混进<color=#dbc291ff>入口的迎宾队列里</color>，给大家引路去了啾。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a passionate one that loves helping out. It could have stolen into the <color=#dbc291ff>welcome line at the entrance</color> again, trying to give directions to people, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，苏乐达是小鸟们的最爱，在<color=#dbc291ff>汽水瀑布那里</color>，多半能找到贪嘴的小鸟啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Birds love SoulGlad, so you'll have a high chance of finding a greedy bird by the <color=#dbc291ff>soda waterfall</color>, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，音符小姐让不少小鸟有了新的梦想，有个爱上了舞台的小家伙，现在还在找它的<color=#dbc291ff>星星</color>啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Miss Note has invoked new dreams among the birds. There's one that's obsessed with stage plays, and is still finding its <color=#dbc291ff>stars</color>, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>赛场上时常会出现很精彩的表演</color>，停留在周围的小家伙，一旦入戏太深，就容易忘记回家啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>there are always exciting performances at the racetrack</color>. Anyone that stop by will get too engrossed in the show and forget to go home, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，有个擅长拍摄的小家伙，特别喜欢热血的场面，最近一直沉迷在<color=#dbc291ff>动作派的现场</color>拍戏啾。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a fella that's great at photography, and loves places that get your blood pumping. It's recently been obsessed with productions at the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Action site</color>, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，最近<color=#dbc291ff>赛场上来了只大猩猩</color>，把所有对手都打得落花流水，那个爱看戏的小家伙绝对不会错过啾。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: A <color=#dbc291ff>huge gorilla has recently arrived at the racetrack</color> and demolished all its opponents. That fanfare-loving fella will definitely not miss this, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，你见过恐龙吗？据说，那东西也是一种小鸟。<color=#dbc291ff>如果有只恐龙参加比赛</color>，周围肯定少不了观赛的小家伙啾。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: You've seen a dinosaur before? People say it's also a type of bird. <color=#dbc291ff>If a dinosaur joins the competition</color>, there'd be plenty of birds spectating, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，哈努兄弟和猫头鹰老师是多年的老朋友，就连他的据点外面也有老师的痕迹，<color=#dbc291ff>是小鸟看了就会亲近的雕像啾</color>。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Brother Hanu and Professor Owl are longtime friends. There are even vestiges of the Professor outside his usual hangout: <color=#dbc291ff>It's a statue that birds are reflexively drawn to, tweet</color>.
嘿呀——让我想想，石头老板似乎找到了<color=#dbc291ff>哈努兄弟的据点</color>，有个勇敢的小家伙，已经飞去救他了啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: It seems like Boss Stone has located <color=#dbc291ff>Brother Hanu's usual hangout</color>. A brave little one has already flown there to save him, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，赛场里新建了<color=#dbc291ff>一台非常大的时钟</color>，每次飞过那里，总能听见熟悉的声音啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>A giant clock</color> was recently built at the racetrack. You can hear familiar sounds each time you fly by there, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>有个傻乎乎的小家伙跑去找谜钟先生玩了，可那里最近有恐龙出没</color>，万一被坏蛋吃掉就糟糕了啾。

Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>There's a dimwitted one that's gone to look for Mr. Big Ticker to play, but dinosaurs have recently been spotted there</color>. It'd be trouble if it got eaten by a baddie, tweet.
嘿呀——让我想想，有个小家伙兴冲冲的对我说，它要和钟表小子一起拍戏，依我看，无非就是藏在<color=#dbc291ff>钟表小子的广告牌</color>里啾。
Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: A lil' fella enthusiastically told me that it wanted to shoot a movie with Clockie. I think it's just hiding inside <color=#dbc291ff>Clockie's billboard</color>, tweet.

Here, this is a present I've specially prepared for you, you must take it. I look forward to our future encounters, tweet.
啾！客官想聊聊天吗？人家一直都在啾。
Tweet! You wish to chat? I've been waiting here always, tweet.
我看见凝固的时光流淌，满城灯火辉映举目蛮荒\n群星浮游于梦与梦之间，在神秘的忆海漾开微浪
I see the flow of time frozen, a city full of lights shining on the gaze of the savage.\nStars float between dreams, sending ripples across the mysterious sea of memories.
我看见行经至此的旅者，与我同将壮丽绝景仰望\n原初之梦如此令人神往，你可情愿在此驻足徜徉……
I see travelers who come here, admiring the magnificent scenery with me.\nThe primitive dream is so truly mesmerizing, would you rest your journey and linger here...
感谢你的赞美，我只是个偶尔喜欢卖弄文墨的诗歌爱好者，面对如此瑰丽奇景，难免有些心绪澎湃……
Thank you for your praise, but I'm just a dabbler of poetry who occasionally likes to show off. It's natural that one's emotions would be stirred when overwhelmed by such a resplendent view...
哈哈，见笑了。不过面对如此瑰丽奇景，我难免有些心绪澎湃……
Haha, I must sound ridiculous. It's only natural that one's emotions would be stirred when overwhelmed by such a resplendent view...
呃…抱歉，我只是一时有感而发……
Err... Apologies, I was just waxing poetic from the heart...
我是说…这座流梦城寨当真是个美妙又奇妙的地方。
I mean to say... This Dreamflux Fortress is truly a beautiful and wondrous place.
瞧，那忆质流淌凝聚的漩涡，那迷人的曲线、圆滑的折角…如此相似的两个{RUBY_B#梦境}世界{RUBY_E#}互为倒影，星光浮游其间、辉映鎏金灯火。

Look, that vortex of coalesced memoria flow, that mesmerizing contour, the smoothly rounded corners... These two similar {RUBY_B#Dreamscape}worlds{RUBY_E#} cast reflections on each other, floating starlight shining through like gilded radiance.
原初的梦境充满了迷人的矛盾——岌岌可危中的安稳、荒芜破败下的生机、困窘狭缝里的自由……
The Primitive Dreamscape was filled with enchanting contradictions — peace amidst precarious predicaments, life beneath desolate destruction, freedom between the crevices of adversity...
这里就像一块未经打磨的原石，而我已按捺不住自己的想象——想象着如何将其雕琢成美玉，就如将质朴语词勾连为精巧的诗……
This place is like a rough stone, and I can't suppress my own imagination — about how to sculpt it into a fine jade, to connect plain words into an exquisite poem...
Are you up for a chat?
当然，如果你有任何疑问，我将很乐意解答。
Of course, if you have any questions, I'd be more than happy to answer them.
我是受雇于隐夜鸫家系的筑梦师…至少明面上是。
I am the Dreamweaver hired by the Nightingale Family... or at least I am in name.
我曾是个漫游星间的雕塑家，帮助家族完成了一位「调弦师」的塑像，继而忝列贵客之流，受到了家族的邀约。
I was once a sculptor roaming the stars, and helped The Family complete a Chordmaster statue, subsequently becoming their honored guest and invited to The Family as a result.
接到隐夜鸫的盛情邀请后，我与好友一同来到匹诺康尼，投身筑梦事业。
After receiving the Nightingales' cordial invitation, I came to Penacony with my friends and embarked on a Dreamweaving career.
只是于我而言，那盛大美梦始终…抱歉，是我多言了，你不必在意。
It's just that to me, that grand dream eventually... Apologies, I've spoken too much, please don't mind me.
Why have you decided to stay in the Dreamflux Reef?
我因令人惊恐的意外到访此处，并将理想与梦寄放于此——我希望将这里建设成理想中的模样。
I came to this place because of a horrific accident, and pinned my ideals and dream on this place — I hope to build this place in the image of my ideals.
这里让我想起了故乡，那是一个蛮荒的星球，有着无尽的黄沙、丰沃的绿洲与不熄的火焰。
This place reminds me of my home. It is a barren planet with boundless golden sand, vibrant oases and flames that don't extinguish.
那是个落后、粗犷的星球，却蕴含无限生机，却能包容一切自由，人人心怀浪漫的渴望——就像流梦礁一样。
But on that primitive, savage planet, bountiful life prevails, and it is inclusive of all freedoms, where everyone's hearts brim with romantic desire— just like Dreamflux Reef.
在我的宏愿之中，梦境当如此处，应自由地生长，结出美好的果实，长成如诗的仙境，而我会为之倾尽心血。
In my grand ambition, a Dreamscape should be as such: Where life is free to blossom into beautiful fruit, into a sanctuary regaled in poems, and I will spare no effort in achieving this.
我深知此非坦途，前路必将艰辛漫长、无法仅凭理论与知识畅行其上，但我愿将余生投注于此，见证它生发成长……

I know it won't be easy, and the path ahead will be arduous and long, that it cannot be built with theories and knowledge alone, but I'm willing to spend my life to achieve this, to witness its growth...
再见，愿你也能在此处找到诗意与浪漫。
Goodbye, may you also find the poetry and romanticism like I have here.
又见面了…你也沉浸于这壮丽奇观之中了吗？
We meet again... Are you also immersed in the grandiosity of this sight?
我一直认为，所谓筑梦，筑的不止是梦，更是做梦之人的心灵。
I've always felt that dreamweaving isn't just about dreams, but also the soul of the one who creates them.
它们起初就像这梦境一样荒芜索瑟，但只要精心雕琢、悉心教养，终究能够变作流光溢彩的美梦。
They start out barren and empty like this Dreamscape, but with meticulous carving and careful nurturing, they will one day become a beautiful dream of kaleidoscopic lights.
我如此坚信着…却不知道自己选择的道路是否正确。但幸运的是，如今我获得了一个自证的契机——
My belief is resolute... but I don't know if my path is correct. Luckily though, I've been given a chance to prove myself...
在这里，蛮荒中暗含生机、无序中透出安宁…我可以将它变为理想中的乌托邦、变为货真价实的「美梦」。
Here, where life is concealed within wilderness, where slivers of peace emerge from disorder... I can turn them into an ideal utopia, into a true dream.
人当自由、物应平等，梦中的灵魂，也将获得真正的幸福与和平……
When freedom and the material are equal to people, the souls in dreams will also earn true happiness and peace...
我曾用心血浇筑家族的美梦，如今却发现，那不过是个金碧辉煌的谎言。
I once slogged for The Family's dream, but now I have discovered that it is but a gilded lie.
我从旧日的理想中惊醒，怅然若失，不知何去何从……
I was shocked awake from my old ideals, at a loss, aimless...
被埋藏的梦，诞生于命途交汇\n被遗忘的梦，匿迹于物欲横流
A buried dream, birthing an encounter with destiny.\nA forgotten dream, hidden in a stream of materialism.
不可见的宿星引我来此，褪去锁枷拘囚\n被唤醒的热忱疾声高呼，方知渴念已久
An unseen star guided me here, breaking the fetters that shackled me.\nA roused fervor cries out, a realization of a long-muted desire.
我曾于矫揉的幸福里寻觅幸福，在虚假的自由中探求自由\n却只见金纸压垮了黄金的脊梁，见声色泥泞了谐声的鸣奏
I once sought happiness in arranged happiness, freedom in false freedom.\nYet only saw gold spines crushed by gold paper, sounds that sullied the melodies of harmony.
今我离群独步、踽踽难断去留\n犹似行舟迷雾、前途未可筹谋
Now I walk alone, my steps not knowing to stay or go.\nHeld hostage by fogged hesitation, a future that cannot be fathomed.
焦渴中花苞希冀阵雨泽润\n烈阳下旅者惦念浓荫庇佑
Parched flower buds hope for a shower of rain.\nTravelers beneath the sweltering sun yearn for shrouded shade.
而我如此渴念，陈腐的终将陈腐于陈腐的棺柩\n而我如此渴念，鲜活的终将鲜活于鲜活的洪流
And I long, the dead to remain dead in a dead casket.\nAnd I long, the living to remain living in a stream of life.
那人人向往的美梦，不过是个畸形的造物，暗藏着多少凶险与阴霾……
The dream that people look forward to is nothing but a twisted creature, lurking with myriad dangers and mist...
未入梦时，曾憧憬美梦；方入梦时，美梦竟成空\n入梦愈久，愈心生惶恐；入梦愈深，愈惫怠难行
Before diving into a dream, once yearning for one. Once dived into, the dream be a void.\nThe longer in a dream, the more paranoid the heart. The deeper in a dream, the more draining the body.
我梦见奏乐者端坐空中楼阁，傲慢自得\n我梦见逐波者囚拘欲望枷锁，纵情声色
I dream of musicians seated atop floating pavilions, lofty and smug.\nI dream of seekers caught in shackles of desire, reveling in worldly wants.
我梦见呻吟掩埋于糖浆，泥泞污浊\n我梦见真心困死于形骸，可鄙可唾
I dream of moans buried in syrup, mired and foul.\nI dream of bared hearts dying in their mortal shells, despicable and contemptible.
我梦见繁华光景、灯火通明，疯狂与混沌滋生于阴影\n我梦见苦痛魂灵、憔悴多病，美梦的疗救痛苦且致命
I dream of prosperous flourish, lights radiating, insanity and chaos spawned in shadow.\nI dream of suffering souls, emaciated and sick, the dream's healing, pain and death.
And so I wake up in a start...
恒久的幸福从未诞生于此，短见的欢愉总在人心痴缠\n闪耀的星辰难逃寂灭暗淡，神圣的谐乐早已荒腔走板
Eternal happiness was never borne of here, fleeting joy so alluring to the heart.\nScintillating stars struggling to flee solitary doom, the sacred harmony long lost in the cacophony.
在这美梦之中，如何继续酣眠\n星辉失却颜色，霓虹过于耀眼
In this dream, how does one sleep soundly.\nThe radiant stars faded, the rainbow saturated.
柔声蜜语，鸩毒比蜜甜\n宝器珠光，自缚于绸缎
Soft whispers and honeyed words, bitter poison sweeter than saccharine.\nTreasures and gems, wrapped in satin.
于是我蓦然惊醒——\n耽于美梦者醉死梦中，无缘黎明
And so I wake up in a start...\nThe dreamer drowning in his own dream, never seeing the light of daybreak.
这原初的梦境，蕴藏着无限可能性。在这里，错误的得以被纠正，缺失的能够被补充……
This Primitive Dreamscape contains infinite possibilities. Here, mistakes can be corrected, and inadequacies can be patched up...
我自午夜美梦中惊醒，坠入愈深沉眠\n鸢尾花香随灯火暗淡，唯余清苦回甘
I startle awake from my twilight dream, descending into a deeper slumber.\nThe scent of iris fades with the light, leaving only the bittersweet.
群星投下异彩，如恋人含情眉眼\n魂灵升腾迷狂，似枯苗饱饮清泉
The stars cast myriad colors, like the eyes of a lover.\nThe soul ascends in ecstasy, like a withered sapling gulping springwater.
我曾无声呐喊，丛生杂草侵占沃壤良田\n喉舌干涸喑哑，却唤不来野火雹冰闪电
I was once voiceless to shout, the weeds invading fertile fields.\nThroat and mouth parched and mute, unable to call upon wildfire, hail, and thunder.
而此刻、而眼前，我愿笃信、我将得见——
And right here and now before me, I sincerely believe that I will see...
隐夜鸫振翅，衔来善的嫩芽与希望的种\n殷勤耕作出，今日的欢歌与明日的笑颜
The Nightingale beats its wings, carrying with it budding shoots and seeds of hope.\nDiligently toiling the joyful songs of today, and the smiles of tomorrow.
帷幕后晨曦露出边角，将鸟的翎羽点燃\n翼羽携自由逐风追日，将人所应得偿还
Dawn peeks out from behind the curtain, setting alight the bird's plumes.\nWings of freedom to chase winds and sun, repaying what those deserve.
在此刻、在眼前，我愿笃信、我将得见——\n所向往、所期盼，我愿笃信、我将得见……
And right here and now before me, I sincerely believe that I shall see...\nThe yearning, the aspiration, I sincerely believe that I shall see...
亲爱的朋友，恭喜你夺得热砂盛典的冠军！
Dear friend, congrats on winning the Scorchsand Festival championship!
当时的我，也正如现在的你一样——闯过层层关卡，跨越一个又一个障碍，终于在这荒凉的梦境中闯出一片天地。
I was just like you then — clearing all levels in swathes, leaping and bounding over all obstacles, finally making a name for myself in this desolate Dreamscape.
岁月转瞬而过，我也从一个什么都不懂的毛头小子变成了垂垂老矣的商人。当时，谁又能想到，一个毛头小子竟然会制造出风靡整个梦境的商品呢？
As time flowed, I went from being an ignorant fledgling to a wizened merchant. Back then, who would even think that a brat would create goods that would take the entire Dreamscape by storm?
咳咳，你瞧，人年纪大了，就喜欢回忆过去…但重要的东西是将来！
Ahem, don't mind me. The old love to reminisce on the past... What's important is the future!
苏乐达集团的事业不会止步于梦境。我有一个梦想，在不久的将来，哪怕在银河最偏僻的角落都能发现苏乐达的身影，无论贫富贵贱，人人都有畅饮苏乐达的权利！

The SoulGlad Enterprise won't simply rest their laurels in the Dreamscape. I have a dream, that in the near future, SoulGlad will be found in even the most obscure corners of the Cosmos. Everyone will have the right to enjoy SoulGlad, regardless of status!
为了这样的未来，我会工作至生命的最后一刻。
I will work to my final breath to realize such a future.
Are you up for a chat?
没问题。老人别的没有，多的是闲暇时间，你想聊什么？
No problem. The old don't have much else besides time. What do you want to talk about?
What made you start a company back then?
说来话长，我曾是星际和平公司的产品销售，听说匹诺康尼处处是机遇，我便咬紧牙关辞掉了这份人人都羡慕的工作，准备在逐梦时代的浪潮中搏一回。

That's a long story. I was once an IPC product salesman. Upon hearing that Penacony was flooded with opportunity, I gritted my teeth and resigned from a cushy job that most would die for, ready to bet big in the tide of the Age of Dreaming.
但在梦里赚钱也没那么容易，在一次创业失败后，我只能在热砂的时刻当个普通的搬运工。
But it's not that easy earning your keep in dreams. After my first business failed, I had to work as an ordinary transport worker in the Moment of Scorchsand.
直到有一天，我因为繁重的工作晕倒在路边，好心人喂给我一瓶美味的饮料，让我找回了活力与梦想…那饮料就是苏乐达！
Till one day, I fainted by the roadside from overwork. A kind-hearted stranger fed me a tasty beverage that helped me regain my enthusiasm and dreams... And that was SoulGlad!
当我了解了苏乐达的故事，听闻了那位圣人救济罪人的传说，我便大受感动。那时我就立志，一定要将苏乐达和苏萨先生的心愿传向整个宇宙！

Once I learned about the story behind SoulGlad and the legend of how that saint redeemed the sinners, I was deeply moved. From then on, my resolution was cemented — I was determined to spread SoulGlad and Mr. Sousa's wish to the entire universe!
我将这番愿景讲述给了苜蓿草家系，那位德高望重的「老奥帝」出资赞助我开创了苏乐达工厂。经过千百次口味的调试，无数次的市场考验，才有了今天的苏乐达。

I told this dream to the Alfalfa Family, and the virtuous Old Oti sponsored the establishment of my SoulGlad factory. It took umpteen taste tests and countless market trials to create the SoulGlad of today.
现在回想起来，是勇气、运气、志气…更重要的是「同谐」的信仰与家族的支持，才让我走上了致富的道路！
Looking back, it was courage, luck, will... and more importantly, my faith in the Harmony and The Family's support that allowed me to walk the path of fortune!
咳咳，我刚才说的是不是很振奋人心？下次采访我也这么说！
Ahem, did I move you with my re-telling? I'll do it again the next time you interview me!
呵呵，没想到现在的年轻人还对这个感兴趣，不枉费我们的大力宣传。那让我讲给你吧——
Heh-heh, never thought the young'uns now would be interested in such a thing. Our huge advertising push certainly didn't go to waste. I'll tell you about it then...
在匹诺康尼还是监狱之时，有一位叫做「苏萨先生」的大善人。他高超的厨艺本能在宇宙中最豪华的餐厅工作，但却选择来到了边陲监狱中救赎犯人的身体与心灵。

When Penacony was still a prison, there was a very kind man named Mr. Sousa. He could have worked in the most luxurious restaurant in the universe with his unmatched culinary skill, but he chose to salvage the shells and souls of prisoners in this frontier prison.
为了改善犯人们的生活，苏萨先生靠狱中的食材以及阿斯德纳星系特有的「梦见草」调配出了「苏乐达」。
To improve the lives of these criminals, Mr. Sousa concocted SoulGlad using ingredients available in the prison and Dreamleaves, an herb that only exists in the Asdana star system.
他希望这种美味的饮品可以让犯人向往美好、化解监狱中的矛盾。这位圣人的梦想便是某日宇宙中的所有人都能坐在一张桌子上，快乐地共饮苏乐达。

He hoped that this tasty drink would get the prisoners to pine for better days, and quell the uncertainties of imprisonment. This saint's dream was that someday, everyone in the universe would be seated at the same table, happily drinking and sharing SoulGlad.
而狭隘的公司不满苏萨先生纯真的梦想，将他投入狱中折磨，并在依诺哈尔上灭绝了所有的梦乐草，最初的苏乐达从此在宇宙中绝迹。

But the small-minded IPC was not pleased with Mr. Sousa's sincere dream. They tossed him in prison to be tortured and decimated all the Dreamleaves that were on Enohart. The original SoulGlad would forever be extinct from this universe.
直至战争爆发，不善战斗的苏萨为了实现和平的心愿，与犯人们一同奋战，最终在决战中英勇战死。
That was till war broke out. Sousa, who was not proficient in combat, stood together with the prisoners and heroically gave his life in the final battle — to realize his wish for peace.
而在将士的战壕中、在家族宴会的桌上、在匹诺康尼的史书里，苏乐达从未缺席……
And in the trenches of soldiers, at the tables of The Family's banquets, in the history books of Penacony, SoulGlad was ever-present...
而在苏乐达企业与苜蓿草家系的努力下，我们在梦中重新培育了梦见草，让他的梦想在梦中永存——喝一口苏乐达，就是在向这位英雄致敬！

Through the combined efforts of SoulGlad Enterprises and the Alfalfa Family, we managed to regrow Dreamleaves in dreams. His dream will forever exist in dreams... Every gulp of SoulGlad is a toast to this hero's bravery!
这个嘛…我们将以苏乐达的饮料业务为核心，向餐饮、潮流服饰、旅游、房地产等多个方面拓展我们的业务。
Well... With the SoulGlad beverage as our core business, we intend to expand our portfolio into food and beverages, fashion, travel, real estate, and other verticals.
我们会通过各种渠道向银河各界推广苏乐达，力争在每一个重要星球上兴建一座苏乐达主题乐园、一座苏乐达主题公寓、一座苏乐达主题酒店、一座苏乐达服饰广场……

We will promote SoulGlad across the cosmos using various media channels, heavily investing in key planets to build SoulGlad theme parks, SoulGlad themed apartments, SoulGlad themed hotels, SoulGlad themed fashion plazas...
有什么给年轻人的建议吗？
Do you have any advice for the younger generation?
现在的年轻人啊，和我们那时候不同，有主见、有思考、有想法，但缺少了信念，做事情常常三心二意，半途而废。

Young people nowadays, they're different from us back then. They now have opinions, freedom of thought, ideals, but lack resolve. They're usually hesitant when embarking on matters, and give up halfway.
你看我，从来不在乎苏乐达赚了多少钱，我在乎的只是能不能把苏乐达的快乐带给更多的人——这就是同谐的伟大精神。
Look at me — I've never cared about how much money SoulGlad makes. I only care about whether I can deliver SoulGlad's happiness to even more people. This is the essence of Harmony's spirit.
所以说啊，年轻人不能只想着挣快钱，要沉下心来，努力思考你的信念。重要的不是你赚了多少钱，而是你为什么而工作。

Which is why, young people shouldn't just think about making a quick buck. They have to find their composure and contemplate on their beliefs. How much you earn isn't important. It is the reason you work.
多么好的年轻人啊。如果有一天你不想做无名客了，欢迎来苏乐达工作！
You're an outstanding youngster. You're welcome to work at SoulGlad if the day comes when you don't want to be a Nameless any longer!
I advise you not to offer any more advice.
呵呵，这都是我自传里的名句，听我的，准没错。
Heh-heh, this is an iconic quote from my memoir. You won't go wrong listening to me.
That's all the questions I have.
年轻人，努力吧！累了就喝一瓶苏乐达！
Keep it up, young one! Have a sip of SoulGlad if you're ever tired!
最近苏乐达的销量突然大幅上涨……
SoulGlad's sales numbers have been rapidly rising recently...
苏乐达集团的银河化战略终于迎来了阶段性的成果！
SoulGlad Enterprises' cosmic strategy has finally reached a milestone!
多年以来，我们一直坚定不移地将苏乐达推向银河中的各个世界。在这个过程中，因为口味、广告、当地法律等问题，苏乐达的推广一度陷入困境。

For many years, we have been unwavering in our promotion of SoulGlad to the various worlds in the cosmos. There were many bumps along the journey, over its taste, commercials, local laws, and other problems.
但实践证明，银河化战略是成功的道路，也是必须坚持的策略。
But the reality has proven that a cosmic strategy is the successful solution, and one in which that we must persist.
自从苏乐达成为匹诺康尼的国民饮料之后，它的销量一直止步不前，这对一个企业来说是十分致命的危险。
Ever since SoulGlad became the national drink of Penacony, its sales have been climbing higher than ever. This is something that could ironically prove fatal to a company.
现在，许多世界已经开始慢慢接受苏乐达，苏乐达集团的销售额即将到达新的高峰！
Now, many worlds have slowly begun to accept SoulGlad. SoulGlad Enterprise's sales numbers are about to reach a new high!
集团发展至今，人员冗余，流程复杂，是时候该改革了……
With the Enterprise' expansion till today, some staff will be made redundant, and with overly complex work flows, it is about time for a restructuring...
大集团有大集团的好处，也有大集团特有的毛病。
Major groups have their advantages, as well as problems only unique to them.
还记得我刚刚开办苏乐达工厂的时候，任何事情都能当天批示，当天决定，当天推进。
I remember when I just opened my SoulGlad factory — anything could be submitted, approved, and rolled out on the same day.
现在集团大则大矣，一件小事都要经过无数领导的批示，想要做些创新简直难如登天。这样下去，我们很快会丧失竞争优势。

The current company is now a juggernaut. Every minute detail has to be scrutinized by countless managers. Trying to implement some innovation is as hard as getting into heaven. At this rate, we'll very quickly lose our competitive edge.
该和集团的人力部门商谈该如何降本增效了，首先，就要开除那些不做事的员工！
It's time to have a chat with HR on measures of cost reduction and higher efficiency. First on the list is to dismiss the employees with subpar performances!
Young one, what do you think?
哈哈哈，我们就是需要像你一样高觉悟的员工！
Hahaha, we need more insightful workers just like you!
Will retrenched staff get severance pay?
赔偿？不让他们赔偿公司的损失已经够人道了！不过作为苜蓿草旗下品牌，我们当然也有「同谐」的人情味——

Severance? Not making them pay for the company's losses is generous enough! But seeing as we need to be on-brand with the Alfalfa Family, we must also express compassion that's aligned with the Harmony...
被开除的员工可以获得三个月的月薪…等价的艾迪恩代币，能肯定能供他们玩到有新工作为止。
Dismissed staff will get three months' pay... in Aideen tokens. That will be more than enough to entertain them till they find new jobs.
Doesn't sound it's of much help.
那就全部换一批人，反正不缺找工作的人…有壮士断腕决心，才有成功的可能。
Then I'll replace all of them at once. Everyone's hankering for a job these days anyway... Success is only possible with a will that has learned loss.
可恶，法院竟然没有判定「苏萨水」侵权！
Bah, the court did not rule Sousa Juice guilty with copyright infringement!
集团的法务部都是干什么吃的，竟然连这么简单的案件都打不赢！回去之后，我一定要好好地优化他们！
Is the Enterprise's Justice Department incompetent? They can't even win such a simple case! When I return, I'm definitely going to take my time optimizing them!
相似的包装、相似的口味、相似的广告词…法官如果不是盲人，就一定能看出来苏萨水就是个彻头彻尾的抄袭品牌！
Similar packaging, similar taste, similar tagline... Unless the judge is blind, it's so obvious Sousa Juice is a <unbreak>100%</unbreak> copycat of our brand!
还说什么苏乐达其实是抄袭苏萨水，他们才是苏萨先生作品的正统继承者，完全是无稽之谈！
They still have the audacity to claim SoulGlad as copied Sousa Juice, and that they're the true successor of Mr. Sousa's work. Absolute and total hogwash!
哼，苏乐达一直被模仿，但从未被超越。销量将会证明一切！
Hmph, SoulGlad has always had its fair share of copycats, but none has surpassed us. Our sales will prove it once and for all!
我还能看到苏乐达流淌在银河各处那一天吗？
Will I see the day when SoulGlad dominates every corner of the cosmos?
岁月不饶人啊，虽然我身子骨还硬朗，记性也是一天比一天差。
Time is a merciless mistress. My bones may still be sturdy, but my memory gets worse with each day.
最近我老是想不起一些东西的名字，手上拿着手机，却在找手机在哪……
I haven't been able to remember the names of some things recently. Or I've got my phone in my hand, but wonder where it is...
唉，医生告诉我，人的记忆功能退化的时候，会先忘记名词，再忘记动词，因为动词比名词重要些……
*sigh* The doctors tell me that when a person's memory starts fading, he will first forget nouns, then verbs, because verbs are more important than nouns...
苏乐达集团正处在关键的发展节点，我们还没有成为宇宙中最赚钱的汽水品牌…也没有实现苏萨先生的理想呢！
The SoulGlad Enterprise is at a pivotal development phase. We still haven't become the richest soda brand in the universe... nor have we fulfilled Mr. Sousa's ideal!
拜托，命运，让我发挥完余热之后再熄灭吧……
I would plead with destiny to allow me to shine bright with whatever I have left before I am extinguished...
哦~这位生面孔的顾客，你是来照顾我的生意？还是想跟我畅聊一番？
Ooh, a familiar face. Are you here to take care of my business? Or for a chat?
哎呀~好问题！是个很有深度的问题！
Ooh good question! A very profound one!
对于匹诺康尼而言，我是一名无籍的「偷渡客」；对于我的母星而言，我是「LOV-E三代量产型<unbreak>3451</unbreak>」；对流梦礁的居民而言，我叫「基尔克」。
To Penacony, I am a stateless stowaway. To my home planet, I am LOV-E III Mass Production Model <unbreak>3451</unbreak>. To the residents of Dreamflux Reef, I am Kirk.
对你来说，可以把我当作是一个「玩具商人」，喜欢用些小玩意儿唤醒无机生命的快感回路，刺激有机生命的伏隔核~

As for you, you can see me as a toy merchant who has a penchant for using knick-knacks to jolt the dopamine circuits of inorganic creatures, and to tickle the thrills of the nucleus accumbens of organic life!
哦！居然还能遇到喜欢玩具的成熟体有机生命，真是令人欣喜！
Oh! To have the fortune to meet a fully grown organic lifeform who likes toys. What a delight!
I'll have to see what toy it is.
哦~那这些精心设计的小玩具定不会令你失望呀~
Ohh, then these exquisitely designed toys won't let you down!
Who still plays with toys in this day and age?
哦，我的博识尊，你残酷的语言让我的心脏回路发生了一次小短路！
Oh, my Learned Nous, your cruel words have caused a short circuit in my heart circuit!
但没关系，你说得对，很少有有机生命爱玩玩具。
But it's okay. You're right — few organic lifeforms like toys.
现在的宇宙中有太多高效取悦你们的娱乐方式了，电子软件、虚拟现实、化合物质……在匹诺康尼更是如此，梦境中有千万种玩乐的方式，何必把弄一个小玩具。

There are plenty more entertaining ways that can elicit joy more efficiently in the universe: Software, virtual reality, chemical substances... Even more so on Penacony, where there are myriad methods of entertainment in the Dreamscape. Why even bother with an insignificant toy?
但对于一些无机生命来说，玩具这种有趣的「装置」往往比拟造规则的游戏和电子脑中的虚构感官刺激要有吸引力。
But to some inorganic beings, toys are fun devices that are more mesmerizing than games with artificial rules and virtual sensory stimulation in electronic brains.
不是每位智械都有螺丝星臣民那样精妙的结构，我们的很多族群曾经也只是有机生命的「玩具」。所以在我们眼中，探索玩具也是在把玩与自己同源的一具躯体……

Not every Intellitron has the structural intricacy of Planet Screwllum's citizens. Many of us were once "toys" to organic lifeforms. In our eyes, tinkering with toys is also playing with a framework that has the same origin as us...
对吧，用这样的说法果然能够让你们有机生命更好理解。
I know, right? I was quite certain organic beings such as you would understand the concept more easily if explained this way.
是吗？我以为自己只是用了一种便于有机生命理解的话术…看来我还是没有完全理解你们的礼仪，抱歉。
Really? I thought I was using vernacular apposite to organic beings... It appears I don't fully understand your customs. My apologies.
哦~恕我冒犯，但宇宙中在追寻愉悦上走得最远、最疯狂、最刺激的永远是你们有机生命。
Oh! I apologize for any offense, but when it comes to the pursuit of joy, organic beings like you will always go the farthest, the wildest, and the most thrilling route in the universe.
我爱这里——在这片梦境里，无论是有机生命还是无机生命，大家的情感可以自由地宣泄，我也希望自己的产品能让这种宣泄更进一步……
I love this place. In this Dreamscape, be it an organic or inorganic lifeform, everyone's emotions can be expressed freely. I also hope that my own products can elevate such forms of expression...
顾客，有机会就来看看我的生意吧——我的玩具可不是普通的玩具，保准让您满意。
Come take a look at my business when you get a chance — my toys are not your common fare. I guarantee your satisfaction.
Are you up for a chat?
哦~没问题！请尽情向我灌注你的情感吧，可爱的有机生命！
Ohh no problem! Please project your emotions on to me to your heart's desire, lovely organic being!
玩具，我的顾客，有趣的、精巧的、神奇的，能为你带来愉悦感的玩具。
Toys, dear customer. Interesting, intricate, and wondrous toys that can bequeath you with joy.
看这魔方大师设计的七色六面魔方，如同宇宙本身一样玄妙莫测；看这用情绪碎片铸造的奇妙积木，能诱发你内心深处最真实的情感……

This colorful magic cube was designed by the cubemaster, as unfathomable as the universe itself. Just look at this wondrous building block that was crafted from emotion fragments — it will reveal the truest emotions in the deepest crevices of your heart...
哦~怎么样？买回家试试看吧？
Ohh, how about it? Buy one home and try it out?
How did you come to the Dreamflux Reef?
Ohh, now that's a long story.
我的生产地是阿斯蒙星环，那地方在追逐「欢愉」中走了条偏路，所有人都寻求疯狂的感官刺激，以此渴求乐子神的瞥视。

I was manufactured in the Asmon Rim, a planet that took a wrong turn in their pursuit of the Elation. Everyone sought heightened stimulation of the senses, all craving for a mere glimpse from the Laughter.
他们在这条路上走得越来越极端，最后摧毁了道德，把其他生命都当成了娱乐的玩具——我也是玩具之一。
The path they took became more extreme, finally destroying any remaining vestiges of their morality and treated other lives as toys of entertainment — I was one of those toys.
但说真的，我理解不了他们寻求快乐的方式，作为玩具，我一点也不快乐！于是我逃出了那里，乘着一位喜欢我的顾客的船来到了匹诺康尼。

But to be honest, I could never understand the method in which they sought joy. As a toy, I was not happy at all! That's why I escaped, boarded a ship of a customer who favored me, and made my way to Penacony.
我在蓝调的时刻的舞厅找了份工作，直到…一只好酷好酷的大怪物撕裂了我——天呐，那真是我被生产以来体验到的最刺激的事情！
I found a job at a dance hall in the Blue Hour, until... A super cool monster ripped me to shreds. Gosh, that really was the most thrilling incident I had experienced since I was made!
等到我的系统恢复，就已经在流梦礁了。比起上面，我更喜欢这个地方，没有家族盯着，能够更自由地感受大家激烈的情绪，哦~

When my system recovered, I was already at the Dreamflux Reef. I much prefer this place to the higher layers. Without The Family's eyes on me, I can freely experience everyone's intense emotions, ohh!
That's all the questions I have.
I wish to take a look at your toys.
看吧，我的顾客，想怎么看就怎么看~
Look away, customer. Look at them any way you want!
哦~亲爱的顾客，要记得再来哦~
Ohh my dear customer, please come back again!
哦吼吼吼~我帮他们找到了自己，真是太好啦！
Oh-hohoho, I helped them find themselves. That's wonderful!
哦~顾客，我好开心，好开心呀！
Ohh customer, I'm delighted, so delighted!
您知道吗，我刚刚听说为宾客服务的梦境迷钟们开始失控了——您知道这是谁的功劳吗？
Did you know — I just heard that the Dream Tickers servicing the guests have started to malfunction. Do you know who's the genius behind this?
我的积木是用无比激烈的情绪碎片制成的，能帮人激发出被压抑的欲望，这种效果在他们这些梦境造物身上会更加明显……

My building block was made from exceptionally intense emotion fragments that can help people evoke desires that have been suppressed. This effect will be much more evident on these Dreamscape creations...
太好了，他们用我的玩具找到了自我，真是让人开心呀~
Excellent. They found themselves using my toys. I'm delighted!
哎呀，夸得我都不好意思啦！
Oh dear, I'm all ablush from your praise!
哦~那不是坏掉，那是他们找到了自我，不再是奴隶的表现~
Ohh, not broken. They've found their own selves, and aren't slaves anymore!
不管别人怎么说，我还会继续制造更加激烈的玩具，让更多人能自由宣泄自己的情感，这就是玩具的意义呀~
No matter what others say, I will continue to craft even intenser toys that will let even more people bare their emotions. This is the essence of toys!
有机生命的快乐与无机生命的快乐，究竟是不是同一种快乐呢……
The joys of organic and inorganic beings... Are they the same type of joy...?
虽然无机生命能感受有机生命的情绪、能从生物学上理解有机生命取悦自己的方式，但我们能真正理解与自己构造完全不同的物种是何等感受吗？

Inorganic life can feel the emotions of organic life, and can understand how they derive pleasure from a biological standpoint, but can we truly understand the sort of emotions felt by a species whose structural make is entirely different from ours?
亲爱的顾客，你觉得呢——我能完全理解你的快乐，并为你带来快乐吗？
My dear customer, what do you think? Did I completely understand your joy, and evoke joy in you?
Why don't you give it a go?
虽然螺丝咕姆那样伟大的同胞提出了很多理论来证明我们的相近，但从诞生起就在取悦人类的我无法认同那些理论。
Our great comrade Screwllum may have posited many theories to prove our similarities, but I, who was made to provide joy to humans, do not accede to those theories.
即便我们的起源与人类一样来自宇宙的演变，但比起神秘莫测的有机生命，我们却像一张白纸，从构造模式到思维系统，没有一点秘密可言……

Even if our origin is the result of the universe's evolution, just like humanity, we are like a blank piece of paper compared to the profundity of organic life — from our structural modes to thought systems, there are no secrets to speak of...
同样的快感，人类与生俱来就能感受到，但我们必须通过感官硬件与仿生程序才能触发……
Humans can feel pleasure the moment they are born, but we have to trigger it through sensory hardware and bionic programming...
但这绝不意味着智械比有机生命更低级，我们也可以拥有自己独特的快乐。我的玩具只是第一步，未来，我会为同胞创造出更独一无二的快乐之物。

But this doesn't mean that Intellitrons are inferior to organic lives. We also possess our own unique joys. My toys are just the first step — in the future, I will create an item of joy exclusively for my brethren.
哎呀！「美梦剧团」们真是太可怜了，我看不下去了！
Oh dear! The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are such poor things. I can't bear this any longer!
哦~看看那些失去自由的孩子，在宣扬快乐的梦境里，却没有资格享受自己的快乐…我一定要帮帮他们！
Ohh, look at those children who have lost their freedom. In a Dreamscape that promotes happiness, yet unworthy to enjoy their own... I must help them!
顾客，你一定在梦里见过那些痛苦的「美梦剧团」吧？
Customer, you must have seen those suffering Sweet Dreams Troupe members in the Dreamscape, no?
哎呀！是吧，那么多有情感的小家伙在梦中挣扎，真是让人心疼！
Oh no! These poor souls, full of emotion, struggling in a dream. It's utterly heart-breaking!
天呐！您的话语比我的金属外壳还冰冷，他们怎能不痛苦呢？
Heavens! Your words are colder than my metal chassis. How could they not be suffering?
惊梦剧团倒是见过不少。
I've seen plenty of the Dreamjolt Troupe though.
哎呀！那就是他们在痛苦中无路可走，最后爆发出来的样子！
Oh no! That's the result of them having nowhere to turn to in their constant suffering!
那些可怜的孩子，从诞生起就必须遵从取悦宾客的使命，无法探寻自己的欲望与情感，让我想到了过去的自己……
From the time they are made, those poor children have been instructed to entertain their guests, unable to explore their own desires and emotions. They remind me of my former self...
家族宣称他们不是有机生命，只是用梦境材料与情感构造的工具——开什么玩笑，他们有身体，有灵魂，有欲望，这和我们无机生命有什么两样！

The Family proclaims that they are not organic lifeforms, but tools constructed from the Dreamscape materials and emotions — Preposterous! They have bodies, souls, and desires! How is that any different from us inorganic beings!
我会制造更多让他们找到自我的玩具，让这些朋友能自由选择快乐的方式，我一定会做到的！
I will make even more toys to help them find themselves, to help these friends choose the path of joy of their own free will, I swear!
唉，生意越来越差了，要不要改行呢……
*sigh* Business is getting worse. Should I change occupations...
亲爱的顾客，玩具产业已经锈迹斑斑了，在这座破工厂坍塌之前，或许我该及时撤离……
Dear customer, the toy industry is already reaching its twilight. Perhaps I should evacuate this rundown factory before it collapses...
宇宙中最大的玩具厂前一阵刚发布宣告，声称自己被星际和平公司收购后会将业务转向军工行业，将他们的玩具机器人用于「存护」的正义战争。

The universe's biggest toy vendor recently announced that it would pivot its efforts towards military equipment after being acquired by the IPC, using their toy robots to help the righteous war fought by "Preservation."
在我曾经是「玩具」的那段时光里，阿斯蒙人不允许我们体验他们的快乐，但又为了乐趣给我们加装了丰富的情感模块，名为「无聊」的病毒无时无刻不在侵蚀我的系统。

During my time as a toy, the Asmonians never allowed us to experience their joy, yet installed a repertoire of emotional modules for their own entertainment, resulting in the virus called "boredom" that constantly pervaded my system.
我没有崩溃的原因，是一位客人留下的积木玩具。
The reason I didn't crash was all thanks to a building block toy left behind by a guest.
那积木只有三块，连一座塔都搭不起来，但那三块积木是我最好的朋友，是我的救星……
There are only three of such building blocks. Even stacked, they can't make a tower, but those three blocks are my best friends, and my salvation...
来到匹诺康尼之后，我可以自由地做各种想做的事情，但我再也找不回跟那三块积木相伴时的满足了。
Upon arriving on Penacony, I could do anything as I wished, but I could not re-discover that sense of satisfaction that I experienced with those three blocks.
对你们也一样吧，有了丰富的物质世界，这样单纯简陋的玩乐毫无意义，对吗？
It's probably the same for you: In a material world full of wonder, such plain, shoddy distractions are meaningless, no?
基尔克沉默了，他之前的热情奔放荡然无存。即使他的外壳无法看出表情，你也能在与你完全不同的钢铁生命之上，感受到一种让你为之共鸣的悲伤。

Kirk goes silent, his prior passionate enthusiasm evidently absent. Even if his chassis betrays no change in emotion, you can feel a sense of sorrow that resonates with you from that life wrapped in steel that is a stark contrast to your fleshy self.
欢迎来到流梦礁。如你所见，这才是梦境原本的样子…没有声色犬马的狂欢和派对，这里有的只是一团混沌的忆质、还有一群在噩梦中努力抗争的人们。

Welcome to the Dreamflux Reef. As you can see, this is the Dreamscape's original form... No wild celebrations nor parties, just a bundle of chaotic memoria, and a resistance force battling ardently within nightmares.
欢迎你加入「钟表匠」的事业，{NICKNAME}。我很荣幸——假如米哈伊尔还在，他一定也会这么觉得。
You're welcome to join the Watchmaker's cause, {NICKNAME}. I'd be honored. If Mikhail were still around, I'm sure he would feel the same.
Were you also a Nameless once?
我和很多无名客有过接触，甚至和他们成为了朋友…但不，我不是他们中的一员。
I've encountered many Nameless, even becoming friends with them... But no, I'm not one of them.
在这里生活一定很不容易。
恐怕在这世上本就没有什么易事。但这也彰显了人的强韧，我们总能找到办法适应环境，然后生存下来。
I'm afraid nothing in this world is easy. But that just builds character — we'll always find a way to adapt to our surroundings, and live on in turn.
从少年时代起，我就一直幻想着能登上星穹列车，成为「开拓」的践行者。
Since my adolescent days, I've always dreamed of boarding the Astral Express and becoming an advocate of the Trailblaze.
米哈伊尔给我讲了很多旅行奇遇；拉扎莉娜教会了我如何查阅星图；铁尔南教会了我该怎么拿起武器，保护自己。
Mikhail told me of his many adventures. Razalina taught me how to read the astral charts. Tiernan taught me how to use weapons to protect myself.
通过和他们对话，我逐渐在脑海里拼凑出了星海的全貌，哪怕我打出生起就从没离开过阿斯德纳。
Through conversations with them, my mind gradually pieced together the entire cartography of the stars, even if I had never left Asdana since the day I was born.
你现在还想出去看看吗？
Do you still wish to take a look outside?
There's never been a moment where I haven't.
I sense a tinge of regret in your words.
但我已经不会感到沮丧了。相反，我目睹了一些花朵、一些美好的东西从遗憾的裂缝里生长了出来。
But I'm not depressed anymore. In contrast, from the crevices of regret, I've seen some flowers and other beautiful things grow.
我已经找到了自己的使命：守护这片梦域，引导所有误入其中的人们寻回自我。对现在的我来说，就算是注定无法实现的理想也可以成为动力，驱使我认真地生活、前进。

I've found my own calling: Protect this dream, and guide those who've stumbled into it to find themselves again. For the present me, even if I'm destined not to realize my ideals, it can still become the motivation to drive myself to live life earnestly, and to move forward.
"Destined not to realize my ideals," that means...
如果用现实中的时间来计数…我已经很老了，{NICKNAME}。
If we were to calculate using real-time... I'm already very old, {NICKNAME}.
我的肉身恐怕早已磨灭。现在呈现在你面前的这个形象，大概和很久以前刚刚步入梦境的那个米凯无异。
I'm afraid my flesh is already long gone. The image I portray before you now is probably no different from the Micah who first entered the Dreamscape.
我一直在这片漫无尽头的梦境中守候着，等着有人能够响应「钟表匠」的号召，继承他的理想。
I've been standing guard in this endless Dreamscape, waiting for someone to return the Watchmaker's echo, to inherit his wish.
见到你们以后，我感觉格外…平静。相比我那无法实现的理想，你们的到来更像是一个早晚都会兑现的承诺。
After meeting you all, I felt especially... peaceful. Compared to that unfulfilled ideal of mine, your arrival is more akin to a promise that will eventually be realized.
就像他以前说过的那样：「希望和理想不会消失，只是一时迷了路。挺过去！它们一定能找到回家的办法。」
It is just as he said before: "Hope and dreams will not vanish. They'll just be lost momentarily. Bear with it! They will surely find their way home."
你好，无名客。希望你还习惯在流梦礁的生活。
Hello, Nameless. I hope life at the Dreamflux Reef hasn't been too jarring for you.
如果遇到任何困难就来找我吧，我会尽己所能提供一切帮助。
Seek me out if you run into any difficulties. I will provide help any way I can.
Micah, I want to chat with you.
我出生在匹诺康尼的监狱星时期，我的生父生母都是曾在阿斯德纳开采忆质的星际囚犯的后人。
I was born when Penacony was still a prison. My biological parents were once descendants of interstellar criminals during Asdana's memoria harvesting period.
有关他们的记忆已经有些模糊了——在那场反抗压迫的战争中，无数和我一样的孩子失去了亲人、朋友。
My memories of them are hazy. In that war against our oppressors, many children like me lost our kin and friends.
我很幸运，因为我遇到了米哈伊尔。他从硝烟弹雨的战场上将我救下，又把我当作自己的孩子一般抚养。对我来说，他就是真正的「父亲」。
I was lucky, because I met Mikhail. He rescued me from the smoke and ashes of war, and raised me as one of his own. To me, he was my real father.
米哈伊尔，拉扎莉娜，铁尔南…我在他们的庇护下长大成人，当上了战机飞行员，加入了解放阿斯德纳的战斗。我和他们并肩作战，一起流下象征解放的血与泪。

Mikhail, Razalina, Tiernan... I grew up under their protection, became a combat pilot, and joined the fight to liberate Asdana. I fought alongside them, shedding blood and tears that symbolized liberty.
他决定离开匹诺康尼、奔向星际拓荒前线的那天，米哈伊尔把梦境世界托付给了我。但他离开了太久…实在太久。匹诺康尼又一次陷入了混乱，局面超出了我的掌控。

The day he decided to leave Penacony and head for the interstellar frontier, Mikhail entrusted the Dreamscape to me. But he left for too long... far too long. Penacony was once again plunged into chaos, with the ensuing situation spun beyond my control.
后面的故事你应该已经有所了解了。我的一生都在追随父亲的脚步，他的理想亦是我的。即便他已经离开，「钟表匠」的传说也会一直在匹诺康尼流传下去。
I'm sure you know what happened after. All my life, I followed in my father's footsteps — his dream was mine. He may be gone, but the Watchmaker's legend has always been passed down on Penacony.
我想再多了解一下流梦礁。
I wish to learn more about the Dreamflux Reef.
无名客帮助阿斯德纳的原住民们建立起了最初的梦境城市，一个仅存于忆质中的完美避难所。
The Nameless helped the indigenous Asdanans establish the first Dreamscape city, a perfect shelter existing within memoria.
但在米哈伊尔离开的那段时间里，匹诺康尼各大家系之间的内乱让梦境世界遭受了毁灭性的破坏。
But during the period when Mikhail left, civil strife broke out among Penacony's Families, causing much destructive damage to the Dreamscape.
家族建立起盛会之星后，混乱的原初梦境再也无人问津。直到家族人畜无害的面具被米哈伊尔撕碎，才有极少数人意识到那片浮华表象之下潜藏的歪曲动机。

After The Family established the Planet of Festivities, the chaotic Primordial Dreamscape was left unchecked. It wasn't until Mikhail ripped off The Family's faux-benevolent mask, that just a handful of people realized that sinister motives lurked beneath that ostentatious representation.
在那之后，加拉赫用「神秘」的力量重新激活了这片不受家族掌控的梦境飞地——这就是流梦礁的来历。
After that, Gallagher used Enigmata's power to once again activate this soaring Dreamscape unfettered by The Family's shackles — this is the origin of Dreamflux Reef.
以流梦礁为据点，我和加拉赫尽己所能，引导来到这里的人们发觉藏于家族美梦之后的真相。
With the Dreamflux Reef as our stronghold, Gallagher and I gave everything to guide the people who came here to realize the truth behind The Family's dream.
但我们不会强迫任何人留下。我们只希望能吸引到志同道合的战友，加入这场对抗虚假美梦的抗争。
But we never forced anyone to stay. We only hoped to gather enough like-minded comrades to join in the resistance against this false dream.
Can you talk about your father?
米哈伊尔…我的父亲并不完美。但他的一生都在燃烧，发亮。
Mikhail... My father was not perfect, but he burned bright his entire life.
他永远怀揣理想，即使是在最黑暗的日子里也从没放弃过希望。他有太多没能做到的事…但他从未因惧怕失败放慢追逐自由的步伐，或犹豫是否该向求救之人伸出援手。

His ideals were always close to his heart. He never lost hope, even on the darkest days. He had too many things he could not do... but that never stopped his pursuit of freedom, not from fear of failure. Neither did he hesitate to lend a helping hand to those in need.
我没有见过他口中那位伟大的阿基维利。但在我心中，拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔就是「开拓」的符号。
I've never seen that great Akivili that he spoke of. But in my heart, Mikhail Char Legwork was a symbol of the Trailblaze.
I would like to stop here.
May you be safe in your dreams, {NICKNAME}.
May you be safe in your dreams, {NICKNAME}.
你尝试用钟表把戏触碰米凯的内心……
You try to use Clockwork to touch Micah's heart...
…但他的心绪表盘没有在你面前显现。
...But his Emo Dial does not appear before you.
站在你眼前的是一个坚定的人，一个无需依靠他人来引导其心绪走向的人。
Standing before you is a resolute individual, one who does not rely on others to guide his feelings.
哪怕将全部的人生都献给了一片支离破碎的梦域，他的精神依旧完整，不接受丝毫的动摇。
Even if everyone's lives were offered to this shattered dream, his spirit would remain intact, unwavering even in the slightest.
既然你造访了流梦礁，还能走到这里来，说明你对这场美梦已经很了解了。
That you visited the Dreamflux Reef and still made it this far, it means you know this dream very well.
我问你一个问题——知道「哈努努」这个名字吗？
Let me ask you a question: Do you know the name "Hanunue"?
不错，不过——听过他名字的人很多，了解他的人却很少。
That's right, but while many have heard his name, few truly know him.
呵，没关系，这片该死的梦就是这样，总会把英雄的名字埋在夜里。
Heh, no matter. It's this cursed dream that buries the names of heroes in the night.
唉，「钟表匠」先生创作它本是想铭记他的故事，如今却反倒将他的存在掩盖了。
*sigh* Mr. Watchmaker initially wanted to make the cartoon to preserve his story, but the cartoon ironically buried his actual existence.
哈努努，来自纳肖巴的哈贝克族星际通缉犯，于琥珀历<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪一手策办了蒙托尔星系的大动乱，被星际和平公司判处终身监禁，于阿斯德纳边陲监狱服刑。

Hanunue was a wanted interstellar criminal hailing from the Harbeck clan on Nashoba. In <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, he single-handedly masterminded the tumult in the Montour System. He was finally apprehended and sentenced by the IPC, and served his time in Asdana's frontier prison.
但这个罪犯入狱后并不安分，还没待上几年，就又策划了一场闻名星海的暴动…致使一个陌生的名字出现在了阿斯德纳星系——你一定知道这个名字。

But this criminal was not repentant during his incarceration. Within just a few years, he plotted another riot that is well-known among the stars... giving rise to an unfamiliar name appearing in the Asdana star system — you must know of this name.
嗯，就是这里，盛会之星——匹诺康尼。
Yes, this very planet, the Planet of Festivities — Penacony.
哼，那位英雄没有那么高调。他将自己亲手解放的星球命名——匹诺康尼。
Hmph, that hero was not so ostentatious. He named the planet that he personally liberated — Penacony.
呃，那位英雄不爱打棒球，只喜欢打架。他将自己亲手解放的星球命名——匹诺康尼。
Err, that hero much preferred brawling to baseball. He named the planet that he personally liberated — Penacony.
多么伟大的英雄，却在自己的领土上无人问津，甚至被后人解读为无谋的暴君，何其可悲！
Such a great hero, yet unsung in his own territory. He was even labeled a witless tyrant by later generations. The tragedy!
所以…我请求「钟表匠」将书写《小小哈努兄弟》故事的任务交给了我，不知道你有没有玩过这个游戏。
So... I asked the Watchmaker to entrust me with the task of writing the Lil' Brother Hanu. I don't know whether you've played that game before.
So you were that cursed game designer!
You need to add more rewards!
You need to reduce the stage difficulty!
呃…游戏是克劳克影业做的，我只负责写故事书。
Err... The game was made by Clock Studios, and I was only in charge of writing the narrative.
抱歉，我不怎么会隐瞒，只能把那个老人告诉我的事情原封不动地夹在了故事中。
Sorry, I'm not great at embellishing things. I just retold the story that the old man told me verbatim.
如果你能从中了解到哈努努的故事，那就太好了。
It would be wonderful if you learned of Hanunue's life from it.
我这边还有关于那个游戏的「纪念品」，如果你感兴趣，我们之后还可以聊聊。
I still have a souvenir for that game here. I can talk about it if you'd like.
朋友，好好逛逛流梦礁吧，这里藏着家族不愿展露给世人的东西…和我希望你能看到的东西。
My friend, be sure to make the most of your stroll around the Dreamflux Reef. There are hidden things that The Family does not wish for the world to see... as well as things I hope you will see.
I'd like to chat with you...
Mm, what do you wish to talk about?
我？我只是一个理应无名的陌生人，有着一段无聊的过去。
Me? I'm just a stranger who deserves no name, someone with a meaningless past.
我曾是梦主的鹰犬，为家族撕咬着为害梦境的蠹虫，以猎犬的身份为荣…直到擢升音级的「升音礼」过后，我从家主口中听到了哈努努这个名字。

I was once a hunting Hound of the Dreammaster, biting down on the enemies of The Family who would harm the Dreamscape. I reveled in the glory of the Hounds... until after the Tuneriser ceremony in which I was to receive a promotion, when I heard Hanunue's name from The Family Head.
我当时十分好奇，这个猎犬家系与匹诺康尼的成立者究竟是什么人？我问了我那狼影中的家主，但他却以沉默为应。
I was restlessly curious: What kind of a person was he? This founder of both the Bloodhound Family and Penacony? I asked The Family Head draped in wolven shadows, but my request was met with silence.
