我问了很多人，有人说他是滥杀无辜的狂徒，有人说他是残暴不仁的昏君，有人说他是功过参半的庸人。

I asked many people, with some saying that he was a madman who massacred innocents and others who said he was a vehemently tyrannical ruler. Some even said he was a hopelessly average man who did as much harm as he did good.
我的家族世代都是猎犬，我以猎犬为荣，绝不能接受猎犬的创立者是一个罪人……
My family has been Hounds for generations. I take pride in being a Hound, and I would never accept that the Hounds' founder was a sinner...
——于是我一路探寻真相，来到了流梦礁，见到了与哈努努为伴的那位「钟表匠」。听他讲述了过去的事情，我才找到答案…至少在我这里，他是个英雄。

...And so, I relentlessly sought the truth, arriving at the Dreamflux Reef, and met with that friend of Hanunue's — the Watchmaker. Upon hearing him narrate the past stories, I finally found the answer... he was a hero, at least in my heart.
哈努努…匹诺康尼的缔造者，猎犬家系的第一任家主，这片梦境成为美梦之前的主人。
Hanunue... Penacony's founder, the Bloodhound Family's first head, and the master of this Dreamscape before it became a beautiful dream.
他已经逝去了数百年，曾为我带来过困惑，也曾令我陷入迷茫。但现在，他是我的精神榜样。
He has been dead for centuries. He once brought me vexation and caused me confusion, but now he is a role model that I emulate in spirit.
食鳄的狂狼、噩梦的暴君、阿斯德纳的尖牙…他的称号有很多，但我觉得最合适的只有一个——「反抗者」。
The Croc-eating Mad Wolf, Tyrant of Nightmares, Asdana's Fang... He has many names, but I think there is only one title that befits him — Rebel.
他反抗侵占自己家园的寡头，反抗困住自己脚步的公司，反抗一切可以反抗的东西。他是一种精神，只可惜…这种精神正在如今的梦中逐渐消散。

He rebelled against the oligarchs who invaded his home, resisted the IPC that restricted his progress, and fought against all that he could fight against. He is an ideal materialized. Alas... this ideal is fading in the current dream.
呵，他大概是《钟表小子》中最没有悬念的卡通人物，因为「钟表匠」把哈努努的名字直接写在了上面。
Heh, he's probably the character with the least suspense in the Clockie cartoon, because the Watchmaker wrote Hanunue's name on it.
有人觉得这是在娱乐这位英雄和过去的苦难…我起初也很反感，但后来才发现，要想向别人诉说那些故事，最适合匹诺康尼的就是这种做法。

Some think this is deriving entertainment from this hero and the suffering of the past... Initially, I was very averse to this as well, but I later realized that if we were to narrate such stories to others, this would be the most Penaconian way to do so.
宾客朝欢暮乐，逐梦客只知名利，我们家徒也都只是沉浸于狂信和愚忠…没人会在意那些已经逝去的人与事，所以不如就配合这场狂欢，讲荒诞的故事。

The guests revel in joys from dusk till dawn and dreamchasers only chase after fame. Even Family members like us only have ears for the fanatical faith, pledging ourselves with foolish loyalty... No one cares for the people and the matters that are buried with the dead. So, why not join the crowd in this carnival and narrate the stories of absurdity?
咳…说实话，写《小小哈努兄弟》的时候，我还挺开心的。
Ahem... Truth be told, I was quite happy when I wrote Lil' Brother Hanu.
如果我不回到猎犬家系，而是在这里创作哈努兄弟故事，似乎也是一种不错的生活……
It doesn't sound like a bad way of life if I don't return to the Bloodhound Family and instead stay here to create Brother Hanu's story...
That's all the questions I have.
我想要哈努兄弟的纪念品。
I want a Brother Hanu souvenir.
呵呵，那东西还没做好呢，以后再来吧。
Hehe, it's not made yet. Come back next time.
不过…你如果想买下它的话，要准备好「代价」哦。
But... if you wish to buy it, you must be prepared to pay the "price."
也不是不行，不过它的价格可不便宜……
I mean, you can have it, but it's not exactly cheap...
I have more than enough credits!
呵呵，我不要苜蓿币和信用点。
Hehe, I don't want Alfalfa credits or IPC credits.
You can't possibly want Stellar Jades, do you...?
要想带走这份纪念品，就请给我你的「黄金限定•艾迪恩代币」吧，那东西在某个「时刻」能派上想不到的用处。
If you want to take this souvenir with you, you'll have to give me your Aideen Token (Golden Limited Edition). That item will become useful in a way beyond your imagination in a certain "Moment."
好，那这份纪念品就给你了——
All right, I'll give you this souvenir...
把它摆在你的据点吧，你可以随时用它变成哈努兄弟，重温你曾经的冒险…也是那位英雄的故事。
Show it off in your stronghold. You can use it to turn into Brother Hanu whenever you like and relive your past adventures... In other words, the story of that hero.
呵，没关系，我会等有缘人把它带走的。
Heh, no matter. I will wait for a destined individual to take it away for me.
祝你玩得开心，也愿你不要忘记哈努努的事迹。
Happy times to you, and may you never forget Hanunue's deeds.
再见，如果想聊哈努努，随时可以来找我。
Farewell. If you wish to talk about Hanunue, I'm more than welcome to entertain you anytime.
嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?
「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.
那就来聊点让我感觉平静的话题吧——关于我的身世。
Let's talk about topics that calm me then — like where I come from.
我出自世代侍奉家族的血脉，因为我的先祖是一位「第Ⅱ音级」的大家长，亲迎过{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「无限夫长」{RUBY_E#}的意志。

I was born into a bloodline that has served The Family for generations, because my ancestor was a scale degree II grand guardian, and had personally ushered in the will of the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony} Eternal Centurion{RUBY_E#}.
我从出生以来就在听从「同谐」的教诲，与兄弟姐妹们服务于各个分家，从未有过二心……
I obeyed Harmony's teachings since I came to this world and served the various clans with my siblings, never once betraying them...
所以当我来到流梦礁，看到自己信仰被人贬低、侮辱、憎恶时，我十分愤怒，但当了解了这里发生的一切，我居然瞬间释怀了！
So, when I came to the Dreamflux Reef and saw that my own faith was derided, insulted, and hated, I was enraged. But when I understood all that had happened here, I was suddenly enlightened!
我觉得我并没有背叛同谐，反倒是同谐让我接纳了这一切…我认为无论是「钟表匠」还是哈努努，他们渴望的都是一个安宁无忧的乐园，这也是家族所期望的。

I don't think I betrayed Harmony. In fact, it is Harmony that made me to accept all this... Whether it be the Watchmaker or Hanunue, they all simply desired a peaceful haven free of troubles, which is also what The Family hopes for.
大家的梦想一样，却因立场兵戎相见，真是可惜呀……
Everyone's dreams are the same, yet we became foes due to our differing allegiances. How unfortunate...
嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?
「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.
那就来聊点让我感觉开心的话题吧——现在有越来越多的人想了解匹诺康尼的过去了。
Let's talk about something that makes me happy, then — there are more people nowadays who wish to learn about Penacony's past.
或许是「钟表匠」的动画起了作用，或许是如今宇宙中的有识之士越来越多…总而言之，这是个好兆头。
Perhaps the Watchmaker's cartoons are working, or that there are more knowledgeable individuals in the cosmos nowadays... All in all, this is a good start.
对于哈努努，我也有很多不了解的地方，他的故事实在太长，「钟表匠」生前并没有跟我讲完…所以，我会和那些好奇的人一起去探寻。

There are many things I don't understand about Hanunue, either. His story is too long, and the Watchmaker did not finish telling me about them when he was alive... Which is why I will find it with those who are curious.
朋友，你应该也是我们的一员吧——那就去看看，去「开拓」那些不为人知的故事吧。
Friend, you should be one of us as well, right? Then let's go check it out together. Let's "trailblaze" upon those unknown stories.
嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?
「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.
那就来聊点让我感觉愤怒的话题吧——现在关于哈努努的谣言越来越多了。
Let's talk about something that makes me angry, then — such as how there are more and more rumors about Hanunue these days.
哈努努确实不是一位完美的领导者。他在统治匹诺康尼期间犯下了许多错误，也让一些无辜的生命消逝……
Honestly, Hanunue was not a perfect leader. He made many mistakes while governing Penacony, resulting in the loss of many innocent lives...
但他的勇敢与反抗拯救了更多的人，不该被简单地判定为罪人。
But his courage and resistance saved even more people. He should not have been simply branded as a criminal.
在我们现在能接触到的史料里，哈努努的过错被无限放大，仿佛是他让匹诺康尼陷入绝境，才有了家族救世的传奇，这太荒谬了！

Hanunue's mistakes were amplified exponentially in the history books that we have access to these days, as if he was the one who created Penacony's crisis, paving the way for The Family's legendary rescue of this world. Preposterous!
所以，我要把哈努努的英雄事迹传遍梦境，当大家知道了这些故事，才能给他一个公正的判词！
This is why I wish to spread Hanunue's heroic deeds across the Dreamscape. The people will only give him a fair judgment when everyone becomes aware of these stories!
嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?
「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.
那就来聊点让我感觉悲伤的话题吧——曾经和哈努努并肩作战的人，已经所剩无几了，那千年前的故事还有几位亲历者呢？

Let's talk about something that makes me sad, then — there aren't many left out of those who once fought beside Hanunue. How many eyewitnesses do we have left for even older stories, then? For stories that happened thousands of years ago?
即便动用梦境的力量将自己转化为迷因，并非忆者的凡人也终究会在「记忆」的遗忘中衰败，在「神秘」的磨损中逐渐消散，就像「钟表匠」的一样悄然离去。

Even if one turns into a memetic entity with the power of the Dreamscape, those who aren't Memokeepers will inevitably wane in how the Remembrance forgets, gradually dissolve in the corrosion of the Enigmata, and quietly depart from existence just like the Watchmaker did.
生命真是太短暂了，与生命相伴的过去真是太脆弱了。丰饶的追随者们用不朽的身体抵御岁月，记忆的追随者们将岁月封录成册，学会的烛墨学者四处求索记录……

Life is far too short, and the past that walks shoulder to shoulder with such lives is far too fragile. The followers of Abundance use their timeless corpus to resist time, the followers of Remembrance seal the past into volumes, and the Candelagraphos scholars of the Guild hurry everywhere to seek records...
但即便如此，他们也没法拯救所有的过去，与跟随过去一同消损的英雄。
But even so, they cannot salvage all of the past, nor save the heroes who perished together with bygone times.
朋友，这也是为什么我要跟你讲哈努努的故事，因为只有「传承」，才能抵御岁月的流逝……
Friend, this is why I need to tell you Hanunue's story. Only by telling the past to the next generation can we resist the flow of time...
那目光平静、专注、不含恶意，却仍令你芒刺在背。
Their gaze is calm, focused, and devoid of ill intentions. Nevertheless, it makes you feel nervous and uneasy.
你转过头，正对上金属面庞上一双难以分辨的眼睛。
You look back and stare straight into a pair of inscrutable eyes sitting upon a metallic face.
古怪的智械似乎并不在乎你作何反应。他的目光似乎落在你身上，又似乎不在。
The strange Intellitron does not seem to care about your response. You cannot tell if he is actually looking at you.
那是种近乎玄妙的感觉。他的目光仿佛正缓缓渗透你的肌肤、血肉、骨骼乃至灵魂，悄无声息地探寻着某种更加抽象、更加纯粹的「本质」。

What a strange feeling. His gaze is so deep that you feel it seep into your skin, past your flesh, your bones, and into your soul. Silently, it searches for your inherent "nature" in its most abstract and purest form.
…您身上有「毁灭」的气息，却又兼具「存护」的意志。二者交汇相融，保持着某种微妙的平衡…我曾在一位虔诚的{RUBY_B#「均衡信徒」}仲裁官{RUBY_E#}身上窥见过相似的美感。

There is an air of Destruction about you, yet you possess the will of the Preservation. Both Paths are able to maintain a delicate balance despite their convergence... I have seen a similar kind of beauty before, when I gazed upon the body of a pious {RUBY_B# Follower of the Equilibrium}Arbitrator{RUBY_E#}.
除此之外…除此之外还有同谐的韵律，就像黑白之外又沾染、晕开暧昧的色彩…这非常美。
In addition... in addition to that, you possess the rhythm of the Harmony, like a monochrome shade that has been stained with a dizzying array of enigmatic hues. Such immense beauty, indeed.
真想让您成为我的模特……
I really want you to be my model...
我是名摄影师，眼睛就是我的镜头——无论字面意义或是比喻意义都如此。
As a photographer, my eyes serve as the lens of my camera, both literally and metaphorically.
感谢您的慷慨，我会铭记您的承诺。
Thank you for your generosity. I will always remember your promise to me.
请别急着拒绝，现在尚且为时过早……
It's too early for you to reject me just yet...
我有种预感——您将来还会染上更多色彩，它们或许会令您无比强大、又或者走向毁灭。
I have a premonition that you will be stained with even more shades of color in the future. These hues will either grant you strength beyond compare or steer you toward destruction.
如果真有那么一天，希望我能赶到您的身边，记录下您那一刻无与伦比的「美丽」。
If such a day ultimately occurs, I hope that you will hurry back to me, so that I can record your incomparable "beauty" in that moment.
您对我的作品感兴趣吗？
Are you interested in my works?
不日我即将在「蓝调的时刻」举办个人摄影展览，如果您有时间，可以来看看。
Soon, I shall hold a personal photo exhibition in the Blue Hour. Do visit it if you have the time.
「如果面前的智械有双碳基生物的眼睛……」
"If the Intellitron in front of me possessed a pair of living eyes..."
你不知为何，开始忍不住这般想象起来——
For some unknown reason, you can't help but start imagining.
那或许会是双漂亮的蓝眼睛，就像黎明来临前的夜空。
Perhaps his eyes would be brilliantly blue, like the shade of a night sky right before dawn.
或许清澈的虹膜流光溢彩，倒映出色彩缤纷的梦境。
Or perhaps his clear irises would be full of radiance that reflect the vibrant colors of the Dreamscape.
而那层泡沫般的光影之下，更深处根本空无一物……
However, beneath that bubbly shadow, there is only emptiness...
智械的目光似乎落在你身上，又似乎不在。
You cannot tell if the Intellitron is actually looking at you.
你分辨不清他的表情，却直觉般感受到那平静之下的冷淡与挑剔。
Even though you can't place his expression, you instinctively feel a sense of apathy and criticism beneath his calm demeanor.
就仿佛…在对方眼中，你只是个尚不完美的半成品。
As though... you are but an imperfect work in his eyes.
我曾遇见过一位「美丽」的作品。
I once encountered someone who was a work of absolute "beauty."
是的，一位，我所使用的量词准确无误。
You heard me right. Precisely one person, who was the epitome of beauty.
她曾是名混沌医师，却最终因为「虚无」的侵蚀成为了自灭者。
Even though she used to be a member of the Doctors of Chaos, she ultimately became a Self-Annihilator due to the corrosion of the Nihility.
我们相遇于她人生的末尾，那时她早已因丧失理智而深陷谵妄与幻觉。
I met her near the end of her life. By then, she had long since lost her sanity and sank into a mix of delirium and hallucinations.
我目睹了她如何将自己献祭给虚无——
I witnessed how she offered herself to the Nihility...
她将自己制作成精美的人偶，与一具具同样工艺制成的人偶共同悬吊在半空。
She crafted herself into an exquisite puppet and hung in midair, alongside other puppets that had been crafted the exact same way.
他们曾是她的伙伴、她的病人，而那时他们依旧如生前般簇拥着她。
These puppets were her erstwhile companions and patients once. They all surrounded her, just as they did while she was still alive.
我看见他们的头颅绽放，猩红玫瑰花瓣在星光与灯光间如此娇艳欲滴……
I saw roses bloom from their heads, the petals vivid shades of crimson amid the glow of starlight...
我的镜头——我的眼睛——将那一刻记录了下来。从那时起，我的逻辑模块出现了无法修复的错误。
My lens — my eyes — recorded that moment. From then on, my logic modules have been beset with irreparable errors.
他们都说我被污染了…或许吧，但这于我而言大概并不算一件坏事。
They all said that I had been corrupted... Perhaps, but this wasn't a bad thing to happen in my eyes.
我因此获得了「自由」，开始寻求某种自己发自内心渴望着的「美」。
After all, that incident had granted me "freedom." Since then, I have been searching for the "beauty" that I crave from the bottom of my heart.
我曾拜访过某个阴郁的墓场，那里每座墓碑旁都有连接着铰链的钟塔，我逐个鸣钟，想知道究竟是否有人被过早埋葬；
I once visited a gloomy graveyard. Every tombstone in that graveyard was linked to a hinged bell. I rang each bell one by one, wanting to know whether anyone had been prematurely buried.
我曾探索过一片纯白的沼泽，那里的生物只要沾染过沼泽中的白泥浆，就会因为污染而渐渐化作枯败僵硬的灰白泥塑；

Another time, I explored a completely white swamp. There, any organism that came into contact with the swamp's white mud would gradually turn into a withered and stiff ashen clay sculpture due to the contamination.
我曾去过太多地方…在死与恶中，嗅到无限生机、窥见永恒的美。于是我将它们记录下来。
I've been to too many places... Amidst death and evil, I have discovered limitless opportunity and observed eternal beauty. This is why I record such moments down.
用我的眼睛…用我的镜头……
With my eyes... With my lens...
我曾去过太多地方…在死与恶中，嗅到无限生机、窥见永恒的美。于是我将它们记录下来。
I've been to too many places... Amidst death and evil, I have discovered limitless opportunity and observed eternal beauty. This is why I record such moments down.
用我的眼睛…用我的镜头……
With my eyes... With my lens...
Are you up for a chat?
男人没有回答，只是平静地注视着你。但你明白这并非拒绝。
The man does not reply and continues to observe you calmly. However, you know that he's not rejecting your request.
有些人称呼我为「虚无的摄影师」，但我自认并未走上「虚无」的命途——至少并非在通常意义上。
Some call me the Nihility's Photographer, but I do not see myself as having walked down the Path of Nihility... At least, not in the usual sense.
我只是个忠实的记录者，记录万物毁坏湮灭那一刻所绽放出的「美」。
I am but a faithful record keeper who captures the moments of "beauty" that are born from the destruction and obliteration of all things.
也许吧。真正的「美」并不面向大众，但总归有人会理解。
Perhaps. Although true beauty does not conform to the masses, there will always be people who are able to understand its meaning.
当然，名声对我而言并无意义——除非它能为我提供拍摄素材。
Naturally, fame is meaningless to me, unless it can aid me in acquiring more source material to capture.
I'll let you get back to your work.
智械沉默着点头，权当作别。
The Intellitron nods silently in response. Perhaps that was his way of bidding farewell.
古怪的智械并未回应你的道别，仅以目光送别你远去的背影。
The strange Intellitron does not respond to your farewell, and merely gazes at you as you walk away.
莱斯特先生，今晚您有空吗，我想请您……
Mr. Lester, are you free tonight? I wish to invite you to...
抱歉，美丽的女士，我已经有安排了。
Apologies, beautiful lady. I've already made plans for tonight.
Well then, how about tomorrow night...
他明晚也没空，阿姨你就不要再缠着人家了。莱斯特先生不喜欢你这个类型，要是实在不甘寂寞，你不如去问问旁边那位先生吧，你们瞧着倒是般配。
He's busy tomorrow night too. Old lady, why don't you give it a rest? Mr. Lester doesn't like women like you. If you're lonely, why don't you try that mister? You two look like a good match.
这种私人恩怨劳驾不要伤及无辜。这位小姐的失礼可真让人困扰…不如这样，莱斯特先生，我请您去安静的地方喝一杯？
Let's not involve others in our personal squabbles, shall we? This lady's impropriety is troubling indeed... How about a drink somewhere quieter, Mr. Lester?
说什么呢大叔，到底是谁没礼貌……
Hey, what did you say, mister? Who's the impolite one around here, I wonder?
就在这位名为莱斯特的男子一筹莫展之际，他的通讯器突然响起。
Just as this man named Lester is about to reach his wit's end, his communicator suddenly begins to ring.
…这样啊…好的，我知道了，我会尽早处理的……
Hm... I see... Alright, I'll deal with it as soon as possible...
抱歉，诸位，我还有些工作要处理。
Apologies, there are some things that I need to take care of at present.
与诸位聊天是件非常愉快的事，我们有缘再见。
I've had a great time talking to all of you. We'll meet again if destiny permits.
众人表情各异，一番踌躇后各自散去。莱斯特望着他们远去的背影，长舒口气。
After some hesitation, the rest of the assembled crowd take their leave, a motley of expressions on their faces. Lester sighs deeply as he gazes at their receding figures.
呼…人都走了，这次也多谢你帮我解围，克劳迪娅……
Whew... They've all left. I must thank you for helping me out again, Claudia.
你们也上船了？什么时候…好吧，那看好你二哥，顺便帮我探探他的口风……
You've boarded the ship as well? When did you... Alright. In that case, look after your second-eldest brother and try to find out more information from him.
…没问题，你要的最新典藏版已经买好了…嗯，辛苦你了……
Not a problem. I've also bought the new Collector's Edition that you wanted. Right, thank you for your help...
…嗯？您好，{F#美丽的小姐}{M#英俊的先生}，很高兴见到您。
...Oh? Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. It's a pleasure to meet you.
抱歉我方才稍有些出神，但您瞧，这里的风景着实美丽宜人——
Sorry, I was lost in thought just now... but look! The view here is simply stunning.
即便是在梦中，高空的景致也总因未被人烟熏染，而显得格外清新宁静，让人不由想要自此沉睡下去……
Even in dreams, the scenery from above is especially serene because it has not been tainted by humans yet. Such landscapes can really make me quite sleepy...
倘若您此刻不忙，不妨一起来放松片刻。
If you're not busy, perhaps you'd like to relax with me for a brief moment?
男人半垂眼睑，苍白面庞在灯光与天光的辉映中显得格外落寞。
Basked in both natural and man-made light, the man's drooping eyelids and pale complexion make him seem especially lonely.
…我偶尔会做些奇怪的梦——有时我缓缓沉入泥淖，喉头舌尖尽是铁锈味；有时我躺在狭窄逼仄的棺材里，被深埋泥土之下，而手边并没有连接钟塔的铰链……

Occasionally, I'll have some strange dreams... Once, I dreamed that I was slowly sinking into a bog, my whole mouth filled with the taste of rust. Another time, I dreamed that I was lying in a narrow coffin that had been buried deep underground, without any bell to ring...
…我的母亲是位美丽的女士，她知性又优雅、独立而自由…她将我培养成为一位「绅士」，然后为了追求自由弃我而去……
My mother is a gorgeous lady. She's intelligent, elegant, independent, and uninhibited... After raising me as a gentleman, she abandoned me in pursuit of her own freedom.
我爱我的弟弟和妹妹——虽然我们的血脉不尽相同——他们也同样爱我…我们彼此信赖、相互帮扶，但我们之间永远有所隔阂……
Even though we are not related by blood, I love my siblings, and they love me too. We trust each other and help one another out wherever we can, but there will always be a gap between us...
「人与人永远无法相互理解」——我的母亲曾如此教导我…而时至今日我愈发深以为然。
My mother once taught me that there can be no mutual understanding between people. Even to this day, I am deeply convinced by her words.
或许这也是我之所以不喜欢匹诺康尼的原因。我的梦总是满载混乱与孤独，就像我迄今为止的人生一样。而这个人工构建的「美梦」……
Perhaps this is the reason why I dislike Penacony. My dreams are always full of chaos and loneliness, not unlike the life that I've lived thus far. As for this artificially designed "sweet dream"...
它不过是强行将人们连接在一起，勉强拼凑出欢乐美好的假象…我深谙它何其虚假，就如同我了解自己是多么的虚伪不堪。
It merely forces people together in a feeble attempt to create the illusion of bliss and happiness. I understand this is a fantasy, just as I am inherently aware of my own hypocrisy.
男人沉默地望向窗外，冷硬的玻璃平面倒映出他嘴角冷硬的弧度。
The man silently gazes outside, the chilly surface of the window's glass reflecting his stiff smile.
…有时我不禁思考，人与人之间的社交，当真是必要的吗？
Sometimes, I can't help but wonder... are social interactions truly necessary?
在表达基础需求之外，又额外演化出一套如此复杂繁琐的交流体系…或许人们愿称之为文明的进步、文化的丰饶，但我只觉得聒噪。

The evolution of such a complicated and tedious communication system on top of merely expressing one's basic demands... Perhaps humans view this as the progress of civilization and the abundance of culture. Yet, I find such a system truly grating.
人们精心铺垫、委婉试探，乔装目的、巧饰修辞…可最终又收获了什么呢？
People carefully pave the way for tactful probing, concealing their goals and disguising their rhetoric... but to what end?
或许很多时候他们确实得到了自己想要的…但说实话，比起在达成目的的过程中那些徒劳无益的消耗，这又何尝不是种得不偿失……
While they may get what they desire most of the time, truth be told... when compared to the futile effort spent on achieving their objectives, such losses do outweigh the gains, am I right?
请原谅我如此失礼，但可否让我一个人安静会儿？
Please excuse my lack of manners, but could you leave me be for a while?
机会难得，得好好规划才行……
Since this is such a rare opportunity, I must come up with a detailed plan...
…嗯，我记得那场拍卖有克劳迪娅想要的手稿…咦，这个雕塑…路易斯是不是最近才给它的创作者写过评论……
Mmm, I remember that the manuscript which Claudia wants is at that auction... Huh? This statue... Didn't Louis just recently critique its sculptor?
那就把「薄暮的时刻」列入行程…咦，「太阳的时刻」好像也不错——博物馆和图书馆，两个小家伙应该很乐意在那里打发时间……

In that case, I'll add the Moment of Dusk to the itinerary. Huh, seems like the Moment of Sol is not a bad option as well. A museum and a library... The two little ones should be quite willing to pass the time there.
或许「绿洲的时刻」也是个好的选择？我们已经很久没有一起野餐了，偶尔晒晒太阳、放空一下也不错。嗯，到时候干脆雇佣一只气泡锂犬吧，我记得路易斯小时候最喜欢玩飞盘游戏了……

Or perhaps the Moment of Oasis would be a good option as well? Since we haven't picnicked in so long, basking in the sun and relaxing once in a while sounds like a good idea. Ahh, on that day, I'll hire a Bubble Hound. I recall that Louis loved playing holodisc when he was young...
至于其它的…餐厅？大剧院？影视乐园或者…算了，这些都过于普通，他们一定不会喜欢。
Apart from that... How about a restaurant? Or the Grand Theater? Or Clock Studios Theme Park? Or... forget it. They wouldn't like these places since they're so ordinary.
对了——那个践行「虚无」之道的摄影师好像说过最近要开个人作品展，稍后可以问问他……
Oh right, that photographer who follows the Path of Nihility told me that he would be holding a personal exhibition soon. Maybe I'll be able to ask him about it later...
已经很久都没举行过家庭聚会了…趁着这次休假，一定要多陪陪他们，毕竟——
I've not organized a family gathering for so long now. I should spend more time with them while I'm still on vacation. After all...
最重要的就是和家人们在一起啊。
Nothing is more important than a family spending time together.
Are you up for a chat?
抱歉，但我现在…哦，您就是这艘船的新主人吧，请问有何见教？
Apologies, I'm currently... Oh, you must be the new owner of this ship. Is anything the matter?
您听过赖斯家族吗？没听过也无妨，不过是个经营地产生意的小家族罢了。
Have you heard of the Rice Family before? It's fine if you haven't. After all, we are but a small family that manages a real estate business, that's all.
我是现任家主，平日里负责打理家族名下的产业。说来，我听闻您是位无名客，对吧？
As the current family head, I manage the family's assets as part of my day-to-day work. Having said that, I've heard that you are a member of the Nameless, am I right?
我个人名下有几颗用以度假的小行星，还算是风景优美、气候宜人。若是今后您在旅途中恰巧经过，还请务必赏脸，让我一尽地主之谊。

I happen to be the titleholder of several asteroids that are mainly used for vacationing, due to the beautiful scenery and pleasant climate afforded there. If you are to pass them by in your future travels, be sure to visit them, so that I can show you some hospitality of my own.
…让您见笑了。说来惭愧，方才那样的闹剧总是隔三差五就会来一场，我已经差不多习惯了…除了名声受损外，我并未因此蒙受其他损失。

Not at all. I'm ashamed to say that the farce that happened just now reoccurs on a rather frequent basis. I've pretty much gotten used to it... Apart from my reputation being impacted somewhat, such issues have never affected me in other ways.
不过请容我小小澄清一下，我从未玩弄过他人的感情，至少「洁身自好」这个词，我自诩还是担得起的。
However, please allow me to make a small correction: I have never toyed with another person's feelings. Not to brag, but I do believe that I am an honest and upright person.
I'll let you get back to your work.
好的，与您聊天非常愉快。
回见，愿您度过愉快的一天。
Goodbye, have a wonderful day ahead.
你注意到眼前的男子，他沉默不语，但脸上的表情却不时变化，似在苦苦思索着什么。
You notice that the facial expression of the man in front of you changes every so often despite his constant silence, as though he is thinking deeply about something.
既然如此，好吧，好吧…那就按你的意思来吧。
Fine, fine... In that case, I'll do as you wish.
你实在不知道自己传达过什么意思。事实上，从刚才开始，你们都只用眉毛做出过类似交流的表示。
You cannot fathom exactly what message he has interpreted from your expression. In truth, since you met him, the both of you have only communicated via your eyebrows.
您也看到了…除了名字以外，这里也很难被称作一艘船，实在没什么用得上水手的地方。
You've seen it as well... Despite its name, you can't really call this a "ship," since it doesn't really require any sailors.
维修船体？如今有的是更方便完善的手段。应对敌袭？多死我一个也拖不了多长时间，而且也没人有这种胆子。

Repair the ship's hull? There are other more convenient and better ways of doing that. Respond to enemy attacks? My death won't delay the inevitable by much, and besides, nobody has the courage to do that.
至于我为什么会站在这里……
As for why I'm standing here...
「我们这可是一艘豪华客船，怎么能没有水手，体验太不真实了。」
"We're supposed to be on board a luxury passenger ship. How could there be no sailors at all? This experience is so unrealistic."
只有值得做的事…才会做得糟糕也值得。但显而易见，现在是完全相反的情况。

Only things that are worth doing... will be worthwhile to do, even if they're terribly done. However, you can clearly see that the situation at hand is the exact opposite of the aforementioned scenario.
不过…还好无论什么样子的生活，也总有到头的那一天——
In spite of all that, regardless of how we live our lives... we will always reach the end one day.
我的「计划」也该差不多了……
My plan is close to fruition...
出自人手的梦境无论多么光怪陆离…也总有看厌的那一天啊。
Regardless of how bizarre and fantastical an artificial Dreamscape can be, one will ultimately grow tired of it.
实话实说，即使能当上船长，恐怕我的心境和现在也不会有什么差别。
In all honesty, even if I'm able to become a captain, I'm afraid my state of mind at that point in time won't differ too much from how it is now.
做水手没什么不好，不然我一开始也不会这样选择，可是…我小时候所听说过的水手，可完全不是现在这样。

There's nothing wrong with being a sailor, otherwise I wouldn't have made such a choice from the very beginning. However... the stories of sailors that I heard when I was young don't seem to match what I'm experiencing right now.
——他们穿过自己所恐惧的末日般伟大的海洋，但最终所看到的既不是恶魔，也并非深渊。
They roamed the boundless ocean — a vast expanse that is as terrifying to behold as the end times — yet the sight that they ultimately laid eyes upon was not those of devils, nor was it the abyss.
而是他们「从未见过」的壮丽海滩，和满天的繁星。
Instead, they gazed upon something that they'd never seen before — magnificent beaches and a sky full of stars.
在我看来那才是驾驶航船的意义所在，无论是星间，又或者是忆域深处的暗流…那才是我应该去的地方，而不是在这十二个时刻当中打转。

As far as I'm concerned, that is the true meaning of sailing a ship. Regardless of whether I'm journeying among the stars, or traveling through the undercurrents of the Memory Zone Depths... those are the places where I should be heading toward, not wasting my time visiting the twelve moments again and again in an endless cycle.
又见面了啊…唉…可为什么偏偏就「又见面了」呢？
We meet again... but why did we "meet again," I wonder?
唉…也不用那么看着我，最近是有些…时运不佳。
Ugh... You don't have to look at me like that. It's just that I've encountered... a spot of bad luck recently.
我向来是个不怎么安分的人，总想着能离开这里，到其他地方去看看。
I've always been a restless person, always wanting to leave this place and see other sights.
可是…准备来准备去，我又从来没有真正出发过。
However... despite my thorough preparation, I've never actually departed before.
在重新开口之前，他盯着你看了好一会儿。
He gazed at you for a long while before speaking again.
每个人都有过类似的瞬间，想要把自己的一切和盘托出的瞬间。
Everyone has experienced such moments before, moments when they wish to reveal their true self and hold nothing back.
People might even want to let loose once in a while.
这里不缺机会，但他们来来去去，我总说自己还得准备，而且也这么告诉别人——
While this place affords a lot of opportunities, as people come and go, I keep telling them that I'm still preparing to depart...
我志向高远，只是时机未到。
While my ambitions are sky-high, it's not yet time to act on them.
但难不成…我只是…我只是借此来掩饰……
However, could it be that... I'm just... I'm just using this excuse to conceal the fact that...
……我的确只是一块做不得志水手的料？
I'm just a terrible excuse of a sailor?
只要从未出发，我就永远不会被盖棺定论？
As long as I never actually take the first step, then nobody will be able to judge me?
...I seem to have said too much.
啊，好像又有一个能参与星间旅行的机会，我得多去了解一下。
Ah, there seems to be another chance for me to participate in an interstellar journey. Let me learn more about it.
这次…我一定会把握住它的。
This time... I will definitely seize the opportunity.
即使能来到这里的都是贵客，令人恼火的麻烦还是每天都见得到……
Even though the only people able to come here are esteemed guests, annoying incidents still happen every day...
说实话，被他们讨论来讨论去的那些…在这艘船上成真过的「怪癖」，倒也没什么值得恼火的。
Truth be told, the topics of their discussions are all strange "hobbies" that have occurred before on this ship. They're nothing to get irritated over.
但有那么一个家伙，我倒是今天回想起来，都还，都还……
But I've just remembered today that there is one fellow, one singular guy...
第一次见到他的时候，几个皮皮西人几乎要和他动起手来了。
The first time I met him, he was about to throw hands with several Pepeshi.
他全身上下能被当作口袋用的地方，都插满了鲜花。后来据他自己所说，都是从不同的星球采摘来的，用了特殊的保鲜技术，相当珍贵。

Anything that even resembled a pocket on his person was stuffed full of fresh flowers. He later told me that the flowers were rather valuable because they had been plucked from various planets and preserved using a special method.
除此以外…他都和流浪汉没什么两样，我实在不知道他是怎么来到这里的。
Apart from that... he was no different from your average wanderer. I really cannot fathom how he was able to come here.
按他自己的说法，他一直在星间流浪，寻找着「希望」，至于方法……
Per his own account, he had been drifting between the stars in search for "hope." As for exactly how he was doing so...
只要见到孩子，他就会把从自己别处的收集到的花朵送给他们，然后看看他们的笑容。
Each time he met a child, he would give the flowers that he had collected to them and observe their smiles in return.
这也就是为什么和他起冲突的会是皮皮西人了，他非得说服对方接受自己的礼物不可。
This was how his conflict with the Pepeshi arose. He was adamant that the Pepeshi accept his gift and wouldn't take no for an answer.
那时候他是这样说的——只要孩童们看到花朵仍然能展露出那样的笑容，这个世界无论变成什么样子，都还值得拯救，并且…有「希望」拯救。

His explanation at that time was that as long as children are still able to smile upon seeing the flowers, it would mean that regardless of how this world changes, it is still worth saving... and there is "hope" of it being saved.
就是怀抱着这种可笑的想法，他从故乡出发，万分艰难地从一个星球流浪到另一个星球。
Armed with such a ridiculous notion, he departed his homeland and wandered from planet to planet, encountering many difficulties along the way.
他似乎察觉到了你困惑的目光——的确，这根本不是什么值得恼怒的情况。
He seems to have noticed your confused gaze. Indeed, the situation that he is describing does not seem to be one that is worth getting exasperated over.
或许你也猜得到…我只是在对自己发怒而已。
Perhaps you've realized that... I'm actually just mad at myself.
这样一个可笑的理由也能支撑着他，可我…我又为什么一直都留在了这里？
That man is driven by such an absurd reason, yet I... I have chosen to stay here all this time. Why?
只要孩童们看到花朵仍然能展露出那样的笑容，这个世界无论变成什么样子，都还值得拯救，并且…有「希望」拯救。
As long as children are still able to smile upon seeing the flowers, it would mean that regardless of how this world changes, it is still worth saving... and there is "hope" of it being saved.
这样一个可笑的理由也能支撑着他，可我…我又为什么一直都留在了这里？
That man is driven by such an absurd reason, yet I... I have chosen to stay here all this time. Why?
我就知道…留在这里做水手总还是有好处的。
I've come to realize that... staying here and remaining as a sailor has its benefits.
也不知道忆域深处究竟发生了什么，竟然真的有人在招募与之相关的人手，甚至还绕过了五大家系的精锐，特意起用一些下层……

I don't know what happened in the depths of Memory Zone. I can't believe that someone is actually recruiting people who are associated with it. They even overlooked the elites of the Five Lineages and chose to use some lower-class...
Ah... I mean, some dust-covered pearls instead.
而这么多年来，我虽说表面上看起来兢兢业业…但一直在私底下筹备着自己的事情，这您也知道。
All these years, even though I seem diligent on the surface... I've actually been arranging my preparations in private. You already know this.
我一直在等一个机会，能让我凭空消失，当熟悉我的同僚有一天再次听闻我的消息，会突然发现——
I've been waiting for an opportunity to disappear into thin air. When my close colleagues hear of me one day, they'll suddenly realize that...
「咦？是那个没精打采的家伙？他在凶险的忆域中经历了数次危难都得以生还，还发现了了不得的异象，当初可真看不出来他有这种本事。」

"Huh? That listless fellow? He was the one that experienced countless dangers in the treacherous Memory Zone, managed to survive, and even discovered some extraordinary phenomenon? I couldn't tell that he was capable of such things."
现在…想必很快就能成真了？
And now... I think that my dreams might finally come true.
我是不大喜欢站在这里，但话也不能这么说……
While it is true that I don't like to stand here very much, you still can't ask these sorts of questions...
船上总是人来人往，带来不少外面的传说。
Aboard the ship, people come and go all the time, bringing with them tales of the outside world.
您或许也听说过那些以星穹为尺度丈量世界的无名客？他们行于星间，展开自己的冒险……
You have perhaps heard of the Nameless, who measure the world in terms of stars? They traverse the cosmos and embark on their own adventures...
还有某位不知名的智者，据说他从一个从未有人到达过的地方取回了某种奥秘，成为了能在时间当中倒着生活的人。

Or perhaps you've heard of an obscure sage, who managed to retrieve some sort of mysterious secret from a place that no one else has been able to reach. By doing so, he gained the ability to live his life in reverse, against the normal flow of time...
又或者一位不得志的冒险家，她一生都没能获得过什么成就，但她曾经作为第一人踏足了某个重归蛮荒的星球——
Or maybe you've heard of an unsuccessful adventurer. While she never accomplished much in her lifetime, she still became the first person to step foot on a planet that had been reclaimed by nature—
据说那里被众神所夺，三座由青铜铸成的巨像用矛尖将其拱卫。即使只是其中的一尊，甚至都比星球本身更为庞大。
It is said that the planet was fought over by the gods and protected by three bronze statues wielding spears. Each of these statues was larger than the planet itself.
我不是他们当中的任何一位，只是个普通人。
I'm not like any of them. I'm just a normal person.
This is the reason why I haven't resigned yet.
May you have an entertaining time aboard {TEXTJOIN#87}.
这位客人，请留步——要来一份下午茶吗？
Dear guest, please wait... Care for some afternoon tea?
{TEXTJOIN#87}上最具「同谐」精神的特色甜点，就由我——这里有口皆碑的「美食乐手」为您呈上！
{TEXTJOIN#87}'s signature desserts that most embody the spirit of the Harmony. Please allow me — the widely acclaimed Musician of Delicacies — to present them to you!
您或许觉得我是在自吹自擂，但即使在这匹诺康尼，善于将食材视为音符，并能将其信手谱为曲调的，也就您眼前这么一个了。

Perhaps you'll think that I am merely tooting my own horn. However, in Penacony, the only one who views ingredients as musical notes and is able to weave these notes into a melody is none other than me.
瞧，正如我手中的这碗米粒…任何角度的稍加调整，都能让它就此开始千变万化。
For instance, observe this bowl of rice in my hands... Even a slight adjustment in angle will cause it to change in a myriad of ways.
不知为何，你总觉得「米粒」是一个非常重要的伏笔。
For some reason, you think that the mention of "rice" foreshadows something extremely important.
而{TEXTJOIN#87}的特色下午茶，便是邀请宾客与大厨一同谱就这首曲目。
As for {TEXTJOIN#87}'s special afternoon tea, it's merely an invitation for the guests to compose the tune along with its chef.
独一无二，充满惊喜——这正是匹诺康尼应该为客人献上的体验。
Unique and full of surprises... This is the experience that Penacony should offer its esteemed guests.
那么，在我已经完成基础的情况下，您来决定它的口味风格吧——
Right, now that I've finished preparing the base, you shall decide how it tastes...
比起开始，更像是准备结束一餐时的选择。不过，无妨——
Instead of choosing something that'll stimulate your appetite, you seem to have made a selection that is more suitable for the end of the meal. However, that's quite all right...
接下来，请您敲定要用哪种食材来进行最终的混音吧。
Next, decide which ingredient you'd like to use for the final mixing.
这位客人随身携带的…兵器，看起来还真是相当…别出心裁。
This... weapon that you've brought with you is certainly quite... unique.
Nevertheless, since this is your selection after all...
May I present Sugary Mung Bean Soda Mixed Rice. Please enjoy.
还真是很有地域特色的选择啊，那么——
A regional selection, I see. In that case...
额外加糖的苏乐达焖饭，请。
May I present Extra-Sugary SoulGlad Stewed Rice. Please enjoy.
接下来，请您敲定要用哪种食材来进行最终的混音吧。
Next, decide which ingredient you'd like to use for the final mixing.
在美味面前选择困难很容易理解，您可以慢慢考虑。
Being indecisive when faced with gourmet cuisine is quite understandable. Feel free to take your time.
在这方面您又保守了起来啊，毕竟…草莓无论怎么搭配，味道都会相当亮眼。
In this aspect, you've made another conservative choice. After all... strawberries have a distinct flavor, no matter what they're paired with.
那么，请用吧，特辣草莓拌饭。
Well then, may I present Extra-Spicy Strawberry Mixed Rice. Please enjoy.
这就是意外惊喜——音乐的高潮总在于出其不意，烹饪亦然。
What an unexpected surprise... The climax of a music piece lies in the element of surprise. Naturally, this applies to cooking as well.
May I present Extra-Spicy Glutinous Rice Egg Tart. Please enjoy.
至少现在你明白之前的伏笔感从何而来了。
At least you now know where the sense of foreshadowing that you felt before came from.
除了一份米饭之外，他似乎并没有准备别的什么。
Apart from a portion of rice, he does not seem to have prepared anything else.
接下来一定会出人命的——无论是他的，又或是你的。
This dish will be the death of someone — either his, or yours.
你决定连借口都不找，快步离开。
You hastily leave the scene without even bothering to provide an excuse.
有些人感受到了，而有些人永远不会——这就叫做艺术。
Art isn't universal — some people can appreciate it, while others can't.
每当回忆起那位客人，我总是心情大好。
Thinking about that guest always puts me in a good mood.
他是如此风度翩翩，总能以智械的视角，给出些不同寻常的提议。
He had such dignified elegance, and offered unique insights from the perspective of an Intellitron.
我与客人共同「谱曲」的习惯，也是在遇到他之后才养成的。
In fact, I only started this habit of "composing" with my guests after meeting him.
那真是位尊贵的客人，若非那时我仍然是首席大厨，恐怕根本没有接待他的资格。
He was truly a distinguished guest. I wouldn't have had the opportunity to serve him if I wasn't still executive chef at the time.
席间，他一边对于我的创造力频频称赞，一边又提出我从未想过的组合，继续品尝。
While sampling dishes, he would frequently praise my creativity while suggesting combinations I never thought of before.
谁又能想到，机油也是如此合适的调味料？
Who knew Machine Oil could be used as seasoning?
只要精心调配，那种辽远的香气，甚至能让你如同置身于匹诺康尼的开拓时代……
Blend it meticulously enough, and its distant aroma could transport your senses back to when Penacony was still being built.
每当回忆起那位客人，我总是心情大好。
Thinking about that guest always puts me in a good mood.
他是如此风度翩翩，总能以智械的视角，给出些不同寻常的提议。
He had such dignified elegance, and offered unique insights from the perspective of an Intellitron.
啊…没错，就是这种感觉，我已经等了很久了……
Yes, that's it. That's the feeling I've been waiting so long for.
很久之前，在两位乐手的交谈中，我就学到了一个窍门——
A long time ago, I learned a secret from a conversation between two musicians.
「正因为你在痛苦，所以你现在才演奏得这么精彩。」
"Your suffering is the reason for your spectacular performance now."
虽说隔行如隔山，但既然我的烹饪也算是一种艺术创想……倒是也可以通用。
Our professions may be worlds apart, but my cooking also counts as a form of artistic expression, so I think it still fits.
哦，我明白了，这份猝不及防的低落与酸楚，就该这样呈现给客人——
I got it! I'll serve my guests with the same striking feeling of forlorn sadness!
就在奶油和蛋糕胚之间涂上一层芥末吧。
I'll add a layer of mustard between the chiffon cake and the cream.
他到底是自己悲伤，还是想让别人感到悲伤，一时之间你似乎难以分辨了。
You can't tell if he's the one feeling sad or if he's trying to make others feel sad.
但此地不宜久留，你倒是清晰地感受到了。
What you do feel for sure is you shouldn't stay here for much longer.
倒不是我卖弄资历，近年来年流行的复古风潮，在我看来实在是太浅薄了……
I'm not one to flaunt my seniority, but in my opinion, the retro revival fad in recent years is too superficial.
这些年来，无论是在这艘{TEXTJOIN#87}上，还是匹诺康尼的别处…各种餐品都力求复古。
Every dish must be retro. That has been the trend on board not just {TEXTJOIN#87}, but the rest of Penacony too.
我之前见到过一位客人，千里迢迢赶来，只为了能在梦境中品尝到他家乡的一种传统美食。
I once met a guest who traveled all the way from distant lands to the Dreamscape just so he could get a taste of a traditional dish from home.
我原本还以为，或许像苏乐达一样，时过境迁，其中几样食材已经完全不存在了。
At first, I thought it was just like SoulGlad, where some of the dish's original ingredients no longer exist thanks to the passage of time.
结果呢…仅仅是因为不加处理地食用那种珍稀物种，在他的故乡要被判处重罪。
Turns out it was merely because it was a felony in his hometown to consume a rare species like that without first processing it.
在那颗星球仇视火焰的蒙昧时代里，这才能被称作一种传统。
Had the planet been in an age of ignorance where they still detested the concept of flame, then the dish would hold traditional significance.
而在开化之后，他们反倒把这种过时的禁忌当成了潮流，我真是无法理解。
Yet, once they left their ignorance behind, they decided to transform these outdated taboos into a fad instead. I just don't get it.
我可明白得很啊…但要想在烹饪上推陈出新，我这才是最保守的法子吧？
Oh, but I do get it. To innovate in the culinary arts, my method is the most conservative way.
嗯…哪怕不去问，大多数客人也都觉得我疯疯癫癫的吧？
Hmm, even if you don't ask, I know most guests think I'm an oddball.
但比起我在当学徒时认识的某位朋友，我算是相当保守。
But compared to the friend I met during my apprenticeship, I'm definitely more conservative.
那时候，我们都想钻研出前所未有的菜式，一举成名。
Back then, we were trying to create a never-before-seen dish and use it to become famous.
在那时的我看来，就算世上的食材如同音符那样可以穷尽，但它们的组合，用一生的时间也难以探寻。
At the time, I believed that even if the potential of every ingredient in the universe is finite like musical notes, they hold infinite potential in combinations.
至于那位朋友…他反倒是一直要在食材的新奇上下文章。
As for my friend, he yearned to make a name for himself using exotic ingredients.
可在某场宴会上，他在一位阅历极其丰富的老饕面前败下阵来，他所收藏的一切珍奇食材，在对方眼中都是见惯了的庸常之物。
But he met his match in a seasoned glutton at a banquet one day. Every exotic ingredient he presented from his collection was commonplace in the eyes of the glutton.
此后他意识到，对于任何食客而言，从未也永远不能品尝过的食材，只有「他们自身」。
He came to the realization that day that the only thing a customer has never tasted and will never taste is "themselves."
后面的事，为了您的心情着想，我还是不再复述了。
I'll spare you the details of what happened after that.
但他还活着，并且仍然是位「大厨」。
Suffice to say that he's still alive and is actually still a "chef."
那时候，我们都想钻研出前所未有的菜式，一举成名。
Back then, we were trying to create a never-before-seen dish and use it to become famous.
在那时的我看来，就算世上的食材如同音符那样可以穷尽，但它们的组合，用一生的时间也难以探寻。
At the time, I believed that even if the potential of every ingredient in the universe is finite like musical notes, they hold infinite potential in combinations.
I want to chat with you...
或许，您也听说过「主宰」这个词是从何而来？
Do you know where the word "chef" comes from?
如今我们用它来形容至高统治，但在最开始，它的确是字面意思。
It comes from chef de cuisine, which refers to the head of the kitchen. In short, both a leader and a cook.
负责宰杀祭祀物的人——一种特定场合中的大厨。
Even someone who leads the preparation of sacrificial offerings can be considered a specialty chef.
我也曾听说过，在某颗遥远的异星，他们将自己禁卫军的领袖尊称为主厨，还有主锅和主勺一类的职阶。
I've also heard of a distant planet where the leader of the imperial guard is known as the head chef, and their ranks included titles such as Cauldron Major and First Ladle.
所以，我向来都对自己的职业相当自豪。
Which is all to say, I've always been very proud of my profession.
无论疆域怎么样，这都算是在统治一个小小的王国？您说对不对？
You could even say I'm the ruler of my own little kingdom when I'm in the kitchen. Don't you agree?
{TEXTJOIN#87}上随时可以用餐，您尽管招呼就好。
Feel free to order a meal at any time on board {TEXTJOIN#87}.
这位朋友，站在高处的感觉如何？您也喜欢丈量万物的尺度吗？
How do you feel standing so high up, my friend? Do you also enjoy taking measure of the scale of the world?
又或者，喜欢看我们身旁的云气，被这艘船轻轻一撞，就得消去无痕？
Or maybe you enjoy watching the clouds disperse without a trace after we bump into them?
啊…抱歉，我倒不是被雇来的吟游诗人。
Oh, I'm sorry. I'm not a hired poet.
只不过，偶尔我也会觉得，我们拥有的一切，也和这云气有些相似之处。
It's just, sometimes, I can't help but feel everything we own is like these clouds.
想要让它不那么脆弱，非得采取些手段才行。
We have to take action to protect them from their fragility.
您愿意收下一份我的名片吗？我是专业理财顾问杰萨梅，您不会因此感到后悔的。
Would you like my business card? You won't regret it. I'm Jessamy, a professional financial advisor.
至于刚才那些话…哈哈，您看上去气度不凡，恐怕不适合这么开门见山。
As for what I just said... Haha, there's something unique about you, so it didn't feel right getting straight to the point.
当然，自我推销总会引人不快，您要是的确只想在这里看看云，我也不会再多说什么的。
Of course, no one likes a self-promoter, so if you really are just here to watch the clouds, I won't say more.
我不给人建议，我只讲述见过的教训。
I don't offer suggestions. I merely talk about lessons I've learned.
实不相瞒，我也曾遇到过「不死之人」。
To tell you the truth, I've met an "Undying" before, too.
据说，她以受到极为深重的伤害为代价，了却了一桩恩怨。
She paid a heavy price to settle a grudge, suffering grievous injuries.
好消息是，她能够就此过上平凡的生活，用无尽的生命，品味凡俗的快乐。
The good news was she could now use her infinite lifespan to experience a happy and ordinary life.
并且，她所拥有的财富，也足以支持她悠哉游哉地畅游星间。
Her wealth also granted her the ability to wander among the stars at her leisure.
而坏消息——即使是她，在承受那种程度的伤害后，也不得不在漫长的时间中独自沉睡，疗养自身。
The bad news was those grievous injuries forced her to enter a deep sleep for an extended period of time in order to recover.
此后，她终于苏醒，并且准备按照原本的计划开始生活，可是……
When she finally woke up and prepared to resume her original plans to live her new life...
出门买了一串糖葫芦之后，她破产了。
She bought a skewer of candied hawthorn and went bankrupt.
看吧，这就是理财的意义所在了，时间是把饕餮的镰刀，我们不能坐以待毙。
You see, this is why financial management is important. Time swings a mighty scythe. We must act before it's too late.
这是人类最伟大的体系。不过，「伟大」是不是经常用来形容…那些现在已经失去意义的东西？
This is mankind's greatest system, but have you noticed how we always use "greatest" to describe things that have lost its significance?
我们免不了要和数字打交道，毕竟它实在方便得很，您看——
We can't avoid using numbers. They make our lives so convenient, after all. Look...
如果您的信用点后面多加一个零，那您一定比现在更舍得享受生活。
If you add an extra zero to the end of your credit total, I bet you'd be more willing to treat yourself to nice things.
多加三个零，不用费什么力气也能展现出自己显赫的身份。
Add three more zeros and you can easily flaunt your personage without lifting a finger.
多加五个零，对这众生来说，您会和神一样，完全像是另一个物种。
Add five more zeros, and you might as well be a god to all living beings, existing on a different plane.
但也正因为太过方便，有时候…也会显得太可悲些。
But it's this same convenience that also makes things... sad.
尽管已经是很模糊的记忆了，但在很久很久之前，我或许还会因为见到形状奇特的贝壳而雀跃不已……
The memory is hazy now but a long, long time ago, I would have been excited to find a curiously shaped shell.
并且，小心翼翼地藏在口袋里，等待之后送给友人。
I'd carefully tuck the shell away in my pocket so I can give it to a friend as a gift later.
当我第一次看到自己的信用点多出一个零时…
But the first time I saw the extra zero at the end of my credit total...
我所感受到的欣喜，与我发现贝壳时的欣喜，显然并不是同一种事物。
The joy I felt was on a whole other level compared to when I found the shell.
但他们谁更重要，现在我倒是完全无法分清了。
Which joy is more important? I admit I can't tell the difference anymore.
当我第一次看到自己的信用点多出一个零时…
But the first time I saw the extra zero at the end of my credit total...
我所感受到的欣喜，与我发现贝壳时的欣喜，显然并不是同一种事物。
The joy I felt was on a whole other level compared to when I found the shell.
但他们谁更重要，现在我倒是完全无法分清了。
Which joy is more important? I admit I can't tell the difference anymore.
我们的时间都太珍贵了，验资当然是必不可少的……
Our time is precious, so maintaining creditworthiness is crucial.
是啊…是啊，我也有过容易热血上头的时候。
Yes, I've had my overly rash moments.
那时我刚刚入行，总觉得自己应该抓住每一个机会。也就理所当然，没能避开一些奇形怪状的客户。
I was still new to the industry at the time, so I latched onto every opportunity I could find, which meant I ran into some peculiar clients.
硬要说起来，那位竟然还真有些眼熟……但也实在讨厌。
To put it bluntly, he seemed familiar... and really annoying.
他自称坐拥巨量财富，希望我能为他制订详尽的方案，以免随着时间推移而遭到贬损。
He claimed to have considerable wealth and wanted my help with a comprehensive plan to protect its future value.
但当我耗费了许多时间和精力后，终于发现他所谓的「财富」……那不过就是小小一箱贝壳而已。
I spent a lot of time and effort on the proposal, only to find out his so-called "wealth" was a small box of shells.
我早就说过，预测未来的诀窍不在于准确……
I've said it before: The trick to predicting the future isn't accuracy.
比起喜悦，她此刻的态度更接近得意。
She seems more proud of herself than happy.
瞧，在我的右眼框上，能够看到一块红色的胎记，对吧？
Look above my right eye. Do you see the red birthmark?
过去，每当有人问起时，我总会半开玩笑地说——哦，我刚被人打了一拳。
In the past, when someone asked about it, I would joke and say I was punched in the face.
又或者…是啊，我刚刚哭了一场。
Or I'd tell them I was crying.
但在从事眼下职业这么久之后，如果您再次问起这件事，那我一定会说——
But after being in this line of work for so long, my answer is now:
「那是我仍在被孕育时就已经烙下的印记，预示着我这一生，都注定常常流下眼泪。」
"I was marked while still in the womb. It means I'm predestined to shed many tears in my lifetime."
看，这就是最重要的职业素养。客户有时候就是这样，越离奇复杂的事态，对他们来说越有说服力。
Now that's a professional answer! Some clients are easier to persuade when you share bizarre tidbits like this.
把钱放在哪里不动，你可能在不受任何损失的情况下越来越穷——这种话他们是听不进去的。
If you try to tell them their money will naturally devalue over time, it won't stick in their minds.
要让未来在他们眼中保持神秘，这样，才能产生不安。
而不安，就是我这种人的财路。
And uncertainty is how we make money in this profession.
要让未来在他们眼中保持神秘，这样，才能产生不安。
而不安，就是我这种人的财路。
And uncertainty is how we make money in this profession.
I want to chat with you...
没问题。虽然有些唐突，不过打眼一看，就知道您颇有一些豪侠气质。
No problem. I don't mean to be rude, but I can tell just by looking at you that you're the chivalrous type.
在投资理财这方面，或许您也更青睐激进一些的方案？
Perhaps you'd prefer more exciting investment proposals.
说到这里，她凑近距离，压低了声音。
She leans in closer and lowers her voice.
您知道的，只要您不介意投资并非用于匹诺康尼，我倒是也有很多别的路子。
If you don't mind investing outside Penacony, I have plenty of other options for you.
恕我不能透露名字，但某颗星球上，一场武装政变的确一触即发……
I can't tell you the name, but a certain planet is on the verge of a military coup.
而对那些反抗者来说，一点小小的物资帮助，都能够换来他们在上台后的巨大回报。
If we send supplies to the rebels, we're guaranteed big returns once they rise to power.
I'll tell you about my other proposals the next time we meet.
可是…这到底是隐含在忆质当中的过去，还是忆域本身的某种生态特色？
...But is this a past contained within memoria or a trait of the Memory Zone itself?
她完全没有注意到你的接近，这实在不是什么好习惯。
She doesn't notice your approach at all. You really shouldn't make a habit out of this.
Oh, I'm sorry. Have you been waiting long?
What happened to the theft detection?
显然，尽管没有付诸行动，但你的气势已经足以使人开始警惕。
Despite the lack of activity right now, your presence is apparently enough to put her on alert.
啊，你好你好——是从别人那里听说了忆域潜水的项目吗？
Oh, hello. Did someone tell you about our Memory Zone diving activity?
嗯…也不知道他们有没有夸大其词。
Mmm, I hope they didn't exaggerate.
「深潜之后，我要见到从古至今最具智慧的人。」
"I want to meet the wisest person in history during my dive."
如果是抱着这种想法，恐怕会很失望哦？忆域潜水和体验梦泡完全是两回事。
If that's what you were hoping for, you'd be sorely disappointed. Memory Zone diving is not the same as experiencing a dream bubble.
纯粹的记忆没有立场，总是不加选择地保留过去，这是它最体贴的地方……也是它最危险的地方。
Pure memory retains the past without any embellishments or standpoints. It's what makes it so thought-provoking... and dangerous.
当然啦，如果你就是为此而来的，我倒是很愿意进行非常全面的教学。最近可是有半价……
Of course, if that's what you're here for, I'd be happy to give you a comprehensive tour. You can enjoy the experience at half-price right now, too.
啊，瞧我的记性，甚至…如果你能替我留心一些「小细节」，免费体验都不是问题哦？
Oh, I almost forgot. Actually, if you help me take note of some "small details," I can offer you the experience for free instead.
或许，相比他们，我们并没有懂得更多？
Maybe we don't actually know more than they do?
很久以前，我从书上看到了一种名为草履虫的微生物。
A long time ago, I read about a microorganism called the paramecium.
它们来自遥远的异星，完全由一个细胞构成，你很难认为它们是一种具有灵知的生物。
They come from a distant planet and are composed of a single cell. You wouldn't think they are creatures that possess any intelligence.
可是，它们的某种习性却让我非常在意。
But their peculiar behavior piqued my interest.
当与其他的草履虫相遇，并开始相处时，两个草履虫会短暂地结合在一起，从两个细胞变成同一个，并在一段时间重新分开。
When one paramecium interacts with another, they will conjugate and then divide. The two cells become a single entity for a moment before splitting apart again.
没有任何崭新的事物会因此诞生，它们都只是永远地失去了自己曾经的一部分，同时获得对方的一部分。
Nothing remarkable will come of this interaction. Each of them just permanently loses a part of themselves while gaining a part of the other.
不知道我描述得算不算清楚，但在我看来…单细胞生物无意识的本能，在遥远的时间以前，就已经概括了我们的许多行为，不是吗？
I don't know if my description made sense, but the way I see it: This instinct of a single-celled organism from so long ago has become a crude outline of our behavior.
教导，爱，友情…不外如是。从很多角度来看，我们和它们也没什么区别。
Don't we interact with each other in the same way when we're teaching, falling in love, and making friends?
所以我才说嘛，根本没什么不一样的……
So, in my opinion, we're not all that different from paramecium.
一瞬间，你还以为钟表把戏出了什么差错，对方甚至没有表现出半分消沉。
For a brief moment, you thought your clockwork malfunctioned. She doesn't look sad at all.
啊…对了，正好给你看一些新发现，说不定能让你对忆域深潜更感兴趣呢。
Oh, I have a new discovery for you. Maybe it'll get you more interested in Memory Zone diving.
以极其小心的动作，她从口袋了取出了管状的密封容器，随后轻巧地打开。
With great care, she removes a sealed tube-shaped container from her pocket and opens it.
在倒数还没结束时，管状容器中突然亮起了几点荧光，虽然惹眼，但又一闪即逝。
Before she can finish her countdown, fluorescent spots light up across the tube-shaped container. They are very bright but quickly fade.
结束啦，知道吗，你刚刚…目睹了某种生命的全部人生。
That's it. You just witnessed the entire lifespan of a certain life form.
据说它们诞生于某个处于极夜的星球，几乎只能拥有十五分钟的寿命。
They come from a planet of eternal night and only have a lifespan of about <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes.
而在这十五分钟里，除了留下后代之外，它们所有的时间都用以积蓄力量，来产生会将自己杀死的一闪而过的光点。

In those <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes, apart from assuring the continuation of their species, they spend the rest of their time collecting the energy required to create a flash of light — the same light that would also end their lives.
——那种力量连它们自己的身体都无法承受。
Their bodies just don't have the capacity to contain so much energy.
在那个永远被笼罩在黑夜的星球上，远古的英雄正是踩着这种荧光组成的道路，看清猛兽的獠牙，为人们取回安宁。
On that planet shrouded in eternal dark, heroes of yore walked the paths created by these fluorescent lights to clearly see the fangs of ferocious beats and win back peace for their people.
不过，刚才发光的那些可并不是容器里的全部哦？
But the lights you just saw in the container didn't come from all of them.
还有相当一部分，即使经历了整整一生的积蓄，也不足以发出一瞬的光芒——它们实在太过微小了嘛。
There were some who couldn't produce a glimmer of light even after a lifetime of trying. They were just too, too small.
对，做着相同的事情，它们在黑暗中结束了自己的一生，伴随着同类放出的光华。
Together in the darkness, they strove toward the same end, just for that one moment of brilliance.
这时，迟来的悲伤出现在了她的脸上。
A look of sadness finally shows on her face.
最爱幻想的科研工作者，或许悲伤时也需要些实据。
Maybe even a researcher who indulges in fantasy needs data to support their sadness first.
很令人惊讶的构造吧？据说诞生于某个处于极夜的星球，几乎只能拥有十五分钟的寿命。
Astonishing, isn't it? They come from a planet of eternal night and only have a lifespan of about <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes.
而在这十五分钟里，除了留下后代之外，它们所有的时间都用以积蓄力量，来产生会将自己杀死的一闪而过的光点。

In those <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes, apart from assuring the continuation of their species, they spend the rest of their time collecting the energy required to create a flash of light — the same light that would also end their lives.
——那种力量连它们自己的身体都无法承受。
Their bodies just don't have the capacity to contain so much energy.
又被退回了？他们到底有没有认真看完啊……
Rejected again? Did they even read the whole thing?
「基于忆域的不确定性，我们的刊物不能接受从梦境中得到的研究结论。」
"Due to the indefinite nature of the Memory Zone, our publication is unable to accept any conclusions that stem from Dreamscape research."
「更何况…其中一些信息，恐怕来路不正。」
"Additionally, we are concerned that some of the information came from questionable sources."
——这也能称得上理由吗？还是说，他们真的目光短浅到完全看不出相应的价值？
What kind of excuse is that? Are they really so short-sighted they can't see the value of my research?
一滴水中的微生物，数量可以超过三万…
A drop of water can contain over thirty thousand microorganisms.
它们自成世界，有些人偏偏却视而不见。
A whole biome right under our noses, and yet there are people who turn a blind eye to it.
如果不是样本太少，这还真是相当惊人啊……
Too bad we don't have more samples. This is truly astonishing...
不过，它究竟是在哪里遇到这种病毒的？
I wonder where he found this virus.
嗯…聊聊看也没什么，虽然的确出人意料，但目前还仅仅只是猜测嘛。
Oh, I can talk about it. It's surprising to be sure, but all I have is conjecture right now.
我的某位客户在结束忆域潜水后，有某种前所未见的微生物也被他顺便带了上来。
A client of mine went Memory Zone diving. When he came back up, he brought with him microorganisms I've never seen before.
出于梦境的混乱，它们似乎残缺不全，但不论怎么看，那都像是一种失活的病毒。
Owing to the chaos of the Dreamscape, they were damaged and incomplete. But having examined them, I'm certain they're some kind of inactivated virus.
而且……是一种人为制作的，无懈可击的病毒。
And not just any virus, these are man-made: A perfect virus.
我几乎没有办法简单说明制作它的难度。
I can't even begin to explain the complexities involved in creating this.
那就像是有某种意志，它能从微观层面随心所欲地操纵一切，并在几经尝试后，把自己心中最可怕的灾异化为了现实。
It's as if some kind of will freely manipulated everything at a microscopic level. Then, after some trial and error, isolated their deepest calamitous fear and made it real.
或许这种病毒曾经肆虐过某个星球，甚至星系，而一些感染者理所当然地因此展开了逃亡。
Maybe this virus devastated a planet or star system once upon a time, and those infected fled from there.
而恰好，就有其中那么几位，他们痛苦的记忆沉积下来，并永远地留存在了忆域的深处……
Then, by coincidence, the painful memories of these individuals were deposited here, permanently etched in the depths of the Memory Zone.
啊…抱歉，好像又在毫无根据的情况下发散太多了。
Oh, I'm sorry. I'm making too many baseless assumptions again.
总之，无论那是一种技术，又或一种「伟力」，只要能够溯源而上，这项发现都够了不起的。
Anyway, it doesn't matter if it's man-made or by some kind of "force." If we can trace its origins, we still have a remarkable discovery on our hands.
真希望能早点发现别的佐证啊……
I wish we can find some other evidence soon...
I want to chat with you...
哦？看来您对这方面还是很感兴趣嘛。
I'm interested, as long as it's free.
虽说我也常常这么觉得啦，以前在学校食堂的时候……
I feel the same way. One day during recess in school...
我还是为您重新介绍一下吧，虽说可以免费…可也不是没有任何条件哦？
Let me start over from the beginning. You can experience this for free if you fulfill some conditions.
总之，忆域的性质想必不用我再复述了吧？
You already know the nature of the Memory Zone, right?
既然你能够看到作为记忆存在的光影，触摸到作为记忆存在的人们……
I know you can see and touch the shadows of those who have become memories.
悄然贯穿我们历史的微生物，也同样悄然被附着在了忆质上。
These include the microorganisms mankind have encountered throughout history, which are also capable of latching on to memoria.
所以，免费的忆域潜水不成问题，我甚至还可以提供许多必要的支持。
Meaning, I'm more than happy to provide you all the support you need for your free Memory Zone dive.
只要在深潜的过程中，你能够实实在在地用双手去接触它们，让那些看不见的小家伙随着你的上浮，来到我的面前。
All you have to do is find these invisible little creatures during the course of your dive, get in touch with them, and bring them back with you to show me.
当然啦，娱乐活动附加上条件之后，总会变得无趣很多。还是再考虑一下吧。
Of course, I understand adding conditions to a recreational activity will suck all the fun out of it, so I'll give you some time to think about it.
没关系，有想法的话，可以随时来找我。
Alright. Come find me once you reach a decision.
嗨，你也是为了雅各布大厨来的吗？
Hi, are you here to see Chef Jacob too?
我叫贝拉，是一名星际美食家。
I'm Bella, an interstellar food connoisseur.
我问你，在你心中，怎样的食物算美食？
Tell me, what do you consider gourmet food?
"The chef shows you the steak cut used for this evening —"
全银河仅一家牧场产出此级别的牛排。雪花纹路均匀遍布，像红宝石上结的霜。只能做三分熟，多一分都是暴殄天物。

"In the entire cosmos, only one ranch can produce such a high-grade steak, with evenly distributed marbling that mirrors frost on a ruby. It should be cooked to medium rare at most to maintain its exquisite quality."
切开是漂亮的粉红色，长时间的静置让牛排锁满肉汁。火候完美，入口嫩如吞拿鱼腹的细致，不会有牛肉的纹理，轻轻咀嚼便融化。唇齿间的香味令你着迷。

"Upon slicing, it reveals a gorgeous pink hue. Let it rest to unlock incomparable juiciness. Its tenderness compares to tuna belly, effortlessly melting away, leaving behind a lingering enticing aroma."
温控是牛排的命门，因此绝不提供星际快送。上门的食客络绎不绝，预约更是排到三个琥珀纪之后。」
"The steak's quality hinges on precise temperature control, so interstellar delivery isn't offered. Such is its demand that reservations are booked up to three Amber Eras ahead."
嗯…确实是美食，你很有品味，说着口水都要滴下来了。
Hmm, it does sound heavenly. Your taste is excellent. It's got me salivating.
不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?
当你受困于原始森林久未进食，爬过的肥美甲虫就是美食。
When you're lost and starving in a forest, a plump beetle becomes gourmet.
当你落入星际监狱，临刑前最后一顿随你所愿，星际快递来的家乡菜就是美食。
When you're thrown into Interastral Prison and given your choice of a last meal, the food delivered from your home planet becomes gourmet.
「你意外落入星际监狱。星际法庭毫不留情，给出最严重的判罚！
"In a twist of fate, you find yourself cast into the Interastral Prison. The merciless Interastral Court has handed down its harshest sentence to you!"
你受够这牢房每日供应的泔水了！临刑前最后一夜，你塞给一位贪财的狱警自己半辈子的积蓄，以换最后一次享用佳肴的机会。
"Disgusted by the terrible prison food, you secretly hand over half of your savings to a greedy warden, bargaining for one final good meal before your execution."
此时你留恋的，并不是一口值千金的顶级牛排，而是母星一碗平平无奇的牛肉盖饭。」
"Now, what you crave most isn't the premium steak with the expensive price, but a humble bowl of beef rice from your home planet."
嗯…这确实是美食，你很有品味，说着我都想家了。
Hmm, it does sound delicious. Your taste is excellent, and I'm feeling homesick now.
不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?
当你受困于原始森林，久未进食即将昏厥，爬过的肥美甲虫就是美食。
When you're lost and starving in a forest and on the verge of passing out, a plump beetle becomes gourmet.
当你手头有大把花不完的钞票，全银河最昂贵的牛排就是美食。
When you have so much wealth you can't spend it all, the most expensive steak in the cosmos becomes gourmet.
「这是你被困于原始森林的第五天，为何一场美食寻觅之旅会酿成灾难！
"This is the fifth day you've been lost in the forest. What started as a quest for ingredients has turned into a tragedy."
随身携带的粮草早已消耗殆尽。你想尝试狩猎，可这里的动物那么矫健，光是躲过追杀就耗尽你所有力气。
"Your food supplies are gone. Despite attempts at hunting, the animals are too quick, and you've spent all your energy just avoiding predators."
当你饿得快被造物主回收灵魂时，你模糊的视界中爬过一只闪着白光的甲虫。它的壳太美了，像深海的白珍珠，可它更像救命的食物。

"Teetering on starvation, with your spirit fading, a luminous beetle emerges before your blurred eyes. Its shell is mesmerizing, reminiscent of a pearl in the depths of the ocean. Yet, to you, it is nothing less than a lifeline."
牛肉味，嘎嘣脆，蛋白质是鸡肉的六倍！
"It has a beef-like flavor, a crunchy texture, and a protein content six times higher than that of chicken!"
靠这种甲虫，你活着走出了原始森林。在你的推介下，银河又多了一样绝美食材。」
"With the help of this beetle species, you've made it through the forest and introduced a novel delicacy to the cosmic culinary landscape."
嗯…这确实是美食，可惜这种甲虫已经绝迹了。
Hmm, that does sound tasty. It's unfortunate that this beetle is now extinct.
不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?
当你手头有大把花不完的钞票，全银河最昂贵的牛排就是美食。
When you have so much wealth you can't spend it all, the most expensive steak in the cosmos becomes gourmet.
当你落入星际监狱，临刑前最后一顿随你所愿，星际快递来的家乡菜就是美食。
When you're thrown into Interastral Prison and given your choice of a last meal, the food delivered from your home planet becomes gourmet.
美食是一种体验——这是我尝遍天下后，最大的感悟。
Gourmet is an experience: This is what I learned after sampling food from across the cosmos.
不说了，我要准备出席雅各布大厨的新品揭幕环节了，回见。
Alright, I have to go get ready to attend the unveiling of Chef Jacob's new dish. Later.
美食分享中，似乎混进了些奇怪的情节……
It seems like some strange events got mixed into that gourmet food-sharing session.
把雅各布大厨贬为普通厨师？我不认可。
Denoting Chef Jacob as a common cook? I don't approve of that.
以前雅各布大厨可是这里的首席主厨。只因为他坚持创新，绝不按照无知宾客的要求制作那无趣的复古口味，就被……
Chef Jacob used to be the head chef here. He was very focused on innovation and refused to listen to ignorant guests who wanted him to recreate boring retro food. Because of that, he was...
我的评价是，美食界快完蛋了。我在那些传统的菜品中品不出灵魂的激荡，平淡得像嚼那动物饲料的干草。

If you want to know what I think, the world of gourmet is finished. Traditional dishes no longer contain flavors that communicate a stirring of the soul, and they taste like a bale of hay used for animal feed.
好吧，我承认，他被撤职的理由不全是因为截然不同的烹饪理念——的确有些食客因为吃了他的料理食物中毒，但就像我说的，美食注重的是体验…而被美食击倒也是体验的一种！

Alright, I admit, his unique culinary philosophy is not the only reason for his removal — Yes, some guests suffered food poisoning after eating his food, but it's like I said before: Gourmet's focus is experience... and being taken out by food is definitely an experience!
这个世界需要更多雅各布大厨这样，具有冒险精神的厨师。
The world needs more bold and adventurous chefs like Jacob.
谁能想得到，我赚了这么多哈哈哈！
Hahaha! I didn't expect to make so much money!
美食家挣钱的机会可不多，可我，哈哈哈哈哈！我还是抓住了机会！
I don't get a lot of opportunities to make money as a food connoisseur, but I found one and used it well! Hahahahaha!
你吃顶级牛排的钱这么来的？
This is how you got the money to eat top-tier steak?
与你还算有缘，我偷偷告诉你吧，嘿嘿。
I guess we've been getting along, so I'll tell you my secret. Heh heh.
曾经我寻觅食材时，看中一种原始森林的甲虫。一般虫子口味很寡淡，可这甲虫肉质细腻、油脂丰富，就像那…上等的牛排肉，你说这事新鲜不新鲜？

I found a beetle while hunting for ingredients in an untouched forest one day. Normally, beetles taste bland, but this one had tender, succulent, fatty meat. It tasted like a piece of premium steak. What an amazing find, don't you think?
后来我找了一群老乡，做起了走私甲虫的生意。很快这种甲虫热销银河，我也靠这生意狠狠赚了一笔。
I got a bunch of locals together and started a beetle smuggling business. Our business rapidly boomed across the Cosmos and money started rolling in.
可后来事情败露了，星际法庭以「走私星际保护动物罪」给我判了个死刑。
Until we were found out. I was given the death penalty by the Interastral Court for the crime of "smuggling protected interstellar animals".
不就是吃灭绝了种虫子，至于判这么重？这种低等生物的命，难道比我这种智慧生物的更值钱？
A death penalty for eating a bug into extinction! Give me a break! They seriously consider the life of such a primitive species to be more precious than an intelligent life form like me?
还好我人脉广，不然真要交代在里面了！
Thankfully, I have enough friends to get me out of prison.
你，可千万不要告诉别人！我的眼线可是遍布银河的。
As for you, don't tell anyone else about this! I've got eyes and ears across the cosmos.
如果再来一次，我还卖这甲虫！这是为全银河的食客谋福利。
If I had the chance to do it all over again, I would still sell that beetle! It's for the benefit of food connoisseurs across the cosmos.
人生大多数时候都在积累，真正的爆发点不多。如果碰上，一定要果断出击！
Life is all about waiting for the rare moment to strike, and you have to strike it hard while it's hot!
见我成功，就要置我于死地？！等我收拾你！
Yet here they are trying to execute me for my success. Ridiculous!
前几年，我…咳…我朋友差点被星际法庭判了死刑。
Years ago, I — ahem — My friend was nearly sentenced to death by the Interastral Court.
经我调查，这完全是陷害，我证据确凿！
I looked into it and they were totally framed! I have the evidence to prove it!
我托关系，调出了我朋友的法院判决书，原罪名「以食用为目的走私星际保护动物」不知何时被篡改为了「涉嫌谋杀」。

I pulled some strings and got my hands on my friend's court document. At some point, their crime was mysteriously changed from "smuggling with the intent of consuming protected interstellar animals" to "suspected homicide".
我顺着这条线查了下去…这幕后黑手真狠，为了确保能用谋杀罪顶替走私罪，直接抹除了这种保护动物的存在。
I investigated the lead... The person behind it was utterly merciless. To flip smuggling into murder charges, they just flat-out pretended this protected animal doesn't exist.
他买通所有进购过这动物的餐厅，让二十多家餐厅统一口径，声称这种甲虫根本不存在…我是说…这种保护动物！

They managed to bribe all the restaurants that previously purchased this animal, convincing more than twenty restaurants to unanimously deny the existence of these beetles... I mean, this protected animal!
餐厅们说这是我的臆想，可是换做过去，他们每周都要在我这儿订上一整船的货。
The restaurants all claimed that I was fabricating the story, but they used to order a shipment of it weekly!
等我搜集证据，揭发这幕后黑手…我的意思是…替我朋友报仇！
Just wait until I collect enough evidence and expose the culprit... I mean, secure justice for my friend!
为什么只有我活了下来……
Why am I the only survivor?
为什么只有我走出了森林……
Why am I the only one who made it out of the forest?
一场美食之旅，怎么变成这样……
How did a culinary journey take such a tragic turn?
Why are you all so useless?
I miss you lot so much...
I want to chat with you...
关于美食一切，我都可以回答你。
For anything food-related, just ask away.
我想了解一下顶级牛排。
I'd like to know more about the premium steak.
没问题，这家可是我的必吃榜第一位！
Absolutely! This restaurant tops my list of must-visit eating places!
"The chef shows you the steak cut used for this evening —"
全银河只有一家牧场产出此级别的牛排。雪花纹路均匀遍布，像红宝石上结的霜。只能做三分熟，多一分都是暴殄天物。

嗯…确实是美食，你很有品味，说着口水都要滴下来了。
Hmm, it does sound heavenly. Your taste is excellent. It's got me salivating.
我想了解一下母星的家乡菜。
I'd like to know more about the food of your home planet.
只有当你远离母星，才会想起它的好。所以，我要为这段演绎增加一个小小的情景。
You only appreciate your home planet once you're away. With that in mind, I'll add a scenario to the enactment.
「你意外落入星际监狱。星际法庭毫不留情，给出最严重的判罚！
"In a twist of fate, you find yourself cast into the Interastral Prison. The merciless Interastral Court has handed down its harshest sentence to you!"
你受够这牢房每日供应的泔水了！临刑前的最后一夜，你塞给一位贪财的狱警你半辈子的积蓄，以换最后一次享用佳肴的机会。
Disgusted by the terrible prison food, you secretly hand over half of your life savings to a greedy warden, bargaining for one final good meal before your execution.
此时你留恋的，并不是一口值千金的顶级牛排，而是母星一碗平平无奇的牛肉盖饭。」
"Now, what you crave most isn't the premium steak with the expensive price, but a humble bowl of beef rice from your home planet."
嗯…这确实是美食，你很有品味，说着我都想家了。
Hmm, it does sound delicious. Your taste is excellent, and I'm feeling homesick now.
我想了解一下原始森林的甲虫。
I'd like to know more about the forest beetles.
你的口味很别致！我告诉你甲虫在什么情况下更美味
You have a distinct taste! Let me tell you when beetles are at their most flavorful.
「这是你被困于原始森林的第五天，为何一场美食寻觅之旅会酿成灾难！
"This is the fifth day you've been lost in the forest. What started as a quest for ingredients has turned into a tragedy."
