牛肉味，嘎嘣脆，蛋白质是鸡肉的六倍！
"It has a beef-like flavor, a crunchy texture, and a protein content six times higher than that of chicken!"
靠这种甲虫，你活着走出了原始森林。在你的推介下，银河又多了一样绝美食材。」
"With the help of this beetle species, you've made it through the forest and introduced a novel delicacy to the cosmic culinary landscape."
嗯…这确实是美食，可惜这种甲虫已经绝迹了。
Hmm, that does sound tasty. It's unfortunate that this beetle is now extinct.
嗯，如果想尝试雅各布大厨的新品，一定要听听我的推荐。
If you're looking to try Chef Jacob's latest dishes, I've got some fantastic suggestions for you!
显然，她注意到了你的目光，一丝怯意从她眸子里一闪而过。但她定了定神，以一种不算标准的营业声线向你*提出需求*——就像她以往在职场上做的那样。
She has clearly noticed your gaze, shyness flickering in her eyes. But after a brief pause, she proceeds to make a request in a less-than-perfect polished tone, similar to the one she uses at work.
咳咳…那…那来一杯荨麻酒好了，<unbreak>143</unbreak>种药草配方的那款。
Ahem... C—Could I please have a Chartreuse? The one made with <unbreak>143</unbreak> herbs.
她深吸一口气，如释重负，耸着的双肩终于垮了下去。然而没过多久，她像是又想起什么似的，条件反射般绷直了背。她开口了，掐着嗓子，气息明显有些颤抖。

She lets out a deep sigh, her shoulders finally relaxing. But almost immediately, as if recalling something, she reflectively tenses up again to speak, her voice strained and her breathing evidently uneven.
对了…呃…不要加枫米…蜂、蜂蜜。
啊…这…这样吗？实在抱歉…哈哈。
Ah... I—Is that so? My apologies...
你为什么捏着嗓子说话？
But why's your voice like that?
Th—This is... actually how I talk...
*Sigh* Never mind. I can't ever seem to fake it right.
她叹了口气，那种看似坚强实则濒临崩溃的架势顷刻间消散无踪了。
She takes a deep breath, and her facade of toughness — covering up an imminent collapse — immediately vanishes.
实在不好意思…这是我头一次出远门。我还…不太熟练。
I'm sorry... It's my first time traveling alone. Th—This is all a bit new to me.
家人嘱咐我，一个人出门在外，要尽量让自己看起来*老练*一些…免得遭人欺负。
My family said I should act more seasoned out there to avoid being exploited.
不过，现在应该也没什么必要吧？虽然这艘船上都是有身份的客人…但您…您看上去像个好人……
But it seems unnecessary now, right? Everyone here probably has some fancy status, but you... you seem genuinely nice...
Yes, I am a nice person.
她讪笑着，眼神飘忽躲闪。如果不出意外，她内心深处还是将你归类到「有身份的客人」里了…虽然这么觉得也没错就是。
She offers a hesitant smile, her gaze flitting about. Subconsciously, she will still categorize you among the "guests with fancy statuses"... Well, it's a fair assumption to make.
怎么突然给人发好人卡…
Are you giving me a medal of good citizenship?
她似乎把你的玩笑当真了。一串模糊的杂音如鲠在喉，她低下头去不再答话。
Your joke doesn't land well with her. A jumble of muffled sounds catches in her throat. She lowers her gaze and becomes quiet.
我又何尝不是一种亡命狂徒！
Who knows? Maybe I'm a fugitive!
她似乎真的吓到了，低下头去不再答话，似乎是在骗自己刚才的一切都从未发生过。
She looks frightened and becomes quiet, as if she's trying to convince herself that the earlier conversation never happened.
虽然旅程才刚刚过半，但工作的事还是很让人担心啊……
Even though I'm only halfway through my trip, I'm already deeply concerned about my work...
嗯…虽然我也不知道，这算不算是毫无必要的担心——但离开工作岗位这么久，我总觉得有点…害怕。
Hmm... I'm not sure if my concerns are justified, but being away from work for this long, I can't help feeling a bit anxious.
也不是说自己有多重要啦…恰恰相反，正是因为自己根本无足轻重，才不能消失太久。不然要是等到领导发现你的消失根本没什么影响，那就彻底完蛋了。
I don't mean that I'm very important... Rather, because I'm replaceable, I can't disappear for too long. If my boss sees that my absence makes no difference, I'm done for!
那种事情…千万不要发生啊……
I truly hope... that doesn't come to pass...
没错，冷静下来，好好想想该怎么把握机会……
That's right, calm down and take a moment to consider how to make the most out of this opportunity...
你知道吗？我觉得我不能坐以待毙…我是说，我不能眼睁睁看着这份豪华旅行套餐把自己…呃，榨干。
You know what? I shouldn't be sitting here and doing nothing... I mean, I can't be whiling away the time when this luxurious vacation combo is already... ugh, bleeding me dry.
我得…利用这个机会。既然这种规格的旅游项目一般人根本负担不起，那「直播」或许是个思路——要是运气好，说不定我也能靠着这次旅行出名？

I need to... really capitalize on this opportunity. Since trips like this aren't affordable to most, live-streaming it could be something novel. Who knows, if I'm lucky, I might even become famous after this journey!
不过，最近好像不流行这个了…我有一个特别喜欢的主播，叫桂乃芬，她是专门播户外灵异探险的，人气可高了…那才是现在的潮流。
But then again, this seems a bit outdated now... My favorite streamer, Guinaifen, does outdoor supernatural adventures and she's really popular... I guess content like that is what's in trend now.
话又说回来了，我只是个穷鬼而已…这种豪华旅行的直播，大家应该更想看纸醉金迷的部分吧？我连花天酒地的资本都没有，更别提播给别人看了……
Also, I'm just a broke girl... Those who watch luxury travel channels are probably drawn in by the opulence. I don't have the funds to splurge, much less flaunt them on-camera...
又或者…借这个直播带货做代购？「十四星特产连珠大礼包」？不行不行…还是得再好好想想……

Or how about starting a live commerce channel with this stream? Maybe I can sell a "Ginormous <unbreak>14</unbreak>-Planet Specialty Deluxe Pack"? No, that doesn't quite hit the mark. I'll have to think harder...
我得…利用这个机会。要是运气好，说不定我也能靠着这次旅行出名？
I need to... really capitalize on this opportunity. Who knows, if I'm lucky, I might even become famous after this journey!
可是我总感觉事情没那么简单…不行不行，还是得再好好想想……
Though I doubt it'll really be that easy... Ugh, these thoughts need to go away. I'll have to think harder...
哎，黛博拉啊黛博拉…你可真够不成器的！
Deborah, oh Deborah! You're really not good for anything!
明明也没遇到坏事，但又烦躁得厉害…这就是所谓的无名火吗？
Nothing terrible has happened, but I feel unusually frustrated... Could this be what they call "angry for no reason"?
啊，我知道了！一定是因为自己又弄巧成拙了……
Ah, I get it. I must have messed it up again...
我…从小到大都这样。脑袋瓜不聪明，光靠努力也得不到什么回报。即使偶尔交到些好运，也因为完全不知道怎么应对，最终只会被我自己搞砸……
I... I've always been this way. I'm not smart, and my efforts never seem to pay off. Even when I do get a bit of luck, I somehow manage to always spoil it for myself...
哎，黛博拉啊黛博拉…你可真够不成器的！
Deborah, oh Deborah! You're really not good for anything!
是啊，与其继续这样自怨自艾，倒不如放下负担，享受旅行本身……
Alright, instead of beating myself up over it, I might as lighten up and enjoy the trip...
尽管空间有限，但她的视线穿越层层障碍，投向远方，落在记忆深处。不多时，她的嘴角终于开始出现向上的弧度。
Even in the limited space, her vision pierces through barriers, reaching far into the depths of her memories. Soon, a smile forms on her lips.
现在想想…我真是太傻了。因为抽到这种大奖的概率太小太小，我总觉得在旅途结束后必须得到些什么才行…结果因为患得患失，本来之不易的旅行反倒变成负担。

Now that I think about it, I've been too naive. The slim chances of snagging the grand prize made me feel that I should squeeze every drop out of the vacation... But my obsession has turned this hard-won trip into a mental burden instead.
但不是也有人那样说过吗——「我们是为了采摘苹果而进入果园，但最终我们得到的，是林中一日，斑驳的光线和时间。」
As someone once put it: "We set out to the orchard for apples, but we return with a day filled with nature, speckled sunshine, and cherished moments."
就算发生了像买纪念品被宰、在高科技星球的地铁里晕头转向这种事…但到底也是宝贵的经历。这种值得会心一笑的瞬间，或许就是旅行的意义所在。
Even things like being ripped off for souvenirs or getting lost in high-tech planetary subways are valuable experiences. These fun moments may just be the true purpose of traveling.
虽然她开心起来的样子令你感到欣慰…但说老实话，这世上也不是什么事都可以乐在其中的。
Her happiness is uplifting to see, yet honestly, it's a hard truth that not all experiences in life are joyful.
但不是也有人那样说过吗——「我们是为了采摘苹果而进入果园，但最终我们得到的，是林中一日，斑驳的光线和时间。」
As someone once put it: "We set out to the orchard for apples, but we return with a day filled with nature, speckled sunshine, and cherished moments."
就算发生了像买纪念品被宰、在高科技星球的地铁里晕头转向这种事…但到底也是宝贵的经历。这种值得会心一笑的瞬间，或许就是旅行的意义所在。
Even things like being ripped off for souvenirs or getting lost in high-tech planetary subways are valuable experiences. These fun moments may just be the true purpose of traveling.
I want to chat with you...
我该怎么称呼您…呃…前辈？就前辈吧……
What should I call you? Hmm... Senior? I guess I'll go with senior.
你为什么会来到匹诺康尼？
我只是个公司里的小职员而已，而且还是偏远星球办事处的…基层员工。别说登上{TEXTJOIN#87}了，如果只靠自己，我连入住匹诺康尼的费用都不太能负担得起……

I'm just an ordinary employee at the IPC, an entry-level staff member based at an outpost on a remote planet... Considering my finances, living in Penacony is out of reach, not to mention boarding {TEXTJOIN#87}...
可我现在能在到处旅行，全因为在部门年会上抽到了特等奖——那是方案中涵盖了十四颗星球的超豪华单人游…几乎没有哪位同事不想抽到手。

The only reason I'm able to travel now is that I won the grand prize at our department's annual party. It's an ultra-luxurious solo travel package spanning <unbreak>14</unbreak> planets... The prize all my colleagues had their eye on.
这么豪华的头等奖，抽中概率真的相当小，我完全没想到自己会是那个幸运儿。可等我真中了大奖…才发现情况和想象中完全不一样，哎。

Winning such a luxurious grand prize is incredibly rare. I never imagined I'd be the lucky one. But when I claimed the grand prize, I had won... I was disappointed to realize it wasn't as I had envisioned.
你看起来很苦恼，怎么了？
You seem distressed. What's on your mind?
其实…都是因为我抽中的这份豪华旅游套餐。
It's... about the luxury travel package I won.
先前我没这么觉得，还总想着要是能抽中头等奖，我一定要好好享受假日。可我到现在才发现，「豪华」两个字真是…既麻烦又吓人。
It didn't occur to me back then. I thought I'd surely enjoy the vacation to the fullest if I were to win the grand prize. But it is only now that I realize "luxury" can be overwhelming and daunting.
就算公司会支付绝大多数费用，但方案中经过的这些星球，消费水平都有点…吓人了。
Although the IPC takes care of most expenses, the cost of living on the planets featured in the package is somewhat... alarming.
就不说匹诺康尼，我的上一站是一个名叫「毛哈达」的海滨度假胜地。在那里光是坐趟地铁，我就快要把积蓄全花光了。
Let's not even talk about Penacony. When I was at my previous stop, the Mhada beach resort, I almost had to shell out my entire savings just to ride the subway.
她甚至都要带上几分哭腔了。
Her voice quivers, teetering on the brink of tears.
「传统项目部」甚至给我发了短信，问我的卡是不是被盗刷了——现在我还哪敢乱跑呀……
The Traditional Project Department even sent me a message to check if that was a fraudulent transaction. That's why I'm not going anywhere else now...
嗨，我老早就注意到你了，你刚才一直在盯着我看…嗯哼，我就是那档真人秀的特邀嘉宾！
Hey, I noticed you've been eyeing me for a while now. Yup, you thought right. I am the special guest from that reality show!
看来你是认出我咯？哎，真是拿你们这种小粉丝没办法～
You've recognized me, haven't you? Ah, I really can't do anything about you fans!
Who are you again? Never heard of you.
Aren't you a little too into yourself?
呵呵～没办法，跟着我的狗仔队和粉丝那么多，谁知道你是不是他们的其中一员呢。
Heh, with so many fans and paparazzi on my tail, who's to say you're not one of them?
特别是在我嫁给我老公托马斯之后！哎呀，你是不知道我们婚礼当天现场来了多少媒体…长枪短炮，狂轰滥炸，镁光灯都快把蓝调的时刻打成正午了。
Especially after marrying Thomas! You can't imagine the swarm of reporters at our wedding. The cameras and flashes almost made the Blue Hour feel like midday!
所以呢～我才以为度个蜜月也不安生…不过既然是场误会，说开了就没事了。
That's why I assumed I wouldn't get a moment's peace even on my honeymoon. But since this is just a misunderstanding, it's all good.
上节目要演戏，讨生活也要演戏，习惯了就好。
For me, being on-screen and off is only about switching into different roles. Everything works out once I get accustomed to it.
有些观众会去我的社交账号下狂轰滥炸，他们搞不懂为什么我在节目上表现得那么离谱。太正常了，毕竟他们不知道…真人秀说白了也只是一场「秀」。
Some fans would bombard my social media, criticizing my outlandish actions on the show. It's expected, really. They're not aware that a reality show, at its core, is still a show.
上节目的人在演戏，配合宣传的媒体也在演戏。所以我一直都得保持清醒，讨生活而已，只要钱到位，什么秀我都能演得演出。
Everyone on TV is playing a part, including the media hyping up the show. I constantly remind myself it's all just work. If the pay is right, I'm game for any circus!
婚姻嘛，也是如此。托马斯需要我立这个「花瓶」形象，那我就配合他演这场好戏。他干的那点私活…呵呵，我可是一清二楚～

Marriage is no different. Thomas needs a trophy wife, so that's the role I'll fill! If you ask me about his private business, though... Let's just say that I have a bird's eye view on all that's going on.
至于事业…哈，我又不是知更鸟小姐，我可没她那样的好嗓子。说什么唱歌，其实只是我老公找个借口开个音乐公司避税，顺便做点…见不得人的事罢了。
As for my career... *sigh* It's a pity I don't have Miss Robin's singing talent. Honestly, the music studio is just a front for my husband's tax evasion and... dealings that have to kept underground.
我那点垃圾音乐，怎么可能会有歌迷？这种事…呵呵，我还是有自知之明的～
There's no way I'd get any fans for my music — it's garbage! Haha, I know where I stand.
如果这一切…最终都会幻灭……
If all of this... is meant to come to an end...
其实在你搭话之前，我老早就注意到你了。
I had noticed you long before you came over to chat.
我感觉你和空艇上的人都不一样——你给我一种疏离感…就好像我站在你面前，但是我们之间却隔着一层玻璃。
You feel different from everyone else here on the airship — there's a sense of detachment about you, as if there's a glass pane separating us, even when we're talking face to face.
我能明白你的感受…因为我和你都是外来者，没办法融入进去……
I understand how you feel. We're both outsiders here, struggling to find our footing...
有时候我在想…就算我的裙装和这里的装潢一样奢华，可灯光熄灭之后，还会有人认得我记得我吗？我好害怕有一天，所有光环都会消退，只留下我…却被时间和所有人抛弃。

Sometimes I wonder, even if my outfit fits right in with all these luxurious decor, will anyone remember me after the lights go out? I'm scared to imagine the day I no longer enjoy the glitz and glamour, when I'm just the bare me... forgotten by time and everyone else.
You're afraid of losing your popularity, aren't you?
All dreams, however sweet, have to end at some point.
你说得对，一针见血。名声也好，所谓的上流社会也好，本质上只是一场幻梦…我在这里待久了，真的会被聚光灯耀眼的光芒迷惑……
You're astute. Be it fame or this idea of high society, they're nothing but a fleeting dream. A dream I've been caught up for so long in that even the spotlights begin to bedazzle me...
以至于…忘记了我来这里的真正目的。谢谢你，是你让我回想起了我的…初心。
So much so that I've lost sight of my real purpose here. Thanks for helping me remember who I really am.
呵呵…别看我没有黑眼圈，那都是遮瑕的功劳。其实…我每天晚上都在失眠。
You wouldn't believe it, but under all of this makeup are some serious dark circles. Truth is, I haven't been sleeping well lately.
我总是翻来覆去地想…这一切真的值得吗？为了足够安享晚年的钱，要跟小丑一样在这么多名流面前装疯卖傻…表面上我还是明星，可实际上大家都把我当成笑料吧？

Night after night, I'm haunted by the question: Is this really worth it? For the sake of a plush retirement, I play the mad clown for these bigwigs. I'm pretty sure they see me as a joke instead of the celebrity they call me.
还有托马斯…说是开音乐公司是为了捧我，可从装修到制作音乐的钱，每一笔款项都有问题…在他入狱之前，我真的能保全自己无罪脱身吗？
Then there's Thomas. He says the music studio is for my career, but every payment, from renovations to production, is rigged. Can I clear myself of the implications before he lands in jail?
有时候我在想，要是能回到五年前就好了…回到还在快餐店打工的时候…只要每个月准时发薪，我就会知足……
Sometimes, I wish I could go back five years to when I worked in fast food... A regular paycheck was enough happiness for me...
我最讨厌那种自以为是的所谓「名流」了，呸！
I can't stand those pretentious, so-called elites, ugh!
你知道吗？有些人真以为我是个愚蠢的花瓶，甚至有人想着法儿羞辱我，说我拜金……
Believe it or not, but some people think I'm actually a dumb trophy wife! They constantly try to belittle me, calling me a gold digger...
可笑！荒唐！丑陋！居然真有人以为自己生来就是高贵的大人物…抱着他们那一套愚蠢的身世论入土去吧！
It's just stupid, absurd even! I can't believe some folks actually think they're born above everyone else! That silly idea of being superior by birth should just be laid to rest with them!
现在的时代，讲究的是流量为王！哼！我不过是配合托马斯演两下，真把我当没脑子的蠢货了？
These days, popularity is everything! Hmph! I'm just doing my performance for Thomas, and they have the nerve to think I'm a simpleton?
等我把托马斯的钱搞到手，我就要让他们知道…轻视我艾丽卡，就是他们此生犯过最大的错！
Just wait until I get Thomas's money! I'll have them learn that underestimating me, Erica, will be the gravest error they've ever made!
哈，我真是越活越有出息了！
Ha, my life's on the upswing with each passing day!
你可能想象不到，在五年前，我还只是个在便利店里打工的服务员。五年后，我竟然能来到「{TEXTJOIN#87}」上，和众多名流贵客举杯相谈！
You'll never guess this, but five years ago, I was just a convenience store clerk. Fast-forward to today, I'm aboard {TEXTJOIN#87}, mingling with social elites!
当然啦，外人看我，就只能看到我在社交活动上光彩照人的模样，还有我在娱乐新闻上的各种劲爆头条…他们哪里知道我为了上头条，事先要排演多久那些傻事。

Of course, people only notice my glamorous appearances at social events and the mad buzz I create in the news... They're clueless about the rehearsals I have to do for these absurd moments, just so I can get on the headlines.
我才不怕被骂，只有有人还在关注我，那就意味着我还有钱赚…所以说，像我这样聪明漂亮脸皮又厚的女人…活该我赚得盆满钵满，哈哈哈！

I'm not bothered by the name-calling, because if I've still got followers, that means there's money to be made... So, being the smart, gorgeous, and shameless woman that I am, it only makes sense that I'm rolling in dough, hahaha!
Who's Thomas? Is he a big deal?
托马斯是我丈夫，我们才结婚没多久。他在星际和平公司工作，经常能和一些大人物碰面，时常要负责一些…重要项目～
Thomas is my husband, and we just got married. He works at the Interastral Peace Corporation, mixing it up all the time with some high-flyers and leading a few... "important" projects.
我听他口气，连什么「托帕总监」他都认识，多少算是有点人脉吧～
It sounds like he even knows "Director Topaz" personally. I guess he's pretty well-connected.
托马斯年纪虽然比我大一些，但能娶到我这种级别的明星，他自己当然也得有点硬实力。
Thomas is a little older than me, but to land someone of my fame, he definitely holds his own.
谈谈你在空艇上的见闻呗…
Tell me about your time on the airship...
这艘空艇？简直是我的第二个家！顶级派对，各路名流，应有尽有——你永远不知道会在下一个转角遇见什么级别的大人物！

The airship? Oh, it's practically my second home! Think top-tier parties, everything you need at your fingertips, and elites from every field imaginable. You never know which bigshots you'll bump into around the corner!
不过呢，他们都将拜倒在我的美貌与名气下。真是拿他们没办法…谁让我生来就是该活在镁光灯下的呢～
But they all fawn over my beauty or fame. What can I say? I am simply destined to live under the spotlight!
你和知更鸟比，谁更有名？
Who's more famous, you or Robin?
我承认，还是知更鸟小姐更出名。我唱的都是电子舞曲，上的节目都是真人秀…我们领域不同，没什么可比较的，反正都很有名就是了。

I'll admit, Miss Robin is more famous than I am. My niche singing is electronic dance music and all the appearances I make are in reality shows... so it doesn't make much sense to compare us, who work in different fields. We're both famous in our own ways.
哎呀呀，你又不是小孩子，就别搞什么「人气排行榜」那一套了。名气这种东西，能拿来变现才是最重要的～
Oh, come on, are you a kid? Quit making this into a popularity contest. What really matters is using your fame to make money!
I don't have any more questions.
好了，亲爱的，我们就先聊到这儿吧。
It was great chatting with you, sweetie.
你瞧我这件怎么样？我身上这件可是限量版，羡慕吧～
How do you like my dress? It's a limited edition piece. Jealous?
好了，不逗你了，我们回头再聊。姐姐我要去参加下一场派对了，看我这身限量版…哼哼，不把其他住客迷死！
Haha, enough teasing. Catch you later! I've got another party to hit. Heh, all the other guests are totally going to go gaga over my limited-edition gown!
I don't have any more questions.
你瞧我这件怎么样？我身上这件可是限量版，羡慕吧～
How do you like my dress? It's a limited edition piece. Jealous?
好了，不逗你了，我们回头再聊。姐姐我要去参加下一场派对了，看我这身限量版…哼哼，不把其他住客迷死！
Haha, enough teasing. Catch you later! I've got another party to hit. Heh, all the other guests are totally going to go gaga over my limited-edition gown!
咦，新面孔？很高兴认识你，我叫萨曼莎。呃…你是找我谈生意的话，无任欢迎，交朋友的话…那还是免谈吧。
Oh, a new face? Hi, I'm Samantha. Um... if you want to talk business, I'm all ears. But if it's friendship you're after, I'm afraid that's not on my agenda.
呵呵…我在这里是为了寻找能够改变游戏规则的商业机会，不是来交朋友的。
Haha, I'm on the hunt for game-changing business deals, not friendships.
Not even a bit of chitchat?

Do you talk about anything else other than work?
有。但很抱歉，我可不是来匹诺康尼度假的。
I do, but sorry to disappoint, pal. I did not come to Penacony for a vacation.
时间就是金钱。但如果你愿意无偿捐赠我一笔钱，我也可以当场度假。
Time is money. Of course, if you're willing to unconditionally offer me a sum of money, I can switch right into vacation mode.
干我们这行，如果你不能保持冷静，那你就已经输了。
In our line of work, you lose the moment you fail to keep your cool.
要记住，不动声色才是在法庭上取胜的王道——就像我现在这样。
Remember, maintaining your composure — like the way I'm behaving now — is the golden rule to winning in court.
我的老朋友曾经这么评价过我：「麦吉尔，你在法庭上就像是只猫，总是灵活又冷静。」这就是猫科动物为什么杀伤力如此之大。
An old friend once said this about me, "McGill, you're so calm and quick on your feet in court, almost like the human embodiment of a cat." This is also why felines are so deadly, by the way.
我接过的案子比你吃过的面包还多——我的对手也是。从法律界的巨鲨到街头混混…当全世界都在对你喊打喊杀时，保持冷静就变成了一门技艺。

I've taken on more cases than all the shoelaces you've tied, and so have my opponents. From the bigwigs of the legal profession to the street thugs... Basically, when the whole world calls for your death, remaining calm becomes an art.
所幸，我的技艺出神入化…所以我总能在最关键时刻找到出路。
Fortunately, I'm already a master of the art... That's how I always manage to find a way out at the most critical juncture.
呵…很多人都对律师抱有偏见，认为我们是冷血动物。
Hmph, many people out there hold a prejudiced view about lawyers, considering us to be cold-blooded animals.
有时候，你明知道当事人并不清白，但你还是得给对方当狗。我刚参加工作的时候就常常在想…世界上真的有所谓的正义吗？

There are times when your client is obviously guilty, but you're still required to go all out to represent and defend them. When I first started my job, I couldn't stop asking myself if justice truly exists in this world.
后来，我告诫自己，工作的事归工作，不要太投入。不然我不去工作，事务所上下这么多人，我的家人，谁来养活呢？

Later on, I made it a point to compartmentalize my work and to never get overly invested in it. What else could I do? If I were to stop working, who's going to pay the employees at the law firm? How's my family going to survive?
可惜…说归说，但做不做得到又是另外一回事了。当你看到客户的眼泪时，你就会明白…在我们漫长的人生里，有许多思想斗争其实根本没必要。

Sadly, talk is cheap. Actually practicing it is a whole other business. When clients come to you in tears, you realize that most of the ideological struggles you spent all your life being conflicted over are in fact meaningless.
那些家伙脑子里是不是进了水…？！
Are those guys soft in the head!?
你知道吗？这个世界上最恶心的事，并不是有罪的人逍遥法外——而是看到自己的客户畏手畏脚，活得像个受气包！
You know what? The worst feeling in the world isn't watching criminals get off scot-free, but seeing your client living their life gripped by fear, becoming no different from a doormat!
所以，我一直以来都会告诫自己的每一位客户，要准备好面对一切后果，更别怕脏了自己的手。哎，只可惜…并不是所有人都能听得进去。
That's why I've always been reminding my clients to be prepared for any consequence, even if it means having to get their hands dirty. *sigh* It's a pity my advice doesn't sit well with everyone.
碰到这种客户，我就感觉自己像是跟整个世界为敌——想想吧，连你的客户都不信任你该有多伤士气！
With such clients, it's as though I'm fighting against the world. What if it were you? Can you imagine how demoralizing it is when your own client refuses to trust you?
人活得这么憋屈就算了，到开庭的时候、为自己争取权益的时候也这么憋屈…那还找我当律师干嘛？！真是搞不懂！

I have no say if they're fine with living an oppressed life, but when they let everyone walk all over them in court — a place where they can fight for their own rights... Is there even a point in hiring me!? I can never get what they're thinking!
哈哈，匹诺康尼这个地方真是有趣…遍地是宝藏。
Haha, Penacony's an interesting place indeed... There's valuable information everywhere I go.
本以为只是个普通出差，没想到能遇到这么有趣的事。匹诺康尼这地方，还有这艘空艇，没想到背后藏了这么多复杂的秘密…哈哈，还好我心细。

I thought this was nothing more than an unremarkable work trip. Who would've expected to learn something so interesting? But for Penacony and this airship to be hiding such intricate secrets... Haha, I guess it's a good thing I'm meticulous.
我喜欢这种消耗脑力的活儿。根据我手头上的信息，无论谈判成功与否，我都能为自己留一手。
I enjoy intellectual challenges like this. With the information I have at hand, I'll be able to emerge unscathed no matter how the negotiation turns out.
Can you divulge a thing or two?
别想套我话，我可不想惹上什么麻烦。
Don't try to trick me into revealing anything. I don't want to get into trouble.
Aren't you worried about the IPC getting back at you?
只要我嘴巴够严，我不说，又有谁知道我知道呢？
As long as I keep my lips sealed, who's going to know what I know?
别误会，我不是想威胁公司。我只是喜欢这种仿佛在牌局里看清别人手牌的感觉。
Don't misunderstand me. I'm not trying to blackmail the IPC. I just enjoy the revelation I get when I discover what tricks people have up their sleeves.
这让我想起了我为什么会选择当律师——在复杂的世界中找到真相，然后利用这些真相为自己和客户赢得优势，这不是很有趣吗？
This reminds me of why I decided to become a lawyer: To seek out the truths in this complicated world, and use them to me and my client's advantage. Do you find that fun too?
最开始，我只是想更好地为我的重要客户服务，所以得了解这地方的所有细节。
Right at the start, I only dug into the details of this place so that I can better serve my VIP clients.
但和其他星球没什么不同…在所有光鲜亮丽的表面下，都有它的阴暗面，匹诺康尼也不例外。
Just as how the other planets have a dark side beneath their welcoming and dazzling appearance, the same holds true for Penacony.
而当我揭开这层面纱时…那种满足感，简直像亲手从地里掘出了金子。
And when I lift this veil, I get a sense of satisfaction no less than digging up gold from the ground myself.
哈哈，我从来不认为自己是个英雄，也不是什么恶棍。我只是一个律师，一个擅长收集一切有利信息的律师——未雨绸缪是我的职责。
Haha, I've never thought of myself as a hero, nor a villain. I'm just a lawyer, one who's honed a craft in gathering useful information. After all, it is my duty to be ahead of the game.
What case are you working on?
我只能说，我来这儿是提供一些法律咨询服务的，除此以外的内容…我很抱歉，基于「公司」的保密原则，恕我不能透露。
I can only say that I'm here to provide legal advice. I'm bound by the IPC's confidentiality agreement, so I'm afraid I can't tell you anything more.
能跟我介绍下你的业务吗？
Can you tell me a little about your work?
我的业务？你可以去打听打听，无论是什么类型的案件，从逃税罚单到重罪辩护，没有我接不了的案子。
My work? You can try asking around, I guess. No matter the case, be it tax evasion or felony defense, there isn't one that I won't take up.
但我最擅长的，是那种看起来无解的案子——其他律师一看就头疼的那种。对我来说，挑战越大，越能证明我的价值。
My expertise, though, lies in cases that seem hopeless. These are cases that other lawyers find torturous, but to me, the greater the challenge, the stronger the testament to my abilities.
Are you famous in the legal profession?
噢，你可能在我的同行口中听说过我的名字。我姑且算是这一行的「老油条」了吧，哈哈。
Oh, you might have heard of me from the other lawyers. I guess I can be considered a seasoned veteran in this field, haha.
各种千奇百怪的案子我都接过，而我每一次都能让客户满意。当然…这就是为什么我的咨询费比其他同行高出一大截。
I've taken on all sorts of strange cases and every single time, my clients walk away satisfied. Of course, this explains why my consultation fees are a lot higher than other fellow lawyers.
你对匹诺康尼感觉如何？
很有趣的问题。匹诺康尼有一种独特的魅力，但所有美丽的东西都有自己的阴暗面。权力斗争，美梦背后的秘密…「暗流涌动」应该是最能概括匹诺康尼的词了。

Interesting question. Well, Penacony has a unique charm, but all things glamorous are known to have a dark side. Power struggles and secrets behind sweet dreams... Perhaps "surging undercurrents" is the term that can best describe Penacony.
对于这次「出差」，虽然我不能跟你透露工作细节，但我可以告诉你，这是一次相当有趣的经历。只能说，在我看来，未来的匹诺康尼…商机无限！

I may not be able to share details of my work trip this time, but I can tell you that it was a rather interesting experience. Let me put it this way, Penacony will soon welcome never-ending business opportunities, at least the way I see it.
I don't have any more questions.
抱歉，我还有些法律事务要处理，我们下次再聊。
Excuse me, but I have some legal matters to see to. Let's talk again sometime.
I don't have any more questions.
抱歉，我还有些法律事务要处理，我们下次再聊。

你注意到你的画像出现在广告牌上，你被它广告词的厚颜无耻所震惊。
You notice your portrait on the billboard and are shocked by the shamelessness of the advertising slogan.
察觉到你的目光一直停留在它身上，它看了看你，视线在扫过你的五官时因为过于激动，竟差点宕机。
Noticing that your gaze has been fixed on it, it looks at you and scans your face before nearly crashing in excitement.
现在你和与它大眼瞪小眼地沉默着，十分滑稽。你决心说点什么，打破这份尴尬的死寂。
You stare at each other in silence, leading to comical absurdity. You decide to say something to break apart this awkward silence.
Why do you look just like me?
Why do you look just like me?

What a good dog. Well-behaved beings with pure minds are a dying breed.
船长周边，限量发售，先到先得！
Captain's merchandise available for a limited time! First come, first served!
欢迎光临…咦？你是…新任船长？船长好！
Welcome... Eh? You're the... new captain? Hi, captain!
这个是咱们这儿的老传统啦，我这小店里除了零食，还卖船长的周边商品，可抢手啦。
It's a tradition we've had since forever here. Other than snacks, our store also sells the captain's merchandise — these are selling like hot cakes.
How can you tell I'm the captain?
您真幽默，要是我连船长都认不出来，我还卖什么船长周边啊。
Oh, you're a humorous one! I sell the captain's merchandise, you know? How can I not recognize you?
船长您来得正好，供应商刚刚送了一批新货过来，都是照足您的模样定制的小玩意。
Oh, captain! Just in time. Our supplier just delivered a new batch of goods, little knick-knacks designed after you.
虽说目前还处于预售阶段，但顾客们实在太热情，把未来一整年的出货量都给包圆了。真是拿他们没办法…您瞧，就是这款——

Well, they're still in the pre-sale phase, but the customers are so excited about them that they've ordered one whole year's worth of merchandise. They really know how to surprise me, huh? Look, this is what they ordered—
这是…照着我的模样做的？
是的，说是能凸显您风趣幽默的特点，又保留您特有的纯真感。
That's right. The design is supposed to dramatize your humorous nature, while retaining the special innocence about you.
...I don't think anyone checked in with me about this.
啊？不会吧？我记得苜蓿草那边是有和星穹列车交接的啊。我们这边是确认拿到了星穹列车方的同意才启动的。
Huh? Really? I know the Alfalfa was in liaison with the Astral Express. We even waited for the Astral Express to green-light it before going into production.
…啊，我知道了，会不会是您贵人多忘事。先前交接的手续比较多，可能忘了……
...Ah, maybe you've been so busy that you forgot all about it? Yeah, there was a ton of things in the handover, so that's likely the case...

We saved a set for you as a celebratory gift for your appointment as captain.
还有就是，我悄悄跟您说，麻烦您别声张——这套周边太抢手啦，我怕别的顾客听了不高兴——我给您留了一大箱，您可以敞开来买，不限量，价格的话就内部拿货价算。

只是个工作用的称呼而已，你不必在意。

They are goods themed around the presiding captain. Examples include 3D puzzles designed after the captain's appearance, captain's autographs, captain's half-body keychains, dolls, and other knick-knacks.

如果船长您还有什么需要…我就在这儿值班，随时喊我就好！

好的，您忙您的去吧，不用管我！

深呼吸…吸气…吐气…不愧是我，果然冷静点了，手都不抖了。
Deep breaths... Breathe in, and out... Good job, me! I've calmed down a little already. Even my hands have stopped shaking.
不得不说船长{F#她}{M#他}本人比玩偶更可爱…不知道能不能要个签名，有亲签的话这算不算全匹诺康尼最珍稀的限量款？。

Wow, captain does look much cuter IRL than {F#her}{M#his} doll... I wonder if I can get an autograph. Would it be the most priceless limited-edition merchandise in the whole of Penacony if captain signs it {F#herself}{M#himself}?
…啊，船长是在看我吗？该不会以为我在摸鱼吧？
...Eep, is captain looking at me? Does it look like I'm slacking off!?
…吸气…吐气…冷静点，现在是上班时间…微笑，清嗓子…好，我果然受过专业训练的优秀售货员！
...Breathe in, and out... Calm down, I'm at work now. *smile* Ahem. Alright, I'm a professionally-trained and outstanding salesperson!
不知道他们处理这单顾客投诉要多久…啊，我的好评率又掉了…我这个月的工资……
I wonder how long they'll take to process this complaint...? Oh no, my rating has fallen again! So will my salary this month...
哎，都怪我做事拖拉，一直没处理掉，这下可踢到铁板了……
*sigh* It's all because of my procrastination! I should've done it and got it out of the way. I've really gone and shot myself in the foot now...
被顾客当面喷了个狗血淋头…太丢人了，时间要是能倒流就好了，我真想回到那一瞬间给自己一巴掌……
How mortifying, I got chewed out by a customer... If I could turn back time, I won't hesitate to slap myself awake at that exact moment!
…要是流程走到人力部门那边，他们会不会开除我？呜呜…我家里还指望我补贴下生活费呢…这下怎么办呐……
...Will HR fire me if this reaches them? *sob* My family's expecting me to help out with our living expenses... What do I do now?
Let the captain take your worries away.
那个…船长，我、我之前在工作上有些疏漏，没有及时处理之前的周边，导致客人原定的零食礼盒发错货了…发成了前任船长的周边。
Umm... captain, I—I failed to sort out the previous batch of merchandise in time because I was negligent. A customer received the previous captain's merchandise instead of the snack box they ordered.
顾客气炸了，就去投诉我发的货不对板，要求十倍赔偿…呜呜…您能不能跟人力那边说一声，千万别开除我，我会改的，我保证以后绝不再犯。

The customer blew up in rage and lodged a complaint against me for sending them things they did not order, demanding a tenfold compensation... *sob* D—Do you think you could ask HR not to fire me? I promise this will never ever happen again.
...It sounds like he's trying to blackmail you.
It's only a small issue. You won't be fired.
谢谢船长！您这么说我就放心了！我会努力工作的，船长你真是个好人…呜呜……
Thank you, captain! It's a relief to hear that! I'll continue to work hard. Captain, you're such a nice person... *sob*
贩售船长周边是我们的传统，我的初衷只是想留住一些关于船长的美好回忆，没有想到会造成这样的误会……
Selling the captain's merchandise is our tradition. I only wanted to leave something to remember our last captain by. I didn't think it would cause so much trouble...
也怪我，我早该改改自己的拖延症了……
It's my fault too. I should've kept my procrastination in check before this...
搞成这个局面真的很抱歉…如果时间能倒流就好了……
I'm really sorry for causing so much trouble... If only I could turn back time...
…但现在光这么说也没用，只能以后表现得好一些，吃一堑当长一智吧，大副说得对，还是要照流程行事才行。

...All this talk of regret wouldn't change a thing anyway. I'll just have to work harder to make up for it. This is a lesson to learn from. The first mate is right, following proper procedures is the way to go.
我只是个小小的售货员！
有些住客总是对我们的小店抱有不切实际的期待，这又不是艇上包间的餐厅，有大厨给你现做！说什么「卖得贵」，真的服了！

Why do some guests have such terribly unrealistic expectations of our store!? We're not a restaurant serving private cabins of the airship, nor do we have a chef to serve meals cooked-to-order! I can't believe they're actually complaining that our prices are high!
还说什么「天价周边」「不实用」…这可是空艇诶？运输成本不要钱吗？买周边什么时候要考虑实用了，这不都是纪念品吗？！

They find our merchandise overpriced and impractical... But hello? We're on an airship! Do they think shipping is free!? And when has practicality ever been a consideration when purchasing collectibles? Aren't they meant to be souvenirs!?
而且我只是个小小的零食工！跟我抱怨有用的话，我还会在这里当售货员吗？！
Plus, I'm just a lowly Snack Vendor! If complaining to me worked, would I still be working as a salesperson here!?
哎，这些住客看着都是非富即贵的，怎么买点东西都这么小家子气，真是一帮难伺候的主儿……
*sigh* These guests are either rich or filthy rich. Who would've expected them to turn into stingy misers when shopping! What a difficult bunch of customers...
能来空艇上工作是我的荣幸！
It's my honor to work on the airship!
虽然住客们很挑剔，但能在这儿工作，每天见到各种大人物，我还是挺幸运的！嘿嘿！
The customers may be demanding, but I get to meet all kinds of bigwigs at work every day. Heh, I guess I'm lucky to be able to work here!
说起来，现在换了新船长，空艇也要换名字吧？「晖长石号」要作废咯…不知道船长您会取个什么样的名字呢？
Actually, now that we have a new captain, are we going to rename the airship? Looks like Radiant Feldspar's going to be a thing of the past... What will the captain name it, though?
听说还要更换涂装什么的，这种事千古难寻，怎么都被我碰上了？
I heard they're also going to repaint the airship. Just my luck to be around when they have plans for such rare works.
未来还长着呢，我看您模样还挺年轻的，年纪轻轻的就事业有成，颜值又高，总感觉船长您以后会成为了不得的大人物……

Ah, you've got a long future ahead of you, and you look pretty young too. With impressive accomplishments at a young age and good looks to boot, I can't help but believe that you'll become someone legendary in the future, captain...
如果我能一直跟在您身边，给您打工…搞不好以后会被我遇到那种「见证历史的时刻」。四舍五入也算历史留名了吧？光是想想就让人兴奋！

If I'm lucky enough to continue working for you... I may even get the chance to witness a historic moment when it happens. I would've made my mark in history too, wouldn't I? Ooh, the thought alone is enough to excite me!
到了那个时候，我要告诉我的小孩：「看，妈妈在历史书上还留下过几笔呢！」
By that time, I'll tell my children, "Look, you can even find traces of mom in the history books!"
…老实说我是为了生计才到这里调饮…如果口感不佳，还请见谅……
...To be honest, I'm only concocting drinks to make ends meet. Please forgive me if it doesn't taste good...
上班时间说这个不妥吧…
Should you really be saying this at work...?
真的很抱歉。我刚学调饮没多久，怕技艺不熟练，给客人调饮时出错，所以提前练习一下道歉的话术。
I'm really sorry. I just got into drinksmithing and I doubt I'm good enough yet... I'm rehearsing my apologies in case I slip up and serve badly mixed drinks to the customers...
刚才没注意你在旁边，我是不是念得太大声吵到你了，抱歉抱歉，以后我会注意点的……
I didn't notice you were here. Was I too loud? I'm sorry, I'll pay more attention next time...
我学调饮学了半年，师傅说我可以出师了，我想我的技术其实也没那么糟糕的。虽然学的时间比较短，但我多少有些基础……
I've trained for half a year before my mentor said I'm ready to work on my own. I guess I can craft drinks? I may not have trained for long, but I do know the basics...
我原本在一个乐队里弹贝斯，手上那点花活对我来说不算什么。就是…我从没来过这种高档地方，更别说工作了…难免有些紧张。
I used to be the bassist of a band, so it's no sweat entertaining them. It's just... I've never been anywhere this boujee, much less worked at one. I can't help getting the jitters.
跟我介绍下你的乐队吧。
没啥好说的，乐队没有人气，作品也卖不出去。队友都是穷哥们，吃饭都是有一顿没一顿的。
There's nothing much to talk about, really. Our band isn't popular, nor does our music sell. Everyone in the band's so strapped for cash that they had to stretch out their meals.
搞音乐不赚钱啊，连吃饭的钱都没有……
Music wasn't making me any money. I wouldn't have survived otherwise...
这些年来，我的音乐事业没有任何发展，出碟录音样样都要花钱，还不如来这里调饮。
My music wasn't going anywhere those years, and you had to put in money to release albums, record tracks, and whatnot. Surely I'm better off here mixing drinks.
咳咳…现在是营业时间，我们还是聊点别的吧。那、那个！调饮师达夫竭诚为您服务！
Ahem, maybe we should talk about something else. I'm getting paid for this, after all... Uh, h—how are you doing? Drinksmith Dahf's at your service!
What have you got for sale here?
好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.
尽管问吧，我眼下还算有空，想要随便聊聊的无任欢迎——不过说归说，你可别去投诉我……
Ask away. I'm free at the moment, so I'm all ears if you wanna chat — as long as you don't tattle on me...
能给我说说你的故事吗？
So, tell me about your story?
故事？我没什么故事啊，我就是个普通…呃，一个小乐队的贝斯手。乐队也没什么人气，作品也一般，赚不到钱，所以我就出来找工作了。
Story? I ain't got no story. I'm just an average... uh, bassist of a small band. A nobody band with mediocre music that wasn't making any money. That's why I left for another job.
以前倒是来应聘过「晖长石号」的表演乐手，结果连简历都没过。后来遇到一位老师，说我手指灵活有力适合调饮…接着我就来空艇上干活了。

I previously applied to be a musician on the Radiant Feldspar, but they didn't even take a second glance at my resume. Then I met someone who found my hands dexterous enough to craft drinks... so here I am, working on the airship.
你对现在的工作不满意吗？
Are you unhappy with your current job?
嗯？你这说话的语气怎么这么像我老板？
Hmm? Why do you sound like my boss all of a sudden?
我不是不满意，只是觉得有点无语——我以前想来空艇上当乐师驻场表演，结果现在成了调饮师……
Well, I'm not exactly unhappy. I guess I just don't know what to feel... I mean, look, I wanted to be the airship's resident musician, but I ended up as a drinksmith here...
Have you thought of going into a new job?
那倒没有。其实调饮让我发现了一种新的艺术形式，我对节奏的感觉和手指的灵活性，在调饮时得到了新的应用。这或许是音乐给我的另一种礼物。但是……

That, I haven't. You know, I realize mixing drinks is a whole new way of looking at art. My sense of rhythm and dexterous fingers come together differently when crafting drinks. Maybe this is music's blessing for me, but...
但是我们乐队的吉他手说：「你摇冰块的声音比你的琴音响得多。」哎，差点把我气到昏迷。可现在我想通了，成年人为了谋生拉下脸很正常，这些闲言碎语算什么。

But when our guitarist said my cocktail shakers resound a lot better than my bass... Boy, I almost went into a stroke. *sigh* I've thought it through now. Pride doesn't pay the bills, so what's a little mindless when I'm earning my keep.
I don't have any more questions.
好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.
我想明白了，到我这个年纪，没天赋没钱的就别捣鼓音乐了，还是趁早转行吧。
I've figured it out. At my age, being penniless and with no talent to boot, a path in music probably isn't meant to be. I'm better off jumping ship early.
I don't have any more questions.
好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.
达夫摇晃杯身的动作流畅而自然，以至于让周遭的喧嚣都变得遥远。
Dahf moves effortlessly with his shaker, as though part of an orchestrated dance, making everything else in the surrounding fade into oblivion.
我是个靠手吃饭的手艺人——字面意义。
I make a living with my own hands — I mean that literally.
弹琴的那点手艺没有让我变成大明星，却让我成为了调饮师，给了我一份稳定的工作。
The skill I honed from playing the bass didn't turn me into a superstar, but instead, landed me a stable job as a drinksmith.
或许不是每个人都能理解，但我觉得或许这就是成年人的自我和解吧。打工也没什么不好的，至少我不会再为生活费发愁了。
Some may disagree, but I guess this is just coming to terms with adult life. There's nothing bad about having a job, at least I never have to worry about making ends meet anymore.
你见达夫突然放下手中的搅拌杆，长长地叹了口气，眉间似乎有些阴郁。
Dahf abruptly releases his grip over the stirrer and you see him let out a long sigh, his expression turning somewhat gloomy.
…感觉我活得真窝囊，人到中年，一事无成……
...I feel like an utter loser in life. I've lived half of my life without accomplishing anything...
其实我几年前已经有预感，我这辈子就会这么蹉跎下去。搞乐队十几年了，我自己的作曲能力怎么样我是再清楚不过了……
To be honest, I already had a hunch several years back. I knew I'd continue wasting my life away. I've played in a band for over a decade, I know full well how my compositions fare...
「没天分就别学人玩音乐！」哎，那个乐评人说得真对……
"Don't jump onto the music bandwagon when you obviously lack the talent!" *sigh* That music critic was bang on...
家里人也天天骂我，这些年来我连个礼物钱都出不起，时不时还要靠父母打钱周转…如果我早点转行，我是不是就会拥有一个相对成功的人生了？

My family berated me plenty, too. I couldn't even afford to get them gifts for years, and I—I even had to ask them for living allowance every now and then... Would I have led a better life if I went into a new job sooner?
It's all my fault... Why was I so stubborn...?
你可以工作生活两不误啊。
But you can work and pursue your interests.
只要你想，什么时候都不算晚。
It's never too late as long as you put your mind to it.
其实我心里也清楚，刚玩乐队的那一年…是我人生中最快乐的一年。
Deep down, I know that too. I was the happiest during my first year in the band.
…就这么抛弃过去的自己，我…我还是舍不得……
I—I can't bring myself to close the chapter on my past just like that...
…算起来，玩音乐整整十年了，坚持了这么久真的要放弃吗？艾克索说得对，把速弹的臂力浪费在摇晃水杯上，真是浪费。

...Thinking back now, I've already been making music for a good ten years. Should I really be giving up on it after holding out this far? Axel's right, it's a complete waste busting my guns on these shakers instead of shredding the bass.
如果这样的生活继续下去，我还有空弹贝斯吗？如果继续这样，我会不会有天连怎么弹琴都忘了？这里也没有练习的地方，员工休息区虽大，却容不下我的箱头和箱体。

Will I even get the time to play the bass if I keep up with this job? Will I forget how to play the bass one day? There's no place for me to practice here. The staff lounge may be spacious, but it's not meant for my amp head and cab.
…孤独的人在音乐里逃避现实，那我算不算在现实里逃避梦想呢？
...People turn to music to drown out solitude from the real world. So, am I escaping my dreams to go back to reality?
生活不应该是这样的…我小时候可没想过会有这么一天，长大了就变成工作的奴隶，怎么想都觉得可悲……
My life shouldn't play out this way... Even as a child, I never ever imagined growing up to become a slave to my job. This is pathetic, through and through...
...I've had enough! Why do the orders keep coming!?
制冰机又坏了，这一地的水，调完这一杯还要拖地…我到底是调饮师还是清洁工？
It's flooding in here because the ice machine's down again. Now I have to mop the floor after crafting this drink... Am I really a drinksmith? Or a cleaner?
天天站在这里脚都麻了，手指泡在水里皮都皱了，又冷又痛，还要天天笑脸相迎。我到底是做错了什么要天天来上刑？

My feet's numb from standing all day and my fingers get wrinkly from being in contact with water. But hey, I'm supposed to ignore the cold and pain, and greet everyone with a smile on my face. What have I done, really, to be subjected to this torture called work?
…我本该站在舞台上发光发热的，现在却困在这里…上班就是上刑，我明白了…什么时候我才能被无罪释放啊？！
...I was meant to dazzle on stage, but here I am, trapped... I now know that having to work is punishment in itself. Gah, when can I be free from this misery!?
即使是繁忙的工作时间，达夫的脸上也总是挂着笑容。
Dahf always wears a smile on his face, no matter how busy his work gets.
调饮和弹琴差不多，都是手工活儿，他人在品尝后露出满足的表情就是最大的满足…都是对我指头灵活性与手臂稳定性的认可。

Mixing drinks and playing the bass are no different. I work the magic with my hands. What truly makes me happy is the glow of satisfaction on their faces after tasting my drinks... That's all the approval these dexterous digits of mine need.
上次那个来找我调饮的叫什么来着？…杰克？好像就是哪家唱片公司的老总？不知道找他签约分成能不能高点……
The guy that ordered a drink a while ago? What's his name? Jack? He seems to be the CEO of a record label. Will he give me a good cut if I sign with him...?
这样的生活也挺好的，包吃包住有工资还有小费，这样的工作上哪里找？
I quite enjoy this life now. I get a place to stay, free meals, a salary, and even tips to boot. Where else can I find such a good job?
The best life is indeed a simple and mundane one...
集中注意力，别让我发现你们中有人在偷懒！记住，在这艘空艇上，每个人都必须全力以赴，包括我在内！从现在起，我希望看到的是效率和纪律。
Stay focused, and don't let me catch any of you slacking off! Remember that everyone on this ship, including me, must give their all! From now on, I want you to show me efficiency and discipline.
把你的脚背绷紧点，注意队形！还有你的扣子怎么扣错了？这点小事都做不好？
Keep your insteps tight and pay attention to the formation! Why are your buttons wrong? Can't you even do something this simple?
记住，这里是旅游胜地，但我们不是游客！…呃，船长…您来啦？！
Remember, this may be a tourist destination, but we're not the tourists! ...Ah, captain! When did you arrive?
不用这么在意形象细节吧？
Is there a need to be so hung up over such minor grooming details?
对下属还是别太严苛了。
You don't have to be so harsh on your subordinates.
请您放心，我只是在训练的时候管得比较严，私底下我们关系还是挺好。
Don't worry. I'm only this strict during training. We actually get along well in private.
我之所以注重这些细节，是因为…形象工作是基础中的基础。一个团队要想被尊重，首先就要从外在形象做起。

I'm particular about such details because maintaining one's image is one of the most basic things to always be mindful of. If a team wants to be respected, they must start by working on how they present themselves.
所以我坚持为船员配备统一的制服并进行队形训练。这不仅能提升他们的专业形象，也能增强团队凝聚力。
That is why I insist on making the crew wear uniforms and practice standing in formation. This enhances their professional image and their cohesiveness as a team.
我刚才在培训新招的船员，没注意到您在后面，非常抱歉。请问您找我是有什么事吗？
My apologies, I was training some newly recruited crew members just now and didn't notice you behind me. Is there something I can do for you?
Nah. I was just taking a walk around the place.
I see. Please enjoy your walk, captain.
船长，如果您发现了我们服务中的不足，请随时告诉我。我们致力于为每一位宾客——包括您——提供最完美的体验。
If you notice anything about our service that needs improvement, please let me know anytime, captain. We're committed to providing the best experience for every guest, including you.
集中注意力，别让我发现你们中有人在偷懒！看到没，船长来了，大家要好好表现，否则…哼哼！
Stay focused, and don't let me catch any of you slacking off! Do you see that? The captain is here! Do your best, everyone! Or else... Hmph!
船长，您找我有什么事吗？
Captain, is there something I can do for you?
There's something I want to know...
向我汇报下你的工作计划。
Give me a report of your work plan.
我正在检查大家的工作细节，因为我认为每一个细节都可能影响整体的工作效率，这会直接影响我推进后续的工作。
I'm currently going over the details of everyone's work. All these details have the potential to influence our overall efficiency, which directly affects subsequent work progress.
如果一切顺利，接下来我将对空艇上的工作流程进行优化，确保每一项任务都能在最短时间内完成，同时保证质量。
If everything goes well, I'll start optimizing work processes on the airship to ensure every task is duly completed within the shortest time possible.
请您放心，我已经以住客的视角完整体验过空艇上的所有设施，所以我很清楚目前住客们的需求。
Rest assured that I've already experienced all the facilities on this airship from a guest's perspective, so I daresay I have an excellent understanding of their current needs.
对于住客们的反馈，我已经详细记录在案并一一分析过了。
I've already recorded their feedback in detail and analyzed it.
目前所有住客对我们的服务表示非常满意，尤其是对我们船员的专业度和服务态度给予了高度评价。但无论成绩有多好，肯定还有一些改进的空间。
All the guests are currently very satisfied with our service. In particular, they have nothing but praises for the crew's professionalism and service. Even so, there's always room for improvement.
I don't have any more questions.
说实话，感谢船长您对我的信任。相信您也看到了，目前空艇上的每一项运作都还有进步的空间，我会继续努力的！

If I may be honest, I'd like to thank you for showing such trust in me, Captain. As you may already be aware, there's still room for further enhancements for everything on this airship. I'll keep doing my best!
没什么事的话我就继续工作啦——诶，趁我和船长聊天，你们在干什么呢？想偷懒？你们不会犯那种愚蠢的错误，对吧？
If there's nothing else, I'll get back to work... Hey! What do you think you're doing while I'm reporting matters to the captain? Slacking off? You wouldn't do anything as silly as that, right?
我想给空艇更名并换涂装。
I want to rename the airship and change her livery.
好的，稍等，等我检查下预案——根据我们的预算，目前只支持原储备的三种方案。方案详情如下：
Okay, please wait a moment while I check the proposals. Hm, our current budget can only support three predetermined designs:
第一种是命名为「开拓之尾号」，尾翼配以星穹列车列车长帕姆模样的涂装。
The first is the Trailblaze's Stern. It features an insignia designed after Pom-Pom, the conductor of the Astral Express, on the tail of the airship.
第二种是命名为「塔塔洛夫号」，尾翼配以垃圾之王塔塔洛夫模样的涂装。
The second is The Tatalov. It features an insignia designed after Tatalov the Garbage King on the tail of the airship.
第三种是命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
The third is The Soaring Clock Hand. It features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.
好的，请你稍等，我就吩咐人去改。
Certainly. One moment, please. I'll have someone change it right this instant.
罗莎按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
Rosa sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.
如您所愿，已经更改成功了，如果您还想继续更换方案，随时喊我就好。
I've made the desired changes. Please let me know whenever you'd like to change the design again.
It's nothing. You can return to what you were doing.
很高兴见到您，船长。在这里，没有生物是完美的，我也不例外。但每一次航行都是一次成长的机会，我相信在您的带领下，我们会变得更好——我以能成为您的大副为荣。

Nice to meet you, Captain. You'll find that none of the lifeforms here are perfect, myself included. Nevertheless, every flight is an opportunity to grow. With you leading us, I'm sure we'll only keep improving and getting better. I'm honored to be your first mate.
船长～愿您与其他同伴都能在未来的航行中找到自己的价值和位置。
May you and your companions find self-worth and a place to belong to in future flights, Captain.
冷芯，这是你新招的人吗？
Caldwick, is this the person you just recruited?
是的，经过我的严格筛选，我将他从一家餐厅的后厨招了进来。尽管过往经验不匹配，但他的天赋很好，我相信他很快就会成为我们不可或缺的一员。

Yes, after a strict screening process, I recruited him from the kitchen of a restaurant. Although he doesn't have the required experience, he's a gifted one. I am certain he will soon become an indispensable member of our team.
谢谢夸奖，非常感谢大副您对我的栽培！
Thank you for the compliment! I am grateful for all the training you've given me!
嘿嘿～我只是说了我的心里话。大副鼓励我要发挥自己的特长，没事就勤说话。所以我都是心里想到什么就说什么，尽量不让嘴巴闲着。

Hehe, I'm just saying whatever comes to mind. The first mate always encourages me to show off my strengths and talk more when I have nothing to do. That's why I always say whatever comes to mind and try not to let my tongue be idle.
新招的这批船员，他们的过往经验与技能看起来和招聘需求并不匹配。但我认为，每个生物都有其独特的潜力与价值，通过传统的途径是无法衡量的。

While the professional experience and abilities of the newly recruited crew members don't seem to meet the hiring criteria, it is my belief that every living thing has their own unique potential and value. These things can't be measured through traditional means.
纵观空艇人员现况，我们缺的并不是技能如何娴熟的侍从，而是那些热心且更懂得珍惜机会的船员。
Looking at the current situation of the airship staff, what we lack isn't skilled attendants, but enthusiastic crew members who cherish the opportunities they are given.
What do you mean when you say they don't seem to meet the hiring criteria?
个人从业经历与专业技能，与「晖长石号」过往招聘船员的要求并不一致，甚至彼此矛盾。
It means that their professional experience and abilities don't match — or may even contradict — past requirements for recruiting crew members of the Radiant Feldspar.
世事洞明皆学问，我目前所掌握的也只是一些管理学知识的皮毛，离「深奥」这个层级还差得远呢。
To have insight into worldly affairs is to be truly learned. I only know the basics of management and am nowhere near having a deep understanding of it.
你正想与冷芯就他的人才管理知识继续探讨下去，但在你正要开口的瞬间，你却发现——
You want to keep discussing the art of talent management with Caldwick, but just as you are about to speak, you notice that...
先前那位新招的船员，在不知何时已悄然远退出对话，让渡出了整片空间供你们二人相谈。
The newly recruited crew member from before has quietly left the conversation at some point, leaving you two to chat in private.
你被他如此知趣的行为所震惊，不知道这究竟是这位新船员的自主行为，抑或是冷芯的教导成果。
You are astonished by their tact. Did they think of this themselves, or was it the result of Caldwick's mentorship?
船长，看您的表情，是有什么疑惑，请问吧，我很乐意为您解答。
Captain, your expression tells me that you have a question. Ask away, I'm more than happy to answer it.
很高兴见到您，船长。在这里，没有生物是完美的，我也不例外。
Nice to meet you, captain. You'll find that none of the lifeforms here are perfect, myself included.
目前新船员们的训练我还在不断改进，坚持下去，大家磨合好了，团队才会有更好的成长。

I'm still refining the training program for the new crew members. But once I see this through and after everyone gets the chance to know one another better, our team will be much better equipped to grow and strive for more.
当然，如果您还有别的事项想问，请问吧，我很乐意为您解答。
Of course, if there's anything else that you'd like to know, I'm more than happy to satisfy your curiosity.
There's something I want to know...
跟我讲解下你的管理理念吧？
Tell me about your management philosophy.
我采取的管理策略是基于每个生物的个体特点，定制个性化的成长计划。
The management strategy I've adopted involves customizing a personalized development plan based on the characteristics of each individual.
我与每位船员都深入地聊过，以了解他们的兴趣、特长以及梦想，然后根据这些信息为他们设计最合适的工作分工。
I've had deep conversations with every one of the crew members to learn their interests, strengths, and dreams. I use this information to create jobs that suit them to a T.
这种方法我认为虽然费时，但属于是磨刀不误砍柴工。船员们能发挥出自己最大的潜力，我们的团队服务质量便会水涨船高。

I do find this process time-consuming, but all the preparation will only help the task go more smoothly. If we can get our crew members to maximize their potential, the quality of service we render will follow with a parallel increase.
You're pretty nice to your crew, huh?
适当的自由与足够的理解，将最大可能地挖掘出他们的潜力。太过严苛的管理反而有损船长的声誉。
Giving them adequate freedom and ample understanding unlocks their highest potential. Micromanaging them, on the other hand, will only end up sullying the captain's reputation.
比如有位船员过去是在空艇的后厨工作，但总喜欢偷吃。经常被前任船长批评，久而久之，前任船长也有一些冷酷无情之类的负面评价。

We used to have a crew member back in the airship's kitchen. He was always sneaking bites of food, something the former captain constantly criticized him for. As time went by, the former captain became associated with negative labels like being cold and unfeeling.
在您任命我为大副之后，我注意到他极为注重细节，并且对食物品质有极高要求。因此我将他调往食材的供应链部门，他果然在那里大放异彩。

After you appointed me as first mate, I noticed this crew member's keen eye for detail and his tremendously high standards for food quality. For those reasons, I transferred him to work in the supply chain for ingredients, where he naturally became a star employee of the department.
船长，我们目前收到的都是正面评价。有住客特意写了表扬信，以此奖彰一位侍从教会他如何玩桌球，他认为我们的员工展现出了极高的专业性与真诚的关怀，这令他很受用。

We've received nothing but positive feedback so far, captain. A guest even wrote a letter of commendation for an attendant who introduced him to billiards. According to him, our staff displayed impeccable professionalism and showed genuine care and concern for guests, which made him feel important and valued throughout his stay.
不过，我也收到了一些员工们自发性的反馈，有船员指出了我们服务中的一些潜在改进空间。上述内容我已记录在册，之后会利用恰当的时机来逐步改进。

Some employees also came to me with feedback, though these mainly pointed out service aspects with room for improvement. All of these have been duly recorded and changes will be gradually rolled out at appropriate junctures.
I don't have any more questions.
我认为，一味地追求利益是不行的，所以我更注重对大家的人文关怀。可惜，很多人都不信任我这一套理念，认为智械不懂人类。

I am of the opinion that a blind pursuit of profits will never work out, which explains why I prefer a humanistic management. It's a shame many remain unconvinced by my philosophy, adamant that Intellitrons do not understand humans.
还好有船长您，谢谢您对我的信任。
It's a good thing you're not like them, captain. Thank you for placing your trust in me.
我想给空艇更名并换涂装。
I want to rename the airship and change her livery.
好的，目前我们有三套不同的储备方案，分别是：
Sure, we have three different designs to choose from:
命名为「开拓之尾号」，尾翼配以星穹列车列车长帕姆模样的涂装。
The Trailblaze's Stern features an insignia designed after Pom-Pom, the conductor of the Astral Express, on the tail of the airship.
命名为「塔塔洛夫号」，尾翼配以垃圾之王塔塔洛夫模样的涂装。
The Tatalov features an insignia designed after Tatalov the Garbage King on the tail of the airship.
以及…命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
And... The Soaring Clock Hand, which features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.
您想选用哪一套方案呢？
好的，请您稍等，我就吩咐人去改。
Certainly. One moment, please. I'll have someone change it right this instance.
冷芯按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
Caldwick sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.
如您所愿，方案布设成功。
Your design of choice has been applied.
I don't have any more questions.
船长您来了！孩子们都过来，跟船长问个好！
Captain, you're here! Children, come over and greet the captain!
好了，没你们的事了，你们继续待命，我和船长有话要说。
Alright, run along to your stations now. I have to speak to the captain about something.
船长，您找我是有什么事吗？
How can I help you, captain?
I just want to have a chat with you.
我们家的孩子们都很听话，您要是有什么吩咐尽管说，我们随时待命！
All of my children are happy to comply to orders, so let us know if you need anything. We're always available!
哎呀，瞧我这笨嘴，这几个都不是我的亲生孩子——我还没成家呢！
Ack, I should've been clearer! They're not actually my children, especially when I haven't started my own family!
只是因为我在家里辈分比较高，加上我航行的年头又久，大家给我个面子，便尊称我一声「佩德罗叔叔」。嗐，都是各家的后辈，我总得照拂一二。

It's only because of my advanced age and all those space voyages I have under my belt that they're calling me Uncle Pedro — a form of respect, I suppose. Well, I do have to watch over them a little, considering how they're all descendants of different families.
对了，船长您来这儿是有啥事吗？有什么任务的话尽管吩咐吧，老佩德罗随时候命！
So... Captain, are you here on business? Just say the word if you need us on a mission. Old Pedro's always raring to go!
船长，您来啦？是来视察我们工作的吗？哈哈，我老佩德罗早就说过，我们皮皮西就是最棒的！您瞧，一个个精神着呢！
Oh, captain! Are you doing an inspection tour? Hah, as I, old Pedro, always say, we Pepeshi are the best! Boy, look at how pumped up everyone is!
您有什么想说的，尽管吩咐吧，老佩德罗随时候命！
Just say the word! Old Pedro's always raring to go!
您说吧！老佩德罗听着呢！
你这用人唯亲不太好吧？
Should you really be keeping it all in the family?
船长！您误会了！不是您想的那样，不是我刻意偏袒。您可以去打听一下——干这行的皮皮西人实际上都是同源，在世代传承之后，几百号人多少都沾亲带故的。

No, no, no, captain! You're mistaken! It's not that I'm not looking after my own. Maybe you'd like to ask around. Every Pepeshi in this industry can be traced back to the same ancestor, so it's only natural to find a relative — be it close or distant — among the many Pepeshi from later generations.
我招他们几个也是经过严格筛选的——你别看咱们皮皮西人个头小，论航行的经验和胆量他们几个都是一流的。等着看吧，我保证他们会让您眼前一亮的。

Each one of them went through a stringent selection process to be recruited! Don't be fooled by our diminutive stature, no matter navigation experience or courage, all them Pepeshi are the cream of the crop. Just wait, they'll impress you someday.
跟我讲讲你的工作方针吧。
Tell me about your work motto.
哈哈，老佩德罗我无非是一句话——让大家成为家人。我把船员们当家人对待，大家也把我当家里长辈看待，那咱们这空艇就稳了。

Haha, if there's one thing I believe in, it's to consider everyone family. I regard the crew members as my family, and they think of me as their elder. That's how we'll make it together as an airship.
我们需如家人般相互扶持，共同面对风浪。在未知的航道上，这份信任和紧密的团队合作就是我们最宝贵的财富。
The trust and close liaison between us will be our most valuable assets as we navigate this channel into the unknown. We'll need to support one another as family does and brave the storms together.
工作进展如何？还顺利吗？
船长，目前空艇上的各项工作一切正常，偶尔会有些小问题，正在逐一解决——工作嘛，总是有这样那样的挑战。
Everything's been going smoothly on the airship, captain. Hiccups crop up every now and then, but we're slowly ironing them all out. What's work without challenges, right?
比如说，基于我们皮皮西船员的生理构造问题，我们在某些大型器械的使用或搬运上就比较吃力。但装个高空作业装置就没问题了。

Take our biological build, for example. It can be tricky for us Pepeshi crew members to transport or operate larger equipment, but we can easily install an aerial work platform to get around the problem.
我们皮皮西人对新事物总是充满好奇，永远不怕接受挑战，所以遇到些小麻烦也请您不必太过担心，我们肯定能找到解决办法的。
Pepeshi tend to harbor curiosity for all things new and would never back down from a challenge. We'll always find a way out, so don't go worrying over minor problems, yeah?
I don't have any more questions.
好的，船长。如果您暂时没有其他问题，我就先回去继续工作了。
Alright, captain. If there's nothing else for now, I'll get back to work.
你这能给空艇更名、换涂装吗？
Can I change the name and livery of the airship here?
当然可以，请您稍等，我看看目前的储备方案…一共三套，分别是：
Of course! Please hold on, let me take a look at the different designs available... There are three different designs:
方案一，命名为「开拓之尾号」，尾翼配以星穹列车列车长帕姆模样的涂装。
Choice one, the Trailblaze's Stern. It features an insignia designed after Pom-Pom, the conductor of the Astral Express, on the tail of the airship.
方案二，命名为「塔塔洛夫号」，尾翼配以垃圾之王塔塔洛夫模样的涂装。
Choice two, The Tatalov. It features an insignia designed after Tatalov the Garbage King on the tail of the airship.
方案三，命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
Choice three, The Soaring Clock Hand. It features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.
您选中哪套方案尽管说，新来的船员们正在摩拳擦掌准备为您效力。小家伙们干劲十足，我保证他们会完成得又快又好。

Just let me know which design you've selected. The new crew members are all eagerly awaiting your orders. They are all very enthusiastic, so I can assure you that work will be completed swiftly and with high standards.
好的，我这就吩咐他们去更换！
Alright, I'll ask them to change the design according to your instruction!
佩德罗按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
Pedro sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.
布设完毕，您可以随时检阅！
The design has been implemented. You can come and check it out any time!
I don't have any more questions.
好的，船长。那我就先回去继续工作了！
Alright captain. Then I'll get back to work now!
初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。结论：您有<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「迷路」问题，<unbreak>85%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「饥饿」问题。

I serve The Family. Mr. Screwllum is a Permanent VIP of Penacony. Logic: I also serve Mr. Screwllum.
What services do you provide here?
补充：出于「好奇」，就像您现在这样。
Addendum: Out of curiosity, just like right now.
我会向各位宾客提供便捷的送餐服务。如有需要，请告知我。
I provide guests with a convenient food delivery service. Just let me know if you wish to place an order.
I want to place an order.
Thank you, I'm good for now.

This isn't the first time we've met.

From your facial expression, I can detect 2% confusion. Question: Am I able to solve your problem?
…喔，原因在我。想必是我的记忆存储模块又出了问题，抱歉给你带来了困扰。
...I see, it must be me. It seems like there is an issue with my memory storage module again. I apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Goodbye. May your Dreamscape be filled with sweet memories.

Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service. Conclusion: There's a <unbreak>13%</unbreak> chance that you are lost, and an <unbreak>85%</unbreak> chance that you are hungry.
好的，但如果给您带来了不必要的困扰，请务必提醒我。
Alright, but if I cause any unnecessary inconvenience, please let me know.
我曾经历一场太空事故。被家族回收时，记忆存储模块已熔化了大半，而维修费用是一笔天文数字。
I was once involved in an accident in space and by the time I was recovered by The Family, a large portion of my memory storage module had already melted. However, the repair cost was astronomical.
家族给了我这份工作。在有足够的财产进行维修前，我能使用的记忆储存空间十分有限。
The Family gave me this job. Before I can raise enough money for my repairs, the amount of memory storage space that I'm able to use is very limited.
初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。
Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service.
很遗憾，我已经记不得那些事。我曾经历一场太空事故。被家族回收时，记忆存储模块已熔化了大半。
Regretfully, I can no longer remember anything. I was once involved in a space accident and by the time I was recovered by The Family, a large portion of my memory storage module had already melted.
不过会让我变成这样的过去，想来不是什么好事。逻辑：不记得才更好。
However, a past that rendered me to my current state is probably not worth remembering. Logic: Not remembering my past is probably better for me.
匹诺康尼有许多智械，知识：无机生命的生活和人类并无不同。
There are many Intellitrons in Penacony. Knowledge: The life of inorganic lifeforms is not different to that of humans.
比如我的上级阿尔斯克，他的鼾声经常吵得大伙难以入睡，即便我没有睡眠的机能，每颗齿轮也会跟着颤动。
Take for example my superior, Alsk. His snoring made it difficult for everyone else to sleep. Even though I do not have the ability to sleep, my gears would tremble as he snored.
喔，这些话我都只和您一个人讲，可千万别告诉别人。要是让他知道我把这些放进了记忆里，一定会暴跳如雷。
Oh, I'm only sharing this with you, so please don't tell anyone else about it. If he finds out that I stored such information in my memory, he would fly into a rage.
That's all I wanted to talk about.
再见。愿美好的记忆能填满您的梦境。
Goodbye. May your Dreamscape be filled with sweet memories.
你尝试用钟表把戏触碰亚梅塞菈的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，她都不为所动。
You attempt to rouse emotions from Amsella with Clockwork, but no matter how much the dial moves, she remains unfazed.
也许你已经成功了，但亚梅塞菈的大脑装不下那么多东西，就连钟表把戏也被忘记了。
Perhaps you have already succeeded, but because Amsella's mind isn't able to store much information, she has even forgotten about the Clockwork.
机械侍者不知道自己还能记住几句话——因为记住这件事，也会占掉一句话的空间。
The mechanical attendant does not know how much more she can remember — because even remembering that would take up memory.
什么？你刚说什么？大点声——
What!? What did you just say? Speak louder —
What did you just say? Speak louder —
对不住，我的助听装置快没电了，{F#小伙子}{M#小姑娘}。不对…是{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
Sorry, {F#boy}{M#girl}, my listening aid is running out of battery. Wait... I meant {F#girl}{M#boy}.
哈哈，别看我现在耳聋眼瞎，摇滚乐风靡折纸大学的年代，我可是全校最受欢迎乐队的主唱呢，甩着齐腰的卷发，穿着大敞胸口的衬衫。

Haha, even though I'm quite blind and deaf now, back in the day when Rock 'n' Roll was all the rage at Paperfold University, I was the lead singer of the most popular band on campus. I had waist-length permed hair and wore shirts that opened all the way down my front.
而主唱，你懂的，总是乐队里最帅的那一个。
As you know, the lead singer is always the most good-looking member of the band.
只不过这头发一去不复返咯，胸肌也往下坠了点成了肚腩，吼吼吼！
But as the years passed, I lost my hair, and my chest pecs drooped to become part of my fat belly, ohohoho!
这么多年来，校园明媚或险恶的模样我都见过，令我欣慰的是，无论何时，年轻人从未忘记对音乐的热爱。

Over the years, I have seen both the glorious and the sinister aspects of the school. However, I find comfort in knowing that even today, youngsters have never forgotten about their passion for music.
何止是普通学生，我可是荣誉留级生，差不多留了半个琥珀纪吧。
I'm not just any normal student. I'm an honorary repeat student. I've repeated school for almost half an Amber Era.
不敢当不敢当，我只是多上了几年学而已，差不多半个琥珀纪吧。
Oh no, of course not. I'm just a student who went to school for a few years more than the others — almost half an Amber Era.
毕业是不可能毕业的，这辈子都不可能毕业的！这里面蕴含着一点人生的智慧，我比其他小年轻要更早领悟到。
I'll never ever graduate, not in this lifetime! That's just some life wisdom that I managed to comprehend before the other youngsters did.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你也是这里的学生吧？正好，若我当年有过来人指点指点，也不至于落得这般废物的模样。我把人生的智慧传授于你吧，听好了——

{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you're also a student here, right? In the past, if someone had been there to guide me, I might not have ended up in this pathetic state. So, let me share some of my life wisdom with you. Listen carefully...
不要学音乐，不要学音乐，不要学音乐！！！重要的事情说三遍，根本找不到工作，找不到一点。年轻人，千万不要被一时的激情冲昏头脑啊！

Don't study music, don't study music, don't study music!!! Important points have to be repeated three times. It'll be impossible for you to find a job. No job at all! So, youngster, don't be carried away by a moment of passion!
刚还欣慰年轻人热爱音乐呢。
You just said that you find comfort in knowing that youngsters have never forgotten about their passion for music.
You've changed your mind rather quickly.
唔，你不好糊弄…那就忘掉我一开始说的，快点快点，忘好了吗？
Argh, you're not an easy one to fool... Just forget about what I said at the start, alright? Quickly, forget everything.
…你好，{F#小伙子}{M#小姑娘}，你是谁来着？
你怎么还赖着不走呢？莫非是真的热爱音乐？
Why are you still here? Could it be that you're actually truly passionate about music?
和你说话挺开心的…你想聊音乐，还是听听我年轻时的光辉事迹，或者都想？
I enjoy talking to you... Do you want to chat about music, or do you want to hear me reminisce about my glorious past? Or perhaps both?
You're the one who wants to chat.
每次看到年轻人耍那些新潮乐器的时候，我这里心里就快活，像看到了年轻时的我。
Whenever I see youngsters playing contemporary musical instruments, I feel great joy. It's as though I'm watching my younger self.
半个琥珀纪前，我可是学校第一批搞摇滚的学生。那还是爵士乐手当道的年代，男学生被要求穿黑色西装才能上台演出。

Half an Amber Era ago, I was among the first group of students to dabble in Rock 'n' Roll. That was during the era when jazz musicians still dominated the music scene. Back then, male students were required to wear black suits in order to perform.
可那规整的领结啊，总让我喘不上气，爵士那股优雅和上流的味，也少了些自我表达的契机。
However, I always felt like the neat necktie was suffocating me, and that the elegance and sophistication of jazz did not give me much opportunity for self-expression.
那就统统打破吧！于是我拿起了麦克风，梦想着在沉闷的折纸大学引领新的潮流。
Therefore, I shattered all of the norms! I picked up the microphone, dreaming about starting an all-new trend at Paperfold University.
我们的第一场演出大获成功，学生们听惯了爵士的煽情，哪里抵御得住电吉他和效果器的狂放，那晚整个折纸大学都在呼喊着我的名字。

Our first performance was a massive success. The students were sick and tired of the tear-jerking emotions of jazz, and had no resistance against the unrestrained wildness of electric guitars and sound mixers. That night, the entire Paperfold University was screaming my name.
整个大学期间，我们都是学校的风云人物，你还能在谐乐学院的墙上看到我的签名呢。
During the years we studied at the university, we were considered celebrities of the school. You still can find my signature somewhere on the walls of Charmony Academy.
Why have I not seen it?
啊？我有段时间没去那边，难道学校把那些签名都给擦掉了？算了，随他们吧。
Ah? I haven't been there in a while. Maybe the school has gotten rid of the signatures? Well, that's up to them.
Aren't you still a university student?
你可真会钻空子。这个不一样，那时候我还活着、呐喊着，现在…就不好说了。
You really do know how to pick out my inconsistencies. It's different. Back then, I was still alive and screaming. But now... it's hard to say.
只可惜…毕业后乐队就散了，哎，也算是所有摇滚乐迷的一大损失吧。
It's such a pity though... Our band disbanded right after graduation. *sigh* I guess it can be considered a major loss for all Rock 'n' Roll fans.
我真忍不住想说学院的那些老古董们几句——不要因为年轻人拥抱新兴音乐流派便太过苛责，甚至以此揣测他们创作的本心，这样只会浇熄孩子们灵感的火焰。

I really can't help but want to tell those old fogeys at the academy — don't be too harsh on the youngsters just because they're embracing a new genre of music. If you go so far as to question their creative intentions, you might quench the flames of inspiration within them.
那群老教授，就像格拉克斯大道上穷追不舍的广告牌一样，黏在孩子们的脑后哔哔叭叭：「你的台风不够优雅，旋律不够婉转，节奏点太过密集，音响太大声！」

Those old professors are just like the billboards who pester people on Glaux Avenue. They keep nagging at the children, "You aren't elegant enough on stage. Your melody is not moving. The downbeats of your music are too accentuated. Your speakers are too loud!"
音乐不以形式论高尚——当年搞摇滚的时候，我的钢琴老师还是我的头号粉丝呢。
The genre of music is never indicative of how good it actually is. Back when I was playing Rock 'n' Roll, my piano teacher was even my number one fan.
见多识广的年轻人，你可曾拜访过「博识学会」，或者认识他们的成员？
Knowledgeable youngster, have you ever visited the Intelligentsia Guild or encountered any of their members?
Knowledge is meant to be circulated and shared.
这个都知道，你挺上道嘛！
You even know that slogan! It seems like you really know your stuff!
听朋友说，那里汇聚了宇宙中一心求学之人…不知道是不是真的。
My friend told me that everyone in the universe who solely seeks to learn is gathered there... I wonder if that's true.
我们乐队的吉他手毕业后去了博识学会任职。离校那天，我一路把他送到了车站。
After graduation, our band's guitarist went to work at the Intelligentsia Guild. On the day he left school, I sent him all the way to the train station.
临别前，他手忙脚乱地从兜里掏出一盘录音带扔给我，说是写给我的歌。
Before he left, he hastily tossed me a tape recording from his pocket, telling me that it was a song that he had written for me.
他歌中唱的故事像物理课本一样晦涩而无趣，讲的是一位宇航员被派往探索银河，却意外落入了时间的圈套。
The lyrics of the song were abstruse and boring like a physics textbook. They told of an astronaut who fell into a trap of time after he was sent on a cosmic voyage.
归乡时，他的妻子已离开人世，女儿也白发苍苍，可他的时间只过了一年零两个月。
When the astronaut finally returned home, his wife had already passed away and his daughter was now an old lady with a head of gray hair. But to him, only fourteen months had passed.
年少的我没想太多，全当这是疯狂科学家一时兴起而随手写下的科幻故事，毕竟这小子在天体物理方面相当有天赋。

As a young man, I didn't think much of it. I simply thought that this was just a science fiction story written by a mad scientist hit by a bolt of inspiration. After all, that brat had some real talent in astrophysics.
现在再品味，哎，这时间的圈套…我早早就落入其中了……
But now, when I listen to it again... *sigh* This trap of time... I seem to have fallen into it a long time ago...
或许，改日你顺路经过博识学会，可以帮我问问他是怎么想的，如果他还在的话。
If you ever pass by the Intelligentsia Guild one day, and if he's still around, can you help me to ask him just what he was thinking back then.
这座学校是我的象牙塔，也是囚禁我的牢笼。
This school is both my ivory tower and the cage that imprisons me.
嘿，你想听个…关于我的小故事吗？
Heh, do you want to hear... a little tale about me?
当年我的乐队小有名气，在人才辈出的谐乐学院也称得上是头号新星。
Back when my band was still quite popular, I was considered one of the top rising stars of the talent-filled Charmony Academy.
我父亲可能是觉得脸上有光，从来瞧不起艺术的他，竟专门开了家唱片公司帮我出道，还砸重金请了鸢尾花家系最有名的音乐总监，亲自为我们制作出道专辑。

Perhaps because of how proud he felt, my father, who always looked down on the arts, started a record label to help me make my debut. He even splurged to hire the most famous music director from the Iris Family to personally create our debut album.
天赋、人气、还有家人的倾力支持，哪个音乐人比我幸运？直到…专辑发售前……
Talent, popularity, and the unwavering support from family. I should have been the most fortunate musician of all. And I was, until... right before the album was released...
那晚，我意外听到父亲与生意伙伴的对话…原来他长期在做黑心生意，赚亏心钱。

One night, I overheard my father's conversation with his business partner... It turned out that he had been engaging in unscrupulous business practices for a long time and was earning unethical money.
哎，我太天真了…那个听见摇滚就皱眉的父亲，怎么会诚心祝福我的音乐事业？
*sigh* I was too naive... How could my father, who frowned whenever he heard Rock 'n' Roll, sincerely support my music career?
他只想利用我的正面形象愚弄公众，做他企业的代言人或者为他的公益项目站台，为的是替那些见不得人的生意洗刷嫌疑。

He only wanted to use my positive image to fool the public. By making me the ambassador of his businesses and engaging me to help him garner support for his charity programs, he could clear the suspicions regarding his shady businesses.
那晚，我们乐队溜进了囤放唱片的仓库。这张构思了整整四年的专辑，里面满是我们对未来的想象，对这个不公世界的呐喊。

That night, my band and I sneaked into the warehouse that stored our records. This was an album that we had spent four whole years preparing. All our anticipation for the future and our cries against this unjust world were encased within it.
我们做梦都想看到它与世界见面的那一天，现在，这个时刻近在咫尺。可…比起诞生，我们更不愿意看到它被它所抗争的现实裹挟，成了陪葬品。

We even dreamed about the day this album would be released. And now, that moment was just around the corner. But... compared to seeing the album produced, we could not bear to see it being coerced and held hostage by the reality it was fighting against.
所以，我们一把火烧了货仓，烧了即将发往货架的上万张专辑，烧了我们四年的梦……
Therefore, we lit the entire warehouse on fire, burning the tens of thousands of albums and setting ablaze our dreams that we had worked the past four years for...
That's not a big deal. Wouldn't you still have the master tape?
我也是这么以为的，只要我们做了正确的事，其他一切都能慢慢解决。
That's what I thought as well. As long as we did the right thing, everything else could be resolved eventually.
如果真如我所想…它美好得像一个电影的结局，不是吗——邪恶商人的阴谋被揭穿，正义的伙伴名扬天下，从头开始，幸福又快乐地追逐着梦想……

If everything went the way I imagined it, it would have been like the perfect ending of a movie. After all, we had exposed the shenanigans of unscrupulous merchants and under the banner of justice, we could happily chase after our dreams with a clear conscience all over again...
如果故事到这里结束就好了……
If only the story had ended here...
它美好得像一个电影的结局，不是吗——邪恶商人的阴谋被揭穿，正义的伙伴名扬天下，从头开始，幸福又快乐地追逐着梦想……

It would have been the perfect ending to a movie. After all, we had exposed the shenanigans of unscrupulous merchants and under the banner of justice, we could happily chase after our dreams with a clear conscience all over again...
可在这个故事里，唱片的巨额亏损让父亲气急败坏，他想尽办法阻挠乐队的演艺事业，我们几个穷学生，要靠什么和他们战斗？

But in this story, the huge loss from the damaged records enraged my father. He did everything in his power to thwart our entertainment careers. As poor students, how could we have possibly fight back against him?
就这样，我选择葬在我梦想夭折的地方。靠着母亲的资助，在折纸大学混到了现在……
And that is why I have chosen to be buried in the place where my dreams perished. With the financial support of my mother, I have been able to stay enrolled in Paperfold University until now...
我思考了小半辈子，对当年的所作所为心中早有论断。但年轻人，记住了——
I've had half of my lifetime to think about this and I've made my peace with what I did back then. But remember, young one...
当世界把话筒交给你的时候，别像我一样哑了嗓，最终只落得在悔恨中度日的下场。
When the world hands you a microphone, don't let your throat seize up like me. Otherwise, you'll end up living the rest of your life in regret.
I want to continue chatting with you.
行啊，我喜欢和年轻人聊天，说吧说吧，想让我教你点什么？
Sure. I love talking to youngsters. Tell me, what do you want me to teach you?
How can I stay here and not graduate?
好的不学，净学坏的。不过你才这点年纪，就算留级也无法撼动我「第一荣誉留级生」的宝座…我就偷偷告诉你吧，耳朵凑过来——

Why would you want to follow my bad example? Well, you're still so young. Even if you repeat a year, my title of the "Number One Honorary Repeat Student" will remain unchanged... Alright, let me tell you the secret. Come closer...
答案是——给钱就好，是不是比你想象中简单？大学虽然不是盈利机构，但钱总不嫌多，有钱才能留住好老师，才能扩建学院招收更多学生。

The answer is — just pay money. It's simpler than you think, right? Even though the university isn't a for-profit organization, they'll never say no to more money. Only with more money can they keep the best teachers here, expand the school, and recruit more students.
不过也无须额外掏腰包，一期不漏奉上天价学费就成。我这小半辈子交过的学费，都够他们买下一个小型度假星球咯。

But there's also no need for you to pay extra. Just ensure that you pay the astronomical tuition fees on time every semester. They could probably buy a small-sized vacation planet with the tuition that I have paid throughout my time here.
今年球笼赛哪个学院会赢？
Which academy's going to win the Spheroid race this year?
啊哈，又到球笼赛季了吗！这问题，你该去问年轻人，我这一把年纪，眼珠子早就跟不上球笼跑的速度咯，哈哈哈哈。
Aha, is it the Spheroid race season already? You should probably ask the youngsters this question. At this age, my eyes can no longer keep up with the speed of the Spheroids. Hahahaha!
年轻时，体育也不是我的强项，我是靠才华赢取女孩芳心的那款。
Even when I was younger, sport was never my strong suit. I was always the type who relied on my talent to win girls.
I have nothing else to ask.
年轻人，听好——音乐这东西，享受别人的成果就好，别把自己搭进去了。
Listen, young one — for something like music, just enjoy what others have produced. Don't sacrifice yourself for it.
I have nothing else to ask.
年轻人，听好——音乐这东西，享受别人的成果就好，别把自己给搭进去了。
Listen, young one — for something like music, just enjoy what others have produced. Don't sacrifice yourself for it.
这些老教授的年纪比我还小呢，怎么教育理念能这么落后？
These old professors are all younger than me. How could their teaching philosophy be so outdated?
哟，看看，这不是我们匹诺康尼的股东嘛。来来，给你讲个好玩的事。
Yo, what do we have here? Aren't you one of Penacony's shareholders? Come, I'll let you in on something interesting.
下周末有个超酷的派对——一年一度的折纸大学球笼赛预热派对，全折纸大学的风云人物都会到场，猜猜谁没有被邀请——

There's going to be a super cool party next weekend — the annual Paperfold University Spheroid race warm-up party! All the big shots of Paperfold University are going to be there. Why don't you make a guess who didn't receive an invite—
我，堂堂折纸大学派对王，全校最盛大的派对居然敢不邀请我？
Me! I'm Paperfold University's Party King, but I'm not invited to the biggest party of the entire school!?
别难过，你的名声太大，也许他们是害怕没法好好招待你，这样说感觉会好些吗？
Don't take it personally. They might think this party is beneath someone as famous as you. Does that make you feel better?
不过你放心，等咱混进去了，一定带上你。我派对王最痛恨这种拉帮结派的作派！
But no worries! Once I'm in, I'll make sure to get you in too. As the Party King, I can't tolerate this kind of exclusion!
就是！这群小白眼狼…吃里扒外的家伙！
Absolutely! What a bunch of total ingrates!
你在校园里随便抓个学生问问，谁没在星期五晚上来过我的派对？谁没在失恋时候喝过一杯查德请的麦芽汁？就说我们学院那个学生会主席，我绝对请过他。

Just ask anyone on campus! Who hasn't been to one of my Friday night parties? Who hasn't had a cup of malt juice on me after a breakup? Even the student council president of our Academy — I'm pretty sure I bought him a drink at some point!
前阵子，我去问派对组委会拒绝我的理由，他们说什么今年的预热派对只邀请有「梦想」的学生。言下之意，成为派对之王不算「梦想」咯？这是瞧不起我。

A few days ago, I asked the party committee why I wasn't invited. They told me this year's kick-off party is only for students with "dreams." So apparently, being the Party King isn't considered a dream? How dare they!
哼，之后再和他们算账，当务之急是想个法子混进去，我绝不接受我的派对全勤因为这种愚蠢的理由中断。
Hmph, I'll deal with them later. Right now, my top priority is finding a way into that party! I won't let my perfect party attendance record be ruined by such a lame excuse!
要不我换个新梦想试试？你有什么梦想，也可以告诉我，我来帮你实现。
Maybe I'll try to find a new dream. Got any dreams yourself? Tell me, and I'll help make it come true!
被组委会拒绝后，我又去找了他们一次。这次我带了份「小礼物」。
After being turned down by the committee, I went back for another try — this time with "a small present."
我说，今年预热派对的规模非同小可，开支也是。正巧我父亲是校球笼赛的忠实观众，非常乐意全额赞助此次派对，免去大家一桩心事。

I mentioned that this year's kick-off party is going to be grand and costly. Luckily, my dad, who's a big fan of the school Spheroid races, would be more than happy to fully sponsor the party and ease their financial burden.
结果你猜怎么着，组委会那群白痴补了封邀请函，但不是给我，是给我爹！他们说在校生唯一的邀约标准仍是「梦想」。
And you know what? Those fools did send out an invitation — not to me, but to my dad! They said the only criterion for students to get invited is still having a "dream"!
连匹诺康尼都不尊重财富了，你不会也不尊重吧？
Now that Penacony doesn't care about money anymore, I hope you'll show some respect for good ol' credits?
There are some things that money can't buy.
呃…你让我有点尴尬，但钱包都掏出来了，再放回去也挺不好意思。或许我的慷慨能打动你。
Eh... Now you're really putting me on the spot. Since I already got my wallet out, it'd be awkward to put it away. Maybe my generosity can sway you.
But without money, you can't buy anything.
对，这才像话！我就知道我们是一路人，以后你在折纸大学的麦芽汁我全包了，不管什么年份的，都随你挑！
That's the spirit! I knew we were on the same page! From now on, I'll cover all the malt juice you drink at Paperfold University. Whether it's vintage or not, it's all on me!
什么时候起，匹诺康尼不崇拜财富了？没接到通知啊。
Since when did Penacony stop worshiping money? I must have missed that memo!
财富才是匹诺康尼的梦想，你有钱，你拥有一切！
Money is Penacony's big dream. With it, you can have it all!
我得赶在派对举办前找到新的「梦想」。
I need to find a new "dream" before the party.
既然成为派对之王的「梦想」备受歧视，那我抓紧换个别的吧。
Since being the Party King isn't considered a "real" dream, I guess I'd better come up with a new one.
我能做什么呢…有了！成为罗密欧那样的球笼赛车手吧，那可是校园里最受尊敬的角色！
But what will I do? Oh, I know! I'll become a Spheroid racer like Romeo. That's pretty popular on campus!
但…上赛季的拉力赛整整比了二十四个系统时，他从球笼出来的时候人都闷馊掉了，我受不了那味道。
But... last season's rallying event lasted a full <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours! He reeked of sweat when he got off the Spheroid. There's no way I can handle that smell!
还有别的吗…噢！像尚恩那样进学生会吧，走路都带风，去哪都受追捧。
What else? Ah, what if I join the student council like Shawn? That kind of confidence really turns heads.
可是…学生会所有工作都属于义务劳动，既不算学分，必要场合还得帮着学校说话。谁要和那群老古董打交道啊！
But... student council work is all unpaid. I wouldn't earn any grades or credits, and I'd have to advocate for the school. I want no part of dealing with those dinosaurs!
不如…整个大活，像知更鸟小姐那样出道做歌手吧，到时候全银河的派对都会抢着邀请我，区区折纸大学的球笼赛预热派对，我都不稀罕来。
