I might as well aim higher! Maybe I'll try singing like Miss Robin. Then, all the parties across the cosmos will be clamoring for me, and I wouldn't even glance at a mere Spheroid kick-off party at Paperfold University!
不过，万一我红了，还得全银河巡演，听说知更鸟小姐的下轮巡演要办整整<unbreak>152</unbreak>场，每场蹦蹦跳跳三个半系统时，我可没这精力。

But on second thought, if I do make it big, I'd be touring across the cosmos. I heard Miss Robin's next tour has <unbreak>152</unbreak> concerts, each with <unbreak>3.5</unbreak> system hours of non-stop singing and dancing! I'm not sure I'm up for that!
再想想…可问题在于——这世上大多数的苦我都吃不消，哪有深耕派对行业来得轻松啊。
Let's keep thinking, but honestly, hard work isn't my style. It's way easier to just focus on partying!
和我谈「梦想」？那我可不困了。
Want to talk about "dreams"? Well, I'm wide awake now.
组委会那群家伙真没眼光。我的「梦想」和其他人的一样好…应该说，更好！
Those people on the committee really have poor judgment. My "dream" is just as good as any — if not better!
我要永不散场的派对，无论你是极乐或忧愁，来我的派对。因为人人生来便有分离焦虑，我们本是宇宙母亲诞下的同一个灵魂，被抛进不同的躯体。
Join my party, where the fun never wanes, whether you're flying high or feeling some strains. The fear of being apart is something we all know. From one cosmic mother, in diverse bodies we grow.
我的派对有喝不完的麦芽汁，有人听你笑、陪你哭。一曲过后，一杯下肚，我们短暂忘却彼此的间隔，拥抱走失的自己，这世上便再无落单的灵魂。
At my party, malt juice flows without cease, where laughter and tears find their release. Let us sing and drink, let all gaps fade away. Embrace who we are, and no soul in the world is alone today.
…后面忘了。总之来参加派对就是！
...I forgot the rest. Anyway, just come to my party!
哈哈哈，没想到在你眼里我那么高尚。你看，只要会扯淡，我这种贪图享乐的学生也能化身大慈爱家，全看你怎么解读了。
Hahaha, I didn't expect you to think so highly of me. See? With the right spin, even a playboy like me can come off as a big philosopher. It's all about how you look at it!
或者，你觉得我的诡辩确实有几分道理？
Or, do you actually think my argument makes some sense?
话题永远离不开派对是吧？
You can't say anything without bringing up parties, can you?
什么派对，我刚才谈论的是艺术，是灵魂的碰撞和精神的升华！哈哈哈。
What parties? I was talking about art — the clash of souls and the ascension of spirits! Hahaha!
你看，只要会扯淡，我这种贪图享乐的学生也能化身大慈爱家，全看你怎么解读了。或者，你觉得我的诡辩确实有几分道理？
See? With the right spin, even a playboy like me can come off as a big philosopher. It's all about how you look at it! Or, do you actually think my argument makes some sense?
她讨厌我…她不讨厌我…她讨厌我…她不讨厌我……
She hates me... She likes me... She hates me... She likes me...
在匹诺康尼有什么办法消除一个人的记忆？你有门路吗？正规的、不正规的都行。
Do you know anyone in Penacony who can erase memories? It doesn't matter if they're reliable or not.
呜…我搞砸了和哈鲁小姐的初次见面…我从入学起就暗恋她了……
*sob* I messed up my first meeting with Haru. I've had a crush on her since day one.
她——是世间一切美好的集合，是我这种游手好闲的学术垃圾所无法企及的存在。
She... she is the epitome of everything wonderful, a beacon of grace far beyond the reach of a floundering student like me.
她的眼里总是映着理想，出身贫寒，双亲葬身于黑心的豆腐渣工程，却发奋苦读，誓为寰宇间穷苦的孩子们筑起安心的巢穴。

Her eyes always gleam with hope. Despite being born into poverty and losing her parents when their house collapsed due to unethical construction, she carved out a path in academia with tenacity. Now, she dreams of creating safe havens for underprivileged children.
更可恶的是…天呐，她还那么漂亮！！！
And to top it all off, she's just breathtakingly beautiful!
可惜我一直没有正式认识她的机会，直到上周，我在朋友的生日派对上遇到了她。
I hadn't had the chance to meet her until last week, when I finally ran into her at a friend's birthday party.
这是我第一次见她参加派对，我太紧张了，傻愣了好久，久到派对都快结束了才回过神。
It was the first time I'd seen her at a party, and I was so nervous that I just froze. I didn't snap out of it until well after the event was over.
What were you so nervous about?
I didn't peg you as the romantic type.
因为…哈鲁小姐是不会喜欢我的。传闻哈鲁小姐讨厌关于财富学院的一切，也有人说她偏爱可爱型的男生，皮皮西人那样的。总之，我不是她的理想型。
It's because I don't stand a chance with Haru. Rumor has it she hates everything about Fortune Academy, and some say she likes cute guys. Anyway, I'm not her type.
我越想越紧张，一口气喝了三杯麦芽汁，想着壮壮胆向哈鲁小姐好好介绍自己。结果嘛…等我恢复意识，已经是第二天早上的事了。

Thinking I could drink to calm my growing bundle of nerves before going to talk to Haru, I downed three shots of malt juice in one go... But when I finally sobered up, I realized I'd been out cold the entire night.
朋友说我三杯下肚后，直挺挺地倒了下去，像块大板砖拍在了地上。这动静惊动了隔壁桌的哈鲁小姐，她以为我出了什么事，急忙跑过来……

My friends said I fell to the ground like a log after chugging down those three shots, creating so loud a thump that it startled Haru at the table next to ours. They also said she hurried over to check on me...
结果我当着哈鲁小姐的面，吐得稀里哗啦，像喷发的苏乐达喷泉，呕吐物洒了一地……
Only to see me retching uncontrollably, spewing my stomach contents all over the place like a SoulGlad fountain...
那也不能随便改别人的记忆。
That's no reason to tinker with her memory.
唔…可…我想消除的不是她的记忆，是我的！
Uh... I—It's not her memory I want to erase, it's mine!
现在她肯定对你印象深刻了。
...At least you left a deep impression on her now.
是啊，所以才想把记忆消除掉…什么时候我才能忘了自己干过这种蠢事啊！
Yeah, that's exactly why I want to erase my memory of last night... Ugh, will I ever forget this hopelessly stupid blunder!?
I'd like to chat with you...
我最喜欢和人聊天了，你想从哪个话题开始？
Sure, I love chatting with people! What do you want to talk about?
The kick-off party for the university's Spheroid race?
从建校起就有的老传统了，每年正赛开始前的周末，组委会都要将大家聚在一起，为今年的赛事预热造势。

That's a tradition we've kept going since the university's founding. Every year, the organizing committee would gather everyone on the weekend before the actual race, to build up hype and excitement for the event.
不过不是那个「仓鼠球骑士」效力的职业球笼赛哦，是折纸大学自己的校赛。
Oh, I should clarify. This party isn't for the professional Spheroid race that Hamster Ball Knight competes in, but for Paperfold University's very own Spheroid race.
被邀请的不止有当年的赛车选手和杰出学生，各学院代表、校长也会出席，传闻格拉克斯校长还在第一届预热派对上喝了个酩酊大醉呢。

Other than stellar students and those participating in the race, representatives from each academy and the dean will also be invited to the party. Psst, word has it Dean Glaux got totally plastered at the inaugural kick-off party!
哪个学院会赢得球笼赛？
Which academy's going to win this Spheroid race?
必然是我们财富学院！多犹豫一秒都是对罗密欧的不尊重，他已经带领财富学院连拿两届冠军咯。

Why, Fortune Academy, of course! I have absolute faith in Romeo representing us. I won't be caught wavering, not even for a split second. And he already has two consecutive championships under his belt!
你问任何学生都只会得到相同的答案。每位学生只为自己的学院加油呐喊，这可是关乎学院荣耀的格拉克斯杯啊。
Ask any other student, and I'm sure you'll get the same answer. We're competing for the prestigious Glaux Cup, after all. Students are only going to cheer for their own academy.
你认识财富学院的契波吗？
Do you know a Czipo from Fortune Academy?
当然认识，那也是个自称*派对高手*的家伙。可惜啊，还是不如我。
Hmph, you bet I do. Too bad that self-proclaimed party connoisseur's nothing compared to me.
放着好好的球笼赛派对不来，跑去组乐队，哈，躲在教室里对着键盘噼里啪啦地乱按，能有什么意思？会比今年冒出来的那个皮皮西车手好玩吗？

Skipping the Spheroid race's party just to form a band? Bah! What fun is there in holing up in a classroom and bashing away on a keyboard? Is that going to draw any more attention than the fresh-faced Pepeshi racing this year?
我看啊，以他那三分钟热度的性格，坚持不了多久就要退出咯。
If you ask me, I doubt he'll stick around in that band for long. Not when he loses interest in things so quickly.
I have nothing else to ask.
可别和派对王客气，我一向慷慨！
As the Party King, I'm always willing to share! No need to be shy around me!
如果感兴趣的话，下次去我的派对吧！我欢迎任何人，即便一分钟前我才认识你。
Come to my next party if you're interested! Anyone's a guest, including those I just met.
「这不是哈鲁吗？正巧，我手上有两张客户送的机动球观赛门票，虽说有些廉价，但在你这里应该能发挥出价值吧。」
"Oh? It's Haru! What great timing, I happen to have two tickets to the Roboball match. I know this may sound cheap because a client gave them to me, but I'm sure it'll be of some value to you?"
不成，这太直接了，和我一贯的表现差太多……
No, that's coming on too strong. I hardly sound like myself...
你留意到这个古怪的人正在对着空气自言自语，便驻足欣赏了一会。
You see a strange guy muttering to himself, and you decide to watch him for a while.
那这样…「哟，瞧瞧这是谁啊？看看这两张票吧，要是你实在想要，我也不是不能…」
How about... "Oh, look who's here! I have two tickets with me. If you really want them, I guess I could—"
Gah! I sound like a total jerk!
他终于察觉到了你的存在，你看着他的脸由红润变得煞白，过一会又转为青绿，最后总算恢复了血色。

When he finally notices your presence, you see his face flit through a spectrum of colors: from the bright red of a flashing siren to a ghostly pallor, and to a noxious green before returning to normal.
你？！咳、咳哼…来咨询实习机会的吧？这个时间已经晚了，好资源早就没了，之前和你们说过，对实习要上点心…

You...!? Ack, ahem... You're here to inquire about internship opportunities, aren't you? A little too late, though. The best offers have been snapped up. Didn't I already tell you guys to put in more effort for your internships...
等等，你没穿校服…是游客？穿搭虽然认不出版型，但整体做工精细，莫非是私人订制？
Wait, you're not in our uniform... You're a visitor? Hmm, I don't recognize the design on your outfit, but it does boast impeccable workmanship. Could it be a custom piece?
I fished it out from a trashcan.
哈哈，简单易懂的反讽——我明白你不打算告诉我，就不再问了。
Hah, that's a deadpan tone I recognize. Alright then, I won't ask if you're not willing to share.
有意思，我猜是边远星系的高级品牌？可惜我还没入职，不然就拜托公司的前辈去联系合作了。
Oh, that's new. A luxury brand from one of the fringe planets? Too bad I'm not onboarded yet, or I'd suggest for my seniors in the IPC to work out a collaboration with them.
My family got it for me.
哦？看来你的家人很有品味，审美水平相当不错。
Oh? I must say your family has a good eye for fashion, then.
不管怎么说，你成功勾起了我的兴趣。自我介绍下：我叫尚恩，担任本届财富学院的学生会主席。以后就算认识了。
Anyhow, you've gotten my interest. I'm Shawn, current president of Fortune Academy's student council. Pleased to make your acquaintance.
如果你有些有价值的点子，需要资金和人脉才能实现，或许我可以介绍一些合作渠道。
If you're lacking funds or the right network for a brilliant idea, I may just be the person to link you up with a partner or opportunity.
(Tell him your plan for the interastral junkyard.)
不行，难度太大。垃圾分类的标准就和宇宙里的种族一样繁杂，很难统一。
Hardly feasible. There are as many ways to categorize trash as we have species in the universe. It's not going to be easy to come up with a common standard.
(Tell him your interest in starting a love consultancy.)
想法很好，但按我的理解…钱，买不来，爱情。
That's a novel idea, but from how I see it... money isn't going to buy anyone love.
…不，可能只是因为我还不够有钱？
...Wait, maybe I just don't have enough money yet?
三块钱收十块钱，无限收。
Fiver for your tenner. This deal's always open.
你左脚踩右脚上天算了。
Pfft, you're not trapping anyone with that circular reasoning.
唉，就没有比那个建房子的傻梦想更靠谱的提案吗……
*sigh* Is that silly dream of building buildings really the most promising proposition out there...?
记着——把握机遇，赢得人生。
Remember this: Make the most out of every opportunity to win in life.
若是要跻身商界前列，与上流人士的联系必不可少。在交流中，那些人的知识与思维方式会自然为你所有。
You're going to have to interact with the highborn and the elite if you want to make it to the top in the business scene, and when you do, you'll naturally pick up the way they think.
相对地，不要在无价值的人身上浪费太多时间，公司的优秀实习生都深谙此道。
The same goes for the converse group. You don't want to waste too much of your time on people who are of no value. Every well performing IPC intern lives by this guideline.
货币…人脉…对无价之物而言，又有什么意义呢？
Wealth and networks... How do they compare to things that are truly invaluable?
我当然清楚，自己在其他人眼里是什么评价。
Sure, I know how others think of me.
「活得一帆风顺的家伙」、「跋扈阔少」、「冷血无情的逐利者」……
The guy with the smooth-sailing life, the rich and bossy guy, the self-serving profiteer...
但他们怎么明白？所有朋友都只记得你的家庭，却对你本人的努力与成就不屑一顾，多么悲哀啊。
I don't expect them to look past any of that. People around you only bother remembering your background, not your efforts or achievements. Sad, huh?
而那些虚名能带来什么？信用点吗？就连她的应允都买不来……
And what can this weighty name bring me? Credits? What use is it when I can't even get her to go out with me...
原来你是真喜欢那位啊？
At least you have some self-awareness.
…唉，你不知道，她是筑梦学院的优等生，是个心思纯粹的设计师…商人的天敌！
... *sigh* You won't understand. She's a model student at Dreamweaver Academy, an altruistic architect with a heart of gold... The archenemy of us entrepreneurs!
在她眼里，我所拥有的财富和人脉，包括我的处事方式在内，恐怕都和苏乐达公司的股价一样与她毫无关联。
My wealth, social connections, and even my approach to things probably mean as much as SoulGlad's shares to her — irrelevant and nothing at all.
我…倾心于她的率真。但或许，我是在羡慕她的无忧无虑…唉……
I... like how she lives true to herself. Or maybe I'm just envious of how carefree she is... *sigh*
我当然清楚，自己在其他人眼里是什么评价。
Sure, I know how others think of me.
「活得一帆风顺的家伙」、「跋扈阔少」、「冷血无情的逐利者」……
The guy with the smooth-sailing life, the rich and bossy guy, the self-serving profiteer...
但他们怎么明白？所有朋友都只记得你的家庭，却对你本人的努力与成就不屑一顾，多么悲哀啊。
I don't expect them to look past any of that. People around you only bother remembering your background, not your efforts or achievements. Sad, huh?
而那些虚名能带来什么？信用点吗？就连她的应允都买不来……
And what can this weighty name bring me? Credits? What use is it when I can't even get her to go out with me...
商机无处不在，而我能听见它们的声音。
Business opportunities are around every corner, and I can hear them calling out to me.
…你觉得什么是成功的生意？把食物卖给饿肚子的人，把药品卖给濒死的病人？
...What's a successful business to you? Is it selling food to those who are hungry? Or selling medicines to those on the brink of death?
这种商机谁都能想到。而在匹诺康尼，所有人都知道的赛道自然会遇到无数竞争者。
These are common business ideas anyone can come up with. And if you venture into such trades here on Penacony, you'll only find yourself up against a stampede of competitors.
这次校庆，很多人看中了那些外来访客的流量，准备大赚一笔…殊不知从根本上就错了！
Many are counting on the influx of visitors to make a killing at our university's upcoming anniversary, but little do they know that those tourists aren't their cash cows!
我提供的商品，是他们堆放货物的仓库！不论竞争多么激烈，这笔生意绝对稳赚不赔！
I, on the other hand, am offering them storage space for their goods! This business idea is sure to rake in profit, no matter how intense the competition gets!
也正因为我把握住了机会，公司的实习录用书才会理所当然地摆在我的桌子上。
And that's how I easily earned an internship offer at the IPC. Because I spotted an untapped business opportunity and jumped in with the right service offering.
这就是精英与普通人的差距——财富学院的那些人得好好学着点。
This is what separates the cream of the crop from the rest. Something those Fortune Academy students ought to learn.
在学校听课就不算荒废时间？想得太简单了。
If you don't find sitting in class a total waste of time, then you haven't seen the real world.
I want to continue chatting with you.
行，别太久，我的时间很宝贵。
Sure, but let's not drag it out too long. My time is money, after all.
Tell me about your business connections?
呵，我的人脉好些都深居幕后，恐怕报出名字来你也不见得认识。但既然你诚心发问，我就勉为其难地举个你肯定知道的例子。
Hah, many of my business associates are bigwigs who work behind the scenes, so people you're not likely to have heard of. But since you're interested, I guess I can name someone you're sure to know?
苜蓿草家系现任家主，奥帝•艾弗法先生。我和他有过几次愉快的同席，彼此相谈甚欢。
Mr. Oti Alfalfa, the current head of the Alfalfa Family. We were both at the same events a couple of times, and I had a few pleasant exchanges with him.
理解了吗？至于其他…如果想知道细节，等你向我展示过你的价值后再谈。
Have an idea of my business network now? You're going to have to show me your worth if you want to learn more, though the discretion is still mine.
You like that Haru girl, don't you?
我没…！…这是商业机密，想打听得付钱。
I don't—! ...That's a trade secret that will cost you money.
那我去找当事人问问好了。
I guess I'll ask her myself, then.
"Oh, I have two tickets with me..."
…行，算我求你，可千万别抖出去。
...Fine, I'll tell you. But you have to keep it a secret.
她是筑梦学院的优秀学生，边远星球来的贫困户，背景薄得吓人，用大号字体都印不满一张纸…

She's a model student at Dreamweaver Academy, but she comes from a poor family from one of those faraway planets. She hardly has any background to speak of. Whatever information found on her doesn't take up a page, even with a <unbreak>20</unbreak>-point font...
别误会，我没有窥探别人隐私的兴趣，但我也没法阻止家里那些多事的保镖自顾自地做了全面调查。
No, I'm not one to snoop around others' private information, but there's nothing I can do to stop those nosey bodyguards employed by my family from running a thorough investigation on her.
天真的女孩，支撑她的梦想就和她的出身一样单纯，但…我欣赏她的才华。
She's just a guileless girl keeping her dream alive with a passion as bare as her background, but... it's her talent that attracted me.
哼，我就当没听懂你的挖苦了，只论演技，那是自然。
Hmph, I'll pretend I didn't hear that sarcasm. Of course I'm a great actor.
以财富学院学生会主席的名义，我可以明确告诉你。实习、面试、商务洽谈，不管哪个地方都用得上这门技术。
I don't mind telling you this as president of Fortune Academy's student council: People are always portraying a certain image, whether at internships, interviews, or business negotiations.
正因如此，做好事前演练，就是提升商业活动成功率最有效的方式。
That's why rehearsing beforehand is the best practice for acing any business function you're expected at.
你那是什么表情？行，我承认…排练的地点最好也该事先确认一下。
...What's with that look? Fine, I'll admit it. It's not just rehearsing beforehand, but rehearsing beforehand at the right place.
行，如果你想到了好点子，记得来找我。
Alright. Come look for me when you get a good business idea.
银河经济、星际市场导论、跨界金融管理…学院的课程安排听起来很高大上，可实际呢？

Cosmic Economy, Introduction to Interastral Markets, Cross-Border Financial Management... Yeah, the academy sure put together a curriculum that sounds downright impressive. But what do you really get from those classes?
全是纸上谈兵！在你实习的第一天，这些知识就会统统都被推翻！
Theories that won't work in the real world! Everything you learned in class will be proven wrong on your very first day as an intern!
计划永远赶不上变化，想要真正看清未来趋势、掌控市场变量，你至少得有个天才那样的头脑——可我要真是天才，还用得着上课吗？

Nothing ever goes entirely as forecasted, so you'll need to have the mental capacity of a genius to astutely pick up on emerging trends and navigate market variables. Then we're back to the question again: Is there a point to sitting in class if you're already a genius?
还不如把学费交给街边的逐梦客！说不定能给你带来点商机和人脉！
You're better off paying your tuition fees to those hustling Dreamchasers instead! They might just offer you a business opportunity or become your business partner!
唉，身为学生会主席，我已经向学校提过无数次，要扩大实习经历在绩点中的占比，却被当成是欺负贫困学生而数次被警告。

*sigh* I'm only doing my job as president of the student council, submitting suggestion after suggestion to increase the weightage of the internship module in our overall GPA, but all I get in return are warnings from the university! For discriminating against students from less well-off backgrounds!
真是荒谬…如果有人问我推荐哪门课，我一定要举个大牌子告诉他：「快逃」！
As if they aren't absurd enough already... If anyone comes asking for my recommendation on which classes to take, you bet I'll wave a giant "DROP OUT NOW" placard in their face!
行，如果你想到了好点子，记得来找我。
Alright. Come look for me when you get a good business idea.
读过最新的《折纸时报》了吗？猜你就没有，我念给你听——
Have you read the latest issue of the Paperfold Times? I imagine not. Let me read it for you...
「随着第<unbreak>550</unbreak>届梦境大学生球笼竞速预选赛落幕，折纸大学终于迎来了历史上第一位皮皮西首席车手。」
"As the <unbreak>550</unbreak>th Dreamscape Collegiate Spheroid Race Qualifiers come to an end, Paperfold University finally welcomes their first ever Pepeshi lead driver in history."
「来自谐乐学院二年级的普蕾玛势不可挡，上周末以一场华丽的胜利，拿下预选赛积分第一。她将同其他三位车手一齐，代表谐乐学院出战今年的格拉克斯杯。」

"Prema, a second-year student at Charmony Academy, proved to be unstoppable, taking a glorious victory over the weekend and securing the highest score in qualifying. She will join three other drivers to represent Charmony Academy and battle for this year's Glaux Cup."
「她的球笼『飞翔的皮皮西号』在枪响后一骑绝尘，这可是令全场车手嫉妒的顶尖之作，不难想象她背后赞助商对其不计成本的投入。」

"Her Spheroid, The Flying Pepeshi, left all of her competitors in its dust from the moment the starting gun was fired. It is a masterpiece of craftsmanship that has inspired envy in all of her fellow drivers. It is clear that her sponsors have spared no cost in their investment towards her and her future."
「她相较其他车手稍显迷你的身躯也令车迷们万分揪心，我们衷心希望普蕾玛在长达二十四系统时的拉力赛中不会陷入脱水危险，现在开始增重是她最好的选择。」

"Her smaller build compared to those of other drivers has become a concern for racing fans. We sincerely hope that Prema will not be at risk of dehydration during the <unbreak>24</unbreak>-system hour rally ahead. We believe her best choice would be to start gaining some weight."
这篇报道，你读起来什么感觉？
What do you feel when you read this article?
They are showing concern for you.
They are being sarcastic about you.
皮皮西…皮皮西…皮皮西的一切都是因为皮皮西…而不是因为我的努力……
Pepeshi... Pepeshi... Pepeshi... It's all because I'm a Pepeshi... It's not because of my own hard work at all...
皮皮西的体能很弱无法支撑球笼赛强度…皮皮西能成首席是赞助商看中了球笼赛运动在皮皮西市场的发展潜力……

Pepeshi are too physically weak to handle the intensity of a Spheroid Race... A Pepeshi was only able to become the lead driver because sponsors took an interest in the potential development of Spheroid sports in the Pepeshi market...
皮皮西他，皮皮西她，皮皮西所有人！！！
Pepeshi this, Pepeshi that, Pepeshi everything!!!
哼，让他们议论去吧，闹得越轰烈越好，越多人关注越好，然后我会证明给所有人看！
Humph! Let them talk! The more fuss they make and the more people take notice, the better! Then, I will prove them all wrong!
Can we talk a little more?
行啊，只要你不是冲着皮皮西人来的就好。
Alright, as long as you're not obsessed with the whole Pepeshi thing, too.
各学院的车手都是什么风格？
What are the drivers of each academy like?
球笼赛可不只是车手间的较量，它更是考验团队的综合作战。每个学院都有自己的优势与策略。
The Spheroid racing contest is not just a contest between drivers, it is more of a comprehensive battle that tests the entire team. Each academy has their own strengths and strategies.
首先，你需要一辆出色的球笼车。格拉克斯杯的赛道复杂多变，球笼车需要在多种类型的赛道稳定发挥性能。论造车，没有人拼得过筑梦学院那群学霸们。

First, you need an outstanding Spheroid. The tracks for the Glaux Cup are complex and varied, Spheroids need to be able to perform reliably on all kinds of tracks. When it comes to Spheroid construction, no one can compete with the Dreamweaver Academy bookworms.
获得冠军的最重要的因素——钱。球笼赛是匹诺康尼最昂贵的运动，造车需要钱，修建训练场地、更换训练耗材需要更多的钱。

The most important factor when it comes to taking victory... is money. Spheroid racing is the most expensive sport in Penacony. Creating a Spheroid costs money, but building a training ground and replacing supplies used in training costs even more.
不得不说，没有人比财富学院的家伙们更会搞钱——投资收益、拉赞助…靠着这些钞能力，他们已经连续拿下两届冠军了。

I have to say, no one manages to accumulate money like those guys at Fortune Academy... Interest from investments, attracting sponsors... They have managed to take two championships in a row with these shrewd money-making skills.
车手必须得有过硬的心理素质和信仰，以撑过极端的比赛环境——长达二十四系统时的拉力赛、失重、十倍重力…多样的考验。

Drivers need outstanding psychological parameters and faith in their own capabilities. That's what it takes to navigate the extreme racing environment. The <unbreak>24</unbreak>-system hour rally, weightlessness, tenfold gravity... All sorts of trials await.
你看我的心理素质就知道了，咱们谐乐学院盛产优秀车手，大致是得益于我们对信仰之事有一种忘我式的虔诚。
As you can see from my mentality, Charmony Academy creates outstanding drivers. This is most likely thanks to our selfless devotion to concepts such as belief and faith.
I have nothing else to ask.
三种致胜的关键因素，缺一不可，没有哪个学院能垄断比赛的胜利，我们用自己的所长彼此制衡，形成了当下三足鼎立的平衡局面。

These are the three crucial factors for victory that are all indispensable. This way, no one academy can monopolize victory. We each use our own strengths to check and balance each other, which is why we now have this current state of three-legged equilibrium.
哪个学院会赢得球笼赛？
Which academy's going to win this Spheroid race?
问谐乐学院首席车手这个问题？认真的？
You're asking the lead driver of Charmony Academy this question? Are you serious?
I have nothing else to ask.
你要是撞见《折纸时报》的那个小编，打我电话，我马上到！
If you come across that Paperfold Times editor, give me a call, and I'll be there in a jiffy!
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
…我就知道你要问这个！别以为皮皮西人的体型小，就可以随便欺负！
...I knew you were going to ask that! Don't think that you can just bully Pepeshi because we're small!
再说这个绒球有什么特别吗，就因为长在皮皮西人的头上，才让你这么感兴趣？
What is so special about this fluff ball anyway? Is it just the fact that they grow on our heads makes you so obsessed with them?
皮皮西…皮皮西…到处都对皮皮西人另眼相待，我真是受够了！
Pepeshi... Pepeshi... Everyone treats us so differently just because we're Pepeshi. I've had enough!
I don't have any other questions.
你要是撞见《折纸时报》的那个小编，打我电话，我马上到！
If you come across that Paperfold Times editor, give me a call, and I'll be there in a jiffy!
我们皮皮西人只是…浓缩了一点，又不是没手没脚！
We Pepeshi are just... We're just a little condensed. We're not helpless!
皮皮西是一个德智体美全面发展的种族，我们并不只有脑子好。
The Pepeshi people are developed in morality, intelligence, physicality, and beauty! We are more than just clever.
只是…我们和所谓的标准体型生物体育竞技时，常常落下劣势，他们跑一步，我们要跨两步，有时候是三步。
It's just... When it comes to physical competition against so-called standard-sized organisms, we are often at a disadvantage — when they run one step, we have to take two, sometimes three.
输多了，皮皮西人也失去了信心，开始逃避参与体育竞技项目。
After many losses, the Pepeshi lost their confidence and began to avoid taking part in physical competitions.
但没想到吧，哼哼，赛车运动中，更小的身形意味着更小的负重，就等于更快的速度！
But I bet you never imagined, hehe, that when it comes to racing, a smaller body means a lighter load for the vehicle, meaning greater speed!
唯一要战胜的敌人，只有我们自己！
The only rival that can defeat us is ourselves!
我要真有他们说得那么神乎其神，还在这开球笼车？
If I really were as exceptional as they say, would I still be racing Spheroids here?
校园里的小报写手格外偏爱我的坐骑。自从我跑出了点成绩，他们从未间断过猜测它的来历，各式各样传言都有——
The campus reporters just have a bias towards my Spheroid. Ever since I started to get results, they have not stopped speculating about its origins. I've heard all kinds of rumors...
有说，这车是苜蓿草家系赞助的，他们看中了皮皮西待开发的体育市场，于是斥巨资请来博识学会星际动力学派的专家设计了「飞翔的皮皮西号」。

Some say that it came from an Alfalfa Family sponsor — that they saw the potential in the developing Pepeshi sporting market and gave the Intelligentsia Guild's Interastral School of Kinetics a huge stipend to design The Flying Pepeshi.
我还是更喜欢另一个版本：这辆球笼搭载了忆质作为动力源，那是过去散溢忆质的残存，被皮皮西人私藏，观众目睹的胜利不过是忆质燃烧时产生的集体梦中梦。

There's another version I like even more, though: That my Spheroid is equipped with memoria as a power source. It is a secret stash of remnant memoria that was gathered by the Pepeshi. They say that the victory that the spectators witnessed was nothing more than a dream within a dream created by the combustion of memoria.
其实我的球笼只是最普通的型号喔，与学校的练习用车别无二致，只是舱内被改装得更适合我的个头，外表用了荧光粉的涂装，仅此而已。

Actually, my Spheroid is a completely normal model. It's exactly the same as the campus training model. The interior is just adjusted to suit my size better and the exterior has been painted fluorescent. That's all.
我和其他选手一样敬畏公平竞技的原则：参赛守则第<unbreak>521</unbreak>条——
I respect the principle of fair competition just like any of my fellow competitors: See article <unbreak>521</unbreak> of the competition guidelines...
禁止折纸大学校外人员或企业以任何形式参与比赛用车的设计、改造、制作，驾驶违规车辆的选手将被取消正赛资格，终生禁赛！

It is forbidden for personnel or businesses from outside of Paperfold University to take part in the design, modification, creation, or driving of competition vehicles. Any contestants found to be driving illegal cars will be disqualified from the current competition and banned for life!
真心难寻也无妨，我会好好利用你们的虚情假意。
Though you sound just as insincere as everyone else, I will make good use of your false wishes.
别看我身边簇满了人，商人、星探、经纪人、赞助商…他们没一个真心相信我的。
Don't be fooled by the traders, talent scouts, agents, and sponsors gathering around me... None of them actually believe in my capabilities.
他们都清楚怎么利用我这样的人——皮皮西人，有点天赋，有些成绩，非常冲动，有些孤立无援。
They know full well how to make use of someone like me... I'm a Pepeshi. I've got a little skill and some success. I'm impulsive and slightly isolated...
我被选为谐乐学院的球笼车手，参加预选赛时，这群人就找上我了。
It was when I was chosen to become the Charmony Academy Spheroid driver and took part in qualifying that they came to me.
刚开始，一切都很美妙。他们带我去梦境里最好的餐厅，递上完美的商业计划，然后不断地向我灌输梦想：我会是第一个皮皮西冠军，成为所有皮皮西人的榜样……

At the beginning, it was all wonderful. They took me to the finest restaurants in the Dreamscape, laid out perfect business plans, and kept filling my head with dreams: I would be the first Pepeshi champion, an idol for all Pepeshi...
但我清楚，如果我在亮相的首场比赛内没有惊艳全场，他们就会抛弃我，转而寻找下一个商机。
But I knew full well that if I hadn't shocked everyone with my debut performance, they'd have abandoned me and gone straight after their next business opportunity.
别误会了，我愿意配合他们的演出，更要感谢他们把我推到聚光灯下——
Don't get me wrong. I am happy to play along with their little performance. I'm actually grateful for them pushing me into the spotlight...
只要我拿下冠军，只要我进职业联赛，只要我能一呼百应，我就能…就能成为他们口中的那个希望！
If I can just win the championship and enter the pro leagues, if I can just win everyone's favor, then... then I can become the hope they all talk about!
只要有梦想，皮皮西人也可以被仰望！
As long as I have a dream, people will look up to Pepeshi as well!
时间过得好快。去年的这个时候，我以最后一名的成绩在预选赛中落败，不过那天也是我命运的转折点……
Time really flies. This time last year I was knocked out of the qualifiers, finishing in last place. Although, that was when my fate turned around...
不公的境遇常常是结构性的，市面现有的球笼没有适合皮皮西人的尺寸。赛前我也四处央求同学帮我改装，但没有人愿意把时间浪费在一个皮皮西选手身上。

Injustice is often structural, and none of the Spheroids on the market are fitted to a Pepeshi's body size. I begged my classmates to help me modify it before the competition, but no one was willing to waste their time on a Pepeshi contestant.
无奈之下，我只能开着过于宽敞的球笼车参赛……
With nowhere to turn, I had no choice but to drive an oversized Spheroid in the competition.
你见过搞笑卡通片里，身高不够的小孩怎么开车吗？我就是那样完成比赛的——屁股下垫着三本百科全书，腿上绑着一根延长的木棍用来踩油门。

You've seen how children drive cars in cartoons when they're too short, right? That's how I was in the contest... I had three encyclopedias under me as a cushion and a wooden stick strapped to my leg to help me step on the gas pedal.
结果，连带孙子来玩的老教授开得都比我快，还快了整整半圈。很遗憾吧，对那些本就瞧不起皮皮西的人，我的失败又巩固了他们心中的偏见。

In the end, even an old professor who had brought his grandson along for a fun ride drove faster than me. They beat me by half a lap! It's a shame, right? I failed and only reinforced the views of those people who already looked down on Pepeshi.
只有一个人不这么想——那天他看了我的比赛，认为眼中所见并非狼藉，而是一颗冉冉升起的明日之星。
There was just one person that did not agree... That day, he watched my race and believed that it was not a disaster he was witnessing, but the rising of a star.
赛后，他让赛训团队把我的驾驶舱改成了适合皮皮西人体型的构造，这才有了后面的故事…他就是上届球笼赛的冠军，财富学院的罗密欧。

Then, he had the training team convert my cockpit to suit a Pepeshi's size, and that's how we got to where we are today... He was actually the champion of the last Spheroid contest, Romeo of Fortune Academy.
He's going to betray Fortune Academy?
虽然球笼赛事关学院荣誉，但我们更珍视梦想。别看赛场上各个学院争得你死我活，私下我们经常交流经验，训练结束后都会聚在一起喝麦芽果汁呢。

Although the Spheroid Race is a matter of academic honor, we are more focused on our own dreams. On the track, the academies fight tooth and nail, but behind the scenes, we frequently share our experiences and often get together for malt juice after training.
这一次，我们会代表各自学院的荣誉而战——我绝对不会输给他！
This time, we will battle for the honor of our respective academies... I will not lose to him!
——那家伙真是气死人！下次再让我见着，非得给他来个过肩摔不可。
...That guy just makes me so dang mad! Next time I see him, I'm gonna judo throw him into next week!
眼前的学生怒气冲冲，你开始犹豫起是否该继续搭话。
The student ahead of you is boiling with rage, you start to wonder if talking to them is a good idea.
Violence is not allowed on campus.
哼，反正在梦里没事！没把他踹到苏乐达池子里都算好的了！
Humph, it doesn't matter, we're in a dream! He'll be lucky if I don't boot him into the SoulGlad pond!
Then give him a flying kick!
对，往胸口踢！想到那花里胡哨的领带我就来气！
Yeah, right in the chest! Just thinking about him and his fancy ties drives me mad!
你们两个的反应还真搭……
谁谁谁，谁和那种玩意搭！
Wh—Who would want to be compared to someone like that!?
…呃，啊…对、对不起！让你看到丢人的事了……
...Uhh, ah... S—Sorry! Sorry you had to see me like that...
你好！是游客对吧！请问你对展览感兴趣吗？筑梦学院新一届概念艺术展再过几个月就要举办了。如果有时间，请务必来参观！

Hello! You must be a visitor! Are you interested in exhibitions? Dreamweaver Academy's newest conceptual art exhibition is going to be taking place in a few months. If you have time, you must come and check it out!
虽然参展的大部分都是学生作品…但我们学院的教学质量可是声名远扬！
Although the majority of our displays are going to be student works... The quality of our school's education is known far and wide!
另外，包括门票和展品交易在内，这次展会收入的九成都会捐赠给星际知名的慈善机构。手头宽裕的话，还请为银河里贫困的人们贡献一份心意！

Also, <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of the proceeds taken from exhibition tickets and trades are going to be donated to famous interastral charitable organizations. If you are feeling generous, please consider making a donation to those less fortunate in the cosmos!
哈哈…唉…不行，我还是咽不下这口气。找个时间，得把那家伙捆起来扔垃圾桶里去！
Haha... Ah... No, I just can't get this guy off my mind. Next time I see him, I'm tying him up and throwing him in the trashcan!
当然，请随便问。我很乐意提供解答！
Of course, ask whatever you like. I would be happy to answer your questions!
你为什么想要当志愿者呢？
Why have you chosen to volunteer?
支持慈善事业一直是我的梦想，并且我自己的作品也会参展。既然宣传工作缺少人手，何乐而不为呢？

It has always been my dream to support charitable organizations. Plus, my works are going to be displayed, too. As we didn't have enough people doing the promotion work, I figured why not get involved?
…其实，还有一个原因。我已经到了该申请实习的时候，但简历上能写的实在是有些单薄。
...Actually, there is another reason. It's time to start applying to internships, but I've realized that my resume is looking a little thin.
那家伙一直也拿这事嘲笑我，虽然很不愿承认，但他说的确实有道理。
That guy kept mocking me for this. Even though I hate to admit it, he may be right.
只靠学院的成绩，恐怕竞争力不太够，我需要志愿者的经历来填补简历空白。
Just relying on my academic grades alone will not give me enough of a competitive edge. I need to fill the blanks with volunteer work.
You could just make the text bigger?
你是没见过我那些同学的简历，每一份看起来都像在闪闪发光。举几个例子，像是——「蝉联七十二届匹诺康尼历史知识竞赛冠军」……
You've never seen my classmates' resumes. They almost look like they glow! Let me give you some examples... "Champion of the Penaconian History Competition for seventy-two consecutive years..."
「经营品牌企业，职员由自己的一百五十名管家来担任。」
"Manages a brand enterprise staffed by <unbreak>150</unbreak> personal butlers."
「当本人二十五岁时，已经拥有了长达三十二年的工作经验。」
"By the age of <unbreak>25</unbreak>, had already amassed <unbreak>32</unbreak> years of work experience."
相比之下，我的「品德良好，成绩优异」看起来就和没气的苏乐达一样没劲。
Compared to them, my "outstanding work ethic and excellent grades" is like a bottle of flat SoulGlad.
What kind of works will there be at the exhibition?
我想想，今年同学们的想法相对保守一些，多半都是最小立体迷宫、微观园林之类的创作。
Let me think. This year's students' ideas are a little conservative. It will be mostly minimalist 3D mazes and microscopic gardens.
但相比于往届，展品形式有了一定程度的拓展，比如受关注的动物体验梦泡，迷因表演等等。当然，展馆本身也是一件精妙的作品。

Although, the forms of exhibitions will be expanded somewhat compared with previous years. There will be trending animal-experience dream bubbles, meme performances, and other things... Of course, the exhibition hall itself is an outstanding work.
Who is this "guy" that made you so mad?
唉，其实是我自己的事。你要是真好奇…行吧，能跟人讲讲也好。
Ah, that's just a personal issue. Although, if you're really curious... Alright, I guess it's good to talk to people about these things.
——财富学院的学生会主席，尚恩。那家伙就是个行走的投资机器。
...Chairman of the Fortune Academy student council — Shawn. That guy is a walking investment machine.
唯利是图，小家子气。就因为我前些日子跟他起了冲突，就开始处处找我、甚至找整个筑梦学院的麻烦！
He is a petty man who only cares about profit. Ever since I got into a little dispute with him, he's been causing trouble for both me and everyone in Dreamweaver Academy!
这次也是，把展会需要用的器材都提前买断了，害得我们没法开始筹备！
This time is no different. He bought out all of the equipment we were going to need for the exhibition in advance so we couldn't begin our preparations!
还故意在我眼前晃，把产权证摆给我看！说什么「喂，我知道你需要它」…要换成你，想不想揍他？
He deliberately rubbed it in my face and showed off his proof of purchase. He kept saying: "Hey, I know you need these." If it were you, would you not want to hit him?
对吧！那家伙明明脑子挺好使，怎么就这么小心眼？不能把心思用在正道上吗？！
Right!? He's clearly a smart guy. How can he be so hung up on such petty things? Can he not just put his mind to good use!?
好在他还没坏得那么彻底，后来答应便宜租给我们，最后造成的损失…就只有让我在游客面前情绪失控而已。
Fortunately, he wasn't completely unreasonable and agreed to rent them to us at a low price. In the end, the only damage he caused... was causing me to lose my temper in front of visitors.
真是糟透了，你要是愿意帮我个忙，就当没听过这茬吧。
He really is awful. But, please do me a favor and pretend I never told you this.
I don't have any other questions.
有空的话，请务必来参观筑梦学院的概念艺术展！
If you get time, please come along to the Dreamweaver Academy Conceptual Art Exhibition!
I don't have any other questions.
有空的话，请务必来参观筑梦学院的概念艺术展！
If you get time, please come along to the Dreamweaver Academy Conceptual Art Exhibition!
又见面了，游客！还是对我们的展览感兴趣吗？
We meet again, visitor! Are you still interested in our exhibition?
这次的展览，从收集作品到展馆规划，我们都花了很多功夫。虽然中间产生了点小插曲，但…无关紧要，哈哈。
We have put a lot of work into collecting display pieces and planning how the hall would be laid out. We had a little trouble along the way, but... It's nothing serious, haha.
重要的是，这些作品会转换为价值，而这份价值…能够切实地帮上其他人。
What's important is that these pieces will be converted into value, and this value... will be able to really help others.
对筑梦的热情，以及对相关课程的掌握，我有自信不会输给任何人。
I am confident that my passion for dreamweaving and my grasp of the curriculum are unmatched!
告诉你个秘密吧…我的家乡非常贫穷，和富丽堂皇的梦境截然不同。在那里，即使有家庭的庇护，寻找一个能遮风挡雨的稳定场所仍然要拼尽全力。

I'll tell you a secret... My hometown is extremely poor. It is a stark contrast to the rich and extravagant Dreamscape. There, even if you have a family to protect you, finding a stable place to shelter from the wind and rain takes real dedication.
离开残破的废墟，住进完整结实的建筑…看起来理所当然的事，对我们而言却极为困难。
Leaving the dilapidated ruins and moving into a complete and sturdy building... Though it seems like such a simple thing, it was extremely difficult for us.
所以我从小就定下目标——要为家乡的人们建造足够多坚固的房屋，供所有人安身。
So, I set myself an objective at a young age... I would construct enough strong and sturdy buildings in my hometown to give everyone a place to live.
这也是我选择进入筑梦学院的原因…哈哈，虽然学到的东西和这个完全不搭边……
This is also why I chose to come to Dreamweaver Academy... Haha, although everything I learn here is completely unrelated...
不过，对筑梦的热情，以及对相关课程的掌握，我有自信不会输给任何人。
But I'm confident that my passion for dreamweaving and my grasp of the curriculum are unmatched!
不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
No matter how hard I work, I will never... belong to that world.
很多人都称赞我的努力。但他们不知道…那只是因为我一无所有。
Many people praise my hard work. But, what they don't know is... it is all because I have nothing.
我拼命学习，是为了折纸大学的奖学金，为了那份荣誉…为了找到一份好工作……
All of my hard work studying is so I can attain the Paperfold University Scholarship. For that honor... And for finding a good job...
只有这样，我才能留在这里，从无数学生中脱颖而出，有机会实现自己的梦想。
That is the only way that I will be able to stay here, stand out amongst the countless other students, and have a chance to achieve my dreams.
I don't have any more questions.
但…这里是匹诺康尼，梦境里的人们大多身世显赫，对地位与价值更在乎，也更敏感。
But... this is Penacony. The majority of people from the Dreamscape are from notable backgrounds and are far more interested in and wary of status and value.
比如老是来烦我的那家伙，要不是因为惹到他，恐怕他绝对不会和我有任何交集。
It's like that guy who is always bothering me. If I hadn't angered him, I fear he never would have bothered interacting with me at all.
老实说，那家伙也有点可取之处。对那些从最开始就拥有许多东西的人来说，能为了证明自己而不懈努力，这也是个挺难能可贵的品质。

If I'm honest, there are things I could learn from that guy. For someone like him who has always been blessed with abundance from birth, that attitude of always working hard to prove oneself is actually a very precious quality.
所以偶尔我会想，我和他…是否有共同前行的可能？
So I sometimes think to myself... maybe he and I could find a common thread?
哈哈哈，你别当真，只是无谓的思绪罢了。不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
Hahaha, ignore me. They're just pointless thoughts... No matter how hard I work, I... I will never belong to that world.
想这些也没用，还是做好手头的每一件事吧。
Thinking about these things is pointless. I just have to make sure I do everything properly.
很多人都称赞我的努力。但他们不知道…那只是因为我一无所有。
Many people praise my hard work. But, what they don't know is... it is all because I have nothing.
我拼命学习，是为了折纸大学的奖学金，为了那份荣誉…为了找到一份好工作……
All of my hard work studying is so I can attain the Paperfold University Scholarship. For that honor... And for finding a good job...
只有这样，我才能留在这里，从无数学生中脱颖而出，有机会实现自己的梦想。
That is the only way that I will be able to stay here, stand out amongst the countless other students, and have a chance to achieve my dreams.
I don't have any more questions.
但…这里是匹诺康尼，梦境里的人们大多身世显赫，对地位与价值更在乎，也更敏感。
But... this is Penacony. The majority of people from the Dreamscape are from notable backgrounds and are far more interested in and wary of status and value.
比如老是来烦我的那家伙，要不是因为惹到他，恐怕他绝对不会和我有任何交集。
It's like that guy who is always bothering me. If I hadn't angered him, I fear he never would have bothered interacting with me at all.
老实说，那家伙也有点可取之处。对那些从最开始就拥有许多东西的人来说，为了证明自己而不懈努力，这也是个挺难能可贵的品质。

If I'm honest, there are things I could learn from that guy. For someone like him who has always been blessed with abundance from birth, that attitude of always working hard to prove oneself is actually a very precious quality.
所以偶尔我会想，我和他…是否有共同前行的可能？
So I sometimes think to myself... maybe he and I could find a common thread?
哈哈哈，你别当真，只是无谓的思绪罢了。不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
Hahaha, ignore me. They're just pointless thoughts... No matter how hard I work, I... I will never belong to that world.
那些没有职业素养的人…真让人作呕。
Those who lack professionalism... They make me sick.
那些人究竟什么时候才能意识到——筑梦在成为艺术前，首先是一项工程！
When will these people realize that... before dreamweaving became an art, it was a form of engineering!
我赞同阿锡卡教授的看法。无论外观如何繁杂，最基础的功能性都不可或缺。
I agree with Professor Asika's views. It does not matter how elaborate the exterior appearance is. A construction must at least serve its most basic functions.
那些为了好看，用发光忆质建造住宅的人，就该让他们自己住进去，等被天花板晃得睁不开眼的时候，看他们怎么后悔！
Those people who use sparkling memoria to construct residential buildings should have to move into them themselves. They'll regret their choices when the ceilings end up blinding them!
呼…这种人还只是蠢，已经算好的了。有另一种是坏——
Phew... These people are just plain stupid, which is almost a relief. It's the truly malevolent ones we need to worry about...
为了降低成本而使用薄弱忆质？提前结束工期，放着空荡荡的屋顶不管？为了钱，这些家伙什么事都干得出来。
Using low-quality memoria to lower costs? Ending construction projects early and leaving roofs wide open? These people will do anything for money.
要是在现实里，这就是…谋杀！就是因为有这种渣滓存在，我的家人才会……
If this was real life, this would simply be... murder! It's because of scum like them that my family...
我发誓，这样的败类，见一个我就举报一个！
I vow that I will personally report each and every one of these degenerates!
…在我看来，这不单单是对教师们正当权益的侵犯，更是对学生的不负责！故而我的诉求是……
...In my opinion, this is not only a violation of the legitimate rights and interests of teaching staff, it is also a disservice to the students! Therefore, my request is...
唔…刚刚那句措辞似乎不够严厉…换成「拿学生们的前途开玩笑」或许更适合些？
Hmm... I don't feel like that phrasing is harsh enough... Maybe I should change it to: "making a joke of student futures"?
…嗯？偷听得如此理直气壮，你也是个人才。所以这位同学，你找我有事吗？
...Hm? Being able to eavesdrop and still seem so self-righteous is a talent. Was there something you wanted to talk to me about?
我只是个路过的普通学生。
路过都不忘吃口瓜是吧。不过…要真这么好奇的话，和你说说也不是不行。
Just making sure to get the gossip as you wander by, huh? Although... I guess I could tell you more if you're really curious.
行啊，稍微满足下你的好奇心也无妨…毕竟这东西就像脑子，有总比没有强。
Alright, I guess I could satisfy your curiosity... Curiosity is like a brain — it's always better to have it.
简而言之，前些天我从学生那里听说，谐乐学院有位负责梦泡鉴赏课程的老教授，对众多星球的文化根本一无所知。

To put it simply, I recently heard from a student that there is a professor working in the Charmony Academy dream bubble connoisseurship course who knows absolutely nothing about interplanetary culture.
对此我大为震撼，甚至装作学生去听了他好几堂课，结果嘛……
I was absolutely shocked! I ended up actually going to a few of his classes and, well...
你猜怎么着，那个老教授不仅连几艘仙舟的名字都讲不出来，把天击将军说成是步离人，还宣称《银河忍法帖》的那个主角是从出云来的。
Guess what? Not only could he not even name the few Xianzhou ships, but he also said that the Merlin's Claw is a borisin and that the main character in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions is from Izumo!
学院的资深教授，上课讲的内容却漏洞百出，你说好不好笑？
He's an experienced academy professor, yet his teachings were full of holes. Isn't that ridiculous?
是吧。这种老师还能留在折纸大学任教，简直离谱！
Right? It's outrageous that a teacher like that would be able to stay and serve as a professor at Paperfold University!
是吗？看来你的涉猎范围也很广啊，等以后有空，我们来好好交流下。
Is that so? I see you have a vast scope of research. We should find time for a good discussion.
更好笑的还在后面呢——我尝试通过各种渠道向校方反映这件事，最终全都石沉大海，连个正经的回应都没有。

That's not even the most ridiculous part... I have tried to report this to the university through various channels and yet it's been completely swept under the rug! They haven't even given me a decent reply!
无意自夸，但就专业水平而言，我们这些年轻教师完全不比这种上课只会念教材的老…咳，老前辈要差。
I don't mean to boast, but in terms of professional capability, we young teachers are just as good as these old... ahem, our seniors, who just spend all their time reading out from the textbook.
可现实就是如此无奈：有的人能凭资历尸位素餐，霸占教授的位置；而有的人满肚子真才实学，却只能开个选修课。

But, there is no changing the reality: Some people manage to occupy the professor positions based purely on their history and experience, while those who possess genuine talent and intellect are left with nothing but elective courses.
现在知道我的诉求了吧——机会难得，得趁这次校庆，向学院当面讨个说法才行。

Now you understand my complaint, right? Opportunities like this don't come around often. I will take the school anniversary celebration as my moment to bring this matter to the university face-to-face.
Are you up for a chat?
还有问题？要是我的学生能像你这么积极就好了……
You have more questions? I wish my students were as interested and proactive as you...
Tell me more about this professor.
哈…其实他课讲得也没那么烂——不过是半个系统时内读错了五个音、误用了三次典故、还把两篇文献的作者完全混淆了而已。

Ah... If I'm honest, his lectures weren't really that bad... It's just that in half a system hour, he mispronounced five words, used three incorrect quotes, and completely confused the authors of two separate documents.
你知道当我听他信誓旦旦地把「翾翔」念成「寰翔」时的感受吗？
Do you know how I felt when he said "aeronautics" instead of "aerodynamics" with a completely straight face?
参加博识学会讲座的时候，就听说有位教授对白痴过敏…如今我可算知道那究竟是个什么滋味了！
When I attended a lecture at the Intelligentsia Guild, I heard that there was a professor who was allergic to stupidity... Now I know what that feels like!
理论上来说是该管。但实际上——你不能因为一所学校建在「美梦」里、并且以「美梦多彩，理想自由」为校训，就真指望它能「完美」得像个梦似的。

Theoretically, they should care about it. However, in reality... you cannot expect a school to achieve the "perfection" of a dream simply because it is built inside a dream and has the motto: "Color your dreams, free your ideals."
只要有人的地方就有利益纠葛，就有纷争，毕竟…哎，所有人都这样。
Wherever there are people, there will be conflicts of interest and disagreements. After all... that is just how people are.
不过当然，这并不影响我为自己和学生们的权益继续抗争下去。
However, naturally, that won't stop me from continuing to defend the rights of myself and my students.
听够了，满意了？那就去玩你自己的吧。
You've heard enough to satisfy you? Go and entertain yourself then.
唔，稿子刚才念到哪了来着……
Ah, where did I just read up to...
既然这么喜欢跟我交流，不如下学期来选修我的课程吧？我打算讲「翁瓦克的民俗与文化」，一点都不难，还有挺多课外实践。

As you enjoy talking to me so much, how about taking my elective next semester? I plan to teach the customs and culture of Vonwacq. It's super easy and there will be loads of extracurricular activities.
而且…看在是熟人的份上，说不定期末考试的时候，我还能给你加几分呢？
Plus... as we're friends, I may be able to bump your grades up a bit when it comes to end-of-term exams?
...At the end of the day, what's the difference?
几年前，为了做田野调查，我曾到访过某个偏远贫瘠的星球。那里的人们还处于游牧与农耕的过渡期，比起「生活」，他们更加注重「生存」。

A few years ago, I once visited a remote and barren planet for my field research. The local people were still in the transitional period between nomadism and agriculture. They were more preoccupied with "survival" than "living."
我以高高在上的视角去评判那些当地居民：我看着他们整日躬耕不辍却收获寥寥，看着他们为猎物分配不均而大打出手，并为此生出虚伪的怜悯。

I looked down on them with a sense of superiority and judged the locals: I watched them toiling all day to receive meager harvests and get into disputes over the uneven distribution of game meat. I felt an almost hypocritical pity for them.
可如今我越发觉得，我们和他们、这里和那里，其实没有什么本质上的区分——
But now I realize, more and more, that there is no difference between us and them, between our planet and theirs...
我们这些所谓的*学者*啊，整日在知识的田野中躬耕不辍却收获寥寥，还得为了教学资源明争暗斗，恨不得大打出手。
We so-called scholars spend all day toiling in the fields of knowledge to come back with dry harvests. Then, we plot and scheme over academic resources and can't wait to get into disputes.
那么，我该怜悯自己吗——毕竟对于我们这样的普通人而言，这世上并不存在什么纯粹的、知识的乐土。
So, should I pity myself? For normal people like us, there is no such thing as a pure paradise of knowledge after all.
年轻的教授嘴角噙着微笑，眼睛里却燃烧着安静的怒火。
A smile hung on the young professor's face, but a quiet rage burned in his eyes.
那位教授…我稍稍调查了一下他的背景：匹诺康尼本地人，家境优渥；本校毕业生，成绩一般但有个好舅舅——据说是家族的某位大人物。

That professor... I did some secret research into his background: He's a Penacony native from a prestigious family. He graduated from this academy with average grades, but he has an uncle... who coincidentally is a big shot in The Family.
哈…为了研究我可以奔赴险恶的荒野，深入未知的雨林，可以不吃不喝好几天去观察去记录…可他呢？

Ah... For the sake of my research, I would be willing to traverse the dangerous wilds or go deep into unknown rainforests. I could go without food or water for many days to observe and record... But what about him?
纯粹的知识无法为他带来任何喜悦，只是他用以营生的工具、博得名利的踏板。
Pure knowledge brings him no joy. It is just a tool for him to make a living, a springboard for fame.
…这个送给你。以后你可不能成为这样面目可憎的人啊。
...I want you to have this. I hope that you will never become such a loathsome person.
那位教授…纯粹的知识无法为他带来任何喜悦，只是他用以营生的工具、博得名利的踏板。
That professor... Pure knowledge brings him no joy. It is just a tool for him to make a living, a springboard for fame.
就是这样的人…在我眼中格外面目可憎……
People like this... I find them especially loathsome...
真是精彩纷呈的一出大戏啊……
不得不说，上次的报告会可真是太精彩了，我还是头一次看到三个学院的教授吵成那样——
I have to say, the last reporting session was truly wonderful. It was the first time I have ever seen professors from across the three academies argue so ferociously...
财富学院嘲笑筑梦学院「打灰的臭劳工」、筑梦学院说谐乐学院「假装清高」、谐乐学院批判财富学院「自我物化」……

The Fortune Academy lecturer called the Dreamweaver Academy lecturer "a stinky cement-mixing laborer." The Dreamweaver Academy lecturer said the Charmony Academy lecturer "puts on an act of superiority." The Charmony Academy lecturer criticized the Fortune Academy lecturer for "self-objectification"...
太精彩了…哎呦，这就是匹诺康尼宣扬的「同谐」吗，真是可怜又可笑啊。
It was truly wonderful... Ah, is this the Harmony that Penacony touts? It is truly pathetic and laughable.
啧，尽是些没品的家伙…我就不信真找不到一个…嗯？
Tsk, none of them have any taste... Surely I can find at least one... Hm?
嗨！这位同学，能占用你一点时间吗？我希望能向你介绍一下我们的社团——「怪奇俱乐部」！
Hi! Fellow student, can I take a moment of your time? I was hoping to introduce you to our school club... the Strange Club!
那当然！咱可是正规社团，学院里登记在案的，你就放一百个心吧！
Of course! We're a proper, registered club. Don't you worry about that at all!
呃…没兴趣不要紧，你听我讲完就有了！不会耽误太久，真的！
Uh... If you're not interested now, hear me out and you will be! I won't take much of your time, I promise!
那我就直说了——朋友，你听过「折纸大学七大不可思议」吗？
I'll get straight to the point... My friend, have you heard of The Seven Wonders of Paperfold University?
学院角落平平无奇的喷泉却是「迷路圣地」，有人说那是幽灵作祟，有人说那是筑梦BUG；知名教授众目睽睽之下化身气球，是人性的扭曲，还是道德的沦丧…等等等等！

An unremarkable water fountain in a corner of the university is actually a "shrine of the lost." Some say it's haunted by ghosts, others think it is a dreamweaving bug. A famous professor transformed into a balloon in front of a room full of witnesses. Is it a distortion of humanity or the loss of morality...! And that's just the beginning!
怎么样，是不是特刺激，有没有很好奇？先别急，还有更劲爆的呢！
What do you think? Doesn't it get you fired up? Aren't you super curious? Don't go rushing off yet, I've got even more shocking stuff to come!
「睡蕉小猴」知道吧——那玩意儿在前段时间火得离谱，也消失得突兀。
You've heard of Slumbernana Monkey, right? That thing was trending like crazy not long ago, but now it's vanished into thin air just as quickly.
原本大家还对小猴爱得死去活来，到处「蕉蕉蕉蕉」呢，就一天不到的功夫，所有人都去讨论《银河忍法帖》了。
Everyone was obsessed with that little monkey. All you'd hear was "bana bana bana." Then, before a day had even passed, everyone moved on to that Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions.
出于对怪谈的敏锐嗅觉，我开始着手调查，但你猜怎么着？所有曾经的小猴粉丝都表现得——特别正常！
I have a very keen sense when it comes to ghost stories, so I began researching it. And do you know what I found? All of these people who were monkey fans all seemed... completely normal!
That was the conclusion of your research?
咳。别急嘛，你不觉得这才是最奇怪的吗？就算匹诺康尼潮流迭代再怎么快，也不该如此不留痕迹…先叠个甲啊，我没说芮克先生的新作不好，我自己也是他的粉丝。

Ahem. Hold on now, don't you think that is precisely what makes it strange? Trends in Penacony may change quickly, but it's not normal for them to just vanish without a trace, is it? Although, I should say that I don't mean Mr. Reca's work is no good, I'm a fan of his, too.
总之这很难不让人去怀疑，事情背后是否有什么阴谋。比如一场家族针对学生们秘密进行的精神实验，再比如梦境的结构发生根本改变…

Either way, I can't help but suspect that there is some kind of secret plot behind all this. I mean, what if this is some kind of secret psychological experiment that The Family carried out on students? Or maybe the structure of the Dreamscape itself suddenly experienced a fundamental structural transformation...
嘶…好家伙，我这是撞大运了？快快快，给我讲讲！
Ah... I knew it! Have I hit the jackpot? Quick, quick, tell me everything you know!
说起这个你可就不困了——眼见一个系统时过去，你依旧滔滔不绝舌灿莲花毫无疲态。
As you start to discuss this topic, all of your exhaustion suddenly fades away... A system hour passes before your very eyes as you continue your tireless speech without any sign of slowing down.
呃…要不今天先到这？你这故事咳、我是说，你提供的讯息非常有趣，我会好好记录下来的！
Uh... Maybe we should leave it here for today? This story of yours — uhh — I mean this information you have given me is extremely interesting. I will make sure I get it all written down!
嘿嘿，那是当然！在这方面我的鼻子可是比哈贝克人还灵敏。
Heh-heh, of course! When it comes to things like this, my nose is sharper than the Harbecks'!
对了，你要是知道些什么，记得情报共享啊。我请你吃恰丽卡学姐的点心，那个现在可是很难抢到的！
Oh, and if you find out anything else, then make sure to come and share intel with me. I'll treat you to some of senior Chaletka's homemade snacks. They're not easy to get hold of nowadays!
They say that curiosity killed the cat...
就当你是在夸我了…啧，至少不是什么「颠子」、「怪胎」之类的评价……
I'll take that as a compliment... Tch, at least it's better than being called a "wacko" or a "freak"...
不过说真的，人要是没了好奇心，和下水道里的鳄鱼又有什么区别？
But seriously, if humanity loses their curiosity, how are they any different from a crocodile crawling around in the sewers?
总之，我准备对「睡蕉小猴」进行更深入的调查。但当务之急…我需要一个得力助手。
Either way, I'm going to do further research into Slumbernana Monkey. However, given the urgency of the task, I need a capable assistant...
而你——就有这个潜质！现在递交入团申请，你就是除了本社长之外最资深的成员，有权优先享受社团的一切资源福利！

And you... You've got what it takes! If you submit your application to join now, you'll be the most senior member after me, the club leader! You will be able to enjoy all the benefits and resources our club offers!
怎么样，心动了吗？机会难得，可千万别错过啊！
What do you think? It's a great honor, right? This is a rare opportunity, make sure you don't miss out!
Do you know any other ghost stories?
这你可就问对人了！让我想想…这学期比较出名的怪谈有「死亡使者」、「千面杀手」、「折纸小鸟」以及「神秘信使」，你想听哪个？

You asked the right person! Let me think... The more well-known ghost stories from this semester were the "Envoy of Death," "Thousand-Faced Killer," "Origami Bird," and "Mysterious Messenger." Which one would you like to hear about?
传说梦境中有散播「死亡」的可怖怪兽，一旦被它掳走，人们在现实中的 躯体就会成为一具空壳。
Rumor has it that there is a terrifying monster in the Dreamscape that spreads "death." If someone is taken away by it, their bodies in the real world will be left as empty shells.
这个怪谈曾是街头巷尾讨论的对象，但不知为何突然销声匿迹了——简直就像这次的「睡蕉小猴」一样。
This ghost story was a hot topic on the streets a while ago, but it suddenly went quiet... It's just like the Slumbernana Monkey incident.
对此我倒是有个猜测：或许这根本就是家族自导自演的一场戏，目的是借「怪物」之手，清除对梦境有威胁的家伙们……

I actually have a speculation about this, though: Perhaps this is all nothing more than a performance put on by The Family. They could just be using the identity of a "monster" to clear out people that pose a threat to the Dreamscape...
有段时间，在匹诺康尼的街头频频发生恐怖袭击事件——人们好端端走在大马路上，或是被人用大锤一通乱砸、或是被人用领带活活勒醒……

There was a period of time when there were terrifying attacks happening in the streets all the time... People would be minding their business in the streets and would be either smashed in the head with a huge hammer or strangled with a necktie...
虽然每次凶手的样貌、种族、作案手法各不相同，几起案件在形式上却相当一致：现场总会留下三样东西——凶器，受害者的私人物品，以及用途不明的美梦剧团。

Even though the murderer looked different, was of a different race and used a different M.O. each time, the cases were consistent in one thing: They would always leave three things at the scene of the crime — the weapon, the victim's personal effects, and a Sweet Dreams Troupe member, purpose unknown.
而奇怪的是…如此恶劣的事件，知情者却寥寥无几，甚至就连家族也对此不闻不问——至少表面如此。

What's even more strange is that... despite the brutality of these attacks, no one seemed to know about them. Even The Family seemed to be completely oblivious... At least that's how it seemed on the surface.
我有个大胆的猜想：折纸小鸟其实并非单纯的卡通角色，它们真实地存在于匹诺康尼的街头巷尾，但只有极少数的、被选中的人才能看到它们。

I have a bold theory: That origami birds are not simply cartoon characters, but they actually exist on the streets of Penacony. It's just that only a very small number of selected people can see them.
按照某个故事里的说法，那些「小鸟」是逝于梦中之人所化的幽灵。它们被困在梦里，无法离开，又太过孤独，才会时不时想办法让人们看到自己……

According to a story I once heard, these "birds" are actually the spirits of people who passed away in a dream. They are trapped inside, unable to escape. It is their unbearable loneliness that leads them to occasionally allow themselves to be seen by us...
简直就像是书上说的「地缚灵」一样，要是我也能看到它们就好了。
They're just like the "earth-bound spirits" I have read about in books. If only I could see them, too.
…这件事嘛，消息的来源我不便提及…大概就是说，一伙虚构史学家绑架了橡木家主——大明星知更鸟的哥哥，星期日。

...That one, huh? I cannot actually tell you where I got my intel on this, but... the general story is that a group of History Fictionologists kidnapped the Oak Family Head — Sunday, brother of that famous star Robin.
案发现场就在大剧院，绑匪留下了封不知所云的绑架信，通篇都在说什么乌鸦什么的…可真够离谱的，对吧？
This all happened at the Grand Theater. The kidnappers left some kind of incomprehensible kidnapping note talking about crows or something... Pretty crazy, right?
但据我所知，前段时间橡木家系好像确实发生了什么不得了的变动…至于为何将此事归为怪谈，姑且算我的私心吧——
As far as I know, though, the Oak Family did actually undergo some huge changes a while back... As for why I categorize this as a ghost story... let's just say it's my personal interest.
那封信落款的署名，来自于一部有名的怪奇小说，而小说衍生的同人广播电台最近恰巧开播了。
The name signed on that letter comes from a famous horror novel, the fan radio station for which just so happened to start broadcasting recently.
不不不，一点都不打扰，想听怪谈的话，随时都可以来找我！
No, no! You're not interrupting me at all. If it's ghost stories you're after, you can come and see me anytime!
拜拜！记得有空来递交入团申请啊！
Bye! Don't forget to hand in your club application when you get a moment!
绝对不可能是什么排演事故…我敢用这学期的绩点发誓。
There is no way that this was just a simple rehearsal accident... I'd bet my semester's grades on it!
嗨，同学！是来递交入团申请的吗？我就知道咱俩肯定合得来——
Hi, fellow classmate! Are you here to hand in your club application? I just knew that we'd get on...
别紧张，还没准备好也没关系，我又有新素材了，正好和你分享一下！
No need to worry if you haven't got it ready yet. I've got new material to share with you!
前阵子克劳克影城的怪事你知道吧——一场转瞬即逝的筹码雨之后，天空破开了个巨大的口子。
You've heard about the weird story that went down at Clock Studios Theme Park a while ago, right? A flood of chips started raining down, then a huge hole opened in the sky.
虽然官方发出声明，说是鸢尾花家系在测试什么「拟梦技术」时发生了机械事故，但这种说辞也就能骗骗傻子。
Although the official statement was that the Iris Family were testing some kind of DreamSim Tech and there was some kind of mechanical malfunction, only simpletons would fall for an excuse like that.
我从一位「当事人」那里听说，其实是有位公司的高管得罪了巡海游侠，被人追杀到匹诺康尼来了。为了自保，这位高管在克劳克影院设下陷阱，想解决掉游侠，但结果嘛……

I heard from a witness that there was an IPC official who had gotten on the wrong side of the Galaxy Rangers, and they chased him down to Penacony. To protect himself, this official had laid a trap in Clock Studios, thinking he could take down the Ranger, but it turns out...
虽然那人是这么说的，我总觉得事情不会这么简单。你想啊，能轻而易举地斩断天空…这可不是普通游侠能做到的……
Although that's what they told me, I don't think it's that simple. Think about it. Cutting the sky in half with ease... That's not something a simple Ranger could do, is it...?
前阵子克劳克影城的怪事你知道吧——一场转瞬即逝的筹码雨之后，天空破开了个巨大的口子。
You've heard about the weird story that went down at Clock Studios Theme Park a while ago, right? A flood of chips started raining down, then a huge hole opened in the sky.
虽然官方发出声明，说是鸢尾花家系在测试什么「拟梦技术」时发生了机械事故，但这种说辞也就能骗骗傻子。
Although the official statement was that the Iris Family were testing some kind of DreamSim Tech and there was some kind of mechanical malfunction, only simpletons would fall for an excuse like that.
我从一位「当事人」那里听说，其实是有位公司的高管得罪了巡海游侠，被人追杀到匹诺康尼来了。为了自保，这位高管在克劳克影院设下陷阱，想解决掉游侠，但结果嘛……

I heard from a witness that there was an IPC official who had gotten on the wrong side of the Galaxy Rangers, and they chased him down to Penacony. To protect himself, this official had laid a trap in Clock Studios, thinking he could take down the Ranger, but it turns out...
不过虽然那人是这么说的，我总觉得事情不会这么简单。你想啊，能轻而易举地斩断天空…这可不是普通游侠能做到的……
Although that's what they told me, I don't think it's that simple. Think about it. Cutting the sky in half with ease... That's not something a simple Ranger could do, is it...?
...It's no good... Focus, you mustn't... sleep...
…唔…小点声，不要再爬来爬去的了…磁带摩擦的声音太吵…听不清广播了……
...Ahh... Quiet, stop crawling around... The sound of the tape is too loud... I can't hear the broadcast clearly...
别、别晃！你到底有多少眼睛啊？再晃我就要吐啦…停一停…停一停……
Stop, stop shaking! How many eyes do you have!? Stop shaking, or I'm going to hurl... Stop... Please stop...
...Hm? You're... It's you... What's going on...?
What... was I doing just now?
神色恍惚的丽姬娅向你走来，却左脚踩右脚，一头扎进大地母亲的怀抱。少女霎时眼圈通红，眼神却恢复了清明。

Ligeia walked towards you in a daze. Her left leg stumbled over the other and sent her crashing into the embrace of Mother Earth below her. The young girl's eyes redden with unshed tears, but she seems to have finally regained her senses.
…嗯…你是…是你吗，修女小姐…你在哪…好痛啊，救救我吧……
...Hmm... You're... Is it you? Miss Nun... Where are you... It hurts, save me...
…拒绝…没有…深眠…我不想…还不是——嗷！
...I refuse... I will not... slumber... I don't want... It's not... Oww!
痛苦挣扎的丽姬娅一头撞上了墙壁，只听「铛——」的一声脆响，少女霎时眼圈通红，眼神却恢复了清明。
Writhing in pain, Ligeia hit her head against the wall as you heard a crisp "thud." The young girl's eyes redden with unshed tears, but she seems to have finally regained her senses.
嘶——痛痛痛…啧，我刚刚又陷入谵妄状态了，对吧？
Ow... It hurts, it hurts... Tsk, I was in a trance again, wasn't I?
就说那个电台绝对有问题，他们还不信…啊，抱歉，这件事有些危险，学校里很多人都中招了，所以我不打算邀请你一起调查。

I knew there was something wrong with that radio station. They still don't believe me... Ah, sorry, this matter is quite dangerous. Many students have already fallen victim. I will not invite you to help me investigate this one.
不过…这个你倒是可以看看——答应我，如果遇到了和「锈墨」电台有关的事情，一定要及时离得远远的，好吗？
Although... you can keep an eye out for something for me... Promise me, if you come across anything related to Rusty Ink Radio Station, you stay well away, okay?
啧，就说那个电台绝对有问题，他们还不信…啊，抱歉，这件事有些危险，学校里很多人都中招了，所以我不打算邀请你一起调查。

Tsk, I knew there was something wrong with that radio station. they still don't believe me... Ah, sorry, this matter is quite dangerous. Many students have already fallen victim. I will not invite you to help me investigate this one.
答应我，如果遇到了和「锈墨」电台有关的事情，一定要及时离得远远的，好吗？
Promise me, if you come across anything related to Rusty Ink Radio Station, you stay well away, okay?
神经病啊！自己不吃辣的，还得所有人陪你一起啃水煮白菜？
Is something wrong with you!? You think just because you can't handle spicy food that everyone around you would have to live on boiled cabbage?
我就不明白了，有些人到底哪来的优越感——爱好小众怎么了，一没花你苜蓿币，二没喝你苏乐达，管这么宽干嘛？

I don't know where everyone gets their sense of superiority... What's wrong with having a niche hobby? I'm not spending your Alfalfa credits or drinking your SoulGlad, so why are you sticking your nose into my business?
整天见了人一口一个「颠子」、一口一个「怪胎」…啧，再「哔哔哔」个没完，小心我往你们汽水里塞老鼠！
All day, I have people calling me "wacko" and "weirdo"... Tsk. If you keep up your whining, I'll stick a rat in your soda!
少女的眼睛闪闪发亮，让人不由想起学校中央永不熄灭的灯光。
The young girl's eyes sparkle with a light reminiscent of the undying flames of the campus lamps.
怎么样，我的好助手，准备好和我一起探索「折纸大学七大不可思议」中的第八个——「睡蕉小猴」了吗？
What do you think, my trusty assistant? Are you ready to explore the eighth of The Seven Wonders of Paperfold University — the Slumbernana Monkey?
谁说只有八个了？除去小猴，还有个新收录的怪谈叫「锈墨电台」…喂，你那是什么表情？四大天王有五个，七大不可思议有九个，这不是常识吗？

There are not just eight, you know! It's not just the monkey, there's even the newly recorded ghost story of the Rusty Ink Radio Station, too! ...Hey, what's with that look on your face? There are five people in the Formidable Four, right? It's only normal that there would be nine of the Seven Wonders, right?
看来有时间得给你好好补补课…放心吧，我可是专门整理过每个怪谈的详细内容，给你当教材足够了！
Looks like I'll have to fill you in when we get time... Fear not, I have organized all of the details on every ghost story. You'll have plenty of materials to learn from!
四大天王有五个，七大不可思议有九个，这不是常识吗？
There are five people in the Formidable Four, right? It's only normal that there would be nine of the Seven Wonders, right?
看来有时间得给你好好补补课…放心吧，我可是专门整理过每个怪谈的详细内容，给你当教材足够了！
Looks like I'll have to fill you in when we get time... Fear not, I have organized all of the details on every ghost story. You'll have plenty of materials to learn from!
啊，你好，是新来的社员吗？我好像没见过你...噢，看你这打扮，我想起来了——
Ah, hello! Are you the new member? I don't think I've met you before... Oh, I recognize that outfit...
你就是传说中的那位无名客啊，没想到能在这里遇见你，真是我的荣幸。
You are the legendary Nameless, aren't you? I never imagined I would meet you here. It is a true honor!
对了，我还没自我介绍呢。我叫诺伯蒂，目前是刚加入喜剧社的成员，主要是写写剧本、编排节目、做点幕后工作。
Oh, I haven't introduced myself. My name is Nobody. I've just recently joined the comedy club. I mainly write scripts, edit programs, and do behind-the-scenes work.
有时候社里缺人手，我也会客串一些龙套角色，偶尔在梦泡里露个脸。运气好的话，你说不定能看到我的正脸特写镜头呢。
Sometimes we're short on people, so I'll do walk-on cameos or show my face in a dream bubble. If you're really lucky, you might get to see a close-up of me.
What does the comedy club do?
顾名思义，主要是搞即兴表演和小品创作的社团，除了现场演出，我们还会不定期地制作一些梦泡，把表演录好去外面售卖，给大家一个沉浸式体验喜剧的机会。

As the name suggests, we're a club that mainly puts on improv shows and creates skits. As well as live performances, we also occasionally produce dream bubbles, recording our performances to sell externally and giving people a chance to experience an immersive comedy.
听上去就是个跑龙套的…
You just sound like an extra?
嗯，我就是大家口中「那个跑龙套的」，但我觉得无所谓呀，凡事总要有第一步的，慢慢来嘛。
Yeah, I'm the definition of a "walk-on extra." I don't mind though. Everyone has to start somewhere. What's the hurry?
只要能做自己喜欢的事情，能把喜剧当成一门艺术来钻研，对我来说就很满足了。至于名气之类的，这些就随缘吧。
Just being able to do what I love and study comedy as an art is extremely satisfying for me. As for fame and fortune, that's all down to fate.
说来惭愧，其实我加入社团之后也写过什么像样的段子，没办法，学业压力大，我只能抽空来参加社团活动。
I'm ashamed to say it, but I haven't really written anything decent since joining the club. With all the pressure from my studies, I can only make time to attend club events when I can.
而且，比起自己登台演出，我还是更喜欢看前辈们的表演…没办法，他们实在太有魅力了，一举一动都是节目效果。
Plus, I prefer to watch my seniors perform than to take to the stage myself... I can't help it. They're too talented. Their every move just screams entertainment.
虽然因为植入广告的事，在折纸论坛上被骂得有点惨，但那只是梦泡经过夸张处理后的效果，现场表演不是那么回事。

Although we got massively chewed out for product placement on the Paperfold Forum, it was just because of the exaggerated effects added when our performances were converted to dream bubbles. The live performances were never that bad.
哎，真是搞不懂，就事论事有那么难嘛？有机会的话，你还是来现场看看吧，观感绝对和梦泡见到的不一样。

Ah, I just don't get it. Is it really that hard to just appreciate our performances for what they are? If they get the opportunity, they should just come and watch us perform live. The experience is always going to be different from watching us in a dream bubble.
说吧，我可喜欢和你这样有见识的人交流了。
Say it. I love conversing with cultured people like yourself.
给我介绍下你们社团呗？
Tell me more about your club?
我们喜剧社成立也有点年头了，本来只是小众社团，制作梦泡的初衷也只是想留个纪念，给社团挣点外快维持运转用的。

Our comedy club has been around for a few years now. We were small at first. Our original inspiration for making dream bubbles was just to leave some kind of memento and help earn some extra cash to maintain operations.
谁知最近走了大运，有几个前辈的脱口秀反响很好，梦泡都卖光了。连匹诺康尼电视台都闻声赶来，想跟我们签优先购买协议。

Unexpectedly, we had a recent stroke of luck with a few of our seniors received a great reception on their stand-up shows, and our dream bubbles sold out. Even the Penacony TV Station came running to us hoping to sign a priority purchase agreement.
前辈们看现在人气不错，就接了些广告，却引起了不少争议。不说折纸论坛吧，光是我们喜剧社内部也有不少反对的声音，担心过度商业化会影响创作。

These seniors realized that they were getting popular and accepted some advertising deals, which actually caused quite a lot of controversy. It wasn't just the Paperfold Forum — Even many of our own club members were growing concerned that over-commercialization could affect our works.
其实大家的顾虑我能理解，但我也不好对前辈们的决策说三道四。
Honestly, I can understand their concerns. But I have no right to criticize the decisions of my seniors.
我还是学生，平时当然是以学业为主啦。筑梦学院的作业多，已经够忙了。好不容易挤出点课余时间，我就创作点剧本，编排下节目什么的。

I'm still a student, so naturally I'm normally busy with my studies. I'm already very busy with the mountains of homework on the Dreamweaver Academy's end. When I finally manage to secure some free time, I create scripts and edit shows and stuff.
偶尔在喜剧社里客串演出，帮前辈们录制下梦泡什么的。
Sometimes I make cameo appearances or help my seniors record dream bubbles.
忙是真忙，累也是真累。不过能做自己喜欢的事情，再苦再累我也乐意。
I'm always ridiculously busy and tired. That said, if it means I can do what I'm passionate about, I don't mind the tiredness.
Is there any gossip in the club?
还能有什么八卦？之前发售的梦泡里加了些植入广告，在折纸论坛上出现了不少负面评价，结果引来老观众们疯狂吐槽。

What kind of gossips are you expecting? We recently put some product placement into our dream bubbles, which attracted a lot of negative criticism on the Paperfold Forum and a crazy amount of complaints from viewers.
虽说初衷是为社团创收，筹备点翻修舞台的资金。但这些贴子在我们社团内传疯了，现在内部争议挺大的——究竟该不该商业化发展，大家都说不准。

Although these were originally intended to generate income for the club and raise funds to repair our stage, these posts have been shared like crazy throughout our club. There's a lot of internal conflict now about whether we should allow ourselves to commercialize and develop. No one is quite sure.
还有人眼红那几个走红的前辈，冷嘲热讽地说了几句，前辈们不服气，反击回去。这一来一回，互相数落对方的，又扯出了不少陈年往事。

Some people were also jealous of our popular seniors and made some sassy retorts about them. Our seniors wouldn't stand for this and clapped back. A lot of shade was thrown back and forth, and a lot of old memories were dragged up.
我反正懒得看他们那点事，喜剧是要带给人快乐的，这种笑不出来的事情，我反正不想搭理。
I don't have the energy to get involved with these trivial matters, though. Comedy is supposed to make people happy! I don't want to pay any mind to things like this that won't make anyone laugh.
I have nothing else to ask.
不知道你有没有看过我们喜剧社的梦泡，有条件的话，我还是建议你来现场看，和梦泡里完全是两回事。
I don't know if you've seen any of our club's dream bubbles? If you can, I would recommend that you come and see us live — it's a completely different experience.
至于那些梦泡的评价，我不建议你去看。不管是好评还是差评，我觉得都不够客观…但没办法，哈，屁股决定脑袋…人生来如此。

As for comments on the dream bubbles, I would advise against reading them. Be it good comments or bad ones, I don't think they're objective enough... Can't be helped though. Your perspective defines your logic... That's just how life is.
I have nothing else to ask.
不知道你有没有看过我们喜剧社的梦泡，有条件的话，我还是建议你来现场看，和梦泡里完全是两回事。
I don't know if you've seen any of our club's dream bubbles? If you can, I would recommend that you come and see us live — it's a completely different experience.
至于那些梦泡的评价，我不建议你去看。不管是好评还是差评，我觉得都不够客观…但没办法，哈，屁股决定脑袋…人生来如此。

As for comments on the dream bubbles, I would advise against reading them. Be it good comments or bad ones, I don't think they're objective enough... Can't be helped though. Your perspective defines your logic... That's just how life is.
…啧，群聊开始了，看来是又吵起来了，跟你说会话的功夫这就弹了一大堆消息出来。
...Tsk, it's the group chat. Looks like people are arguing again. Look at all these messages that have piled up just while I was talking with you.
我看看是谁发的…哦，刚加入的新生……
Let's see who's been sending them... Oh, it's a new student...
哈，屁股决定脑袋，自己还要靠家里养呢，当然不会理解喜剧人的吃饭问题了。
Ah. Your perspective defines your logic. What would a kid that still lives off their parents know about the struggles a comedian faces to feed themselves?
要我说，追求独立创作也好，迎合商业潮流也罢，说到底，不过是在生存和理想间做出选择罢了。谁能说自己的选择就一定是对的呢？

If you ask me, it doesn't matter if you're making independent works or going with the commercial trends. At the end of the day, you're doing nothing more than making a decision between survival and your ideals. Who can say that one choice is ultimately more correct?
人各有志，强求不来。与其对着不可知的将来瞎想，倒不如脚踏实地，把基本功练好。
Everyone has their own ideals. They cannot be forced. I think that, rather than focusing on an unknown future, it is best to go one step at a time and master your fundamental skills.
说到底，喜剧表演还是得扎根在舞台上，有空吵架，还不如多琢磨点段子呢。
At the end of the day, comedy lives and dies on the stage. If you have time to argue, why not spend it honing your jokes instead?
理想和现实只能二选一吗……
Are ideals and reality mutually exclusive...?
理想，到底算是前进的动力，还是不切实际的幻梦？说实话，我也没想明白。
Ideals... Are they a driving force to move one forward, or just unrealistic fantasy? If I'm honest, I haven't figured it out myself either.
还记得当初满怀热忱地加入喜剧社时，我以为自己找到了人生的归宿。总想着凭一己之力为匹诺康尼带来更多欢声笑语。
I remember that, when I first joined the comedy club, my heart was filled with passion. I thought I had found my destiny. I wanted to use my skills to bring more laughter to Penacony.
后来我才发现，生活根本没有我想的那么浪漫。我在筑梦学院念书，为了生计，学的也是筑梦师的本事。
Only later did I realize that life was not so romantic. I study at Dreamweaver Academy, and I major in Dreamweaving just so I can hope to make a living.
工程作业已经够多了，还要出去搬砖…从基层做起，这就是筑梦师的生活。每天光是活着就已经很累了，根本没时间去构思脱口秀的内容编排……

I'm already buried in engineering homework, then I have to go and do physical construction tasks... Working your way up from the lowest builder is the life of a dreamweaver. Just living in that way is already exhausting. How am I supposed to have time to think up content and jokes for talk shows after all that...
哎，有时候我在想，我是不是该放弃自己的理想…比起一夜成名这种梦，果然还是老实打灰，考到筑梦师资格证更现实吧。

Ah... Sometimes I wonder if I should just give up on my ideals... Maybe making an honest living in engineering and getting my dreamweaver qualification is more realistic than some dream of overnight fame.
怎么能放弃自己的梦想呢？
How can you give up on your dream like that?
老实说，我想过这个问题，我的未来一眼就能望到头——没什么天赋，注定只能跑跑龙套，当个业余段子手。这种水平完全不足以养活自己……

Truth be told, I've thought about this question before. My future is plain as day — mediocre in talent, destined to be an extra on the stage, working freelance as a joke writer. I won't be able to eke a living with my meager skills...
但我想要试试看，不然就这么放弃，我还是不甘心…何况我们喜剧社已经实现自负盈亏了，这给了我信心。
But I want to take a shot at it. I'm not ready to give up yet, especially since our comedy club is now self-sustaining. That gives me hope.
说不定下一个爆红的就是我…未来的事情谁说得准呢。
Who knows... I might become the next big star... Who can tell with the future?
理想和现实，就像平行线，永远都不会有交集。
Dreams and reality are like parallel lines that will never intersect.
曾几何时，我以为有梦想就能活下去。但我也快毕业了，生存问题还是更要紧些……
There was a time when I thought I could survive with dreams alone. But I'm graduating soon — survival is probably a more urgent priority right now...
不过…时代在变，环境在变，我们喜剧社也不一样了。靠销售梦泡基本能达成收支平衡，还有植入广告之类的花样手段来赚钱，比过去的状况好多了。

But... times have changed, so has our environment, and so has the comedy club. To be able to sell dream bubbles to make ends meet and earn some cash with product placements and other similar tactics... We're much better than in the past.
就是广告带来的恶评不太好…哎，这点我倒是能接受……
The poor reviews from the advertisements aren't great... *sigh* But I can accept that...
商业化？原来只是个笑话！
Commercialization? So it's just a joke!
哼，说什么商业化发展，我觉得只是社团走投无路的借口！
Hmph, what's this talk about commercialization and development? I think it's just an excuse from a club that has run out of options!
真是讽刺，曾经高喊着要用喜剧改变世界的人，转眼就把立场和初心统统抛诸脑后。说出来的大道理，翻脸就可以当笑话。

How ironic. Those who once yelled about how they would change the world with comedy have quickly cast aside their principles and ideals. The lofty ideals they once spoke of are nothing more than a joke now.
可笑，他们口口声声说梦想，到头来，不还是向生存低了头？一旦触及利益，什么理想不理想的，哪里有植入广告带来的收成香！

What a joke. They constantly speak of dreams, yet in the end, they still bow in order to survive. Once profit is involved, who cares about dreams and ideals? The smell of money from ads is what matters most!
没错！我也骂我自己！要是我再努点力，每天多想几个好玩的段子，是不是社团的人气就能更高些，就不用去接这些无聊的广告了？
That's right! I'm scolding myself, too! If only I worked harder and came up with a few more jokes, would the club have been more popular? Maybe then we wouldn't have to take on these boring ads.
其实我觉得我们社团走商业化路线也挺好啊！
Actually, I think it's pretty good that our club is moving into a commercialized route!
以前从场地到演出，所有环节都要我们自己掏钱，光是租金就要一大笔钱，光靠卖门票的那点收入哪里够呀！
Back then, from the venue to the performance, everything was paid for out of our own pockets. Just the rent alone took up a huge chunk, and the ticket sales were nowhere enough to cover it!
没想到前辈们的思路竟如此清奇，老实说我也是才发现，原来广告还有这么多花式植入的方法…要我说，只要段子质量高，广告多点也无妨嘛。

I didn't expect our seniors to have such an out-of-the-box idea. Honestly, I've only just realized how many creative ways there are to integrate ads... If the jokes are good, I don't mind having more ads.
而且观众们骂归骂，前辈们那几期演出还不是爆火了？电视台还上门拉我们签合同呢，这样下去，说不定哪天…我们社团在匹诺康尼电视台就拥有专属节目了！

Even with all the complaints from the audience, the previous few shows from the seniors still went viral! The TV station even came to us with a contract! If this continues, who knows... maybe our club will have our own show on the Penacony TV Station one day!
到那个时候…说不定我也能在电视上常驻露面，天啊…我都不敢想了！
When that time comes... who knows? I might be a regular on TV! Oh gee... I don't even dare to imagine that!
…音乐派对的演出结束了，乐器搬走了，乐队成员都散了，我的心也变得空荡荡的了。
The music party's performance has ended, the instruments have been moved away, and the band members have all gone their separate ways. My heart is empty now.
将我的美好回忆，弃置于此——
I'll leave my precious memories here.
But the other members are still here.
乱破小姐走了啊！她才是「缭乱」的灵魂，虽然现在还会和其他成员碰面，但聊起天来，总感觉少了点什么。
Miss Rappa left! She's the soul of The Dazzling! We can still meet up with the other members, but it still feels like something is missing.
对演出的热情？那种胡闹的气氛？还是不管学院阻拦，坚持要冲上舞台的勇气？
The passion for performing? The rowdy atmosphere? Or the courage to push ahead to perform despite the disapproval from the schools?
哎，我也说不清楚。只是…演出结束后，再去那些派对都觉得没劲了。
*sigh* I can't really put it into words. It's just that... after the performance, going to all those parties feels dull.
I thought you were gonna go learn some ninjutsu?
学忍术？呃…我当时是这么说的嘛，好像有点记不清了。让我想想，想想……
Learn ninjutsu? Hmm... Did I say that? I don't quite remember. Let me think. Let me think...
财富学院都这么善变的吗？
Are Fortune Academy students all so capricious?
哎呀，计划总是赶不上变化，我的兴趣爱好那么丰富，换个人生目标也很正常。
Oh well, plans always change, and I have so many interests and hobbies. It's normal to switch to a different life goal.
对！我想起来了，让乱破小姐教我忍术！实不相瞒，演出结束后，我确实跟着乱破小姐学了些基本技巧，可那实在太难了，很折磨。

Yes! I remember now, I wanted to ask Miss Rappa to teach me ninjutsu! To tell you the truth, after the show ended, I learned plenty of fundamentals from Miss Rappa, even though they were excruciatingly hard.
什么忍符的绘制技巧，忍•真言的吟诵韵律，超•忍•动态视力的磨练…比我在健身房上的私教课还要累，我是想做忍侠，不是来受罪的呀。

What's all this nonsense about ninja talisman drawing techniques, ninja mantra chant cadence, super ninja dynamic vision training... They're even more tiring than my private gym lessons! I want to become a Ninja Hero! Not to feel like dying all the time!
所以我就放弃啦。世界上的各种*侠*那么多，也不缺我一个吧。
That's why I gave up. There are all kinds of *heroes* all around the world. It won't make a difference without me.
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你问了个好问题。我最近也在烦恼这件事。
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, you've asked a great question. I've been troubled over this recently too.
就快毕业了，但我还没想好离开学校后该去做什么，是找份正经的工作，还是留在学院里继续深造，或者…做个独立音乐人也不错？
It's almost time for graduation, but I haven't thought of what to do next. Do I find a decent job, stay in school for further education, or... become an independent musician?
我们共同经历了那么多事，彼此都很熟悉啦。在经理看来，最适合我的出路是什么呢？
We've gone through so much together. We know each other well. In your eyes, what do you think I'm most suitable for?
我也想去职场闯荡，可…经理你也知道，现在的工作不太好找，轻松赚钱的职位更是少之又少，我又不想离开匹诺康尼…很麻烦啊。
I'd also like to venture into the workforce, but... as you know, it's difficult to land a job now, much less get a relaxing job with easy money. And I don't want to leave Penacony... It's a hassle.
It's better to further your studies.
我的导师也这么劝我，还说我不做他的学生实在可惜了，可我怎么觉得…他是希望我留在学校帮他干活呢？可以随便使唤，还不用付钱。

My teacher gave me the same advice and even said it would be a waste if I didn't become his student. But somehow I feel... he just hopes that I stay in school so I can help him with his stuff. He can order me around without even paying me a wage.
不行不行，我对学术本来就没多少兴趣，再待下去未免太浪费人生了。
No can do. I've never had much interest in academia. I would be wasting my life away if I stayed on.
我觉得你很有音乐天赋。
I think you do have musical talent.
…是吗？我也这么觉得！从站上舞台的时候开始，我就想把余生都奉献给音乐了！
...Really? I think so too! From the moment I stood on stage, I knew I wanted to give my life to music!
但…把兴趣当职业，是不是有点太理想了？要是火不起来怎么办，赚不到钱，甚至连票都卖不出去又该怎么办？光是想到这些，我就开始害怕了。
