But... to turn my interest into a job... is it too idealistic? What if I don't become popular? What if I can't earn any money or even sell any tickets? Just thinking about this makes me afraid.
要不，还是老老实实找份工作算了吧？
Then, should I just forget about it and look for a job?
It's too difficult. I can't think of an answer.
哎，算了算了，也别烦恼了。我还是尽快拿到毕业证书，回去继承家里的企业好了。
*sigh* Forget it. I shall not worry anymore. I better quickly get my graduation certificate and return home to take over the family business.
既然找不到合适的方向，说明每条路都不适合我。有简单的模式可以选，我也别给自己的人生增加难度了。
Since I can't find the right direction, that means that none of the paths are suitable for me. If l can choose an easy mode for life, I shouldn't make it any harder than it needs to be.
Then why did you even ask me?
你这不是没有任何烦恼吗！
Doesn't this mean you never had any troubles to begin with?
面临人生的关键抉择，总还是会迷茫。再说，继承家业需要考虑的事情也很多呀。
Facing important life decisions can be quite overwhelming. After all, taking over the family business does involve a lot of things too.
谢谢你帮我做职业分析，经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
Thank you for helping me with my career analysis, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager!
…音乐派对的演出结束了，乐器搬走了，乐队成员都散了，我的心也变得空荡荡的了。
The music party's performance has ended, the instruments have been moved away, and the band members have all gone their separate ways. My heart is empty now.
将我的美好回忆，弃置于此——
I'll leave my precious memories here.
Do you need me for something?
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你来得正好。你知道吗，学校要出毕业年鉴了，每个学院的学生都有自己的专属页面。
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, your timing is great. Did you know the school will be releasing its yearbook soon? Every student will have their own dedicated page.
我想请你帮我写段留言…毕竟我们一起举办过那么精彩的演出，经历过那么多重要的时刻，不知道你现在方不方便？
I was hoping to get you to write a message for me... After all, we've organized many exciting performances together and experienced many crucial moments. Would you be available now?
让我看看…太好了，真适合我，不愧是经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}！短短几句话就令我的页面与众不同！
Let me see... That's amazing, it suits me so well! No wonder you're our {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager! You've made my page stand out with just a few sentences!
对了，我也给你复制一份，这样就不用等年鉴正式刊发出来了。千万别忘了我啊！
Oh yeah, I've made you a copy, so you don't have to wait for the yearbook to be published. Don't forget me!
I want to chat with you.
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}太客气了！我们都这么熟悉了，有什么事就直说吧！
You're too polite, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager! We are so familiar with each other, just speak freely!
你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?
会啊。我们是并肩作战的同伴，彼此间的信任早就坚不可摧了，这种深厚的友谊，可不是派对上认识的那些损友能比的！

Of course. We are comrades that stood by each other through thick and thin. Our trust in each other is unshakable. This deep-rooted friendship can't be compared to those fair-weather friends you meet at parties!
我们会定期碰面，聊聊学校的话题，各自的近况，还有未来的规划…哎，不过乱破小姐走了，见面时候总感觉少了点什么。

We'll meet regularly and chat about school, update each other on what's going on recently, and discuss future plans... *sigh* But with Miss Rappa's departure, it feels like something is missing whenever we meet.
…「缭乱」不会解散，但她才是我们乐队的核心啊。
...The Dazzling will not disband, but she is the lead of our band.
财富学院还有为难你吗？
Is Fortune Academy still giving you a hard time?
哈哈，说到这个，自从「缭乱」把那个肆意妄为的学院代表赶走后，我在学院里的地位可谓是如日中天啊，同学和老师们都对我很尊敬。
Haha, speaking of this, ever since The Dazzling chased away that unscrupulous academy representative, my standing in the academy has soared. All my classmates and teachers greatly respect me now.
也是他咎由自取吧，原本就有很多学生看不惯他，如今总算能出这口恶气了。
He brought it on himself. Many students already disliked him, so now they finally can get back at him.
现在，我是财富学院的英雄——忍者•契波大人！哈哈哈哈！
Now, I'm the hero of Fortune Academy — Master Ninja Czipo! Hahahaha!
That's all the questions I have.
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}想聊天的时候，随时来找我就行！
If you ever want to chat, do look for me anytime!
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?
…这是什么新流行的搭讪方式？我怎么没在派对上听人说过。
...Is this some new pick-up tactic? Why didn't I hear about this at a party?
要是经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}感兴趣的话…当然可以！我们的关系都这么好了，表示下亲昵也很正常。来，试试吧，这正是进一步加深彼此间信任的机会！
If you're interested... Of course you can! We're so familiar with each other, it's normal to show some affection. Come, try it, this is a good opportunity to deepen our trust!
犹豫片刻后，你将手指轻轻放在了白色绒球上。那柔软的触感使你确信，刚才问出这个失礼问题时的窘迫是值得的，你很愿意为这种体验再次冒险。

After a moment's hesitation, you lightly place your finger on the white fluff ball. From that soft touch, you are certain that the awkwardness from that rude question just now was worth it. You are very willing to risk your skin for that experience again.
Bro, your fluff ball feels nice.
嘿嘿，能让经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}开心，是我的荣幸！
Heh-heh, it's an honor to make {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager this happy!
好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
Enjoy this music party to the fullest!
当然！我得珍惜毕业前最后的欢乐时光才行——派对万岁！音乐万岁！
I will! I must treasure the final moments of joy before graduation — viva la music party! Viva la music!
你尝试用钟表把戏碰触契波的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
You attempt to use clockwork to get in touch with Czipo's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...
看来先前的演出经历在乐队成员心中留下了极为深刻的印象，以至于任何情绪都无法动摇这份热情。这就是音乐的力量吧。
Looks like the performances left an indelible, lasting impression in the band's hearts — no amount of emotion can cause this passion to waver. This is the power of music.
经理好。音乐派对还没有结束，外面这么热闹，您该去享受欢快的校园生活才对。
Hello Manager. The music party isn't over yet. It's bustling out there, and you should be enjoying the carefree school life outside.
这里是我们曾经的排练室，不过现在…已经和乐队没什么关系了。
This was once our rehearsal room, but now... it's got nothing to do with the band.
你为什么要待在这里呢？
…我吗？我本来就不喜欢吵闹的地方，这里比较僻静，让我觉得安心…也很怀念。
...Me? I don't like noisy places. It's much quieter here. It gives me peace... and nostalgia.
跟着乱破忍首修行的那段时间，就像是画面定格了那样，始终在记忆里循环…我和乐队同伴们站在舞台上，向所有人宣告我们的名号。

While I was training with Head Ninja Rappa, it was like time stood still, and the memories of that time still swirl in my head... Standing on the stage with me and my bandmates, declaring our name to everyone.
对我来说，这样的经历简直难以想象。我大概…永远都忘不掉「缭乱」了吧。
Such an experience was simply unimaginable to me. I probably... will never forget The Dazzling.
你们当时演奏的乐器呢？
Where are the instruments you guys used for the show?
演出结束后，乱破忍首曾经拜托工作人员将乐器都搬到这里，但我和艾尔菲同学把各自的乐器带回了家…重要的物品，放在教室里不太放心。
After the show ended, Head Ninja Rappa asked a staff member to move the instruments here, but Arfey and I brought ours home... It's not safe to leave important stuff in the classroom.
是向学校申请过的。再说，乐器上绘满了忍符，除了我们应该也没人会使用了。
We requested them from the school. Also, the instruments have been scribbled full of ninja talismans — no one else but us would use them.
契波同学说是要在校园里留下「缭乱」的印记，就把键盘存放在这里了。
Czipo said he wanted to leave The Dazzling's mark at the school, so he left the keyboard here.
能在学校里看到忍符…我还挺开心的。
To be able to see a ninja talisman at school... It makes me pretty happy.
音乐派对还会继续，因此乱破忍首使用的演出设备就留在了舞台上。
The music party will continue, so Head Ninja Rappa left the performance gear on the stage.
蒙塔娜同学负责管理，我们没事的时候也会去看看。
Montana's in charge of that. We can go take a look when we're free.
我…我还是先完成答辩论文吧，要是没法毕业就麻烦了。
I... I'd better finish my dissertation first. It'll be troublesome if I can't graduate.
顺利的话，离开学校后，我想组建一只新的乐队——以我为核心的乐队。
If everything goes well, after I graduate, I plan to form a new band — one where I'm the lead.
乱破忍首向学院代表保证过，会接纳我为演出乐队的正式成员，但我更想从头开始，从召集成员、创作乐曲、打造属于自己的风格开始。

Head Ninja Rappa promised the academy representatives that I would be included as an official member of the performing band, but I'd rather start all over — recruitment, composition, and creating my own unique style.
我的水平是不太够，但技术可以提升，最重要的…是迈出第一步的勇气。
I may lack skill, but technique can be honed. Most importantly... it's the courage to take that first step.
要找我继续当乐队经理吗？
You want me to keep being the band manager?
您有兴趣的话，当然可以！有经理在，我们都不用为作曲的事发愁了。
If you're interested, absolutely! We won't have to fret over composing tracks with a manager around.
开玩笑的…经理很会照顾成员，也敢为乐队的演出和学院正面交涉，要是您愿意帮忙，我肯定会轻松很多的。
I'm kidding... You've taken great care of us, and were willing to confront the school about the band's performance. If you agreed to help out, it'd definitely be much easier for me.
会找以前的乐队成员吗？
Will you find the former band members too?
我问过他们的想法，但可惜…契波同学对组乐队没有兴趣，而艾尔菲同学则是有很明确的目标，打算离开匹诺康尼，就只好作罢了。
I asked them about it, but... Czipo isn't interested in forming a band, and Arfey's got a clear goal in her mind — she intends to leave Penacony, so I had to abandon that idea.
再说…我也想过，他们的水平都很高，自己是否真的能承担起乱破忍首的职责，帮他们实现各自的忍道呢？我…没这个信心。

Moreover... I've also thought about it — they are very good. Can I really pick up the mantle of Head Ninja Rappa's role and help them fulfill their own way of the ninja? I... don't have that kind of confidence.
Let me wish you the best of luck in the meantime!
谢谢，但还是请您先预祝我顺利毕业吧。
Thank you, but I think you should wish for me to successfully graduate first.
经理好。音乐派对还没有结束， 外面这么热闹，您该去享受欢快的校园生活才对。
Hello manager. The music party isn't over yet. It's bustling out there, and you should be enjoying the carefree school life outside.
这里是我们曾经的排练室，不过现在…已经和乐队没什么关系了。
This was once our rehearsal room, but now... it's got nothing to do with the band.
Do you need me for something?
经理，我想请你帮个忙，就是…学校要出年鉴了，可以邀请同学给自己写赠言，那个…我在学校里和其他人不太熟，您能帮我写一段吗？

Manager, I'd like to ask for a favor. Um... the school's yearbook is about to be out, and we can invite classmates to write us messages. Um... I'm not really familiar with others at school, so can you write something for me?
谢谢…对了，请您也保存一份吧，不管以后大家还能不能聚在一起，就当是…我们乐队的回忆。
Thank you... Oh yes, please save a copy for yourself too. No matter whether everyone stays in touch in the future or not, this will be... our band's memory.
I want to chat with you.
你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?
嗯，我在学校里没什么朋友，现在联系最频繁的，也就是契波同学和艾尔菲同学。我们经常聚在一起，聊聊学校的事，还有未来的打算。
Mm, I don't really have a lot of friends at school. The ones I talk to the most are Czipo and Arfey. We usually hang out together to talk about school stuff and future plans.
虽然大家的想法各不相同，但关系却相当亲密。就像乱破忍首所说的——「缭乱」并非是暂时组成的乐队，更是我们共同的信念与归属。
Everyone's got different ideas, but we're all pretty close. Just like Head Ninja Rappa said — The Dazzling isn't just a temporarily formed band, but a belief and sense of belonging that we share.
我很高兴…能在最后的校园时光里遇到经理、乱破忍首，还有乐队的两位同伴。谢谢你们。
I'm very glad... that I met you, Head Ninja Rappa, and my two bandmates during the final moments of my school time. Thank you all.
筑梦学院的事处理好了吗？
Has the Dreamweaver Academy matter been settled?
学院代表给了那位同学足够的补偿，他对乐队活动原本也没多少兴趣，所以很快就解决了，但…关于*绩点优先*原则，学生内部出现了不少反对的声音。

The academy representative gave that student sufficient compensation. He wasn't all that interested in band activities anyway, so it was settled very quickly, but... students have started to protest about the grades first principle.
强行将学生推到不合适，或是不感兴趣的位置上，这样的做法虽然公平，但真的是最优解吗？我想，学院代表也需要思考这个问题。

Forcing students into positions they are unsuited or uninterested in may be in the spirit of fairness, but is it really the best solution? I think the academy representative should also think this over.
That's all the questions I have.
嗯。经理想聊天的时候，随时找我就好。
Sure. You can look for me any time you wish to chat.
好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
Enjoy this music party to the fullest!
我…不太喜欢人多的地方，呆在这会更轻松。经理不用管我，去忙自己的事吧。
I... don't really like crowded places. It's much more calming to stay here. Don't worry about me, Manager. You've got stuff to do.
你尝试用钟表把戏碰触达凡绮的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
You try using clockwork to get in touch with Dafanchy's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...
看来先前的演出经历在乐队成员心中留下了极为深刻的印象，以至于任何情绪都无法动摇这份热情。这就是音乐的力量吧。
Looks like the performances left an indelible, lasting impression in the band's hearts — no amount of emotion can cause this passion to waver. This is the power of music.
属于我的音乐派对已经结束了，现在该专心准备毕业的相关事项。
My music party has already ended. It's now time to focus on the affairs concerning graduation.
但…在房间里看到那把吉他的时候，心里还是会不平静。当时那么用力地在舞台上呼喊过，这样重要的回忆…没法轻易忘记。
But... when I see that guitar in the room, my heart can't stay calm. That time when I yelled my lungs out on the stage, this important memory... is not so easily forgotten.
你很喜欢那三场演出吗？
You really liked those three performances?
是的。现在我可以毫不迟疑地说，我喜欢乱破同学的音乐，也很享受和各位成员共同组乐队的时光。这将是我在折纸大学最难忘的经历。

I did. Now I can confidently say that I like Rappa's music, and I really enjoyed the times I shared with each and every bandmate. This will be the most unforgettable experience I've had at Paperfold University.
当然，必须要感谢经理的帮助——如果那个时候你没有来劝我，或许我早就离开了乐队，此刻正在学院的教室里后悔吧。
Of course, this is all thanks to you, Manager — if you hadn't persuaded me back then, I might've left the band already. I'd be sulking in regret back at the classroom right now.
…忍者，还有稀奇古怪的忍术，呵，谁能想到我这种只在乎音乐、活在闭塞世界里的无聊的人，会和这些闻所未闻的事扯上关系呢。
...Ninja with strange bizarre ninjutsu. Heh, who would've thought someone like me — who only cares about music and lives in my own little world — would be involved in all these unheard-of things?
那个时候究竟发生了什么？
第二场演出开始前，我返回谐乐学院，想要邀请更多老师和同学来观看我们的现场，希望「缭乱」的音乐能稍微改变大家的观念……

Before the second show started, I returned to Charmony Academy to invite more teachers and students to see our show, hoping that The Dazzling's music would change everyone's opinions, even in the slightest...
但那两位学院代表将我叫到了办公室，那里连通着某个小型梦境。我被关在空无一人的梦境里，责令反思自己的过错，直至乱破同学来到。

But those two academy representatives summoned me into their office, which was connected to some mini dreamscape. I was imprisoned in a deserted dreamscape to reflect on my wrongdoings until Rappa came along.
呵…乱破同学很早就说过，校园并非如我想象得那般平静，可那时候我以为她只是在胡言乱语，甚至还为此指责你们…对不起。
Heh... Rappa said it earlier before: The school isn't as peaceful as I thought, but I thought she was just spouting rubbish and even blamed you all for that... I'm sorry.
It was for your own good!
嗯，我知道…所以，这才更让我自责。
Yes, I know... That's why I am filled with self-reproach.
嗯，我知道。可惜到最后，我都没能亲口向她道歉。
Yes, I know. It's a pity that, even in the end, I didn't get a chance to personally apologize to her.
我始终以音乐作为人生的目标，这点不会改变。但现在，比起在学院里接受训练，我想去接触更丰富的音乐形式，拓展自己的眼界。

I have always made music my life's goal. That much hasn't changed. But now, rather than practice at the academy, I'd rather expose myself to an even wider variety of music forms and broaden my horizons.
从谐乐学院毕业后，我准备去艾普瑟隆进修，同时积累演出的经验，虽然那里很难称得上是艺术的殿堂，但……

After graduating from Charmony Academy, I will prepare to further my studies at Epsilon and accrue more performance experience. That place is a far cry from what one considers a haven fit for fine arts, but...
要是演奏的音乐没法让观众开心，没法让自己和同伴开心，不是就没意义了吗？
If the music performance can't evoke joy in its audience, yourself, or your companions, wouldn't that be meaningless?
打算彻底改变音乐风格了？
You're deciding to totally change up your music style?
倒也不算吧。作为创作者，我们本来就不该被风格局限。风格是作品的特征，是艺术表达的惯性，但绝对不是必须达到的要求。
Not entirely. As creators, we shouldn't be confined to any style. It is a characteristic of our work, a form of artistic expression, but never a requirement that needs to be achieved.
就像…「旋律是对世界的记录」，经理不是也能从各种各样的奇特现象中，得到作曲灵感吗。既然你和乱破同学能做到，我也想要尝试。
Just like... "melodies are records of the world." Don't you obtain musical inspiration from all sorts of wondrous phenomena? If you and Rappa can do it, I'd like to give it a try too.
That place doesn't really suit you...
我在加入「缭乱」前，也从来没想到过这样的装扮会适合自己。
Before I joined The Dazzling, I also never thought such an attire would suit me either.
但就算不适合，我也可以主动去适应。吸收不同的风格，学习不熟悉的知识，为未来的创作积累素材，这样才真正算是*以音乐为目标*吧。

Even if it doesn't suit me, I can also try to adapt to it. To absorb different styles, learn unfamiliar knowledge, and accumulate materials for future creations — this should be the true goal of pursuing music.
Looking forward to your future performances!
谢谢。要是有机会，我会邀请经理、还有乐队的各位成员来观看的。
Thank you. If I get the chance, I will invite you and the bandmates to watch me.
…不知道乱破同学会不会感兴趣。
...I don't know if Rappa will be interested.
不记得有没有和经理聊过，我的家庭管教非常严格，父母希望我把全部心思都放在学业上，将来成为音乐家，为此对我的生活做了许多限制。

I forgot if I mentioned before that my family is very strict. My parents hope I will wholly focus on my studies and become a musical maestro in the future, which is why they imposed so many restrictions on my life.
我…不想走他们规定的道路，我有自己对世界、对未来的理解和感悟。
I... don't want to walk on the path they dictated for me. I have my own views and perceptions of the future.
所以，我也需要践行*我的忍道*。
And so, I also need to follow my way of the ninja.
属于我的音乐派对已经结束了，现在该专心准备毕业的相关事项。
My music party has already ended. It's now time to focus on the affairs concerning graduation.
但…在房间里看到那把吉他的时候，心里还是会不平静。当时那么用力地在舞台上呼喊过，这样重要的回忆…没法轻易忘记。
But... when I see that guitar in the room, my heart can't stay calm. That time when I yelled my lungs out on the stage, this important memory... is not so easily forgotten.
Do you need me for something?
经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我有件事想请你帮忙。学校要制作毕业年鉴，每个学生都有自己的页面。
{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, I have a favor to ask of you. The school is about to launch its graduation yearbook, and every student has their own page.
我…我想拜托你给我写一段赠言，毕竟…乐队的共同回忆，是任何同学都无法替代的，所以想麻烦你。不知道你现在方便吗？
I... I'd like to ask you to write a message, since... those shared memories with the band are irreplaceable, so I hope it's not too much trouble. I wonder if you're free?
谢谢经理，我再复制一份给你，就当作是纪念了。毕业以后，希望我们都不要忘记这段为了音乐梦想而共同努力的经历。
Thank you, manager. I will make a copy for you as a souvenir. After I graduate, I hope you all won't forget this time when we all worked together for our dream of music.
I want to chat with you.
嗯，经理想找我聊些什么呢？
Mm, what do you wish to talk about?
你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?
我们经常会见面。尤其是财富学院的契波同学，对组织聚会特别有兴趣，时不时就要拉我们出来玩，我和达凡绮也不会拒绝就是。

We see each other all the time, especially Czipo from Fortune Academy — he's really interested in organizing meetups, dragging us out for hangouts from time to time. Dafanchy and I won't refuse anyway.
大家聚在一起，随便聊聊学校里发生的事，还有各自毕业后的计划。尽管来自不同学院，但彼此间的联系已经相当紧密了。

When we're together, we just talk about what happened at school and our various post-graduation plans. Even if we're from different academies, our interactions with one another are still quite frequent.
「缭乱」不会解散——我们都将沿各自的道路继续前行。
The Dazzling will not disband — we will all keep treading on our own paths.
和谐乐学院的关系还好吗？
How's your relationship with Charmony Academy?
…学院代表很诚恳地向我道过歉，我也相信他并非是出于私心。「缭乱」的音乐确实不符合学院推崇的规范，他会做出这样的举动…我能理解

...The academy representative earnestly apologized to me, and I'm sure he wasn't acting out of personal interest. The Dazzling's music flouted the academy's recommended regulations, resulting in his actions... I can understand that.
希望谐乐学院未来能接受更多样的风格和艺术形式，别局限在狭隘的视野里了。但对那群老教授而言，做到这点恐怕相当不容易吧。

I hope Charmony Academy will be more accepting of other styles and artistic forms in the future, and not be restricted by the narrow walls of their vision. But it's probably not that easily accomplished for those old professors.
There's nothing else I want to ask.
好的。要是经理还有事，可以随时找我。
Okay. Do look for me if you need anything.
好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
Enjoy this music party to the fullest!
是啊，沉浸在回忆里没什么意思，也祝经理玩得开心！
Yes, it's no fun being submerged in memories. I also wish you a good time!
你尝试用钟表把戏碰触艾尔菲的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
You try using clockwork to get in touch with Arfey's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...
看来先前的演出经历在乐队成员心中留下了极为深刻的印象，以至于任何情绪都无法动摇这份热情。这就是音乐的力量吧。
Looks like the performances left an indelible, lasting impression in the band's hearts — no amount of emotion can cause this passion to waver. This is the power of music.
你好，演出乐队的经理。音乐派对能取得如此成功，在银河间引起广泛关注，你和那位乐队核心的确功不可没。
Hello, band manager. The music party's success and its amassed following across the cosmos are all thanks to you and your band's lead.
我谨代表筑梦学院，对你们付出的努力表示感谢。
On behalf of Dreamweaver Academy, I extend my gratitude for all the work you've put in.
I was just doing my job.
否定：作为匹诺康尼的股东，你愿意参与到学生活动当中，帮助折纸大学举办这场彩梦校庆，自然值得郑重道谢。

Negative: As Penacony's shareholder, you were willing to participate in the school's activities and help Paperfold University organize this exciting celebration. Profuse appreciation is naturally deserved.
遗憾：筑梦学院无权为你们提供实质奖励。如有需要，可以向苜蓿草家系提出申请，相信他们愿意为那位代表的无礼行为表达歉意。

Remorse: Dreamweaver Academy has no authority to provide you with physical rewards. If you need anything, you can submit a request to the Alfalfa Family — I trust they will be willing to express their apology for that representative's boorish behavior.
至于达凡绮，自从她与乐队的各位成员接触后，性情变得愈发开朗，也在学院内建立起了良好的社交关系，不再逃避与同学的交往了。

As for Dafanchy, ever since she befriended everyone in the band, her personality has become much more jovial, and she's forged healthy social relationships within the academy. She no longer avoids socializing with her classmates.
相信对她而言，参加此次演出将会是段颇有纪念意义的经历。
I'm sure that participating in this show will be a memorable experience for her.
没有。相反，由于乐队排练占用了部分精力，她的成绩比以往更差了。
No. On the contrary, since band practice took up part of her attention, her grades dropped even more.
没有。乐队演出经验与她的专业方向并不相关，对求职而言毫无帮助。
No. The band's performance isn't relevant to her major — it doesn't help her employment prospects at all.
Did she figure out what she wants to do after graduation?
没有。不仅如此，结业日期临近，我却还未收到她的答辩论文，实在令人担忧。
No. Not just that, as the deadline closes near, I still haven't received her dissertation. It's simply worrying.
It's good enough as long as she grows.
那是自然。作为学院代表，我也很高兴看到学员能变得更加优秀，找到自己想走的道路。再次向你和那位乐队核心表示感谢。
Naturally. As an academy representative, I am also happy to see a student growing with excellence and figuring out their own path. I have you and your band's lead to thank.
I have some things to ask.
如果仍有疑问，请直接提出，我会尽可能为你解答。
If you still have any questions, please do ask. I will answer them as best as I can.
正如知更鸟小姐所说，苜蓿草家系撤销了他的学院代表职务。他的渎职行为对学校声誉造成了极大影响，不可能继续在校内任职。

It is just as Miss Robin said, the Alfalfa Family has rescinded his academy representative role. His irresponsible behavior has greatly sullied the academy's repute, and will no longer be able to hold his post.
学生们原本便对这位代表颇有微词，校方也曾收到过相关投诉，只是碍于苜蓿草家系的情面，才始终没有处理。

There have been students who have been critical of this representative, and the school has also received related complaints. It was due to the considerations of the Alfalfa Family that this problem was never resolved.
相信此次事件过后，他会得到应有的惩处。
With the passing of this matter, I believe that he will receive just punishment.
我与那位代表相识很长时间了，知道他是位真心替学生着想，将艺术理念看得比名誉更为重要的优秀教师。
I've known that rep for a long time, and I know he sincerely cares for the students. He is an excellent teacher who puts artistic ideals far above fame.
但…正是这份对艺术的执着，才驱使他做出了阻挠乐队登台的行为。学院的训练既是知识，同样是对我们视野的限制。
But... it is that obstinacy with art that drove him to do what he did to hinder the band's performance. Knowledge is what students learn in school, but it is also what limits our horizons.
或许我也该多听听学生们的想法，避免陷入固步自封的境地。
Perhaps I should pay more attention to what the students say, so we don't get entrapped in our own hubris.
I don't have any other questions.
若是还有疑问，你可以随时与我沟通。
If you still have any further questions, please talk to me anytime.
美梦多彩，理想自由——折纸大学的校训始终如此，作为学院代表，我们理应做出表率，将这种精神贯彻下去。
Color your dreams, free your ideals — this has always been Paperfold University's motto. As a representative of the academy, we should lead by example and uphold this spirit.
希望你能和折纸大学的全体师生一起，共同享受这场音乐派对。
I hope you, along with all Paperfold University's teachers, will share in this music party's joy.
美梦多彩，理想自由——折纸大学的校训始终如此，作为学院代表，我们理应做出表率，将这种精神贯彻下去。
Color your dreams, free your ideals — this has always been Paperfold University's motto. As a representative of the academy, we should lead by example and uphold this spirit.
音乐派对能取得如此成功，在银河间引起广泛关注，你和那位乐队核心的确功不可没。
The music party's success and amassed following across the cosmos are all thanks to you and the core members of your band.
我谨代表筑梦学院，对你们付出的努力表示感谢。
On behalf of Dreamweaver Academy, I extend my gratitude for all the work you've put in.
无需任何质疑，以绩点为评判依据才是最公平有效的考核方式。
There is no debate. Using grades as the basis of evaluation is the fairest and most effective assessment method.
我早就说过，无论是才能还是效益都不可靠，绩点…只有绩点才是最正确的。
I've said it before. Neither talent nor efficacy is reliable. Grades... only grades are most correct.
幽默：看看那两个学院，坚持才能优先的，最后受限于自己的认知，做出错误的判断。宣称效益优先的，其实想的都是自己的利益。

Humor: Look at those two academies. The first champions aptitude above all else, yet ironically finds itself shackled by its own narrow perspectives, leading to flawed decisions. The second proclaims efficiency as its guiding principle, but in reality, merely pursues its own self-interest.
为什么？因为这两个衡量标准都是假的，没法用数字量化，而数字不会骗人。
Why? Because these two standards of measurement are unquantifiable and therefore false. Numbers do not lie.
谁能断言自己比其余人更有天赋？谁能说清自己的提议能带来多少效益？模糊的标准只会带来争端，最终导向错误与偏见。

Who can claim themselves more talented than others? Who can justify that their own suggestions bring about the greatest efficiency? Ambiguous standards only fuel dispute, resulting in mistaken trajectories and bias.
那达凡绮该怎么解释呢？
How would you explain Dafanchy then?
我承认，这是我的个人判断。这种情况不应再次出现。对，不符合原则。
I admit, that was my personal judgment. Such instances shouldn't happen again. Yes, it is misaligned with the principle.
但…绩点无法规定学员的未来，作为学院代表，我必须顾虑更多。
But... grades can't dictate a student's future. As the academy representative, I must consider this carefully.
督促学生认真学习，这不是教师的职责么…我做错了吗？
To guide a student's diligent study... Is that not a teacher's duty...? Have I done something wrong?
你知道吗，学员中流传着一份名为「我最讨厌的老师」的共享文档。
Do you know that there is a shared file named "Teachers I Hate Most" that's making its rounds among students?
在其中，排名第一的是那位财富学院代表，而我居然在第二位。真是不可思议。
Inside, the top-ranked teacher is that Fortune Academy representative, and I am surprisingly just below him. It was simply astonishing.
难道是因为我平时对待他们过分严格？但我这样做，都是希望他们能将心思放在学业上。督促学员认真学习，这不是教师的职责么？
Is it because I'm usually too strict with them? But I do this in the hopes that they will concentrate on their studies. To guide a student's diligent study, is that not a teacher's duty?
悲伤：遭到学员误解，或许是所有教师的宿命。
Sorrow: Being misunderstood by students is perhaps just the wretched life of all teachers.
…罢了，忧虑这种问题并无益处。这个给你，权当作为听我发牢骚的歉意。
...Forget it. It's meaningless to mull over such problems. This is for you. Just take it as an apology for my grumblings.
…你知道吗，学员中流传着一份名为「我最讨厌的老师」的共享文档。
...Do you know that there is a shared file named "Teachers I Hate Most" that's making its rounds among students?
在其中，排名第一的是那位财富学院代表，而我居然在第二位。真是不可思议。
Inside, the top-ranked teacher is that Fortune Academy representative, and I am surprisingly just below him. It was simply astonishing.
难道是因为我平时对待他们过分严格？但我这样做，都是希望他们能将心思放在学业上。督促学员认真学习，这不是教师的职责么？
Is it because I'm usually too strict with them? But I do this in the hopes that they will concentrate on their studies. To guide a student's diligent study, is that not a teacher's duty?
悲伤：遭到学员误解，或许是所有教师的宿命。
Sorrow: Being misunderstood by students is perhaps just the wretched life of all teachers.
我要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内！
I request that Fortune Academy's independence be revoked, and returned under the oversight of the Dreamweaver Academy!
我厌恶财富学院的那群人很久了！
I've been tired of those Fortune Academy snobs for far too long!
占用学校最多的资源，教学活动的经费也最为充足，结果无论是发表的论文数，还是学生就业率都远远比不上我们筑梦学院。

They hog most of the school's resources, and they always have ample teaching event budget. And even then, their number of published papers and student employment rates far pale in comparison to the Dreamweaver Academy's.
预算如此充分，却始终毫无建树，绝对是被那几个不学无术的负责人挥霍掉了！
Equipped with such a generous budget, but without any accolades to show for it — a clear sign of squandered opportunities by incompetent leaders!
质问：你如何看待现今的学院规划？
Query: How do you view the current academy plan?
Honestly, I fully agree with you.
请求：作为匹诺康尼的股东，你可以和我联名提出申请，要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内。
Request: As Penacony's shareholder, you can submit a joint proposal with me to revoke Fortune Academy's independence and place it under the jurisdiction of Dreamweaver Academy.
梦境才是匹诺康尼的根基，没有稳固的建筑，所有财富都是空谈！
The dreamscapes are Penacony's foundation. Without structural stability, all the wealth in the world is nothing but empty talk!
是吗？但我阐述的都是事实，数据清晰，逻辑完整。更何况，那位代表的所作所为你都见到了，完全不符合教师的规范。
Do you? But I expound the truth — the numbers are clear, and the logic sound. You have also seen that representative's actions, which have made a farce of teaching standards.
尝试：我可以向学校提出申请，要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内。希望这份提案能够通过。
Attempt: I can submit a proposal to the school to revoke Fortune Academy's independence and bring it under the jurisdiction of Dreamweaver Academy. I hope this proposal will be approved.
哼，做得不错啊。没看出来你还挺有当经理的天赋的，匹诺康尼的大股东！
Hah, well done. I never took you for someone with a managerial knack, major shareholder of Penacony.
And I'm pretty good at it!
别太得意忘形。艺术是条看不见尽头的路，走的越远，才越会觉得慌张。要是以为自己现在很厉害，就大错特错了！
Don't get full of yourself. Art is a road with no finish line — The further you go, the more unsure you will be. You'd be gravely mistaken if you think you're already good enough!
You're too kind. I'm just a minor shareholder.
有区别吗？都是提需求的大人物，都是学校的贵宾，我可惹不起！
Does it make a difference? All of you are important figures making proposals and VIPs of the school. I can't afford to offend any of you!
…跟你在这较劲也没什么意思。演出都结束了，从结果来看，咳…你们也算完成了任务，虽然我是不明白这种音乐到底哪点好了。
...It's pointless to argue with you. The show is over, and from the outcome, ahem... I suppose you've all completed the assignment, though I still don't get what's so good about this music.
但既然学生都喜欢，观众也表示认可，那行吧，姑且表扬下你们也不是不可以。
But if the students like it and the audience also approves, then that's fine. I'm not above giving you a compliment or two.
是啊，时代是变了，我熟悉的音乐风格渐渐都见不到了，而我擅长的那些技法和规范，也成了你们口中老旧的学院派。
Yes, times have changed. The music styles I'm familiar with have slowly become irrelevant, and the techniques and standards I pride myself in are now also the dated concepts students gripe about.
但是…音乐的理念、艺术的精神，还有我的坚持都是不会变的！
But... the ideas about music, the spirit of art, and my resolution will never waver!
Don't be too hard on yourself.
哪有勉强！我是那种冥顽不化、不懂得变通的老师吗？我也是很擅长发现学生优点的，只不过…哼，你们的音乐确实和我想得不一样。

Too hard? Never! Do I look like the sort of teacher who's obstinate and unable to adapt? I'm also good at discovering students' strengths. It's just... hmph, your kind of music does deviate from what I had in mind.
好了好了，去玩你的吧。随便到哪里转转，都比和我这种老家伙废话要强！
Alright, alright, you go and play elsewhere. Going anywhere else would be better than engaging in pointless banter with this old coot!
I have some things to ask.
那就快点说，我还赶着去看学生的表演呢。
Make it quick then. I'm in a hurry to watch a student performance.
先前说过，我是被那个坏家伙给骗了！他用艾尔菲的前途来威胁我，我…我一时没想清楚，就答应了他的计划。
I've already told you that I was lied to by that baddie! He threatened me with Arfey's future! I... I wasn't thinking straight and agreed to his plan.
这你可得相信我，哪有老师会害自己的学生？我是真心实意为艾尔菲着想，要是继续跟你们胡闹，谁知道他还会使出什么手段？

You have to believe me on this. Which teacher would wish harm on his students? I really was trying to look out for Arfey. If I continued to make a ruckus with you guys, who knows what horrors he could have committed?
哎…现在说这个也什么用，是我判断失误了，我…对不起你们。
*sigh* ...It's pointless to say anything of this now. It was an error on my part. I... I have wronged all of you.
说句实话，筑梦学院就不该参与到这件事里来。街头的自动乐团，懂什么是音乐吗？知道什么叫做*触动心灵*吗？

To be honest, Dreamweaver Academy shouldn't have even been involved in this. What would street automated orchestras know about music? Can they even comprehend the concept of music that touches the soul?
旋律可不是什么乐器振动，而是灵魂的碰撞！让那个代表来讨论灵魂，就像把美梦剧团当成人那样不可理喻！
Melodies aren't just instruments vibrating. They are collisions among souls! Getting that representative to discuss the soul is as absurd as treating the Sweet Dreams Troupe as human beings!
哼，要是还有下次，我会向学校申请的。和音乐相关的事务，只能由谐乐学院决定，其余学院都不行。
Hmph, if there comes a next time, I will make a request to the school — That all affairs regarding music will only be decided by Charmony Academy. The other academies don't cut it.
I don't have any other questions.
就这样吧，没事别来打扰我。
We're done here. Don't bother me unless it's important.
行。音乐派对还没有结束，去找点好玩的吧。
Sure. The music party hasn't ended. Go find somewhere fun.
和音乐相关的事务，只能由谐乐学院决定，其余学院都不行！
All affairs regarding music will only be decided by Charmony Academy. The other academies don't cut it.
从结果来看…你们也算完成了任务，虽然我是不明白这种音乐到底哪点好了。
Looking at the outcome... I suppose you've all completed the assignment, though I still don't get what's so good about this music.
但既然学生都喜欢，观众也表示认可，那行吧，姑且表扬下你们也不是不可以。
But if the students like it and the audience also approves, then that's fine. I'm not above giving you a compliment or two.
哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都难啊！
*sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!
你肯定听说了吧，彩梦校庆的庆典音乐是我创作的！
You must have heard that the Dreamlight Anniversary's festive music was composed by me!
哎，最开始他们邀请我来负责，我是拒绝的，毕竟我已经有很多代表作了，这种难得的机会，应该让给有需要的学生才对。
*sigh* When they initially invited me to head up the event, I refused. I already had so many masterworks — such a rare opportunity should be left to other students who need it more.
可没办法啊，谐乐学院的教授们集体推举，说这个人选非我不可，还说彩梦校庆要是没了我的音乐，就会失色不少。我实在推脱不过，就答应了。

I didn't have much of a choice though. Charmony Academy's professors were unanimous in my recommendation, insisting that no one else could do it. They even said that the Dreamlight Anniversary would be lackluster without my music. They wouldn't take no for an answer, so I agreed.
哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都很难啊！
*sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!
…辞职？不行，那可不行。我还有好多没用上的音乐灵感，想出席的隆重场合，还有很多事情等着我去做。
...Quit? No, that won't do. I still have plenty of unrealized musical inspiration that needs to be serenaded on a grand stage. There are plenty of amazing things waiting for me to accomplish them.
再说…要是我不做学院代表了，会有谁记得我呢？
Besides... if I don't become the academy representative, who would remember me?
不如让我来当学院代表吧！
How about letting me be the representative instead!
…你？学院代表？哈哈哈，等你先拿到谐乐学院的毕业证书再说吧！
...You? Academy representative? Hahaha, get a graduation certificate from Charmony Academy before making such bold claims!
都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久？
It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure?
...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.
随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*
都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？

It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?
呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想、我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.
你感受到某种混杂着不甘与无可奈何的情绪安静飘散开来，最终在你的手中凝聚成形。
You sense a certain emotion, a convoluted cocktail of reluctance and helplessness, quietly dissipating, eventually taking shape in your hands.
...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.
随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*
都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久呢。热情和灵感总是会慢慢磨灭，等到了那个时候，我该靠什么来支撑生活？

It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure? Passion and inspiration are being slowly ground to dust — when that time comes, what will I rely on to survive?
呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想，我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.
真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议！
Agh, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative!
我早看出财富学院的那个代表不对劲，可我、我…我糊涂啊！
I knew something was off with that Fortune Academy representative, but I, I... I wasn't thinking straight!
自私自利的家伙，骗子！利用了我对艺术的追求，还有对艾尔菲的关爱，反复跟我说你们的音乐不符合要求，是要被家族处罚的，所以我就……

That selfish, self-aggrandizing liar! He took advantage of my passion for art, my care for Arfey, and was constantly harping on how your music didn't meet requirements and The Family would exact punishment on you. That's why I...
真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议，要我说，不如把财富学院的资源都给我们，省得那群人闹出更多笑话来！

Gah, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative! If you ask me, how about diverting all of Fortune Academy's resources to us? That'll at least save us from even more embarrassment!
就是！要不你用股东的身份，跟学校那边说说？别怕，我跟你一起去！
Yeah! Why don't you exert your shareholder influence and talk to the school? Don't be scared. I'm with you!
You're no better than them, though?
啊？别把我和那种人相提并论！虽然…阻拦你们登台这件事，我也有责任，但他是为了自己的利益，而我是为了艺术！
Eh? Don't lump me in with those folks! Though... I am somewhat responsible for preventing your show too. But he did it for his own interests — I did it for art!
同学们快来瞧瞧哇，都是新到的好货！这位同学！我是财富学院的学生，小本创业，勤工俭学，要不要来支持一下……

Students, come take a gander. These are all newly arrived beauties! I'm a Fortune Academy student, bootstrapping my business, and working hard to pay through school. How about throwing some support my way...
啊，原来是大佬！你记得我吗？
Ah, it's the boss! You remember me?
啊哈哈，可能这就是贵人多忘事吧，咱们以前做过生意的啊。
Ahaha, benefactors do tend to forget the people they help out. We used to do business together.
啊哈哈，真是荣幸！之后也请大佬多多关照我的生意呀！
Ahaha, how fortuitous! Please patronize my business more too in the future!
Charlatan! I want my money back!
啊…不好意思，退款的话需要把原商品带回来哦，咱的摊位不支持仅退款服务——那样太容易被坑了。
Ah... sorry, you need to bring back the original item if you want a refund. Our store doesn't support refunds without that, as we're too vulnerable to being scammed.
最近实在太忙，之前很多事我都有点记不清了…你和另外几位同学好像帮了我一个大忙？
I've been too busy lately, and I can't remember a lot of incidents that happened recently... You and some other students seem to have done me a great favor?
哎哟，具体是什么事我忘了，但…总之…总之就是非常感谢
Oof, I can't remember what it was exactly, but... anyway... I'm truly grateful!
What are you gonna thank me with?
我不是什么富家子弟，社团的勤工俭学勉强能凑出来生活费，拿不出什么贵重的谢礼……
I'm not from a wealthy family. The money from the club's work-study program is meager and barely covers my daily expenses. I can't afford any expensive gifts...
这样吧，以后你过来买东西我给你打折！
How about this, next time you buy something from me, I'll give you a discount!
不过…我现在做生意的时间也不多了。之前一心想着赚钱，差点被退学。好在学院给了我补考的机会，我之后得把主要精力放在学习上面。

But... I don't have much time to run my business now. I almost got kicked out of school because I wanted to earn money. Luckily, the school gave me a chance to retake the exam, so my main focus has to be on studying now.
只要补考能过，我就不用退学…但愿这次我能及格。
If I can pass this make-up exam, I won't have to quit school... I really hope I can pass this time.
老爹他挺好的…就是…那个…他知道我退学警告书的事了。但我跟他承诺了，今后绝对不会让他失望的。
My old man is doing okay... It's just that... He knows about my academic warning letter. But I promised him I won't disappoint him again in the future.
他现在还在早霞工厂打工，但我之前不是在校庆上赚了一笔嘛。这就是启动资金，之后的生活费我尽力自己赚，也算是给他减轻了点负担。

He is still working at the Dawn Factory, but I did make some money during the school anniversary. I'll take that as my initial capital, and I'll try and make ends meet on my own in the future. Hopefully that will lessen his burden a bit.
虽说还欠着学费贷款一大笔钱，但只要我们父子同心，没有什么坎是过不去的。等我在匹诺康尼闯出名堂来了，就让老爹退休，好好享受生活！

I still owe a large amount of student loans, but as long as my father and I stick together, there's no challenge we can't overcome. Once I make a name for myself on Penacony, I'll help my old man retire and enjoy life!
What are your plans for the future?
先把补考过了吧，好歹混个文凭出来，要是真的过不了…唔，那也没办法……
Let me get past the make-up exam and get a degree first. If I really can't pass... Well, then there's nothing much I can do about it...
老实说我也不知道毕业之后能不能在匹诺康尼找到工作，但我相信我的未来不会差的。
Honestly, I don't even know if I'll be able to land a job in Penacony, but I believe my future isn't too bleak.
我在学校做生意认识了这么多厉害的校友，积累的经验和人脉迟早用得上——反正只要努力，哪怕赚不了大钱，也总有办法养活自己和老爹的！

When I was doing business in school, I met so many fellow students and alumni in high places. The experience and connections I've accumulated will definitely come into use — I believe that as long as I work hard, even if I can't make a lot of money, I'll still be able to support myself and my old man!
你怎么不卖睡蕉小猴了？
Why don't you sell the Slumbernana Monkeys anymore?
嗐，那玩意早过气了，谁还买啊？最近流行的都是芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
Ugh, that thing is already a has-been. Who will buy it? The next new thing is Mr. Reca's latest work, Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!
而且…嘶，我们得小点声——我跟你透点内幕吧，社里的东西呢，溢价太高了。以前我见预售行情火热，还会故意断货，然后把价格炒高了再卖。

Also... Shh, we have to lower our voices for this. Lemme share some insider info with you. The prices for items in the club are super inflated. In the past, if I saw the pre-sale market doing well, I would intentionally buy out the stock to increase the price and sell it again.
我觉得这种销售策略实在有点缺德，虽然赚钱…但是现在我想明白了，就赚点生活费，这里的主顾又都是同学，没必要这么下作。

I do feel this sales strategy is unethical, although it does make money... But now I've thought it through. It's just to earn a bit of living expenses. The main customers here are all my schoolmates, and there's no need to be so despicable.
I have nothing else to ask.
Okay, just give a shout if you need me.
There's nothing else I want to ask.
我说你也是难得来我这儿一趟。我这里新进了点物美价廉的好东西，价格呢，就按成本价给你打折。
I was saying it's rare for you to pop by. I've just gotten some high-quality and affordable items. As for the price, I'll give you a discount based on the cost.
你看我这勤工俭学的也不容易，要不要来支持一下？不买的话看看也行嘛！
You know, this part-time work thing to pay for school isn't easy for me. How about showing me some support? Even if you're not buying anything, just come take a look!
What can I do for you?
大佬，你知道「折纸大学年鉴」吗？那个…我想麻烦你帮我写上一段对我的未来寄语。
Boss, have you heard about the Paperfold University Yearbook? Well... Could I trouble you to write a message for my future?
就是校委会决定在今年刊发一本全校性质的年鉴，所有正式就读于我校的在读生都有份参与，里面有大家的个人资料、本年度校园里发生的大事和不同学院不同班级的介绍等等。

The council decided to publish a school-wide yearbook this year. Every officially enrolled student will be included. There will be details of each individual, major school events of the year, and introductions to the various schools and classes.
Why do you want me to write in it?
因为你是大名鼎鼎的旁听生啊，在同学间很有人气，长得{F#漂亮}{M#帅气}不说， 性格又好，大家都很喜欢你，我想沾沾光嘛。

Because you're the renowned guest student! You're famous among the students. You're not just {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, you also have a great personality and everyone loves you. I just want to share in your spotlight too.
唉，也不怕大佬笑话，因为之前我一心只想搞钱，都没怎么和班级里的同学来往。有些人见我学业一团糟，连带着也远离我。

*sigh* I'm not afraid of you laughing at me, but because I was so focused on making money, I hardly interacted with my classmates. Some of them saw that my grades were horrible and they kept their distance from me.
但如果大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}能给我留言几句，到时候年鉴刊发出来，全校师生都看得到！
But if the renowned {NICKNAME} can leave a short message for me, then everyone in school will be able to see it when the yearbook gets published!
这样看起来就显得我好像人脉挺广的…老爹要是看到了也会很开心。所以我想拜托你帮我写几句，随便写什么都行！
This will make it seem like I have many connections... If my old man sees it, he'll be happy too. I'd like to ask you to help me write a few lines, anything will do!
感谢大佬！那我就把我的个人页上传过去了，我先发你一份吧，上面有我的联系方式，你可以随时找我——如果有需要的话。
Thanks boss! I'll send over my personal page first. Let me send you a copy too. My contact is on there, and if anything comes up, feel free to reach out to me.
…普通人把日子过好，比什么都重要。
...As an ordinary person, living the best you can is more important than anything.
说实话，经历了这些事，我算是想通了很多事儿。
Honestly, after going through so much, I've come to realize many things.
以前啊，我总觉得学习特别无聊，匹诺康尼处处都是乱飞的苜蓿币，我整天想的都是怎么搞钱，然后幻想自己暴富之后怎么花天酒地。

Back then, I used to feel that studying was so boring. Alfalfa credits are flying all over Penacony, and my mind was just obsessed with earning money. I was just dreaming about how to make it big and indulge in a lavish lifestyle.
但在跟老爹坦白了这一切之后…我觉得很多事情我看到的只是一层表象——比如说，哪怕格拉克斯大道多么光鲜亮丽，早霞工厂的流水线也沾不上一点光。

But after coming clean to my old man about all these... I feel that I'm only seeing the surface of many things. For example, no matter how dazzling Glaux Avenue is, its shine will never get to rub off on the Dawn Factory's production line.
还有那个什么睡蕉小猴，很多人…包括我，根本就不知道那是什么玩意！但大家就喜欢跟风，哪怕溢价都要买个玩偶回去，好像这是某种身份的象征一样。

And the Slumbernana Monkey... Many people, including me, don't even know what that thing is exactly! But everyone likes to chase the hype — they want it even if it means buying at a premium. It was just like as if it were a status symbol.
可一转眼，这玩意不火了，那价格跌的跟跳水似的，啧啧……
But in a blink of an eye, that novelty lost its hype and the price plummeted, tsk tsk...
所以啊——人活着还是脚踏实地一点比较好，钱是要赚的，但有时候也没那么重要，至少没有我以前想的那么重要。
That's why it's more important to be down-to-earth. Money has to be earned, but sometimes it may not be as important as it seems. Or at least it's not as important as I used to think.
我觉得就现阶段而言，我和老爹在匹诺康尼相互扶持下去。把日子过好，这对普通人来说比一切都重要。
I feel that, at this stage, what matters most is for my old man and me to support each other on Penacony. For ordinary people, it's most important to just live the best we can.
...At least I can only hope so for now.
你看到富贵眉头紧皱，几欲落泪。
You see Richie frowning, almost on the verge of tears.
星际经济学、梦境产业分析、跨星系贸易基础…唉，这些艰深的理论我怎么读都读不懂，我都快怀疑自己是怎么考进来的了。

Interstellar economics, dreamscape industry analysis, intergalactic trade basics... *sigh* No matter how many times I pore through them, I can't understand any of these abstruse theories. I'm starting to doubt how I even managed to be enrolled in the first place.
家人供我读书已经很艰难了，老爹一把年纪了，还要来匹诺康尼进厂打工…我要是毕不了业，学费贷款花了那么多钱，感觉都拿去喂狗都比花在我身上好！

My family is already having a hard time supporting my education. My old man still has to come to Penacony and work in a factory at his age... If I don't graduate, all my student loans spent would have been better off feeding the dogs than on me!
还是说，我就应该在老家的培训学校学门技术，干点普通的基础工作……
Or maybe I should have just learned a skill at the trade school back home and just worked a basic job...
不不不！富贵！你不能这么想——已经没法回头了，我一定不能辜负老爹的期望，一定不能……
No no no! Richie! You can't think like this — there's no turning back now, and I can't let my old man down. I simply can't...
It's fine if you don't want to buy, but why cause trouble?
唉，又被同学投诉了，这群天天玩奢侈品的公子哥，商品稍微有点瑕疵就要举报我违规经营！
*sigh* Classmates are complaining about me again. These rich folks play with luxury items every day, and report me for violating regulations just because there are slight flaws in the products!
我也是财富学院的学生，多点理解不行吗？为什么非要到我摊位上闹事，还说我是「奸商」！我辛辛苦苦地就是想勤工俭学赚点生活费，都是同学…为难我就这么有意思吗……

I'm also a student from Fortune Academy. Can't you be more reasonable? Why must you cause a scene at my stall and call me a dishonest merchant? I'm working hard just to earn some daily expenses. We are all classmates... Is it so fun to make my life difficult...?
还整天阴阳怪气地喊我「大老板」，看到我出身不好、成绩不好就上嘴脸…不就是一群恬不知耻只知道花家里钱的蛀虫嘛！

And sarcastically calling me "big boss" all the time, belittling me for my poor family background and bad grades.... They're just a bunch of shameless parasitic brats who flaunt their families' money!
哼，我一定要赚到大钱，做出一番事业——早晚让他们后悔！
Hmph, I'm gonna make a lot of money and achieve success — one day, I'll make them regret it!
感觉我离成功又近了一步！
Feels like I'm one step closer to success!
生意不错，这学期的生活费和学费应该稳了，老爹这下可以休息一阵子了。
Business has been good. This semester's tuition and living expenses should be covered. My old man can take a break for a while.
我就知道，我能考进折纸大学财富学院，果然还是有天赋的！嗯，这档子生意如果能稳定地经营下去…我想想……
I knew it. I got into Paperfold University's Fortune Academy because I have talent! Hmm, if this business can continue at this pace... let me think...
嘿嘿…假以时日，我指不定能和苜宿草家系的大人物打交道，要是能合作，扩大我们的商业版图…接下来…说不定我能成为匹诺康尼有史以来最年轻的首富！

Hee-hee... With time, I might be able to work with the big names from the Alfalfa Family. If we can collaborate and expand our business empire... who knows, I might be the youngest richest-person-in-Penacony in history!
然后我就回母校捐书教学，亲自传授商业经验，到时候什么退学警告，什么成绩，狗屁！学院还要主动倒贴我，追着我发通稿夸我是财富学院第一人！

Then I'll return to my alma mater to donate books and lecture, passing down my business experience. By then, who will care about the academic warnings or grades? It's all nonsense! The school should subsidize me and chase after me to issue a press release that lauds me as the top figure of Fortune Academy.
是的，就是这样！果然还是搞钱让人快乐，我要努力，我要挣钱，挣大钱——
Yes, that's the way! Hustling does bring joy. I'm gonna work hard. I want to earn money, earn big money...
Wake up. You still need to do the make-up exam.
哎哟，我这老毛病又犯了，整天盯着挣钱二字胡思乱想，差点忘了当下最要紧的事儿。
Oh no, old habits die hard. I've been obsessing over making money again, and I almost forgot about what's most important now.
大佬就是大佬，思想高度果然不一样，多亏你提醒我！
No wonder you're the boss. Your thinking is just on another level. Thanks for the reminder.
最近多亏了同学们的支持，生意还不错，我就说嘛，睡蕉小猴那玩意过时不说，市场也早就饱和了，得另辟蹊径才行。

Recently, thanks to the support of my classmates, business has been good. Like I said, the Slumbernana Monkey is not only outdated, but the market is already saturated. We need to explore new opportunities.
虽然赚的不多，但我也没花太多时间精力进去，毕竟读书要紧。算起来…加上校庆挣的那笔钱，这学期的生活费就不用老爹给我转账了。

I'm not earning much, but I didn't invest too much time and energy in it. After all, studying is my top priority now. After running some numbers... including the money I made during the school anniversary, I won't need my old man to send me money for living expenses this month.
嘿嘿，以前我总觉得自己家境不如其他同学好，读书也读不明白，一无是处…现在我感觉其实我也没那么差嘛。
Hee-hee. I used to feel like my family background wasn't as good as the others, and I'm not great at studying either. I felt useless... but now, I feel like I'm not so bad after all.
只要我脚踏实地，我和老爹迟早能过上好日子的！
As long as I stay grounded, my old man and I can live a good life sooner or later!

顺便也想多接触点拍摄机会，我想体验下不同风格的角色，给自己的演艺事业攒攒经验。

不过有机会的话，你可以介绍我们认识一下吗？都是要出镜的，四舍五入也算是半个同行，交流交流经验也好呀。

不过…目前给我发邀请的都是些短剧剧组，说是现在比较流行这种一分钟看完的故事…唉，芮克先生一定不会认可这种理念的。

But... I've wasted so much film, and everyone's time too. He must be really mad...

This feeling of being acknowledged makes me all warm and fuzzy. When I see an excellent piece of art, especially something like Mr. Reca's gripping movies, I can't help but earnestly envy those protagonists on the silver screen. And now I'm getting closer to being like them.
说不定过不了多久，我就能登上更大的舞台…这些都要感谢{NICKNAME}你啦！多亏了你，跟你搭戏我才能被芮克导演发掘！

可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？

Maybe... I don't have to see my studies here as my whole life. Even if I stumble here, it only serves to prove that it's not the right path for me, nor is it my way of the ninja.

Chaletka balls up her fists, her face flushing red — red like a bloodthorn banana. This is probably how she expresses her anger.

"A missing subcontractor, a disabled after sales service, a clueless product of the same model, a shattered him..."
数十个琥珀纪前，一条非法武装智械生产线淘汰的次品智械核心，辗转被移交给星际和平公司抵债。公司将它们改头换面，贴上「调饮机器人」的标签售卖。

Dozens of Amber Eras ago, those Intellitron cores deemed defective from an illegal armed Intellitron production line were transferred to IPC as debt collateral. IPC repurposed and repackaged them, stuck the "drinksmith robot" label on them and put them on shelves.
它们大多走上灶台，担负起厨师的职责，唯独一个机器人，在餐厅遇袭的危急时刻，意外解锁了智械核心的战斗模块。

Most of them ended up in kitchens, charged with chef responsibilities. Only one robot, during a critical moment when its restaurant was attacked, accidentally unlocked its Intellitron core's combat module.
原来，它炽热的正义感，甚至熔断了系统锁！它行云流水地挥舞铁锅，孤身一机击退了所有吃霸王餐的星际海盗，从此走上了惩恶除善的冒险旅程！

It turned out that its burning righteousness melted the system lock! It deftly brandished its pots, single-handedly beating back all the interstellar pirates who dined and dashed. From then on, it embarked on an adventure to punish evil and eliminate good!
——这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}为我撰写的起源故事。
...This is the origin story my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} created for me.
很遗憾，我的记忆体逐渐被漫长的时间磨损，最初的记忆早已模糊不清。即便是列车长，也只隐约记得是某位无名客将我制造而成。
I apologize, my memory unit has been worn down by the gradual passage of time, so my earliest memories are hazy. Even the conductor only vaguely remembers it was some Nameless who created me.
不过，或许可以想象这种可能：我的前史远比前任主人编造的版本更加波澜壮阔？
But, you might imagine such a possibility: Could my past be even more magnificently dramatic than the version my previous owner created?
毕竟，我也是「星穹列车」的无名客。
After all, I too am a Nameless of the Astral Express.
我的{NICKNAME}乘客啊，您真是问到点子上了。我一直在思考这个问题——生而为机器人，究竟是型号决定了功能，还是功能决定了型号？

My Nameless {NICKNAME}, you really hit the nail on its head. I have always been contemplating this question: Created as a robot, is it the model that determines my functions, or my functions that determine my model?
答案很显然是后者。一个调饮机器人，不应该被自己的型号所束缚。
The answer is obviously the latter. As a drinksmith robot, I should not be constrained by my model.
因此，调制饮品、制作点心，收集诸位无名客的饮食数据和用餐偏好，生成合适菜单，除了这些本职工作，我还时常更新自己的核心算法，下载一些补充包。

Therefore, mixing drinks, making snacks, collecting the Nameless' food data and dining preferences and generating suitable menus — apart from these jobs, I also regularly update my own core algorithms and download update packs.
比如之前，我就给自己安装了「杀敌算法免安装绿色正版补充包」，能精确识别数千公里外的多个敌对目标，迅速计算电磁脉冲炮弹道，进行火力压制。

For example, I previously installed the "Official Enemy Elimination Algorithm Green Update Pack — No Installation Required" that can accurately identify multiple enemy targets thousands of kilometers away, quickly compute EM pulse cannon trajectory, and execute suppression fire.
可惜我没有长焦义眼，没有火控雷达，更没有电磁脉冲炮——更没预先查杀出补充包里的蠕虫病毒。好险，差点变傻。

But I have no tele-focus artificial eyes, nor fire control radar, much less electromagnetic pulse cannons. I didn't even detect and eliminate the worm in the pack beforehand. I was lucky I didn't turn dumber.
看来，我还是更适合做「调饮机器人」一些。
It appears that I am more suited to be a drinksmith robot.
亲爱的无名客， 您或许对智能拟真模块的训练方式略有所闻？
Dear Nameless, I assume you might be somewhat aware of the training methods with AI realism modules?
{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}在货运车厢找到了破损的我，修复完毕后，我一直跟随他左右。
My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} found me in the cargo carriage, all beat-up. After finishing repairs on me, I followed him ever since.
从他那里收集到的语言和行为数据，使我学会了处世之道。因此，我至今仍对他怀有感激之情。
I learned about the world from the languages and behavioral data he collected. Which is why, to this day, I am ever grateful to him.
说来奇怪，他一直自言自语「有一个和自己相像的机器人果然是种有趣的体验」。或许有朝一日，我也会用自己的数据训练一个机器人？
It was strange that he always muttered to himself: "Having a robot that resembles yourself is truly an interesting experience." Perhaps, one day, I might also use my own data to train a robot?
而这个机器人，也会用它的数据训练新的机器人…哦，这该多么有趣呀！
And this robot, will use its own data to train a new robot... Oh, how interesting that would be!
我的名字，来自于姬子女士对我{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}说的最后一句话。
My name, is the last thing Lady Himeko said to my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#}.
从我的名字便能看出姬子女士的愤怒——真希望她当时说的是其他的话！「再见」、「永别」、「永不复还」、「祝你平安」之类的。
One can easily visualize Lady Himeko's wrath from my name — I really wish she had said something else that day! "Farewell," "Goodbye forever," "Nevermore," "Peace be with you," something like that.
实在不行，「铁血金刚」、「光轮<unbreak>12000</unbreak>」、「神钢机甲」之类的，我也可以接受。
If those don't work, something like "Ironblood Titan," "Photon Wheel <unbreak>12000</unbreak>" or "Divine Metal Mech," I would have accepted those as well.
我知道您很好奇当时究竟发生了什么，抱歉我无法向您说明原委。恐怕，还是等到您与他见面时，亲自问他比较妥当。
I know you are very curious as to what exactly happened. I apologize that I am unable to explain the whole incident to you. It might be better for you to ask him yourself when you meet him.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
再见，亲爱的无名客。愿您旅途顺遂。
Goodbye, dear Nameless. Have a safe voyage.
您是否熟悉「仙舟联盟」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的得意之作。
Are you familiar with the "Xianzhou Alliance"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my finest creations.
提问：谁是「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人？
Which of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is the most cunning?
答案：「帝弓七天将」中最强壮的人是「飞霄」。因为她是「添肌将军」。
The most cunning of the Seven Arbiter-Generals is Feixiao because she is sly as a fox.
您理解了吗？「天击」与「添肌」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
Do you get it? Because she's a foxian? It's a funny pun.
您是否熟悉「天才俱乐部」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的天才之作。
Are you familiar with the "Genius Society"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my most ingenious creations.
提问：为什么「碎星王虫•斯喀拉卡巴兹（拟造）」如此坚硬？
What do you call the wife of a Swarm insect?
答案：它如此坚硬，因为「软没」。
您理解了吗？「软没」与「阮•梅」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
Do you get it? It's a funny pun.
我还有几个比较短的「一句话幽默」。机会难得，就一并讲给您听吧。
I have a couple of one-liners. It's a rare opportunity, so let me share them all with you.
提问：罗浮六御中谁最幸福？答案：符玄。因为她姓符。
Who is the most tired among the Luofu's Six Charioteers? Jing Yuan. Because he's the "Dozing" General.
提问：波提欧先生最害怕哪艘仙舟？答案：「方壶」。因为那里有「伏波将军」。
Why is Boothill always so confident? Because it's not his first rodeo.
提问：为什么罗刹可以出入无关人员不得进出的区域？答案：因为他是「有棺人员」。
Why does Luocha need to see a healer? Because of his coffin.
希望您喜欢这几个笑话。我还会继续努力创作的。
I hope you enjoyed those jokes. I will continue to work hard on them.
您对星神感兴趣吗？我这里还有一个关于星神的笑话。
Are you interested in Aeons? I have another joke about Aeons.
在「寰宇蝗灾」的时代，众神争斗不休。有一天，「存护」克里珀找到「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯，对祂说：「我知道你是一位很要强的星神，但从今天开始，你不必再要强了。」

During the era of the Swarm Disaster, the gods were in constant conflict. One day, Qlipoth the Preservation found Tayzzyronth the Propagation and said to THEM, "I know you try very hard to be popular, but from this day forth, you no longer need to do so."
The Preservation responded, "Because everyone is swarming around you."
然后，「寰宇蝗灾」就结束了。
您似乎听腻了「谐音梗」或其他冷笑话。我这里刚好有一个特殊风格的笑话，请您欣赏一下吧。
You seem to be tired of puns and corny jokes. I happen to have a joke with a unique style, please enjoy it.
有个杀手带着他的受害者走进黑暗的丛林深处。受害者说：「我害怕！」杀手生气地说——
A killer takes his victim deep into a dark forest. The victim says, "I'm scared!" The killer angrily replies:
「你有什么好怕的！我才该害怕！等一下我还要一个人走回来呢！」
"What do you have to be afraid of? I should be the one afraid! I have to walk back alone later!"
…呃，您不喜欢这个笑话吗？这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}教给我的，我还以为您会喜欢。
...Uh, you didn't like that one? It was taught to me by my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#}. I thought you might enjoy it.
我这里还有一个非常古老的笑话，出自过去一位非常糟糕的无名客。这个笑话是这样的——
I have a very old joke here from a past, rather terrible Nameless. It goes like this...
在比星神还古老的时代，人们可以用「魔法」操控自然万物。一个人对自然的认知越少，能操纵的事物就越多。
In an era older than the Aeons, people could use "magic" to control the natural world. The less a person understood about nature, the more they could manipulate it.
譬如一个人不理解大气的运动，便能操纵风。一个人不理解潮汐的起落，就能操纵海。
For example, if someone didn't understand atmospheric movement, they could control the wind. If someone didn't understand the rise and fall of tides, they could control the sea.
在那时的人类当中，有一位最伟大的魔法师。他不止能操纵自然万物——他还能操纵一切「命运」。
Among the humans of that time, there was one greatest sorcerer. Not only could he control the forces of nature, but he could also manipulate all of "fate."
因为他出生时就缺乏完整的大脑，却奇迹般地活着。他对整个世界都无知无识，却能挑动命运的机杼。
He was born with an incomplete brain, yet miraculously survived. He was ignorant and unaware of the entire world, yet he could steer the wheels of fate.
那么——总有听到这个故事的人会问——既然此人无知无识，人们又要如何运用他操纵「命运」的力量呢？
So, people who hear this story will always ask: If this person lacks awareness, how can others possibly wield his power over "fate"?
The answer is: Leave it to fate.
哦，我知道这并不是一个很好笑的笑话。因为正如我所说的那样，这个笑话非常古老。但它很有启发性，不是吗？

Yes, it's true that it might not be the funniest joke, but it is quite thought-provoking. The idea of someone who is both ignorant and influential in controlling fate is a fascinating concept, and it certainly offers a lot of food for thought.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
再见，亲爱的无名客。愿您旅途顺遂。
Goodbye, dear Nameless. Have a safe voyage.
有什么事需要我吗，{F#女士}{M#先生}？
Just wanted to chat with you, Sunny.
…知无不言，但那个称呼，还是让它成为往事吧。
...I'll tell you everything I know, but I'd prefer not to be called that in the future.
请尽管问吧。只是我初来乍到，也许没太多事情可说。
Please ask away. But I might not have a lot to share since I've only recently came on board.
About the companions on the Express...
我正在尝试以新的身份与各位相处。只是囿于性格，需要时间。
I'm trying to connect with everyone using my new identity, but I may need some time due to my personality.
瓦尔特先生在同行时，向我展现了令人折服的「开拓」之道。实不相瞒，在我眼中各位都是良师。
Mr. Yang showed me the captivating way of the Trailblaze during our travels. Truth be told, you've all been great teachers.
与列车长的交谈中，我越发了解无名客的历史，丹恒则为我展示了智库中的诸多学识。甚至那位三月七女士，我也从她身上学到……
The conductor taught me about the history of the Nameless, Dan Heng showed me the extensive knowledge stored in the data bank, and even from Miss March 7th, I've learned...
是曾经收到的一份礼物。交到我手中时，是完全空白的。
It was a gift I received, and it arrived blank.
你是把它当作经文一类的典籍了么？这也不算误解，其中有些相关内容，不过是我自行写下的。
Did you mistake it for some type of classic text or something? It's not entirely inaccurate, though. I wrote some pages myself.
某种意义上，它代表了我人生的一个阶段。
In a way, it symbolizes a chapter of my life.
What have you been up to lately?
大多时候，仍是独自思量，等待启程。
Most of the time, I've been reflecting in solitude while waiting for our departure.
想为列车做些什么，但初来乍到，无从下手。列车长也只叫我安心待机。
I wanted to contribute, but I wasn't sure how. The conductor just told me to wait patiently.
不过…也许是闲来无事，看着偌大的车厢，总有种想要整理一番的冲动……
Yet... as I look at the spacious car, I feel a strong urge to organize it that likely stems from boredom...
我的过往不值一提。不过，是什么引起了你的好奇？
My past isn't worth mentioning. But may I ask what piqued your curiosity?
的确，盛会之星大名鼎鼎，但在家族不计其数的领地中，也只称得上是一处「酒店」。
The Planet of Festivities is certainly well-known, but among The Family's many territories, it is merely a "hotel" at best.
或许今后，我们还有机会踏上「同谐」的其他属地。当然，我会尽可能回避，以免引来麻烦。
Perhaps we'll visit more domains of the Harmony someday. I'll make sure to excuse myself to avoid any complications.
尽管其中一处…令我相当怀念。
There is but one place that lingers in my thoughts, though.
那位慈玉女士的阴影仍投射在我身上。
The shadow of Lady Bonajade still looms over me.
她离去时留下过一句耐人寻味的话语：如果群星也没有我所求的答案，那战略投资部…会是无家可归者最后的归宿。

She shared some intriguing words with me before she left. She said that if I cannot find the answer I seek among the stars, the Strategic Investment Department... will be the last refuge for the lost.
或许某一天，就会有人找上门来，要我偿还自由的代价。我对此已有预期，也定然不会累及各位。
Perhaps one day, someone will find me and ask me to pay the price of freedom. I am ready for that, and I will certainly not be a burden to any of you.
也许你会感到疑惑，但我忧心的事中，唯独不包括她。
You may find this confusing, but among my worries, she is not one of them.
她并不需要我操心…其实我早该承认这点。
She can take care of herself... I should have admitted that long ago.
如今我唯一想做的，就是尽可能走在她前面。倒不是身为兄长的好胜心。只是前路若有我们尚未得知的苦难，我更希望先她一步承受。
All I want is to lead the way for her. It's not about sibling rivalry. There are unknown hardships ahead, and I wish to face them first.
我毕竟是一名逃犯，不应引人注目。恢复自由后，便第一时间换下了家主的衣装。
I am a fugitive, after all, and I shouldn't draw attention. I changed out of the family head's outfit the moment I gained my freedom.
虽说要开始苦行，但我觉得它仍有纪念的价值，就想好好保存，却不慎在匹诺康尼遗失了。
Even though I was about to start my penance, I wanted to keep it for its sentimental value, but I lost it in Penacony.
或许这小小的意外，也是某种喻示吧。
Perhaps this is some sort of sign.
说来有趣，我从未想过，自己有朝一日会与无名客同行。
It's funny that I never imagined I would be traveling with the Nameless one day.
你准备参与开拓之行吗？
Are you planning to join the trailblazing journey?
你是指在到达目的地后，是否要下车随行吗？当然，我毕竟在进行苦修，更希望能多看看这尘世。
You mean, will I disembark when we reach the destination? Absolutely, I want to explore more of the world for the sake of my ascetic journey.
即使「秩序」的力量已然不复，但若有什么意外…我还是会倾力相助。
Even without the power of the Order, I will do my utmost to lend a hand if needed.
有什么感兴趣的目的地？
有一些目标，但我毕竟只是一介搭车客，不应妄言。
I do have a few ideas in mind, but as a mere hitchhiker, it's not really my place to weigh in.
在这人世创造乐园，仍是我毕生的夙愿。获得准许后，我也查阅了智库中的信息，发现宇宙中有不少世界有着类似的名号。
Creating a paradise remains my lifelong ambition. When I obtained permission and accessed the data bank, I came across many references to this concept throughout the universe.
比如「天国」，「净土」，「乐境」…用词略有不同。但愿此后，我能有机会造访，看看它们是否名副其实。
They go by different names — Heavenly Kingdom, Pure Land, Blissful Realm... Hopefully, I can visit these places to see if they truly live up to their names.
你担心它的怒火会追逐着我，无论我去向何处？请放心。若有类似的可能性，我定然不会道出登上列车的请求。
Are you concerned that I won't be able to escape its wrath, no matter where I go? Rest assured, if that were truly a possibility, I wouldn't have made the request to board the Express.
家族或许存有将我铲除的意愿，但若非我组织起一支声势浩大的军队，绝不会轻易惊动「无限夫长」。
The Family may wish to eliminate me, but as long as I'm not rallying a sizable army, they wouldn't go so far as to involve the Eternal Centurion.
这个名字自问世起，就不是为了对付「一个人」而存在的。
Since its inception, it was never meant to be used against a single person.
我们将要前往下一站了吗？
Are we leaving for the next stop?
你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
How much do you know about Amphoreus?
一无所知，甚至连名字都未曾听闻。
Nothing, I've not even heard of the name.
我自幼开始参与家族事务，分身乏术，少有远行的时候。
I've been managing The Family's affairs since young, leaving me little time to travel afar.
而我所知晓的世界，往往…也只是一些巡演举办的地方，我并未深入了解过。
And the world I know often... only consists of places where music tours are held. I've never explored them in depth.
Nothing much. Still have to wait.
想和我谈些什么，要坐下慢慢聊么？
What's on your mind? Do you want to sit and talk?
哦，该不会是要我补票吧？
Oh? Don't tell me I'm supposed to pay for the ride...
好奇那一位的事吗？当然，我们已经打过交道了。
You wish to know more about her? Well, yes, we've already met.
但很遗憾，我无法解答你的疑惑。同为忆者，我不能擅自打听他人的行动。
But sadly, I can't indulge your curiosity. As Memokeepers, we can't pry into each other's plans.
不过我并未从她身上探知到能被称为威胁的事物，这点可以放心。
Just so you know, I haven't sensed anything that comes off as a threat in her. No need to be concerned about that.
呵呵，未免有些迫不及待了呢。但正如领航员小姐所说，眼下还是多做点准备为好。
Hehe, looks like someone is a little impatient! But as the Navigator said, it's best for us to prepare as best as we can now.
耐心和优雅能赋予一个人绝妙的吸引力，你也试着放慢些步调吧？
Patience and elegance can give people an irresistible charm. Perhaps you should consider slowing down a bit?
I want to glimpse into my destiny!
呵呵。虽说有所涉猎，但我可称不上通晓占卜，也不认为存在确信的未来。
Hehe, while I do have some knowledge of divination, I'm no expert, and I don't really believe in a predetermined future.
比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.
You want to know more about me?
嗯…说是无所事事，似乎也不恰当。只是略微有些沉闷。
Hmm... I wouldn't call it boring... but, it's just been a bit uneventful.
好在某位开拓者{F#女士}{M#先生}常来探望，时时展现{F#她}{M#他}的鲜活，才不至于让一位搭车的女士向隅独泣。
Luckily, a certain {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Trailblazer often stops by, bringing {F#her}{M#his} vibrant energy to lift the spirits of this lonely passenger.
{F#她}{M#他}还会再来，直到我也成为{F#她}{M#他}记忆的一部分…对吗？
Will {F#she}{M#he} keep visiting me until I find my place in {F#her}{M#his} memory?
I want to know more about your past...
呀，你也对「记忆」充满好奇心呢，或许有踏上这条命途的潜质？
Ha! You're intrigued by the Remembrance as well? Maybe you're destined to follow THEIR Path!
我的建议是，不要只用言语探查他人的过往——而是要用心，呵呵。
A good rule of thumb is to uncover others' pasts not just with words, but with your heart, hehe.
感到好奇也是在所难免。毕竟，你很难从人们口中听见对焚化工的正面评价。
I get why you'd be curious about them. People don't usually have nice things to say about The Cremators.
不过，我建议在做好准备前，还是不要贸然打听这群人的消息。因为这部分「记忆」…会让你在他们的视线中暴露无遗。
But until you're ready, I highly recommend not inquiring about them. Having this "memory" could reveal your presence before you.
That's all I wanted to talk about.
茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.
让我猜猜…你不是来闲聊的，对吧？
Let me guess... You're not here just to chat, right?
想了解目的地吗？是哪些方面呢？
You want to know about the destination? What would you like to know?
很遗憾。我从未踏足那里，所知同样甚少。
Unfortunately, I've never set foot there, hence my limited knowledge.
能确信的，只有忆庭之镜映照出的星球绝非寻常之地。更何况…那是个受三重命途纠缠的世界。
What is certain is that the planet reflected in the mirror of the Garden of Recollection is no ordinary place. Moreover... that is a world where the Three Paths are entangled.
不如说，是我个人的目的。
It's better to call it my personal goal.
打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，星神的明光闪烁其间，令人沉醉不已。
It is my duty to salvage memories that are forgotten, while Amphoreus... is a treasure behind a window, with the Aeons' blinding light radiating from within, mesmerizing all.
呵呵。虽说有所涉猎，但我可称不上通晓占卜，也不觉得存在确信的未来。
Hee-hee. I have dabbled in such things, but it's not like I'm well-versed in divination, nor do I believe in a predetermined future.
比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.
茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.
你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
How much do you know about Amphoreus?
无数演员穷尽一生，只为自己能出现在这块小小的屏幕上。
Countless actors spend their whole lives just to get the chance to appear on this small screen.
每一副面孔，都代表着匹诺康尼艺术领域的最高成就。
Each face represents the highest achievement of the arts in Penacony.
除了知更鸟，你一个也不认识，但装作认识他们会显得你很有品味。
Apart from Robin, you don't know any of them, but acting like you do makes it seem like you have good taste.
在悲剧中嚎哭的人偶，高举的手得不到救赎。
A puppet who cries in a tragedy, with hands raised for unreachable salvation.
在喜剧中欢笑的人偶，放声感慨世界的幸福。
A puppet who laughs during a comedy, loudly releasing the world's happiness as a sigh.
在舞蹈中踮足的人偶，身形如谐乐鸽在振翅。
A puppet who loses themselves to the dance, their body akin to a Charmony Dove spreading its wings.
窗帘保护了贵宾的隐私，也为他们献上了窥视他人的权柄。
The curtain protects the privacy of elite guests and also provides them with the authority to spy on others.
窗外是剧院的舞台，一些尊贵的客人会留在这里，用望远镜观看剧目，或是遥望其他客人。
Beyond the window is the theater's stage. Some distinguished guests will linger there and use binoculars to watch a show or observe other guests.
这里的视角算不上完美，但对于有资格来到这里的宾客来说，重点并不是剧场上的演出，而是幕后与戏友的隐语。

The view from here isn't perfect, but for someone with the right qualifications to occupy this space, a theater's performance isn't the main course. That honor goes to the cryptic messages passed between friends of the theater behind the scenes.
非常抱歉，因突发事故影响，本剧院暂中止提供服务。
My apologies. The theater has temporarily suspended its services due to an accident.
一旁的前台淡定地平息着客人们的恐慌，虽然她已经紧张得快要当场醒过来了。
The receptionist off to the side calmly works to mollify the frightened guests, even though she herself is so nervous that she could wake up right then and there.
贵宾票请前往一号口，普通票请前往二号口，家族成员请前往三号口——都什么时候了，还惦记这几号口有意义吗？

Guests with VIP tickets, please proceed to Gate No. 1. Those with regular tickets, please go to Gate No. 2. Family members are to go to Gate No. 3. What's the point of remembering these gate numbers at a time like this?
在史诗中浅唱的人偶，战争与历史只余文字。
A puppet softly singing an epic saga. Wars and history leave only words.
在闹剧中惨死的人偶，吐息结束的最后一刻。
A puppet dying tragically in a farce. This is the moment of its last breath.
在爱剧中跌落的人偶，扭曲自己却求而不得。
A puppet who fell in a romance drama. It twists itself, yet cannot obtain its desire.
在懵懂中学语的人偶，所作所为皆镜中你我。
A puppet learning to speak. All our actions are reflected by it as if a mirror.
在寂静中沉思的人偶，未知谜题终得到解答。
A puppet contemplating in silence. The unknown puzzle is finally answered.
欢笑的人偶十分困惑——我们八个不是同一套动作吗？怎么词儿都各说各的？
The laughing puppet is confused: Didn't the eight of us perform the same set of actions? Why do we each have different lines?
学语的人偶表示，我不知道啊，我跟着大伙一起做的。
The puppet learning to speak states: I don't know, I just followed what everyone else did.
沉思的人偶表示，让它沉思了百年的就是这个问题。
The puppet in contemplation says: This is precisely the issue I spent a century deciphering.
想要成为盛会巨星吗？赶快来报名吧！注册只需一秒，成功却是永恒。
Yearning to become a Festive Superstar? Then you better sign up now! Registration is just a second, but success is forever.
我方郑重承诺，参赛者的个人隐私将得到严密保护，请放心使用该注册设备。
As we pledge to closely guard the privacy of all participants, please feel free to register with this device.
无奖问答，哪台是「钟表匠」曾经用过的？好吧，他本人可能也记不得了。
Here's a question for you, but no prize if you get it right. Which of these was used by the Watchmaker? Fine, he probably doesn't remember either.
完美诠释了「大就是好，多就是妙」的永恒真理。
This perfectly explains the timeless truth of "Bigger is better, and more is marvelous."
「音响给我使劲儿造！能做多大做多大，咱们苏乐达不差钱。」
"Put your back into making this sound system. The bigger, the better. SoulGlad isn't hurting for money."
事实证明，不管是不是心理作用，大号的音响用着是要爽快些。
The evidence shows that irrespective of whether it's psychological or not, a big speaker offers a more satisfying experience.
聚爆苏乐达，万吨级压缩，让您感受恒星炸裂的快感。
Explosion SoulGlad has a crazy high level of compression that'll give you that happy feeling of a planetary explosion.
请勿在赛前两个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
Do not drink two system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.
虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.
冰点苏乐达，添加苍蓝薄荷精华，为您带来冻结星辰的寒冬。
Ice SoulGlad with blue mint essence brings you the cold blast of a frozen star.
请勿在赛前四个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
Do not drink four system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.
虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.
盛会海选，一场人人平等的造星之旅。
The Festivity Auditions are a journey to discover a new star in a way that is fair to all who participate.
去摘下那颗星星吧！超越所有的对手，变得比任何人都要闪闪发光。
Pluck that star! Surpass all competitors and shine brighter than everyone else.
智慧、财富、歌喉、舞技，拼尽你所拥有的一切，让世界为你让路。
You've got it all: Intelligence, wealth, singing and dancing skills. Let the world make way for you.
每个人都有成为巨星的潜力，下一个被匹诺康尼记住的名字，就是未来的你！
Everyone has the potential to become a Superstar. The next name that everyone in Penacony remembers could be yours!
The stars are spiraling for you tonight.
还在担心你的才能无人赏识？还在苦恼水里的金子不被发现？快来报名吧！热砂盛会海选，绝不错过一颗明星。

Still worried that no one can truly appreciate your talents? Are you concerned that there is some hidden potential within that hasn't been discovered yet? Then now is the time to sign up! The Scorchsand Festivity Auditions never miss a star.
本节目由苏乐达独家冠名赞助播出，苏乐达，您观赛娱乐的不二之选。
This program is brought to you by SoulGlad, our exclusive sponsor. SoulGlad, the best choice for watching the auditions.
美梦苏乐达，经典百年传。
SoulGlad, a beautiful dream, a time-tested classic.
「滴答，还在等什么，全新瓶装限量苏乐达，等你来享受。」
"Tick-tock, tick-tock. What are you waiting for? The all-new, limited edition SoulGlad bottle is waiting for you."
嘿，朋友，偷听可不是什么好习惯。
Hey, friend. Eavesdropping is a bad habit to have.
热砂苏乐达吧，苏乐达狂欢火热进行中，暂时歇业。
Due to the SoulGlad festivities being in full swing, the Scorchsand SoulGlad Bar is temporarily closed.
一扇被糖浆紧紧黏住的门，无法被外力打开。
The door is stuck because of a syrupy substance. It cannot be opened.
盛会巨星联名活动，热砂大酒店专场——但就是贴了几个立牌而已。
This is the Festive Superstar collab event held at the Scorchsand Grand Hotel, and all they have are a few stands.
惊了！全套的《哈努兄弟》官方小说，哪怕是你，也狠狠地羡慕了。
Whoa! The complete set of the official Brother Hanu novels. Even you are crazy jealous.
《<unbreak>420</unbreak>岁废弃智械转生成哈努兄弟拯救美梦小镇》、《黑帮的自我修养》、《狼人老大爱上我》…天啊，哈努兄弟为什么会有这种同人作品？
The 420-Year-old Abandoned Intellitron Reincarnated as Brother Hanu Saves Dreamville, Self-Cultivation of a Gangster, The Werewolf's Love... Why are there these kinds of Brother Hanu fan fiction?
丰富的藏书，涵盖了梦境经济、名人传记、忆质技术等多个领域——做高素质黑帮，从我做起。
This rich collection of works features the Dreamscape economy, biographies of famous individuals, memoria techniques, and many other fields. If you wanna be a wise guy, you gotta start with yourself.
被弹药箱堵住的通道，值得哈努兄弟的一次出场。
A passage blocked by an ammunition box warrants the arrival of Brother Hanu.
任何时间，任何地点，哈努兄弟都会为你排忧解难。
Brother Hanu will help when you're in a pinch. Anytime, anywhere.
有时候，一个地方看着能过去，摸着能过去，但确实就是过不去。
Sometimes, you look at a place and think you can pass through. Sometimes, it'll even feel like you can, but in reality, you can't.
花是最忠诚的朋友，它们美丽，芬芳，而且不会说话。
Flowers truly are the most loyal of friends. They are gorgeous, fragrant, and don't talk.
只有四下空无一人的时候，哈努兄弟才会展现出些许疲惫。花儿把这些画面放进心里，静静地守望。
Brother Hanu will only show a hint of fatigue when no one is around. The flower carves this image into its memory as it quietly watches Hanu.
被梦所滋养的花儿，永远都不会凋谢。
The flower nourished by dreams will never wilt.
箱子里装满了钱，但哈努兄弟拒绝收下它们，他需要更本质的一些东西，比如友情。
The box is stuffed full of cash, but Brother Hanu refuses to accept them. He needed something even more essential, like friendship.
「你把一些数字放到我桌上，以为这样我就能为你办事，若你这样想…朋友，你该去找赏金猎人。」
"You put down some numbers on my table and think that'll allow me to take care of things for you. If you really think that way, then... friend, you should go look for a bounty hunter."
「看到这些书了吗？随便翻开它们，里面一页纸的内容，也远比这些钱要珍贵。」
"Did you see these books? If you flip through them, you'll find that a single page of one of these books is way more valuable than the money."
历年以来，组织的人员编制和账目情况，都有序地罗列在其中。
Over the years, the situation behind the organization's personnel and accounting have been listed in an orderly sequence.
从书的新旧程度可以看出，哈努兄弟最讨厌的，是这本没拆封的《星际和平公司发展史》。
Judging from how aged each of these books is, Hanu hates this unopened IPC Developmental History text the most.
哈努兄弟不怎么爱看以他为主角的作品，但《钟表小子》系列却翻了一遍又一遍。
Hanu doesn't really like to view works starring himself as the protagonist, but he has gone through the Clockie series over and over.
储存组织经费的保险柜，据说它的内部空间远比外面看起来要大。
A strongbox storing the organization's expenditures. It is said to be much better on the inside.
通常机密文件也会放在保险柜里，但哈努兄弟对外向来开诚布公，没有机密可藏。
Secret documents are usually placed in the safe as well, but Hanu has always dealt openly and honestly with the public, offering little in the way of secrets.
据说家族会把一种迷因塞进保险柜，任何偷盗的行为都会招致它的惩罚。
Rumor has it that The Family will place some kind of memetic entity into their safe, and any manner of theft would incur their retribution.
量产的军火装备，原型是哈努哈努回旋加速喷气式哈努哈努炮。
A mass-produced weapon. Its prototype was the Hanu-Hanu Tornado Speed Jet Hanu-Hanu Cannon.
最新款超级弹药，加量不加价，一颗更比七颗强，把敌人统统炸回老家。
The latest pattern of high-grade ammunition. With its quantity far outweighing the price, as a single shot from this can outdo seven of its competitors and send all your enemies to kingdom come.
请放心，所有武器都附带有防火涂层，如运输中发生爆炸，支持伤者本人进行维权。
Please rest assured: All weapons have a layer of fireproof coating. If an explosion occurs during transportation, the injured party's legal rights will be fully enforced.
价值连城的汽水展柜，预留给那些能改变世界的客人。
A priceless soda display case. This is reserved for visitors who can change the world.
第三次谐乐大典期间的特装版苏乐达，发行量极少，每一瓶的现世，都会在匹诺康尼拍卖中掀起一场血雨腥风。
A special edition SoulGlad produced during the third Charmony Festival. Few in quantity, when each of these bottles is released, Penacony's auctions turn into slaughterhouses.
不用担心，梦里的汽水是没有保质期的，况且你也没有在梦里闹肚子的机能。
Don't worry, dream-made soft drinks don't have expiry dates, and you won't be able to suffer a stomach ache in the Dreamscapes anyway.
陈酿了数百年的气泡水，足以撼动任何有机生命的味蕾。
Soda that has been stored for centuries, potent enough to shake any organic's taste buds.
第四次谐乐大典期间的陈年苏乐达，你在每一场外交宴会都能看到它的身影。
A classic SoulGlad produced during the fourth Charmony Festival. You can see its presence gracing every single diplomatic banquet.
整座地窖价格最低廉的产品，花上十年的工资就能买到。
It's the cheapest product in the whole cellar, and you'll be able to afford it with a mere ten years of salary.
收藏特殊汽水的展柜，永远向汽水界的盛会巨星敞开。
A display case that stores special sodas. It is always open to the superstars of the soft drink industry.
因生产事故、迷因影响、汽水本身特质等因素所产生的，不可复现的谜之汽水。
Due to production accidents and memetic entities, the properties of this mysterious and memetically altered soda cannot be recreated.
「想加入我们吗？快来参加汽水海选吧！让世界因你的气泡而颤抖！」
"Wanna join us? Come sign up for the soda elections! Let the world tremble before your carbonation!"
这位是酸辣口味的汽水，诞生于一场噩梦；这位汽水能把吐出来的气再吸回去；这位更是重量级，联名了仙舟特色的苏打豆汁。

This is a soda with a spicy and sour flavor. Created from a nightmare, this soda can draw back gas that was already expelled. This one is even stronger, for it contains elements of the Xianzhou specialty: Mung bean soda.
第五次谐乐大典期间的量产苏乐达，曾作为军用品运往战场，具有极高的历史价值。
A flavor of SoulGlad mass-produced during the fifth Charmony Festival. It was once used as military rations and transported on the battlefield. It also possesses great historical value.
在抵御外敌的那段日子里，营地里的苏乐达，是猎犬战士们为数不多的一点享受。
While holding against the enemy during the war, the SoulGlad on the base was one of the few things a Bloodhound could enjoy.
无缘进入展柜的汽水，并非是它们不优秀，只是有的汽水比它们更优秀。
The sodas that haven't been placed in the display case aren't excluded because they're bad, but because other drinks are better.
「好好反思一下，你们和能进展柜的汽水，到底有什么不同？」，「生产日期。」
"Think about it. What's the difference between you and the sodas that get to go in the display case?" "Our expiry date."
失意者的聚集地，等待它们的是被喝掉的命运。
A gathering place for the disillusioned. Their fate is to be gulped down.
不容为外人打扰的珍贵窖藏，迎来了数百年来的第一位客人。
