A treasured cellar that usually doesn't tolerate visitors. It has welcomed its first guest in centuries.
你惊讶地发现，这些汽水身上没有任何品牌的标记，与外面展柜的藏品相比，显得格外简陋。
You are astonished to discover these sodas don't have any brand symbols on them. Compared to the collection items in the display case outside, they look extremely garish.
在这些窖藏出产的时候，它们还被叫做苏萨水，配方价格「高达」一万信用点。
When these were first stored, they were still called Sousa Juice, and their recipe was worth up to ten thousand credits.
而正是这种廉价的民间小饮品，成就了如今苏乐达庞大的商业帝国。
And this is a cheap drink meant for everyday consumption. It is also this cheap drink that has built SoulGlad's commercial empire.
朴素到有些扎嘴的糖浆药水，在监狱时期却是难得的美味。
A simple and tongue-prickling syrupy medicine that was a rare flavor during the Prison Era.
承载了几代人回忆的汽水饮料，只是没多少人还记得最初的风味了。
A soda that carries the memories of countless generations. Only a few people remember its original flavor.
不怎么好喝的汽水，却有着远超任何一瓶苏乐达的价值。
A soda that doesn't taste so good, yet is far more valuable than any bottle of SoulGlad.
本梦境迷钟为展出限定款，具体尺寸请以到货实物为准。
This Dream Ticker is a limited exhibition edition. Please treat the actual merchandise's dimensions as accurate.
巨型梦境迷钟，设计之初曾具备星际飞行与变形合体的功能，后来被甲方砍掉了。
A giant Dream Ticker. Its original design was made with interstellar flight and transformation functions in mind, but the client scaled down later.
请看下集，一台比钟表小子还要厉害的钟。
Please stay tuned for the next episode: A Clock Stronger than Even Clockie.
点石成金小课堂开课啦，只收学费，不包教会。
Alright. The lesson about turning garbage into gold begins. Note that this only includes the tuition fee and that the demonstrations are not included.
是不是还可以做成珀金、钻石和水晶版的钟表小子？你好像发现了不得了的商机。
Say, could we make platinum, diamond, or crystal versions of Clockie? You seem to have discovered a great business opportunity.
黄金钟表小子，坐拥热砂之地，毗邻豪华宅邸，尽显高调奢华——你，值得拥有。
A golden Clockie sitting amidst the scorching sands, adjacent to a luxurious mansion. It exudes a lavish sense of luxury, and you most certainly deserve to have it.
即使隔着屏幕，透过如雷的掌声，你也能感受到另一侧观众们的激动和亢奋。
Even through the screen and the thunderous applause, you can feel the excitement and stimulation of the audience on the other side.
不知为何，你突然害怕它们会把你围住，然后疯狂地复读「恭喜你」。
For some reason, you are afraid they will surround you and begin wildly telling you: "Congratulations."
「让我们为盛会巨星的诞生献上喝彩——本海选由苏乐达独家赞助播出，快乐美梦速速达，大家一起苏乐达。」
"Let us cheer the birth of a superstar for this competition. These auditions are sponsored by SoulGlad: 'Make Your Dreams a Blast, Everyone Have Some SoulGlad.'"
瞧瞧这是谁？匹诺康尼的盛会巨星！无匹的开拓者！大家最爱的银河球棒侠！
Check out who it is? Penacony's celebratory superstar! The peerless Trailblazer! Everyone's favorite Galactic Baseballer!
一想到这张脸会在屏幕上挂上很长一段时间，你甚至有些害羞。
The thought of your face behind displayed on the screen for countless hours makes you even a little shy.
按照标准流程，下一步是不是就该有人来找你接广告代言了？
According to the standard procedure, shouldn't someone come and ask you to be an ambassador and shoot some ads for them?
万众瞩目的巨星之路，只为唯一的星中之星敞开，目前正在休赛维护中。
The path to becoming a megastar is only open to superstars above superstars. Currently, it is undergoing maintenance during the off-season.
满是糖浆的泉水会再次喷涌而出吗？你期待地盯着它，但什么都没有发生。
Will the syrup-filled spring geyser out once more? You expectantly stare at it, but nothing happens.
这大概就是那种——音乐喷泉只会在周末喷水，海选的装置也只会在比赛时启动。
This is the kind of musical fountain that only sprays on weekends. The installation will likewise only come into activation during the qualifiers.
看着从天而降的苏乐达，盛会海选时的点点滴滴又涌上心头。
Looking at the SoulGlad falling from the sky, your memories of the Festivity Auditions return.
一切好似命运的悄然安排，你途径此处、你驻足、你沉浸于歌声化作的月光粼粼的海。

Everything seems to be quietly falling into place as if ordered by fate. You pass by here, you linger for a while, and you lose yourself in the luminescent moonlit ocean that songs have transformed into.
恍惚中所有烦扰云烟霁散，你的灵魂在冷淡的人造光中随这哼唱呼吸起伏，几欲酣眠。
In a daze, you feel all your troubles melt away. Your soul's breath undulates with each hum of the song under this cold, artificial light. You almost fall asleep.
做梦人的梦中你看见薄暮下的高耸穹顶、微风中的莽苍旷野、荒漠上的广袤夜空……
Inside the dreamer's dream, you spy a towering dome in the twilight, a zephyr fluttering through the great wilderness, the vastness of the night sky as it spans the wastelands...
一曲终了，而短暂的静默后旋律再次响起，就像那一串串相互属连的梦永远不会有尽头。
The song finishes. Then, the melody rings out again after a brief interlude — just like the neverending string of interconnected dreams.
你拨弄按钮，试图驾驶这艘船，但屏幕上出现的图标比你手机里安装的虚拟应用还多——你感到眼花缭乱，开始暗自考虑是否要自掏腰包为设备更新迭代。

You fiddle with the button in an attempt to steer this ship, but more icons are showing up on the screen than the number of virtual apps installed on your phone. You start to feel dizzy and silently consider if you want to open your own wallet to update this device.
你注意到一个标有「隐形模式」的开关，随即试探性地按了下去，屏幕上的控制界面瞬间隐藏了起来——名副其实，可这又有什么用呢？你无法理解它的设计初衷。

You notice a switch labeled "Stealth Mode," and you experimentally press down on it — the control panel on the screen is instantly hidden. It certainly lives up to its functional name, but what's the point of it? You cannot fathom the reason for its design.
显像管设备让你幻视了某个熟悉的舰桥，你幻想自己坐在控制室的椅子上，把逻辑推在一边，只管跟着感觉驾驶下去。

The cathode ray tube TV monitor makes you hallucinate a certain familiar bridge. You imagine that you are sitting in the control room's chair, shoving all logic aside, and flying the ship based on your instinct and nothing else.
复古的金属舵轮屹立于此，旁边贴着一张纸条：「真正的船长需要的不是舵轮，而是天空的呼唤。」
The rustic metal ship's helm is right here, with a note stuck on it: "Real captains need no wheels but the call of the sky."
你握住舵轮，它的手感比你预想的还要顺滑，可惜自动驾驶程序正按照既定线路航行，令你突如其来的手感无处发挥。

You grasp the wheel, its texture even smoother than you imagined. It's a pity the navigation program is traveling on its pre-determined route, preventing you from wielding the sudden rise of your navigational spirit to its fullest.
舵轮中间的构建似乎是通讯装置，你好奇是否有船员在此声情并茂地朗诵过：「噢！船长！我的船长！」之类的诗句。
The construct in the middle of the wheel appears to be a comms device. You wonder if there have been crew members who had the urge to open with: "O captain! My captain!" or some such verse.
瞭望镜在这里似乎有些多余，身在高空时还需要仰望星空吗？你不解，你决定——
The telescope over here feels a bit redundant: Is there even a need to gaze upon the sky when you are surrounded by it? You don't understand, so you decide to...
瞭望镜视野里的景色是如此开阔，以至于令你生出某种错觉——在云端漂浮太久，就会成为物理意义上的「高高在上的人」，这或许并不是好事。

The scenery through the telescope is vast, so vast that it evokes some delusions in you — floating among the clouds for too long would physically make one "in the clouds," which isn't necessarily a good thing.
看得太久，你觉得有些头晕目眩，或许该换个角度？你决定——
You feel somewhat dizzy after staring into the lens for too long. Perhaps you should change an angle? You decide to...
在摆弄片刻后，瞭望镜的镜头对准物体自动缩放——
After fiddling with it for a moment, the telescope's lens is aimed at an object and auto-zooms...
从这个视角看，一切都被缩小了，就连匹诺康尼十二时分内的一切建筑都像是棋子，令你心神激荡。
Everything looks so small from this angle. Even the buildings on Penacony's Twelve Hours look like chess pieces — this view gets your senses all abuzz for some reason.
瞭望镜的镜头在不断缩放后，焦距达到极限，你这才意识到这艘飞艇之大，远超你的想象。
It is when the telescopic lens keeps zooming in and out, and its focal length is at its maximum, that you realize the enormity of this ship far exceeds your imagination.
你看到飞艇机翼上的涂装，那是你「{NICKNAME}严选」的成果，即使在高空中，它也如此突出，如此帅气，就像飞艇的现任船长一样……

You see the paint on the ship's wings: It's the result of "{NICKNAME}'s stringent selection." Even when soaring through the sky, it is still that vibrant and sleek — just like the ship's current captain...
My eyes are tired. I'm done looking.
你见过太多奇景，这里的景色也没什么特殊的地方，你有些乏了，不愿多看。
You've seen plenty of breathtaking views, and this one here isn't anything special. You're bored of it and don't wish to admire it any further.
瞭望镜在这里似乎有些多余，身在高空时还需要仰望星空吗？你不解，你决定——
The telescope over here feels a bit redundant: Is there even a need to gaze upon the sky when you are surrounded by it? You don't understand, so you decide to...
瞭望镜视野里的景色是如此开阔，以至于令你生出某种错觉——在云端漂浮太久，就会成为物理意义上的「高高在上的人」，这或许并不是好事。

The scenery through the telescope is vast, so vast that it evokes some delusions in you — floating among the clouds for too long would physically make one "in the clouds," which isn't necessarily a good thing.
看得太久，你觉得有些头晕目眩，或许该换个角度？还是干脆别看了？你决定——
After admiring it for too long, you start feeling dizzy. Maybe a change of angle? Or just stop looking altogether? You decide to...
在摆弄片刻后，瞭望镜的镜头对准物体自动缩放——
After fiddling with it for a moment, the telescope's lens is aimed at an object and auto-zooms...
从这个视角看，一切都被缩小了，就连匹诺康尼十二时分内的一切建筑都像是棋子，令你心神激荡。
Everything looks so small from this angle. Even the buildings on Penacony's Twelve Hours look like chess pieces — this view gets your senses all abuzz for some reason.
瞭望镜的镜头在不断缩放后，焦距达到极限。
The telescopic lens' focal length reaches its maximum after continuously zooming in and out.
你眯起眼，看见飞艇的尾翼，你忽然意识到它在高空中是如此抢眼。只可惜，上面什么也没有。这地方能涂点什么上去吗？或许有船员会知晓这一切……

You squint and look at the ship's empennage, suddenly realizing that it is truly eye-catching, even high up in the sky. It's a pity that it's a plain design. Can you paint something on it? A crew member might know about this...
My eyes are tired. I'm done looking.
你见过太多奇景，这里的景色也没什么特殊的地方，你有些乏了，不愿多看。
You've seen plenty of breathtaking views, and this one here isn't anything special. You're bored of it and don't wish to admire it any further.
你憋着一口气，隔空发力，尝试着一次性批量打开所有抽屉，然而它们不为所动。
You hold your breath and try to telekinetically open all the drawers at once, but they remain closed.
无法打开的抽屉，这可能是某种测试，你抛下球棒摩拳擦掌决定一试——在你用尽力气打开后，才发现它们只是锈住了。

The unopenable drawers could be a test. You drop your baseball bat and rub your palms together to give it an honest go — it is only after you expend your entire strength opening them that you notice they are just rusted.
你拨弄抽屉的锁扣，有声音在你耳畔响起：「这里没有你要找的金色垃圾。」奇怪，它是怎么知道你心里所想的？
You pull at the drawers' locks, and a voice rings in your ears: "There is no golden trash that you seek here." Strange, how does it know what you're thinking?
在某些特别的时刻，家族的服务员会趁着上菜的机会，在环形餐桌的圆心处突然登场，为宾客表演才艺。
During certain special moments, as The Family's servers serve food, they will take the opportunity to make surprise appearances in the center of the ring of dining tables to perform for guests.
巨大的环形餐桌，特意保留圆角处的缺口，或许是为了防止名为「圆桌骑士」的奇怪食客大闹晚宴。
The giant ring-shaped head table has a segment carved out of it, perhaps to prevent strange customers named the Knights of the Round Table from making a fuss at the banquet.
为家族贵客备下的华丽晚宴，你试图随便找个位置坐下时，家族侍从提醒你：「尊敬的船长，您该坐在主位上。」
A magnificent banquet prepared for honored Family guests. When you try to find a random seat, a Family attendant reminds you: "Honored Captain, you should be seated at the main seat."
据时不愿透露姓名的调饮师透露：「我是弹贝斯的，玩不来这种古典玩意。」他因而从演奏家愤然转职。
According to a drinksmith who wishes to remain anonymous: "I play bass. I can't play such classical pieces." It is for this reason that, in a fit of anger, he switched his job as a musician.
它坚称自己是知名电影《空中钢琴师》的主角，只是因为没有后台而被导演换角。如今，它沉默地拒绝一切表演，等待着愿意为它争取克劳克影业头部合约的经纪人出现。

It stubbornly proclaims itself to be the protagonist of the famous movie Airborne Pianist, and its role was changed by the director because of its lack of backing. Now, it silently refuses all performances as a form of protest, waiting for an agent who would help it clinch a top Clock Studios contract.
昂贵的钢琴，定期有家族调音师前来调律，音色极美，但大部分宾客把它视为社交时的白噪音。
Family tuners fix up the expensive piano regularly. Its sound is exquisite, but most of the guests treat it as white noise while they schmooze.
墙上的喇叭有些异样，你伸手取下，竟发现它原是保险箱的伪装，你很想知道这究竟是哪任船长所为。
The horn on the wall looks somewhat off. You take it down and notice it's a front for a safe box. You really want to know which captain did this.
你取下墙上的喇叭，隐藏的保险柜旋即展现于眼前。你失望地发现里面空空荡荡，看来是上一任船长撤离时做了充足的准备。

You take down the horn from the wall, and the hidden safe box appears before your eyes. You disappointingly discover that it's empty inside — looks like the previous captain made the utmost preparations before leaving.
神秘的喇叭，在过去的某个时刻，也许奏响过——等等，这喇叭是坏的。你这才发现它只是此间隐藏保险柜的表面伪装。
The mysterious horn was probably played at some point in the past — hold on, the horn is broken. Only then do you notice that it's just a guise to conceal the safe box.
陈列架上为你留有不少空位，但你除了高尚的品德之外一无所有——但那东西太沉重了，恐怕会把架子压垮。
There is plenty of empty space left for you on the shelf, but you have no possessions beyond your noble morality — a thing that's so heavy that it would probably collapse the shelf.
你决心加大开拓力度，用三月七拍下的旅途风景图填满书架的空白。
You are determined to fire up your Trailblaze Power, to fill up the shelf with all those photos that March 7th took on your voyages.
书架上摆了历任船长收藏的书，你猜测丹恒或许会对它们感兴趣。
The bookshelf is slotted with books collected by previous captains. You infer that Dan Heng might be interested in them.
你自诩在公司也有些人脉，还曾和知名主持人叽米合作过，不知把面前的雕像替换成它的模样，能否向它收取广告费。

You think of yourself as having some connections in the IPC, and even have worked closely with the famous host, Owlbert. You wonder if replacing the statue before you with its visage allows you to claim an advertising fee from the bird.
某种鸟类的雕像，你依稀记得这似乎是隐夜鸫家系的象征之一。
The statue of a certain bird. You still vaguely remember that it is one of the symbols of the Nightingale Family.
「隐夜鸫将修复一切。」雕像底座刻着这样一行字。
"The Nightingale will fix everything." That is what is written at the base of the statue.
餐厅以现场烹制「鸟巢炒蛋」的表演为噱头，以此证明餐品不是预制菜——哪怕是在梦境中，类似的声明也是极为必要的。
The restaurant's marketing gimmick is cooking "fried nested eggs" on the spot to prove that their dishes aren't prepared beforehand. Even in the Dreamscape, such repute must be kept intact.
飞碟堡，匹诺康尼颇负盛名的美食之一。在你成为船长后，它会每年向你缴纳广告费吗？你很好奇……
The Floatdisc Burger, is one of the more popular dishes in Penaconian cuisine. After you become captain, will it pay you annual advertising dues? Most curious...
钟表披萨，钟表小子都爱吃的聚会美食。在你成为船长后，它会每年向你缴纳广告费吗？你很好奇……
Clockie Pizza is party food that even Clockie likes to eat. After you become the captain, will it pay you annual advertising dues? Most curious...
看在钟表小子的面子上，或许该给广告费打个八折，你在心中默默定下这一切。
You consider a discounted advertising fee on account of Clockie — that's what's going through your mind.
这种沙发的材质相当有趣，当承受外力时会自动向下倾斜，何不一试呢？
This couch's material is rather interesting. It will incline by itself when an external force is pushing against it. Why not give it a try?
每当贵宾们需要放松时，就会在这个环形的怀抱中寻找灵感，就像现在你那样。
When guests need to relax, they will seek inspiration in this circular embrace, just as you are right now.
沙发的每一处都如此舒适，但你知道，住客们的选择往往归于哪个位置离电源插座更近。
Every inch of the sofa is truly comfortable, but you know that lodgers typically choose whichever spot is nearer to the power outlets.
桌上散落着几本折纸书，这可能是匹诺康尼某个未竟的秘密工程，又或是一位忙碌的筑梦师随手丢下的草稿。
A few origami books are scattered across the desk. This could be one of Penacony's unfinished secret projects, or a draft casually left behind by a busy Dreamweaver.
包装完好的折纸书，在匹诺康尼的某些商店上可以卖出高价——可惜你凝神望去，它们都不是限量与联名款。
An origami book is still in its package. It can be sold for a high price in certain Penacony shops — It's a pity that, when you scrutinize them, none are limited or collaboration editions.
望着眼前凌乱的一桌用具，你感慨万千——满满都是成年人的煎熬。
Gazing at the stationery strewn across the table before you, you are hit by a profound sense of emotion — these all represent the hardships of adults.
色彩斑斓的包装纸在微光下是如此诱人，你试图解开它们的内里——只可惜赠送者似乎忘记附上大名。
The colorful packaging paper shimmers mesmerizingly beneath the faint light. You attempt to unwrap their contents — it's unfortunate that the sender did not leave their name.
你无法克制打开它们的欲望，随手拿起一盒礼物便开始探索，可惜里面既没有闪光的石头，也没有任何你感兴趣的东西。
You cannot push down the desire to unwrap them, and randomly pick up a box of presents to begin your exploration. Alas, there are no shimmering stones inside, nor anything that piques your interest.
精心准备的礼物摆放于此，它们所传递的情感价值远比礼物本身更加宝贵。
Carefully prepared presents sit here, with the value of the emotions they deliver being much dearer than the objects themselves.
球形救生艇，看上去和气泡弹珠机的发射方式极为相似——倒也合理，逃生本来就是极限运动。
An orb-shaped lifeboat. Its method of launch looks similar to a bubble pinball machine — that makes sense, since fleeing for your life is a kind of extreme sport unto itself.
悬挂在船身的球形救生艇，希望你没有用上它的时候。
An orb-shaped lifeboat strapped to the side of the ship. You hope you never have to use it.
救生艇牢固地悬挂在船身上，无论沿途风景多么壮丽，安全才是旅行的第一要义。
The lifeboat is firmly secured to the ship. No matter how splendid the view during the journey is, safety is always first on a voyage.
你伫立在船头，眺望着远方，你能感受到风的流动，想象着自己在云层间自由飞翔…直到狂风吹乱了你灰色的发丝，幻想戛然而止。

You stand motionless at the ship's bow, gazing toward the distance, feeling the flow of wind, and imagine yourself soaring freely through the covers of clouds... until a fierce billow messes up your gray hair, snapping you out of your daydream.
你想起了某部匹诺康尼的经典爱情片，有位心灵相通的同伴站在你身旁，向你许下「你跳，我也跳」的誓言。
You recall a classic Penaconian romance film, where a kindred companion is standing beside you, promising you that if "you jump, I'll jump too."
在这里跳下去会落到知更鸟小姐与星期日先生的面前吗？你想起初次入梦时，摔落至「黄金的时刻」的经历，不禁哑然失笑……

Will jumping off the edge plop you right in front of Miss Robin and Mr. Sunday? You recall the first time you dived into the dream and how you plummeted into the Golden Hour. You can't help but smile...
你注意到梦泡上竟站着一只扑满，它朝你点了点头，似是致意，你很感动——原来你并不孤独，世界上竟然有这么多理解你的生物存在。

You notice a trotter standing atop the dream bubble. It nods its head at you, as if greeting you. You are moved — you aren't truly alone, for the world still has so many creatures that understand you.
每个扑满似乎都有自己的个性与故事，你可以想象眼前这只四处游荡，最终来到匹诺康尼，成为飞艇上的吉祥物的传奇故事。

It's as if each trotter has its own personality and story. You fantasize about a legendary tale of this trotter before you, how it roamed the worlds and eventually ended up on Penacony, becoming the mascot of this flying ship.
这些扑满似乎在泳池里开了一场派对，为旁观者带来好运。
These trotters appear to be throwing a party by the pool, bequeathing luck upon their spectators.
你听见一阵拍打翅膀的震颤声。
You hear the sounds of wings flapping.
是你在喊我吗？那个…你认识我？
Are you calling for me? Umm... Do you know me?
高空飞行还是要注意安全…
累了的话我会飞过来休息的，谢谢你的关心啾。
I'll fly over to rest when I'm tired. Thanks for your concern, tweet~
…啊，原来是我听错了啾，你是在唱歌吗？我还以为是我的同伴在喊我……
...Ahh, it turns out I was mistaken, tweet~ Are you singing? I thought that it was my companions calling for me...
…那个，没什么事的话我先走了啾，啾、啾…那个，请不要再跟我搭话了，我、我不知道该说什么…我、我该回去了，再见啾！
...Then, if there's nothing else, I'll be off, tweet, tweet tweet... Umm, you don't have to keep talking to me... I—I don't know what to say... I—I should be heading back. Goodbye, tweet!
平滑的球体，表面有蓝白色的烟雾在浮动，像是此起彼伏的海浪，又像是流动的云团。
A smooth sphere with white and blue smoke floating around it. The smoke both resembles rising and falling waves and flowing clouds.
在你的双手触及时，「身份已识别，正在为您加载。」一道冰冷的电子音从球体中传来，这究竟是个什么玩意，你感到好奇。
As your hands come into contact with it, you hear a cold electric voice, "Identity confirmed. Loading data." What exactly is this? You can't help but wonder.
「监控设备状态连接正常，是否启动『探查模式』？」声音在你耳畔回响，你决定——
"Connection status to surveillance device normal. Activate Exploration Mode?" The voice echoes in your ears, and you decide to—
球体表面淡蓝色的灯光开始闪烁，你感觉眼前的一切开始扭曲，你感到头晕目眩，但好在几秒之后你就适应了这一切。

The faint blue glow on the surface of the sphere flickers, and you feel everything before your eyes becoming distorted. You are overcome by a wave of dizziness, but manage to adapt and recover after several seconds.
在你眼前展现出来得是无边的天空，巨大的浮空艇悬于云层之上，下面的云团如潮水般涌动。
The boundless sky appears before your eyes, the massive airship hovering above the clouds. Looking below, you see the clouds surging like tidal waves.
你这才意识到这似乎是某种虚拟现实的功能，透过监控设备，令使用者犹如亲临于高空之上。
You suddenly realize that this seems to be some sort of virtual reality function that allows the user to feel as though they are really high up in the sky through the surveillance device.
你注意到浮空艇原来在不断前进，透过云层，露出的城市景象犹如某种画作，笔触模糊，带着些许朦胧感却引人深思。

You notice that the airship is actually constantly moving forward. Past the clouds, you can see the vague outline of a city, as though painted with indistinct brushstrokes, its blurriness thought-provoking.
在你的控制下，摄像头缓缓转动，这一次，隐藏在云层之外的城市映入你的眼帘。
Under your control, the camera rotates slowly. This time, the city hidden beyond the clouds is revealed before your eyes.
监控镜头缩放到极限，你好像看到了某些高耸入云建筑，前方是「黄金的时刻」吗？你无法辨认出那儿究竟是哪里。
Zooming in as far as you can, you seem to be able to make out a few towering buildings. Is that the Golden Hour? You cannot tell for sure what the place ahead is.
你静静地观察着这一切，恍惚之间，你几乎生出一种自己是观察者的疏离感。
You silently observe everything. In a daze, a sense of detachment from being an observer nearly takes over you.
安全起见，还是别乱按了。
To be safe, it's better to not randomly press any more buttons.
你无法确定这个设备是否运转正常，基于人身安全考虑，你决定还是别乱按为好。
You're not certain whether the device is operating normally so for safety reasons, you decide not to randomly press the buttons.
在冒险旅途中手太痒的人多半没什么好下场，你在某些故事里听说过类似的故事。
While adventuring, curiosity often kills the cat. You've heard many such stories before.
「『探查模式』已结束。」设备提示音响起，将你的视线拉回到眼前的球体上。
"Exploration Mode has ended." The notification sound of the device pulls your vision back to the sphere in front of you.
你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，他将你拎出泳池。
While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor, who pulls you out of the swimming pool.
泳池是游泳的地方，不是用来跑步的，您的行为已经严重干扰到别的客人了！
A swimming pool is a place meant for swimming, it's not a place for running around. Your behavior has already severely affected the other guests!
Sorry, I'll be mindful in the future.
嗯嗯，谢谢您的理解，以后请不要再犯了。
Okay, thank you for your understanding. Please don't do it again next time.
Do you have to be so fierce?
为了大家的人身安全着想，请不要再乱来了！没看到旁边很多小孩在走动吗？我要是不严抓，以后还不知道会出什么事呢！

For the safety of all the guests, please stop acting recklessly! Don't you see that there are many children walking around? If I don't clamp down on this, who knows if anything untoward will happen in the future!
可别再乱跑了！不然我就将你拉入泳池黑名单！
Don't let me catch you running around again! Otherwise, I'll blacklist you from the swimming pool!
你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，但碍于你的身份，他只得劝说你离开。
While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor but due to your identity, he can only try to persuade you to leave.
船长…那个，请您注意！您在泳池边这样跑…影响不太好！
Captain... Umm, please be careful! It's not a good look... to run around the swimming pool like this!
Sorry, I'll be mindful in the future.
哎呀，船长，您太客气了！泳池打滑，您走起来比较急也是情理之中。我也只是为您的人身安全考虑，打扰了！
Ahh, captain, you're too kind! The floor around the swimming pool is slippery, so it's understandable that you're walking quicker than usual. I'm only worried about your personal safety. Sorry!
You don't have to be so fierce!
很抱歉，方才跟您说话口气太重了点，我在此向船长您诚挚地致歉，希望您别往心里去。
My apologies! I was a bit too rude when speaking to you just now. I sincerely apologize for my mistake. I hope that you don't take it to heart.
我也是没办法…您看，泳池边小孩子挺多的，我们监管起来也有难处…感谢您的配合！
But I have no choice as well... As you can see, there are so many children at the pool, so it's difficult for us to supervise as well... We really thank you for your cooperation!
I really want to meet the captain in person!
…奇怪，这雕像是什么时候摆的，昨天路过的时候这里好像还是空的。
...That's strange, when was this statue placed? I remember this place being empty when I passed by yesterday.
你懂什么，这是船长的雕像，估计最近是刚摆上去的。
What do you know. That's the statue of the captain. It's probably something that was put up recently.
居然这么年轻，看这五官，感觉长得肯定很好看。真想亲眼见见船长…要是能合照签名就好啦……

{F#She's}{M#He's} actually so young? Looking at {F#her}{M#his} features, {F#she}{M#he} must be very good-looking. I really want to meet the captain in person... If only I can take a photo with {F#her}{M#him} and get {F#her}{M#his} autograph...
Sure, where do you want me to sign?
签在我手机壳上！等等…还是先合照吧，我马上发给我朋友看，嘻嘻。
Sign on my phone case! Wait... Let's take a photo together first so I can show it off to my friends, hehehe!
你说得我都有点不好意思了…
You're making me feel a little embarrassed...
居然是活的船长！快快快，帮我跟{F#她}{M#他}拍个合照。船长，我可以跟你握个手吗？
It's the captain! Quick, quick, help me to take a photo with {F#her}{M#him}. Captain, can I shake your hand?
谢谢船长！没想到您的雕像看着威严，本人居然这么和善，还是个可爱的小年轻，难以置信！
Thank you, captain! Seeing how majestic your statue looked, I didn't expect you to be so friendly. It's completely unbelievable to me that you're such a cute youngster!
咳咳咳，我朋友不太会说话请见谅。船长请您见谅！
*cough cough* My friend doesn't really think before she speaks, please don't take it to heart!
抱歉，是我太激动啦，正巧之前买了点特产……
I'm sorry, I was too excited. Here are some specialties that I bought previously...
船长您就收下吧，叨扰您这么久，就当是我们的一点心意！
Just take it, captain. It's just a little token of appreciation for bothering you for so long!
Oh... So that's what the captain is like!
此处人来人往，不时有人盯着你的雕像看得出神。你观察着住客们的表现，住客们也发现了你。

There are people coming and going all the time. Occasionally, some of them become lost in thought as they stare at your statue. As you observe the behavior of the guests, the guests start to notice you as well.
在人群爆发出某种激动的喧哗声后，你被热情的住客包围了！
As a loud commotion erupts among the crowd, you are surrounded by a bunch of enthusiastic guests!
「可以合照吗？」你听见有人发出这种请求，刚刚应下，又有人掏出纸笔找你签名，耳畔还有和你握手的请求在不断重复。

"Can I take a photo with you?" You hear someone request. As you agree, another person takes out a pen and paper to ask for your autograph. There's also a constant barrage of requests from people to shake your hands.
饶是见惯大场面的银河球棒侠，此情此景也有些应接不暇——因为合照微笑次数过多，嘴角开始抽搐；而握惯球棒的手龙飞凤舞地捏起笔，竟隐隐有些发抖。

Despite being the Galactic Baseballer who's used to all sorts of grand occasions, the current situation leaves you feeling a little overwhelmed — as the corner of your mouth starts to twitch from smiling for too many photos. Even your hand, honed of muscle and skill from swinging your bat, has started to tremble faintly.
在一一应付过去之后，你只觉得疲惫，准备深藏功与名赶紧抽身离开。
After dealing with all the requests, you are left with a sense of exhaustion. You prepare to hide your achievements and fame as you try to leave as quickly as possible.
但你忽然意识到了有哪里不对，你下意识地摸了摸口袋，小脸顿时涨得通红——
However, you suddenly notice that something is amiss. You subconsciously touch your pocket, and a flush instantly blossoms across your face.
到底是谁在你口袋里塞了礼物…还有…这是…小费？！
Just who was it that stuffed the present into your pocket... And... is this... a tip!?
在你完成了船长职位的交接手续后，你总算获得了这间船长室的实际控制权。
After completing the handover procedure for the captain's position, you finally obtain actual control over the Captain's Quarters.
或许是某种新人到岗的热情，又或许是他们对这份职业的高度自律，在你任命完大副后，大副立刻向你提交了一份简略的工作报告。

Perhaps due to their enthusiasm to welcome a newcomer to the post, or the high level of professionalism they have for their work, immediately after you appointed the first mate, he submits a brief work report to you.
报告中提到，船长周边正在火热预售中，税后分成已在存入你的保险柜中。
The report mentions that the pre-sale for the captain's merchandise is currently ongoing and the profits after tax deduction have already been deposited into your safe.
会是这里吗？这个以喇叭墙饰为遮掩的玩意儿——你打开看了看
Could this be it? This thing that's hidden by the wall decoration of a horn — you open it to take a look.
看来这就是今天的分成了。
It seems like this is the profits for today.
你试图在里面找到些值钱玩意儿，但很可惜，本阶段预售已结束，保险柜里什么也没有。
You try to look for something valuable inside but unfortunately, since the pre-sale period for this phase has ended, there's nothing left inside the safe.
你细致地审视这幅半身像，发现雕塑家精心捕捉了你的每一个细节，就连头发丝都透露出领导者的睿智。
You scrutinize the bust and realize that the sculptor has meticulously captured every detail of you — even the strands of hair reveal the wisdom of a leader.
你的雕像被放置在长廊的中心位置，仿佛是船上的守护神，默默注视着过往的船员和客人，传递着一种无形的力量。
Your statue is placed at the central location of the long gallery, like a guardian of the ship, silently watching over the passing crew and guests, radiating an unseen strength.
或许随着时间的流逝，这尊雕像会成船上的一个话题，进而演化成乃至一个传说。你不敢想象你在传说中会有怎样荒腔走板的事迹。
Perhaps, as time passes, this statue will become a topic of banter on the ship, eventually evolving into a fable. You dare not even imagine how absurd your story will end up in these tales.
你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，他将你拎出泳池，你为他惊人的臂力咋舌。
While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor, who pulls you out of the swimming pool. You're amazed by the strength of his arm.
泳池是游泳的地方，不是用来跑步的！
A swimming pool is a place meant for swimming, it's not a place for running around!
你是住客别人也是住客，多少也要考虑下别人的安危，没看到旁边还有小孩吗？
You're a guest, but so is everyone else. You should still give a thought to the safety of others. Can't you see that there are children around here?
看你面生，念你初犯这次就放过你，下次可别再乱跑了！
Since you don't look familiar, I'll let you off this time, considering it's your first offense. Don't let me catch you running around again!
一道金光烧毁了泰坦悬置于此的心脏，眼前的一幕，正是遗留下来的「犯罪」现场。
A flash of golden light incinerated the heart that the Titan had left here. What lay before me was the scene of this "crime."
还记得与那刻夏熔为一炉的「理性」之泰坦，曾亲手洞穿过一位黑袍剑士的胸膛。如此相似的方式……
Remember the Titan of "Reason" that fused with Anaxa, who once pierced through the chest of a black-robed swordmaster in such a similar way...
不，你认识的剑士才不是这么记仇的家伙。这一定是某种巧合…大概。
No, the swordmaster you know isn't the type to hold grudges like this. This must be some kind of coincidence... probably.
其实，不知从何时起，烧毁树心的想法犹如定做的礼服，穿在你身上特别合体，仿佛你一生下来就立志要干这件事——下次干坏事要趁早。

Actually, at some point, the idea of burning the tree core became like a tailor-made suit that fits you perfectly. It's as if you were born destined to do this. Next time you want to cause trouble, better do it early.
你久久地望着那道创口，仿佛置身于炙热的阳炎照亮树庭的一刹那，似乎还有一声呐喊：「我焚烧一切，只为净化这虚伪的黄金！」

You gaze at the wound for what feels like an eternity, as if caught in that moment when scorching sunlight illuminated the Grove. And there was seemingly a bellow: "I shall incinerate everything, all to purify this False Chrysos!"
回过神来，眼前只有数道白雾般弥散的光束——没错，是传说中的达利原效应。
When I came to my senses, all I saw were several beams of light dispersing like white mist. Yes, it was the legendary Dall Effect.
你是不是以为我在胡说八道？很遗憾，在翁法罗斯发现「光线通过胶体的散射现象」的树庭学者，就叫达利原。
You think I'm talking nonsense? Well, hate to break it to you, but the Grove scholar who discovered "light scattering through colloids" in Amphoreus was literally named Dall.
站在矩阵的终点，一切明白如洗：十二泰坦符文包裹的符号，象征着十二道因子参与的无限循环。
Standing at the end of the matrix, everything becomes crystal clear: the symbols encased in the Twelve Titans' runes represent an infinite loop involving twelve factors.
这座无机质的冰冷矩阵，却是「爱」下定决心出发的地方。
This cold, inorganic matrix is where "love" made its resolute decision to depart.
你也会和过往结识的所有同伴一起，拥抱一个新的明天。这次，用上比以往更多的温柔、坚决和勇气吧！
Together with all your companions from the past, you'll embrace a new tomorrow. This time, with more tenderness, determination, and courage than ever before!
这片战场，是众泰坦与黑潮死斗的证明。
This battlefield stands as testament to the death struggle between the Titans and the black tide.
泰坦们浴血捍卫那柄刺向深渊的利剑，见证你们踏上征程。
The Titans fought tooth and nail to defend that sword pierced into the Abyss, bearing witness as you embark on your journey.
一个宁静、温柔的新世界，由一位泰坦编织而成的美梦。
A peaceful, gentle new world, a sweet dream woven by a Titan.
纵使无缘黎明，仍会将时光铭记——
Even if dawn remains out of reach, time shall still be etched in memory...
裂隙在虚空中闪烁，以不同振幅的波形流溢出寒意与热浪。
The fissure flickers in the void, spilling chills and heat in shifting waves of amplitude.
波形击打着立足处，仿佛某种——从不见底的深处，传来的心跳声。
The waves pulse against your footing, like a heartbeat climbing from lightless depths.
这里曾踞坐着残骸，他的手心仍残余着无数次挥舞侵晨时的麻木感，与漫天风沙一同破碎。
Here the corpse once sat hunched, his grip locked in numbness from countless swings of Dawnmaker, crumbling into the swirling wind and sand.
如今，镌刻于他记忆中的那份苦痛，已被同伴们的话语触碰，渐渐融解，消散…
Now, that agony etched into his memory seems to thaw, dissolved by the words of companions, melting away...
愿你收获宁静，最初的「卡厄斯兰那」。
May you find peace, the first Khaslana.
鲜艳的红晶，簇生成纷争之形——在某本不存在的字典中，它被称作「力量」，词源与「石榴」同根。
A crimson crystal blooms into the shape of strife. In a dictionary that doesn't actually exist, it's called "Strength," a word with the same root as "pomegranate" in the Kremnoan language.
提问：明明看上去这么锋利，还常常用在激烈的战斗中，它为什么不会伤及其创造者？答案：其实会的。
Question: If it looks so sharp and is often used in brutal battles, why doesn't it harm its creator? Answer: Actually, it does.
似乎连泰坦们也不得知晓，这扇被沙海掩埋的门径，原先究竟通向何处，但此时此刻，它并不重要。
Even the Titans may never have known where this sand-buried passage once led. But here and now, it no longer matters.
No need to look back. Just keep moving forward.
哟，看这满地的财宝。这下猫儿可开心了。
Whoa! Look at all this treasure lying around. Makes a kitty elated.
金币，金币，猫咪形状的金币，金币…扎格列斯的鬼脸？
Gold coins, gold coins, cat-shaped gold coins, gold coins... Zagreus's funny face?
宁静而典雅，还有数不尽的宝物…这正可谓是猫儿理想中的生活。想必被赠予这层幻境的人，也会因为猫儿的品味而感动不已吧！
Peaceful and elegant, overflowing with untold riches... This is the dream life. Whoever receives this fantasia will also be moved by my impeccable taste!
…等一下，那月亮怎么有点眼熟呢…该不会又是找蜗居公主「借」来的？
...Wait a sec, why does that moon look so familiar? Don't tell me it was "borrowed" from Princess Homebody again?
清新而婉转的悠扬，似乎有着与药草同等的疗愈之效。这也是那位好医生特别喜欢哼歌的原因。
A fresh and soft tune that seems to be as soothing as medicinal herbs. This is why that kind doctor loves to hum.
伤痕痊愈，却余有幻痛，医者便会轻抚琴弦，演奏蓝天。
Though wounds heal, phantom pain lingers still. The healer gently strums the strings, playing a melody of blue skies.
由可爱流线拼出的火箭设计图，只是这一次，它的结构多预留了十几个人的座位空间。
A rocket design traced in cute curves, but this time, with extra seating space reserved for a dozen more passengers.
石板与卷轴在一隅堆积成山，却未染上一丝灰尘。
Slates and scrolls are piled high in the corner, yet not a speck of dust can be found on them.
消亡与新生，它们本首尾相连，却从接续处延展出一片幽静花海。
Death and rebirth, though intertwined like head and tail, unfold into a tranquil sea of flowers at their meeting point.
安提灵的冷冽早已被温柔淡去，而花香依旧。
The chill of Antila has long since faded into gentleness, yet the fragrance of flowers still lingers.
盘上双方都几近陷入楚茨文格——即使是打发时间的嬉戏，泰坦们也是动了真格的。
Both participants on the board are nearly out of good moves. Even though it's just a casual game to pass the time, the Titans are taking it very seriously.
池中清流汩汩——这里不需要律法，也难承载欢宴，却能让候者暂歇。
The clear stream in the pond gurgles gently. This place needs no laws, nor can it host grand feasts, but it offers weary travelers a moment of respite.
「…一片——长满的香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！」
"An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernanas!"
"♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪"
「——吃完香蕉就睡觉，快快乐乐没烦恼……」
"Eat bananas, then nap away. Worry no more, be glad all day!"
停停停——别再盯着那玩意了，你已经出现幻觉啦！
Hold on, hold on — stop staring at that thing, you're seeing things already!
二维市最经典的拍照打卡点。在旅游旺季，这座桥上经常会站着一大群游客，因此桥梁的承重能力经过了精心设计。
The most iconic photo spot in Duomension City. During peak tourist season, this bridge is usually packed with crowds of visitors, so its load-bearing capacity has been carefully engineered.
大厦灯火通明，人群川流不息。有人说是二相乐园吸引了全银河的游客，也有人说是游客的愿力共同塑造了这里。

The towers blaze with light, crowds flowing endlessly through the streets. Some say Planarcadia draws tourists from across the cosmos, while others claim it's the collective Wishpower of those visitors that shaped this place into what it is.
二维市商业中心寸土寸金，以至于有人另辟蹊径住上天空。远离尘嚣，空气清新，除了外卖无法送达以外没有任何痛点。

Every square inch in Duomension City's downtown is gold. So, some clever souls have taken to the skies. Away from the hustle and bustle, fresh air all around, and the only catch is that food delivery can't reach you.
这是一张「魔法少女急袭剧团」的招聘广告。「魔法少女有她不容舍弃的矜持，那便是不将命运托付给他人，亲身迎战的意志。」
This is a recruitment ad for the "Magical Girl Troupe." "A magical girl has her own inviolable dignity, the resolve to face battles head-on, never entrusting her fate to others."
魔法少女正义的目光扫视整座城市，任何邪恶终将被绳之以法——「你的意志，守护世界。欢迎加入魔法少女急袭剧团。」
The magical girl's righteous gaze sweeps across the city, and all evil will inevitably be brought to justice. "Your will protects the world. Welcome to the Magical Girl Troupe."
这张海报非常引人注目，但很难说是否达到了宣传目的。民调显示，大部分人都以为这是一张关于「眼镜」的广告。
The poster is quite eye-catching, but it's hard to say whether it achieved its purpose. Polls show that most people thought it was an advertisement for "glasses."
「『狐图图』书店，销售同人志•魔导书•魔法禁书•禁断科技。」
"Foxfolio Bookstore: Selling fan comics, arcane tomes, forbidden magic tomes, and lost technology."
「渴求超越此世的知识？就来『狐图图』书店！接受绝版书籍的寄售委托！」
"Seeking knowledge beyond the mortal realm? Come to Foxfolio Bookstore! Now accepting out-of-print books for consignment!"
看标语就让人觉得很不妙的书店，海报上的粉毛狐狸更是透露出一股难以掩饰的狡猾气息。
A bookstore that feels suspicious just from its slogan, and that pink-haired fox on the poster absolutely oozes craftiness.
可能很多新时代的朋友不知道「电话亭」是什么，简而言之，就是功能比较单一且没法移动的公共手机…看在电话亭的面子上，不要问「它为什么还要存在」这种问题好吗？

Maybe a lot of you youngsters don't know what a "phone booth" is. Simply put, it's a public phone that can't move and doesn't do much else... For the phone booth's sake, let's not ask questions like "why does this still exist," alright?
叮铃铃～从电话亭里传来了电话铃声，是谁在给公共电话打电话啊？
Ring-a-ling-a-ling~ The phone is ringing from the phone booth. Who could be calling a payphone?
你走进电话亭，拿起听筒，准备弄清楚到底是谁在给路人打电话。
You step into the phone booth, pick up the receiver, ready to find out who's been making these mysterious calls to passersby.
Hey, it's me, I'm the phone booth.
你是电话亭，你打电话钓鱼啊？
You're the phone booth... making phishing calls?
你是电话亭，我是手机，幸会。
Hello phone booth, I'm a cell phone. Nice to meet ya.
我希望你不要再使用手机了，求求了。
Please, I'm begging you to stop using your cell phone.
你的手机可能知道的号码没我多，如果现在让您打电话，您会拨通谁的号码？
Your phone doesn't know nearly as many numbers as I do. If you were to make a call right now, whose number would you dial?
对不起，您拨打的电话是空号，请稍后也不要再播。
Sorry, the number you have dialed does not exist. Please don't try again later, either.
You're doing this on purpose, aren't you?
…没有查询到名叫「随机」的号主。
很不高兴没能为您服务，下次需要打电话的时候记得来找我。
Sorry I couldn't be of service. Next time you need to make a call, you know where to find me.
请放心，没有任何狙击手正在瞄准着本电话亭，我向你保证——我都是老古董了，打坏了他们赔不起。
Rest assured, there are no snipers aiming at this phone booth, I promise you. I'm such an old relic that they couldn't afford to break me.
对着电话筒，说一句「如果能…」，世界真的可以变成你期望的那样——如果真能这样就好了，可惜我不是来自某个口袋的神奇道具。
Speak into the receiver and say, "if only..." and the world will truly become what you wish it to be. If only it were that simple, but sadly I'm not some magical gadget from a certain pocket.
当你感到迷茫的时候，不妨听听电话亭说的话吧——
When you feel lost, try listening to what the phone booth has to say...
嘟——，嘟——（规律、短促，每秒一次。这意味对方正在通话或者线路忙……）
Beep, beep... (Regular, short beeps, once per second. This means the other party is on a call or the line is busy...)
嘟——，嘟——（规律、长间隔，约5秒一次。这意味着电话接通，等待对方接听。）
Beep... beep... (Regular, long intervals of about 5 seconds. This means the call has gone through and is waiting for other person to answer.)
嘟—，嘟—，嘟—…（连续、急促。这意味着空号、停机或者线路故障。）
Beep, beep, beep... (Continuous and rapid. This indicates an invalid number, a powered-off device, or a line failure.)
嘟嘟嘟嘟…（密集、连续不断。这意味对方挂断了电话。）
Beep-beep-beep-beep... (A dense, continuous series of beeps. This means the other party has hung up.)
有位大师说过「能和电话亭聊到现在，你做什么都会成功的」。所以，不用害怕迷茫，一起前进吧！
A wise master once said, "If you can chat with a phone booth for this long, you'll succeed at anything." So don't be afraid of feeling lost. Let's move forward together!
怀旧的8-bit游戏。也许技术会推陈出新，但快乐不会。那些最简单的游戏，总会跨越时间给人带来最纯质的快乐。
Nostalgic 8-bit games. Technology may evolve, but happiness remains the same. Those simplest games will always bring the purest joy, no matter how much time has passed.
现如今，大部分人已经不会再玩这些老游戏了。但「文化的永生」不意味着人们要永远玩这款游戏，而是说玩过这些老游戏的人们，选择去制作属于自己的新游戏。

Nowadays, most people don't play these old games anymore. But "cultural immortality" doesn't mean we have to play them forever. It means the people who once played these classics choose to create new games of their own.
怀旧的8-bit游戏。单纯、轻盈、不含任何教育意义的快乐。绝不是游戏最完美的形态，但一定是游戏最令人神往的形态。
Nostalgic 8-bit games. Pure, light-hearted fun with no lessons attached. Not the most perfect form of gaming, but certainly its most captivating.
扭一扭！转一转！拧一拧！{M#小哥哥}{F#小姐姐}，来玩玩扭蛋噻。
Twist it! Turn it! Give it a crank! Hey {M#buddy}{F#girl}, come try the capsule machine!
What good stuff can you get out of it?
你别看这么多扭蛋机，咱这里扭出来最多的就是乐子。
Don't let all these machines fool you. The thing you'll get the most around here is fun!
I'm kinda scared of capsule machines.
您放心，咱这扭蛋，拧不出珍贵的东西，对谁都一视同仁，只有乐子。
Don't worry. Our capsule machine treats everyone the same. You won't get anything valuable out of it, just pure fun!
Alright, here's hoping you get a good pull!
今天您可真见着了，我是这片区出货率最高的扭蛋机。有其他星球的扭蛋爱好者专门跑过来扭我。来吧，快来扭一扭～
You're in for a treat today! I'm the capsule machine with the highest drop rate in this area. Capsule machine fans from other planets come here just for me. Come on, give me a spin~
教您个提升运气的小诀窍，扭我之前先原地逆时针转一圈，再顺时针转两圈。来吧，快来扭一扭～
Here's a little trick to boost your luck: before you spin me, turn counterclockwise once, then clockwise twice. Come on, give me a spin~
What good stuff can you get out of it?
你别看这么多扭蛋机，咱这里扭出来最多的就是乐子。
Don't let all these machines fool you. The thing you'll get the most around here is fun!
I'm kinda scared of capsule machines.
您放心，咱这扭蛋，拧不出珍贵的东西，对谁都一视同仁，只有乐子。
Don't worry. Our capsule machine treats everyone the same. You won't get anything valuable out of it, just pure fun!
Alright, here's hoping you get a good pull!
这是从扭蛋机里扭出来的随机乐子，请您收好——
Here's a bit of random fun from the capsule machine, please keep it...
疾锋龙列车让医生躺在地板上，并在轨道上铺满新鲜的苹果，通过「苹果远离医生」的基础原理，实现了悬浮列车——就是有点费医生。

The Bullet Wyrm Express had doctors lie flat on the floor and covered the tracks with fresh apples. Using the basic principle of "an apple a day keeps the doctor away," they managed to create a levitating train. Though it was a bit rough on the doctors.
在二相乐园，<unbreak>18</unbreak>周岁以上的人群中约<unbreak>49.14%</unbreak>的人饱受痔疮折磨，可怕吗？是的，但更可怕的是，还有<unbreak>51.86%</unbreak>的人在享受痔疮。

In Planarcadia, about <unbreak>49.14%</unbreak> of people over <unbreak>18</unbreak> suffer from hemorrhoids. Sounds scary? Well, what's even scarier is that the other <unbreak>51.86%</unbreak> actually enjoy having them.
你注意到了吗？刚才有1%的人注意到<unbreak>49.14%</unbreak>、<unbreak>51.86%</unbreak>两个数字之和为<unbreak>101%</unbreak>。
Did you know? Only 1% of people notice that <unbreak>49.14%</unbreak> and <unbreak>51.86%</unbreak> add up to <unbreak>101%</unbreak>.
拖延症严重的反派才会说「明年今日，就是你的死期」。
"Your time will come... on this very day, next year!" ...is something only a villain with a serious procrastination problem would say.
一个人能为家乡做出的最大贡献就是——离开家乡。
The best thing you can do for your hometown... is to leave it.
生活小贴士——如果你在愿力银行的资金被冻结了，就请柜员帮你加热一下。
Life Hack: Should your funds at the Wishpower Bank ever get frozen, simply ask a teller to heat it up in the microwave for you.
生活小贴士——你知道吗？如果你每天喝三公斤的水，就可以远离人际关系的问题，因为你整天都会忙着去厕所，根本没有时间交朋友。
Life Hack: Chug three kilograms of water every day and watch your social problems disappear. You'll be too busy in the bathroom to have a social life.
如果你回望过去的人生，有过很多丢人的过往，那么我建议您不要从事导游的工作。
If your life is a series of embarrassing memories, you might want to avoid a job that involves revisiting the past. Like being a tour guide.
如果将你的年龄加上4，得出来的数字，就不是你的年龄。
Fun fact: If you take your age and add 4 to it, you get a number that isn't your age. Amazing, right?
亲，这边建议您立刻退出帝垣琼玉牌的圈子，让您的朋友失去一笔稳定的收入。
You should totally quit playing celestial jade right now. Think of all the money your friends will stop winning from you.
生活小贴士——在日常生活中遇到困难的算术，身边却没有计算器的时候，建议您对着天空讲一遍——毕竟，人算不如天算。
Life Hack: When you're stuck on a hard math problem with no calculator in sight, just say it out loud to the sky. Think of it as using the "universal" calculator.
爱一个人是藏不住的，但是爱两个人你可要藏好了。
You can't hide being in love with someone. But when it's two someones... you'd better learn how.
这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我是一个「笑话自动售货机」，你要买点什么笑话吗？
{M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, I'm a "Joke Vending Machine." Would you like to buy a joke?
对不起，笑话售罄了——作为一个「笑话自动售货机」，我的笑话已经售罄了。是不是很好笑？
Sorry, we're out of jokes. As a "Joke Vending Machine," I'm out of jokes. Pretty funny, right?
那告诉你一个悲伤的故事——作为一个「笑话自动售货机」，我的笑话已经售罄了。是不是很悲伤？
Then here's a sad one: As a "Joke Vending Machine," I'm out of jokes. Pretty sad, isn't it?
唉！看你的表情，我似乎没能让你满意。早知道毕业以后不来做「笑话自动售货机」了……
*sigh* Judging by that look on your face, I guess I didn't impress you. Should've known better than to become a "Joke Vending Machine" after graduation...
我同学成绩比我差，后来去当了「神秘文学自动售货机」，无论胡言乱语什么，顾客都很喜欢，特别受欢迎！只能说，选择比努力更加重要。

My classmate had worse grades than me, but then they became an "Enigmatic Literature Vending Machine." Customers loved whatever nonsense they spouted, and they got super popular! Just goes to show that picking the right path matters more than working hard.
和一般的自动售货机不同，没有人会来给我补货。如果笑话售罄，我就只能自己想办法构思。
Unlike regular vending machines, no one comes to restock me. When I run out of jokes, I have to figure out how to come up with new ones on my own.
越是焦虑就越想不出笑话，越想不出笑话就越是焦虑…唉，上班怎么这么难啊？
The more anxious I get, the harder it is to think of jokes, and the harder it is to think of jokes, the more anxious I get... Ugh, why is work so darn hard?
我学姐现在是「捧哏自动售货机」，只要负责在客人讲笑话时吐槽就好。真羡慕啊，我也想做这种不必自己想笑话的自动售货机。

My senior is now a "Punchline Partner Vending Machine." All she has to do is throw in a snappy comeback whenever customers tell a joke. I'm so jealous, I wish I could be a vending machine that don't have to write its own jokes.
幻月满盈期间超值折扣活动火热进行中喵！现在注册会员，可立刻享受会员服务喵！这位朋友，要不要注册会员？
The full Phantasmoon super sale is on now, meow! Sign up for a membership right now and enjoy immediate member services, meow! So, friend, wanna sign up?
咦？仔细一看，这不是{NICKNAME}喵？本店立刻赠送你终身会员资格喵！记得替我们宣传喵！
Hey, wait a second! If I'm not mistaken, you're {NICKNAME}, right? In that case, you'll get a lifetime membership on the house, meow! Don't forget to tell your friends about us, meow!
I'm loaded. I don't need a membership.
客人，可不能这么想喵！常言道「吃不穷、穿不穷，算计不到总受穷喵！」
That's only one way to look at it, meow! You know what they say, "Food and clothes won't make you broke, but a lack of foresight is no joke, meow!"
既然如此，本喵决定代表本店立刻赠送你终身会员资格喵！记得替我们宣传喵！
In that case, I've decided, on behalf of the store, to gift you a lifetime membership on the house, meow! Don't forget to tell your friends about us, meow!
所以会员资格到底有什么好处？
So what good is a membership, anyway?
基本没有喵！但我们可是二相乐园最高端的连锁便利店，成为我们的会员，可以算得上是身份的象征了喵！
Basically... none! But we're the most exclusive convenience store chain in Planarcadia, so becoming a member is a real status symbol, meow!
请收下这份小礼物喵～这可是会员专属福利！
Please accept this little present, meow! It's an exclusive bonus, just for members!
好像应该宣传一下《苍天航路绒绒号》与本店的联动商品喵…但即使不宣传，联动商品也会在顷刻间售罄，还是不费这个劲了喵！
I probably should be advertising our collab merch for Fluffy Across the Blue, meow... But they sell out in a flash even if I don't, so I'm not gonna waste my breath, meow!
听说仙舟联盟有个大佬特别喜欢大猫猫，也不知道我这样的大猫猫能不能有机会被他收养喵？我不想努力了喵！
I heard some bigwig in the Xianzhou Alliance absolutely adores big cats. Do you think a big cat like me has a shot at getting adopted, meow? I'm so over this whole "labor to survive" thing, meow!
我明明是个招财猫，却还是要自己努力赚钱喵…如果能只靠挥动前爪，就让无数愿力汇聚而来就好了喵！就像这样——来财喵！来财喵！

I'm a fortune cat, for crying out loud! And I still have to actually work to make money... It would be great if I could just wave my little paw and have endless Wishpower flow to me, meow! Like this: O money, come to me-ow!
小蓝小蓝，今天的天气怎么样？
Hey Bluey, how's the weather today?
天气怎么样你不会自己看吗？…哦对，你没有眼睛。
Can't you check the weather yourself? ...Oh right, you don't have eyes.
小蓝小蓝，你怎么不理睬我？
Hey Bluey, why are you ignoring me?
小绿和你说话，你怎么不理人家？…哦对，你没有嘴巴。
Green's talking to you, why are you ignoring them? ...Oh right, you don't have a mouth.
小红、小蓝！你们等下看我眼色行事！
Reddy, Bluey! Follow my non-verbal cues when the time comes!
小红你怎么了？你也没有嘴巴了吗？
What's wrong, Reddy? Did you lose your mouth too?
小红小红，我准备和小蓝作为脱口秀组合出道了！
Hey Reddy! I'm planning to make a stand-up duo debut with Bluey!
但是小蓝都不会说话，你们怎么讲脱口秀？
But Bluey doesn't even talk, how are you two supposed to do stand-up?
这个简单，我给你表演一下——小蓝，今天我们来试试「模仿大挑战」！来，请尝试模仿屎壳郎的叫声！
This is easy, let me give you a demonstration... Bluey, today we're gonna try the Imitation Challenge! Come on, try to imitate a dung beetle's call!
哇塞！学得也太像了吧！那再来模仿一下…唔…两个剑客在真空环境下搏斗的声音！
Wow! That's such a spot-on imitation! Now let's try imitating... hmm... the sound of two swordsmen dueling in a vacuum!
天啊，你学得也太像了！简直是身临其境啊！
Oh my gosh, you've got it down perfectly! It's like the real deal!
What's going on, is it an earthquake?
We got kicked out of our home.
So... this is the end for us...
Do you think she'll have a change of heart?
你醒醒吧，她根本就不喜欢你。
Wake up, she's never into you.
兄弟，我们伊磨吉是空心的。
Bro, we emotis are hollow inside.
老板雇你来看门的，不是让你来畅饮的。
The boss hired you to guard the door, not to knock back drinks.
反正一个客人都没有，我想怎么喝就怎么喝，吨吨吨……
There's not a single customer anyway, I can drink however I want! *glug glug glug*...
呜呜，我们的音乐太感人了，我自己都忍不住哭了。
*sniff sniff* Our music is so moving, I can't stop crying myself.
是挺赶人的，客人都被我们赶跑了。
Yeah, it's moving alright. We've moved every customer right out the door.
我不学了，我再也不学脑壳碎大石了。
I quit. I'm never going back to this "smashing boulder on skull" stuff again.
忍一忍，砸完这一摞砖你就出师了。
Just hang in there, once you finish smashing this pile of bricks, you'll officially graduate.
有没有一种可能，还没等到出师我就被砸死了。
Or maybe I'll get smashed to death before I graduate.
都过去好久了，那帮笨蛋怎么还没找到我。
It's been ages. How have those idiots still not found me?
不管了，我要继续藏下去，谁也别想赢我！
Whatever, I'll keep hiding! No one's gonna beat me at this!
每天要浇这么多花，好累哦。
Watering all these flowers every day is so exhausting.
要是我会云吟术就好了。
If only I knew cloudhymn magic.
你有考虑过我的感受吗？
Have you ever thought about how I feel?
刚才那只伊磨吉好怪啊。
That emoti just now was really weird.
我也看到了，它好像个汪星人啊！
I saw it too! It looked like a doggo!
Doc, are you done drawing blood yet?
快了快了，再抽一管就完事。
Almost there, just one more vial and we're done.
可我感觉身体越来越干瘪了。
But I feel like my body's getting more and more deflated.
那说明你的负面情绪排掉了啊。
That means you've gotten rid of your negative emotions.
两个伊磨吉在打台球…呃…不对，是在当台球。
Two emotis playing billiards... uh... no, they ARE the billiard balls.
怎么又是你先进洞啊！我不服气！
You got into the pocket first again!? I refuse to accept this!
你看，你平时吃得太少，不够圆，就没有我能滚！
See, you don't eat enough, and that's why you're not round enough to roll like I do!
哎呦喂…肚子好痛，感觉胃里有东西坏了，能帮我检查下么？
Ouch... My stomach hurts so bad. I think something's gone bad in there. Could you check it out for me?
太感谢了，你把柜门打开，看看里头有什么。
Thanks a bunch! Why don't you open that fridge door and see what's inside?
这包蔬菜放了得有二十年了，估计比你年纪还大，帮忙扔下吧。
This pack of vegetables must've been here for twenty years, probably older than you are. Help me throw it away.
这肉冻得比砖头还硬，硌得我胃疼，帮忙扔下吧。
This meat's frozen harder than a brick, and it's killing my stomach. Help me throw it away.
这是牛奶还是细菌培养皿啊，帮忙扔下吧。
Is this milk or a petri dish of bacteria? Help me throw it away.
谢谢你，现在感觉好多了，希望下次放东西的人能及时取走。
Thanks, I feel much better now. I hope whoever left their stuff here will come pick it up soon enough.
*sigh* I guess I'll just have to put up with it for now.
一起惨烈的交通事故，扁平化的伊磨吉躺在地上痛哭流涕，而围观者提供了除实际帮助以外的一切支持。
A horrific traffic accident, where a flattened emoti lay on the ground, sobbing uncontrollably, while onlookers offered everything except actual help.
作为一名热心市民，你是否愿意关心一下被压扁的小可怜？
As a concerned citizen, would you care to help this poor flattened fellow?
Join the crowd and check out what's going on.
不好意思，我以为压到减速带了。
Sorry, I thought I hit a speed bump.
呜呜呜，那是我挺拔的鼻梁骨，所以到底发生什么事了？
*sob* That was my proud nose bridge, so what on earth happened just now?
You've been outclassed by forces from a higher dimension.
那我立体的五官怎么办？！快让我回三次元的世界。
What about my three-dimensional features!? Quick, let me go back to the 3D world.
You got into a car accident.
那我英俊的脸是不是被刹车印毁了？！快扶我起来看看。
Is my handsome face ruined by the brake marks!? Quick, help me up so I can check.
别乱动，你现在比一张纸还脆。我后备箱有打气筒，先让你鼓起来再说。
Stay still, you're more fragile than a sheet of paper right now. I've got an air pump in my trunk. Let's get you inflated first.
两只伊磨吉正在玩帝垣琼玉，看他们的表情就知道谁赢谁输了。
Two emotis are playing Celestial Jade, and their expressions clearly show who's winning and who's losing.
*sob* That's not fair! Let's play another round!
你先把这局输的愿力交了。
Not until you hand over the Wishpower you lost this round first.
你好，我是神秘马桶商人。不知道，您是否对购入全新的马桶感兴趣呢？
Hello there, I'm the Mysterious Toilet Merchant. Say, would you be interested in purchasing a brand new toilet?
太好了，那么您可以来我这认养一只马桶。
Excellent! Then you can adopt a toilet from me.
我知道您对传统的购买方式不感兴趣，那么认养的方式如何呢？
I see. You're not interested in traditional purchasing methods, so how about adoption instead?
我知道您想问什么，您想问「为什么马桶也可以认养？」但是您环顾四周，这里的马桶都各怀本事…有马桶能认您做「{F#干妈}{M#干爹}」也不奇怪了！

——那当然是因为它有着成为究极马桶的潜力！
